package com.chenrise.device;
import com.chenrise.common.security.annotation.EnableCustomConfig;
import com.chenrise.common.security.annotation.EnableRyFeignClients;
import com.chenrise.common.swagger.annotation.EnableCustomSwagger2;
import com.chenrise.device.handler.NettyServerHandler;
import com.chenrise.device.pool.NettyClientPoolFactory;
import com.chenrise.device.service.NetworkCollectorService;
import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.slf4j.Logger;
import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;
import org.springframework.boot.CommandLineRunner;
import org.springframework.boot.SpringApplication;
import org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.SpringBootApplication;
import org.springframework.context.ConfigurableApplicationContext;
import javax.annotation.Resource;
import java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture;
@EnableCustomConfig
@EnableCustomSwagger2
@EnableRyFeignClients
@RequiredArgsConstructor
@Slf4j
@SpringBootApplication
public class ChenriseDeviceApplication implements CommandLineRunner {
    private static final Logger logger = LoggerFactory.getLogger(ChenriseDeviceApplication.class);
    private static volatile boolean running = true;
    private final NettyClientPoolFactory tcpClient;
    @Resource
    private NetworkCollectorService networkCollectorService;
    @Resource NettyServerHandler nettyServerHandler;
    //    static NAudioServerSDK audioServer = AudioService.getInstance();
//    NAudioServerSDK.COMMON_INSTANCE;
    public static void main(String[] args) throws InterruptedException {
        final ConfigurableApplicationContext ctx = SpringApplication.run(ChenriseDeviceApplication.class, args);
        //udp的相关服务的开启和关闭
        Runtime.getRuntime().addShutdownHook(new Thread() {
            public void run() {
                try {
                    ctx.stop();
                } catch (Throwable t) {
                    logger.error(t.getMessage(), t);
                } finally {
                    ctx.close();
                }
                synchronized (ChenriseDeviceApplication.class) {
                    running = false;
                    ChenriseDeviceApplication.class.notify();
                }
                logger.info("UDP server stopped");
            }
        });
        synchronized (ChenriseDeviceApplication.class) {
            while (running) {
                try {
                    logger.info("UDP server started");
                    ChenriseDeviceApplication.class.wait();
                } catch (InterruptedException e) {
                    logger.error(e.getMessage(), e);
                }
            }
        }
        SpringApplication.run(ChenriseDeviceApplication.class, args);
        System.out.println("(♥◠‿◠)ﾉﾞ  设备服务启动成功   ლ(´ڡ`ლ)ﾞ  \n" + "" +
                ",------.  ,------.,--.   ,--.,--. ,-----.,------. \n" +
                "|  .-.  \\ |  .---' \\  `.'  / |  |'  .--./|  .---' \n" +
                "|  |  \\  :|  `--,   \\     /  |  ||  |    |  `--,  \n" +
                "|  '--'  /|  `---.   \\   /   |  |'  '--'\\|  `---. \n" +
                "`-------' `------'    `-'    `--' `-----'`------' ");
    }
    @Override
    public void run(String... args) throws Exception {
//        CompletableFuture.runAsync(() -> {
//            openNetty();
//        });
//        CompletableFuture.runAsync(() -> {
//            openSpeaker();AudioController.java
//        });
        CompletableFuture.runAsync(() -> {
            try {
                networkCollectorService.openCjq();
            } catch (InterruptedException e) {
                throw new RuntimeException(e);
            }
        });
        CompletableFuture.runAsync(() -> {
            try {
                openTcp();
            } catch (InterruptedException e) {
                throw new RuntimeException(e);
            }
        });
    }
    protected void openTcp() throws InterruptedException {
        //tcp客户端启动
        tcpClient.init();
        System.err.println("tcp客户端启动------------------>>>>>>");
        Runtime.getRuntime().addShutdownHook(new Thread() {
            public void run() {
                try {
                    tcpClient.close();
                } catch (Throwable t) {
                } finally {
                }
                synchronized (ChenriseDeviceApplication.class) {
                    running = false;
                    ChenriseDeviceApplication.class.notify();
                }
                logger.info("Tcp server stopped");
            }
        });
    }
    protected void openSpeaker(){
        /* *//**
         * @Description:开启喇叭服务
         * @param args
         * @return: void
         * @Author: CJH
         * @Updator: CJH
         * @Date 2024/7/5 13:45
         *//*
        System.err.println("开启喇叭服务------------------>>>>>>");
        int retVal = 0;
        //启动音频服务
        //todo...注意改IP
        retVal = audioServer.na_server_start("192.168.1.10",8890);
        if(retVal == NAudioServerSDK.RET_START_CMDSERVER_FAIL){
            System.out.println("启动命令服务失败！");
            audioServer.na_server_stop();
            return ;
        }else if(retVal == NAudioServerSDK.RET_START_DATASERVER_FAIL){
            System.out.println("启动数据服务失败！");
            audioServer.na_server_stop();
            return;
        }
        //设置心跳超时时间，系统默认为6s
        audioServer.na_set_heartbeat_timeout(30);
        //设置回调函数
        audioServer.na_set_callback(onDeviceStatusCallBack,null);
        audioServer.na_set_async_callback(onAsyncFuncCallBack);
        audioServer.na_set_stream_callback(onStreamCallBack);
        audioServer.na_set_call_callback(onCallCallBack);
        audioServer.na_set_io_callback(onIOChangeCallBack);
        audioServer.na_set_dserial_callback(onSerialCallBack);
        //延时等待设备上线
        try {
            Thread.sleep(3000);
        } catch (InterruptedException e) {
            audioServer.na_server_stop();
            e.printStackTrace();
        }
        //设置广播的最大码率
        audioServer.na_set_max_bitrate(NAudioServerSDK.BR_128KBPS); //对实时播放、PCM推流有效
        System.out.println("启动喇叭服务完毕！！");
    }
    protected void openNetty(){
        *//**
         * 开启netty 服务
         * 空调使用
         *//*
        System.err.println("开启netty------------------>>>>>>");
        // 创建两个线程组bossGroup和workerGroup, 含有的子线程NioEventLoop的个数默认为cpu核数的两倍
        // bossGroup只是处理连接请求 ,真正的和客户端业务处理，会交给workerGroup完成
        EventLoopGroup bossGroup = new NioEventLoopGroup(1);
        EventLoopGroup workerGroup = new NioEventLoopGroup(8);
        try {
            // 创建服务器端的启动对象
            ServerBootstrap bootstrap = new ServerBootstrap();
            // 使用链式编程来配置参数
            bootstrap.group(bossGroup, workerGroup) //设置两个线程组
                    // 使用NioServerSocketChannel作为服务器的通道实现
                    .channel(NioServerSocketChannel.class)
                    // 初始化服务器连接队列大小，服务端处理客户端连接请求是顺序处理的,所以同一时间只能处理一个客户端连接。
                    // 多个客户端同时来的时候,服务端将不能处理的客户端连接请求放在队列中等待处理
                    .option(ChannelOption.SO_BACKLOG, 1024)
                    .childHandler(new ChannelInitializer<SocketChannel>() {
                        //创建通道初始化对象，设置初始化参数，在 SocketChannel 建立起来之前执行
                        @Override
                        protected void initChannel(SocketChannel ch) throws Exception {
                            //对workerGroup的SocketChannel设置处理器
                            ch.pipeline().addLast(new LifeCycleInBoundHandler());
                            ch.pipeline().addLast(nettyServerHandler);
                        }
                    });
            System.out.println("netty server start。。");
            // 绑定一个端口并且同步, 生成了一个ChannelFuture异步对象，通过isDone()等方法可以判断异步事件的执行情况
            // 启动服务器(并绑定端口)，bind是异步操作，sync方法是等待异步操作执行完毕
            ChannelFuture cf = bootstrap.bind(9000).sync();
            // 给cf注册监听器，监听我们关心的事件
            cf.addListener(new ChannelFutureListener() {
                @Override
                public void operationComplete(ChannelFuture future) throws Exception {
                    if (cf.isSuccess()) {
                        System.out.println("监听端口9000成功");
                    } else {
                        System.out.println("监听端口9000失败");
                    }
                }
            });
            // 等待服务端监听端口关闭，closeFuture是异步操作
            // 通过sync方法同步等待通道关闭处理完毕，这里会阻塞等待通道关闭完成，内部调用的是Object的wait()方法
            cf.channel().closeFuture().sync();
        } catch (InterruptedException e) {
            throw new RuntimeException(e);
        } finally {
            bossGroup.shutdownGracefully();
            workerGroup.shutdownGracefully();
        }*/
    }
}
package com.chenrise.device.config;
import org.springframework.context.annotation.Bean;
import org.springframework.context.annotation.Configuration;
import org.springframework.scheduling.annotation.EnableAsync;
import org.springframework.scheduling.concurrent.ThreadPoolTaskExecutor;
import java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor;
@EnableAsync
@Configuration
public class AsyncConfig {
    /**
     * 设备通信日志线程池
     */
    @Bean("devCommunicationLogExecutor")
    public ThreadPoolTaskExecutor devCommunicationLogExecutor() {
        ThreadPoolTaskExecutor exec = new ThreadPoolTaskExecutor();
        // 核心线程数
        exec.setCorePoolSize(Math.max(4, Runtime.getRuntime().availableProcessors()));
        // 最大线程数
        exec.setMaxPoolSize(exec.getCorePoolSize() * 2);
        // 线程池所使用的缓冲队列
        exec.setQueueCapacity(10000);
        // 线程前缀名
        exec.setThreadNamePrefix("log-");
        // 线程池对拒绝任务的处理策略 CallerRunsPolicy 当队列满且线程池满时，由调用线程（主线程）执行任务
        exec.setRejectedExecutionHandler(new ThreadPoolExecutor.CallerRunsPolicy());
        // 初始化线程池
        exec.initialize();
        return exec;
    }
}
package com.chenrise.device.config;
import com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.plugins.MybatisPlusInterceptor;
import com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.plugins.inner.DynamicTableNameInnerInterceptor;
import org.springframework.context.annotation.Bean;
import org.springframework.context.annotation.Configuration;
import java.time.LocalDate;
import java.time.format.DateTimeFormatter;
@Configuration
public class MybatisPlusConfig {
    @Bean
    public MybatisPlusInterceptor mybatisPlusInterceptor() {
        MybatisPlusInterceptor interceptor = new MybatisPlusInterceptor();
        DynamicTableNameInnerInterceptor dynamic = new DynamicTableNameInnerInterceptor();
        dynamic.setTableNameHandler((sql, tableName) -> {
            if ("dev_communication_log".equals(tableName)) {
                String suffix = LocalDate.now().format(DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("yyyyMM"));
                return tableName + "_" + suffix;
            }
            return tableName;
        });
        interceptor.addInnerInterceptor(dynamic);
        return interceptor;
    }
}

package com.chenrise.device.config;
import java.util.HashMap;
import java.util.Map;
public class TcpClientCmdHeadNames {
    //门锁常开常闭消息头
    public static String cmdOpenOrClose = "Cmd,TargetType,TargetId,DeviceType,ActionCode,Param,Param1,TimeStamp,Expand";
    //网关心跳信息回复指令消息头
    public static String cmdNetBitRes = "Cmd,TargetType,TargetId,DeviceType,ResultCode,TimeStamp,Expand";
    //网关心跳信息头关系对照
    public static String cmdNetBitResBeat = "Cmd,SrcType,DeviceId,DeviceType,DeviceHeart,TimeStamp,Expand";
    //分组信息/门锁信息
    public static String deviceInfo = "Cmd,TargetType,TargetId,DeviceType,DeviceId,UpId,DeviceName,DeviceIP,DevicePort,DeviceMac,IsUsable,TimeStamp,Expand";
    //添加白名单  卡号密码
    public static String addCardOrPassword ="Cmd,TargetType,TargetId,DeviceType,UserId,PropertyValue,Property,UserAuth,VerMode,StartValidTime,EndValidTime,TimeStamp,Expand";
    //修改白名单 卡号密码
    public static String editCardOrPassWord = "Cmd,TargetType,TargetId,DeviceType,UserId,OldPropertyValue,NewPropertyValue,Property,UserAuth,VerMode,StartValidTime,EndValidTime,TimeStamp,Expand";
    //清除白名单 全部
    public static String deleteWhiteList ="Cmd,TargetType,TargetId,DeviceType,UserAuth,TimeStamp,Expand";
    // 根据人员的id进行清除白名单
    public static String deleteWhiteListById = "Cmd,TargetType,TargetId,DeviceType,UserId,TimeStamp,Expand";
    //开锁
    public static String cmdOpenOrCloseOneTime  = "Cmd,TargetType,TargetId,DeviceType,DestAdr,AdrId,UserId,Status,ValidCount,StartTime,EndTime,TimeStamp,Expand";
    ///////
    public static String getCmdByName(String name) {
        String  a = "";
        Map<String, String> map = new HashMap();
        map.put("cmdOpenOrClose",cmdOpenOrClose);
        map.put("deviceInfo",deviceInfo);
        map.put("cmdNetBitRes",cmdNetBitRes);
        map.put("cmdNetBitResBeat",cmdNetBitResBeat);
        map.put("addCardOrPassword",addCardOrPassword);
        map.put("editCardOrPassWord",editCardOrPassWord);
        map.put("deleteWhiteList",deleteWhiteList);
        map.put("deleteWhiteListById",deleteWhiteListById);
        map.put("cmdOpenOrCloseOneTime",cmdOpenOrCloseOneTime);
        a =  map.get(name);
        return a;
    }
}

package com.chenrise.device.controller;
import cn.hutool.json.JSONObject;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.poi.ExcelUtil;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo;
import com.chenrise.common.log.annotation.Log;
import com.chenrise.common.log.enums.BusinessType;
import com.chenrise.common.security.annotation.RequiresPermissions;
import com.chenrise.device.domain.AirConditioner;
import com.chenrise.device.domain.DevNetworkCollector;
import com.chenrise.device.domain.PowerUpdatepwRecords;
import com.chenrise.device.service.IAirConditionerService;
import com.chenrise.device.service.IPowerUpdatepwRecordsService;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.*;
import javax.annotation.Resource;
import javax.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse;
import java.util.List;
/**
 * @Author cjh
 * @Description  电源修改密码
 * @Date 13:25 2024/8/1
 **/
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/airconditioner")
public class AirConditionerController extends BaseController
{
    @Resource
    private IAirConditionerService airConditionerService;
    /**
     * @Author cjh
     * @Description 列表
     * @Date 13:29 2024/8/1
     **/
    @RequiresPermissions("device:airconditioner:list")
    @GetMapping("/list")
    public TableDataInfo list(AirConditioner obj)
    {
        startPage();
        List<AirConditioner> list = airConditionerService.list(obj);
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     * 获取数据详细信息
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("device:airconditioner:query")
    @GetMapping(value = "/{id}")
    public AjaxResult getInfo(@PathVariable("id") Long id)
    {
        return success(airConditionerService.get(id));
    }
    /**
     * 新增数据
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("device:airconditioner:add")
    @PostMapping
    public AjaxResult add(@RequestBody AirConditioner airConditioner)
    {
        return toAjax(airConditionerService.insert(airConditioner));
    }
    /**
     * 修改数据
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("device:airconditioner:edit")
    @PutMapping
    public AjaxResult edit(@RequestBody AirConditioner airConditioner)
    {
        return toAjax(airConditionerService.update(airConditioner));
    }
    /**
     * 删除数据
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("device:airconditioner:remove")
    @DeleteMapping("/{id}")
    public AjaxResult remove(@PathVariable Long id)
    {
        return toAjax(airConditionerService.delete(id));
    }
    /**
     * 发送指令
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("device:airconditioner:sendorder")
    @PostMapping("/sendOrder")
    public AjaxResult sendOrder(@RequestBody JSONObject obj)
    {
        airConditionerService.sendOrder(obj);
        return AjaxResult.success();
    }
}
package com.chenrise.device.controller;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult;

/**

@RestController
@RequestMapping("/airconditioner/controllog")
public class AirConditionerControlLogController extends BaseController

     */

    @GetMapping(value = "/{id}")

    {
        return success(acclService.get(id));
    }
    /**

    @PostMapping
    public AjaxResult add(@RequestBody AirConditionerControlLog accl)
    {
        return toAjax(acclService.insert(accl));
    }
    /**
     * 修改数据
     */

    @PutMapping
    public AjaxResult edit(@RequestBody AirConditionerControlLog accl)
    {
        return toAjax(acclService.update(accl));
    }
    /**
     * 删除数据
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("device:airconditionercontrollog:remove")
    @DeleteMapping("/{id}")
    public AjaxResult remove(@PathVariable Long id)
    {
        return toAjax(acclService.delete(id));
    }
}
package com.chenrise.device.controller;
import cn.hutool.json.JSONArray;
import cn.hutool.json.JSONObject;
import cn.hutool.json.JSONUtil;
import com.alibaba.fastjson.JSON;
import com.chenrise.common.core.domain.R;
import com.chenrise.device.websocket.MyMessageHandler;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.*;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
/**
 * @Description TODO
 * @Author sunming
 * @Date 2023-05-06 09:43:00
 */
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/audioDevice")
public class AudioController {
    private String localFilePath;
    @Autowired
    private MyMessageHandler myMessageHandler;
    @PostMapping("/playOrStopAudio")
    public R<Integer> playOrStopAudio(@RequestBody Object object) {
        Map<String,String> infos =  JSON.parseObject(JSONUtil.toJsonStr(JSONUtil.toJsonStr(object)), Map.class);
        String ips = infos.get("ips");
        String url = infos.get("url");
        url= localFilePath + url;
        String playStatus = infos.get("playStatus");
        myMessageHandler.sendAudioToUsers(url,ips,playStatus);
//        devPowerNodeInfoService.boardControlPowerNode(deviceId,openStatus,userId)
        return R.ok(1);
    }
    @PostMapping("/playAudio")
    public R<Integer> playAudio(@RequestBody Object object) {
        JSONObject jsonObject = JSONUtil.parseObj(object);
        String type = jsonObject.getStr("type");
        //若未设置播放音量 默认为 30
        Integer volume = JSONUtil.isNull(jsonObject.get("volume"))?30:jsonObject.getInt("volume");
        JSONArray jsonArray = jsonObject.getJSONArray("codes");
        List<Integer> codes = jsonArray.toList(Integer.class);
        if("1".equals(type)){
            String url = jsonObject.getStr("url");
//            AudioService.PlayAudioFileTest(codes,url,volume);
        }else if("2".equals(type)){
            String text = jsonObject.getStr("text");
//            AudioService.PlayTTSTest(codes,text,volume);
        }
        return R.ok(1);
    }
    @PostMapping("/stopPlay/{type}")
    public R<Integer> stopPlay(@PathVariable("type")String type) {
//        AudioService.stopPlay(type);
        return R.ok(1);
    }
}
package com.chenrise.device.controller;
import com.chenrise.common.core.constant.HttpStatus;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.BaseEntity;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo;
import com.chenrise.common.security.utils.DictUtils;
import com.github.pagehelper.PageInfo;
import org.slf4j.Logger;
import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;
import java.util.List;
/**
 * web层通用数据处理
 *
 * @author chenrise
 */
public class BaseController extends com.chenrise.common.core.web.controller.BaseController
{
    protected final Logger logger = LoggerFactory.getLogger(this.getClass());
    /**
     * 响应请求分页数据
     */
    @SuppressWarnings({ "rawtypes", "unchecked" })
    protected TableDataInfo getDataTable(List<?> list)
    {
        TableDataInfo rspData = new TableDataInfo();
        rspData.setCode(HttpStatus.SUCCESS);
        rspData.setRows(list);
        rspData.setMsg("查询成功");
        rspData.setTotal(new PageInfo(list).getTotal());
        if(list != null && list.size()>0 && list.get(0) instanceof BaseEntity){
            List<? extends  BaseEntity> eList = (List<? extends BaseEntity>) list;
            DictUtils.getDictName(eList);
        }
        return rspData;
    }
}
package com.chenrise.device.controller;
import cn.hutool.core.codec.Base64Decoder;
import cn.hutool.core.util.URLUtil;
import cn.hutool.json.JSONObject;
import cn.hutool.json.JSONUtil;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.controller.BaseController;
import com.chenrise.system.api.RemoteJufeService;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.*;
import javax.annotation.Resource;
import java.net.URLDecoder;
import java.nio.charset.Charset;
import java.util.HashMap;
import java.util.Map;
/**
 * 网络采集器采集数据Controller
 *
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2023-06-01
 */
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/data/carry")
public class DataCarryController extends BaseController
{
    @Resource
    private RemoteJufeService jufeService;
    @PostMapping
    public String dataCarry(@RequestParam Map<String,Object> object){
        JSONObject obj = new JSONObject(object);
        String cmd = obj.getStr("cmd");
        if("POSTALARM".equals(cmd)){
            String str = obj.getStr("content");
            System.out.println("str-------------->>>>"+str);
            String content = Base64Decoder.decodeStr(str, Charset.forName("UTF-8"));
            JSONObject jsonObject = JSONUtil.parseObj(content);
            //剔除分闸、合闸告警及告警撤销
            if(!"1003".equals(jsonObject.getStr("typeNumber"))&&
                    !"1004".equals(jsonObject.getStr("typeNumber"))&&
                jsonObject.getBool("status")){
                jsonObject.putOnce("warningType","1");
                jufeService.addWarning(jsonObject);
            }
        }else if("GETCMD".equals(cmd)){
            System.out.println("T30S获取操作指令--------------------");
        }else {
            System.out.println("非告警数据，不予处理---------------------------------");
        }
        Map<String,String> map = new HashMap<>();
        map.put("ret","success");
        map.put("control",null);
        return JSONUtil.toJsonStr(map);
    }
//    public static void main(String[] args) {

//        //过流

//        String str2 = "";
//
//        try{
//

//

//            System.out.println(a2);
//
//            String content1 = Base64Decoder.decodeStr(str1, Charset.defaultCharset());

//
//            System.out.println(jsonObject2);
//        }catch (Exception e){

//        }

}
package com.chenrise.device.controller;
import java.util.HashMap;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import javax.annotation.Resource;
import javax.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse;
import com.chenrise.common.security.utils.DictUtils;
import com.chenrise.device.domain.DevCollectorData;
import com.chenrise.device.mapper.DevCollectorDataMapper;
import com.chenrise.device.service.IDevCollectorDataService;
import com.chenrise.system.api.domain.SysDictData;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.GetMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PostMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PutMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.DeleteMapping;

import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestBody;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestMapping;

/**
 * 网络采集器采集数据Controller
 *
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2023-06-01
 */
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/collectordata")
public class DevCollectorDataController extends BaseController
{
    @Autowired
    private IDevCollectorDataService devCollectorDataService;
    @Resource
    private DevCollectorDataMapper dataMapper;
    /**
     * 查询网络采集器采集数据列表
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("collector:data:list")
    @GetMapping("/list")
    public TableDataInfo list(DevCollectorData devCollectorData)
    {
        startPage();
        List<DevCollectorData> list = devCollectorDataService.selectDevCollectorDataList(devCollectorData);
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     * 导出网络采集器采集数据列表
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("collector:data:export")
    @Log(title = "网络采集器采集数据", businessType = BusinessType.EXPORT)
    @PostMapping("/export")
    public void export(HttpServletResponse response, DevCollectorData devCollectorData)
    {
        List<DevCollectorData> list = devCollectorDataService.selectDevCollectorDataList(devCollectorData);
        ExcelUtil<DevCollectorData> util = new ExcelUtil<DevCollectorData>(DevCollectorData.class);
        util.exportExcel(response, list, "网络采集器采集数据数据");
    }
    /**
     * 获取网络采集器采集数据详细信息
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("collector:data:query")
    @GetMapping(value = "/{id}")
    public AjaxResult getInfo(@PathVariable("id") Long id)
    {
        return success(devCollectorDataService.selectDevCollectorDataById(id));
    }
    /**
     * 新增网络采集器采集数据
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("collector:data:add")
    @Log(title = "网络采集器采集数据", businessType = BusinessType.INSERT)
    @PostMapping
    public AjaxResult add(@RequestBody DevCollectorData devCollectorData)
    {
        return toAjax(devCollectorDataService.insertDevCollectorData(devCollectorData));
    }
    /**
     * 修改网络采集器采集数据
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("collector:data:edit")
    @Log(title = "网络采集器采集数据", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PutMapping
    public AjaxResult edit(@RequestBody DevCollectorData devCollectorData)
    {
        return toAjax(devCollectorDataService.updateDevCollectorData(devCollectorData));
    }
    /**
     * 删除网络采集器采集数据
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("collector:data:remove")
    @Log(title = "网络采集器采集数据", businessType = BusinessType.DELETE)
	@DeleteMapping("/{ids}")
    public AjaxResult remove(@PathVariable Long[] ids)
    {
        return toAjax(devCollectorDataService.deleteDevCollectorDataByIds(ids));
    }
    @GetMapping(value = "/getRoomDeviceData/{roomId}")
    public AjaxResult getRoomDeviceData(@PathVariable("roomId") String roomId)
    {
        Map<String,Object> result = new HashMap<>();
        List<SysDictData> datas = DictUtils.getDictCache("room_device_type");
        for(SysDictData data:datas){
            DevCollectorData devCollectorData = dataMapper.selectLastByType(roomId,data.getDictValue());
            if(devCollectorData==null){
                continue;
            }
            switch (data.getDictValue()){
                case "1":
                    result.put("sj",devCollectorData.getTem()==0.0f?null:devCollectorData.getTem()==0.1f?false:true);
                    break;
                case "2":
                    result.put("yg",devCollectorData.getTem()==0.0f?null:devCollectorData.getTem()==0.1f?false:true);
                    break;
                case "3":
                    result.put("cc",devCollectorData.getTem()==0.0f?null:devCollectorData.getTem()==0.1f?false:true);
                    break;
                case "4":
                    result.put("wd",devCollectorData.getTem());
                    result.put("sd",devCollectorData.getHum());
                    break;
                case "5":
                    result.put("gz",devCollectorData.getHum());
                    break;
                case "6":
                    //pm2.5
                    result.put("kqzl_pm1",devCollectorData.getTem());
                    //pm10
                    result.put("kqzl_pm2",devCollectorData.getHum());
                    break;
            }
        }
        return success(result);
    }
}
package com.chenrise.device.controller;
import com.chenrise.common.core.domain.R;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.poi.ExcelUtil;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.controller.BaseController;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo;
import com.chenrise.common.log.annotation.Log;
import com.chenrise.common.log.enums.BusinessType;
import com.chenrise.common.security.annotation.RequiresPermissions;
import com.chenrise.device.domain.DevNetworkCollector;
import com.chenrise.device.domain.DevNetworkCollectorItem;
import com.chenrise.device.service.IDevNetworkCollectorItemService;
import com.chenrise.device.service.IDevNetworkCollectorService;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.*;
import javax.annotation.Resource;
import javax.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse;
import java.util.List;
/**
 * 网络采集器数据Controller
 *
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2023-06-01
 */
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/collector")
public class DevNetworkCollectorController extends BaseController
{
    @Resource
    private IDevNetworkCollectorService devNetworkCollectorService;
    @Resource
    private IDevNetworkCollectorItemService dciService;
    /**
     * 查询网络采集器数据列表
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("device:collector:list")
    @GetMapping("/list")
    public TableDataInfo list(DevNetworkCollector devNetworkCollector)
    {
        startPage();
        List<DevNetworkCollector> list = devNetworkCollectorService.selectDevNetworkCollectorList(devNetworkCollector);
        for(DevNetworkCollector dnc:list){
            DevNetworkCollectorItem dci_query = new DevNetworkCollectorItem();
            dci_query.setCollectorId(dnc.getId());
            List<DevNetworkCollectorItem> items = dciService.selectDevNetworkCollectorItemList(dci_query);
            dnc.setItems(items);
        }
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     * 导出网络采集器数据列表
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("device:collector:export")
    @Log(title = "网络采集器数据", businessType = BusinessType.EXPORT)
    @PostMapping("/export")
    public void export(HttpServletResponse response, DevNetworkCollector devNetworkCollector)
    {
        List<DevNetworkCollector> list = devNetworkCollectorService.selectDevNetworkCollectorList(devNetworkCollector);
        ExcelUtil<DevNetworkCollector> util = new ExcelUtil<DevNetworkCollector>(DevNetworkCollector.class);
        util.exportExcel(response, list, "网络采集器数据数据");
    }
    /**
     * 获取网络采集器数据详细信息
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("device:collector:query")
    @GetMapping(value = "/{id}")
    public AjaxResult getInfo(@PathVariable("id") Long id)
    {
        return success(devNetworkCollectorService.selectDevNetworkCollectorById(id));
    }
    /**
     * 新增网络采集器数据
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("device:collector:add")
    @Log(title = "网络采集器数据", businessType = BusinessType.INSERT)
    @PostMapping
    public AjaxResult add(@RequestBody DevNetworkCollector devNetworkCollector)
    {
        return toAjax(devNetworkCollectorService.insertDevNetworkCollector(devNetworkCollector));
    }
    /**
     * 修改网络采集器数据
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("device:collector:edit")
    @Log(title = "网络采集器数据", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PutMapping
    public AjaxResult edit(@RequestBody DevNetworkCollector devNetworkCollector)
    {
        return toAjax(devNetworkCollectorService.updateDevNetworkCollector(devNetworkCollector));
    }
    /**
     * 删除网络采集器数据
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("device:collector:remove")
    @Log(title = "网络采集器数据", businessType = BusinessType.DELETE)
	@DeleteMapping("/{ids}")
    public AjaxResult remove(@PathVariable Long[] ids)
    {
        return toAjax(devNetworkCollectorService.deleteDevNetworkCollectorByIds(ids));
    }
    /**
     * 获取当前采集器数量
     */
    @GetMapping("/getCurrentNum")
    public R<Integer> getCurrentNum() {
        return R.ok(devNetworkCollectorService.getCurrentNum());
    }
}
package com.chenrise.device.controller;
import cn.hutool.http.HttpRequest;
import com.alibaba.fastjson.JSONObject;
import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PostMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestBody;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RestController;
import javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest;
import javax.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse;
/**
 * @Description drc控制类
 * @Author sunming
 * @Date 2023-01-29 13:36:00
 */
@RequiredArgsConstructor
@RestController
@Slf4j
@RequestMapping("/drcau")
public class DrcauController {
    /**
     * @Description:获取楼群信息
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-01-29 14:57:07
     * @param q:
     * @param response:
     * @return: java.lang.String
     */
    @PostMapping("/sys_lq")
    public String sys_lq(HttpServletRequest q, HttpServletResponse response) {
        return getApiInfo(q,"http://10.0.4.147:8081/drcau/sys_lq");
    }
    /**
     * @Description:获取教室信息
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-01-29 14:57:17
     * @param q:
     * @param response:
     * @return: java.lang.String
     */
    @PostMapping("/sys_jzg")
    public String sys_jzg(HttpServletRequest q, HttpServletResponse response) {
        return getApiInfo(q,"http://10.0.4.147:8081/drcau/sys_jzg");
    }
    /**
     * @Description:获取学生信息
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-01-29 14:57:23
     * @param q:
     * @param response:
     * @return: java.lang.String
     */
    @PostMapping("/sys_xs")
    public String sys_xs(HttpServletRequest q, HttpServletResponse response) {
        return getApiInfo(q,"http://10.0.4.147:8081/drcau/sys_xs");
    }
    /**
     * @Description:获取部门信息
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-01-29 14:57:27
     * @param q:
     * @param response:
     * @return: java.lang.String
     */
    @PostMapping("/sys_bm")
    public String sys_bm(HttpServletRequest q, HttpServletResponse response) {
        return getApiInfo(q,"http://10.0.4.147:8081/drcau/sys_bm");
    }
    /**
     * @Description:post请求
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-01-29 14:57:34
     * @param q:
     * @param url:
     * @return: java.lang.String
     */
    private static String getApiInfo(HttpServletRequest q,String url){
        JSONObject object = new JSONObject();
        Object type= q.getHeader("Authorization");
        String res = HttpRequest.post(url)
                .header("Authorization-Type",q.getHeader("Authorization-Type"))
                .header("Authorization",q.getHeader("Authorization"))
                .header("Content-Type",q.getHeader("Content-Type"))
                .body(String.valueOf(object))
                .execute().body();
        return res;
    }
}

package com.chenrise.device.controller;
import com.chenrise.common.core.domain.R;
import com.chenrise.device.websocket.MyMessageHandler;
import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.GetMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PathVariable;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RestController;
/**
 * @Description 发送声音信息到班牌
 * @Author sunming
 * @Date 2023-04-28 14:35:00
 */
@RequiredArgsConstructor
@RestController
@Slf4j
@RequestMapping("/boardSound")
public class SendSoundController {
    @Autowired
    private MyMessageHandler myMessageHandler;
    /**
     * @Description:发送消息到指定班牌
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-04-28 14:43:29
     * @param ips:
     * @param path:
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.domain.R<java.lang.Integer>
     */
    @GetMapping("/sendSoundToSelUser/{ips}&{path}")
    public R<Integer> sendSoundToSelUser(@PathVariable String[] ips, @PathVariable String path) {
        myMessageHandler.sendToSelUsers(ips,path);
        return R.ok(1);
    }
    /**
     * @Description:发送消息到全部班牌
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-04-28 14:45:32
     * @param path:
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.domain.R<java.lang.Integer>
     */
    @GetMapping("/sendSoundAllUser/{path}")
    public R<Integer> sendSoundAllUser(@PathVariable String path) {
        myMessageHandler.sendMessageToAllUsers(path);
        return R.ok(1);
    }
}
package com.chenrise.device.controller;
import cn.hutool.json.JSONUtil;
import com.alibaba.fastjson.JSON;
import com.chenrise.common.core.domain.R;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo;
import com.chenrise.device.pool.NettyClientPoolFactory;
import com.chenrise.device.pool.*;
import com.chenrise.device.service.TcpClientGatewayCommandService;
import io.netty.channel.Channel;
import io.netty.channel.pool.ChannelPool;
import io.netty.util.concurrent.Future;
import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.*;
import java.util.*;
import java.util.concurrent.ExecutionException;
import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit;
/**
 * @Description:模拟发送tcp请求
 * @Author: sunming
 * @Date: 2022-11-29 10:58:58
 */
@RequiredArgsConstructor
@RestController
@Slf4j
@RequestMapping("/deviceLock")
public class TcpClientHttpApiController {
    @Autowired
    private TcpClientGatewayCommandService tcpClientGatewayCommandService;
    /** tcp连接池 */
    private final NettyClientPoolFactory clientPool;
    /** 延迟连接设置 */
    private Map<String, Date> conIps =new HashMap<>();
    /**
     * @Description: tcp发送消息
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 12:48:37
     * @param o:
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo
     */
    @PostMapping("/lockSendOrder")
    public TableDataInfo send( @RequestBody Object o) {
        TableDataInfo t = new TableDataInfo();
        try{
            tcpClientGatewayCommandService.sendMessageInfoToGateway(o);
        }catch (Exception e){
            e.printStackTrace();
            t.setCode(0);
            t.setMsg("发送失败");
            return t;
        }
        t.setCode(1);
        t.setMsg("发送成功");
        return t;
    }
    /**
     * @Description:创建tcp连接
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 12:55:47
     * @return: java.lang.String
     */
    @PostMapping("/connect")
    public  R<Object> connect( @RequestBody Object object) {
        System.out.println("发起tcp连接"+new Date());
        List<Map<String,String>> ipInfos =  JSON.parseObject(JSONUtil.toJsonStr(JSONUtil.toJsonStr(object)), List.class);
        List<Map<String,String>> ipInfosUse = new ArrayList<>();
        List<Map<String,String>> ipInfosUnUse = new ArrayList<>();
        for(int i=0;i<ipInfos.size();i++){
            Map<String,String> info = ipInfos.get(i);
            String status= info.get("status");
            if(status!=null && status.equals("0")){
                ipInfosUse.add(info);
            }else{
                ipInfosUnUse.add(info);
            }
        }
        System.out.println("可用连接数量："+  (ipInfosUse==null?0:ipInfosUse.size())  );
        System.out.println("不可用连接数量："+  (ipInfosUnUse==null?0:ipInfosUnUse.size())  );
        String key="";
        for(int i=0;i<ipInfosUse.size();i++){
            ChannelPool pool =null;
            Future<Channel> future =null;
            try {
                Map<String,String> info = ipInfosUse.get(i);
                String ip= info.get("ip");
                Integer port = Integer.valueOf(info.get("port"));
                key = ip+":"+port;
                pool = clientPool.getPool(key);
                if(pool==null){
                    connectToGateWay(ip,port);
                }else{
                    reconnect(key);
                }
            }finally{
                try {
                    if(pool!=null&&future!=null){
                        pool.release(future.get());
                    }
                } catch (InterruptedException | ExecutionException e) {
                    clientPool.removeConnectFromPool(key);
                }
            }
        }
        //断开连接
        for(int i=0;i<ipInfosUnUse.size();i++){
            Map<String,String> info = ipInfosUnUse.get(i);
            String ip= info.get("ip");
            Integer port = Integer.valueOf(info.get("port"));
            key = ip+":"+port;
            ChannelPool pool =null;
            pool = clientPool.getPool(key);
            if(pool!=null){
                pool.close();
            }
            clientPool.removeConnectFromPool(key);
        }
        return   R.ok("连接成功");
    }
    /**
     * @Description:查看生效时间
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-01-16 09:51:24
     * @param key:
     * @return: java.lang.Boolean
     */
    private Boolean getIpTimes(String key){
        if(conIps!=null){
            Date d1 =  conIps.get(key);
            if(d1==null){
                conIps.put(key,new Date());
                return true;
            }else{
                Date d2 = new Date();
                long diff = d2.getTime() - d1.getTime();
                diff=diff/1000/60;
                if(diff>2){
                    conIps.put(key,d2);
                    return true;
                }else{
                    return false;
                }
            }
        }else{
            conIps.put(key,new Date());
            return true;
        }
    }
    /**
     * @Description:发起重连
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-01-16 09:58:47
     * @param key:
     * @return: void
     */
    public void reconnect(String key){
        Boolean flag = getIpTimes(key);
        if(!flag){
            return;
        }
        key = key.replace("/","");
        clientPool.removeConnectFromPool(key);
        ChannelPool pool =null;
        Future<Channel> future =null;
        String ip= key.split(":")[0];
        Integer port = Integer.valueOf(key.split(":")[1]);
        try {
            key = ip+":"+port;
            pool = clientPool.getPool(key);
            if(pool==null){
                connectToGateWay(ip,port);
            }
        }finally{
            try {
                if(pool!=null&&future!=null){
                   future.get();
                }
            } catch (InterruptedException | ExecutionException e) {
                clientPool.removeConnectFromPool(key);
                e.printStackTrace();
            }
        }
    }
    /**
     * @Description:连接到网关
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-01-16 17:11:28
     * @param ip:
     * @param port:
     * @return: void
     */
    private   void  connectToGateWay(String ip,Integer port){
        ChannelPool pool =null;
        Future<Channel> future =null;
        clientPool.addConnectToPool(ip+":"+port,ip,port);
        try {
            Thread.sleep(1000);
        } catch (InterruptedException e1) {
            e1.printStackTrace();
        }
        pool = clientPool.getPool(ip+":"+port);
        future= pool.acquire();
        String message="reconnect success";
        DefaultGenericFutureListener listener = com.chenrise.device.pool.NettyClient.sendMessage(future, message);
        WrapperResponseMessage responseMessage = listener.get(800, TimeUnit.MILLISECONDS);
    }
}
package com.chenrise.device.controller;
import cn.hutool.http.HttpRequest;
import cn.hutool.json.JSONUtil;
import com.alibaba.fastjson.JSONObject;
import com.chenrise.device.mapper.TcpClientIssueInstructionInfoMapper;
import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PostMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestBody;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RestController;
import javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest;
import javax.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse;
import java.util.HashMap;

/**
 * @Description drc控制类
 * @Author sunming
 * @Date 2023-01-29 13:43:00
 */
@RequiredArgsConstructor
@RestController
@Slf4j
@RequestMapping("/28drc")
public class TedrcController {
    @Autowired
    private TcpClientIssueInstructionInfoMapper tcpmapper;
    /**
     * @Description:获取实验室调度信息
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-01-29 14:57:03
     * @param q: 
     * @param response: 
     * @return: java.lang.String
     */
    @PostMapping("/sys_sjdd")
    public String sys_sjdd(HttpServletRequest q, HttpServletResponse response) {
        return getApiInfo(q,"http://10.0.4.147:8081/28drc/sys_sjdd");
    }
    /**
     * @Description:实验室调度某一天的信息
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-01-29 14:57:00
     * @param q: 
     * @param response: 
     * @return: java.lang.String
     */
    @PostMapping("/sys_sjddbyday")
    public String sys_sjddbyday(HttpServletRequest q, HttpServletResponse response) {
        return getApiInfo(q,"http://10.0.4.147:8081/28drc/sys_sjddbyday");
    }
    /**
     * @Description:获取教室信息
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-01-29 14:56:30
     * @param q: 
     * @param response: 
     * @return: java.lang.String
     */
    @PostMapping("/sys_labdetail")
    public String sys_labdetail(HttpServletRequest q, HttpServletResponse response) {
        return getApiInfo(q,"http://10.0.4.147:8081/28drc/sys_labdetail");
    }
    /**
     * @Description:获取课程安排
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-01-29 14:56:15
     * @param q: 
     * @param response: 
     * @return: java.lang.String
     */
    @PostMapping("/sys_kc")
    public String sys_kc(HttpServletRequest q, HttpServletResponse response) {
        return  getApiInfo(q,"http://10.0.4.147:8081/28drc/sys_kc");
    }
    private String getApiInfo(HttpServletRequest q,String url){
        JSONObject object = new JSONObject();
        Object type= q.getHeader("Authorization");
        String rq = q.getParameter("rq");
        if(rq !=null&&!rq.equals("")){
            url = url+"?rq="+rq;
           List<Map> cousrInfos = tcpmapper.selectCourseInfoByData(rq);
           Map<String ,Object> m1 = new HashMap<>();
           m1.put("code","0");
           m1.put("status","success");
           Map<String,Object> m2 = new HashMap<>();
           m2.put("list",cousrInfos);
           m1.put("data",m2);
           return JSONUtil.toJsonStr(m1);
        }
        String res = HttpRequest.post(url)
                .header("Authorization-Type",q.getHeader("Authorization-Type"))
                .header("Authorization",q.getHeader("Authorization"))
                .header("Content-Type",q.getHeader("Content-Type"))
                .body(String.valueOf(object))
                .execute().body();
        return res;
    }
}
package com.chenrise.device.controller;
import cn.hutool.json.JSONUtil;
import com.alibaba.fastjson.JSON;
import com.chenrise.common.core.domain.R;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.controller.BaseController;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo;
import com.chenrise.device.domain.UdpPowerInfo;
import com.chenrise.device.service.UdpPowerInfoService;
import com.chenrise.device.service.UdpSendMessageOnlyService;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.*;
import java.util.List;
/**
 * @Description:空开控制类
 * @Author: sunming
 * @Date: 2022-12-09 15:27:24
 */
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/devicePower")
public class UdpPowerInfoController extends BaseController {
    @Autowired
    private UdpPowerInfoService udpPowerInfoService;
    @Autowired
    private UdpSendMessageOnlyService udpSendMessageOnlyService;
    /**
     * @Description:查询电源列表
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-12-09 15:27:47
     * @param udpPowerInfo:
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo
     */
    @GetMapping("/list")
    public TableDataInfo list(UdpPowerInfo udpPowerInfo) {
        startPage();
        List<UdpPowerInfo> list = udpPowerInfoService.selectPowerList(udpPowerInfo);
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     * @Description:远程调用合闸分闸指令
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-12-09 10:45:05
     * @param object:
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.domain.R<java.lang.Object>
     */
    @PostMapping("/executeCommand")
    public R<Object> fenzha(@RequestBody Object object) {
        UdpPowerInfo udpPowerInfo =  JSON.parseObject(JSONUtil.toJsonStr(JSONUtil.toJsonStr(object)), UdpPowerInfo.class);
        udpSendMessageOnlyService.sendOnOffPowerMessageByPowerInfo(udpPowerInfo);
        return R.ok("1");
    }
    /**
     * @Author cjh
     * @Description //修改空开密码
     * @Date 15:42 2024/7/31
     **/
    @PostMapping("/executeCommand/updatePw")
    public R<Object> updatePw(@RequestBody Object object) {
        UdpPowerInfo udpPowerInfo =  JSON.parseObject(JSONUtil.toJsonStr(JSONUtil.toJsonStr(object)), UdpPowerInfo.class);
        udpSendMessageOnlyService.sendUpdatePwMessage(udpPowerInfo);
        return R.ok("1");
    }
    /**
     * 从redis中同步空开信息
     */
    @PostMapping("/editPowerInfoFromRedis")
    public R<Void> editPowerInfoFromRedis() {
        udpPowerInfoService.editRealTimeInfoFromRedis();
        return R.ok();
    }
}

import lombok.Data;
import java.util.Date;
/**
 * 门锁设备信息
 */
@Data
public class TcpClientDoorDeviceInfo {
    private String cmd;
    /**
     * 分组id
     */
    private String deviceId;
    /**
     * 发送目的地
     */
    private String targetType;
    /**
     *数据服务网关ID
     */

package com.chenrise.device.domain;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.BaseEntity;
import lombok.Data;
import java.io.Serializable;
import java.net.InetSocketAddress;
import java.util.Date;
/**
 * 曼顿UDP协议消息对象
 * 
 * @author Mantunsci
 * 
 */
@Data
public class UdpProtocolMessage extends BaseEntity implements Serializable {
	/**
	 * 主键id
	 */
	private String id;
	/**
	 * 起始标记,固定 0xF1
	 */
	private short msf=0xF1;
	/**
	 * 消息类型
	 */
	private short cmd;
	/**
	 * 消息版本
	 */
	private short cmdVer;
	/**
	 * 发送时表示消息类型附加码2
	 */
	private short cmdVer2;
	/**
	 * 回复消息时表示返回ack类型(0表示成功，非0表示异常)
	 */
	private short ack;
	/**
	 * 请求数据长度
	 */
	private int len;
	/**
	 * 消息ID(返回时原样返回)
	 */
	private int cmdNo;
	/**
	 * 6 byte: 设备MAC
	 */
	private String mac;
	/**
	 * 1 byte 时区，如：8，9.5等
	 */
	private float tmZone;
	/**
	 * 操作用户号
	 */
	private Long uid;
	/**
	 * 请求消息内容
	 */
	private byte[] data;
	/**
	 * 消息的校验和，算法CRC32
	 */
	private long crc;
	/**
	 * 计算的校验和
	 */
	private long crcCalc;
	/**
	 * 发送端的sn号
	 */
	public byte[] sn;
	/**
	 * 更新时间
	 */
	private Date updateTime;
	/**
	 * 发送端的IP和端口
	 */
	private InetSocketAddress sender;
}
