package com.chenrise.device.handler;
import javax.annotation.PreDestroy;
public interface ITcpClient {
    /**
     * 主启动程序，初始化参数
     *
     * @throws Exception 初始化异常
     */
    void start() throws Exception;
    /**
     * 重启
     *
     * @throws Exception e
     */
    void reconnect() throws Exception;
    /**
     * 优雅的结束服务器
     *
     * @throws InterruptedException 提前中断异常
     */
    @PreDestroy
    void destroy() throws InterruptedException;
}
package com.chenrise.device.handler;
import io.netty.channel.ChannelHandlerContext;
import io.netty.channel.ChannelInboundHandlerAdapter;
/**
 * @Description 生命周期handler
 * @Author sunming
 * @Date 2022-12-12 13:33:00
 */
public class LifeCycleInBoundHandler extends ChannelInboundHandlerAdapter {
    /**
     * @Description:channel注册到NioEventLoop
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-12-13 09:21:49
     * @param ctx:
     * @return: void
     */
    @Override
    public void channelRegistered(ChannelHandlerContext ctx)throws Exception {
        super.channelRegistered(ctx);
    }
    /**
     * @Description: channel取消和NioEventLoop的绑定
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-12-13 09:22:12
     * @param ctx:
     * @return: void
     */
    @Override
    public void channelUnregistered(ChannelHandlerContext ctx)  throws Exception {
        super.channelUnregistered(ctx);
    }
    /**
     * @Description:channel准备就绪
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-12-13 09:22:49
     * @param ctx:
     * @return: void
     */
    @Override
    public void channelActive(ChannelHandlerContext ctx)throws Exception {
        super.channelActive(ctx);
    }
    /**
     * @Description:channel被关闭
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-12-13 09:24:04
     * @param ctx:
     * @return: void
     */
    @Override
    public void channelInactive(ChannelHandlerContext ctx)
            throws Exception {
        super.channelInactive(ctx);
    }
    /**
     * @Description:channel中有可读的数据
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-12-13 09:24:24
     * @param ctx:
     * @param msg:
     * @return: void
     */
    @Override
    public void channelRead(ChannelHandlerContext ctx, Object msg)
            throws Exception {
        super.channelRead(ctx, msg);
    }
    /**
     * @Description:channel读数据完成
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-12-13 09:25:02
     * @param ctx:
     * @return: void
     */
    @Override
    public void channelReadComplete(ChannelHandlerContext ctx)  throws Exception {
        super.channelReadComplete(ctx);
    }
    /**
     * @Description:handler被添加到channel的pipeline
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-12-13 09:25:23
     * @param ctx:
     * @return: void
     */
    @Override
    public void handlerAdded(ChannelHandlerContext ctx)throws Exception {
        super.handlerAdded(ctx);
    }
    /**
     * @Description:handler从channel的pipeline中移除
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-12-13 09:25:43
     * @param ctx:
     * @return: void
     */
    @Override
    public void handlerRemoved(ChannelHandlerContext ctx)   throws Exception {
        super.handlerRemoved(ctx);
    }
}
package com.chenrise.device.handler;
import io.netty.bootstrap.Bootstrap;
import io.netty.channel.ChannelFuture;
import io.netty.channel.ChannelFutureListener;
import io.netty.channel.ChannelInitializer;
import io.netty.channel.EventLoopGroup;
import io.netty.channel.nio.NioEventLoopGroup;
import io.netty.channel.socket.SocketChannel;
import io.netty.channel.socket.nio.NioSocketChannel;
import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Component;
import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit;
/**
 * @Description TODO
 * @Author sunming
 * @Date 2022-12-12 13:27:00
 */
@Component
@Slf4j
@RequiredArgsConstructor
public class NettyClient {
    private String host;
    private int port;
    private Bootstrap bootstrap;
    private EventLoopGroup group;
    private SocketChannel socketChannel;
    /**
     * @Description:初始化
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-12-13 09:26:07
     * @param host:
     * @param port:
     * @return: void
     */
    public void init(String host, int port) {
        this.host = host;
        this.port = port;
        //客户端需要一个事件循环组
        group = new NioEventLoopGroup();
        //创建客户端启动对象
        // bootstrap 可重用, 只需在NettyClient实例化的时候初始化即可.
        bootstrap = new Bootstrap();
        bootstrap.group(group)
            .channel(NioSocketChannel.class)
            .handler(new ChannelInitializer<SocketChannel>() {
                @Override
                protected void initChannel(SocketChannel ch) throws Exception {
                    //加入处理器
                    ch.pipeline().addLast(new NettyClientHandler(NettyClient.this));
                }
            });
    }
    /**
     * @Description:连接
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-12-13 09:26:19
     * @return: void
     */
    public void connect() throws Exception {
        System.out.println("netty client start。。");
        //启动客户端去连接服务器端
        ChannelFuture cf = bootstrap.connect(host, port);
        cf.addListener(new ChannelFutureListener() {
            @Override
            public void operationComplete(ChannelFuture future) throws Exception {
                if (!future.isSuccess()) {
                    //重连交给后端线程执行
                    future.channel().eventLoop().schedule(() -> {
                        System.err.println("重连服务端...");
                        try {
                            connect();
                        } catch (Exception e) {
                            e.printStackTrace();
                        }
                    }, 3000, TimeUnit.MILLISECONDS);
                } else {
                    socketChannel = (SocketChannel) future.channel();
                    System.out.println("服务端连接成功...");
                }
            }
        });
        //对通道关闭进行监听
        cf.channel().closeFuture().sync();
    }
    /**
     * @Description:获取频道
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-12-13 09:26:41
     * @return: io.netty.channel.socket.SocketChannel
     */
    public SocketChannel getSocketChannel() {
        return this.socketChannel;
    }
}
package com.chenrise.device.handler;
import com.chenrise.device.service.TcpClientAddInfoByMapService;
import com.chenrise.device.service.UdpPowerInfoService;
import io.netty.buffer.ByteBuf;
import io.netty.buffer.Unpooled;
import io.netty.channel.ChannelHandler;
import io.netty.channel.ChannelHandlerContext;
import io.netty.channel.ChannelInboundHandlerAdapter;
import io.netty.util.CharsetUtil;
import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Component;
import javax.annotation.PostConstruct;
/**
 * @Description NettyClientHandler
 * @Author sunming
 * @Date 2022-12-12 13:28:00
 */
@Slf4j
@Component
@ChannelHandler.Sharable
@RequiredArgsConstructor
public class NettyClientHandler extends ChannelInboundHandlerAdapter {
    private NettyClient nettyClient;
    @Autowired
    private TcpClientAddInfoByMapService tcpclientAddInfoByMapService;
    private static NettyClientHandler nettyClientHandler;
    @Autowired
    private UdpPowerInfoService udpPowerInfoService;
    @PostConstruct
    public void initDemoService(){
        nettyClientHandler = this;
        nettyClientHandler.tcpclientAddInfoByMapService = this.tcpclientAddInfoByMapService;
    }
    public NettyClientHandler(NettyClient nettyClient) {
        this.nettyClient = nettyClient;
    }
    /**
     * @Description:当客户端连接服务器完成就会触发该方法
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-12-13 09:27:34
     * @param ctx:
     * @return: void
     */
    @Override
    public void channelActive(ChannelHandlerContext ctx) throws Exception {
        ByteBuf buf = Unpooled.copiedBuffer("HelloServer".getBytes(CharsetUtil.UTF_8));
        ctx.writeAndFlush(buf);
    }
    /**
     * @Description:当通道有读取事件时会触发，即服务端发送数据给客户端
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-12-13 09:27:51
     * @param ctx:
     * @param msg:
     * @return: void
     */
    @Override
    public void channelRead(ChannelHandlerContext ctx, Object msg) throws Exception {
        ByteBuf buf = (ByteBuf) msg;
        System.out.println("服务端端发送消息是:" + buf.toString(CharsetUtil.UTF_8));
//        nettyClientHandler.tcpclientAddInfoByMapService.returnMessageByRec(ctx, buf.toString(CharsetUtil.UTF_8));
//        System.out.println("服务端的地址： " + ctx.channel().remoteAddress());
    }
    /**
     * @Description:channel 处于不活动状态时调用
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-12-13 09:28:40
     * @param ctx:
     * @return: void
     */
    @Override
    public void channelInactive(ChannelHandlerContext ctx) throws Exception {
        System.err.println("运行中断开重连。。。");
        nettyClient.connect();
    }
    /**
     * @Description:捕获错误结束连接
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-12-13 09:29:04
     * @param ctx:
     * @param cause:
     * @return: void
     */
    @Override
    public void exceptionCaught(ChannelHandlerContext ctx, Throwable cause) throws Exception {
        cause.printStackTrace();
        ctx.close();
    }
}
package com.chenrise.device.handler;
import io.netty.bootstrap.ServerBootstrap;
import io.netty.channel.*;
import io.netty.channel.nio.NioEventLoopGroup;
import io.netty.channel.socket.SocketChannel;
import io.netty.channel.socket.nio.NioServerSocketChannel;
/**
 * @Description TODO
 * @Author sunming
 * @Date 2022-12-12 13:31:00
 */
public class NettyServer {
    public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {
        // 创建两个线程组bossGroup和workerGroup, 含有的子线程NioEventLoop的个数默认为cpu核数的两倍
        // bossGroup只是处理连接请求 ,真正的和客户端业务处理，会交给workerGroup完成
        EventLoopGroup bossGroup = new NioEventLoopGroup(1);
        EventLoopGroup workerGroup = new NioEventLoopGroup(8);
        try {
            // 创建服务器端的启动对象
            ServerBootstrap bootstrap = new ServerBootstrap();
            // 使用链式编程来配置参数
            bootstrap.group(bossGroup, workerGroup) //设置两个线程组
                    // 使用NioServerSocketChannel作为服务器的通道实现
                    .channel(NioServerSocketChannel.class)
                    // 初始化服务器连接队列大小，服务端处理客户端连接请求是顺序处理的,所以同一时间只能处理一个客户端连接。
                    // 多个客户端同时来的时候,服务端将不能处理的客户端连接请求放在队列中等待处理
                    .option(ChannelOption.SO_BACKLOG, 1024)
                    .childHandler(new ChannelInitializer<SocketChannel>() {//创建通道初始化对象，设置初始化参数，在 SocketChannel 建立起来之前执行
                        @Override
                        protected void initChannel(SocketChannel ch) throws Exception {
                            //对workerGroup的SocketChannel设置处理器
                            ch.pipeline().addLast(new LifeCycleInBoundHandler());
                            ch.pipeline().addLast(new NettyServerHandler());
                        }
                    });
            System.out.println("netty server start。。");
            // 绑定一个端口并且同步, 生成了一个ChannelFuture异步对象，通过isDone()等方法可以判断异步事件的执行情况
            // 启动服务器(并绑定端口)，bind是异步操作，sync方法是等待异步操作执行完毕
            ChannelFuture cf = bootstrap.bind(9000).sync();
            // 给cf注册监听器，监听我们关心的事件
            cf.addListener(new ChannelFutureListener() {
                @Override
                public void operationComplete(ChannelFuture future) throws Exception {
                    if (cf.isSuccess()) {
                        System.out.println("监听端口9000成功");
                    } else {
                        System.out.println("监听端口9000失败");
                    }
                }
            });
            // 等待服务端监听端口关闭，closeFuture是异步操作
            // 通过sync方法同步等待通道关闭处理完毕，这里会阻塞等待通道关闭完成，内部调用的是Object的wait()方法
            cf.channel().closeFuture().sync();
        } finally {
            bossGroup.shutdownGracefully();
            workerGroup.shutdownGracefully();
        }
    }
}
package com.chenrise.device.handler;
import cn.hutool.core.util.StrUtil;
import cn.hutool.json.JSONObject;
import cn.hutool.json.JSONUtil;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.StringUtils;
import com.chenrise.device.domain.AirConditioner;
import com.chenrise.device.domain.AirConditionerControlLog;
import com.chenrise.device.mapper.AirConditionerControlLogMapper;
import com.chenrise.device.mapper.AirConditionerMapper;
import com.chenrise.device.util.ExpirableMap;
import io.netty.buffer.ByteBuf;
import io.netty.buffer.Unpooled;
import io.netty.channel.ChannelHandler;
import io.netty.channel.ChannelHandlerContext;
import io.netty.channel.ChannelInboundHandlerAdapter;
import io.netty.util.CharsetUtil;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Component;
import javax.annotation.Resource;
/**
 * @Description TODO
 * @Author sunming
 * @Date 2022-12-12 13:32:00
 */
@Component
@ChannelHandler.Sharable
public class NettyServerHandler extends ChannelInboundHandlerAdapter {
    @Resource
    private AirConditionerMapper airConditionerMapper;
    @Resource
    private AirConditionerControlLogMapper airConditionerControlLogMapper;
    private ExpirableMap map = new ExpirableMap();
    /**
     * 读取客户端发送的数据
     *
     * @param ctx 上下文对象, 含有通道channel，管道pipeline
     * @param msg 就是客户端发送的数据
     * @throws Exception
     */
    @Override
    public void channelRead(ChannelHandlerContext ctx, Object msg) throws Exception {
        try {
            String poolName = StrUtil.replace(ctx.channel().remoteAddress().toString(),"/","");
            map.put(poolName,ctx,2*60*1000L);
            //将 msg 转成一个 ByteBuf，类似NIO 的 ByteBuffer
            ByteBuf buf = (ByteBuf) msg;
            String message = buf.toString(CharsetUtil.UTF_8);
            if(StringUtils.isNotEmpty(message)&&!message.startsWith("{")){
                return ;
            }
            JSONObject obj = JSONUtil.parseObj(buf.toString(CharsetUtil.UTF_8));
            if("IntervalUpload".equals(obj.getStr("cmd"))){
                System.out.println("客户端发送消息是:" + message);
                String gateway = obj.getStr("id");
                AirConditioner airConditioner = airConditionerMapper.getByGateway(gateway);
                if(airConditioner != null){
                    airConditioner.setHum(obj.getFloat("dqsd"));
                    if(obj.getFloat("dqsd")!=null&&obj.getFloat("dqsd")>0){
                        airConditioner.setOnlineStatus("1");
                    }else {
                        airConditioner.setOnlineStatus("0");
                    }
                    airConditioner.setTem(obj.getFloat("dqwd"));
                    airConditioner.setElectricCurrent1(obj.getFloat("kt1dl"));
                    airConditioner.setElectricCurrent2(obj.getFloat("kt2dl"));
                    airConditioner.setControlModel(obj.getStr("ktkzms"));
                    airConditioner.setChannelAutoControl1(obj.getStr("kt1zdkz"));
                    airConditioner.setChannelAutoControl2(obj.getStr("kt2zdkz"));
                    airConditioner.setElectricCurrent1(obj.getFloat("kt1dl"));
                    airConditioner.setElectricCurrent2(obj.getFloat("kt2dl"));
                    airConditioner.setControlModel(obj.getStr("ktkzms"));
                    if(obj.getFloat("ktdlyz")!=null&&obj.getFloat("ktdlyz")>0){
                        airConditioner.setChannelControlStatus1(obj.getStr("kt1zdkzsb"));
                        airConditioner.setChannelControlStatus2(obj.getStr("kt2zdkzsb"));
                        airConditioner.setRunningStatus1(obj.getStr("kt1zt"));
                        airConditioner.setRunningStatus2(obj.getStr("kt2zt"));
                    }
                    airConditionerMapper.update(airConditioner);
                }
            }else{
                System.err.println("客户端发送消息是:" + message);
                Thread.sleep(1000L);
                String code = obj.getStr("code");
                AirConditionerControlLog controlLog = airConditionerControlLogMapper.getByCode(code);
                if(controlLog!=null){
                    controlLog.setIsSuccess(obj.getBool("isSuccess"));
                    controlLog.setMessage(obj.getStr("message"));
                    airConditionerControlLogMapper.update(controlLog);
                }
            }
            /*
             * 服务器发送命令回复
             * {"id":"e46338809b072f39","code":15486,"device":"AirConditioner","cmd":"Initialization","data":null,"isSuccess":true,"message":"Operation successful !"}
             * {
             * 	"id": "e46338809b072f39",			// 网关设备的唯一id，数据类型为String类型。
             * 	"code": 6545646,					// 数据包的顺序，32位无符号整数，服务器下发与网关回复id一致。
             * 	"device": "AirConditioner",			// 服务器下发控制设备的类型，数据类型为String类型。
             * 	"cmd": "RemoteCtrl",				// 服务器下发的命令，数据类型为String类型。
             * 	"data": null,						// 服务器下发命令的数据，类型为多类型,与服务器下发数据类型一致。
             * 	"isSuccess": true					// 服务器下发命令的操作结果，bool类型，true为成功，false为失败。
             * 	"message": "Operation successful !"	// 服务器下发命令的操作结果信息，数据类型为String类型。
             * }
             * 心跳信息
             *{
             * 	"id": "e46338809b072f39",	// 网关设备的唯一id，数据类型为String类型。
             * 	"cmd": "IntervalUpload",	// cmd关键字为 ”IntervalUpload”（定时上传）。
             * 	"dqsd": 37.8000,			// 当前湿度，单位为℃，精度为0.1。
             * 	"dqwd": 30.7000,			// 当前温度，单位为％，精度为0.1。
             * 	"kt1zdkz": 1,				// 空调通道1自动控制（值为1时开启，0关闭）。
             * 	"kt2zdkz": 1, 				// 空调通道2自动控制（值为1时开启，0关闭）。
             * 	"ktwdjz": 0.0000, 			// 空调温度校准值，单位为℃，精度为0.1。
             * 	"ktsdjz": 0.0000, 			// 空调湿度校准值，单位为℃，精度为0.1。
             * 	"ktzkwdsx": 30.1000, 		// 空调温度自动控制上限值，单位为℃，精度为0.1。
             * 	"ktzkwdxx": 15.0000, 		// 空调温度自动控制下限值，单位为℃，精度为0.1。
             * 	"ktzkwdhc": 0.0000, 		// 空调温度自动控制回差，单位为℃，精度为0.1。
             * 	"ktdlyz": 0.1000,			// 空调电流阈值，电流大于阈值代表操作成功，为0不判断，单位为A，精度为0.1。
             * 	"kt1dl": 0.0000, 			// 空调通道1电流，单位为A，精度为0.1。
             * 	"kt2dl": 0.0000, 			// 空调通道2电流，单位为A，精度为0.1。
             * 	"ktkzms": 0, 				// 空调控制模式（值为0 时远程控制，1自动控制）。
             * "ktlhkz": 1, 				// 空调双通道轮换控制（值为1时开启，0关闭）。
             * 	"ktlhsj": 1, 				// 空调双通道轮换控制时间设置（单位为分钟，整型数）。
             * 	"kt1zdkzsb": 0,			//*空调通道1控制失败（值为1 时失败，0正常，仅在电流阈值>0时生效）。
             * 	"kt2zdkzsb": 0, 			//*空调通道2控制失败（值为1 时失败，0正常，仅在电流阈值>0时生效）。
             * 	"kt1zt": 0,				//*空调1运行状态（0 停止，1 制冷，2 制热，3 未知，仅在电流阈值>0时生效）。
             * 	"kt2zt": 0					//*空调2运行状态（0 停止，1 制冷，2 制热，3 未知，仅在电流阈值>0时生效）。
             * }
             *
             */
        }catch (Exception e) {
            e.printStackTrace();
        }
    }
    /**
     * 数据读取完毕处理方法
     *
     * @param ctx
     * @throws Exception
     */
    @Override
    public void channelReadComplete(ChannelHandlerContext ctx) throws Exception {
        String poolName = StrUtil.replace(ctx.channel().remoteAddress().toString(),"/","");
    }
    /**
     * 处理异常, 一般是需要关闭通道
     *
     * @param ctx
     * @param cause
     * @throws Exception
     */
    @Override
    public void exceptionCaught(ChannelHandlerContext ctx, Throwable cause) throws Exception {
        ctx.close();
    }
    public void sendMsg(String poolName,JSONObject obj){
//        服务器下发数据格式：
//        eg: {"id":"e46338809b072f39","code":15486,"device":"AirConditioner","cmd":"Initialization","data":null}
//        {
//            "id": "e46338809b072f39",	// 网关设备的唯一id，数据类型为String类型（不可缺省）。
//                "code": 6545646,			// 数据包的顺序，32位无符号整数，服务器下发与网关回复id一致（不可缺省）。
//                "device": "AirConditioner",	// 设备类型，数据类型为String类型（不可缺省）。①
//                "cmd": "RemoteCtrl",		// 下发的命令，数据类型为String类型（不可缺省）。②
//                "data": 0					// 命令的数据，数据类型为多类型（可缺省）。
//        }
//        注：①设备类型包含”AirConditioner”、”Gateway”等类型。
//        ②下发的命令：
//        设备类型为”AirConditioner”的cmd指令:
//        1.“RemoteCtrl” 切换空调远程控制模式，data字段可缺省。
//        2.“RemoteHeatOn” 远程开启空调制热，需在远程控制模式下才生效，data字段可缺省。
//        3.“RemoteCoolOn“ 远程开启空调制冷，需在远程控制模式下才生效，data字段可缺省。
//        4."RemoteOff" 远程关闭空调，需在远程控制模式下才生效，data字段可缺省。
//        5."AutoCtrl" 切换空调自动控制模式，data字段可缺省。
//        6.“RotationEnabled” 开启空调自动控制双机切换，data字段可缺省。
//        7.“RotationDisable” 关闭空调自动控制双机切换，data字段可缺省。
//        8."OneAutoCtrlOn" 空调通道1开启自动控制，data字段可缺省。
//        9."OneAutoCtrlOff" 空调通道1关闭自动控制，data字段可缺省。
//        10."TwoAutoCtrlOn" 空调通道2开启自动控制，data字段可缺省。
//        11."TwoAutoCtrlOff" 空调通道2关闭自动控制，data字段可缺省。
//        12."Initialization" 空调控制器初始化，首次添加设备时发送，data字段可缺省,。
//        13."GetCmd" 获取全部cmd指令，data字段可缺省。
//        14."CustomIREmission" 空调控制器发射自定义红外 1 至自定义红外 20，data字段为1~20。
//        15."RotationTime" 空调自动控制双机时间，data字段不可缺省，单位为分钟(<65536)，精度为1。
//        16."UpperLimitSet" 空调自动控制模式温度上限设置，data字段不可缺省，单位为℃，精度为0.1。
//        17."LowerLimitSet" 空调自动控制模式温度下限设置，data字段不可缺省，单位为℃，精度为0.1。
//        18."ReturnDiffSet" 空调自动控制温度回差值设置，data字段不可缺省，单位为℃，精度为0.1。
//        19."CurrentThr" 空调电流阈值，电流大于阈值代表成功，data字段不可缺省，单位为A，精度为0.1。
//        20."TempComp" 温度校准值，data字段不可缺省，单位为℃，精度为0.1。
//        21."HumComp" 湿度校准值，data字段不可缺省，单位为℃，精度为0.1。
//        22."Timing" 空调控制器时间校正，data字段不可缺省，以秒为单位的Unix时间戳（eg:1723046400）。
//        设备类型为” Gateway”的cmd指令
//        1.“Restart” 重启网关。data字段可缺省。
        System.err.println("发送消息body"+JSONUtil.toJsonStr(obj));
        ChannelHandlerContext ctx = (ChannelHandlerContext) map.get(poolName);
        ByteBuf buf = Unpooled.copiedBuffer(StrUtil.bytes(JSONUtil.toJsonStr(obj),CharsetUtil.UTF_8));
        ctx.writeAndFlush(buf);
    }
}
package com.chenrise.device.handler;
import com.chenrise.device.resolver.UdpMessageDecoder;
import com.chenrise.device.resolver.UdpMessageEncoder;
import io.netty.channel.ChannelInboundHandlerAdapter;
import io.netty.channel.ChannelInitializer;
import io.netty.channel.ChannelPipeline;
import io.netty.channel.socket.DatagramChannel;
/**
 * UDP的处理器初始化
 * 
 * @author Mantunsci
 * 
 */
public class UdpHandlerInitializer extends ChannelInitializer<DatagramChannel> {
	@Override
	protected void initChannel(DatagramChannel ch) throws Exception {
		ChannelPipeline pipeline = ch.pipeline();
		pipeline.addLast(new ChannelInboundHandlerAdapter());
		// 消息UDP解析器
		pipeline.addLast(new UdpMessageDecoder());
		// 消息UDP编码器
		pipeline.addLast(new UdpMessageEncoder());
		// 消息UDP处理器
		pipeline.addLast(new UdpMessageHandler());
	}
}
package com.chenrise.device.handler;
import com.chenrise.device.domain.UdpProtocolMessage;
import io.netty.bootstrap.Bootstrap;
import io.netty.channel.Channel;
import io.netty.channel.ChannelOption;
import io.netty.channel.EventLoopGroup;
import io.netty.channel.nio.NioEventLoopGroup;
import io.netty.channel.socket.nio.NioDatagramChannel;
import org.slf4j.Logger;
import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Value;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
import javax.annotation.PostConstruct;
import javax.annotation.PreDestroy;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.concurrent.BlockingQueue;
import java.util.concurrent.LinkedBlockingQueue;
/**
 * UDP监听服务
 * 
 * @author Mantunsci
 * 
 */
@Service
public class UdpListeningServer implements Runnable {
	private static final Logger logger = LoggerFactory.getLogger(UdpListeningServer.class);
	//服务端口和udp监听端口，启动后不冲突
	@Value("${server.port}")
	private String udpPort;
	private EventLoopGroup bossGroup;
	private List<Channel> ioChannels = new ArrayList<Channel>();
	private static final BlockingQueue<UdpProtocolMessage> MSG_AC_QUEUE = new LinkedBlockingQueue<>();
	public static BlockingQueue<UdpProtocolMessage> getMsgACQueue() {
		return MSG_AC_QUEUE;
	}
	/**
	 * 初始化后启动线程
	 */
	@PostConstruct
	public void init() {
		new Thread(this).start();
	}
	/**
	 * 服务监听启动
	 */
	public void run() {
		bossGroup = new NioEventLoopGroup();
		try {
			Bootstrap bs = new Bootstrap();
			bs.group(bossGroup);
			bs.channel(NioDatagramChannel.class);
			bs.option(ChannelOption.SO_BROADCAST, true);// 不广播
			bs.option(ChannelOption.SO_RCVBUF, 10 * 1024 * 1024);
			bs.handler(new UdpHandlerInitializer());
			// 绑定端口，开始接收进来的连接  
			Channel ch = bs.bind(Integer.parseInt(udpPort)).sync().channel();
			ioChannels.add(ch);
			logger.info("... UDP listening on port:{}", udpPort);
		} catch (Exception e) {
		}
	}
	/**
	 * 注销、关闭
	 */
	@PreDestroy
	public void destroy() {
		if (bossGroup != null) {
			bossGroup.shutdownGracefully();
		}
		for (Channel ch : ioChannels) {
			ch.closeFuture().syncUninterruptibly();
		}
	}
}
package com.chenrise.device.handler;
import com.alibaba.fastjson2.JSON;
import com.chenrise.device.constant.CommunicationDeviceType;
import com.chenrise.device.domain.*;
import com.chenrise.device.service.IDevCommunicationLogService;
import com.chenrise.device.service.UdpPowerInfoService;
import com.chenrise.device.util.*;
import io.netty.buffer.Unpooled;
import io.netty.channel.ChannelHandlerContext;
import io.netty.channel.SimpleChannelInboundHandler;
import io.netty.channel.socket.DatagramPacket;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Component;
import javax.annotation.PostConstruct;
import javax.annotation.PreDestroy;
import java.util.Date;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.concurrent.BlockingQueue;
import java.util.concurrent.ExecutorService;
import java.util.concurrent.Executors;
import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit;
/**
 * UDP协议消息处理器
 *
 * @author Mantunsci
 *
 */
@Slf4j
@Component
public class UdpMessageHandler extends SimpleChannelInboundHandler<UdpProtocolMessage> {
	private static UdpMessageHandler udpMessageHandler;
	@Autowired
	private UdpPowerInfoService udpPowerInfoService;
	@Autowired
	private IDevCommunicationLogService devCommunicationLogService;
	private final ExecutorService executorService = Executors.newCachedThreadPool();
//	private final ExecutorService processorExecutor = Executors.newSingleThreadExecutor();
	private final ExecutorService processorExecutor = Executors.newFixedThreadPool(3);
	private volatile boolean running = true;
//	private final BlockingQueue<UdpProtocolMessage> msgACQueue = new LinkedBlockingQueue<>();
  	private static final BlockingQueue<UdpProtocolMessage> msgACQueue = UdpListeningServer.getMsgACQueue();
	@PostConstruct
	public void initDemoService(){
		udpMessageHandler = this;
		udpMessageHandler.udpPowerInfoService = this.udpPowerInfoService;
		udpMessageHandler.devCommunicationLogService = this.devCommunicationLogService;
		processorExecutor.submit(this::processACMessages);
	}
	/**
	 * @Author cjh
	 * @Description // 对回复的消息进行处理
	 * @Date 11:27 2024/8/1
	 **/
	@Override
	protected void channelRead0(ChannelHandlerContext ctx, UdpProtocolMessage msgObj) throws Exception {
		long start = System.currentTimeMillis();
		// 处理从消息解码器传递下来的消息对象，先对消息队形进行判空防止NPE
		if (msgObj == null) {
			return;
		}
		// 获取消息对象的DATA属性，
//		ByteBuffer buf = ByteBuffer.wrap(msgObj.getData());
		byte[] resBytes = new byte[0];
		System.out.println("cmd------->>"+Integer.toHexString(msgObj.getCmd()));
		if (0xD3 == msgObj.getCmd()) {
			System.out.println("修改密码收到回复！！！！！！！！！！");
		}
		UdpProtocolMessage rMsg = new UdpProtocolMessage();
		rMsg.setData(new byte[0]);
		rMsg.setCmd(msgObj.getCmd());
		rMsg.setMac(msgObj.getMac());
		//部分消息需要的Block数量
		rMsg.setCmdVer(msgObj.getCmdVer());
		//组装回复消息参数
		resBytes = ByteUtil.obj2Bytes(rMsg,msgObj.sn);
		// 安排在1000ms后执行的回复消息任务
		byte[] finalResBytes = resBytes;
		DatagramPacket sendPacket = new DatagramPacket(Unpooled.copiedBuffer(finalResBytes), msgObj.getSender());
		ctx.writeAndFlush(sendPacket);
		long end = System.currentTimeMillis();
		System.err.println(".................回复消息耗时："+(end-start)+"ms");
		StringBuilder hexString = new StringBuilder();
		for (byte b : finalResBytes) {
			// Convert each byte to unsigned int and then to hex string
			String hex = Integer.toHexString(b & 0xFF);
			if (hex.length() == 1) {
				hexString.append("0"); // Ensure two digits
			}
			hexString.append(hex).append(" ");
		}
		System.out.println("---->>>>回复消息:"+hexString);
		executorService.submit(() -> {
			try {
				gogoMSG(msgObj);
			} catch (Exception e) {
				// 记录错误日志或其他处理
                log.error("处理 gogoMSG() 时发生错误: " + e.getMessage(), e);
			}
		});
	}
	public void gogoMSG(UdpProtocolMessage msgObj){
		String address = msgObj.getSender().getAddress().getHostAddress();
		//		在这里回复消息
//		 根据消息类型区分，参照协议对应消息体约定格式解析具体数据，并转换成数据对象，进行不同的业务逻辑处理
//		 CMD=0xB0为握手和配置消息
//		 0xB0  === 176
		if (0xB0 == msgObj.getCmd()) {
			UdpPowerInfo udpPowerInfo = B0DecodeUtil.getPowerInfo(msgObj,address);
			saveCommunicationLog(msgObj, udpPowerInfo);
			udpMessageHandler.udpPowerInfoService.addPowerInfoByData(udpPowerInfo);
		}
		// CMD=0xB2为推送网络配置消息
		// 0xB0  === 178
		else if (0xB2 == msgObj.getCmd()) {
			UdpNetConfig udpNetConfigData = B2DecodeUtil.getNetConfigInfo(msgObj,address);
			saveCommunicationLog(msgObj, udpNetConfigData);
		}
		// CMD=0xB4为推送开关配置消息，多个Block组合，每个Block长度固定为80字节，Block个数由HEAD部分的消息参数PARA指定
		// 0xB0  === 180
		else if (0xB4 == msgObj.getCmd()) {
			List<UdpNodeConfig> nodeList = B4DecodeUtil.getNodeConfigInfos(msgObj,address);
			saveCommunicationLog(msgObj, nodeList);
			udpMessageHandler.udpPowerInfoService.addNodeConfigDate(nodeList);
		}
		// CMD=0xAC为定时推送消息，多个Block组合，每个Block长度固定为32字节，Block个数由HEAD部分的消息参数PARA指定
		// 0xB0  === 172
		else if (0xAC == msgObj.getCmd()) {
            // 使用redis存储空开状态信息
            this.setPowerStatusToRedis(msgObj);
			if (msgACQueue.size()>200){
				System.out.println("AC消息队列长度超过200，清空队列");
				msgACQueue.clear();
			}
			msgACQueue.offer(msgObj);
			System.out.println("^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^AC消息队列长度："+msgACQueue.size());
		}
		// 0xA4  === 164
		else if(0xA4 == msgObj.getCmd()) { //报警信息，可以获取节点状态信息
//			System.out.println("收到A4消息");
			//0xe1表示实时事件)
			if(0xE1 == ByteForMessInfoUtil.byteToInteger((byte) msgObj.getCmdVer())){
				List<UdpNodeConfig> nodeList  = A4DecodeUtil.getNodeConfigInfos( msgObj,address);
				saveCommunicationLog(msgObj, nodeList);
				udpMessageHandler.udpPowerInfoService.upDateNodeConfig(nodeList);
			}else if(0xE2 == ByteForMessInfoUtil.byteToInteger((byte) msgObj.getCmdVer())){
				List<UdpNodeConfig> nodeList  = A4DecodeUtil.getNodeConfigInfos( msgObj,address);
				saveCommunicationLog(msgObj, nodeList);
				udpMessageHandler.udpPowerInfoService.upDateNodeConfig(nodeList);
			}
		}
		// 20260203 暂时注释掉更新电源端口，目前未发现有端口需要修改
		//udpMessageHandler.udpPowerInfoService.upDatePowerPort(msgObj.getSender());
//		所有的消息回复在下方的代码块中
	}
	@Override
	public void channelReadComplete(ChannelHandlerContext ctx) {
		ctx.flush();
	}
	public void processACMessages() {
		while (running) { // 根据running标志判断是否继续处理
			try {
				UdpProtocolMessage msgObj = msgACQueue.take();
				if (msgObj != null) {
					System.out.println("、、、、AC消息消费*1："+msgACQueue.size());
					try {
						setACmsg(msgObj); // 尝试处理消息
					} catch (Exception e) {
						// 记录错误日志或其他处理
                        log.error("处理消息时发生错误: " + e.getMessage(), e);
					}
				}
			} catch (InterruptedException e) {
				Thread.currentThread().interrupt(); // 保持中断状态
                log.error("处理 AC 消息时被中断: " + e.getMessage());
				break; // 安全退出循环
			}
		}
		// 处理完剩余的消息
		UdpProtocolMessage msgObj;
		while ((msgObj = msgACQueue.poll()) != null) {
			try {
				setACmsg(msgObj);
			} catch (Exception e) {
                log.error("处理消息时发生错误: " + e.getMessage(), e);
			}
		}
	}
	public void setACmsg(UdpProtocolMessage msgObj){
		String address = msgObj.getSender().getAddress().getHostAddress();
		List<UdpRealTimeInfo>  list = AcDecodeUtil.getRealTimeInfos(msgObj,address);
		udpMessageHandler.udpPowerInfoService.saveRealTimeInfo(list);
	}
	@PreDestroy
	public void shutdown() throws InterruptedException {
		running = false; // 停止接收新消息
		processorExecutor.shutdown(); // 关闭executor，停止接受新任务
		// 等待正在处理的消息完成
		if (!processorExecutor.awaitTermination(60, TimeUnit.SECONDS)) {
			processorExecutor.shutdownNow(); // 强制关闭
		}
	}
    /**
     * 将空开信息存入redis中
     */
    private void setPowerStatusToRedis(UdpProtocolMessage msgObj) {
        String address = msgObj.getSender().getAddress().getHostAddress();
        List<UdpRealTimeInfo> list = AcDecodeUtil.getRealTimeInfos(msgObj, address);
		saveCommunicationLog(msgObj, list);
        udpMessageHandler.udpPowerInfoService.saveRealTimeInfoToRedis(list);
    }
	/**
	 * 记录空开消息日志
	 */
	protected void saveCommunicationLog(UdpProtocolMessage msgObj, Object parseObject) {
		try {
			String address = msgObj.getSender().getAddress().getHostAddress();
			DevCommunicationLog communicationLog = new DevCommunicationLog();
			//地址
			communicationLog.setDeviceId(address);
			if (0xB0 == msgObj.getCmd()) {
				communicationLog.setDeviceType(CommunicationDeviceType.POWER_NODE_B0);
				communicationLog.setParsedData(JSON.toJSONString(parseObject));
			} else if (0xB2 == msgObj.getCmd()) {
				communicationLog.setDeviceType(CommunicationDeviceType.POWER_NODE_B2);
				communicationLog.setParsedData(JSON.toJSONString(parseObject));
			} else if (0xB4 == msgObj.getCmd()) {
				communicationLog.setDeviceType(CommunicationDeviceType.POWER_NODE_B4);
				communicationLog.setParsedData(JSON.toJSONString(parseObject));
			} else if (0xAC == msgObj.getCmd()) {
				communicationLog.setDeviceType(CommunicationDeviceType.POWER_NODE_AC);
				communicationLog.setParsedData(JSON.toJSONString(parseObject));
			} else if (0xA4 == msgObj.getCmd()) {
				communicationLog.setDeviceType(CommunicationDeviceType.POWER_NODE_A4);
				communicationLog.setParsedData(JSON.toJSONString(parseObject));
			} else {
				communicationLog.setDeviceType(CommunicationDeviceType.POWER_NODE);
			}
			communicationLog.setRawData(JSON.toJSONString(msgObj));
			communicationLog.setCreateTime(new Date());
			udpMessageHandler.devCommunicationLogService.saveCommunicationLog(communicationLog);
		} catch (Exception e) {
			log.error("保存空开消息日志异常，msgObj:{}", msgObj, e);
		}
	}
}

package com.chenrise.device.mapper;
import com.baomidou.mybatisplus.core.mapper.BaseMapper;
import com.chenrise.device.domain.UdpRealTimeInfo;
import org.apache.ibatis.annotations.Param;

package com.chenrise.device.pool;
import cn.hutool.json.JSONUtil;
import com.alibaba.fastjson.JSON;
import com.chenrise.device.controller.TcpClientHttpApiController;
import com.chenrise.device.service.TcpClientAddInfoByMapService;
import io.netty.channel.ChannelHandlerContext;
import io.netty.channel.SimpleChannelInboundHandler;
import io.netty.handler.timeout.IdleStateEvent;
import io.netty.util.CharsetUtil;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import javax.annotation.PostConstruct;
import io.netty.buffer.ByteBuf;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Component;
/**
 * 客户端消息接收handler
 * @author hmm
 */
@Component
public class ClientMessageHandler extends SimpleChannelInboundHandler<Object> {
	private WrapperResponseMessage wrapper;
	private Thread thread;
	public void setWrapper(WrapperResponseMessage wrapper) {
		this.wrapper = wrapper;
	}
	public void setThread(Thread thread) {
		this.thread = thread;
	}
	@Autowired
	private TcpClientAddInfoByMapService tcpclientAddInfoByMapService;
	@Autowired
	private TcpClientHttpApiController tcpClientHttpApiController;
	private static ClientMessageHandler clientMessageHandler;
	/**
	 * @Description: 钩子方法
	 * @Author: sunming
	 * @Date: 2022-12-14 17:41:18
	 * @return: void
	 */
	@PostConstruct
	public void initDemoService(){
		clientMessageHandler = this;
		clientMessageHandler.tcpclientAddInfoByMapService = this.tcpclientAddInfoByMapService;
		clientMessageHandler.tcpClientHttpApiController = this.tcpClientHttpApiController;
	}
	/**
	 * @Description:断开重连
	 * @Author: sunming
	 * @Date: 2022-12-14 17:41:42
	 * @param ctx:
	 * @return: void
	 */
	@Override
	public void channelInactive(ChannelHandlerContext ctx) throws Exception {
		clientMessageHandler.tcpClientHttpApiController.reconnect(ctx.channel().remoteAddress().toString());
	}
	/**
	 * @Description:显示活动连接
	 * @Author: sunming
	 * @Date: 2022-12-14 17:42:01
	 * @param ctx:
	 * @return: void
	 */
	@Override
	public void channelActive(ChannelHandlerContext ctx) throws Exception {
		System.out.println("channelActive");
	}
	/**
	 * @Description:异常捕获
	 * @Author: sunming
	 * @Date: 2022-12-14 17:42:14
	 * @param ctx:
	 * @param cause:
	 * @return: void
	 */
	@Override
	public void exceptionCaught(ChannelHandlerContext ctx, Throwable cause) throws Exception {
		super.exceptionCaught(ctx, cause);
	}
	@Override
	public void userEventTriggered(ChannelHandlerContext ctx, Object evt)
			throws Exception {
		if(evt instanceof IdleStateEvent){
			ctx.writeAndFlush("准备发送心跳数据");
		}
	}
	/**
	 * @Description:获取信息
	 * @Author: sunming
	 * @Date: 2022-12-14 17:42:29
	 * @param ctx:
	 * @param content:
	 * @return: void
	 */
	@Override
	protected void channelRead0(ChannelHandlerContext ctx, Object content){
		try{
//			System.out.println("监听返回的消息----------》"+JSONUtil.toJsonStr(content));
			ByteBuf buf = (ByteBuf) content;
			clientMessageHandler.tcpclientAddInfoByMapService.returnMessageByRec(ctx,buf.toString(CharsetUtil.UTF_8));
		}catch(Exception e){
			System.out.println(e);
		}finally{
//			ReferenceCountUtil.release(content);
		}
	}
}

package com.chenrise.device.pool;
public class ConnectServerException extends Exception {
	/** 日志 */
	private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;
	/**
	 * @Description:连接异常
	 * @Author: sunming
	 * @Date: 2022-12-14 17:11:23
	 * @return: null
	 */
	public ConnectServerException() {
		super();
	}
	/**
	 * @Description:连接服务异常
	 * @Author: sunming
	 * @Date: 2022-12-14 17:11:41
	 * @param message:
	 * @param cause:
	 * @param enableSuppression:
	 * @param writableStackTrace:
	 * @return: null
	 */
	public ConnectServerException(String message, Throwable cause, boolean enableSuppression, boolean writableStackTrace) {
		super(message, cause, enableSuppression, writableStackTrace);
		// TODO Auto-generated constructor stub
	}
	/**
	 * @Description:方法重写
	 * @Author: sunming
	 * @Date: 2022-12-14 17:12:09
	 * @param message:
	 * @param cause:
	 * @return: null
	 */
	public ConnectServerException(String message, Throwable cause) {
		super(message, cause);
	}
	/**
	 * @Description:方法重写
	 * @Author: sunming
	 * @Date: 2022-12-14 17:12:33
	 * @param message:
	 * @return: null
	 */
	public ConnectServerException(String message) {
		super(message);
		// TODO Auto-generated constructor stub
	}
	/**
	 * @Description:方法重写
	 * @Author: sunming
	 * @Date: 2022-12-14 17:12:48
	 * @param cause:
	 * @return: null
	 */
	public ConnectServerException(Throwable cause) {
		super(cause);
		// TODO Auto-generated constructor stub
	}
}
package com.chenrise.device.pool;
import io.netty.buffer.ByteBufAllocator;
import io.netty.channel.Channel;
import io.netty.channel.ChannelPipeline;
import io.netty.channel.pool.AbstractChannelPoolHandler;
import io.netty.handler.codec.LineBasedFrameDecoder;
import io.netty.handler.codec.http.HttpClientCodec;
import io.netty.handler.codec.string.StringDecoder;
import io.netty.handler.codec.string.StringEncoder;
import io.netty.handler.ssl.SslContext;
import io.netty.handler.ssl.SslContextBuilder;
import io.netty.handler.ssl.SslHandler;
import io.netty.handler.ssl.util.InsecureTrustManagerFactory;
import io.netty.handler.timeout.IdleStateHandler;
import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit;
/**
 * 默认channelpool消息配置handler
 * @author hmm
 *
 */
public class DefaultChannelPoolHandler extends AbstractChannelPoolHandler {
	public static final String MESSAGE_HANDLER = "messageHandler";
	private boolean ssl = false;
	private boolean http = false;
	private boolean heartbeat = false;
	public DefaultChannelPoolHandler(){
		this(false, false);
	}
	/**
	 * @Description: 默认配置
	 * @Author: sunming
	 * @Date: 2022-12-14 17:13:16
	 * @param ssl: 是否支持https
	 * @param http: 是否支持http
	 * @return: null
	 */
	public DefaultChannelPoolHandler(boolean ssl, boolean http){
		this(ssl, http, false);
	}
	/**
	 * @Description: 初始配置
	 * @Author: sunming
	 * @Date: 2022-12-14 17:13:42
	 * @param ssl: 是否支持https
	 * @param http: 是否支持http
	 * @param heartbeat: 是否支持心跳检测  间隔时间为秒
	 * @return:
	 */
	public DefaultChannelPoolHandler(boolean ssl, boolean http, boolean heartbeat){
		this.http = http;
		this.ssl = ssl;
		this.heartbeat = heartbeat;
	}
	/**
	 * @Description: 从连接池中获取channel
	 * @Author: sunming
	 * @Date: 2022-12-14 17:14:47
	 * @param channel:
	 * @return: void
	 */
	@Override
	public void channelAcquired(Channel channel) throws Exception {
		System.out.println("acquired a channel from pool"+channel);
	}
	/**
	 * @Description:创建连接
	 * @Author: sunming
	 * @Date: 2022-12-14 17:15:19
	 * @param channel:
	 * @return: void
	 */
	@Override
	public void channelCreated(Channel channel) throws Exception {
		System.out.println("created a channel from pool"+channel);
		ChannelPipeline pipeline = channel.pipeline();
		if(heartbeat){
			pipeline.addLast(new IdleStateHandler(10, 10, 20, TimeUnit.SECONDS));
		}
		if(ssl){
			SslContext clientContext =  SslContextBuilder.forClient().trustManager(InsecureTrustManagerFactory.INSTANCE).build();
	        pipeline.addLast("ssl", new SslHandler(clientContext.newEngine(ByteBufAllocator.DEFAULT)));
		}
		if(http || ssl){
//			pipeline.addLast("http-codec", new HttpClientCodec(1024, 1024, 8192, false));
		}else{
//			pipeline.addLast("decoder", new StringDecoder());
//			pipeline.addLast("encoder", new StringEncoder());
		}
		pipeline.addLast(MESSAGE_HANDLER, new ClientMessageHandler());
	}
	/**
	 * @Description:释放连接
	 * @Author: sunming
	 * @Date: 2022-12-14 17:15:37
	 * @param channel:
	 * @return: void
	 */
	@Override
	public void channelReleased(Channel channel) throws Exception {
		System.out.println("released a channel "+channel);
	}
}
package com.chenrise.device.pool;
import io.netty.bootstrap.Bootstrap;
import io.netty.channel.Channel;
import io.netty.channel.ChannelOption;
import io.netty.channel.nio.NioEventLoopGroup;
import io.netty.channel.pool.*;
import io.netty.channel.socket.nio.NioSocketChannel;
import io.netty.util.concurrent.Future;
import io.netty.util.concurrent.GenericFutureListener;
import java.net.InetSocketAddress;
import java.util.HashMap;
import java.util.Map;
/**
 * 默认channelpool配置
 * @author hmm
 *
 */
public class DefaultChannelPoolMap extends AbstractChannelPoolMap<InetSocketAddress, ChannelPool> {
	private final int maxConnections;
	private final int maxInitSize;
	private NioEventLoopGroup group = new NioEventLoopGroup();
	private final Map<InetSocketAddress, AbstractChannelPoolHandler> handlerMap = new HashMap<InetSocketAddress, AbstractChannelPoolHandler>();
	public DefaultChannelPoolMap(){
		this(10, 10);
	}
	/**
	 * @Description: 连接池配置
	 * @Author: sunming
	 * @Date: 2022-12-14 17:16:06
	 * @param maxConnections: 最大连接数
	 * @param maxInitSize: 最大初始化池数
	 * @return: null
	 */
	public DefaultChannelPoolMap(int maxConnections, int maxInitSize){
		this.maxConnections=maxConnections;
		this.maxInitSize = maxInitSize;
	}
	/**
	 * @Description:添加handler
	 * @Author: sunming
	 * @Date: 2022-12-14 17:16:44
	 * @param addr:
	 * @param channelPoolHandler:
	 * @return: void
	 */
	public void addHandler(InetSocketAddress addr, AbstractChannelPoolHandler channelPoolHandler){
		handlerMap.put(addr, channelPoolHandler);
	}
	/**
	 * @Description:新的连接池
	 * @Author: sunming
	 * @Date: 2022-12-14 17:17:06
	 * @param addr:
	 * @return: io.netty.channel.pool.ChannelPool
	 */
	@Override
	protected ChannelPool newPool(InetSocketAddress addr) {
		Bootstrap bootstrap = new Bootstrap();
		bootstrap.remoteAddress(addr);
		bootstrap.channel(NioSocketChannel.class);
		bootstrap.group(group);
		bootstrap.option(ChannelOption.SO_KEEPALIVE, true);
		bootstrap.option(ChannelOption.TCP_NODELAY, true);
        bootstrap.option(ChannelOption.SO_SNDBUF, 32000);
        bootstrap.option(ChannelOption.SO_RCVBUF, 32000);
		bootstrap.option(ChannelOption.SO_TIMEOUT, 50);
		bootstrap.option(ChannelOption.CONNECT_TIMEOUT_MILLIS, 1000);
		AbstractChannelPoolHandler channelPoolHandler = handlerMap.get(addr);
		if(null == channelPoolHandler){
			channelPoolHandler = new DefaultChannelPoolHandler();
		}
		SimpleChannelPool pool = new FixedChannelPool(bootstrap, channelPoolHandler, maxConnections);
		this.initChannelPool(pool, addr);
		return pool;
	}
	/**
	 * @Description:初始化channel池
	 * @Author: sunming
	 * @Date: 2022-12-14 17:17:26
	 * @param pool:
	 * @param addr:
	 * @return: void
	 */
	private void initChannelPool(final ChannelPool pool, final InetSocketAddress addr){
		for(int i=0;i < maxInitSize;i++){
			/**
			 * 这是一种不够严谨的方式，假如需要加入很多个连接，很可能前半部分的确在新建后释放了，
			 * 然而后半部分实际上并没有新建，而是取得前面的连接然后释放，这样就导致实际初始化的channel并没有达到500个，看源码很容易知道原因
			 * 当然，目前的测速中，我初始化1000个最大连接数，倒是还没有发生这种情况
			 */
			pool.acquire().addListener(new GenericFutureListener<Future<Channel>>() {
				@Override
				public void operationComplete(Future<Channel> future)
						throws Exception {
					if(future.isSuccess()){
						Channel channel = future.getNow();
						pool.release(channel);
					}else{
						throw new ConnectServerException(addr+" client not connect server");
					}
				}
			});
		}
	}
	/**
	 * @Description:关闭
	 * @Author: sunming
	 * @Date: 2022-12-14 17:17:45
	 * @return: void
	 */
	public void shutdown(){
		group.shutdownGracefully();
	}
}
package com.chenrise.device.pool;
import io.netty.buffer.ByteBuf;
import io.netty.buffer.Unpooled;
import io.netty.channel.Channel;
import io.netty.channel.ChannelPipeline;
import io.netty.channel.socket.SocketChannel;
import io.netty.util.CharsetUtil;
import io.netty.util.concurrent.Future;
import io.netty.util.concurrent.GenericFutureListener;
import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit;
import java.util.concurrent.locks.LockSupport;
/**
 * 默认消息收发监听器
 * @author hmm
 *
 */
public class DefaultGenericFutureListener implements GenericFutureListener<Future<Channel>> {
	private WrapperResponseMessage wrapperResponse;
	private String message;
	private Thread thread = Thread.currentThread();
	private SocketChannel socketChannel;
	public DefaultGenericFutureListener(WrapperResponseMessage wrapperResponse,
                                        String  message) {
		this.wrapperResponse = wrapperResponse;
		this.message = message;
	}
	/**
	 * @Description:操作完成
	 * @Author: sunming
	 * @Date: 2022-12-14 17:18:07
	 * @param future:
	 * @return: void
	 */
	@Override
	public void operationComplete(Future<Channel> future) throws Exception {
		if(future.isSuccess()){
			 Channel channel = future.getNow();
			 ChannelPipeline pipeline = channel.pipeline();
			 ClientMessageHandler messageHandler = (ClientMessageHandler) pipeline.get(DefaultChannelPoolHandler.MESSAGE_HANDLER);
			 messageHandler.setWrapper(this.wrapperResponse);
			 messageHandler.setThread(this.thread);
			socketChannel = (SocketChannel) future.getNow();
			ByteBuf buf = Unpooled.copiedBuffer(this.message.getBytes(CharsetUtil.UTF_8));
			socketChannel.writeAndFlush(buf);
		}
		future.removeListener(this);
	}
	/**
	 * @Description:获取WrapperResponseMessage
	 * @Author: sunming
	 * @Date: 2022-12-14 17:18:26
	 * @return: com.chenrise.device.pool.WrapperResponseMessage
	 */
	public WrapperResponseMessage get(){
		LockSupport.park(this.thread);
		return this.wrapperResponse;
	}
	/**
	 * @Description:获取WrapperResponseMessage
	 * @Author: sunming
	 * @Date: 2022-12-14 17:18:48
	 * @param time:
	 * @param unit:
	 * @return: com.chenrise.device.pool.WrapperResponseMessage
	 */
	public WrapperResponseMessage get(long time, TimeUnit unit){
		long deadline = System.nanoTime() + unit.toNanos(time);
		for(;;){
			if(!wrapperResponse.isEmpty()){
				return this.wrapperResponse;
			}
			long nanos = deadline - System.nanoTime();
			if(nanos <= 0L){
				System.out.println("超时！！！");
				return this.wrapperResponse;
			}
			LockSupport.parkNanos(this.thread, nanos);
		}
	}
}
package com.chenrise.device.pool;
import java.util.Map;
public class MessageHeader {
	private String crcCode;
	private int length;
	private int type;
	private long sessionID;
	private Map<String, Object> attachment;
	public String getCrcCode() {
		return crcCode;
	}
	public void setCrcCode(String crcCode) {
		this.crcCode = crcCode;
	}
	public int getLength() {
		return length;
	}
	public void setLength(int length) {
		this.length = length;
	}
	public int getType() {
		return type;
	}
	/**
	 * 0，业务请求消息
	 * 1、业务响应消息
	 * 2、业务ONE WAY消息
	 * 3、握手请求消息
	 * 4、握手应答消息
	 * 5、心跳应答消息
	 */
	public void setType(int type) {
		this.type = type;
	}
	public long getSessionID() {
		return sessionID;
	}
	public void setSessionID(long sessionID) {
		this.sessionID = sessionID;
	}
	public Map<String, Object> getAttachment() {
		return attachment;
	}
	public void setAttachment(Map<String, Object> attachment) {
		this.attachment = attachment;
	}
}
package com.chenrise.device.pool;
import io.netty.channel.Channel;
import io.netty.util.concurrent.Future;
public class NettyClient {
	/**
	 * @Description:发送消息
	 * @Author: sunming
	 * @Date: 2022-12-14 17:19:16
	 * @param future:
	 * @param message:
	 * @return: com.chenrise.device.pool.DefaultGenericFutureListener
	 */
	public static DefaultGenericFutureListener sendMessage(Future<Channel> future, String message){
		WrapperResponseMessage response = new WrapperResponseMessage();
		DefaultGenericFutureListener listener = new DefaultGenericFutureListener(response, message);
		if(null != future){
			future.addListener(listener);
		}
		return listener;
	}
}
package com.chenrise.device.pool;
import io.netty.channel.pool.AbstractChannelPoolHandler;
import io.netty.channel.pool.ChannelPool;
import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Component;
import java.net.InetSocketAddress;
import java.util.HashMap;
import java.util.Map;
/**
 * @Description:链接池工厂
 * @Author: sunming
 * @Date: 2022-12-15 13:41:34
 */
@Component
@Slf4j
@RequiredArgsConstructor
public class NettyClientPoolFactory {
	private final int maxConnections = 40;
	private final int maxInitSize = 0;
	private DefaultChannelPoolMap poolMap;
	private final Map<String, InetSocketAddress> inetMap = new HashMap<String, InetSocketAddress>();
	/**
	 * @Description: 多地址初始化连接池
	 * @Author: sunming
	 * @Date: 2022-12-14 17:19:32
	 * @return: void
	 */
	public void init() {
		poolMap = new DefaultChannelPoolMap(maxConnections, maxInitSize);
	}
	public void addConnectToPool(String poolName, String host, Integer port){
		ChannelPool pool = this.getPool(poolName);
		if(pool==null){
			InetSocketAddress inet = new InetSocketAddress(host, port);
			this.setPool(poolName, inet, new DefaultChannelPoolHandler(false, false, false));
		}
	}
	/**
	 * @Description:根据key值移除对应的链接
	 * @Author: sunming
	 * @Date: 2022-12-15 13:39:38
	 * @param poolName:
	 * @return: void
	 */
	public void removeConnectFromPool(String poolName){
//		inetMap.remove(poolName);
		ChannelPool pool = this.getPool(poolName);
		if(pool!=null){
			InetSocketAddress inet = new InetSocketAddress(poolName.split(":")[0], Integer.valueOf(poolName.split(":")[1]));
			poolMap.remove(inet);
			inetMap.remove(poolName);
		}
	}
	/**
	 * @Description: 放入链接池
	 * @Author: sunming
	 * @Date: 2022-12-15 13:40:08
	 * @param name:
	 * @param inet:
	 * @param channelPoolHandler:
	 * @return: void
	 */
    public void setPool(String name, InetSocketAddress inet, AbstractChannelPoolHandler channelPoolHandler){
		if(null != channelPoolHandler){
			 poolMap.addHandler(inet, channelPoolHandler);
		}
		poolMap.get(inet);
		inetMap.put(name, inet);
	}
	/**
	 * @Description: 根据key值获取链接池
	 * @Author: sunming
	 * @Date: 2022-12-15 13:40:25
	 * @param source:
	 * @return: io.netty.channel.pool.ChannelPool
	 */
	public ChannelPool getPool(String source){
		InetSocketAddress inet = inetMap.get(source);
		if(null == inet){
			return null;
		}
		return poolMap.get(inet);
	}
	/**
	 * @Description: 程序关闭后关闭链接池
	 * @Author: sunming
	 * @Date: 2022-12-15 13:40:54
	 * @return: void
	 */
	public void close(){
		poolMap.shutdown();
		poolMap.close();
	}
}
package com.chenrise.device.pool;
public class WrapperRequestMessage {
	private Object body;
	public Object getBody() {
		return body;
	}
	public void setBody(Object body) {
		this.body = body;
	}
}
package com.chenrise.device.pool;
public class WrapperResponseMessage {
	private String uri;
	private Object body;
	public Object getBody() {
		return body;
	}
	public void setBody(Object body) {
		this.body = body;
	}
	public String getUri() {
		return uri;
	}
	public void setUri(String uri) {
		this.uri = uri;
	}
	public boolean isEmpty(){
		if(null != this.body){
			return false;
		}
		return true;
	}
}
package com.chenrise.device.resolver;
import com.alibaba.fastjson2.JSON;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.SpringUtils;
import com.chenrise.device.constant.CommunicationDeviceType;
import com.chenrise.device.domain.DevCommunicationLog;
import com.chenrise.device.domain.UdpProtocolMessage;
import com.chenrise.device.service.IDevCommunicationLogService;
import com.chenrise.device.util.ByteUtil;
import io.netty.buffer.ByteBuf;
import io.netty.channel.ChannelHandlerContext;
import io.netty.channel.socket.DatagramPacket;
import io.netty.handler.codec.MessageToMessageDecoder;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import java.util.Date;
import java.util.List;
/**
 * UDP消息解析器
 *
 * @author Mantunsci
 */
@Slf4j
public class UdpMessageDecoder extends MessageToMessageDecoder<DatagramPacket> {
	@Override
    protected void decode(ChannelHandlerContext ctx, DatagramPacket dataPkg, List<Object> out) throws Exception {
    	// 获取UDP消息数据包字节流
        ByteBuf buf = dataPkg.content();
//		String con = ByteBufUtil.hexDump(buf);
        // 解析字节流并转换为消息对象
        UdpProtocolMessage msgObj = new UdpProtocolMessage();
		//获取发送端IP和端口
		msgObj.setSender(dataPkg.sender());
//		System.out.println("sender="+dataPkg.sender());
        String originalMsg = ByteUtil.printByteBufHex(buf, msgObj.getSender());
		// 字节流起始下标从0开始截取
		int index = 0;
		/** ===【解析协议 开始】===== **/
		/** ===【HEAD部分】===== **/
		
		// 1 byte: 消息版本 PVER，固定为0xF1
		msgObj.setMsf(buf.getUnsignedByte(index));
		// 检查消息版本的值是否为0xF1，如果不相等则抛错或者退出，不再继续解析
        if (0xF1 != msgObj.getMsf()) {
        	throw new Exception("消息版本错误");
        	// return;
        }
		index ++;
		// 1 byte: 消息类型 CMD
		msgObj.setCmd(buf.getUnsignedByte(index));
//		System.out.println("解析中的cmd==============="+buf.getUnsignedByte(index));
		index ++;
		// 1 byte: 消息参数 PARAM
		msgObj.setCmdVer(buf.getUnsignedByte(index));
		index ++;
		// 1 byte: 第二消息参数 ECHO （发送时表示消息类型附加码2；回复消息时表示返回ack类型）
		msgObj.setCmdVer2(buf.getUnsignedByte(index));
		// 判断消息是否为服务器主动下发后通讯模块回复的消息，如果是则读取ack类型回复状态：0表示成功，非0表示异常
		if(ByteUtil.isAckCmd(msgObj.getCmd())){
			msgObj.setAck(msgObj.getCmdVer2());
		}
		index ++;
		// 2 byte: 数据长度 LEN
		msgObj.setLen(buf.getUnsignedShort(index));
		index += 2;
		// 2 byte: 消息序列号 SN （新消息递增）
		msgObj.setCmdNo(buf.getUnsignedShort(index));
		msgObj.sn=new byte[2];
		msgObj.sn[0]=buf.getByte(index);
		msgObj.sn[1]=buf.getByte(index+1);
		index += 2;
		// 6 byte: 设备唯一标识 MAC
		//msgObj.setMac(ByteUtil.byteToHex(buf.getBytes(index, new byte[6]).array()));
		byte[] mac = new byte[6];
		msgObj.setMac(ByteUtil.byteToHex(mac));
		index += 6;
		// 1 byte: 设备时区 ZONE （等于实际时区的2倍，出厂默认为16，16/2=东八区）
		msgObj.setTmZone(buf.getByte(index) / 2);
		index ++;
		// 1 byte: 保留备用 HOST
		index ++;
		/** ===【DATA部分】===== **/
		//LEN byte: 消息体 DATA（按消息头指定的LEN长度进行截取）
//		ByteBuf bufTemp = buf.slice(index/2, msgObj.getLen()+index/2);
		byte[] bytemp = new byte[msgObj.getLen()];
		for(int bi=0;bi<msgObj.getLen();bi++){
			bytemp[bi] = (byte) buf.getUnsignedByte(index);
			index++;
		}
//		bufTemp.getBytes(index,bytemp);
		msgObj.setData(bytemp);
//		index += msgObj.getLen();
		/** ===【CRC部分】===== **/
		// 4 byte： CRC32校验和 CRC
		msgObj.setCrc(buf.getUnsignedInt(index));
		index += 4;
		/** ===【解析协议 END】===== **/
		// 计算CRC校验和（报文总长度 = 报文头长度16 + 数据长度LEN）
		//msgObj.setCrcCalc(ByteUtil.calCrc32(buf.getBytes(0, new byte[16 + msgObj.getLen()]).array()));
		byte[] crcCalc = new byte[16 + msgObj.getLen()];
		msgObj.setCrcCalc(ByteUtil.calCrc32(crcCalc));
        // 将转换的消息对象msgObj往下传递给消息处理器进行处理
        out.add(msgObj);
        saveLog(originalMsg, msgObj);
    }
    /**
     * 保存消息日志
     *
     * @param originalMsg 原始消息
     * @param msgObj      消息对象
     */
    private void saveLog(String originalMsg, UdpProtocolMessage msgObj) {
        try {
            // 手动获取Bean
            IDevCommunicationLogService devCommunicationLogService = SpringUtils.getBean(IDevCommunicationLogService.class);
            DevCommunicationLog communicationLog = new DevCommunicationLog();
            String address = msgObj.getSender().getAddress().getHostAddress();
            communicationLog.setDeviceId(address);
            // 设置设备类型
            if (0xB0 == msgObj.getCmd()) {
                communicationLog.setDeviceType(CommunicationDeviceType.POWER_NODE_B0);
            } else if (0xB2 == msgObj.getCmd()) {
                communicationLog.setDeviceType(CommunicationDeviceType.POWER_NODE_B2);
            } else if (0xB4 == msgObj.getCmd()) {
                communicationLog.setDeviceType(CommunicationDeviceType.POWER_NODE_B4);
            } else if (0xAC == msgObj.getCmd()) {
                communicationLog.setDeviceType(CommunicationDeviceType.POWER_NODE_AC);
            } else if (0xA4 == msgObj.getCmd()) {
                communicationLog.setDeviceType(CommunicationDeviceType.POWER_NODE_A4);
            } else {
                communicationLog.setDeviceType(CommunicationDeviceType.POWER_NODE);
            }
            communicationLog.setRawData(originalMsg);
            communicationLog.setParsedData(JSON.toJSONString(msgObj));
            communicationLog.setCreateTime(new Date());
            devCommunicationLogService.saveCommunicationLog(communicationLog);
        } catch (Exception e) {
            log.error("UdpMessageDecoder保存日志失败", e);
        }
    }
}
package com.chenrise.device.resolver;
import com.chenrise.device.domain.UdpProtocolMessage;
import io.netty.channel.ChannelHandlerContext;
import io.netty.handler.codec.MessageToMessageEncoder;
import java.util.List;
/**
 * UDP消息编码器
 *
 * @author Mantunsci
 *
 */
public class UdpMessageEncoder extends MessageToMessageEncoder<UdpProtocolMessage> {
	@Override
	protected void encode(ChannelHandlerContext ctx, UdpProtocolMessage msg, List<Object> ou) throws Exception {
	}
}
package com.chenrise.device.service;
import javax.sound.sampled.*;
import javax.websocket.*;
import javax.websocket.server.ServerEndpoint;
import java.io.IOException;
import java.nio.ByteBuffer;
import java.nio.file.Files;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.nio.file.Paths;
import java.util.Base64;
@ServerEndpoint("/audio")
public class AudioServer {
    private AudioThread audioThread;
    @OnOpen
    public void onOpen(Session session) {
        // 创建音频线程并启动
        audioThread = new AudioThread(session);
        audioThread.start();
    }
    @OnMessage
    public void onMessage(String message, Session session) {
        // 暂时不需要处理客户端发送的消息
    }
    @OnClose
    public void onClose(Session session) {
        // 关闭音频线程
        audioThread.close();
    }
    private static class AudioThread extends Thread {
        private static final int BUFFER_SIZE = 4096;
        private final Session session;
        private boolean isRunning;
        public AudioThread(Session session) {
            this.session = session;
            this.isRunning = true;
        }
        public void run() {
            try {
                // 获取音频输入设备
                AudioFormat format = new AudioFormat(44100, 16, 1, true, false);
                TargetDataLine line = AudioSystem.getTargetDataLine(format);
                line.open(format);
                line.start();
                // 持续获取音频并发送
                while (isRunning) {
                    byte[] buffer = new byte[BUFFER_SIZE];
                    int bytesRead = line.read(buffer, 0, buffer.length);
                    String encodedAudio = Base64.getEncoder().encodeToString(buffer);
                    session.getBasicRemote().sendText(encodedAudio);
                }
                // 关闭音频输入设备
                line.stop();
                line.close();
            } catch (IOException | LineUnavailableException e) {
                e.printStackTrace();
            }
        }
        public void close() {
            isRunning = false;
        }
    }
    @ServerEndpoint("/file")
    public static class FileServer {
        @OnOpen
        public void onOpen(Session session) {
            try {
                // 打开音频文件
                Path path = Paths.get("audio.wav");
                byte[] data = Files.readAllBytes(path);
                ByteBuffer buffer = ByteBuffer.wrap(data);
                // 发送音频文件数据
                session.getBasicRemote().sendBinary(buffer);
            } catch (IOException e) {
                e.printStackTrace();
            }
        }
        @OnClose
        public void onClose(Session session) {
            // 关闭会话
        }
    }
}

package com.chenrise.device.service.impl;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.DateUtils;
import com.chenrise.device.domain.AirConditioner;

import com.chenrise.device.domain.PowerUpdatepwRecords;
import com.chenrise.device.mapper.AirConditionerControlLogMapper;
import com.chenrise.device.mapper.AirConditionerMapper;
import com.chenrise.device.mapper.PowerUpdatepwRecordsMapper;
import com.chenrise.device.service.IAirConditionerControlLogService;
import com.chenrise.device.service.IPowerUpdatepwRecordsService;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
import javax.annotation.Resource;
import java.util.List;
/**
 * @Author cjh
 * @Description 修改空开密码记录
 * @Date 13:20 2024/8/1
 **/
@Service
public class AirConditionerControlLogServiceImpl implements IAirConditionerControlLogService
{
    @Resource
    private AirConditionerControlLogMapper mapper;
    /**
     * @Author cjh
     * @Description //按ID 获取
     * @Date 13:18 2024/8/1
     **/
    @Override
    public AirConditionerControlLog get(Long id)
    {
        return mapper.get(id);
    }
    /**
     * @Author cjh
     * @Description //按uID 获取
     * @Date 13:18 2024/8/1
     **/
    @Override
    public AirConditionerControlLog getByCode(String code)
    {
        return mapper.getByCode(code);
    }
    /**
     * @Author cjh
     * @Description //获取列表
     * @Date 13:18 2024/8/1
     **/
    @Override
    public List<AirConditionerControlLog> list(AirConditionerControlLog obj)
    {
        return mapper.list(obj);
    }
    /**
     * @Author cjh
     * @Description //插入
     * @Date 13:18 2024/8/1
     **/
    @Override
    public int insert(AirConditionerControlLog obj)
    {
        obj.setCreateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        return mapper.insert(obj);
    }
    /**
     * @Author cjh
     * @Description //修改
     * @Date 13:18 2024/8/1
     **/
    @Override
    public int update(AirConditionerControlLog obj)
    {
        return mapper.update(obj);
    }
    /**
     * @Author cjh
     * @Description //删除
     * @Date 13:18 2024/8/1
     **/
    @Override
    public int delete(Long id)
    {
        return mapper.delete(id);
    }
}
package com.chenrise.device.service.impl;
import cn.hutool.core.util.IdUtil;
import cn.hutool.core.util.StrUtil;
import cn.hutool.json.JSONObject;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.DateUtils;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.StringUtils;
import com.chenrise.common.security.utils.SecurityUtils;
import com.chenrise.device.domain.AirConditioner;
import com.chenrise.device.domain.AirConditionerControlLog;
import com.chenrise.device.domain.PowerUpdatepwRecords;
import com.chenrise.device.handler.NettyServerHandler;
import com.chenrise.device.mapper.AirConditionerControlLogMapper;
import com.chenrise.device.mapper.AirConditionerMapper;
import com.chenrise.device.mapper.PowerUpdatepwRecordsMapper;
import com.chenrise.device.service.IAirConditionerService;
import com.chenrise.device.service.IPowerUpdatepwRecordsService;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
import org.tio.utils.json.Json;
import javax.annotation.Resource;
import java.util.List;
/**
 * @Author cjh
 * @Description 修改空开密码记录
 * @Date 13:20 2024/8/1
 **/
@Service
public class AirConditionerServiceImpl implements IAirConditionerService
{
    @Resource
    private AirConditionerMapper mapper;
    @Resource private AirConditionerControlLogMapper controlLogMapper;
    @Resource
    NettyServerHandler nettyServerHandler;
    /**
     * @Author cjh
     * @Description //按ID 获取
     * @Date 13:18 2024/8/1
     **/
    @Override
    public AirConditioner get(Long id)
    {
        return mapper.get(id);
    }
    /**
     * @Author cjh
     * @Description //按uID 获取
     * @Date 13:18 2024/8/1
     **/
    @Override
    public AirConditioner getByGateway(String gateway)
    {
        return mapper.getByGateway(gateway);
    }
    /**
     * @Author cjh
     * @Description //获取列表
     * @Date 13:18 2024/8/1
     **/
    @Override
    public List<AirConditioner> list(AirConditioner obj)
    {
        return mapper.list(obj);
    }
    /**
     * @Author cjh
     * @Description //插入
     * @Date 13:18 2024/8/1
     **/
    @Override
    public int insert(AirConditioner obj)
    {
        String code = IdUtil.randomUUID();
        JSONObject object = new JSONObject();
        object.putOnce("id",obj.getGateway()).putOnce("code",code).putOnce("device","AirConditioner").putOnce("cmd","Initialization");
        nettyServerHandler.sendMsg(obj.getIp()+":"+obj.getPort(), object);
        obj.setCreateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        AirConditionerControlLog controlLog = new AirConditionerControlLog();
        controlLog.setCode(String.valueOf(code));
        controlLog.setGateway(obj.getGateway());
        controlLog.setDevice("AirConditioner");
        controlLog.setCmd("Initialization");
        controlLogMapper.insert(controlLog);
        return mapper.insert(obj);
    }
    /**
     * @Author cjh
     * @Description //修改
     * @Date 13:18 2024/8/1
     **/
    @Override
    public int update(AirConditioner obj)
    {
        return mapper.update(obj);
    }
    /**
     * @Author cjh
     * @Description //删除
     * @Date 13:18 2024/8/1
     **/
    @Override
    public int delete(Long id)
    {
        return mapper.delete(id);
    }
    /**
     * @Author cjh
     * @Description //发送指令
     * @Date 13:18 2024/8/1
     **/
    @Override
    public void sendOrder(JSONObject jsonObject)
    {
        AirConditioner airConditioner = this.get(jsonObject.getLong("id"));
        String code = IdUtil.randomUUID();
        JSONObject object = new JSONObject();
        object.putOnce("id",airConditioner.getGateway())
                .putOnce("code",code)
                .putOnce("device",jsonObject.get("device"))
                .putOnce("cmd",jsonObject.get("cmd"));
        AirConditionerControlLog controlLog = new AirConditionerControlLog();
        controlLog.setCode(String.valueOf(code));
        controlLog.setGateway(airConditioner.getGateway());
        controlLog.setDevice(jsonObject.getStr("device"));
        controlLog.setCmd(jsonObject.getStr("cmd"));
        controlLog.setCreateBy(SecurityUtils.getUsername());
        controlLog.setCreateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        switch (jsonObject.getStr("cmd")){
            //空调控制器发射自定义红外 1 至自定义红外 20，data字段为1~20。
            case "CustomIREmission":
                object.putOnce("data",airConditioner.getCustomIremission());
                controlLog.setData(String.valueOf(airConditioner.getCustomIremission()));
                break;
            //空调自动控制双机时间，data字段不可缺省，单位为分钟(<65536)，精度为1。
            case "RotationTime":
                object.putOnce("data",airConditioner.getChannelRotationControlTime());
                controlLog.setData(String.valueOf(airConditioner.getChannelRotationControlTime()));
                break;
            //空调自动控制模式温度上限设置，data字段不可缺省，单位为℃，精度为0.1。
            case "UpperLimitSet":
                object.putOnce("data",airConditioner.getMaxTem());
                controlLog.setData(String.valueOf(airConditioner.getMaxTem()));
                break;
            //空调自动控制模式温度下限设置，data字段不可缺省，单位为℃，精度为0.1。
            case "LowerLimitSet":
                object.putOnce("data",airConditioner.getMinTem());
                controlLog.setData(String.valueOf(airConditioner.getMinTem()));
                break;
            //空调自动控制温度回差值设置，data字段不可缺省，单位为℃，精度为0.1。
            case "ReturnDiffSet":
                object.putOnce("data",airConditioner.getTemHysteresis());
                controlLog.setData(String.valueOf(airConditioner.getTemHysteresis()));
                break;
            //空调电流阈值，电流大于阈值代表成功，data字段不可缺省，单位为A，精度为0.1。
            case "CurrentThr":
                object.putOnce("data",airConditioner.getCurrentThreshold());
                controlLog.setData(String.valueOf(airConditioner.getCurrentThreshold()));
                break;
            //温度校准值，data字段不可缺省，单位为℃，精度为0.1。
            case "TempComp":
                object.putOnce("data",airConditioner.getTemCalibration());
                controlLog.setData(String.valueOf(airConditioner.getTemCalibration()));
                break;
            //湿度校准值，data字段不可缺省，单位为℃，精度为0.1。
            case "HumComp":
                object.putOnce("data",airConditioner.getHumCalibration());
                controlLog.setData(String.valueOf(airConditioner.getHumCalibration()));
                break;
            //空调控制器时间校正，data字段不可缺省，以秒为单位的Unix时间戳（eg:1723046400）。
            case "Timing":
                long currentTimeMillis = System.currentTimeMillis();
                // 将毫秒值转换为秒
                long time = currentTimeMillis / 1000;
                object.putOnce("data",time);
                controlLog.setData(String.valueOf(time));
                break;
            default:
                break;
        }
        nettyServerHandler.sendMsg(airConditioner.getIp()+":"+airConditioner.getPort(), object);
        controlLogMapper.insert(controlLog);
    }
}
package com.chenrise.device.service.impl;
import java.util.List;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.DateUtils;
import com.chenrise.device.domain.DevCollectorData;
import com.chenrise.device.mapper.DevCollectorDataMapper;
import com.chenrise.device.service.IDevCollectorDataService;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
import javax.annotation.Resource;
/**
 * 网络采集器采集数据Service业务层处理
 *
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2023-06-01
 */
@Service
public class DevCollectorDataServiceImpl implements IDevCollectorDataService
{
    @Resource
    private DevCollectorDataMapper devCollectorDataMapper;
    /**
     * 查询网络采集器采集数据
     *
     * @param id 网络采集器采集数据主键
     * @return 网络采集器采集数据
     */
    @Override
    public DevCollectorData selectDevCollectorDataById(Long id)
    {
        return devCollectorDataMapper.selectDevCollectorDataById(id);
    }
    /**
     * 查询网络采集器采集数据列表
     *
     * @param devCollectorData 网络采集器采集数据
     * @return 网络采集器采集数据
     */
    @Override
    public List<DevCollectorData> selectDevCollectorDataList(DevCollectorData devCollectorData)
    {
        return devCollectorDataMapper.selectDevCollectorDataList(devCollectorData);
    }
    /**
     * 新增网络采集器采集数据
     *
     * @param devCollectorData 网络采集器采集数据
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int insertDevCollectorData(DevCollectorData devCollectorData)
    {
        devCollectorData.setCreateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        return devCollectorDataMapper.insertDevCollectorData(devCollectorData);
    }
    /**
     * 修改网络采集器采集数据
     *
     * @param devCollectorData 网络采集器采集数据
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int updateDevCollectorData(DevCollectorData devCollectorData)
    {
        return devCollectorDataMapper.updateDevCollectorData(devCollectorData);
    }
    /**
     * 批量删除网络采集器采集数据
     *
     * @param ids 需要删除的网络采集器采集数据主键
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int deleteDevCollectorDataByIds(Long[] ids)
    {
        return devCollectorDataMapper.deleteDevCollectorDataByIds(ids);
    }
    /**
     * 删除网络采集器采集数据信息
     *
     * @param id 网络采集器采集数据主键
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int deleteDevCollectorDataById(Long id)
    {
        return devCollectorDataMapper.deleteDevCollectorDataById(id);
    }
}
package com.chenrise.device.service.impl;
import com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.service.impl.ServiceImpl;
import com.chenrise.device.domain.DevCommunicationLog;
import com.chenrise.device.mapper.DevCommunicationLogMapper;
import com.chenrise.device.service.IDevCommunicationLogService;
import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
import org.springframework.scheduling.annotation.Async;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
import java.time.LocalDate;
import java.time.ZoneId;
import java.time.format.DateTimeFormatter;
import java.util.Date;
import java.util.Set;
import java.util.concurrent.ConcurrentHashMap;
@RequiredArgsConstructor
@Service
public class DevCommunicationLogServiceImpl extends ServiceImpl<DevCommunicationLogMapper, DevCommunicationLog> implements IDevCommunicationLogService {
    private final DevCommunicationLogMapper devCommunicationLogMapper;
    private static final Set<String> createdTables = ConcurrentHashMap.newKeySet();
    @Async("devCommunicationLogExecutor")
    @Override
    public void saveCommunicationLog(DevCommunicationLog devCommunicationLog) {
        String tableName = resolveMonthlyTableName(devCommunicationLog.getCreateTime());
        if (createdTables.add(tableName)) {
            devCommunicationLogMapper.createMonthlyTable(tableName);
        }
        devCommunicationLogMapper.insert(devCommunicationLog);
    }
    private String resolveMonthlyTableName(Date createTime) {
        LocalDate date = createTime != null
                ? createTime.toInstant().atZone(ZoneId.systemDefault()).toLocalDate()
                : LocalDate.now();
        String suffix = date.format(DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("yyyyMM"));
        return "dev_communication_log_" + suffix;
    }
}
package com.chenrise.device.service.impl;
import java.util.List;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
import com.chenrise.device.mapper.DevNetworkCollectorItemMapper;
