import com.chenrise.device.service.IDevNetworkCollectorItemService;
/**
 * 室内设备Service业务层处理
 * 
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2023-06-02
 */
@Service
public class DevNetworkCollectorItemServiceImpl implements IDevNetworkCollectorItemService 
{
    @Autowired
    private DevNetworkCollectorItemMapper devNetworkCollectorItemMapper;
    /**
     * 查询室内设备
     * 
     * @param id 室内设备主键
     * @return 室内设备
     */
    @Override
    public DevNetworkCollectorItem selectDevNetworkCollectorItemById(Long id)
    {
        return devNetworkCollectorItemMapper.selectDevNetworkCollectorItemById(id);
    }
    /**
     * 查询室内设备列表
     * 
     * @param devNetworkCollectorItem 室内设备
     * @return 室内设备
     */
    @Override
    public List<DevNetworkCollectorItem> selectDevNetworkCollectorItemList(DevNetworkCollectorItem devNetworkCollectorItem)
    {
        return devNetworkCollectorItemMapper.selectDevNetworkCollectorItemList(devNetworkCollectorItem);
    }
    /**
     * 新增室内设备
     * 
     * @param devNetworkCollectorItem 室内设备
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int insertDevNetworkCollectorItem(DevNetworkCollectorItem devNetworkCollectorItem)
    {
        return devNetworkCollectorItemMapper.insertDevNetworkCollectorItem(devNetworkCollectorItem);
    }
    /**
     * 修改室内设备
     * 
     * @param devNetworkCollectorItem 室内设备
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int updateDevNetworkCollectorItem(DevNetworkCollectorItem devNetworkCollectorItem)
    {
        return devNetworkCollectorItemMapper.updateDevNetworkCollectorItem(devNetworkCollectorItem);
    }
    /**
     * 批量删除室内设备
     * 
     * @param ids 需要删除的室内设备主键
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int deleteDevNetworkCollectorItemByIds(Long[] ids)
    {
        return devNetworkCollectorItemMapper.deleteDevNetworkCollectorItemByIds(ids);
    }
    /**
     * 删除室内设备信息
     * 
     * @param id 室内设备主键
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int deleteDevNetworkCollectorItemById(Long id)
    {
        return devNetworkCollectorItemMapper.deleteDevNetworkCollectorItemById(id);
    }
}
package com.chenrise.device.service.impl;
import com.chenrise.common.core.domain.R;
import com.chenrise.common.core.exception.ServiceException;
import com.chenrise.device.domain.DevNetworkCollector;
import com.chenrise.device.domain.DevNetworkCollectorItem;
import com.chenrise.device.mapper.DevNetworkCollectorItemMapper;
import com.chenrise.device.mapper.DevNetworkCollectorMapper;
import com.chenrise.device.service.IDevNetworkCollectorService;
import com.chenrise.system.api.RemoteDevAuthorizeService;
import com.chenrise.system.api.enums.AuthorizeDeviceTypeEnum;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
import javax.annotation.Resource;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Optional;
/**
 * 网络采集器数据Service业务层处理
 *
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2023-06-01
 */
@Service
public class DevNetworkCollectorServiceImpl implements IDevNetworkCollectorService
{
    @Resource
    private DevNetworkCollectorMapper devNetworkCollectorMapper;
    @Resource
    private DevNetworkCollectorItemMapper dciMapper;
    @Resource
    private RemoteDevAuthorizeService remoteDevAuthorizeService;
    /**
     * 查询网络采集器数据
     *
     * @param id 网络采集器数据主键
     * @return 网络采集器数据
     */
    @Override
    public DevNetworkCollector selectDevNetworkCollectorById(Long id)
    {
        return devNetworkCollectorMapper.selectDevNetworkCollectorById(id);
    }
    /**
     * 查询网络采集器数据列表
     *
     * @param devNetworkCollector 网络采集器数据
     * @return 网络采集器数据
     */
    @Override
    public List<DevNetworkCollector> selectDevNetworkCollectorList(DevNetworkCollector devNetworkCollector)
    {
        return devNetworkCollectorMapper.selectDevNetworkCollectorList(devNetworkCollector);
    }
    /**
     * 新增网络采集器数据
     *
     * @param devNetworkCollector 网络采集器数据
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int insertDevNetworkCollector(DevNetworkCollector devNetworkCollector)
    {
        // 授权数量校验
        R<Integer> authorizeNumResult = remoteDevAuthorizeService.getAuthorizeNum(AuthorizeDeviceTypeEnum.NETWORK_COLLECTOR.getValue());
        if (R.isError(authorizeNumResult)) {
            throw new RuntimeException("设备授权数获取失败");
        }
        int authorizeNum = Optional.of(authorizeNumResult.getData()).orElse(0);
        if (getCurrentNum() >= authorizeNum) {
            throw new RuntimeException("已达到设备授权数上限");
        }
        DevNetworkCollector dnc = devNetworkCollectorMapper.selectDevNetworkCollectorByCode(devNetworkCollector.getCode(),null);
        if(dnc!=null){
            throw new ServiceException("编码被占用！");
        }
        int index = devNetworkCollectorMapper.insertDevNetworkCollector(devNetworkCollector);
        if(devNetworkCollector.getItems()!=null&&devNetworkCollector.getItems().size()>0){
            for(DevNetworkCollectorItem dci:devNetworkCollector.getItems()){
                dci.setCollectorId(devNetworkCollector.getId());
                dciMapper.insertDevNetworkCollectorItem(dci);
            }
        }
        return index;
    }
    /**
     * 修改网络采集器数据
     *
     * @param devNetworkCollector 网络采集器数据
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int updateDevNetworkCollector(DevNetworkCollector devNetworkCollector)
    {
        DevNetworkCollector dnc = devNetworkCollectorMapper.selectDevNetworkCollectorByCode(devNetworkCollector.getCode(),devNetworkCollector.getId()+"");
        if(dnc!=null){
            throw new ServiceException("编码被占用！");
        }
        if(devNetworkCollector.getItems()!=null&&devNetworkCollector.getItems().size()>0){
            dciMapper.deleteByCollectorId(devNetworkCollector.getId());
            for(DevNetworkCollectorItem dci:devNetworkCollector.getItems()){
                dci.setCollectorId(devNetworkCollector.getId());
                dciMapper.insertDevNetworkCollectorItem(dci);
            }
        }
        return devNetworkCollectorMapper.updateDevNetworkCollector(devNetworkCollector);
    }
    /**
     * 批量删除网络采集器数据
     *
     * @param ids 需要删除的网络采集器数据主键
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int deleteDevNetworkCollectorByIds(Long[] ids)
    {
        return devNetworkCollectorMapper.deleteDevNetworkCollectorByIds(ids);
    }
    /**
     * 删除网络采集器数据信息
     *
     * @param id 网络采集器数据主键
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int deleteDevNetworkCollectorById(Long id)
    {
        return devNetworkCollectorMapper.deleteDevNetworkCollectorById(id);
    }
    @Override
    public int getCurrentNum() {
        return devNetworkCollectorMapper.selectCurrentNum();
    }
}
package com.chenrise.device.service.impl;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.DateUtils;
import com.chenrise.device.domain.PowerUpdatepwRecords;
import com.chenrise.device.mapper.PowerUpdatepwRecordsMapper;
import com.chenrise.device.service.IPowerUpdatepwRecordsService;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
import javax.annotation.Resource;
import java.util.List;
/**
 * @Author cjh
 * @Description 修改空开密码记录
 * @Date 13:20 2024/8/1
 **/
@Service
public class PowerUpdatepwRecordsServiceImpl implements IPowerUpdatepwRecordsService
{
    @Resource
    private PowerUpdatepwRecordsMapper purMapper;
    /**
     * @Author cjh
     * @Description //按ID 获取
     * @Date 13:18 2024/8/1
     **/
    @Override
    public PowerUpdatepwRecords get(Long id)
    {
        return purMapper.get(id);
    }
    /**
     * @Author cjh
     * @Description //按uID 获取
     * @Date 13:18 2024/8/1
     **/
    @Override
    public PowerUpdatepwRecords getByUid(String uid)
    {
        return purMapper.getByUid(uid);
    }
    /**
     * @Author cjh
     * @Description //获取列表
     * @Date 13:18 2024/8/1
     **/
    @Override
    public List<PowerUpdatepwRecords> list(PowerUpdatepwRecords obj)
    {
        return purMapper.list(obj);
    }
    /**
     * @Author cjh
     * @Description //插入
     * @Date 13:18 2024/8/1
     **/
    @Override
    public int insert(PowerUpdatepwRecords obj)
    {
        obj.setCreateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        return purMapper.insert(obj);
    }
    /**
     * @Author cjh
     * @Description //修改
     * @Date 13:18 2024/8/1
     **/
    @Override
    public int update(PowerUpdatepwRecords obj)
    {
        return purMapper.update(obj);
    }
    /**
     * @Author cjh
     * @Description //删除
     * @Date 13:18 2024/8/1
     **/
    @Override
    public int delete(Long id)
    {
        return purMapper.delete(id);
    }
}
package com.chenrise.device.service.impl;
import cn.hutool.core.date.DateTime;
import cn.hutool.core.date.DateUtil;
import cn.hutool.core.util.ObjectUtil;
import cn.hutool.json.JSONObject;
import com.alibaba.fastjson2.JSON;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.StringUtils;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult;
import com.chenrise.device.constant.CommunicationDeviceType;
import com.chenrise.device.domain.DevCommunicationLog;
import com.chenrise.device.domain.TcpClientIssueInstructionInfo;
import com.chenrise.device.mapper.TcpClientIssueInstructionInfoMapper;
import com.chenrise.device.service.IDevCommunicationLogService;
import com.chenrise.device.service.TcpClientAddInfoByMapService;
import com.chenrise.device.service.TcpClientIssueInstructionInfoService;
import com.chenrise.device.util.TcpMessageTool;
import com.chenrise.system.api.RemoteJufeService;
import io.netty.buffer.ByteBuf;
import io.netty.buffer.Unpooled;
import io.netty.channel.ChannelHandlerContext;
import io.netty.util.CharsetUtil;
import org.slf4j.Logger;
import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
import java.text.SimpleDateFormat;
import java.util.Date;
import java.util.HashMap;
import java.util.LinkedHashMap;
import java.util.Map;
/**
 * 门锁消息实现类
 */
@Service
public class TcpClientAddInfoByMapServiceImpl implements TcpClientAddInfoByMapService {
    @Autowired
    private RemoteJufeService remoteJufeServi;
    @Autowired
    private IDevCommunicationLogService devCommunicationLogService;
    /**
     * 接收消息
     */
    private static String messageQue="";
    /**
     * 日志信息
     */
    private static final Logger logger = LoggerFactory.getLogger(TcpClientAddInfoByMapServiceImpl.class);
    @Autowired
    TcpClientIssueInstructionInfoService tcpclientIssueInstructionInfoService;
    @Autowired
    private TcpClientIssueInstructionInfoMapper tcpMapper;
    /**
     * @Description:接受处理信息，并返回指令信息 修改成队列方式执行
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-12-13 12:56:42
     * @param ctx:
     * @param message:
     * @return: void
     */
    @Override
    public void returnMessageByRec(ChannelHandlerContext ctx, String message) {
        messageQue += message;
        Integer index = messageQue.indexOf("\r\n");
        if(index!=-1){
            try{
                getMessageOneByOne(ctx);
            }catch (Exception e){
                messageQue="";
            }
        }
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 循环处理messageQue 中的指令
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-12-13 12:56:27
     * @param ctx:
     * @return: void
     */
    private  void getMessageOneByOne(ChannelHandlerContext ctx) throws InterruptedException {
        Integer index = messageQue.indexOf("\r\n");
        if(index!=-1){
            String cmdOneByOne = messageQue.substring(0,index);
            getMessageOneCmd(ctx,cmdOneByOne);
            messageQue =  messageQue.substring( index+2);
        }
        if(messageQue!=null&&!messageQue.equals("")&&messageQue.indexOf("\r\n")!=-1){
            getMessageOneByOne(ctx);
        }
    }
    /**
     * @Description:对消息进行处理
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-12-13 12:57:17
     * @param ctx:
     * @param message:
     * @return: void
     */
    private  void getMessageOneCmd(ChannelHandlerContext ctx, String message) throws InterruptedException {
        TcpClientIssueInstructionInfo issue = null;
        if(message!=null && !message.equals("")){
            String returnMsg="";
            LinkedHashMap<String,String> msgMap = TcpMessageTool.dealMessageToMap(message);
            // 记录收到消息日志
            saveCommunicationLog(message, msgMap);
            String cmd = msgMap.get("cmd");
            if(cmd!=null&&"1".equals(cmd)){
//                Thread.sleep(3*1000);
                Map<String ,Object> deviceLog = new HashMap<>();
                String codeNum = msgMap.get("DllNum").substring(msgMap.get("DllNum").indexOf("=")+1);
                deviceLog.put("operNum",codeNum);
                deviceLog.put("resTime",new Date());
                remoteJufeServi.updateLogStatue(deviceLog);
            }
            //304为心跳信息，单独处理
            else if(cmd!=null&&cmd.equals("304")){
                //判断网关和分组的在线状态
                TcpMessageTool.dataChangeMapFaceValue(msgMap,"cmdNetBitRes");
                returnMsg = TcpMessageTool.dealHeartBeatMsg(msgMap);
                ByteBuf buf = Unpooled.copiedBuffer(returnMsg.getBytes(CharsetUtil.UTF_8));
                ctx.writeAndFlush(buf);
                String deviceId  = msgMap.get("TargetId");
                Long gateId = Long.parseLong(deviceId);
                tcpMapper.updateGatewayStatus(gateId);
            } else if(cmd!=null&&cmd.equals("303")){
                String deviceId  = msgMap.get("DeviceId");
                String deviceHeart = msgMap.get("DeviceHeart");
                if(deviceHeart.equals("1")){
                    Long groupId = Long.parseLong(deviceId);
                    tcpMapper.updateGroupStatus(groupId);
                }
            }
            else if(cmd!=null&&cmd.equals("351")){
                //门状态锁状态
               // DoorStatus,LockStatus,DeviceId,
                String doorStatus  = msgMap.get("DoorStatus");
                if(doorStatus!=null&&doorStatus.equals("0")){
                    doorStatus="2";
                }
                String lockStatus  = msgMap.get("LockStatus");
                if(lockStatus!=null&&lockStatus.equals("0")){
                    lockStatus="2";
                }
                String deviceId = msgMap.get("DeviceId");
                msgMap.put("doorStatus",doorStatus);
                msgMap.put("lockStatus",lockStatus);
                msgMap.put("deviceId",deviceId);
                tcpMapper.updateDoorLockStatus(msgMap);
            }
            else if(cmd!=null&&cmd.equals("352")){
                //门锁电量信号
                String signalStatus  = msgMap.get("SignalStatus");
                msgMap.put("signalStatus",signalStatus);
                String deviceId = msgMap.get("DeviceId");
                msgMap.put("deviceId",deviceId);
                Map<String,Object> lockInfo = tcpMapper.selectByDeviceId(deviceId);
                if(ObjectUtil.isNotNull(lockInfo.get("ele_type"))){
                    if(StringUtils.isNotBlank(msgMap.get("BatteryVal"))){
                        float dy = Float.parseFloat(msgMap.get("BatteryVal"))/10+Float.parseFloat(msgMap.get("BatteryValLow"))/100;
                        if("1".equals(String.valueOf(lockInfo.get("ele_type")))){
                            int ele = getGdcPercent(dy);
                            msgMap.put("eleQuantity",String.valueOf(ele));
                        }else{
                            int ele = getLdcPercent(dy);
                            msgMap.put("eleQuantity",String.valueOf(ele));
                        }
                    }
                }
                String deviceType = msgMap.get("DeviceType");
                if(deviceType!=null&&deviceType.equals("4")){
                    tcpMapper.updateBatteryStatus(msgMap);
                }
            }
            else if(cmd!=null&&cmd.equals("301")){ //修改门锁后的心跳信息
                String deviceId = msgMap.get("DeviceId");
                String onlineStatus = msgMap.get("DeviceHeart");
                if(!(onlineStatus!=null&&onlineStatus.equals("1"))){
                    onlineStatus ="2";
                }
                msgMap.put("deviceId",deviceId);
                msgMap.put("onlineStatus",onlineStatus);
                tcpMapper.updateDoorLockOnlineStatus(msgMap);
            }
            else if(cmd!=null&&cmd.equals("401")){
                String deviceId = msgMap.get("DeviceId");
                String lockStatus = msgMap.get("LockStatus");
                if(lockStatus!=null&&lockStatus.equals("1")){
                    lockStatus="1";
                }else{
                    lockStatus="2";
                }
                String doorStatus = msgMap.get("LockStatus");
                if(doorStatus==null||doorStatus.equals("0")){
                    doorStatus="2";
                }else{
                    doorStatus="1";
                }
                msgMap.put("deviceId",deviceId);
                msgMap.put("lockStatus",null);
                msgMap.put("doorStatus",doorStatus);
                tcpMapper.updateDoorLockStatus(msgMap);
                String eventType = msgMap.get("EventType");
                String numInfo = msgMap.get("Num");
                if(eventType!=null && eventType.equals("40")){
                    remoteJufeServi.addPasswordLog(deviceId,numInfo,"",lockStatus);
                    //插入门锁操作记录
                }else if(eventType!=null && (eventType.equals("52")||eventType.equals("37"))){
                    String verNum = msgMap.get("VerNum");
                    if(eventType.equals("52")){
                        remoteJufeServi.addPasswordLog(deviceId,numInfo,verNum,"2");
                    }else{
                        remoteJufeServi.addPasswordLog(deviceId,numInfo,verNum,"1");
                    }
                    //插入刷卡
                }
            }
            else{
                String numInfo = msgMap.get("Num");
                Integer index = numInfo.lastIndexOf("=");//带有等号的时返回消息
                if(index!=-1){
                    String codeNum = numInfo.substring(index+1);
                    issue = tcpclientIssueInstructionInfoService.selectInfoById(codeNum);
                    if(issue!=null){
                        TcpClientIssueInstructionInfo updateBean = new TcpClientIssueInstructionInfo();
                        updateBean.setId(codeNum);
                        String cmdNum = msgMap.get("cmdNum");
                        String explain = msgMap.get("Explain");
                        String issuedStatus ="";
                        String issuedTime = null;
                        String cmdCode=issue.getCmd();
                        Boolean cmdFlag = false;
                        String operType = "1";
                        if(cmdCode!=null&&(cmdCode.equals("761")||cmdCode.equals("813"))){
                            if(cmdCode.equals("813")){
                                operType = this.getOperTypeByMsg(issue.getCmdInfo());
                            }
                            cmdFlag = true;
                        }
                        if(explain!=null&&explain.equals("Success")){
                            if(cmdNum.indexOf(codeNum)!=-1){
                                updateBean.setStatus("3");
                                tcpclientIssueInstructionInfoService.updateIssueInstructionInfo(updateBean);
                                if(cmdFlag){
                                    // todo 后续需改成 此处有消息再改变门锁状态，而不是点击开锁 直接改状态
                                    Map<String ,String> deviceLog = new HashMap<>();
                                    deviceLog.put("operNum",codeNum);
                                    deviceLog.put("status","1");
                                    remoteJufeServi.updateLogStatue(deviceLog);
                                    //按序列号 反查操作记录  带出 操作动作和 设备ID
                                    AjaxResult result = remoteJufeServi.getByOperNum(codeNum);
                                    Map<String,Object> map = (Map<String, Object>) result.get("data");
                                    Map<String,Object> map1 = new HashMap<>();
                                    map1.put("deviceId",map.get("deviceId"));
                                    map1.put("openStatus",map.get("operationOnoff"));
                                    remoteJufeServi.updateLockOnly(new JSONObject(map1));
                                }
                            }else{
                                updateBean.setStatus("2");
                                tcpclientIssueInstructionInfoService.updateIssueInstructionInfo(updateBean);
                            }
                            issuedStatus="1";
                            SimpleDateFormat sdf = new SimpleDateFormat("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss");//设置日期格式
                            // new Date()为获取当前时间
                            String time = sdf.format(new Date());// format() 作用是将获取的时间转换为我们自定义的日期格式字符串
                            issuedTime = time;
                        }else if(explain!=null&&explain.equals("Failed")){
                            if(cmdFlag){
                                Map<String ,String> deviceLog = new HashMap<>();
                                deviceLog.put("operNum",codeNum);
                                deviceLog.put("status","0");
                                remoteJufeServi.updateLogStatue(deviceLog);
                                //按序列号 反查操作记录  带出 操作动作和 设备ID
                                AjaxResult result = remoteJufeServi.getByOperNum(codeNum);
                                Map<String,Object> map = (Map<String, Object>) result.get("data");
                                Map<String,Object> map1 = new HashMap<>();
                                map1.put("deviceId",map.get("deviceId"));
                                String openStatus = "";
                                if("1".equals(String.valueOf(map.get("operationOnoff")))){
                                    openStatus = "2";
                                }else if("2".equals(String.valueOf(map.get("operationOnoff")))){
                                    openStatus = "1";
                                }
                                map1.put("openStatus",openStatus);
                                remoteJufeServi.updateLockOnly(new JSONObject(map1));
                            }
                        }else{
                            issuedStatus="0";
                        }
                        String cmdInfo = issue.getCmd();
                        if(issue.getCmdInfo()!=null&&!issue.getCmdInfo().equals("")){
                            msgMap.put("deviceId",issue.getDeviceId());
                            msgMap.put("issuedStatus",issuedStatus);
                            msgMap.put("issuedTime",issuedTime);
                            if(cmdInfo!=null&&(cmdInfo.equals("81")||cmdInfo.equals("82"))){
                                tcpclientIssueInstructionInfoService.updateLockInssueStatus(msgMap);
                            }else if(cmdInfo!=null&&(cmdInfo.equals("41")||cmdInfo.equals("42"))){
                                tcpclientIssueInstructionInfoService.updateGroupInssueStatus(msgMap);
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                System.out.println("其他心跳信息:"+message);
            }
            if(cmd!=null&&!cmd.equals("401")){
                TcpMessageTool.dataChangeMapFaceValue(msgMap,"cmdNetBitRes");
                returnMsg = TcpMessageTool.dealHeartBeatMsg(msgMap);
                ByteBuf buf = Unpooled.copiedBuffer(returnMsg.getBytes(CharsetUtil.UTF_8));
                ctx.writeAndFlush(buf);
            }else if(cmd.equals("401")){
                String deviceId = msgMap.get("DeviceId");
                String targetId ="";
                try{
                      targetId = tcpMapper.selectTargetIdByDeviceId(deviceId);
                }catch (Exception e){
                    e.printStackTrace();
                }
                if(targetId!=null){
                    msgMap.put("TargetType","1");
                    msgMap.put("TargetId",targetId);
                    msgMap.put("DeviceType","1");
                    TcpMessageTool.dataChangeMapFaceValue(msgMap,"cmdNetBitRes");
                    returnMsg = TcpMessageTool.dealHeartBeatMsg(msgMap);
                    ByteBuf buf = Unpooled.copiedBuffer(returnMsg.getBytes(CharsetUtil.UTF_8));
                    ctx.writeAndFlush(buf);
                }
            }else  if(cmd!=null&&issue!=null&&!cmd.equals("304")){
                String targetId =  issue.getTargetId();
                TcpMessageTool.dataChangeMapFaceValue(msgMap,"cmdNetBitRes");
                msgMap.put("TargetId",targetId);
                msgMap.put("ResultCode","1");
                returnMsg = TcpMessageTool.dealHeartBeatMsg(msgMap);
                ByteBuf buf = Unpooled.copiedBuffer(returnMsg.getBytes(CharsetUtil.UTF_8));
                ctx.writeAndFlush(buf);
            }
        }
    }
    /**
     * 保存通信日志
     */
    private void saveCommunicationLog(String message, LinkedHashMap<String, String> msgMap) {
        try {
            DevCommunicationLog communicationLog = new DevCommunicationLog();
            communicationLog.setDeviceId(msgMap.get("DeviceId"));
            String srcType = msgMap.get("SrcType");
            if (srcType != null) {
                if (srcType.equals("1")) {
                    communicationLog.setDeviceType(CommunicationDeviceType.GATEWAY);
                } else if (srcType.equals("2")) {
                    communicationLog.setDeviceType(CommunicationDeviceType.GROUP);
                } else if (srcType.equals("3") || srcType.equals("4")) {
                    communicationLog.setDeviceType(CommunicationDeviceType.DOOR_LOCK);
                } else {
                    communicationLog.setDeviceType("-1");
                }
            }
            communicationLog.setRawData(message);
            communicationLog.setParsedData(JSON.toJSONString(msgMap));
            String commandTimeStr = msgMap.getOrDefault("TimeStamp", null);
            if (commandTimeStr != null) {
                DateTime commandTime = DateUtil.parse(commandTimeStr, "yyyyMMddHHmmssSSS");
                communicationLog.setCommandTime(commandTime);
            }
            communicationLog.setCreateTime(new Date());
            devCommunicationLogService.saveCommunicationLog(communicationLog);
        } catch (Exception e) {
            logger.error("保存通信日志异常: " + e.getMessage());
        }
    }
    private String getOperTypeByMsg(String cmdInfo) {
        if(cmdInfo!=null&&cmdInfo.length()>0){
            try{
                String info = cmdInfo.split("813,")[1];
                String infos = info.split(",")[4];
                if(infos!=null&&infos.equals("1")){
                    return "3";
                }else{
                    return "2";
                }
            }catch (Exception e){
                return "3";
            }
        }else{
            return "3";
        }
    }
    private int getGdcPercent(float dy){
        float ele = 4.4f;
        int percent = 0;
        while (dy>ele){
            percent++;
            ele+=0.016f;
        }
        return percent>100?100:percent;
    }
    private static int getLdcPercent(float dy){
        int percent = 0;
        float [] arr = new float[]{
                3.426f,3.438f,3.449f,3.460f,3.470f,3.480f,3.489f,3.498f,3.506f,3.513f,3.521f,3.528f,3.534f,3.540f,3.546f,3.552f,3.557f,3.562f,3.567f,3.571f,3.576f,3.580f,3.584f,
                3.588f,3.592f,3.595f,3.599f,3.602f,3.606f,3.609f,3.613f,3.616f,3.619f,3.623f,3.626f,3.630f,3.633f,3.637f,3.641f,3.645f,3.648f,3.652f,3.657f,3.661f,3.665f,3.670f,
                3.675f,3.679f,3.685f,3.690f,3.695f,3.701f,3.707f,3.713f,3.719f,3.725f,3.732f,3.738f,3.745f,3.753f,3.760f,3.768f,3.775f,3.784f,3.792f,3.800f,3.809f,3.818f,3.827f,
                3.836f,3.845f,3.855f,3.865f,3.875f,3.885f,3.895f,3.906f,3.916f,3.927f,3.938f,3.949f,3.960f,3.971f,3.980f,3.994f,4.005f,4.017f,4.028f,4.040f,4.051f,4.063f,4.076f,
                4.088f,4.099f,4.111f,4.123f,4.134f,4.146f,4.157f,4.169f,4.179f
        };
        if(dy>4.179f){
            return 100;
        }else if(dy<3.426f){
            return 0;
        }else{
            for(int i=0;i< arr.length;i++){
                if(dy<=arr[i]){
                    percent = i-1;
                    break;
                }
            }
        }
        return percent;
    }
}

package com.chenrise.device.service.impl;
import cn.hutool.json.JSONUtil;
import com.alibaba.fastjson.JSON;
import com.chenrise.device.domain.TcpClientCommonCmdInfo;
import com.chenrise.device.domain.TcpClientIssueInstructionInfo;
import com.chenrise.device.pool.DefaultGenericFutureListener;
import com.chenrise.device.pool.NettyClientPoolFactory;
import com.chenrise.device.pool.WrapperResponseMessage;
import com.chenrise.device.service.TcpClientGatewayCommandService;
import com.chenrise.device.service.TcpClientIssueInstructionInfoService;
import com.chenrise.device.util.TcpMessageTool;
import io.netty.channel.Channel;
import io.netty.channel.pool.ChannelPool;
import io.netty.util.concurrent.Future;
import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
import java.util.Date;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.concurrent.ExecutionException;
import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit;
/**
 * 指令服务实现
 */
@RequiredArgsConstructor
@Slf4j
@Service
public class TcpclientGatewayCommandServiceImpl implements TcpClientGatewayCommandService {
    @Autowired
    private TcpClientIssueInstructionInfoService tcpclientIssueInstructionInfoService;
    private final NettyClientPoolFactory clientPool;
    @Override
    public void sendMessageInfoToGateway(Object object) {
        try{
            Map<String ,String> mapLock =  JSON.parseObject(JSONUtil.toJsonStr(JSONUtil.toJsonStr(object)), Map.class);
            String keyInfo = mapLock.get("ipKey");
            mapLock.remove("ipKey");
            TcpClientCommonCmdInfo commonCmdInfo =  JSON.parseObject(JSONUtil.toJsonStr(JSONUtil.toJsonStr(mapLock)), TcpClientCommonCmdInfo.class);
            commonCmdInfo.setUuid(mapLock.get("uuid"));
            String dataMsg = TcpMessageTool.getMsgDataByObj(commonCmdInfo);
            this.sendMessageInfo(dataMsg,keyInfo);
            this.addIssueInfo(mapLock.get("uuid"),commonCmdInfo.getCmd(),dataMsg,commonCmdInfo.getDeviceId(),commonCmdInfo.getTargetId());
        }catch (Exception e){
            e.printStackTrace();
        }
    }
    /**
     * @Description:发送消息
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-12-14 15:05:08
     * @param message:
     * @param addressName:
     * @return: void
     */
    public void sendMessageInfo(String message,String addressName){
        ChannelPool pool = clientPool.getPool(addressName);
        if(pool!=null){
            Future<Channel> future= pool.acquire();
            if(future!=null){
                DefaultGenericFutureListener listener = com.chenrise.device.pool.NettyClient.sendMessage(future, message);
                try {
                    WrapperResponseMessage responseMessage = listener.get(800, TimeUnit.MILLISECONDS);
                }finally{
                    try {
                        pool.release(future.get());
                    } catch (InterruptedException | ExecutionException e) {
                        e.printStackTrace();
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
    /**
     * 保存指令信息到数据库
     * @param uuid
     * @param cmdStr
     * @param msgInfo
     */
    private void addIssueInfo(String uuid,String cmdStr,String msgInfo,String deviceId,String targetId){
        TcpClientIssueInstructionInfo saveInfo =new TcpClientIssueInstructionInfo();
        saveInfo.setId(uuid);
        saveInfo.setCmd(cmdStr);
        saveInfo.setCmdInfo(msgInfo);
        saveInfo.setAddTime(new Date());
        saveInfo.setStatus("1");
        saveInfo.setDeviceId(deviceId);
        saveInfo.setTargetId(targetId);
        tcpclientIssueInstructionInfoService.addIssueInstructionInfo(saveInfo);
    }
}

package com.chenrise.device.service.impl;
import cn.hutool.core.collection.CollectionUtil;
import cn.hutool.json.JSONUtil;
import com.alibaba.fastjson.JSON;
import com.chenrise.common.redis.service.RedisService;
import com.chenrise.device.domain.UdpNodeConfig;
import com.chenrise.device.domain.UdpPowerInfo;
import com.chenrise.device.domain.UdpRealTimeInfo;
import com.chenrise.device.mapper.UdpNodeConfigMapper;
import com.chenrise.device.mapper.UdpPowerInfoMapper;
import com.chenrise.device.mapper.UdpRealTimeInfoMapper;
import com.chenrise.device.service.UdpPowerInfoService;
import com.chenrise.device.service.UdpSendMessageOnlyService;
import com.chenrise.device.util.ByteForMessInfoUtil;
import com.chenrise.system.api.RemoteJufeService;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
import java.net.InetSocketAddress;
import java.util.*;
import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit;
import static com.chenrise.common.core.constant.CacheConstants.POWER_REAL_TIME_INFO_EXPIRATION;
import static com.chenrise.common.core.constant.CacheConstants.POWER_REAL_TIME_INFO_KEY;
/**
 * @Description:空开接口实现类
 * @Author: sunming
 * @Date: 2022-12-09 15:29:44
 */
@Slf4j
@Service
public class UdpPowerInfoServiceImpl implements UdpPowerInfoService {
//
    @Autowired
    private UdpPowerInfoMapper udpPowerInfoMapper;
    @Autowired
    private UdpNodeConfigMapper udpNodeConfigMapper;
    @Autowired
    private UdpRealTimeInfoMapper udpRealTimeInfoMapper;
    @Autowired
    private RemoteJufeService remoteJufeServi;
    @Autowired
    private UdpSendMessageOnlyService udpSendMessageOnlyService;
    @Autowired
    private RedisService redisService;
    /**
     * @param udpPowerInfo:
     * @Description:保存电源信息到数据库
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-12-09 15:30:34
     * @return: int
     */
    public int addPowerInfoByData(UdpPowerInfo udpPowerInfo) {
        Integer count = udpPowerInfoMapper.getPowerCountByAddressAndPort(udpPowerInfo);
        if (count != null && count > 0) {
            udpPowerInfo.setUpdateTime(new Date());
        } else {
            udpPowerInfo.setAddTime(new Date());
            udpPowerInfo.setUpdateTime(new Date());
            udpPowerInfoMapper.insertPowerInfo(udpPowerInfo);
        }
        return 1;
    }
    /**
     * @param udpPowerInfo:
     * @Description:查询电源列表
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-12-09 15:30:46
     * @return: java.util.List<com.chenrise.device.domain.UdpPowerInfo>
     */
    @Override
    public List<UdpPowerInfo> selectPowerList(UdpPowerInfo udpPowerInfo) {
        List<UdpPowerInfo> list = udpPowerInfoMapper.selectPowerList(udpPowerInfo);
        if (list != null && list.size() > 0) {
            for (int i = 0; i < list.size(); i++) {
                List<UdpNodeConfig> udpNodeConfigs = udpNodeConfigMapper.selectListByPowerInfoAddress(list.get(i).getAddress());
                list.get(i).setUdpNodeConfigs(udpNodeConfigs);
            }
        }
        return list;
    }
    /**
     * @param udpPowerInfo:
     * @Description:根据id分闸
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-12-09 15:31:02
     * @return: int
     */
    @Override
    public int fenzhaById(UdpPowerInfo udpPowerInfo) {
        udpSendMessageOnlyService.sendOnOffPowerMessageByPowerInfo(udpPowerInfo);
        return 1;
    }
    /**
     * @param object:
     * @Description:执行指令信息
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-12-09 15:31:16
     * @return: int
     */
    @Override
    public int executeCommand(Object object) {
        UdpPowerInfo udpPowerInfo = JSON.parseObject(JSONUtil.toJsonStr(JSONUtil.toJsonStr(object)), UdpPowerInfo.class);
        udpSendMessageOnlyService.sendOnOffPowerMessageByPowerInfo(udpPowerInfo);
        return 0;
    }
    /**
     * @param sender:
     * @Description:根据IP更新端口号
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-02-14 14:50:48
     * @return: void
     */
    @Override
    public void upDatePowerPort(InetSocketAddress sender) {
        String ip = sender.getHostName();
        String port = String.valueOf(sender.getPort());
        remoteJufeServi.updatePowerPort(ip, port);
    }
    /**
     * @param nodeDatas:
     * @Description:添加节点信息
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-12-09 15:31:27
     * @return: void
     */
    @Override
    public void addNodeConfigDate(List<UdpNodeConfig> nodeDatas) {
        if (nodeDatas != null && nodeDatas.size() > 0) {
            for (int i = 0; i < nodeDatas.size(); i++) {
                Integer count = udpNodeConfigMapper.getCountInfo(nodeDatas.get(i));
                if (count == null || count == 0) {
                    udpNodeConfigMapper.addNodeConfigDate(nodeDatas.get(1));
                }
            }
        }
    }
    /**
     * @param udpNodeConfigs:
     * @Description:修改节点状态
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-12-09 15:32:16
     * @return: void
     */
    @Override
    public void upDateNodeConfig(List<UdpNodeConfig> udpNodeConfigs) {
        if (udpNodeConfigs != null && udpNodeConfigs.size() > 0) {
            for (int i = 0; i < udpNodeConfigs.size(); i++) {
                udpNodeConfigMapper.upDateNodeConfig(udpNodeConfigs.get(i));
            }
        }
    }
    /**
     * @param realTimeList:
     * @Description:保存各个闸的瞬时信息
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-12-09 15:32:26
     * @return: void
     */
    @Override
    public void saveRealTimeInfo(List<UdpRealTimeInfo> realTimeList) {
        if (realTimeList != null && realTimeList.size() > 0) {
            List<Map<String, String>> powerNodeInfos = new ArrayList<>();
            List<Map<String, String>> powerNodeInfoLogs = new ArrayList<>();
            for (int i = 0; i < realTimeList.size(); i++) {
                UdpRealTimeInfo urti = realTimeList.get(i);
                urti.setAddTime(new Date());
                String addressInfo = urti.getAddress();
                short type = urti.getType();
                /* 0x80-单相节点
                 * 0x84-三相节点主路
                 * 0xA0-直流单相节点
                 * 0xE0-T/A 系列单相
                 * 0xE4-T/A 系列三相主路
                 */
                Integer nodeTypeNumberInt = ByteForMessInfoUtil.byteToInteger((byte) type);
                if (0x80 == nodeTypeNumberInt || 0x84 == nodeTypeNumberInt || 0xA0 == nodeTypeNumberInt || 0xE0 == nodeTypeNumberInt || 0xE4 == nodeTypeNumberInt) {
                    int count = 0;
                    if (addressInfo != null && !addressInfo.equals("")) {
                        count = udpRealTimeInfoMapper.selectNodeExist(urti);
                        Map<String, String> powerNodeLog = new HashMap<>();
                        powerNodeLog.put("address", addressInfo);
                        powerNodeLog.put("sortNum", String.valueOf(urti.getNno()));
                        powerNodeLog.put("onoffStatus", urti.getOnoffStatus());
                        powerNodeInfoLogs.add(powerNodeLog);
                    }
                    if (count == 0) {
                        Map<String, String> powerNode = new HashMap<>();
                        String nodeType = "";
                        if (0x80 == nodeTypeNumberInt) {
                            nodeType = "4";
                        } else if (0x84 == nodeTypeNumberInt) {
                            nodeType = "2";
                        }
                        powerNode.put("nodeType", nodeType);
                        powerNode.put("address", addressInfo);
                        powerNode.put("sortNum", String.valueOf(urti.getNno()));
                        powerNode.put("onoffStatus", urti.getOnoffStatus());
                        powerNodeInfos.add(powerNode);
                    }
                }
            }
            if (powerNodeInfos != null && !powerNodeInfos.isEmpty()) {
                try {
                    System.out.println("-------AC-------保存节点信息" + powerNodeInfos);
                    remoteJufeServi.addNodeInfoByInfo(powerNodeInfos);
                } catch (Exception e) {
                    System.out.println("保存节点信息失败" + e.getMessage());
                }
            }
            //更新空开结果
            remoteJufeServi.updateNodeLongsResult(powerNodeInfoLogs);
        }
    }
    @Override
    public UdpPowerInfo getPower(UdpPowerInfo powerInfo) {
        return udpPowerInfoMapper.getPower(powerInfo);
    }
    @Override
    public void updateDevPowerNodeInfo(UdpPowerInfo powerInfo) {
        udpPowerInfoMapper.updateDevPowerNodeInfo(powerInfo);
    }
    @Override
    public void saveRealTimeInfoToRedis(List<UdpRealTimeInfo> realTimeList) {
        if (CollectionUtil.isEmpty(realTimeList)) {
            return;
        }
        for (UdpRealTimeInfo urti : realTimeList) {
            urti.setAddTime(new Date());
            String addressInfo = urti.getAddress();
            short type = urti.getType();
            /* 0x80-单相节点
             * 0x84-三相节点主路
             * 0xA0-直流单相节点
             * 0xE0-T/A 系列单相
             * 0xE4-T/A 系列三相主路
             */
            Integer nodeTypeNumberInt = ByteForMessInfoUtil.byteToInteger((byte) type);
            if (0x80 == nodeTypeNumberInt || 0x84 == nodeTypeNumberInt || 0xA0 == nodeTypeNumberInt || 0xE0 == nodeTypeNumberInt || 0xE4 == nodeTypeNumberInt) {
                if (addressInfo != null && !addressInfo.equals("")) {
                    String hex = Integer.toHexString(urti.getAlm());
                    hex = hex.toLowerCase();
                    if (hex != null && hex.substring(0, 1).equals("8")) { //分闸
                        urti.setOnoffStatus("0");
                    } else if (hex != null && hex.substring(0, 1).equals("c")) { //和闸
                        urti.setOnoffStatus("1");
                    }
                    //手动分闸
                    if (hex.substring(3, 4).equals("1") || hex.substring(3, 4).equals("f")) {
                        urti.setNetcon("1");
                    } else {
                        urti.setNetcon("0");
                    }
                    redisService.setCacheObject(POWER_REAL_TIME_INFO_KEY + addressInfo + ":" + urti.getNno(),
                            urti,
                            POWER_REAL_TIME_INFO_EXPIRATION,
                            TimeUnit.MINUTES);
                }
            }
        }
    }
    @Override
    public void editRealTimeInfoFromRedis() {
        List<UdpRealTimeInfo> cacheList = redisService.getCacheListByPrefix(POWER_REAL_TIME_INFO_KEY);
        if (CollectionUtil.isNotEmpty(cacheList)) {
            //按顺序排序 address和nno排序
            cacheList.sort(Comparator.comparing(UdpRealTimeInfo::getAddress).thenComparing(UdpRealTimeInfo::getNno));
            long start = System.currentTimeMillis();
            try {
                // 第一步：清空临时表
                udpRealTimeInfoMapper.clearTmpTable();
                // 第二步：插入新数据
                udpRealTimeInfoMapper.insertToTmpTable(cacheList);
                // 第三步：关联更新
                udpRealTimeInfoMapper.updateFromTmpTable();
                log.info("redis同步空开状态完成，条数:{}，耗时:{}ms", cacheList.size(), System.currentTimeMillis() - start);
            } catch (Exception e) {
                log.error("同步失败", e);
                throw e;
            }
        }
    }
    public static void main(String[] args) {
//        short type =  -124;
        short type = -128;
        Integer nodeTypeNumberInt = ByteForMessInfoUtil.byteToInteger((byte) type);
        System.out.println(nodeTypeNumberInt);
        System.out.println("Type: 0x" + Integer.toHexString(type & 0xFF).toUpperCase());
        String hex = Integer.toHexString(-2146500608); //f
//        String hex = Integer.toHexString(-1072824320); //e
//        String hex = Integer.toHexString(-2147418112); //1
//        String hex = Integer.toHexString(-2146492416); //f
//        String hex = Integer.toHexString(-2147409920); //1
        hex = hex.toLowerCase();
        System.out.println("hex: " + hex);
        System.out.println("hex(远程禁止分闸): " + hex.substring(3, 4));
    }
}
package com.chenrise.device.service.impl;
import cn.hutool.core.util.CharsetUtil;
import cn.hutool.core.util.StrUtil;
import cn.hutool.crypto.digest.MD5;
import cn.hutool.json.JSONUtil;
import com.alibaba.nacos.common.utils.MD5Utils;
import com.chenrise.device.domain.PowerUpdatepwRecords;
import com.chenrise.device.domain.UdpPowerInfo;
import com.chenrise.device.domain.UdpProtocolMessage;
import com.chenrise.device.mapper.UdpPowerInfoMapper;
import com.chenrise.device.service.IPowerUpdatepwRecordsService;
import com.chenrise.device.service.UdpPowerInfoService;
import com.chenrise.device.service.UdpSendMessageOnlyService;
import com.chenrise.device.util.ByteUtil;
import org.springframework.scheduling.annotation.Async;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
import javax.annotation.Resource;
import java.io.IOException;
import java.net.*;
import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit;
/**
 * @Description:电源接口实现类
 * @Author: sunming
 * @Date: 2022-12-09 10:47:45
 */
@Service
public class UdpSendMessageOnlyServiceImpl implements UdpSendMessageOnlyService {
    @Resource
    private IPowerUpdatepwRecordsService purService;
    @Resource
    private UdpPowerInfoMapper powerInfoMapper;
    /**
     * @Description:发送合闸分闸指令
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-12-09 10:48:36
     * @param udpPowerInfo:空开信息
     * @return: void
     */
    @Override
    public void sendOnOffPowerMessageByPowerInfo(UdpPowerInfo udpPowerInfo) {
        System.err.println("发送合闸分闸指令"+udpPowerInfo);
        String onOff = udpPowerInfo.getPowerStatus();
        String block = udpPowerInfo.getBlock();
        String address = udpPowerInfo.getAddress();
        String port = udpPowerInfo.getPort();
        byte[] resBytes = ByteUtil.getOnOffByteMessage( onOff,block );
        System.out.println(StrUtil.str(resBytes,CharsetUtil.CHARSET_UTF_8));
        DatagramSocket ds = null;
        try {
            ds = new DatagramSocket();
            int length = resBytes.length;
            try {
                Thread.sleep(400); // 休眠0.2秒钟
            } catch (InterruptedException e) {
                e.printStackTrace();
            }
            DatagramPacket dp = new DatagramPacket(resBytes,length,InetAddress.getByName(address),Integer.parseInt(port));
            //发送数据
            ds.send(dp);
            ds.close();
        } catch (SocketException e) {
            throw new RuntimeException(e);
        } catch (UnknownHostException e) {
            throw new RuntimeException(e);
        } catch (IOException e) {
            throw new RuntimeException(e);
        }
    }
    /**
     * @Author cjh
     * @Description 修改空开密码
     * @Date 15:41 2024/7/31
     **/
    @Override
    public void sendUpdatePwMessage(UdpPowerInfo udpPowerInfo) {
        System.out.println("udpPowerInfo-------->>>>>"+JSONUtil.toJsonStr(udpPowerInfo));
        String address = udpPowerInfo.getAddress();
        String port = udpPowerInfo.getPort();
        String oldPw = udpPowerInfo.getOldPw();
        String newPw = udpPowerInfo.getNewPw();
        String oldPwMd5 = MD5Utils.md5Hex(oldPw,CharsetUtil.UTF_8).substring(8,24).toUpperCase();
        String newPwMd5 = MD5Utils.md5Hex(newPw,CharsetUtil.UTF_8).substring(8,24).toUpperCase();
        byte[] resBytes = ByteUtil.getUpdatePwMessage(oldPwMd5,newPwMd5);
        String str = ByteUtil.byteToHex(resBytes);
        String uid = String.valueOf(Integer.parseInt(str.substring(24,32)));
        //存储修改日志
        PowerUpdatepwRecords pur = new PowerUpdatepwRecords();
        pur.setPowerNo(udpPowerInfo.getPowerNo());
        pur.setPowerName(udpPowerInfo.getPowerName());
        pur.setOldPw(oldPw);
        pur.setNewPw(newPw);
        pur.setRoomId(udpPowerInfo.getRoomId());
        pur.setRoomName(udpPowerInfo.getRoomName());
        pur.setIp(udpPowerInfo.getIp());
        pur.setPort(udpPowerInfo.getPort());
        pur.setUid(uid);
        pur.setCreateBy(udpPowerInfo.getCreateBy());
        purService.insert(pur);
        DatagramSocket ds = null;
        try {
            ds = new DatagramSocket(8889);
            int length = resBytes.length;
            try {
                Thread.sleep(400); // 休眠0.2秒钟
            } catch (InterruptedException e) {
                e.printStackTrace();
            }
            DatagramPacket dp = new DatagramPacket(resBytes,length,InetAddress.getByName(address),Integer.parseInt(port));
            //发送数据
            ds.send(dp);
            // 启动接收数据的线程
            receiveData(ds,uid);
//            ds.close();
        } catch (SocketException e) {
            throw new RuntimeException(e);
        } catch (UnknownHostException e) {
            throw new RuntimeException(e);
        } catch (IOException e) {
            throw new RuntimeException(e);
        }
    }
    /**
     * @Author cjh
     * @Description 异步执行  等待udp 回复
     * @Date 13:50 2024/8/2
     **/
    @Async
    public void receiveData(DatagramSocket socket,String uid) {
        boolean keepRunning = true;
        long lastReceiveTime = System.currentTimeMillis();
        try {
            byte[] buffer = new byte[1024];
            DatagramPacket packet = null;
            while (keepRunning) {
                packet = new DatagramPacket(buffer, buffer.length);
                // 设置超时时间为1分钟
                socket.setSoTimeout(60 * 1000);
                try {
                    socket.receive(packet); // 接收数据，如果超时会抛出SocketTimeoutException
                    if(packet.getLength()>0){
                        // 处理接收到的数据   预留处理信息 暂时用不到  暂时只要知道 回复消息了就认为修改成功了
                        handleReceivedData(packet);
                        PowerUpdatepwRecords pur = purService.getByUid(uid);
                        if(pur!=null){
                            System.out.println("修改密码成功接收到结果------------");
                            pur.setStatus("SUCCESS");
                            purService.update(pur);
                            UdpPowerInfo query = new UdpPowerInfo();
                            query.setIp(pur.getIp());
                            query.setPort(pur.getPort());
                            UdpPowerInfo power = powerInfoMapper.getPower(query);
                            power.setOldPw(pur.getOldPw());
                            power.setNewPw(pur.getNewPw());
                            powerInfoMapper.updateDevPowerNodeInfo(power);
                        }
                        keepRunning = false;
                    }
                    // 更新最后接收时间
                    lastReceiveTime = System.currentTimeMillis();
                } catch (SocketTimeoutException e) {
                    // 检查是否超时时间已到
                    if (System.currentTimeMillis() - lastReceiveTime >= TimeUnit.SECONDS.toSeconds(60)) {
                        PowerUpdatepwRecords pur = purService.getByUid(uid);
                        if(pur!=null){
                            pur.setStatus("FAIL");
                            purService.update(pur);
                        }
                        keepRunning = false; // 超时，退出循环
                    }
                } catch (Exception e) {
                    throw new RuntimeException(e);
                }
            }
            // 关闭DatagramSocket
            if (socket != null && !socket.isClosed()) {
                socket.close();
            }
        } catch (IOException e) {
            e.printStackTrace();
        }finally {
            if (socket != null && !socket.isClosed()) {
                socket.close();
            }
        }
    }
    //预留处理信息 暂时用不到  暂时只要知道 回复消息了就认为修改成功了
    public void handleReceivedData(DatagramPacket packet) throws Exception {
        // 从packet中提取数据并进行处理
        UdpProtocolMessage obj = ByteUtil.reviveToUdpProtocolMessage(packet);
        System.out.println("处理信息-------------------"+JSONUtil.toJsonStr(obj));
    }
}

package com.chenrise.device.service;
import cn.hutool.json.JSONObject;
import cn.hutool.json.JSONUtil;
import com.alibaba.fastjson2.JSON;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.StringUtils;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult;
import com.chenrise.device.constant.CommunicationDeviceType;
import com.chenrise.device.domain.DevCollectorData;
import com.chenrise.device.domain.DevCommunicationLog;
import com.chenrise.device.domain.DevNetworkCollector;
import com.chenrise.device.domain.DevNetworkCollectorItem;
import com.chenrise.device.mapper.DevCollectorDataMapper;
import com.chenrise.device.mapper.DevNetworkCollectorItemMapper;
import com.chenrise.device.mapper.DevNetworkCollectorMapper;
import com.chenrise.system.api.RemoteJufeService;
import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
import rk.netDevice.sdk.p2.*;
import javax.annotation.Resource;
import java.text.SimpleDateFormat;
import java.util.Date;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.TimeZone;
/**
 * 网络采集器服务
 */
@Slf4j
@Service
@RequiredArgsConstructor
public class NetworkCollectorService {
    private final DevCollectorDataMapper dataMapper;
    private final DevNetworkCollectorMapper dncMapper;
    private final DevNetworkCollectorItemMapper dciMapper;
    private final IDevCommunicationLogService devCommunicationLogService;
    @Resource
    private RemoteJufeService jufeService;
    /**
     * 开启网络采集器
     */
    public void openCjq() throws InterruptedException {
        log.info("开启网络采集器------------------>>>>>>");
        RSServer rsServer = RSServer.Initiate(8855);// 初始化
        rsServer.addDataListener(new IDataListener() {// 添加监听
            @Override
            public void receiveTimmingAck(TimmingAck data) {// 校时指令应答处理
                System.out.println("校时应答->设备编号:" + data.getDeviceId()
                        + "\t执行结果：" + data.getStatus());
            }
            @Override
            public void receiveTelecontrolAck(TelecontrolAck data) {// 遥控指令应答处理
                System.out.println("遥控应答->设备编号:" + data.getDeviceId()
                        + "\t继电器编号:" + data.getRelayId() + "\t执行结果:"
                        + data.getStatus());
            }
            @Override
            public void receiveStoreData(StoreData data) {// 已存储数据接收处理
                // 遍历节点数据。数据包括网络设备的数据以及各个节点数据。温湿度数据存放在节点数据中
                for (NodeData nd : data.getNodeList()) {
                    SimpleDateFormat sdf = new SimpleDateFormat(
                            "yy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss");
                    String str = sdf.format(nd.getRecordTime());
                    System.out.println("存储数据->设备地址:" + data.getDeviceId()
                            + "\t节点:" + nd.getNodeId() + "\t温度:" + nd.getTem()
                            + "\t湿度:" + nd.getHum() + "\t存储时间:" + str);
                }
            }
            @Override
            public void receiveRealtimeData(RealTimeData data) {
                log.info("网络采集器deviceId：{},数据：{}", data.getDeviceId(), JSONUtil.toJsonStr(data));
                // 数据库记录日志
                saveCommunicationLog(data);
                // 实时数据接收处理
                // 遍历节点数据。数据包括网络设备的数据以及各个节点数据。温湿度数据存放在节点数据中
                DevNetworkCollector dnc = dncMapper.selectDevNetworkCollectorByCode(data.getDeviceId() + "", null);
                if (dnc != null) {
                    AjaxResult result = jufeService.baseSetInfo();
                    JSONObject obj = JSONUtil.parseObj(JSONUtil.toJsonStr(result.get("data")));
                    DevNetworkCollectorItem dci_query = new DevNetworkCollectorItem();
                    dci_query.setCollectorId(dnc.getId());
                    List<DevNetworkCollectorItem> items = dciMapper.selectDevNetworkCollectorItemList(dci_query);
                    for (NodeData nd : data.getNodeList()) {
                        for (DevNetworkCollectorItem item : items) {
                            if (item.getNodeId() == nd.getNodeId()) {
                                DevCollectorData dcd = new DevCollectorData();
                                dcd.setRoomId(dnc.getRoomId());
                                dcd.setCollectorCode(data.getDeviceId() + "");
                                dcd.setRoomDeviceType(item.getType());
                                dcd.setTem(nd.getTem());
                                dcd.setHum(nd.getHum());
                                dcd.setCoordinateType(nd.getCoordinateType() + "");
                                dcd.setLng(nd.getLng());
                                dcd.setLat(nd.getLat());
                                dcd.setCreateTime(new Date());
                                dataMapper.insertDevCollectorData(dcd);
                            }
                        }
                        JSONObject room = new JSONObject();
                        room.putOnce("roomId", dnc.getRoomId());
                        Map<String, Object> check = dataMapper.selectRoom(Long.valueOf(dnc.getRoomId()));
                        JSONObject checkRoom = JSONUtil.parseObj(check);
                        room.putOnce("warningType", "3");
                        TimeZone timeZone = TimeZone.getTimeZone("Asia/Shanghai");
                        TimeZone.setDefault(timeZone);
                        switch (nd.getNodeId()) {
                            case 1:
                                room.putOnce("sfsj", String.valueOf(nd.getTem() == 0.0f ? null : nd.getTem() == 0.1f ? "否" : "是"));
                                if (nd.getTem() == 100f) {
                                    room.putOnce("subType", "3001");
                                    jufeService.addWarning(room);
                                }
                                break; //可选
                            case 2:
                                room.putOnce("sfyg", String.valueOf(nd.getTem() == 0.0f ? null : nd.getTem() == 0.1f ? "否" : "是"));
                                if (nd.getTem() == 100f) {
                                    room.putOnce("subType", "3002");
                                    jufeService.addWarning(room);
                                }
                                break; //可选
                            case 3:
                                String putOnce = nd.getTem() == 0.0f ? null : nd.getTem() == 0.1f ? "开" : "关";
                                room.putOnce("sfkc", putOnce);
                                if ("开".equals(putOnce)) {
                                    room.putOnce("subType", "3008");
                                    jufeService.addWarning(room);
                                }
                                break; //可选
                            case 4:
                                float wdmx = obj.getFloat("maxWd");
                                float wdmn = obj.getFloat("minWd");
                                float sdmx = obj.getFloat("maxSd");
                                float sdmn = obj.getFloat("minSd");
                                room.putOnce("wdNum", nd.getTem());
                                if (nd.getTem() > wdmx || nd.getTem() < wdmn) {
                                    room.putOnce("wdgj", "Y");
                                    if (!"Y".equals(checkRoom.getStr("wdgj"))) {
                                        room.putOnce("wdgj_time", new Date());
                                    }
                                } else {
                                    room.putOnce("wdgj", "N");
                                }
                                if (StringUtils.isNotEmpty(room.getStr("wdgj")) && !room.getStr("wdgj").equals(checkRoom.getStr("wdgj"))) {
                                    room.putOpt("subType", "3003");
                                    if ("Y".equals(checkRoom.getStr("wdgj")) && "N".equals(room.getStr("wdgj"))) {
                                        room.putOpt("subType", "3010");
                                        room.putOpt("duration", new Date().getTime() - checkRoom.getDate("wdgj_time").getTime());
                                    }
                                    jufeService.addWarning(room);
                                }
                                room.putOnce("sdNum", nd.getHum());
                                if (nd.getHum() > sdmx || nd.getHum() < sdmn) {
                                    room.putOnce("sdgj", "Y");
                                    if (!"Y".equals(checkRoom.getStr("sdgj"))) {
                                        room.putOnce("sdgj_time", new Date());
                                    }
                                } else {
                                    room.putOnce("sdgj", "N");
                                }
                                if (StringUtils.isNotEmpty(room.getStr("sdgj")) && !room.getStr("sdgj").equals(checkRoom.getStr("sdgj"))) {
                                    room.putOpt("subType", "3004");
                                    if ("Y".equals(checkRoom.getStr("sdgj")) && "N".equals(room.getStr("sdgj"))) {
                                        room.putOpt("subType", "3011");
                                        room.putOpt("duration", new Date().getTime() - checkRoom.getDate("sdgj_time").getTime());
                                    }
                                    jufeService.addWarning(room);
                                }
                                break; //可选
                            case 5:
                                float gzmx = obj.getFloat("maxGz");
                                float gzmn = obj.getFloat("minGz");
                                room.putOnce("gzNum", nd.getHum() * 10);
                                if (nd.getHum() * 10 > gzmx || nd.getHum() * 10 < gzmn) {
                                    room.putOnce("gzgj", "Y");
                                    if (!"Y".equals(checkRoom.getStr("gzgj"))) {
                                        room.putOnce("gzgj_time", new Date());
                                    }
                                } else {
                                    room.putOnce("gzgj", "N");
                                }
                                if (StringUtils.isNotEmpty(room.getStr("gzgj")) && !room.getStr("gzgj").equals(checkRoom.getStr("gzgj"))) {
                                    room.putOnce("subType", "3005");
                                    if ("Y".equals(checkRoom.getStr("gzgj")) && "N".equals(room.getStr("gzgj"))) {
                                        room.putOpt("subType", "3012");
                                        room.putOnce("duration", new Date().getTime() - checkRoom.getDate("gzgj_time").getTime());
                                    }
                                    jufeService.addWarning(room);
                                }
                                break; //可选
                            case 6:
                                float pm25mx = obj.getFloat("maxPm1");
                                float pm25mn = obj.getFloat("minPm1");
                                float pm10mx = obj.getFloat("maxPm2");
                                float pm10mn = obj.getFloat("minPm2");
                                room.putOnce("pm25Num", nd.getTem() * 10);
                                if (nd.getTem() * 10 > pm25mx || nd.getTem() * 10 < pm25mn) {
                                    room.putOnce("pm25gj", "Y");
                                    if (!"Y".equals(checkRoom.getStr("pm25gj"))) {
                                        room.putOnce("pm25gj_time", new Date());
                                    }
                                } else {
                                    room.putOnce("pm25gj", "N");
                                }
                                if (StringUtils.isNotEmpty(room.getStr("pm25gj")) && !room.getStr("pm25gj").equals(checkRoom.getStr("pm25gj"))) {
                                    room.putOpt("subType", "3006");
                                    if ("Y".equals(checkRoom.getStr("pm25gj")) && "N".equals(room.getStr("pm25gj"))) {
                                        room.putOpt("subType", "3013");
                                        room.putOpt("duration", new Date().getTime() - checkRoom.getDate("pm25gj_time").getTime());
                                    }
                                    jufeService.addWarning(room);
                                }
                                room.putOnce("pm10Num", nd.getHum() * 10);
                                if (nd.getHum() * 10 > pm10mx || nd.getHum() * 10 < pm10mn) {
                                    room.putOnce("pm10gj", "Y");
                                    if (!"Y".equals(checkRoom.getStr("pm10gj"))) {
                                        room.putOnce("pm10gj_time", new Date());
                                    }
                                } else {
                                    room.putOnce("pm10gj", "N");
                                }
                                if (StringUtils.isNotEmpty(room.getStr("pm10gj")) && !room.getStr("pm10gj").equals(checkRoom.getStr("pm10gj"))) {
                                    room.putOpt("subType", "3007");
                                    if ("Y".equals(checkRoom.getStr("pm10gj")) && "N".equals(room.getStr("pm10gj"))) {
                                        room.putOpt("subType", "3014");
                                        room.putOpt("duration", new Date().getTime() - checkRoom.getDate("pm10gj_time").getTime());
                                    }
                                    jufeService.addWarning(room);
                                }
                                break; //可选
                            default: //可选
                                //语句
                        }
                        Map map = room.toBean(Map.class);
                        dataMapper.updateSchoolRoomDevice(map);
                    }
                }
//                System.out.println("-----------------------------结束");
            }
            @Override
            public void receiveLoginData(LoginData data) {// 登录数据接收处理
                System.out.println("登录->设备地址:" + data.getDeviceId());
            }
            @Override
            public void receiveParamIds(ParamIdsData data) {
                StringBuilder str = new StringBuilder("设备参数编号列表->设备编号：" + data.getDeviceId()
                        + "\t参数总数量：" + data.getTotalCount() + "\t本帧参数数量："
                        + data.getCount() + "\r\n");
                for (int paramId : data.getPararmIdList())// 遍历设备中参数id编号
                {
                    str.append(paramId).append(",");
                }
                System.out.println(str);
            }
            @Override
            public void receiveParam(ParamData data) {
                StringBuilder str = new StringBuilder("设备参数->设备编号：" + data.getDeviceId() + "\r\n");
                for (ParamItem pararm : data.getParameterList()) {
                    str.append("参数编号：").append(pararm.getParamId()).append("\t参数描述：").append(pararm.getDescription()).append("\t参数值：").append(pararm.getValueDescription() == null ? pararm
                            .getValue() : pararm.getValueDescription()
                            .get(pararm.getValue())).append("\r\n");
                }
                System.out.println(str);
            }
            @Override
            public void receiveWriteParamAck(WriteParamAck data) {
                String str = "下载设备参数->设备编号：" + data.getDeviceId() + "\t参数数量："
                        + data.getCount() + "\t"
                        + (data.isSuccess() ? "下载成功" : "下载失败");
                System.out.println(str);
            }
            @Override
            public void receiveTransDataAck(TransDataAck data) {
                String str = "数据透传->设备编号：" + data.getDeviceId() + "\t响应结果："
                        + data.getData() + "\r\n字节数：" + data.getTransDataLen();
                System.out.println(str);
            }
            @Override
            public void receiveHeartbeatData(HeartbeatData heartbeatData) {
            }
        });
        rsServer.start();
    }
    protected void saveCommunicationLog(RealTimeData data) {
        try {
            DevCommunicationLog communicationLog = new DevCommunicationLog();
            communicationLog.setDeviceId(String.valueOf(data.getDeviceId()));
            communicationLog.setDeviceType(CommunicationDeviceType.NETWORK_COLLECTOR);
            communicationLog.setRawData(JSON.toJSONString(data));
            communicationLog.setCreateTime(new Date());
            devCommunicationLogService.saveCommunicationLog(communicationLog);
        } catch (Exception e) {
            log.error("保存网络采集器消息日志异常，data:{}", data, e);
        }
    }
}
package com.chenrise.device.service;
import io.netty.buffer.ByteBuf;
import io.netty.buffer.Unpooled;
import io.netty.channel.ChannelHandlerContext;
import io.netty.channel.SimpleChannelInboundHandler;
import io.netty.handler.codec.http.websocketx.BinaryWebSocketFrame;
import io.netty.handler.codec.http.websocketx.TextWebSocketFrame;
import io.netty.util.CharsetUtil;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Component;
import java.io.File;
import java.io.FileInputStream;
import java.io.FileNotFoundException;
import java.io.IOException;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.Set;
import java.util.concurrent.ConcurrentHashMap;
/**
 * @program: netty4demo
 * @description: 消息处理器
 * @author: 孙明
 * @create: 2019-12-30 22:39
 */
@Component
public class SocketServerHandler extends SimpleChannelInboundHandler<TextWebSocketFrame> {
    private static Map<String, ChannelHandlerContext> clientContextMap = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
    @Override
    protected void channelRead0(ChannelHandlerContext channelHandlerContext, TextWebSocketFrame textWebSocketFrame) throws Exception {
        // 打印接收到的消息
        System.out.println("服务端接受到的消息:" + textWebSocketFrame.text());
        // 返回消息给客户端
        File audioFile = new File("D:\\6633669.mp3");
        FileInputStream audioStream = new FileInputStream(audioFile);
        byte[] audioData = new byte[(int) audioFile.length()];
        audioStream.read(audioData);
        audioStream.close();
        // 创建WebSocketFrame对象并发送到客户端
        channelHandlerContext.writeAndFlush(new BinaryWebSocketFrame(Unpooled.wrappedBuffer(audioData)));
//        channelHandlerContext.writeAndFlush(new TextWebSocketFrame("{\"name\":\"123456\"}"  ));
    }
    /**
     * 客户端连接的时候触发
     * @param ctx
     * @throws Exception
     */
    @Override
    public void handlerAdded(ChannelHandlerContext ctx) throws Exception {
        // LongText() 唯一的  ShortText() 不唯一
        clientContextMap.put(ctx.channel().id().asLongText(), ctx);
    }
    /**
     * 客户端断开连接的时候触发
     * @param ctx
     * @throws Exception
     */
    @Override
    public void handlerRemoved(ChannelHandlerContext ctx) throws Exception {
        clientContextMap.remove(ctx.channel().id().asLongText());
    }
    /**
     * @Description：异常处理方法
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-03-07 15:03:22
     * @param ctx:
     * @param cause:
     * @return: void
     */
    @Override
    public void exceptionCaught(ChannelHandlerContext ctx, Throwable cause) throws Exception {
        ctx.close();
    }
    /**
     * @Description:发送消息
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-03-07 15:54:30
     * @param clientId:
     * @param message:
     * @return: void
     */
    public void sendMessage(String clientId, String message) {
        ChannelHandlerContext ctx = clientContextMap.get(clientId);
        Set<Map.Entry<String, ChannelHandlerContext>> entries = clientContextMap.entrySet();
// 遍历所有值
        for (Map.Entry<String, ChannelHandlerContext> entry : entries) {
            ctx = entry.getValue();
        }
        if (ctx != null) {
            ByteBuf buf = Unpooled.copiedBuffer(message.getBytes(CharsetUtil.UTF_8));
            ctx.writeAndFlush(buf);
        }
        File audioFile = new File("D:\\6633669.mp3");
        FileInputStream audioStream = null;
        try {
            audioStream = new FileInputStream(audioFile);
        } catch (FileNotFoundException e) {
            e.printStackTrace();
        }
        byte[] audioData = new byte[(int) audioFile.length()];
        try {
            audioStream.read(audioData);
            audioStream.close();
        } catch (IOException e) {
            e.printStackTrace();
        }
        // 创建WebSocketFrame对象并发送到客户端
        ctx.writeAndFlush(new BinaryWebSocketFrame(Unpooled.wrappedBuffer(audioData)));
    }
}
