package com.chenrise.device.service;
import io.netty.bootstrap.ServerBootstrap;
import io.netty.buffer.Unpooled;
import io.netty.channel.Channel;
import io.netty.channel.ChannelFuture;
import io.netty.channel.ChannelFutureListener;
import io.netty.channel.ChannelHandlerContext;
import io.netty.channel.ChannelInitializer;
import io.netty.channel.ChannelOption;
import io.netty.channel.EventLoopGroup;
import io.netty.channel.nio.NioEventLoopGroup;
import io.netty.channel.socket.SocketChannel;
import io.netty.channel.socket.nio.NioServerSocketChannel;
import io.netty.handler.codec.http.HttpObjectAggregator;
import io.netty.handler.codec.http.HttpServerCodec;
import io.netty.handler.codec.http.websocketx.BinaryWebSocketFrame;
import io.netty.handler.codec.http.websocketx.CloseWebSocketFrame;
import io.netty.handler.codec.http.websocketx.TextWebSocketFrame;
import io.netty.handler.codec.http.websocketx.WebSocketFrame;
import io.netty.handler.codec.http.websocketx.WebSocketServerProtocolHandler;
import io.netty.handler.stream.ChunkedFile;
import io.netty.handler.stream.ChunkedWriteHandler;
import io.netty.util.AttributeKey;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Component;
import javax.sound.sampled.AudioFormat;
import javax.sound.sampled.AudioInputStream;
import javax.sound.sampled.AudioSystem;
import javax.sound.sampled.DataLine;
import javax.sound.sampled.SourceDataLine;
import java.io.ByteArrayInputStream;
import java.io.ByteArrayOutputStream;
import java.io.File;
import java.io.FileInputStream;
import java.io.IOException;
import java.io.InputStream;
import java.net.InetSocketAddress;
import java.nio.charset.StandardCharsets;
import java.util.concurrent.ConcurrentHashMap;
public class WebSocketServer {
    private final int port;
    private final ConcurrentHashMap<String, ChannelHandlerContext> clients = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
    // 定义身份验证令牌
    private static final String AUTH_TOKEN_VALUE = "123456";
    private static final AttributeKey<String> AUTH_TOKEN = AttributeKey.valueOf("authToken");
    public WebSocketServer(int port) {
        this.port = port;
    }
    public void run() throws Exception {
        EventLoopGroup bossGroup = new NioEventLoopGroup();
        EventLoopGroup workerGroup = new NioEventLoopGroup();
        try {
            ServerBootstrap b = new ServerBootstrap();
            b.group(bossGroup, workerGroup)
                    .channel(NioServerSocketChannel.class)
                    .childHandler(new ChannelInitializer<SocketChannel>() {
                        @Override
                        public void initChannel(SocketChannel ch) throws Exception {
                            ch.pipeline().addLast(
                                    new HttpServerCodec(),
                                    new HttpObjectAggregator(65536),
                                    new ChunkedWriteHandler(),
                                    new WebSocketServerProtocolHandler("/"),
//                                    new WebSocketServerHandler(clients),
                                    new SocketServerHandler()
                            );
                        }
                    })
                    .option(ChannelOption.SO_BACKLOG, 128)
                    .childOption(ChannelOption.SO_KEEPALIVE, true);
            ChannelFuture f = b.bind(port).sync();
            f.channel().closeFuture().sync();
        } finally {
            workerGroup.shutdownGracefully();
            bossGroup.shutdownGracefully();
        }
    }
    private class WebSocketServerHandler extends io.netty.channel.ChannelInboundHandlerAdapter {
        private final ConcurrentHashMap<String, ChannelHandlerContext> clients;
        private SourceDataLine line;
        public WebSocketServerHandler(ConcurrentHashMap<String, ChannelHandlerContext> clients) {
            this.clients = clients;
            initAudio();
        }
        private void initAudio() {
            try {
                InputStream in =  new FileInputStream("D:\\6633669.mp3");
                ByteArrayOutputStream out = new ByteArrayOutputStream();
                byte[] buffer = new byte[4096];
                int bytesRead;
                while ((bytesRead = in.read(buffer)) != -1) {
                    out.write(buffer, 0, bytesRead);
                }
                in.close();
                out.flush();
                byte[] audioBytes = out.toByteArray();
                ByteArrayInputStream audioIn =new ByteArrayInputStream(audioBytes);
                AudioInputStream audioStream = AudioSystem.getAudioInputStream(audioIn);
                AudioFormat sourceFormat = audioStream.getFormat();
                AudioFormat targetFormat = new AudioFormat(AudioFormat.Encoding.PCM_SIGNED, 22050.0f, 16, 1, 2, 22050.0f, false);
                AudioInputStream targetStream = AudioSystem.getAudioInputStream(targetFormat, audioStream);
                DataLine.Info info = new DataLine.Info(SourceDataLine.class, targetFormat);
                line = (SourceDataLine) AudioSystem.getLine(info);
                line.open(targetFormat);
                line.start();
                byte[] audioBuffer = new byte[4096];
                int bytesRead2;
                while ((bytesRead2 = targetStream.read(audioBuffer, 0, audioBuffer.length)) != -1) {
                    line.write(audioBuffer, 0, bytesRead2);
                }
                targetStream.close();
            } catch (Exception e) {
                e.printStackTrace();
            }
        }
        private void sendAudioToClient(ChannelHandlerContext ctx, String audioFilePath, String authToken) {
            if (AUTH_TOKEN_VALUE.equals(authToken)) {
                try {
                    File audioFile = new File(audioFilePath);
                    FileInputStream audioStream = new FileInputStream(audioFile);
                    byte[] audioData = new byte[(int) audioFile.length()];
                    audioStream.read(audioData);
                    audioStream.close();
                    // 创建WebSocketFrame对象并发送到客户端
                    ctx.writeAndFlush(new BinaryWebSocketFrame(Unpooled.wrappedBuffer(audioData)));
                } catch (IOException e) {
                    e.printStackTrace();
                }
            } else {
                System.out.println("Unauthorized client attempted to access audio data");
            }
        }
        @Override
        public void channelActive(ChannelHandlerContext ctx) throws Exception {
            // 当有新的客户端连接时，将其加入clients集合中
            clients.put(ctx.channel().id().asLongText(), ctx);
        }
        @Override
        public void channelInactive(ChannelHandlerContext ctx) throws Exception {
            // 当客户端断开连接时，将其从clients集合中移除
            clients.remove(ctx.channel().id().asLongText());
        }
        @Override
        public void channelRead(ChannelHandlerContext ctx, Object msg) throws Exception {
            // 处理WebSocketFrame消息
            if (msg instanceof TextWebSocketFrame) {
                TextWebSocketFrame frame = (TextWebSocketFrame) msg;
                String message = frame.text();
                // 检查是否为请求音频文件
                if ("request_audio".equals(message)) {
                    String authToken = ctx.channel().attr(AUTH_TOKEN).get();
                    sendAudioToClient(ctx, "D:\\6633669.mp3", authToken);
                }
            } else if (msg instanceof BinaryWebSocketFrame) {
                BinaryWebSocketFrame frame = (BinaryWebSocketFrame) msg;
                byte[] audioData = frame.content().array();
                line.write(audioData, 0, audioData.length);
            } else if (msg instanceof CloseWebSocketFrame) {
                // 当客户端关闭WebSocket连接时，将其从clients集合中移除
                clients.remove(ctx.channel().id().asLongText());
                ctx.channel().close();
            }
        }
        @Override
        public void exceptionCaught(ChannelHandlerContext ctx, Throwable cause) throws Exception {
            // 异常处理
            cause.printStackTrace();
            clients.remove(ctx.channel().id().asLongText());
            ctx.close();
        }
    }
    public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {
        WebSocketServer server = new WebSocketServer(8635);
        server.run();
    }
}
package com.chenrise.device.util;
import cn.hutool.core.date.DateUtil;
import cn.hutool.json.JSONObject;
import com.chenrise.device.domain.UdpNodeConfig;
import com.chenrise.device.domain.UdpProtocolMessage;
import java.nio.ByteBuffer;
import java.nio.charset.StandardCharsets;
import java.util.*;
/**
 * A4告警信息解析
 */
public class A4DecodeUtil {
    public static List<UdpNodeConfig> getNodeConfigInfos(UdpProtocolMessage msgObj, String address){
        int n = msgObj.getCmdVer2(); // 获取Block个数
        ByteBuffer block = null;
        // 多个block解析的多个节点用list保存
        List<UdpNodeConfig> nodeList = new ArrayList<>();
        UdpNodeConfig nodeData = null;
        byte[] data = msgObj.getData();
        if (data != null && data.length > 0) {
            // 按每28个字节循环读取每一个block
            for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
                nodeData = new UdpNodeConfig();
                block = ByteBuffer.wrap(data, i * 28, 28);
                nodeData.setAddress(address);
                short eno = block.getShort(); //2
                short ecode = block.get();    //1
                short emark = block.get();      //1
                short elevel = block.get();    //1
                nodeData.setLevel(elevel);
                short ert = block.get();       //1
                nodeData.setNno(block.get());
                int efa = block.getInt(); //4
                int time = block.getInt(); //时间戳 4
                int status1 =  block.getInt(); //4
                String hex1 = Integer.toHexString(status1);
                int status2 =  block.getInt(); //4
                String hex2 = Integer.toHexString(status2);
                int statusFiannl = status1^status2;  //两者异或得到 0X80000000,说明是开关分闸报警
                String hex3 = Integer.toHexString(statusFiannl);
                String yuString =  Integer.toBinaryString(statusFiannl);
                if(0x34==emark){
                    if(yuString!=null){
                        String bit30 = yuString.substring(0,yuString.length()-29);
                        String bitnew30 = bit30.substring(1,2);
                        String a = bitnew30;
                    }
                    if(hex1.substring(0,1).equals("8")&&hex2.substring(0,1).equals("c")){
                        nodeData.setStatus(0);
                    }else if(hex2.substring(0,1).equals("8")&&hex1.substring(0,1).equals("c")) {
                        nodeData.setStatus(1);
                    }
                    //手动分闸
                    if(hex1.substring(3,4).equals("1")){
                        nodeData.setNetcon(1);
                    }else{
                        nodeData.setNetcon(0);
                    }
                }
                nodeList.add(nodeData);
            }
        }
        return nodeList;
    }
    public static List<JSONObject> getNodeConfigInfos1(UdpProtocolMessage msgObj, String address){
        int n = msgObj.getCmdVer2(); // 获取Block个数
        ByteBuffer block = null;
        // 多个block解析的多个节点用list保存
        List<JSONObject> nodeList = new ArrayList<>();
        JSONObject nodeData = null;
        byte[] data = msgObj.getData();
        String text = ByteUtil.byteToHex(data);
        if (data != null && data.length > 0) {
            // 按每28个字节循环读取每一个block
            for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
                nodeData = new JSONObject();
                block = ByteBuffer.wrap(data, i * 28, 28);
                nodeData.putOnce("address",address);
                short no = block.getShort(); //2
                short code = block.get();    //1
                short evt_id = block.get();      //1
                short evt_lv = block.get();    //1
                short evt_re = block.get();       //1
                short evt_ex = block.get();       //1
                int evt_sp = block.getInt(); //4
                int time = block.getInt(); //时间戳 4
                Date d = DateUtil.date(time*1000L);
                nodeData.putOnce("no",no);
                nodeData.putOnce("level", evt_lv);
                if(evt_lv==2){
                    System.out.println("节点："+evt_ex+"--------------------发生了告警！！！！！！！！！！！");
                }
                nodeList.add(nodeData);
            }
        }
        return nodeList;
    }
}
package com.chenrise.device.util;
import com.chenrise.device.domain.UdpProtocolMessage;
import com.chenrise.device.domain.UdpRealTimeInfo;
import java.math.BigInteger;
import java.nio.ByteBuffer;
import java.text.SimpleDateFormat;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.Date;
import java.util.List;
/**
 * AC心跳消息信息解析
 */
public class AcDecodeUtil {
    public static List<UdpRealTimeInfo> getRealTimeInfos(UdpProtocolMessage msgObj, String address){
        // 获取Block个数
        int n = msgObj.getCmdVer();
        ByteBuffer block = null;
        // 多个block解析的多个节点用list保存
        List<UdpRealTimeInfo> realTimeList = new ArrayList<>();
        UdpRealTimeInfo realTimeData = null;
        // 按每32个字节循环读取每一个block
        byte[] data = msgObj.getData();
        byte[] datanew = new byte[data.length-4];
        byte[] timeStmap =  new byte[4];
        System.arraycopy(data,0,timeStmap,0,4); //时间戳
        System.arraycopy(data,4,datanew,0,datanew.length);
        String hex = new BigInteger(1, timeStmap).toString(16);
        SimpleDateFormat simpleDateFormat = new SimpleDateFormat("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss");
        long lt = new Long(Long.parseLong(hex.substring(0,8)+"000",  16));
        Date date = new Date(lt);
        if (data != null && data.length > 0) {
            for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
                block= ByteBuffer.wrap(datanew,i*32,32);
                realTimeData = new UdpRealTimeInfo();
                realTimeList.add(realTimeData);
                //				block = block.get(new byte[32]);
                // byte 1 : 节点类型 NNO
                realTimeData.setNno(block.get());
                // byte 1 : 产品类型 TYPE
                realTimeData.setType((short) Short.toUnsignedInt ((short)block.get()));
                realTimeData.setAddress(address);
                // 获取block对应的产品类型，判断不同类型解析不同的block
                short nodeTypeNumber = realTimeData.getType();
                /* 0x80-单相节点
                 * 0x84-三相节点主路
                 * 0xA0-直流单相节点
                 * 0xE0-T/A 系列单相
                 * 0xE4-T/A 系列三相主路
                 */
                Integer nodeTypeNumberInt =  ByteForMessInfoUtil.byteToInteger((byte) nodeTypeNumber);
                if (0x80 == nodeTypeNumberInt
                        || 0x84 == nodeTypeNumberInt
                        || 0xA0 == nodeTypeNumberInt
                        || 0xE0 == nodeTypeNumberInt
                        || 0xE4 == nodeTypeNumberInt) {
                    // byte 2 : 电压值 VOL
                    realTimeData.setVol(block.getShort());
                    // byte 2 : 漏电流值 LKI
                    realTimeData.setLki(block.getShort());
                    // byte 4 : 功率值 PWR
                    realTimeData.setPwrOne(block.getShort());
                    realTimeData.setPwrTwo(block.getShort());
                    Integer pwrOneInt =  ByteForMessInfoUtil.byteToInteger((byte) realTimeData.getPwrOne());
                    Integer pwrTwoInt =  ByteForMessInfoUtil.byteToInteger((byte) realTimeData.getPwrTwo());
                    String s = Integer.toHexString((int) (pwrOneInt & 0xff));
                    String s2 = Integer.toHexString((int) (pwrTwoInt & 0xff));
                    s =getForString(s );
                    s2 =getForString(s2 );
                    long ltpwr = new Long(Long.parseLong(s+s2,16));
                    realTimeData.setPwr(ltpwr);
//						Integer pwrInfo =  ByteUtils.byteToInteger((byte) realTimeData.getPwr());
//						ByteUtil.bytes2hex()
                    // byte 2 : 温度值 TMP
                    realTimeData.setTmp(block.getShort());
                    Integer curOneInt =  ByteForMessInfoUtil.byteToInteger((byte) block.getShort());
                    Integer curTwoInt =  ByteForMessInfoUtil.byteToInteger((byte) block.getShort());
                    s = Integer.toHexString((int) (curOneInt & 0xff));
                    s2 = Integer.toHexString((int) (curTwoInt & 0xff));
                    s =getForString(s);
                    s2 =getForString(s2);
                    ltpwr = new Long(Long.parseLong(s+s2,16));
                    // byte 4 : 电流值 CUR
                    realTimeData.setCur(ltpwr);
                    // byte 2 : N相温度值 TMPN
                    realTimeData.setTmpn(block.getShort());
                    // byte 2 : 功率因数 PF
                    realTimeData.setPf(block.getShort());
                    // byte 4 : 报警位 ALM
                    realTimeData.setAlm(block.getInt());
                    // byte 8 : 累计电量 ENERGE
                    realTimeData.setEnerge(block.getDouble());
                }
                /* 0x85-三相节点A相
                 * 0x86-三相节点B相
                 * 0x87-三相节点C相
                 * 0xE5-T/A 系列A相
                 * 0xE6-T/A 系列B相
                 * 0xE7-T/A 系列C相
                 */
                else if (0x85 == nodeTypeNumberInt
                        || 0x86 == nodeTypeNumberInt
                        || 0x87 == nodeTypeNumberInt
                        || 0xE5 == nodeTypeNumberInt
                        || 0xE6 == nodeTypeNumberInt
                        || 0xE7 == nodeTypeNumberInt) {
                    // TODO:同上分支，按协议约定的产品类型进行字节分割读取，转换为对应的数据对象
                }
                /* 0x81-交流单相节点
                 * 0xA1-直流单相节点
                 */
                else if (0x81 == nodeTypeNumberInt || 0xA1 == nodeTypeNumberInt) {
                    // TODO:同上分支，按协议约定的产品类型进行字节分割读取，转换为对应的数据对象
                }
                /* 0x83-三相交流节点
                 */
                else if (0x83 == nodeTypeNumberInt) {
                    // TODO:同上分支，按协议约定的产品类型进行字节分割读取，转换为对应的数据对象
                }
            }
        }
        return realTimeList;
    }
    private static String getForString(String str){
        int length = str.length();
        for(int i=0;i<4-length;i++){
            str= "0"+str;
        }
        return str;
    };
}
package com.chenrise.device.util;
import com.chenrise.device.domain.UdpPowerInfo;
import com.chenrise.device.domain.UdpProtocolMessage;
import com.chenrise.device.domain.UdpRegister;
import java.nio.ByteBuffer;
import java.util.Date;
/**
 * B0握手消息解析
 */
public class B0DecodeUtil {
    public static UdpPowerInfo getPowerInfo(UdpProtocolMessage msgObj, String address){
        ByteBuffer buf = ByteBuffer.wrap(msgObj.getData());
        UdpRegister udpRegisterData = new UdpRegister();
        // byte 1 :节点号 NNO
        udpRegisterData.setNno(buf.get());
        // byte 1 :通讯模块类型 TYPE
        udpRegisterData.setType(buf.get());
        // byte 2 :通讯模块型号 Model
        udpRegisterData.setModel(buf.getShort());
        // byte 2 :版本号 VER
        udpRegisterData.setVer(buf.getShort());
        UdpPowerInfo udpPowerInfo = new UdpPowerInfo();
        udpPowerInfo.setAddType("1");
        udpPowerInfo.setAddTime(new Date());
        udpPowerInfo.setUpdateTime(new Date());
        udpPowerInfo.setAddress(address);
        udpPowerInfo.setPort(String.valueOf(msgObj.getSender().getPort()));
        udpPowerInfo.setName(address);
        udpPowerInfo.setMac(msgObj.getMac());
        return udpPowerInfo;
    }
}
package com.chenrise.device.util;
import com.chenrise.device.domain.UdpNetConfig;
import com.chenrise.device.domain.UdpProtocolMessage;
import java.nio.ByteBuffer;
/**
 * B2握手消息解析
 */
public class B2DecodeUtil {
    public static UdpNetConfig getNetConfigInfo(UdpProtocolMessage msgObj, String address){
        ByteBuffer buf = ByteBuffer.wrap(msgObj.getData());
        // 这里示例为了方便直接用map，实际可根据需要定义自己的数据对象实体类
        UdpNetConfig udpNetConfigData = new UdpNetConfig();
        /**config1部分**/
        // byte 1 :节点号 NNO
        udpNetConfigData.setNno((short) buf.get());
        // byte 1 :通讯模块类型 TYPE
        udpNetConfigData.setType((short) buf.get());
        // byte 2 :通讯模块型号 Model
        udpNetConfigData.setModel(buf.getShort());
        // byte 2 :版本号 VER
        udpNetConfigData.setVer(buf.getShort());
        // byte 6 :产品序列号 MAC
        udpNetConfigData.setMac(ByteUtil.byteToHex(buf.get(new byte[6]).array()));
        // byte 2 :控制位 CTRL
        udpNetConfigData.setCtrl(buf.getShort());
        // byte 4 :IP地址 IP
        udpNetConfigData.setIp(ByteUtil.longToIP(buf.getInt()));
        // byte 4 :子网掩码 MASK
        udpNetConfigData.setMask(ByteUtil.longToIP(buf.getInt()));
        // byte 4 :网关IP地址 GW
        udpNetConfigData.setGw(ByteUtil.longToIP(buf.getInt()));
        // byte 4 :服务器IP地址 SIP
        udpNetConfigData.setSip(ByteUtil.longToIP(buf.getInt()));
        // byte 2 :服务器端口 SPORT
        udpNetConfigData.setSport(buf.getShort());
        // byte 4 :DNS服务器IP地址 DNSS
        udpNetConfigData.setDnss(ByteUtil.longToIP(buf.getInt()));
        // byte 2 :时间间隔 RTVI
        udpNetConfigData.setRtvi(buf.getShort());
        // byte 2 :本地监听端口 SPORT
        udpNetConfigData.setLport(buf.getShort());
        // byte 2 :时区 ZONE
        udpNetConfigData.setZone(buf.getShort());
        // byte 4 :APP地址 LIP
        udpNetConfigData.setLip(ByteUtil.longToIP(buf.getInt()));
        // byte 8 :设备密码 DEVPWD
        udpNetConfigData.setDevpwd(ByteUtil.byteToHex(buf.get(new byte[8]).array()));
        // byte 3 :保留其他用途 REV1
        buf.get(new byte[3]);
        // byte 24 :名称 NAME
        udpNetConfigData.setName(ByteUtil.byteToHex(buf.get(new byte[24]).array()));
        /**config2部分**/
        // 根据TYPE字段值不同，区分解析不同的config2部分
        // 当TYPE 等于0X8A 字段解析如下
        if (0x8a == udpNetConfigData.getType()) {
            // byte 4 :保留使用 RESV
            // byte 20 :WIFI路由器无线信号标识 SSID
            udpNetConfigData.setSsid(ByteUtil.byteToHex(buf.get(new byte[20]).array()));
            // byte 20 :WIFI路由器密码 PASSWD
            udpNetConfigData.setPasswd(ByteUtil.byteToHex(buf.get(new byte[20]).array()));
        }
        // 当TYPE 不等于0X8A 字段解析如下
        else {
            // byte 4 :保留使用 RESV
            buf.getInt();
            // byte 4 :IMEI高字节 IMEIH
            udpNetConfigData.setImeih(buf.getInt());
            // byte 4 :IMEI低字节 IMEIL
            udpNetConfigData.setImeil(buf.getInt());
            // byte 4 :IMSI高字节 IMSIH
            udpNetConfigData.setImeih(buf.getInt());
            // byte 4 :IMSI低字节 IMSIL
            udpNetConfigData.setImeil(buf.getInt());
            // byte 24 :保留使用 RESV1
        }
        // TODO : 调用业务服务处理数据对象，如保存网络配置信息处理逻辑
        return udpNetConfigData;
    }
}
package com.chenrise.device.util;
import com.chenrise.device.domain.UdpNodeConfig;
import com.chenrise.device.domain.UdpProtocolMessage;
import java.math.BigInteger;
import java.nio.ByteBuffer;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.Date;
import java.util.List;
/**
 * B4握手消息解析
 */
public class B4DecodeUtil {
    public static List<UdpNodeConfig> getNodeConfigInfos(UdpProtocolMessage msgObj, String address){
        // 获取Block个数
        int n = msgObj.getCmdVer();
        ByteBuffer block = null;
        // 多个block解析的多个节点用list保存
        List<UdpNodeConfig> nodeList = new ArrayList<>();
        UdpNodeConfig nodeData = null;
        byte[] data = msgObj.getData();
        if (data != null && data.length > 0) {
            // 按每80个字节循环读取每一个block
            for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
                nodeData = new UdpNodeConfig();
                nodeList.add(nodeData);
                block= ByteBuffer.wrap(data,i*80,80);
                // byte 1 : 节点类型 NNO
                nodeData.setNno(block.get());
                // byte 1 : 产品类型 TYPE
                nodeData.setType(block.get());
                // 获取block对应的产品类型，判断不同类型解析不同的block
                short nodeTypeNumber = nodeData.getType();
                /* 0x80-单相节点
                 * 0x84-三相节点主路
                 * 0xA0-直流单相节点
                 */
                String hex = new BigInteger(1, data).toString(16);
                if (1==1||0x80 == nodeTypeNumber || 0x84 == nodeTypeNumber || 0xA0 == nodeTypeNumber) {
                    nodeData.setAddress(address);
                    // byte 2 :产品型号
                    nodeData.setModel(block.getShort());
//						ByteUtil.bytes2hex(nodeData.getModel());
                    // byte 2 :版本号 VER
                    nodeData.setVer(block.getShort());
                    // byte 4 :产品序列号 SER
                    nodeData.setSer(String.valueOf(block.getInt()));
                    // byte 1 :保留 REV
                    block.get();
                    // byte 1 :变比倍数 CUNIT
                    nodeData.setCunit(block.get());
                    // byte 1 :控制位 CTRL
                    nodeData.setCtrl(block.get());
                    //  byte 1  电量目标节点号 = 01  [0x01]
                    block.get();
                    // byte 2 :电压上限 VOLH
                    nodeData.setVolh(block.getShort());
                    // byte 2 :电压下限 VOLL
                    nodeData.setVoll(block.getShort());
                    // byte 2 :电压预警上限 VOLHw
                    nodeData.setVolhw(block.getShort());
                    // byte 2 :漏电流上限 LKIH
                    nodeData.setLkin(block.getShort());
                    // byte 2 :漏电流预警上限 LKIHw
                    nodeData.setLkihw(block.getShort());
                    // byte 2 :功率上限 PWRH
                    nodeData.setPwrh(block.getShort());
                    // byte 2 :电压预警下限 VOLLw
                    nodeData.setVollw(block.getShort());
                    // byte 2 :功率预警上限 PWRHw
                    nodeData.setPwrhw(block.getShort());
                    // byte 2 :温度上限 TMPH
                    nodeData.setTmph(block.getShort());
                    // byte 2 :温度预警上限 TMPHw
                    nodeData.setTmphw(block.getShort());
                    // byte 2 :电流上限 CURH
                    nodeData.setCurh(block.getShort());
                    // byte 2 :电流预警上限 CURHw
                    nodeData.setCurhw(block.getShort());
                    // byte 4 :报警使能 FUN
                    nodeData.setFun(block.getInt());
                    // byte 4 :漏电检测时间 LKDT
                    nodeData.setLkdt(block.getInt());
                    // byte 4 :漏电检测设定 LKDI
                    nodeData.setLkdi(block.getInt());
                    // byte 4 :脱扣使能 CUTOFF
                    nodeData.setCutOff(block.getInt());
                    // byte 4 :传感器故障使能 SENE nodeData.setSene(block.getInt()); 没有
                    // byte 24 :线路名称 NAME
//						byte[] namestemp =block.get(new byte[26]).array();
                    byte[] bytemp = new byte[26];
                    for(int bi=0;bi<26;bi++){
                        bytemp[bi] = block.get();
                    }
                    nodeData.setName(String.valueOf(""));
                    nodeData.setUpdateTime(new Date());
                    //保存node信息到数据库
                }
                /* 0x81-交流1P 节点附属配置
                 * 0xa1-直流节点附属配置
                 */
                else if (0x81 == nodeTypeNumber || 0xa1 == nodeTypeNumber) {
                    // TODO : 同上，参照协议消息格式约定，进行按字节截取并转换为响应的数据对象
                }
                /* 0x83-交流三相节点附属配置
                 */
                else if (0x83 == nodeTypeNumber) {
                    // TODO : 同上，参照协议消息格式约定，进行按字节截取并转换为响应的数据对象
                }
                /* 0xE0-E系列单相
                 * 0xE4-E系列三相主路
                 */
                else if (0xE0 == nodeTypeNumber || 0xE4 == nodeTypeNumber) {
                    // TODO : 同上，参照协议消息格式约定，进行按字节截取并转换为响应的数据对象
                }
                /* 0x85-三相节点A相
                 * 0x86-三相节点B相
                 * 0x87-三相节点C相
                 * 0xE5-T/A 系列A相
                 * 0xE6-T/A 系列B相
                 * 0xE7-T/A 系列C相
                 */
                else if (0x85 == nodeTypeNumber
                        || 0x86 == nodeTypeNumber
                        || 0x87 == nodeTypeNumber
                        || 0xE5 == nodeTypeNumber
                        || 0xE6 == nodeTypeNumber
                        || 0xE7 == nodeTypeNumber) {
                    // TODO:同上分支，按协议约定的产品类型进行字节分割读取，转换为对应的数据对象
                }
            }
        }
        return nodeList;
    }
}
package com.chenrise.device.util;
import java.io.IOException;
import java.io.StringReader;
import java.io.StringWriter;
public final class ByteForMessInfoUtil {
    public final static short UNSIGNED_MAX_VALUE = (Byte.MAX_VALUE * 2) + 1;
    public static short toUnsigned(byte b) {
        return (short) (b < 0 ? (UNSIGNED_MAX_VALUE + 1) + b : b);
    }
    public static String toHexAscii(byte b) {
        StringWriter sw = new StringWriter(2);
        addHexAscii(b, sw);
        return sw.toString();
    }
    public static String toHexAscii(byte[] bytes) {
        int len = bytes.length;
        StringWriter sw = new StringWriter(len * 2);
        for (int i = 0; i < len; ++i)
            addHexAscii(bytes[i], sw);
        return sw.toString();
    }
    public static byte[] fromHexAscii(String s) throws NumberFormatException {
        try {
            int len = s.length();
            if ((len % 2) != 0)
                throw new NumberFormatException("Hex ascii must be exactly two digits per byte.");
            int out_len = len / 2;
            byte[] out = new byte[out_len];
            int i = 0;
            StringReader sr = new StringReader(s);
            while (i < out_len) {
                int val = (16 * fromHexDigit(sr.read())) + fromHexDigit(sr.read());
                out[i++] = (byte) val;
            }
            return out;
        } catch (IOException e) {
            throw new InternalError("IOException reading from StringReader?!?!");
        }
    }
    static void addHexAscii(byte b, StringWriter sw) {
        short ub = toUnsigned(b);
        int h1 = ub / 16;
        int h2 = ub % 16;
        sw.write(toHexDigit(h1));
        sw.write(toHexDigit(h2));
    }
    private static int fromHexDigit(int c) throws NumberFormatException {
        if (c >= 0x30 && c < 0x3A)
            return c - 0x30;
        else if (c >= 0x41 && c < 0x47)
            return c - 0x37;
        else if (c >= 0x61 && c < 0x67)
            return c - 0x57;
        else
            throw new NumberFormatException('\'' + c + "' is not a valid hexadecimal digit.");
    }
    private static char toHexDigit(int h) {
        char out;
        if (h <= 9)
            out = (char) (h + 0x30);
        else
            out = (char) (h + 0x37);
       return out;
    }
    private ByteForMessInfoUtil() {
    }
    public static Integer byteToInteger(Byte b) {
        return 0xff & b;
    }
}
package com.chenrise.device.util;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.StringUtils;
import com.chenrise.device.domain.UdpProtocolMessage;
import io.netty.buffer.ByteBuf;
import io.netty.buffer.ByteBufUtil;
import io.netty.buffer.Unpooled;
import java.io.IOException;
import java.net.DatagramPacket;
import java.net.InetSocketAddress;
import java.util.Arrays;
import java.util.zip.CRC32;
import static ch.qos.logback.core.encoder.ByteArrayUtil.hexStringToByteArray;
public class ByteUtil {
	private static long sortno=65534;
	/**
     * 计算CRC32值
     *
     * @param data
     * @return
     */
	public static long calCrc32(byte[] data) {
        CRC32 crc32 = new CRC32();
        crc32.update(data);
        return crc32.getValue();
    }
    /**
	 * 判断指令是否为服务器主动下发后通讯模块回复的ACK消息
	 * 说明：
	 * 		CMD最低位：0表示通讯模块发起的请求，为1表示服务器下发后通信模块的响应
	 * 		服务器主动下发的指令，当服务器收到设备返回的消息后，不需要响应，否则会出现死循环
	 *
	 * @param cmd
	 * @return
	 */
    public static boolean isAckCmd(short cmd) {
		return (cmd & 0x00000001) == 1;
	}
	/**
     * 将十进制整数形式转换成127.0.0.1形式的ip地址
     *
     * @param longIp
     * @return
     */
    public static String longToIP(long longIp) {
        StringBuilder sb = new StringBuilder("");
        // 直接右移24位
        sb.append((longIp >>> 24));
        sb.append(".");
        // 将高8位置0，然后右移16位
        sb.append(((longIp & 0x00FFFFFF) >>> 16));
        sb.append(".");
        // 将高16位置0，然后右移8位
        sb.append(((longIp & 0x0000FFFF) >>> 8));
        sb.append(".");
        // 将高24位置0
        sb.append((longIp & 0x000000FF));
        return sb.toString();
    }
    /**
	 * 二进制转16进制
	 *
	 * @author kansum
	 */
    public static String byteToHex(byte... src) {
		StringBuilder strBuff = new StringBuilder();
		if (src == null || src.length <= 0)
			return null;
		//		return new String(Hex.encodeHex(src));
		for (int i = 0; i < src.length; i++) {
			strBuff.append(Integer.toHexString((0x000000FF & src[i]) | 0xFFFFFF00).substring(6));
		}
		return strBuff.toString().toUpperCase();
	}
	/**
	 * 将字节数组转成16进制
	 * @param bytes
	 * @return
	 */
	public static String bytes2hex(byte[] bytes) {
		StringBuilder sb  = new StringBuilder();
		String        tmp = null;
		for(byte b : bytes) {
			tmp = Integer.toHexString(0xFF & b);
			if(tmp.length() == 1) {
				tmp = "0" + tmp;
			}
			sb.append(tmp);
		}
		return sb.toString();
	}
	/**
	 * 握手消息（B0、B2、B4、AC）
	 * @param msg
	 * @param sn
	 * @return
	 * @throws IOException
	 */
	public static byte[] obj2Bytes(UdpProtocolMessage msg, byte[] sn){
		/**
		 * 此处为data处理，暂未完成
		 * String testMsg = "aaccaacc01";
		 * byte[] testMsgByte = new byte[testMsg.length()];
		 * System.arraycopy(testMsg.getBytes(),0,testMsgByte,0,testMsg.length());
		* msg.setData(testMsgByte);
		 */
		//帧头HEAD
		int headLen=16;
		//消息体DATA
		int dataLen=msg.getData().length;
		//校验码CRC
		int crcLen=4;
		//创建字节数组
		byte[] buf=new byte[headLen+dataLen+crcLen];
		// 字节流起始下标从0开始截取
		int index = 0;
		//帧头 0xf1 1个字节
		buf[index]=(byte)0xf1;
		index++;
		//1个字节
		buf[index]=(byte)msg.getCmd();
		index++;
		//根据不同的消息类型赋予para
		if(0xAA == msg.getCmd()){// AA心跳消息
			buf[index]=(byte)0x00;
		}else if(0xA4 == msg.getCmd()){
			buf[index]=(byte)0xE1;
		}else if(0xA8 == msg.getCmd()){
			buf[index]=(byte)0xF1;
		}else if(0xB0 == msg.getCmd()){
			//para与厂家确认支持1.8版本的协议 1个字节
			buf[index]=(byte)0xAC;
		}else if(0xB2 == msg.getCmd()){
			buf[index]=(byte)0x00;
		}else if(0xB4 == msg.getCmd()||0xAC == msg.getCmd()){
			buf[index]=(byte)msg.getCmdVer();
		}else {
			buf[index]=(byte)0x00;
		}
		index++;
		//echo 1个字节
		buf[index]=0;
		index++;
		//回复消息体长度 2个字节
		byte[] dataLenByte  = Tools.getDataLengthByte(msg);
		buf[index]=dataLenByte[0];
		index++;
		buf[index]=dataLenByte[1];
		index++;
		// sn 2个字节
		buf[index]=sn[0];
		index++;
		buf[index]=sn[1];
		index++;
		// UTC时间戳 4个字节
		byte[] timeInfoB =  hexStringToByteArray(Tools.getUtcTime());
		System.arraycopy(timeInfoB,0,buf,index,4);
		index+=4;
		//UID用于记录命令来源 4个字节
		byte[] uuidInfo = hexStringToByteArray("ffffff80");
		System.arraycopy(uuidInfo,0,buf,index,4);
		index+=4;
		dataLen=msg.getData().length;
		System.arraycopy(msg.getData(),0,buf,headLen,dataLen);
		index+=dataLen;
		//CRC
		setCrcInfoToByte(buf,index,headLen,dataLen,crcLen);
		return buf;
	}
	//分闸合闸回复消息组装
	public static byte[] getOnOffByteMessage(String onOff,String block){
		//block节点号 合闸分闸固定的data格式 00000000 00000000 01
		String blockStr  = Long.toHexString(Long.parseLong(block));
		Integer leStr = blockStr.length();
		for(int i=0;i<4-leStr;i++){
			blockStr = "0"+ blockStr;
		}
		String testMsg = "00000000000000"+blockStr;
		//消息体DATA
		byte[] returnData = hexStringToByteArray(testMsg);
		int dataLen=returnData.length;
		//帧头HEAD
		int headLen=16;
		//校验码CRC
		int crcLen=4;
		//创建字节数组
		byte[] buf=new byte[headLen+dataLen+crcLen];
		// 字节流起始下标从0开始截取
		int index = 0;
		//帧头 0xf1 1个字节
		buf[index]=(byte)0xf1;
		index++;
		//消息ID
		buf[index]=(byte)0xD3;
		index++;
		//1个字节
		//CMD A1合闸  A2分闸
		if(onOff!=null&&onOff.equals("1")){
			buf[index]=(byte)0xA1;
		}else{
			buf[index]=(byte)0xA2;
		}
		index++;
		//消息参数 2
		buf[index]=(byte)0x00;
		index++;
		//0009 DATA 长度固定
		buf[index]=(byte)0x00;
		index++;
		buf[index]=(byte)0x09;
		index++;
		//05F3 消息序列号
		byte[] sortNum = getNodesc();
		buf[index]=sortNum[0];
		index++;
		buf[index]=sortNum[1];
		index++;
		// 时间戳 4个字节
		byte[] timeInfoB =  hexStringToByteArray(Tools.getUtcTime());
		System.arraycopy(timeInfoB,0,buf,index,4);
		index+=4;
		//UID用于记录命令来源 4个字节
		byte[] uuidInfo = hexStringToByteArray(StringUtils.leftPad(sortno+"",8,"0"));
		System.arraycopy(uuidInfo,0,buf,index,4);
		index+=4;
		System.arraycopy(returnData,0,buf,headLen,dataLen);
		index+=dataLen;
		//CRC
		setCrcInfoToByte(buf,index,headLen,dataLen,crcLen);
		return buf;
	}
	/**
	 * @Author cjh
	 * @Description //根据 旧密码和新密码生成指令byte[]
	 * @Date 15:42 2024/7/31
	 **/
	public static byte[] getUpdatePwMessage(String oldPw,String newPw){
		//消息体DATA
		byte[] returnData = hexStringToByteArray(newPw+oldPw);
		int dataLen=returnData.length;
		//帧头HEAD
		int headLen=16;
		//校验码CRC
		int crcLen=4;
		//创建字节数组
		byte[] buf=new byte[headLen+dataLen+crcLen];
		// 字节流起始下标从0开始截取
		int index = 0;
		//帧头 0xf1 1个字节
		buf[index]=(byte)0xf1;
		index++;
		//消息ID
		buf[index]=(byte)0xD3;
		index++;
		//1个字节
		buf[index]=(byte)0xD4;
		index++;
		//消息参数 2
		buf[index]=(byte)0x00;
		index++;
		//0009 DATA 长度固定
		buf[index]=(byte)0x00;
		index++;
		buf[index]=(byte)0x10;
		index++;
		//05F3 消息序列号
		byte[] sortNum = getNodesc();
		buf[index]=sortNum[0];
		index++;
		buf[index]=sortNum[1];
		index++;
		// 时间戳 4个字节
		byte[] timeInfoB =  hexStringToByteArray(Tools.getUtcTime());
		System.arraycopy(timeInfoB,0,buf,index,4);
		index+=4;
		//UID用于记录命令来源 4个字节
		byte[] uuidInfo = hexStringToByteArray(StringUtils.leftPad(sortno+"",8,"0"));
		System.arraycopy(uuidInfo,0,buf,index,4);
		index+=4;
		System.arraycopy(returnData,0,buf,headLen,dataLen);
		index+=dataLen;
		//CRC
		setCrcInfoToByte(buf,index,headLen,dataLen,crcLen);
		return buf;
	}
	public static byte[] getNodesc(){
		System.out.println("sortno---->"+sortno);
		String sortNo = Long.toHexString(sortno);
		sortNo = StringUtils.leftPad(sortNo, 4, "0");
		byte[] by=hexToByteArray(sortNo);
		return by;
	}
	public static byte[] hexToByteArray(String inHex) {
		int hexlen = inHex.length();
		byte[] result;
		if (hexlen % 2 == 1) {
			// 奇数
			hexlen++;
			result = new byte[(hexlen / 2)];
			inHex = "0" + inHex;
		} else {
			// 偶数
			result = new byte[(hexlen / 2)];
		}
		int j = 0;
		for (int i = 0; i < hexlen; i += 2) {
			result[j] = hexToByte(inHex.substring(i, i + 2));
			j++;
		}
		return result;
	}
	public static byte hexToByte(String inHex) {
		return (byte) Integer.parseInt(inHex, 16);
	}
	/**
         * 计算crc 并添加到返回消息中
         * @param buf 返回字节数组
         * @param index 下标
         * @param headLen head长度
         * @param dataLen 数据长度
         * @param crcLen  crc长度
         */
	public static void setCrcInfoToByte(byte[] buf,int index,int headLen,int dataLen,int crcLen){
		sortno--;
		if(sortno==1){
			sortno=65534;
		}
		long crc = ByteUtil.calCrc32(Arrays.copyOfRange(buf,0,index));
		String crcStr  = Long.toHexString(crc);
		crcStr = StringUtils.leftPad(crcStr,8,"0");
		byte[] crcBytes = hexStringToByteArray(crcStr);
		if(crcBytes!=null&&buf!=null){
			try{
				System.arraycopy(crcBytes,0,buf,headLen+dataLen,crcLen);
			}catch (Exception e){
				System.out.println("参数为空");
			}
		}else{
			System.out.println("参数为空");
		}
	}
	/**
	 * @Author cjh
	 * @Description 解析udp 传回的消息
	 * @Date 15:34 2024/8/2
	 **/
	public static UdpProtocolMessage reviveToUdpProtocolMessage(DatagramPacket dataPkg) throws Exception {
		// 获取UDP消息数据包字节流
		byte [] arr = dataPkg.getData();
		ByteBuf buf = Unpooled.wrappedBuffer(arr);
		String con = ByteBufUtil.hexDump(buf);
		// 解析字节流并转换为消息对象
		UdpProtocolMessage msgObj = new UdpProtocolMessage();
		// 字节流起始下标从0开始截取
		int index = 0;
		/** ===【解析协议 开始】===== **/
		/** ===【HEAD部分】===== **/
		// 1 byte: 消息版本 PVER，固定为0xF1
		msgObj.setMsf(buf.getUnsignedByte(index));
		// 检查消息版本的值是否为0xF1，如果不相等则抛错或者退出，不再继续解析
		if (0xF1 != msgObj.getMsf()) {
			throw new Exception("消息版本错误");
			// return;
		}
		index ++;
		// 1 byte: 消息类型 CMD
		msgObj.setCmd(buf.getUnsignedByte(index));
//		System.out.println("解析中的cmd==============="+buf.getUnsignedByte(index));
		index ++;
		// 1 byte: 消息参数 PARAM
		msgObj.setCmdVer(buf.getUnsignedByte(index));
		index ++;
		// 1 byte: 第二消息参数 ECHO （发送时表示消息类型附加码2；回复消息时表示返回ack类型）
		msgObj.setCmdVer2(buf.getUnsignedByte(index));
		// 判断消息是否为服务器主动下发后通讯模块回复的消息，如果是则读取ack类型回复状态：0表示成功，非0表示异常
		if(ByteUtil.isAckCmd(msgObj.getCmd())){
			msgObj.setAck(msgObj.getCmdVer2());
		}
		index ++;
		// 2 byte: 数据长度 LEN
		msgObj.setLen(buf.getUnsignedShort(index));
		index += 2;
		// 2 byte: 消息序列号 SN （新消息递增）
		msgObj.setCmdNo(buf.getUnsignedShort(index));
		msgObj.sn=new byte[2];
		msgObj.sn[0]=buf.getByte(index);
		msgObj.sn[1]=buf.getByte(index+1);
		index += 2;
		// 6 byte: 设备唯一标识 MAC
		//msgObj.setMac(ByteUtil.byteToHex(buf.getBytes(index, new byte[6]).array()));
		byte[] mac = new byte[6];
		msgObj.setMac(ByteUtil.byteToHex(mac));
		index += 6;
		// 1 byte: 设备时区 ZONE （等于实际时区的2倍，出厂默认为16，16/2=东八区）
		msgObj.setTmZone(buf.getByte(index) / 2);
		index ++;
		// 1 byte: 保留备用 HOST
		index ++;
		/** ===【DATA部分】===== **/
		//LEN byte: 消息体 DATA（按消息头指定的LEN长度进行截取）
//		ByteBuf bufTemp = buf.slice(index/2, msgObj.getLen()+index/2);
		byte[] bytemp = new byte[msgObj.getLen()];
		for(int bi=0;bi<msgObj.getLen();bi++){
			bytemp[bi] = (byte) buf.getUnsignedByte(index);
			index++;
		}
//		bufTemp.getBytes(index,bytemp);
		msgObj.setData(bytemp);
//		index += msgObj.getLen();
		/** ===【CRC部分】===== **/
		// 4 byte： CRC32校验和 CRC
		msgObj.setCrc(buf.getUnsignedInt(index));
		index += 4;
		/** ===【解析协议 END】===== **/
		// 计算CRC校验和（报文总长度 = 报文头长度16 + 数据长度LEN）
		//msgObj.setCrcCalc(ByteUtil.calCrc32(buf.getBytes(0, new byte[16 + msgObj.getLen()]).array()));
		byte[] crcCalc = new byte[16 + msgObj.getLen()];
		msgObj.setCrcCalc(ByteUtil.calCrc32(crcCalc));
		return msgObj;
	}
	public static String printByteBufHex(ByteBuf byteBuf,
									   InetSocketAddress sender) {
		// 保存当前读取位置
		int readerIndex = byteBuf.readerIndex();
		// 打印字节的十六进制表示
		StringBuilder hexString = new StringBuilder();
		while (byteBuf.isReadable()) {
			byte b = byteBuf.readByte();
			hexString.append(String.format("%02x", b));
		}
//		System.err.println("收到["+sender.getHostString()+":"+sender.getPort()+"]设备消息-----》》》》 " + hexString);
		// 恢复原来的读取位置
		byteBuf.readerIndex(readerIndex);
		return hexString.toString();
	}
}
package com.chenrise.device.util;
/**
 * @Description TODO
 * @Author sunming
 * @Date 2023-05-05 16:01:00
 */
import rk.netDevice.sdk.p2.*;
import java.io.IOException;
import java.text.SimpleDateFormat;
class demo {
    public static void main(String[] args) throws IOException,
            InterruptedException {
        RSServer rsServer = RSServer.Initiate(8855);// 初始化
        rsServer.addDataListener(new IDataListener() {// 添加监听
            @Override
            public void receiveTimmingAck(TimmingAck data) {// 校时指令应答处理
            }
            @Override
            public void receiveTelecontrolAck(TelecontrolAck data) {// 遥控指令应答处理
            }
            @Override
            public void receiveStoreData(StoreData data) {// 已存储数据接收处理
                // 遍历节点数据。数据包括网络设备的数据以及各个节点数据。温湿度数据存放在节点数据中
                for (NodeData nd : data.getNodeList()) {
                    SimpleDateFormat sdf = new SimpleDateFormat(
                            "yy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss");
                    String str = sdf.format(nd.getRecordTime());
                }
            }
            @Override
            public void receiveRealtimeData(RealTimeData data) {// 实时数据接收处理
                // 遍历节点数据。数据包括网络设备的数据以及各个节点数据。温湿度数据存放在节点数据中
                for (NodeData nd : data.getNodeList()) {
                    System.out.println("实时数据->设备地址:" + data.getDeviceId()
                            + "\t节点:" + nd.getNodeId() + "\t温度:" + nd.getTem()
                            + "\t湿度:" + nd.getHum() + "\t经度:" + data.getLng()
                            + "\t纬度:" + data.getLat() + "\t坐标类型:"
                            + data.getCoordinateType() + "\t继电器状态:"
                            + data.getRelayStatus());
                }
            }
            @Override
            public void receiveLoginData(LoginData data) {// 登录数据接收处理
            }
            @Override
            public void receiveParamIds(ParamIdsData data) {
                String str = "设备参数编号列表->设备编号：" + data.getDeviceId()
                        + "\t参数总数量：" + data.getTotalCount() + "\t本帧参数数量："
                        + data.getCount() + "\r\n";
                for (int paramId : data.getPararmIdList())// 遍历设备中参数id编号
                {
                    str += paramId + ",";
                }
            }
            @Override
            public void receiveParam(ParamData data) {
                String str = "设备参数->设备编号：" + data.getDeviceId() + "\r\n";
                for (ParamItem pararm : data.getParameterList()) {
                    str += "参数编号："
                            + pararm.getParamId()
                            + "\t参数描述："
                            + pararm.getDescription()
                            + "\t参数值："
                            + (pararm.getValueDescription() == null ? pararm
                            .getValue() : pararm.getValueDescription()
                            .get(pararm.getValue())) + "\r\n";
                }
                System.out.println(str);
            }
            @Override
            public void receiveWriteParamAck(WriteParamAck data) {
                String str = "下载设备参数->设备编号：" + data.getDeviceId() + "\t参数数量："
                        + data.getCount() + "\t"
                        + (data.isSuccess() ? "下载成功" : "下载失败");
                System.out.println(str);
            }
            @Override
            public void receiveTransDataAck(TransDataAck data) {
                String str = "数据透传->设备编号：" + data.getDeviceId() + "\t响应结果："
                        + data.getData() + "\r\n字节数：" + data.getTransDataLen();
                System.out.println(str);
            }
            @Override
            public void receiveHeartbeatData(HeartbeatData heartbeatData) {
            }
        });
        rsServer.start();
    }
}
package com.chenrise.device.util;
import java.util.HashMap;
import java.util.Map;
public class ExpirableMap<K, V> {
	private Map<K, ValueWithTimeout<V>> map = new HashMap<>();
	public void put(K key, V value, long timeout) {
		long expiryTime = System.currentTimeMillis() + timeout;
		map.put(key, new ValueWithTimeout<>(value, expiryTime));
	}
	public V get(K key) {
		ValueWithTimeout<V> valueWithTimeout = map.get(key);
		if (valueWithTimeout == null) {
			return null;
		}
		long expiryTime = valueWithTimeout.getExpiryTime();
		if (System.currentTimeMillis() > expiryTime) {
			// 键值对已过期，从map中移除
			map.remove(key);
			return null;
		}
		return valueWithTimeout.getValue();
	}
	private static class ValueWithTimeout<V> {
		private V value;
		private long expiryTime;
		public ValueWithTimeout(V value, long expiryTime) {
			this.value = value;
			this.expiryTime = expiryTime;
		}
		public V getValue() {
			return value;
		}
		public long getExpiryTime() {
			return expiryTime;
		}
	}
}
package com.chenrise.device.util;
import java.math.BigInteger;
import java.nio.ByteBuffer;
import java.nio.ByteOrder;
/**
 * @Description:16进制数转小端格式
 * @Author: sunming
 * @Date: 2023-02-17 13:56:02
 */
public class HexToLittleEndian {
    /**
     * @Description:16进制转小端格式
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-02-20 08:13:14
     * @param hexString:
     * @return: java.lang.String
     */
    public static String hexToLittleEndian(String hexString) {
        byte[] hexBytes = hexStringToBytes(hexString);
        ByteBuffer buffer = ByteBuffer.wrap(hexBytes);
        buffer.order(ByteOrder.LITTLE_ENDIAN);
        byte[] littleEndianBytes = new byte[hexBytes.length];
        buffer.get(littleEndianBytes);
        String littleEndianHex = bytesToHexString(littleEndianBytes);
        return littleEndianHex;
    }
    /**
     * @Description:16进制转字节数组
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-02-20 08:13:33
     * @param hexString:
     * @return: byte[]
     */
    private static byte[] hexStringToBytes(String hexString) {
        int len = hexString.length();
        byte[] hexBytes = new byte[len / 2];
        for (int i = 0; i < len; i += 2) {
            hexBytes[i / 2] = (byte) ((Character.digit(hexString.charAt(i), 16) << 4)
                    + Character.digit(hexString.charAt(i+1), 16));
        }
        return hexBytes;
    }
    /**
     * @Description:字节数组转16 进制
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-02-20 08:13:50
     * @param bytes:
     * @return: java.lang.String
     */
    private static String bytesToHexString(byte[] bytes) {
        StringBuilder sb = new StringBuilder();
        for (int i = bytes.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
            String hex = Integer.toHexString(bytes[i] & 0xFF);
            if (hex.length() == 1) {
                sb.append('0');
            }
            sb.append(hex);
        }
        return sb.toString();
    }
    /**
     * @Description:使用一个方法实现
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-02-22 16:12:33
     * @param hex:
     * @return: java.lang.String
     */
    public static String hexToLittleEndianMedth(String hex) {
        // 将16进制字符串转换为byte数组
        byte[] bytes = new BigInteger(hex, 16).toByteArray();
        // 创建一个字节数组，将byte数组的元素倒序拷贝到其中
        byte[] littleEndianBytes = new byte[bytes.length];
        for (int i = 0; i < bytes.length; i++) {
            littleEndianBytes[i] = bytes[bytes.length - i - 1];
        }
        // 将字节数组转换为16进制字符串
        String littleEndianHex = new BigInteger(1, littleEndianBytes).toString(16);
        if (littleEndianHex.length() % 2 != 0) {
            littleEndianHex = "0" + littleEndianHex;
        }
        return littleEndianHex;
    }
}
package com.chenrise.device.util;
import com.sun.jna.*;
import com.sun.jna.platform.win32.WinDef;
import com.sun.jna.ptr.ByteByReference;
import com.sun.jna.ptr.IntByReference;
import com.sun.jna.ptr.PointerByReference;
import java.io.IOException;
import java.util.Arrays;
import java.util.List;
public interface NAudioServerSDK extends Library {
    NAudioServerSDK COMMON_INSTANCE = Native
            .load("NAudioServer", NAudioServerSDK.class);
     //接口返回值
    public static final int RET_SUCCESS =							0;  //操作成功
    public static final int RET_START_CMDSERVER_FAIL =				1;  //启动命令服务失败
    public static final int RET_START_DATASERVER_FAIL =				2;  //启动数据服务失败
    public static final int RET_OPEN_AUDIOFILE_FAIL =				3;  //打开音频文件失败
    public static final int RET_INIT_PAGING_FAIL =					4;  //初始化寻呼失败
    public static final int RET_START_RECORD_FAIL =					5;  //启动录音失败
    public static final int RET_DEV_NOT_EXIST =						6;  //操作时设备不存在
    public static final int RET_DEV_EXIST =							7;  //设备已存在
    public static final int RET_DEV_EXIST_IN_CALLINST =				8;  //对讲实例中已存在该设备
    public static final int RET_BOTH_USERDEV_IN_CALLINST =			9; //对讲实例中双方都是用户设备
    public static final int RET_CALLINST_NOT_EXIST =				10;  //对讲实例不存在
    public static final int RET_DEV_IS_CALLING =					11;  //设备正在通话
    public static final int RET_PLAYINST_NOT_EXIST = 				12;  //播放实例不存在
    public static final int RET_SYSDEV_EXIST =						13;  //系统设备已存在
    public static final int RET_SYSDEV_NOT_EXIST =					14;  //系统设备不存在
    public static final int RET_CASTGROUP_EXIST	=					15;  //系统广播分组已存在
    public static final int RET_CASTGROUP_NOT_EXIST =				16;  //系统广播分组不存在
    public static final int RET_GROUPDEV_EXIST =					17;  //设备已经存在在该组中
    public static final int RET_GROUPDEV_NOT_EXIST =				18;  //设备未在在该组中
    public static final int RET_NM_CASTGROUP_EXIST =				19;  //广播分组已在网络话筒中
    public static final int RET_NM_CASTGROUP_NOT_EXIST =			20;  //网络话筒中不存在的广播分组
    public static final int RET_NM_CASTDEV_EXIST =					21;  //广播设备已在网络话筒中
    public static final int RET_NM_CASTDEV_NOT_EXIST =				22;  //网络话筒中不存在的广播设备
    public static final int RET_NM_CALLDEV_EXIST =					23;  //对讲设备已在网络话筒中
    public static final int RET_NM_CALLDEV_NOT_EXIST =				24;  //网络话筒中不存在的对讲设备
    public static final int RET_DEV_NOT_SUPPORT_CALL =				25;  //设备不支持对讲
    public static final int RET_DEV_NOT_SUPPORT_SAMPLER	=			26;  //设备不支持采播
    public static final int RET_DEV_RESP_TIMEOUT	=			    27;  //设备响应超时
    public static final int RET_DEV_NOT_SUPPORT_FUNC	=			28;  //设备不支持的功能
    public static final int RET_DEV_GET_FILESIZE_FAIL	=			29;  //获取文件大小失败
    public static final int RET_DEV_DOWN_FILE_FAIL	=			    30;  //下载文件失败
    public static final int RET_DEV_GET_DEVFILE_FAIL	=			31;  //获取设备文件失败
    public static final int RET_AUDIO_FILE_NOT_SUPPORTED = 			32;  //不支持的音频文件格式
    public static final int RET_NOT_SUPPORT_FUNC = 			        33;  //不支持的功能
    public static final int RET_COMMON_FAIL =						-1; //通用失败
    //码率定义
    public static final int BR_32KBPS =						0;
    public static final int BR_64KBPS =						1;
    public static final int BR_128KBPS =					2;
    //设备功能定义
    public static final int DEVF_CAST =                     0x01;  //广播
    public static final int DEVF_MONITOR =                  0x02;  //监听
    public static final int DEVF_SAMPLER =                  0x02;  //监听
    public static final int DEVF_INTERCOM =                 0x04;  //对讲
    public static final int DEVF_FIREALARM =                0x08;  //消防报警
    public static final int DEVF_4G =                       0x10;  //4G终端
    public static final int DEVF_FOTA =                     0x20;  //FOTA升级
    public static final int DEVF_TTS =                      0x40;  //设备带TTS
    public static final int DEVF_STORAGE =                  0x80;  //设备带存储
    //设备状态定义
    public static final short DEVS_OFFLINE = 0;  //离线状态
    public static final short DEVS_IDLE = 1;  //空闲状态
    public static final short DEVS_PLAYING = 2;  //播放状态
    public static final short DEVS_INTERCOM = 3;  //对讲状态
    public static final short DEVS_SAMPLER = 4;  //采集状态
    //播放状态
    public static final int PS_STOP =		0;  //播放停止状态
    public static final int PS_PLAYING = 	1;  //播放中
    public static final int PS_PAUSE =  	2; //播放暂停状态
    //场景类型定义
    public static final byte SCENE_PLAY_AUDIOFILE =		0; //播放音频文件
    public static final byte SCENE_PLAY_TTS	=			1; //文字转语音播放
    public static final byte SCENE_PLAY_PAGING =		2; //话筒寻呼播放
    public static final byte SCENE_AUDIO_STREAM =		3; //播放音频流
    //播放实例
    public static final byte PLAY_INST1	=				0; //播放实例1
    public static final byte PLAY_INST2	=				1; //播放实例2
    public static final byte PLAY_INST3	=				2; //播放实例3
    public static final byte PLAY_INST4	=				3; //播放实例4
    public static final byte PLAY_INST5	=				4; //播放实例5
    //定义
    public static final int DISABLE =					0;  //禁止
    public static final int ENABLE =					1;  //使能
    //音频流格式
    public static final int ASF_PCM =					0;  //PCM格式
    public static final int ASF_MP3 =					1;  //mp3格式
    public static final int ASF_IMA_ADPCM =				2;  //IMA-ADPCM格式
    //对讲时软件端编码格式
    public static final int CALL_ENC_PCM = 0;   //原始数据
    public static final int CALL_ENC_ADPCM = 1;   //ADPCM编码，默认编码格式
    //呼叫状态定义
    public static final int CALLS_IDLE = 0;   //空闲状态
    public static final int CALLS_START = 1;   //启动对讲
    public static final int CALLS_RING = 2;   //响铃状态
    public static final int CALLS_CALLING = 3;   //呼叫状态
    public static final int CALLS_HANGUP = 4;   //挂断状态
    //对讲回调类型定义
    public static final int CALLCB_NONE = 0;
    public static final int CALLCB_STATUS_CHANGE = 1;
    public static final int CALLCB_CALLDATA_TO_UDEV = 2;  //对讲设备到用户设备数据
    //网络话筒的音源
    public static final byte NM_AS_MIC =						0; //前置MIC
    public static final byte NM_AS_LINEIN =					    1; //后置LINEIN
    //网络话筒广播采样率定义
    public static final short NM_SMPR_8KHZ	=				    0;
    public static final short NM_SMPR_16KHZ =					1;
    public static final short NM_SMPR_24KHZ =					2;
    public static final short NM_SMPR_32KHZ =					3;

    public static final int AUDIO_FRAME_HEAD_LEN =  			36;
    //下载文件状态
    public static final byte DFS_IDLE =                         0;
    public static final byte DFS_DOWNLOADING =                  1;
    public static final byte DFS_DOWN_FAIL =                    2;
    public static final byte DFS_WRITE_FAIL =                   3;
    //文件属性定义
    public static final byte FA_DIR =                           0;
    public static final byte FA_FILE =                          1;
    public static final byte FA_UNKNOWN =                       2;
    //异步函数返回类型定义
    public static final int FUNC_GET_HWINFO =                   1;
    public static final int FUNC_DOWNLOAD_FILE =                2;
    public static final int FUNC_DOWNLOAD_STATUS =              3;
    public static final int FUNC_GET_DEV_FILES =                4;
    public static final int FUNC_DELETE_DEV_FILE =              5;

    public static final int FUNC_GET_DEV_FILEINFO =             11;

    public static final int FUNC_GET_IO_STATUS =                13;
    public static final int FUNC_SET_IO_VAL =                   14;
    //播放信息
    public class PlayInfo extends  Structure{
        public Integer  playstatus;  //播放状态
        public Integer  progress;  //播放进度0-100
        public Integer  totaltime;  //总播放时间(单位s)
        public Integer  samplerate;  //采样率
        public Integer  bitrate;  //比特率
        /**
         * 内部类实现指针类型接口
         */
        public static class ByReference extends PlayInfo implements Structure.ByReference{}
        /**
         * 内部类实现值类型接口
         */
        public static class ByValue extends PlayInfo implements Structure.ByValue{}
        /**
         * 定义取值次序，需要与c++中对齐，不然报NoSuchFieldError
         *
         * @return
         */
        @Override
        protected List<String> getFieldOrder() {
            return Arrays.asList(new String[] {"playstatus", "progress", "totaltime", "samplerate", "bitrate"});
        }
    }
    //自动触发参数

    }

    }

    //广播参数
    public class CastPara extends Structure {
        public byte audio_src;  //音源,只对网络话筒有效(NM_AS_MIC \NM_AS_LINEIN)
        public byte priority;	//优先级 (1-255)
        public short samplerate;	//采样率
        public byte input_gain;  //输入增益
        public byte []reserve = new byte[3];
        /**
         * 内部类实现指针类型接口
         */
        public static class ByReference extends CastPara implements Structure.ByReference{}
        /**
         * 内部类实现值类型接口
         */
        public static class ByValue extends CastPara implements Structure.ByValue{}
        /**
         * 定义取值次序，需要与c++中对齐，不然报NoSuchFieldError
         *
         * @return
         */
        @Override
        protected List<String> getFieldOrder() {
            return Arrays.asList(new String[] {"audio_src", "priority", "samplerate", "input_gain", "reserve"});
        }
    }
    //音频流格式
    public class AudioFrame extends Structure {
        public int audio_head;	 //音频包头标记
        public byte scene_type;  //场景,0:广播,1:对讲,2
        public byte instance;  //实例
        public byte priority;  //帧优先级
        public byte audiofmt;	 //音频格式
        public int sampleRate;  //采样率
        public int bitrate;  //比特率
        public byte []reserve = new byte[3];  //保留
        public byte addr_type;  //地址类型,0:编号,1:IP地址
        public int audio_src;  //音源（设备编号/IP）
        public int audio_dst;  //目标（设备编号/IP)，仅对讲时用
        public int frame_no;  //帧序号
        public short frame_len;  //数据帧长度
        public short  reserve1;  //保留
        public byte []data = new byte[1200];  //帧数据
        /**
         * 内部类实现指针类型接口
         */
        public static class ByReference extends AudioFrame implements Structure.ByReference{}
        /**
         * 内部类实现值类型接口
         */
        public static class ByValue extends AudioFrame implements Structure.ByValue{}
        /**
         * 定义取值次序，需要与c++中对齐，不然报NoSuchFieldError
         *
         * @return
         */
        @Override
        protected List<String> getFieldOrder() {
            return Arrays.asList(new String[] {"audio_head", "scene_type", "instance", "priority", "audiofmt", "sampleRate", "bitrate", "reserve", "addr_type", "audio_src", "audio_dst", "frame_no", "frame_len", "reserve1", "data"});
        }
    }
    //硬件信息
    public class DevHwInfo extends  Structure{

        }
    }
    //设备文件信息

    }
    //设备文件
    public class DevFiles extends  Structure{
        public short packet_no; //包编号
        public short status; //0:正常读取,1:全部文件读取完成,2:读取错误
        public int count; //文件数
        public DevFileInfo files_info[] = new DevFileInfo[256];

            return Arrays.asList(new String[] {"packet_no", "status", "count","files_info"});
        }
    }

    //下载状态

        @Override
