package com.chenrise.job.service;
import java.util.List;
import org.quartz.SchedulerException;
import com.chenrise.common.core.exception.job.TaskException;
import com.chenrise.job.domain.SysJob;
/**
 * 定时任务调度信息信息 服务层
 * 
 * @author chenrise
 */
public interface ISysJobService
{
    /**
     * 获取quartz调度器的计划任务
     * 
     * @param job 调度信息
     * @return 调度任务集合
     */
    public List<SysJob> selectJobList(SysJob job);
    /**
     * 通过调度任务ID查询调度信息
     * 
     * @param jobId 调度任务ID
     * @return 调度任务对象信息
     */
    public SysJob selectJobById(Long jobId);
    /**
     * 暂停任务
     * 
     * @param job 调度信息
     * @return 结果
     */
    public int pauseJob(SysJob job) throws SchedulerException;
    /**
     * 恢复任务
     * 
     * @param job 调度信息
     * @return 结果
     */
    public int resumeJob(SysJob job) throws SchedulerException;
    /**
     * 删除任务后，所对应的trigger也将被删除
     * 
     * @param job 调度信息
     * @return 结果
     */
    public int deleteJob(SysJob job) throws SchedulerException;
    /**
     * 批量删除调度信息
     * 
     * @param jobIds 需要删除的任务ID
     * @return 结果
     */
    public void deleteJobByIds(Long[] jobIds) throws SchedulerException;
    /**
     * 任务调度状态修改
     * 
     * @param job 调度信息
     * @return 结果
     */
    public int changeStatus(SysJob job) throws SchedulerException;
    /**
     * 立即运行任务
     * 
     * @param job 调度信息
     * @return 结果
     */
    public boolean run(SysJob job) throws SchedulerException;
    /**
     * 新增任务
     * 
     * @param job 调度信息
     * @return 结果
     */
    public int insertJob(SysJob job) throws SchedulerException, TaskException;
    /**
     * 更新任务
     * 
     * @param job 调度信息
     * @return 结果
     */
    public int updateJob(SysJob job) throws SchedulerException, TaskException;
    /**
     * 校验cron表达式是否有效
     * 
     * @param cronExpression 表达式
     * @return 结果
     */
    public boolean checkCronExpressionIsValid(String cronExpression);
}
package com.chenrise.job.service;
import java.util.List;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
import com.chenrise.job.domain.SysJobLog;
import com.chenrise.job.mapper.SysJobLogMapper;
/**
 * 定时任务调度日志信息 服务层
 *
 * @author chenrise
 */
@Service
public class SysJobLogServiceImpl implements ISysJobLogService
{
    @Autowired
    private SysJobLogMapper jobLogMapper;
    /**
     * 获取quartz调度器日志的计划任务
     *
     * @param jobLog 调度日志信息
     * @return 调度任务日志集合
     */
    @Override
    public List<SysJobLog> selectJobLogList(SysJobLog jobLog)
    {
        return jobLogMapper.selectJobLogList(jobLog);
    }
    @Override
    public Integer count(SysJobLog jobLog)
    {
        return jobLogMapper.count(jobLog);
    }
    /**
     * 通过调度任务日志ID查询调度信息
     *
     * @param jobLogId 调度任务日志ID
     * @return 调度任务日志对象信息
     */
    @Override
    public SysJobLog selectJobLogById(Long jobLogId)
    {
        return jobLogMapper.selectJobLogById(jobLogId);
    }
    /**
     * 新增任务日志
     *
     * @param jobLog 调度日志信息
     */
    @Override
    public void addJobLog(SysJobLog jobLog)
    {
        jobLogMapper.insertJobLog(jobLog);
    }
    /**
     * 批量删除调度日志信息
     *
     * @param logIds 需要删除的数据ID
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int deleteJobLogByIds(Long[] logIds)
    {
        return jobLogMapper.deleteJobLogByIds(logIds);
    }
    /**
     * 删除任务日志
     *
     * @param jobId 调度日志ID
     */
    @Override
    public int deleteJobLogById(Long jobId)
    {
        return jobLogMapper.deleteJobLogById(jobId);
    }
    /**
     * 清空任务日志
     */
    @Override
    public void cleanJobLog()
    {
        jobLogMapper.cleanJobLog();
    }
}
package com.chenrise.job.service;
import com.chenrise.common.core.constant.ScheduleConstants;
import com.chenrise.common.core.exception.job.TaskException;
import com.chenrise.job.domain.SysJob;
import com.chenrise.job.mapper.SysJobMapper;
import com.chenrise.job.util.CronUtils;
import com.chenrise.job.util.ScheduleUtils;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.quartz.JobDataMap;
import org.quartz.JobKey;
import org.quartz.Scheduler;
import org.quartz.SchedulerException;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
import org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;
import javax.annotation.PostConstruct;
import java.util.List;
/**
 * 定时任务调度信息 服务层
 *
 * @author chenrise
 */
@Slf4j
@Service
public class SysJobServiceImpl implements ISysJobService {
    @Autowired
    private Scheduler scheduler;
    @Autowired
    private SysJobMapper jobMapper;
    /**
     * 项目启动时，初始化定时器 主要是防止手动修改数据库导致未同步到定时任务处理（注：不能手动修改数据库ID和任务组名，否则会导致脏数据）
     */
    @PostConstruct
    public void init() throws SchedulerException, TaskException {
        scheduler.clear();
        List<SysJob> jobList = jobMapper.selectJobAll();
        for (SysJob job : jobList) {
            ScheduleUtils.createScheduleJob(scheduler, job);
        }
    }
    /**
     * 获取quartz调度器的计划任务列表
     *
     * @param job 调度信息
     * @return
     */
    @Override
    public List<SysJob> selectJobList(SysJob job) {
        return jobMapper.selectJobList(job);
    }
    /**
     * 通过调度任务ID查询调度信息
     *
     * @param jobId 调度任务ID
     * @return 调度任务对象信息
     */
    @Override
    public SysJob selectJobById(Long jobId) {
        return jobMapper.selectJobById(jobId);
    }
    /**
     * 暂停任务
     *
     * @param job 调度信息
     */
    @Override
    @Transactional(rollbackFor = Exception.class)
    public int pauseJob(SysJob job) throws SchedulerException {
        Long jobId = job.getJobId();
        String jobGroup = job.getJobGroup();
        job.setStatus(ScheduleConstants.Status.PAUSE.getValue());
        int rows = jobMapper.updateJob(job);
        if (rows > 0) {
            scheduler.pauseJob(ScheduleUtils.getJobKey(jobId, jobGroup));
        }
        return rows;
    }
    /**
     * 恢复任务
     *
     * @param job 调度信息
     */
    @Override
    @Transactional(rollbackFor = Exception.class)
    public int resumeJob(SysJob job) throws SchedulerException {
        Long jobId = job.getJobId();
        String jobGroup = job.getJobGroup();
        job.setStatus(ScheduleConstants.Status.NORMAL.getValue());
        int rows = jobMapper.updateJob(job);
        if (rows > 0) {
            scheduler.resumeJob(ScheduleUtils.getJobKey(jobId, jobGroup));
        }
        return rows;
    }
    /**
     * 删除任务后，所对应的trigger也将被删除
     *
     * @param job 调度信息
     */
    @Override
    @Transactional(rollbackFor = Exception.class)
    public int deleteJob(SysJob job) throws SchedulerException {
        Long jobId = job.getJobId();
        String jobGroup = job.getJobGroup();
        int rows = jobMapper.deleteJobById(jobId);
        if (rows > 0) {
            scheduler.deleteJob(ScheduleUtils.getJobKey(jobId, jobGroup));
        }
        return rows;
    }
    /**
     * 批量删除调度信息
     *
     * @param jobIds 需要删除的任务ID
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    @Transactional(rollbackFor = Exception.class)
    public void deleteJobByIds(Long[] jobIds) throws SchedulerException {
        for (Long jobId : jobIds) {
            SysJob job = jobMapper.selectJobById(jobId);
            deleteJob(job);
        }
    }
    /**
     * 任务调度状态修改
     *
     * @param job 调度信息
     */
    @Override
    @Transactional(rollbackFor = Exception.class)
    public int changeStatus(SysJob job) throws SchedulerException {
        int rows = 0;
        String status = job.getStatus();
        if (ScheduleConstants.Status.NORMAL.getValue().equals(status)) {
            rows = resumeJob(job);
        } else if (ScheduleConstants.Status.PAUSE.getValue().equals(status)) {
            rows = pauseJob(job);
        }
        return rows;
    }
    /**
     * 立即运行任务
     *
     * @param job 调度信息
     */
    @Override
    @Transactional(rollbackFor = Exception.class)
    public boolean run(SysJob job) throws SchedulerException {
        boolean result = false;
        Long jobId = job.getJobId();
        String jobGroup = job.getJobGroup();
        SysJob properties = selectJobById(job.getJobId());
        if (properties == null) {
            log.error("执行任务失败，未找到任务信息，jobId: {}", jobId);
            return false;
        }
        // 参数
        JobDataMap dataMap = new JobDataMap();
        dataMap.put(ScheduleConstants.TASK_PROPERTIES, properties);
        JobKey jobKey = ScheduleUtils.getJobKey(jobId, jobGroup);
        if (scheduler.isShutdown()) {
            log.error("执行任务失败，调度器已关闭，jobId: {}", jobId);
            return false;
        }
        if (scheduler.checkExists(jobKey)) {
            result = true;
            scheduler.triggerJob(jobKey, dataMap);
            log.info("任务已触发手动执行，jobId: {}, jobGroup: {}, 目标: {}", jobId, jobGroup, properties.getInvokeTarget());
            // 额外检查调度器是否处于开启状态
            if (scheduler.isInStandbyMode()) {
                log.warn("注意：调度器当前处于待机状态（standby），任务可能不会立即执行");
            }
        } else {
            log.error("执行任务失败，任务不存在于调度器中，jobId: {}, jobGroup: {}", jobId, jobGroup);
        }
        return result;
    }
    /**
     * 新增任务
     *
     * @param job 调度信息 调度信息
     */
    @Override
    @Transactional(rollbackFor = Exception.class)
    public int insertJob(SysJob job) throws SchedulerException, TaskException {
        job.setStatus(ScheduleConstants.Status.PAUSE.getValue());
        int rows = jobMapper.insertJob(job);
        if (rows > 0) {
            ScheduleUtils.createScheduleJob(scheduler, job);
        }
        return rows;
    }
    /**
     * 更新任务的时间表达式
     *
     * @param job 调度信息
     */
    @Override
    @Transactional(rollbackFor = Exception.class)
    public int updateJob(SysJob job) throws SchedulerException, TaskException {
        SysJob properties = selectJobById(job.getJobId());
        int rows = jobMapper.updateJob(job);
        if (rows > 0) {
            updateSchedulerJob(job, properties.getJobGroup());
        }
        return rows;
    }
    /**
     * 更新任务
     *
     * @param job      任务对象
     * @param jobGroup 任务组名
     */
    public void updateSchedulerJob(SysJob job, String jobGroup) throws SchedulerException, TaskException {
        Long jobId = job.getJobId();
        // 判断是否存在
        JobKey jobKey = ScheduleUtils.getJobKey(jobId, jobGroup);
        if (scheduler.checkExists(jobKey)) {
            // 防止创建时存在数据问题 先移除，然后在执行创建操作
            scheduler.deleteJob(jobKey);
        }
        ScheduleUtils.createScheduleJob(scheduler, job);
    }
    /**
     * 校验cron表达式是否有效
     *
     * @param cronExpression 表达式
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public boolean checkCronExpressionIsValid(String cronExpression) {
        return CronUtils.isValid(cronExpression);
    }
}
package com.chenrise.job.task;
import cn.hutool.core.collection.CollectionUtil;
import cn.hutool.core.date.DateUtil;
import cn.hutool.core.util.StrUtil;
import com.chenrise.common.core.constant.SecurityConstants;
import com.chenrise.common.core.domain.R;
import com.chenrise.system.api.RemoteAssetsService;
import com.chenrise.system.api.RemoteUserService;
import com.chenrise.system.api.RemoteWsService;
import com.chenrise.system.api.domain.AssetsExpireWarn;
import com.chenrise.system.api.domain.AssetsStockWarn;
import com.chenrise.system.api.domain.SysUser;
import com.chenrise.system.api.domain.WsSendMessage;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.springframework.scheduling.annotation.Async;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Component;
import javax.annotation.Resource;
import java.util.Date;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.stream.Collectors;
import static com.chenrise.common.core.constant.WsConstants.WS_ALERT_TYPE_EXPIRE;
import static com.chenrise.common.core.constant.WsConstants.WS_ALERT_TYPE_STOCK;
/**
 * 资产管理告警定时任务
 */
@Slf4j
@Component
public class AssetsWarnTask {
    @Resource
    private RemoteUserService remoteUserService;
    @Resource
    private RemoteAssetsService remoteAssetsService;
    @Resource
    private RemoteWsService remoteWsService;
    public void expireWarn() {
        R<List<AssetsExpireWarn>> expireWarnListR = remoteAssetsService.getExpireWarnList(DateUtil.now(), SecurityConstants.INNER);
        if (!R.isSuccess(expireWarnListR)) {
            log.error("获取资产到期告警列表失败," + expireWarnListR.getMsg());
            return;
        }
        List<AssetsExpireWarn> expireWarnList = expireWarnListR.getData();
        if (CollectionUtil.isEmpty(expireWarnList)) {
            return;
        }
        String[] userInfo = loadNoticeUserInfo();
        if (userInfo != null) {
            String userIds = userInfo[0];
            String nickNames = userInfo[1];
            expireWarnList.forEach(it -> {
                it.setReceiveUserIds(userIds);
                it.setReceiveUser(nickNames);
            });
        }
        Date now = DateUtil.date();
        expireWarnList.forEach(it -> {
            it.setWarnTime(now);
            // 发送通知
            sendWsMessage(it.getReceiveUserIds(), it, WS_ALERT_TYPE_EXPIRE);
        });
        // 存储告警记录
        remoteAssetsService.saveExpireWarnList(expireWarnList, SecurityConstants.INNER);
    }
    public void stockWarn() {
        R<List<AssetsStockWarn>> stockWarnListR = remoteAssetsService.getStockWarnList(SecurityConstants.INNER);
        if (!R.isSuccess(stockWarnListR)) {
            log.error("获取资产库存告警列表失败," + stockWarnListR.getMsg());
            return;
        }
        List<AssetsStockWarn> stockWarnList = stockWarnListR.getData();
        if (CollectionUtil.isEmpty(stockWarnList)) {
            return;
        }
        String[] userInfo = loadNoticeUserInfo();
        if (userInfo != null) {
            String userIds = userInfo[0];
            String nickNames = userInfo[1];
            stockWarnList.forEach(it -> {
                it.setReceiveUserIds(userIds);
                it.setReceiveUser(nickNames);
            });
        }
        Date now = DateUtil.date();
        stockWarnList.forEach(it -> {
            it.setWarnTime(now);
            // 发送通知
            sendWsMessage(it.getReceiveUserIds(), it, WS_ALERT_TYPE_STOCK);
        });
        // 存储告警记录
        remoteAssetsService.saveStockWarnList(stockWarnList, SecurityConstants.INNER);
    }
    private String[] loadNoticeUserInfo() {
        R<List<SysUser>> userListR = remoteUserService.getUserByRoleKey(SecurityConstants.ROLE_ASSETS_WARN_NOTICE_PERMISSION, SecurityConstants.INNER);
        if (!R.isSuccess(userListR)) {
            return null;
        }
        List<SysUser> users = userListR.getData();
        if (CollectionUtil.isEmpty(users)) {
            return null;
        }
        String userIds = users.stream().map(u -> String.valueOf(u.getUserId())).collect(Collectors.joining(","));
        String nickNames = users.stream().map(SysUser::getNickName).collect(Collectors.joining(","));
        return new String[]{userIds, nickNames};
    }
    @Async
    protected void sendWsMessage(String userIds, Object message, String type) {
        if (StrUtil.isEmpty(userIds)) {
            return;
        }
        List<Long> userIdList = StrUtil.split(userIds, ",").stream().map(Long::valueOf).collect(Collectors.toList());
        WsSendMessage wsSendMessage = new WsSendMessage();
        wsSendMessage.setUserIds(userIdList);
        wsSendMessage.setType(type);
        wsSendMessage.setData(message);
        remoteWsService.send(wsSendMessage);
    }
}

package com.chenrise.job.task;

package com.chenrise.job.task;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Component;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.StringUtils;
/**
 * 定时任务调度测试
 * 
 * @author chenrise
 */
@Component("ryTask")
public class RyTask
{
    public void ryMultipleParams(String s, Boolean b, Long l, Double d, Integer i)
    {
        System.out.println(StringUtils.format("执行多参方法： 字符串类型{}，布尔类型{}，长整型{}，浮点型{}，整形{}", s, b, l, d, i));
    }
    public void ryParams(String params)
    {
        System.out.println("执行有参方法：" + params);
    }
    public void ryNoParams()
    {
        System.out.println("执行无参方法");
    }
}
package com.chenrise.job.task;
import com.chenrise.system.api.RemoteSchoolMeetingService;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Component;
import javax.annotation.Resource;
@Slf4j
@Component
public class SchoolMeetingTask {
    @Resource
    private RemoteSchoolMeetingService remoteSchoolMeetingService;
    public void meetingWarn() {
        log.info("开始执行学校会议提醒任务");
        remoteSchoolMeetingService.sendMeetingWarn();
    }
}

package com.chenrise.job.util;
import com.chenrise.common.core.constant.ScheduleConstants;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.ExceptionUtil;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.SpringUtils;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.StringUtils;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.bean.BeanUtils;
import com.chenrise.job.domain.SysJob;
import com.chenrise.job.domain.SysJobLog;
import com.chenrise.job.service.ISysJobLogService;
import org.quartz.Job;
import org.quartz.JobExecutionContext;
import org.quartz.JobExecutionException;
import org.slf4j.Logger;
import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;
import java.util.Date;
/**
 * 抽象quartz调用
 *
 * @author chenrise
 */
public abstract class AbstractQuartzJob implements Job
{
    private static final Logger log = LoggerFactory.getLogger(AbstractQuartzJob.class);
    /**
     * 线程本地变量
     */
    private static ThreadLocal<Date> threadLocal = new ThreadLocal<>();
    @Override
    public void execute(JobExecutionContext context) throws JobExecutionException
    {
        SysJob sysJob = new SysJob();
        BeanUtils.copyBeanProp(sysJob, context.getMergedJobDataMap().get(ScheduleConstants.TASK_PROPERTIES));
        try {
            before(context, sysJob);
            if (sysJob != null) {
                doExecute(context, sysJob);
            }
            after(context, sysJob, null);
        } catch (Exception e) {
            log.error("任务执行异常  - ：", e);
            after(context, sysJob, e);
        }
    }
    /**
     * 执行前
     *
     * @param context 工作执行上下文对象
     * @param sysJob 系统计划任务
     */
    protected void before(JobExecutionContext context, SysJob sysJob)
    {
        threadLocal.set(new Date());
    }
    /**
     * 执行后
     *
     * @param context 工作执行上下文对象
     * @param sysJob 系统计划任务
     */
    protected void after(JobExecutionContext context, SysJob sysJob, Exception e)
    {
        Date startTime = threadLocal.get();
        threadLocal.remove();
        final SysJobLog sysJobLog = new SysJobLog();
        sysJobLog.setJobName(sysJob.getJobName());
        sysJobLog.setJobGroup(sysJob.getJobGroup());
        sysJobLog.setInvokeTarget(sysJob.getInvokeTarget());
        sysJobLog.setStartTime(startTime);
        sysJobLog.setStopTime(new Date());
        long runMs = sysJobLog.getStopTime().getTime() - sysJobLog.getStartTime().getTime();
        sysJobLog.setJobMessage(sysJobLog.getJobName() + " 总共耗时：" + runMs + "毫秒");
        if (e != null)
        {
            sysJobLog.setStatus("1");
            String errorMsg = StringUtils.substring(ExceptionUtil.getExceptionMessage(e), 0, 2000);
            sysJobLog.setExceptionInfo(errorMsg);
        }
        else
        {
            sysJobLog.setStatus("0");
        }
        // 写入数据库当中
        SpringUtils.getBean(ISysJobLogService.class).addJobLog(sysJobLog);
    }
    /**
     * 执行方法，由子类重载
     *
     * @param context 工作执行上下文对象
     * @param sysJob 系统计划任务
     * @throws Exception 执行过程中的异常
     */
    protected abstract void doExecute(JobExecutionContext context, SysJob sysJob) throws Exception;
}
package com.chenrise.job.util;
import java.text.ParseException;
import java.util.Date;
import org.quartz.CronExpression;
/**
 * cron表达式工具类
 * 
 * @author chenrise
 *
 */
public class CronUtils
{
    /**
     * 返回一个布尔值代表一个给定的Cron表达式的有效性
     *
     * @param cronExpression Cron表达式
     * @return boolean 表达式是否有效
     */
    public static boolean isValid(String cronExpression)
    {
        return CronExpression.isValidExpression(cronExpression);
    }
    /**
     * 返回一个字符串值,表示该消息无效Cron表达式给出有效性
     *
     * @param cronExpression Cron表达式
     * @return String 无效时返回表达式错误描述,如果有效返回null
     */
    public static String getInvalidMessage(String cronExpression)
    {
        try
        {
            new CronExpression(cronExpression);
            return null;
        }
        catch (ParseException pe)
        {
            return pe.getMessage();
        }
    }
    /**
     * 返回下一个执行时间根据给定的Cron表达式
     *
     * @param cronExpression Cron表达式
     * @return Date 下次Cron表达式执行时间
     */
    public static Date getNextExecution(String cronExpression)
    {
        try
        {
            CronExpression cron = new CronExpression(cronExpression);
            return cron.getNextValidTimeAfter(new Date(System.currentTimeMillis()));
        }
        catch (ParseException e)
        {
            throw new IllegalArgumentException(e.getMessage());
        }
    }
}
package com.chenrise.job.util;
import java.lang.reflect.InvocationTargetException;
import java.lang.reflect.Method;
import java.util.LinkedList;
import java.util.List;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.SpringUtils;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.StringUtils;
import com.chenrise.job.domain.SysJob;
/**
 * 任务执行工具
 *
 * @author chenrise
 */
public class JobInvokeUtil
{
    /**
     * 执行方法
     *
     * @param sysJob 系统任务
     */
    public static void invokeMethod(SysJob sysJob) throws Exception
    {
        String invokeTarget = sysJob.getInvokeTarget();
        String beanName = getBeanName(invokeTarget);
        String methodName = getMethodName(invokeTarget);
        List<Object[]> methodParams = getMethodParams(invokeTarget);
        if (!isValidClassName(beanName))
        {
            Object bean = SpringUtils.getBean(beanName);
            invokeMethod(bean, methodName, methodParams);
        }
        else
        {
            Object bean = Class.forName(beanName).newInstance();
            invokeMethod(bean, methodName, methodParams);
        }
    }
    /**
     * 调用任务方法
     *
     * @param bean 目标对象
     * @param methodName 方法名称
     * @param methodParams 方法参数
     */
    private static void invokeMethod(Object bean, String methodName, List<Object[]> methodParams)
            throws NoSuchMethodException, SecurityException, IllegalAccessException, IllegalArgumentException,
            InvocationTargetException
    {
        if (StringUtils.isNotNull(methodParams) && methodParams.size() > 0)
        {
            Method method = bean.getClass().getMethod(methodName, getMethodParamsType(methodParams));
            method.invoke(bean, getMethodParamsValue(methodParams));
        }
        else
        {
            Method method = bean.getClass().getMethod(methodName);
            method.invoke(bean);
        }
    }
    /**
     * 校验是否为为class包名
     * 
     * @param invokeTarget 名称
     * @return true是 false否
     */
    public static boolean isValidClassName(String invokeTarget)
    {
        return StringUtils.countMatches(invokeTarget, ".") > 1;
    }
    /**
     * 获取bean名称
     * 
     * @param invokeTarget 目标字符串
     * @return bean名称
     */
    public static String getBeanName(String invokeTarget)
    {
        String beanName = StringUtils.substringBefore(invokeTarget, "(");
        return StringUtils.substringBeforeLast(beanName, ".");
    }
    /**
     * 获取bean方法
     * 
     * @param invokeTarget 目标字符串
     * @return method方法
     */
    public static String getMethodName(String invokeTarget)
    {
        String methodName = StringUtils.substringBefore(invokeTarget, "(");
        return StringUtils.substringAfterLast(methodName, ".");
    }
    /**
     * 获取method方法参数相关列表
     * 
     * @param invokeTarget 目标字符串
     * @return method方法相关参数列表
     */
    public static List<Object[]> getMethodParams(String invokeTarget)
    {
        String methodStr = StringUtils.substringBetween(invokeTarget, "(", ")");
        if (StringUtils.isEmpty(methodStr))
        {
            return null;
        }
        String[] methodParams = methodStr.split(",(?=([^\"']*[\"'][^\"']*[\"'])*[^\"']*$)");
        List<Object[]> classs = new LinkedList<>();
        for (int i = 0; i < methodParams.length; i++)
        {
            String str = StringUtils.trimToEmpty(methodParams[i]);
            // String字符串类型，以'或"开头
            if (StringUtils.startsWithAny(str, "'", "\""))
            {
                classs.add(new Object[] { StringUtils.substring(str, 1, str.length() - 1), String.class });
            }
            // boolean布尔类型，等于true或者false
            else if ("true".equalsIgnoreCase(str) || "false".equalsIgnoreCase(str))
            {
                classs.add(new Object[] { Boolean.valueOf(str), Boolean.class });
            }
            // long长整形，以L结尾
            else if (StringUtils.endsWith(str, "L"))
            {
                classs.add(new Object[] { Long.valueOf(StringUtils.substring(str, 0, str.length() - 1)), Long.class });
            }
            // double浮点类型，以D结尾
            else if (StringUtils.endsWith(str, "D"))
            {
                classs.add(new Object[] { Double.valueOf(StringUtils.substring(str, 0, str.length() - 1)), Double.class });
            }
            // 其他类型归类为整形
            else
            {
                classs.add(new Object[] { Integer.valueOf(str), Integer.class });
            }
        }
        return classs;
    }
    /**
     * 获取参数类型
     * 
     * @param methodParams 参数相关列表
     * @return 参数类型列表
     */
    public static Class<?>[] getMethodParamsType(List<Object[]> methodParams)
    {
        Class<?>[] classs = new Class<?>[methodParams.size()];
        int index = 0;
        for (Object[] os : methodParams)
        {
            classs[index] = (Class<?>) os[1];
            index++;
        }
        return classs;
    }
    /**
     * 获取参数值
     * 
     * @param methodParams 参数相关列表
     * @return 参数值列表
     */
    public static Object[] getMethodParamsValue(List<Object[]> methodParams)
    {
        Object[] classs = new Object[methodParams.size()];
        int index = 0;
        for (Object[] os : methodParams)
        {
            classs[index] = (Object) os[0];
            index++;
        }
        return classs;
    }
}
package com.chenrise.job.util;
import org.quartz.DisallowConcurrentExecution;
import org.quartz.JobExecutionContext;
import com.chenrise.job.domain.SysJob;
/**
 * 定时任务处理（禁止并发执行）
 * 
 * @author chenrise
 *
 */
@DisallowConcurrentExecution
public class QuartzDisallowConcurrentExecution extends AbstractQuartzJob
{
    @Override
    protected void doExecute(JobExecutionContext context, SysJob sysJob) throws Exception
    {
        JobInvokeUtil.invokeMethod(sysJob);
    }
}
package com.chenrise.job.util;
import org.quartz.JobExecutionContext;
import com.chenrise.job.domain.SysJob;
/**
 * 定时任务处理（允许并发执行）
 * 
 * @author chenrise
 *
 */
public class QuartzJobExecution extends AbstractQuartzJob
{
    @Override
    protected void doExecute(JobExecutionContext context, SysJob sysJob) throws Exception
    {
        JobInvokeUtil.invokeMethod(sysJob);
    }
}
package com.chenrise.job.util;
import org.quartz.CronScheduleBuilder;
import org.quartz.CronTrigger;
import org.quartz.Job;
import org.quartz.JobBuilder;
import org.quartz.JobDetail;
import org.quartz.JobKey;
import org.quartz.Scheduler;
import org.quartz.SchedulerException;
import org.quartz.TriggerBuilder;
import org.quartz.TriggerKey;
import com.chenrise.common.core.constant.Constants;
import com.chenrise.common.core.constant.ScheduleConstants;
import com.chenrise.common.core.exception.job.TaskException;
import com.chenrise.common.core.exception.job.TaskException.Code;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.SpringUtils;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.StringUtils;
import com.chenrise.job.domain.SysJob;
/**
 * 定时任务工具类
 * 
 * @author chenrise
 *
 */
public class ScheduleUtils
{
    /**
     * 得到quartz任务类
     *
     * @param sysJob 执行计划
     * @return 具体执行任务类
     */
    private static Class<? extends Job> getQuartzJobClass(SysJob sysJob)
    {
        boolean isConcurrent = "0".equals(sysJob.getConcurrent());
        return isConcurrent ? QuartzJobExecution.class : QuartzDisallowConcurrentExecution.class;
    }
    /**
     * 构建任务触发对象
     */
    public static TriggerKey getTriggerKey(Long jobId, String jobGroup)
    {
        return TriggerKey.triggerKey(ScheduleConstants.TASK_CLASS_NAME + jobId, jobGroup);
    }
    /**
     * 构建任务键对象
     */
    public static JobKey getJobKey(Long jobId, String jobGroup)
    {
        return JobKey.jobKey(ScheduleConstants.TASK_CLASS_NAME + jobId, jobGroup);
    }
    /**
     * 创建定时任务
     */
    public static void createScheduleJob(Scheduler scheduler, SysJob job) throws SchedulerException, TaskException
    {
        Class<? extends Job> jobClass = getQuartzJobClass(job);
        // 构建job信息
        Long jobId = job.getJobId();
        String jobGroup = job.getJobGroup();
        JobDetail jobDetail = JobBuilder.newJob(jobClass).withIdentity(getJobKey(jobId, jobGroup)).build();
        // 表达式调度构建器
        CronScheduleBuilder cronScheduleBuilder = CronScheduleBuilder.cronSchedule(job.getCronExpression());
        cronScheduleBuilder = handleCronScheduleMisfirePolicy(job, cronScheduleBuilder);
        // 按新的cronExpression表达式构建一个新的trigger
        CronTrigger trigger = TriggerBuilder.newTrigger().withIdentity(getTriggerKey(jobId, jobGroup))
                .withSchedule(cronScheduleBuilder).build();
        // 放入参数，运行时的方法可以获取
        jobDetail.getJobDataMap().put(ScheduleConstants.TASK_PROPERTIES, job);
        // 判断是否存在
        if (scheduler.checkExists(getJobKey(jobId, jobGroup)))
        {
            // 防止创建时存在数据问题 先移除，然后在执行创建操作
            scheduler.deleteJob(getJobKey(jobId, jobGroup));
        }
        // 判断任务是否过期
        if (StringUtils.isNotNull(CronUtils.getNextExecution(job.getCronExpression())))
        {
            // 执行调度任务
            scheduler.scheduleJob(jobDetail, trigger);
        }
        // 暂停任务
        if (job.getStatus().equals(ScheduleConstants.Status.PAUSE.getValue()))
        {
            scheduler.pauseJob(ScheduleUtils.getJobKey(jobId, jobGroup));
        }
    }
    /**
     * 设置定时任务策略
     */
    public static CronScheduleBuilder handleCronScheduleMisfirePolicy(SysJob job, CronScheduleBuilder cb)
            throws TaskException
    {
        switch (job.getMisfirePolicy())
        {
            case ScheduleConstants.MISFIRE_DEFAULT:
                return cb;
            case ScheduleConstants.MISFIRE_IGNORE_MISFIRES:
                return cb.withMisfireHandlingInstructionIgnoreMisfires();
            case ScheduleConstants.MISFIRE_FIRE_AND_PROCEED:
                return cb.withMisfireHandlingInstructionFireAndProceed();
            case ScheduleConstants.MISFIRE_DO_NOTHING:
                return cb.withMisfireHandlingInstructionDoNothing();
            default:
                throw new TaskException("The task misfire policy '" + job.getMisfirePolicy()
                        + "' cannot be used in cron schedule tasks", Code.CONFIG_ERROR);
        }
    }
    /**
     * 检查包名是否为白名单配置
     * 
     * @param invokeTarget 目标字符串
     * @return 结果
     */
    public static boolean whiteList(String invokeTarget)
    {
        String packageName = StringUtils.substringBefore(invokeTarget, "(");
        int count = StringUtils.countMatches(packageName, ".");
        if (count > 1)
        {
            return StringUtils.containsAnyIgnoreCase(invokeTarget, Constants.JOB_WHITELIST_STR);
        }
        Object obj = SpringUtils.getBean(StringUtils.split(invokeTarget, ".")[0]);
        return StringUtils.containsAnyIgnoreCase(obj.getClass().getPackage().getName(), Constants.JOB_WHITELIST_STR);
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.change.controller;
import java.util.List;
import javax.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse;
import com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.change.domain.XkpChanges;
import com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.change.service.IXkpChangesService;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.GetMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PostMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PutMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.DeleteMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PathVariable;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestBody;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RestController;
import com.chenrise.common.log.annotation.Log;
import com.chenrise.common.log.enums.BusinessType;
import com.chenrise.common.security.annotation.RequiresPermissions;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.controller.BaseController;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.poi.ExcelUtil;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo;
/**
 * 新开普人员或部门信息变化Controller
 * 
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2025-08-21
 */
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/changes")
public class XkpChangesController extends BaseController
{
    @Autowired
    private IXkpChangesService xkpChangesService;
    /**
     * 查询新开普人员或部门信息变化列表
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:changes:list")
    @GetMapping("/list")
    public TableDataInfo list(XkpChanges xkpChanges)
    {
        startPage();
        List<XkpChanges> list = xkpChangesService.selectXkpChangesList(xkpChanges);
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     * 导出新开普人员或部门信息变化列表
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:changes:export")
    @Log(title = "新开普人员或部门信息变化", businessType = BusinessType.EXPORT)
    @PostMapping("/export")
    public void export(HttpServletResponse response, XkpChanges xkpChanges)
    {
        List<XkpChanges> list = xkpChangesService.selectXkpChangesList(xkpChanges);
        ExcelUtil<XkpChanges> util = new ExcelUtil<XkpChanges>(XkpChanges.class);
        util.exportExcel(response, list, "新开普人员或部门信息变化数据");
    }
    /**
     * 获取新开普人员或部门信息变化详细信息
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:changes:query")
    @GetMapping(value = "/{id}")
    public AjaxResult getInfo(@PathVariable("id") Long id)
    {
        return success(xkpChangesService.selectXkpChangesById(id));
    }
    /**
     * 新增新开普人员或部门信息变化
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:changes:add")
    @Log(title = "新开普人员或部门信息变化", businessType = BusinessType.INSERT)
    @PostMapping
    public AjaxResult add(@RequestBody XkpChanges xkpChanges)
    {
        return toAjax(xkpChangesService.insertXkpChanges(xkpChanges));
    }
    /**
     * 修改新开普人员或部门信息变化
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:changes:edit")
    @Log(title = "新开普人员或部门信息变化", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PutMapping
    public AjaxResult edit(@RequestBody XkpChanges xkpChanges)
    {
        return toAjax(xkpChangesService.updateXkpChanges(xkpChanges));
    }
    /**
     * 删除新开普人员或部门信息变化
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:changes:remove")
    @Log(title = "新开普人员或部门信息变化", businessType = BusinessType.DELETE)
	@DeleteMapping("/{ids}")
    public AjaxResult remove(@PathVariable Long[] ids)
    {
        return toAjax(xkpChangesService.deleteXkpChangesByIds(ids));
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.change.domain;
import com.chenrise.common.core.annotation.Excel;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.BaseEntity;
import lombok.Data;
/**
 * 新开普人员或部门信息变化对象 xkp_changes
 * 
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2025-08-21
 */
@Data
public class XkpChanges extends BaseEntity
{
    private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;
    /** 主键ID */
    private Long id;
    /** 同步类型（1 同步人员 2同步部门） */
    @Excel(name = "同步类型", readConverterExp = "1=,同=步人员,2=同步部门")
    private String type;
    /** 变动类型（1新增 2修改 3删除） */
    @Excel(name = "变动类型", readConverterExp = "1=新增,2=修改,3=删除")
    private String changeType;
    /** 新开普或中间库的数据 */
    @Excel(name = "新开普或中间库的数据")
    private String xkpData;
    /** 数据库中的数据 */
    @Excel(name = "数据库中的数据")
    private String databaseData;
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.change.mapper;
import com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.change.domain.XkpChanges;
import java.util.List;
/**
 * 新开普人员或部门信息变化Mapper接口
 * 
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2025-08-21
 */
public interface XkpChangesMapper 
{
    /**
     * 查询新开普人员或部门信息变化
     * 
     * @param id 新开普人员或部门信息变化主键
     * @return 新开普人员或部门信息变化
     */
    public XkpChanges selectXkpChangesById(Long id);
    /**
     * 查询新开普人员或部门信息变化列表
     * 
     * @param xkpChanges 新开普人员或部门信息变化
     * @return 新开普人员或部门信息变化集合
     */
    public List<XkpChanges> selectXkpChangesList(XkpChanges xkpChanges);
    /**
     * 新增新开普人员或部门信息变化
     * 
     * @param xkpChanges 新开普人员或部门信息变化
     * @return 结果
     */
    public int insertXkpChanges(XkpChanges xkpChanges);
    /**
     * 修改新开普人员或部门信息变化
     * 
     * @param xkpChanges 新开普人员或部门信息变化
     * @return 结果
     */
    public int updateXkpChanges(XkpChanges xkpChanges);
    /**
     * 删除新开普人员或部门信息变化
     * 
     * @param id 新开普人员或部门信息变化主键
     * @return 结果
     */
    public int deleteXkpChangesById(Long id);
    /**
     * 批量删除新开普人员或部门信息变化
     * 
     * @param ids 需要删除的数据主键集合
     * @return 结果
     */
    public int deleteXkpChangesByIds(Long[] ids);

import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.DateUtils;

/**
 * 新开普人员或部门信息变化Service业务层处理
 * 
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2025-08-21
 */
@Service
public class XkpChangesServiceImpl implements IXkpChangesService
{
    @Autowired
    private XkpChangesMapper xkpChangesMapper;
    /**
     * 查询新开普人员或部门信息变化
     * 
     * @param id 新开普人员或部门信息变化主键
     * @return 新开普人员或部门信息变化
     */
    @Override
    public XkpChanges selectXkpChangesById(Long id)
    {
        return xkpChangesMapper.selectXkpChangesById(id);
    }
    /**
     * 查询新开普人员或部门信息变化列表
     * 
     * @param xkpChanges 新开普人员或部门信息变化
     * @return 新开普人员或部门信息变化

    {
        return xkpChangesMapper.selectXkpChangesList(xkpChanges);
    }
    /**
     * 新增新开普人员或部门信息变化
     * 
     * @param xkpChanges 新开普人员或部门信息变化
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int insertXkpChanges(XkpChanges xkpChanges)
    {
        xkpChanges.setCreateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        return xkpChangesMapper.insertXkpChanges(xkpChanges);
    }
    /**
     * 修改新开普人员或部门信息变化
     * 
     * @param xkpChanges 新开普人员或部门信息变化
     * @return 结果
     */

    {

     * @param ids 需要删除的新开普人员或部门信息变化主键
     * @return 结果

    /**

     * @return 结果

package com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.error.data.controller;
import java.util.List;
import javax.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse;
import com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.error.data.domain.XkpErrorLog;
import com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.error.data.service.IXkpErrorLogService;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.GetMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PostMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PutMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.DeleteMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PathVariable;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestBody;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RestController;
import com.chenrise.common.log.annotation.Log;
import com.chenrise.common.log.enums.BusinessType;
import com.chenrise.common.security.annotation.RequiresPermissions;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.controller.BaseController;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.poi.ExcelUtil;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo;
/**
 * 新开普同步人员信息及部门信息错误日志Controller
 * 
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2025-08-20
 */
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/log")
public class XkpErrorLogController extends BaseController
{
    @Autowired
    private IXkpErrorLogService xkpErrorLogService;
    /**
     * 查询新开普同步人员信息及部门信息错误日志列表
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:log:list")
    @GetMapping("/list")
    public TableDataInfo list(XkpErrorLog xkpErrorLog)
    {
        startPage();
        List<XkpErrorLog> list = xkpErrorLogService.selectXkpErrorLogList(xkpErrorLog);
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     * 导出新开普同步人员信息及部门信息错误日志列表
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:log:export")
    @Log(title = "新开普同步人员信息及部门信息错误日志", businessType = BusinessType.EXPORT)
    @PostMapping("/export")
    public void export(HttpServletResponse response, XkpErrorLog xkpErrorLog)
    {
        List<XkpErrorLog> list = xkpErrorLogService.selectXkpErrorLogList(xkpErrorLog);
        ExcelUtil<XkpErrorLog> util = new ExcelUtil<XkpErrorLog>(XkpErrorLog.class);
        util.exportExcel(response, list, "新开普同步人员信息及部门信息错误日志数据");
    }
    /**
     * 获取新开普同步人员信息及部门信息错误日志详细信息
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:log:query")
    @GetMapping(value = "/{id}")
    public AjaxResult getInfo(@PathVariable("id") Long id)
    {
        return success(xkpErrorLogService.selectXkpErrorLogById(id));
    }
    /**
     * 新增新开普同步人员信息及部门信息错误日志
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:log:add")
    @Log(title = "新开普同步人员信息及部门信息错误日志", businessType = BusinessType.INSERT)
    @PostMapping
    public AjaxResult add(@RequestBody XkpErrorLog xkpErrorLog)
    {
        return toAjax(xkpErrorLogService.insertXkpErrorLog(xkpErrorLog));
    }
    /**
     * 修改新开普同步人员信息及部门信息错误日志
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:log:edit")
    @Log(title = "新开普同步人员信息及部门信息错误日志", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PutMapping
    public AjaxResult edit(@RequestBody XkpErrorLog xkpErrorLog)
    {
        return toAjax(xkpErrorLogService.updateXkpErrorLog(xkpErrorLog));
    }
    /**
     * 删除新开普同步人员信息及部门信息错误日志
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:log:remove")
    @Log(title = "新开普同步人员信息及部门信息错误日志", businessType = BusinessType.DELETE)
	@DeleteMapping("/{ids}")
    public AjaxResult remove(@PathVariable Long[] ids)
    {
        return toAjax(xkpErrorLogService.deleteXkpErrorLogByIds(ids));
    }
}

    private String errorLog;

package com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.middlebase.data.controller;
import java.util.List;
import javax.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.poi.ExcelUtil;
import com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.middlebase.data.domain.XkpDept;
import com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.middlebase.data.service.IXkpDeptService;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.GetMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PostMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PutMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.DeleteMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PathVariable;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestBody;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RestController;
import com.chenrise.common.log.annotation.Log;
import com.chenrise.common.log.enums.BusinessType;
import com.chenrise.common.security.annotation.RequiresPermissions;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.controller.BaseController;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo;
/**
 * 新开普部门信息Controller
 * 
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2025-08-20
 */
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/dept")
public class XkpDeptController extends BaseController
{
    @Autowired
    private IXkpDeptService xkpDeptService;
    /**
     * 查询新开普部门信息列表
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:dept:list")
    @GetMapping("/list")
    public TableDataInfo list(XkpDept xkpDept)
    {
        startPage();
        List<XkpDept> list = xkpDeptService.selectXkpDeptList(xkpDept);
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     * 导出新开普部门信息列表
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:dept:export")
    @Log(title = "新开普部门信息", businessType = BusinessType.EXPORT)
    @PostMapping("/export")
    public void export(HttpServletResponse response, XkpDept xkpDept)
    {
        List<XkpDept> list = xkpDeptService.selectXkpDeptList(xkpDept);
        ExcelUtil<XkpDept> util = new ExcelUtil<XkpDept>(XkpDept.class);
        util.exportExcel(response, list, "新开普部门信息数据");
    }
    /**
     * 获取新开普部门信息详细信息
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:dept:query")
    @GetMapping(value = "/{id}")
    public AjaxResult getInfo(@PathVariable("id") Long id)
    {
        return success(xkpDeptService.selectXkpDeptById(id));
    }
    /**
     * 新增新开普部门信息
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:dept:add")
    @Log(title = "新开普部门信息", businessType = BusinessType.INSERT)
    @PostMapping
    public AjaxResult add(@RequestBody XkpDept xkpDept)
    {
        return toAjax(xkpDeptService.insertXkpDept(xkpDept));
    }
    /**
     * 修改新开普部门信息
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:dept:edit")
    @Log(title = "新开普部门信息", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PutMapping
    public AjaxResult edit(@RequestBody XkpDept xkpDept)
    {
        return toAjax(xkpDeptService.updateXkpDept(xkpDept));
    }
    /**
     * 删除新开普部门信息
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:dept:remove")
    @Log(title = "新开普部门信息", businessType = BusinessType.DELETE)
	@DeleteMapping("/{ids}")
    public AjaxResult remove(@PathVariable Long[] ids)
    {
        return toAjax(xkpDeptService.deleteXkpDeptByIds(ids));
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.middlebase.data.domain;
import java.util.Date;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.BaseEntity;
import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonFormat;
import com.chenrise.common.core.annotation.Excel;
import lombok.Data;
/**
 * 新开普部门信息对象 xkp_dept
 * 
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2025-08-20
 */
@Data
public class XkpDept extends BaseEntity
{
    private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;
    /** 主键ID */
    private Long id;
    /** 失效日期 */
    @JsonFormat(pattern = "yyyy-MM-dd")
    @Excel(name = "失效日期", width = 30, dateFormat = "yyyy-MM-dd")
    private Date nousedate;
    /** 版本号 */
    @Excel(name = "版本号")
    private Long ver;
    /** 服务器ID */
    @Excel(name = "服务器ID")
    private Long serverid;
    /** 一级部门名称 */
    @Excel(name = "一级部门名称")
    private String dpname1;
    /** 一级部门编码 */
    @Excel(name = "一级部门编码")
    private String dpcode1;
    /** 二级部门名称 */
    @Excel(name = "二级部门名称")
    private String dpname2;
    /** 二级部门编码 */
    @Excel(name = "二级部门编码")
    private String dpcode2;
    /** 三级部门名称 */
    @Excel(name = "三级部门名称")
    private String dpname3;
    /** 三级部门编码 */
    @Excel(name = "三级部门编码")
    private String dpcode3;
    /** 四级部门名称 */
    @Excel(name = "四级部门名称")
    private String dpname4;
    /** 四级部门编码 */
    @Excel(name = "四级部门编码")
    private String dpcode4;
    /** 批次号 */
    @Excel(name = "批次号")
    private Long batnum;
    /** 排序ID */
    @Excel(name = "排序ID")
    private Long sortid;
}

import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
/**
 * 新开普部门信息Service业务层处理
 * 
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2025-08-20
 */
@Service
public class XkpDeptServiceImpl implements IXkpDeptService
{
    @Autowired
    private XkpDeptMapper xkpDeptMapper;
    /**
     * 查询新开普部门信息
     * 
     * @param id 新开普部门信息主键
     * @return 新开普部门信息
     */
    @Override
    public XkpDept selectXkpDeptById(Long id)
    {
        return xkpDeptMapper.selectXkpDeptById(id);
    }
    /**
     * 查询新开普部门信息列表
     * 
     * @param xkpDept 新开普部门信息
     * @return 新开普部门信息
     */
    @Override
    public List<XkpDept> selectXkpDeptList(XkpDept xkpDept)
    {
        return xkpDeptMapper.selectXkpDeptList(xkpDept);
    }
    /**
     * 新增新开普部门信息
     * 
     * @param xkpDept 新开普部门信息
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int insertXkpDept(XkpDept xkpDept)
    {
        xkpDept.setCreateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        return xkpDeptMapper.insertXkpDept(xkpDept);
    }
    /**
     * 修改新开普部门信息
     * 
     * @param xkpDept 新开普部门信息
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int updateXkpDept(XkpDept xkpDept)
    {
        xkpDept.setUpdateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        return xkpDeptMapper.updateXkpDept(xkpDept);
    }
    /**
     * 批量删除新开普部门信息
     * 
     * @param ids 需要删除的新开普部门信息主键
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int deleteXkpDeptByIds(Long[] ids)
    {
        return xkpDeptMapper.deleteXkpDeptByIds(ids);
    }
    /**
     * 删除新开普部门信息信息
     * 
     * @param id 新开普部门信息主键
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int deleteXkpDeptById(Long id)
    {
        return xkpDeptMapper.deleteXkpDeptById(id);
    }
    /**
     * 根据主要信息查询部门数据
     * @param middleBaseDept
     * @return
     */
    @Override
    public XkpDept selectXkpDeptInfo(MiddleBaseDept middleBaseDept) {
        return xkpDeptMapper.selectXkpDeptInfo(middleBaseDept);
    }
}

    private String phone;
    /** 邮箱 */
    private String email;
    /** 部门状态:0正常,1停用 */
    private String status;

    private String delFlag;
    /** 父部门名称 */
    private String parentName;
    private String deptCode;
    private String subCode;
    private String subName;
    private String addType;
    /**
     * 部门类型 1老师 2学生
     */
    private String deptType;
    /**
     * 完整的部门code
     */
    private String fullDeptCode;
}

/**

    @DynamicSql
    SysDeptHandle selectSysDeptHandleById(Long id);

     * @param parentId

    @DynamicSql
    SysDeptHandle selectByFullDeptCode(String fullDeptCode);

package com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.middlebase.handle.service;
import com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.middlebase.data.domain.XkpDept;
import com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.middlebase.handle.domain.SysDeptHandle;
import java.util.List;
/**
 * 处理新开普部门数据Service
 *
 * @author lougang
 * @date 2025-8-20
 */
public interface IHandleXkpDeptService {
    /**
     * 添加部门信息
     * @param xkpDept
     */
    void handlerAddDept(XkpDept xkpDept);
    /**
     * 修改部门信息
     * @param xkpDept
     */
    void handlerUpdateDept(XkpDept xkpDept);
    /**
     * 删除部门信息
     * @param xkpDept
     */
    void handlerDeleteDept(XkpDept xkpDept);
    /**
     * 获取所有部门
     *
     * @return
     */
    List<SysDeptHandle> handlerAllList();
    /**
     * 根据部门编号查询部门
     *
     * @param fullDeptCode 部门全码
     * @return 部门信息
     */
    SysDeptHandle getByFullDeptCode(String fullDeptCode);
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.middlebase.handle.service.impl;
import com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.middlebase.data.domain.XkpDept;
import com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.middlebase.handle.domain.SysDeptHandle;
import com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.middlebase.handle.mapper.HandleXkpDeptMapper;
import com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.middlebase.handle.service.IHandleXkpDeptService;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
import java.util.Arrays;
import java.util.List;
/**
 * 处理新开普部门数据Service
 *
 * @author lougang
 * @date 2025-8-20
 */
@Service
public class HandleXkpDeptServiceImpl implements IHandleXkpDeptService {
    private final List<String> teacherDeptList = Arrays.asList("党政管理机构", "返聘教工", "合同职工", "合作单位", "教辅及直属机构", "教学机构", "群团组织", "退休调转", "外聘教师");
    @Autowired
    private HandleXkpDeptMapper handleXkpDeptMapper;
    /**
     * 添加部门信息
     * @param xkpDept
     */
    @Override
    public void handlerAddDept(XkpDept xkpDept) {
        int level = getDeptLevel(xkpDept);
        if (level == 0) {
            return;
        }
        // 逐级处理部门
        Long parentId = 100L;
        String ancestors = "0,100";
        for (int currentLevel = 1; currentLevel <= level; currentLevel++) {
            String deptCode = getDeptCodeByLevel(xkpDept, currentLevel);
            String deptName = getDeptNameByLevel(xkpDept, currentLevel);
            SysDeptHandle existingDept = handleXkpDeptMapper.selectSysDeptHandle(deptCode, deptName, parentId);
            if (existingDept == null) {
                SysDeptHandle newDept = createSysDeptHandle(xkpDept, deptCode, deptName, parentId, ancestors, currentLevel);
                handleXkpDeptMapper.insertSysDeptHandle(newDept);
                parentId = newDept.getDeptId();
            } else {
                parentId = existingDept.getDeptId();
            }
            // 更新祖先路径
            ancestors = ancestors + "," + parentId;
        }
    }
    /**
     * 修改部门信息
     * @param xkpDept
     */
    @Override
    public void handlerUpdateDept(XkpDept xkpDept) {
        int level = getDeptLevel(xkpDept);
        if (level == 0) {
            return;
        }
        // 获取对应层级的部门并更新名称
        SysDeptHandle targetDept = getDeptByLevel(xkpDept, level);
        if (targetDept != null) {
            String newDeptName = getDeptNameByLevel(xkpDept, level);
            if (!newDeptName.equals(targetDept.getDeptName())) {
                targetDept.setDeptName(newDeptName);
                handleXkpDeptMapper.updateSysDeptHandle(targetDept);
            }
        }
    }
    /**
     * 删除部门信息
     * @param xkpDept
     */
    @Override
    public void handlerDeleteDept(XkpDept xkpDept) {
        int level = getDeptLevel(xkpDept);
        if (level == 0) {
            return;
        }
        SysDeptHandle targetDept = getDeptByLevel(xkpDept, level);
        if (targetDept != null) {
            handleXkpDeptMapper.deleteSysDeptHandleById(targetDept.getDeptId());
        }
    }
    @Override
    public List<SysDeptHandle> handlerAllList() {
        return handleXkpDeptMapper.selectAll();
    }
    @Override
    public SysDeptHandle getByFullDeptCode(String fullDeptCode) {
        return handleXkpDeptMapper.selectByFullDeptCode(fullDeptCode);
    }
    /**
     * 获取部门层级
     */
    public int getDeptLevel(XkpDept xkpDept) {
        // 从4级到1级依次检查
        for (int level = 4; level >= 1; level--) {
            String deptCode = getDeptCodeByLevel(xkpDept, level);
            String deptName = getDeptNameByLevel(xkpDept, level);
            if (!isNullOrEmpty(deptCode) && !"000".equals(deptCode) &&
                    !isNullOrEmpty(deptName) && !"000".equals(deptName)) {
                return level;
            }
        }
        return 0; // 无效组织
    }
    /**
     * 根据层级获取部门代码
     */
    private String getDeptCodeByLevel(XkpDept xkpDept, int level) {
        switch (level) {
            case 1: return xkpDept.getDpcode1();
            case 2: return xkpDept.getDpcode2();
            case 3: return xkpDept.getDpcode3();
            case 4: return xkpDept.getDpcode4();
            default: return null;
        }
    }
    /**
     * 根据层级获取部门名称
     */
    private String getDeptNameByLevel(XkpDept xkpDept, int level) {
        switch (level) {
            case 1: return xkpDept.getDpname1();
            case 2: return xkpDept.getDpname2();
            case 3: return xkpDept.getDpname3();
            case 4: return xkpDept.getDpname4();
            default: return null;
        }
    }
    /**
     * 根据层级获取部门对象
     */
    private SysDeptHandle getDeptByLevel(XkpDept xkpDept, int targetLevel) {
        Long parentId = 100L;
        SysDeptHandle currentDept = null;
        for (int level = 1; level <= targetLevel; level++) {
            String deptCode = getDeptCodeByLevel(xkpDept, level);
            currentDept = handleXkpDeptMapper.selectSysDeptHandleByDeptCodeAndDelete(deptCode, parentId);
            if (currentDept == null) {
                return null;
            }
            parentId = currentDept.getDeptId();
            // 如果是目标层级，直接返回
            if (level == targetLevel) {
                return currentDept;
            }
        }
        return null;
    }
    /**
     * 创建部门处理对象
     */
    private SysDeptHandle createSysDeptHandle(XkpDept xkpDept, String deptCode, String deptName,
                                              Long parentId, String ancestors, int currentLevel) {
        SysDeptHandle deptHandle = new SysDeptHandle();
        deptHandle.setParentId(parentId);
        deptHandle.setAncestors(ancestors);
        deptHandle.setDeptCode(deptCode);
        deptHandle.setDeptName(deptName);
        // 设置排序号：如果是一级部门且在教师部门列表中，设为1，否则设为2
        boolean isTeacherDept = teacherDeptList.contains(xkpDept.getDpname1());
        deptHandle.setOrderNum(isTeacherDept ? 1 : 2);
        deptHandle.setDeptType(isTeacherDept ? "1" : "2");
        StringBuilder fullDeptCodeBuilder = new StringBuilder(xkpDept.getDpcode1());
        for (int i = 2; i <= 4; i++) {
            String code = getDeptCodeByLevel(xkpDept, i);
            if (code == null || "000".equals(code)) {
                break;
            }
            fullDeptCodeBuilder.append(code);
        }
        String fullDeptCode = fullDeptCodeBuilder.toString();
        deptHandle.setFullDeptCode(fullDeptCode);
        deptHandle.setAddType("1");
        // 设置上级部门信息（非一级部门）
        if (currentLevel > 1) {
            deptHandle.setSubCode(getDeptCodeByLevel(xkpDept, currentLevel - 1));
            deptHandle.setSubName(getDeptNameByLevel(xkpDept, currentLevel - 1));
        }
        return deptHandle;
    }
    /**
     * 检查字符串是否为空或null
     */
    private boolean isNullOrEmpty(String str) {
        return str == null || str.trim().isEmpty();
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.middlebase.server;
import com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.middlebase.data.domain.XkpDept;
import lombok.Data;
import java.util.*;
import java.util.stream.Collectors;
public class DeptCompareUtils {
    /**
     * 生成部门的唯一标识键
     */
    private static String generateDeptKey(MiddleBaseDept dept) {
        return String.format("%s|%s|%s|%s",
                Objects.toString(dept.getDPCODE1(), ""),
                Objects.toString(dept.getDPCODE2(), ""),
                Objects.toString(dept.getDPCODE3(), ""),
                Objects.toString(dept.getDPCODE4(), "")
        );
    }
    private static String generateDeptKey(XkpDept dept) {
        return String.format("%s|%s|%s|%s",
                Objects.toString(dept.getDpcode1(), ""),
                Objects.toString(dept.getDpcode2(), ""),
                Objects.toString(dept.getDpcode3(), ""),
                Objects.toString(dept.getDpcode4(), "")
        );
    }
    /**
     * 获取 allDeptList 比 xkpDeptList 多的数据
     */
    public static List<MiddleBaseDept> getAdditionalInAllDeptList(
            List<MiddleBaseDept> allDeptList,
            List<XkpDept> xkpDeptList) {
        Set<String> xkpKeys = xkpDeptList.stream()
                .map(DeptCompareUtils::generateDeptKey)
                .collect(Collectors.toSet());
        return allDeptList.stream()
                .filter(dept -> !xkpKeys.contains(generateDeptKey(dept)))
                .collect(Collectors.toList());
    }
    /**
     * 获取 xkpDeptList 比 allDeptList 多的数据
     */
    public static List<XkpDept> getAdditionalInXkpDeptList(
            List<MiddleBaseDept> allDeptList,
            List<XkpDept> xkpDeptList) {
        Set<String> allDeptKeys = allDeptList.stream()
                .map(DeptCompareUtils::generateDeptKey)
                .collect(Collectors.toSet());
        return xkpDeptList.stream()
                .filter(dept -> !allDeptKeys.contains(generateDeptKey(dept)))
                .collect(Collectors.toList());
    }
    /**
     * 获取两个列表中相同键但其他字段不同的数据
     */
    public static List<DeptDifference> getDifferentData(
            List<MiddleBaseDept> allDeptList,
            List<XkpDept> xkpDeptList) {
        Map<String, MiddleBaseDept> allDeptMap = allDeptList.stream()
                .collect(Collectors.toMap(DeptCompareUtils::generateDeptKey, dept -> dept));
        Map<String, XkpDept> xkpDeptMap = xkpDeptList.stream()
                .collect(Collectors.toMap(DeptCompareUtils::generateDeptKey, dept -> dept));
        List<DeptDifference> differences = new ArrayList<>();
        // 找出两个map中都存在的key，但其他字段可能不同
        Set<String> commonKeys = new HashSet<>(allDeptMap.keySet());
        commonKeys.retainAll(xkpDeptMap.keySet());
        for (String key : commonKeys) {
            MiddleBaseDept middleDept = allDeptMap.get(key);
            XkpDept xkpDept = xkpDeptMap.get(key);
            // 检查其他字段是否相同
            if (!isSameDept(middleDept, xkpDept)) {
                differences.add(new DeptDifference(middleDept, xkpDept));
            }
        }
        return differences;
    }
    /**
     * 比较两个部门对象的所有字段是否相同
     */
    private static boolean isSameDept(MiddleBaseDept middleDept, XkpDept xkpDept) {
        return Objects.equals(middleDept.getDPCODE1(), xkpDept.getDpcode1()) &&
                        Objects.equals(middleDept.getDPNAME1(), xkpDept.getDpname1()) &&
                        Objects.equals(middleDept.getDPNAME2(), xkpDept.getDpname2()) &&
                        Objects.equals(middleDept.getDPNAME3(), xkpDept.getDpname3()) &&
                        Objects.equals(middleDept.getDPNAME4(), xkpDept.getDpname4());
    }
    /**
     * 差异结果封装类
     */
    @Data
    public static class DeptDifference {
        private MiddleBaseDept middleBaseDept;
        private XkpDept xkpDept;
        private String differenceReason;
        public DeptDifference(MiddleBaseDept middleBaseDept, XkpDept xkpDept) {
            this.middleBaseDept = middleBaseDept;
            this.xkpDept = xkpDept;
            this.differenceReason = findDifferenceReason(middleBaseDept, xkpDept);
        }
        private String findDifferenceReason(MiddleBaseDept middleDept, XkpDept xkpDept) {
            List<String> reasons = new ArrayList<>();
            if (!Objects.equals(middleDept.getDPNAME1(), xkpDept.getDpname1())) {
                reasons.add("DPNAME1不同");
            }
            if (!Objects.equals(middleDept.getDPNAME2(), xkpDept.getDpname2())) {
                reasons.add("DPNAME2不同");
            }
            if (!Objects.equals(middleDept.getDPNAME3(), xkpDept.getDpname3())) {
                reasons.add("DPNAME3不同");
            }
            if (!Objects.equals(middleDept.getDPNAME4(), xkpDept.getDpname4())) {
                reasons.add("DPNAME4不同");
            }
            return reasons.isEmpty() ? "无差异" : String.join(",", reasons);
        }
    }
}

}

package com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.middlebase.sync.service.impl;
import com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.change.domain.XkpChanges;
import com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.change.mapper.XkpChangesMapper;
import com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.error.data.domain.XkpErrorLog;
import com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.error.data.service.IXkpErrorLogService;
import com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.middlebase.data.domain.XkpDept;
import com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.middlebase.data.service.IXkpDeptService;
import com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.middlebase.handle.service.IHandleXkpDeptService;
import com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.middlebase.server.DeptCompareUtils;
import com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.middlebase.server.MiddleBaseDept;
import com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.middlebase.server.mapper.MiddleBaseMapper;
import com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.middlebase.sync.service.ISyncDeptDataService;
import com.google.gson.Gson;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
import java.util.Collections;
import java.util.Date;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.stream.Collectors;
/**
 * 同步中间库部门数据Service
 *
 * @author lougang
 * @date 2025-8-20
 */
@Slf4j
@Service
public class SyncDeptDataServiceImpl implements ISyncDeptDataService {
    @Autowired
    private MiddleBaseMapper middleBaseMapper;
    @Autowired
    private IXkpErrorLogService xkpErrorLogService;
    @Autowired
    private IXkpDeptService xkpDeptService;
    @Autowired
    private XkpChangesMapper xkpChangesMapper;
    @Autowired
    private IHandleXkpDeptService handleXkpDeptService;
    private static final Gson GSON = new Gson();
    private static final String DEPT_TYPE = "2";
    /**
     * 获取中间库部门信息
     */
    @Override
    public void getDeptData() {
        List<MiddleBaseDept> allDeptList = fetchMiddleBaseDeptData();
        if (allDeptList.isEmpty()) {
            log.info("未获取到中间库部门数据");
            return;
        }
        log.info("查询中间库数据完成，总计：{}", allDeptList.size());
        try {
            processDeptDataChanges(allDeptList);
        } catch (Exception e) {
            logError("2", e, "新增修改删除部门报错");
        }
        log.info("新开普部门同步数据完成");
    }
    /**
     * 获取中间库部门数据
     */
    private List<MiddleBaseDept> fetchMiddleBaseDeptData() {
        try {
            return middleBaseMapper.getSQLData();
        } catch (Exception e) {
            logError("2", e, "调用中间库sql报错");
            return Collections.emptyList(); // 使用Collections.emptyList()替代List.of()
        }
    }
    /**
     * 处理部门数据变更
     */
    private void processDeptDataChanges(List<MiddleBaseDept> allDeptList) {
        List<XkpDept> xkpDeptList = xkpDeptService.selectXkpDeptList(new XkpDept());
        // 获取差异数据
        List<MiddleBaseDept> additionalInAllDept = DeptCompareUtils.getAdditionalInAllDeptList(allDeptList, xkpDeptList);
        List<XkpDept> additionalInXkpDept = DeptCompareUtils.getAdditionalInXkpDeptList(allDeptList, xkpDeptList);
        List<DeptCompareUtils.DeptDifference> differentData = DeptCompareUtils.getDifferentData(allDeptList, xkpDeptList);
        List<MiddleBaseDept> middleBaseDeptList = differentData.stream()
                .map(DeptCompareUtils.DeptDifference::getMiddleBaseDept)
                .collect(Collectors.toList());
        log.info("中间库比新开普多的数据量：{}", additionalInAllDept.size());
        log.info("新开普比中间库多的数据量：{}", additionalInXkpDept.size());
        log.info("相同键但字段不同的数据量：{}", differentData.size());
        log.info("提取middleBase的数量：{}", middleBaseDeptList.size());
        // 处理不同类型的数据变更
        processAddedDepts(additionalInAllDept);
        processUpdatedDepts(middleBaseDeptList);
        processDeletedDepts(additionalInXkpDept);
    }
    /**
     * 处理新增部门
     */
    private void processAddedDepts(List<MiddleBaseDept> addedDepts) {
        for (MiddleBaseDept middleBaseDept : addedDepts) {
            try {
                XkpDept xkpDept = convertToXkpDept(middleBaseDept);
                xkpDeptService.insertXkpDept(xkpDept);
                logChange(DEPT_TYPE, "1", GSON.toJson(middleBaseDept), null);
                handleXkpDeptService.handlerAddDept(xkpDept);
            } catch (Exception e) {
                logError("2", e, "新增部门处理失败: " + middleBaseDept.getDPCODE1());
            }
        }
    }
    /**
     * 处理更新部门
     */
    private void processUpdatedDepts(List<MiddleBaseDept> updatedDepts) {
        for (MiddleBaseDept middleBaseDept : updatedDepts) {
            try {
                XkpDept existingDept = xkpDeptService.selectXkpDeptInfo(middleBaseDept);
                if (existingDept == null) {
                    continue;
                }
                XkpDept updatedDept = convertToXkpDept(middleBaseDept);
                updatedDept.setId(existingDept.getId()); // 保持ID不变
                xkpDeptService.updateXkpDept(updatedDept);
                logChange(DEPT_TYPE, "2", GSON.toJson(middleBaseDept), GSON.toJson(existingDept));
                handleXkpDeptService.handlerUpdateDept(updatedDept);
            } catch (Exception e) {
                logError("2", e, "更新部门处理失败: " + middleBaseDept.getDPCODE1());
            }
        }
    }
    /**
     * 处理删除部门
     */
    private void processDeletedDepts(List<XkpDept> deletedDepts) {
        for (XkpDept xkpDept : deletedDepts) {
            try {
                xkpDeptService.deleteXkpDeptById(xkpDept.getId());
                logChange(DEPT_TYPE, "3", null, GSON.toJson(xkpDept));
                handleXkpDeptService.handlerDeleteDept(xkpDept);
            } catch (Exception e) {
                logError("2", e, "删除部门处理失败: " + xkpDept.getDpcode1());
            }
        }
    }
    /**
     * MiddleBaseDept 转 XkpDept
     */
    private XkpDept convertToXkpDept(MiddleBaseDept middleBaseDept) {
        XkpDept xkpDept = new XkpDept();
        xkpDept.setNousedate(middleBaseDept.getNOUSEDATE());
        xkpDept.setVer(middleBaseDept.getVER());
        xkpDept.setServerid(middleBaseDept.getSERVERID());
        xkpDept.setDpname1(middleBaseDept.getDPNAME1());
        xkpDept.setDpcode1(middleBaseDept.getDPCODE1());
        xkpDept.setDpname2(middleBaseDept.getDPNAME2());
        xkpDept.setDpcode2(middleBaseDept.getDPCODE2());
        xkpDept.setDpname3(middleBaseDept.getDPNAME3());
        xkpDept.setDpcode3(middleBaseDept.getDPCODE3());
        xkpDept.setDpname4(middleBaseDept.getDPNAME4());
        xkpDept.setDpcode4(middleBaseDept.getDPCODE4());
        xkpDept.setBatnum(middleBaseDept.getBATNUM());
        xkpDept.setSortid(middleBaseDept.getSORTID());
        return xkpDept;
    }
    /**
     * 记录变更日志
     */
    private void logChange(String type, String changeType, String xkpData, String databaseData) {
        XkpChanges xkpChanges = new XkpChanges();
        xkpChanges.setType(type);
        xkpChanges.setChangeType(changeType);
        xkpChanges.setXkpData(xkpData);
        xkpChanges.setDatabaseData(databaseData);
        xkpChanges.setCreateTime(new Date());
        xkpChangesMapper.insertXkpChanges(xkpChanges);
    }
    /**
     * 记录错误日志
     */
    private void logError(String type, Exception e, String remark) {
        XkpErrorLog xkpErrorLog = new XkpErrorLog();
        xkpErrorLog.setType(type);
        xkpErrorLog.setErrorLog(e.getMessage());
        xkpErrorLog.setRemark(remark);
        xkpErrorLogService.insertXkpErrorLog(xkpErrorLog);
        log.error(remark + ": " + e.getMessage());
    }
}

 */
public interface ISyncDeptDataService {
    /**
     * 获取中间库部门信息
     */
    void getDeptData();
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.abutment;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.SpringUtils;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.BaseEntity;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo;
import com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.xinkaipu.data.domain.XkpPerson;
import com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.xinkaipu.data.mapper.XkpPersonMapper;
import com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.xinkaipu.data.service.IXkpPersonService;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.SchoolTeaInfo;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.ISchoolTeaInfoService;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.mock.web.MockMultipartFile;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.GetMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RestController;
import org.springframework.web.multipart.MultipartFile;
import javax.imageio.ImageIO;
import java.io.ByteArrayInputStream;
import java.io.IOException;
import java.util.Base64;
import java.util.List;
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/person")
public class test extends BaseEntity {
    @Autowired
    private IXkpPersonService xkpPersonService;
    @Autowired
    private ISchoolTeaInfoService schoolTeaInfoService;
    @GetMapping("/test")
    public void list() {
        XkpPerson xkpPerson = xkpPersonService.selectXkpPersonById(56374L);
        if (xkpPerson.getPhotobase64() != null && xkpPerson.getPhotobase64().length > 0) {
            String fileName = xkpPerson.getOutid() + ".jpg";
            try {
                // 先验证和修复图片数据
                byte[] validatedImageData = validateAndFixImageData(xkpPerson.getPhotobase64());
                if (validatedImageData == null) {
                    System.out.println("图片数据无效或损坏");
                    return;
                }
                MultipartFile multipartFile = convert(validatedImageData, fileName);
                String url = schoolTeaInfoService.uploadAndCompressImage(multipartFile, fileName);
                System.out.println("上传成功: " + url);
            } catch (Exception e) {
                System.out.println("处理失败: " + e.getMessage());
                e.printStackTrace();
            }
        }
    }
    /**
     * base转成MultipartFile
     *
     * @param filename
     * @return
     * @throws IOException
     */
    public static MultipartFile convert(byte[] base, String filename) throws IOException {
        // 创建ByteArrayInputStream
        ByteArrayInputStream inputStream = new ByteArrayInputStream(base);
        // 创建MockMultipartFile
        return new MockMultipartFile(
                "file",// name
                filename,        // original filename
                "image/",           // content type (可以设置为null或具体类型)
                inputStream      // input stream
        );
    }
    /**
     * 验证和修复图片数据
     */
    private byte[] validateAndFixImageData(byte[] imageData) {
        if (imageData == null || imageData.length == 0) {
            return null;
        }
        // 尝试直接读取
        try (ByteArrayInputStream stream = new ByteArrayInputStream(imageData)) {
            if (ImageIO.read(stream) != null) {
                return imageData; // 数据有效
            }
        } catch (IOException e) {
            // 继续尝试修复
        }
        // 尝试检测是否是base64字符串被误存为byte[]
        String dataStr = new String(imageData);
        if (dataStr.startsWith("data:image/")) {
            // 可能是base64字符串，尝试解析
            try {
                String base64Data = dataStr.split(",")[1];
                return Base64.getDecoder().decode(base64Data);
            } catch (Exception e) {
                return null;
            }
        }
        // 尝试常见的图片格式头检测
        if (isLikelyImageData(imageData)) {
            return imageData; // 可能是有效的图片数据但ImageIO不支持
        }
        return null;
    }
    /**
     * 检测数据是否可能是图片
     */
    private boolean isLikelyImageData(byte[] data) {
        if (data.length < 4) return false;
        // 检查常见的图片文件头
        // JPEG: FF D8 FF
        if (data[0] == (byte) 0xFF && data[1] == (byte) 0xD8 && data[2] == (byte) 0xFF) {
            return true;
        }
        // PNG: 89 50 4E 47
        if (data[0] == (byte) 0x89 && data[1] == (byte) 0x50 &&
                data[2] == (byte) 0x4E && data[3] == (byte) 0x47) {
            return true;
        }
        // GIF: "GIF"
        if (data[0] == 'G' && data[1] == 'I' && data[2] == 'F') {
            return true;
        }
        return false;
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.xinkaipu.abutment.domain;
import lombok.Data;
@Data
public class PersonInfo {
