    private String deptcode;
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.xinkaipu.abutment.server;
import com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.xinkaipu.abutment.utils.Constants;
import com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.xinkaipu.abutment.utils.EncryptionFactory;
import com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.xinkaipu.abutment.utils.HttpReqUtils;
import com.google.gson.Gson;
import com.google.gson.JsonObject;
import org.apache.commons.lang3.StringUtils;
import org.apache.commons.lang3.builder.ToStringBuilder;
/**
 * 三方对接类-API接口的工具类
 * <p>demo版本：V1.2</p>
 * <p>demo日期：2020-10-20</p>
 * <p>说明：demo仅对接对接思路
 * demo不一定紧跟文档更新，请以最新API接口为准</p>
 */
public class AIfaceApiUtils {
	private static final Gson gson = new Gson();
	public static void paramVerify(boolean exp, String message) {
		if (!exp) {
			throw new RuntimeException(message);
		}
	}
	/**
	 * @Title: 基本接口  获取令牌
	 * @Description: 请求token并缓存
	 * 令牌有效期有一个自然日；
	 * 申请后系统缓存下来使用，不要每次都去申请令牌；
	 * 当令牌过期时再去申请；
	 */
	public static void cacheToken() {
		try {
			// 请求的header值
			JsonObject reqHeader = new JsonObject();
			reqHeader.addProperty("appkey", Constants.AIFACE_APPKEY);
			// 请求基本业务数据
			JsonObject json = new JsonObject();
			json.addProperty("app_secret", Constants.AIFACE_APPSECRET);
			// 将基本业务参数加密
			String jsondata = EncryptionFactory.tEncryptDES(
					Constants.AIFACE_SECRETALGORITHM,
					Constants.AIFACE_SECRETKEY,
					json.toString()
			);
			// 请求的参数
			JsonObject params = new JsonObject();
			params.addProperty("request_data", jsondata);
			String retdata = HttpReqUtils.httpPostForm(
					Constants.AIFACE_URL + "/oauth/token",
					params,
					reqHeader
			);
			System.out.println("获取token返回值" + retdata);
			AifaceRetData aifaceRetData = new AifaceRetData(retdata);
			System.out.println("解密后的数据对象: " + ToStringBuilder.reflectionToString(aifaceRetData));
			if (aifaceRetData.getCode() == 1) {
				// 记录到内存变量中
				JsonObject retDataJson = aifaceRetData.getRetdata();
				Constants.AIFACE_TOKEN = retDataJson.get("access_token").getAsString();
			} else {
				throw new RuntimeException("申请token," + aifaceRetData.getMsg());
			}
		} catch (Exception e) {
			throw new RuntimeException("申请token,原因:" + e.getMessage());
		}
	}
	/**
	 * 查询人员信息getpersons
	 * 接入方 向认证平台发送请求，根据传入的人员信息，要求获取该人员的所有属性信息,
	 * 包括姓名、部门名称、显示照片、识别照片、照片校验状态等；
	 * 当不指定人员信息时，该接口可以获取当前应用创建的所有人员信息。
	 * @param outid
	 * @return
	 */
	public static AifaceRetData getpersons(String outid, Long ver, int pagesize) {
		try {
			// 如果缓存中的TOKEN为空，重新请求缓存token
			if (StringUtils.isBlank(Constants.AIFACE_TOKEN)) {
				cacheToken();
			}
			// 处理请求header
			JsonObject reqHeader = new JsonObject();
			reqHeader.addProperty("accesstoken", Constants.AIFACE_TOKEN);
			// 加密基本业务参数
			JsonObject json = new JsonObject();
			json.addProperty("outid", outid);
			json.addProperty("ver", ver);
			// json.addProperty("ecode",Constants.ECODE); // 该行代码一般不需要，仅多客户平台才开启
			json.addProperty("pagesize", pagesize);
			String jsondata = EncryptionFactory.tEncryptDES(
					Constants.AIFACE_SECRETALGORITHM,
					Constants.AIFACE_SECRETKEY,
					json.toString()
			);
			// 人脸服务平台接口URL
			String url = Constants.AIFACE_URL + "/managerapi/getphotos";
			// 整理form表单入参,无图片
			JsonObject params = new JsonObject();
			params.addProperty("request_data", jsondata);
			String retdata = HttpReqUtils.httpPostForm(url, params, reqHeader);
			AifaceRetData aifaceRetData = new AifaceRetData(retdata);
			if (aifaceRetData.getCode() == 1) {
				return aifaceRetData;
			} else {
				throw new RuntimeException("--getpersons--error:" + aifaceRetData.getMsg());
			}
		} catch (Exception e) {
			throw new RuntimeException("--getpersons--error:" + e.getMessage());
		}
	}
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.xinkaipu.abutment.server;
import com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.xinkaipu.abutment.utils.Constants;
import com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.xinkaipu.abutment.utils.EncryptionFactory;
import com.google.gson.JsonObject;
import com.google.gson.JsonParser;
import com.google.gson.JsonSyntaxException;
/**
 * 返回消息体处理
 */
public class AifaceRetData {
	private static final JsonParser jsonParser = new JsonParser();
	private Integer code; // 返回code1 成功，其它失败
	private String msg; // 失败消息
	private JsonObject retdata; // 成功时返回的json数据
	public AifaceRetData(String retdata) {
		System.out.println("走到这了奥");
		// 请求返回消息体处理
		if (retdata == null) {
			this.code = -1;
			this.msg = "请求失败,结果未知!";
		} else {
			try {
				JsonObject retdatajson = jsonParser.parse(retdata).getAsJsonObject();
				if (retdatajson.has("errcode")) { // 请求失败
					handleErrorResponse(retdatajson);
				} else { // 请求成功
					handleSuccessResponse(retdatajson);
				}
			} catch (JsonSyntaxException e) {
				this.code = -1;
				this.msg = "JSON解析失败: " + e.getMessage();
			} catch (Exception e) {
				this.code = -1;
				this.msg = "处理响应数据异常: " + e.getMessage();
			}
		}
	}
	private void handleErrorResponse(JsonObject retdatajson) {
		String errcode = retdatajson.get("errcode").getAsString();
		// -1001 INTERFACE_NOTSUPPORT 接口内容暂不支持；主要是在某些部署模式下，部分接口不支持
		// -2001 INVALID_TOKEN 无效的token或者token已过期
		// -2002 INVALID_APPKEY_SECRET 无效的app_key或者app_secret
		// -3001 NOT_GRANTED 未授权的操作
		if ("-2001".equals(errcode)) {
			// token无效，清空token，下次在请求时，继续申请token
			Constants.AIFACE_TOKEN = null;
		} else {
			this.code = -1;
			this.msg = retdatajson.get("errmsg").getAsString();
		}
	}
	private void handleSuccessResponse(JsonObject retdatajson) throws Exception {
		// 解密返回的data密文
		String retdatamingwen = EncryptionFactory.tDecryptDES(
				Constants.AIFACE_SECRETALGORITHM,
				Constants.AIFACE_SECRETKEY,
				retdatajson.get("data").getAsString()
		);
		JsonObject retjson = jsonParser.parse(retdatamingwen).getAsJsonObject();
		int responseCode = retjson.get("code").getAsInt();
		if (responseCode == 1) {
			this.code = 1;
			this.retdata = retjson;
		} else {
			this.code = responseCode;
			this.msg = retjson.get("msg").getAsString();
		}
	}
	public Integer getCode() {
		return code;
	}
	public void setCode(Integer code) {
		this.code = code;
	}
	public String getMsg() {
		return msg;
	}
	public void setMsg(String msg) {
		this.msg = msg;
	}
	public JsonObject getRetdata() {
		return retdata;
	}
	public void setRetdata(JsonObject retdata) {
		this.retdata = retdata;
	}
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.xinkaipu.abutment.utils;
import java.io.*;
import java.net.URLEncoder;
import java.security.InvalidKeyException;
import java.security.NoSuchAlgorithmException;
/**
 * 公共工具类
 */
public class CommonUtil {
    /**
     * 获取照片签名
     * @param file
     * @return 签名字符串
     */
    public static String getPhotoSign(File file){
        String photosign = "";
        try {
            //获取照片字节数据
            byte[] data = imageToByteArray(file);
            //获取加密mac对象
            HMAC_SHA1 sha1 = getHmac();
            //mac加密
            photosign = sha1.genHMAC(data);
            System.out.println("photosign："+photosign);
            //encode 处理符号
            photosign = URLEncoder.encode(photosign,"UTF-8");
            System.out.println("encode："+photosign);
        }catch (Exception e){
            e.printStackTrace();
        }
        return photosign;
    }
    /**
     * 获取加密对象
     * @return
     */
    public static HMAC_SHA1 getHmac(){
        try {
            HMAC_SHA1 hmac_sha1 = new HMAC_SHA1(Constants.AIFACE_SECRETKEY);
            return hmac_sha1;
        } catch (NoSuchAlgorithmException e) {
            e.printStackTrace();
        } catch (InvalidKeyException e) {
            e.printStackTrace();
        }
        return null;
    }
    /**
     * 图片转换成byte
     * @param file
     * @return
     */
    public static byte[] imageToByteArray(File file) {
        BufferedInputStream in = null;
        ByteArrayOutputStream out = null;
        try {
            in = new BufferedInputStream(new FileInputStream(file));
            out = new ByteArrayOutputStream();
            int size = 0;
            byte[] temp = new byte[1024];
            while ((size = in.read(temp)) != -1) {
                out.write(temp, 0, size);
            }
            return out.toByteArray();
        } catch (IOException e) {
            e.printStackTrace();
            return null;
        } finally {
            try {
                if (in!=null){
                    in.close();
                }
            } catch (Exception ex) {
                ex.printStackTrace();
            }try {
                if (out!=null){
                    out.close();
                }
            } catch (Exception ex) {
                ex.printStackTrace();
            }
        }
    }
}

package com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.xinkaipu.abutment.utils;
/** 
 * <p>Title: EncryptionFactory.java</p>  
 * <p>Description: 加解密工厂</p>  
 */
public class EncryptionFactory {
	/**
	  * @Title:			tDecryptDES 
	  * @Description:	解密
	  * @param:			@param secretalgorithm  密钥算法 ，1：3DESC 2DESC
	  * @param:			@param key
	  * @param:			@param data
	  * @param:			@return
	  * @return: 		String
	 */
	public static String tDecryptDES(Integer secretalgorithm,String key,String data) {  
        switch (secretalgorithm) {
	        case 1:  //3DESC
	        	return ThreeDESUtil.decryptMode(key, data);
	        case 2: //DESC
				return null;
	        case 3: 
	        	return null;
	        default:  
	            break;  
        }  
        return null;
    }
	/**
	  * @Title:			tEncryptDES
	  * @Description:	加密
	  * @param:			@param secretalgorithm  密钥算法 ，1：3DESC 2DESC
	  * @param:			@param key
	  * @param:			@param data
	  * @param:			@return
	  * @return: 		String
	 */
	public static String tEncryptDES(Integer secretalgorithm,String key,String data) {  
        switch (secretalgorithm) {
	        case 1:  //3DESC
	        	return ThreeDESUtil.encryptMode(key, data);
	        case 2://DESC
				return null;
	        case 3: 
	        	return null;
	        default:  
	            break;  
        }  
        return null;
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.xinkaipu.abutment.utils;
import org.apache.commons.net.util.Base64;
import org.apache.log4j.Logger;
import javax.crypto.Mac;
import javax.crypto.spec.SecretKeySpec;
import java.security.InvalidKeyException;
import java.security.NoSuchAlgorithmException;
/**
 * Title: HMAC_SHA1.java
 * Description: HMAC_SHA1加密
 */
public class HMAC_SHA1 {
	private static final Logger log = Logger.getLogger(HMAC_SHA1.class.getName());
	private static final String HMAC_SHA1_ALGORITHM = "HmacSHA1";
	private Mac mac = null;
	public HMAC_SHA1(String HMAC_SHA1_KEY) throws NoSuchAlgorithmException, InvalidKeyException{
		//根据给定的字节数组构造一个密钥,第二参数指定一个密钥算法的名称
		SecretKeySpec signinKey = new SecretKeySpec(HMAC_SHA1_KEY.getBytes(), HMAC_SHA1_ALGORITHM);
		//生成一个指定 Mac 算法 的 Mac 对象
		mac = Mac.getInstance(HMAC_SHA1_ALGORITHM);
		//用给定密钥初始化 Mac 对象
		mac.init(signinKey);
	}
    /**
     * 加密图片HAX数据
     * @param data
     * @return
     */
    public String genHMAC(byte[] data) {
        byte[] result = null;
        if (mac==null) {
            return null;
        }
        //将byte[]转十六进制String
        String datastr = byte2hex(data);
        //完成 Mac 操作
        byte[] rawHmac = mac.doFinal(datastr.getBytes());
        result = Base64.encodeBase64(rawHmac);
        if (null != result) {
            return new String(result);
        } else {
            return null;
        }
    }
    /**
	 * byte[]转十六进制String
	 * 
	 * @param b
	 * @return
	 */
	public static String byte2hex(byte[] b) {
		try {
			if ((b == null) || (b.length <= 0)) {
				return null;
			}
			StringBuffer sb = new StringBuffer();
			String stmp = "";
			for (int n = 0; n < b.length; ++n) {
				stmp = Integer.toHexString(b[n] & 0xFF);
				if (stmp.length() == 1)
					sb.append("0" + stmp);
				else {
					sb.append(stmp);
				}
			}
			return sb.toString();
		} catch (Exception e) {
			e.printStackTrace();
		}
		return null;
	}
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.xinkaipu.abutment.utils;
import com.google.gson.JsonObject;
import com.google.gson.JsonElement;
import com.google.gson.JsonParser;
import org.apache.http.HttpEntity;
import org.apache.http.HttpStatus;
import org.apache.http.NameValuePair;
import org.apache.http.client.ClientProtocolException;
import org.apache.http.client.CookieStore;
import org.apache.http.client.config.RequestConfig;
import org.apache.http.client.entity.UrlEncodedFormEntity;
import org.apache.http.client.methods.CloseableHttpResponse;
import org.apache.http.client.methods.HttpGet;
import org.apache.http.client.methods.HttpPost;
import org.apache.http.entity.StringEntity;
import org.apache.http.entity.mime.MultipartEntityBuilder;
import org.apache.http.impl.client.CloseableHttpClient;
import org.apache.http.impl.client.HttpClients;
import org.apache.http.message.BasicNameValuePair;
import org.apache.http.util.EntityUtils;
import org.slf4j.Logger;
import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;
import java.io.IOException;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.Set;
/**
 * <p>Title: HttpRequestUtils.java</p>
 * <p>Description: httpClient工具类</p>
 */
public class HttpReqUtils {
	// 设置连接超时时间，单位毫秒。
	// 设置从connect Manager获取Connection 超时时间，单位毫秒。
	// 请求获取数据的超时时间，单位毫秒。
	static RequestConfig requestConfig = RequestConfig.custom()
			.setConnectTimeout(50000).setConnectionRequestTimeout(5000)
			.setSocketTimeout(10000).build();
	private static final Logger logger = LoggerFactory.getLogger(HttpReqUtils.class);
	private static final JsonParser jsonParser = new JsonParser();
	/**
	 * Get请求
	 * @param url 请求URL
	 * @param cookieStore Cookie存储
	 * @return 响应字符串
	 */
	public static String httpGet(String url, CookieStore cookieStore) {
		try (CloseableHttpClient httpclient = HttpClients.custom()
				.setDefaultCookieStore(cookieStore)
				.build()) {
			HttpGet request = new HttpGet(url);
			request.setConfig(requestConfig);
			try (CloseableHttpResponse response = httpclient.execute(request)) {
				int status = response.getStatusLine().getStatusCode();
				if (status == HttpStatus.SC_OK) {
					return EntityUtils.toString(response.getEntity(), "UTF-8");
				}
				throw new RuntimeException("请求失败! 状态码: " + status);
			}
		} catch (ClientProtocolException e) {
			logger.error("HTTP协议错误", e);
			throw new RuntimeException(e.getMessage());
		} catch (IOException e) {
			logger.error("IO异常", e);
			throw new RuntimeException(e.getMessage());
		}
	}
	/**
	 * 表单POST请求(带文件上传)
	 * @param url 请求URL
	 * @param builder 多部分实体构建器
	 * @param reqHeader 请求头
	 * @return 响应字符串
	 */
	public static String httpPostForm(String url, MultipartEntityBuilder builder, JsonObject reqHeader) {
		try (CloseableHttpClient httpclient = HttpClients.createDefault()) {
			HttpPost request = new HttpPost(url);
			request.setConfig(requestConfig);
			// 设置请求头
			if (reqHeader != null && reqHeader.size() > 0) {
				Set<Map.Entry<String, JsonElement>> entries = reqHeader.entrySet();
				for (Map.Entry<String, JsonElement> entry : entries) {
					request.setHeader(entry.getKey(), entry.getValue().getAsString());
				}
			}
			HttpEntity entity = builder.build();
			request.setEntity(entity);
			try (CloseableHttpResponse response = httpclient.execute(request)) {
				int status = response.getStatusLine().getStatusCode();
				HttpEntity responseEntity = response.getEntity();
				if (status == 404) {
					throw new RuntimeException("接口不存在!");
				}
				if (responseEntity != null) {
					return EntityUtils.toString(responseEntity, "UTF-8");
				}
				throw new RuntimeException("请求异常! 无响应实体");
			}
		} catch (ClientProtocolException e) {
			logger.error("HTTP协议错误", e);
			throw new RuntimeException(e.getMessage());
		} catch (IOException e) {
			logger.error("IO异常", e);
			throw new RuntimeException(e.getMessage());
		}
	}
	/**
	 * 表单POST请求
	 * @param url 请求URL
	 * @param json 请求参数
	 * @param reqHeader 请求头
	 * @return 响应字符串
	 */
	public static String httpPostForm(String url, JsonObject json, JsonObject reqHeader) {
		try (CloseableHttpClient httpclient = HttpClients.createDefault()) {
			HttpPost request = new HttpPost(url);
			request.setHeader("Content-Type", "application/x-www-form-urlencoded");
			request.setConfig(requestConfig);
			// 设置请求头
			if (reqHeader != null && reqHeader.size() > 0) {
				Set<Map.Entry<String, JsonElement>> entries = reqHeader.entrySet();
				for (Map.Entry<String, JsonElement> entry : entries) {
					request.setHeader(entry.getKey(), entry.getValue().getAsString());
				}
			}
			// 准备表单参数
			List<NameValuePair> pairs = new ArrayList<>();
			if (json != null && json.size() > 0) {
				Set<Map.Entry<String, JsonElement>> entries = json.entrySet();
				for (Map.Entry<String, JsonElement> entry : entries) {
					pairs.add(new BasicNameValuePair(entry.getKey(), entry.getValue().getAsString()));
				}
			}
			request.setEntity(new UrlEncodedFormEntity(pairs, "UTF-8"));
			try (CloseableHttpResponse response = httpclient.execute(request)) {
				return EntityUtils.toString(response.getEntity(), "UTF-8");
			}
		} catch (ClientProtocolException e) {
			logger.error("HTTP协议错误", e);
			throw new RuntimeException(e.getMessage());
		} catch (IOException e) {
			logger.error("IO异常", e);
			throw new RuntimeException(e.getMessage());
		}
	}
	/**
	 * JSON POST请求
	 * @param url 请求URL
	 * @param json 请求体JSON
	 * @param reqHeader 请求头
	 * @return 响应字符串
	 */
	public static String httpPost(String url, JsonObject json, JsonObject reqHeader) {
		try (CloseableHttpClient httpclient = HttpClients.createDefault()) {
			HttpPost request = new HttpPost(url);
			request.setHeader("Content-Type", "application/json");
			request.setConfig(requestConfig);
			// 设置请求头
			if (reqHeader != null && reqHeader.size() > 0) {
				Set<Map.Entry<String, JsonElement>> entries = reqHeader.entrySet();
				for (Map.Entry<String, JsonElement> entry : entries) {
					request.setHeader(entry.getKey(), entry.getValue().getAsString());
				}
			}
			request.setEntity(new StringEntity(json.toString(), "UTF-8"));
			try (CloseableHttpResponse response = httpclient.execute(request)) {
				return EntityUtils.toString(response.getEntity(), "UTF-8");
			}
		} catch (ClientProtocolException e) {
			logger.error("HTTP协议错误", e);
			throw new RuntimeException(e.getMessage());
		} catch (IOException e) {
			logger.error("IO异常", e);
			throw new RuntimeException(e.getMessage());
		}
	}
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.xinkaipu.abutment.utils;
import org.apache.commons.codec.binary.Base64;
import org.apache.log4j.Logger;
import javax.crypto.Cipher;
import javax.crypto.SecretKey;
import javax.crypto.spec.SecretKeySpec;
import java.net.URLDecoder;
import java.net.URLEncoder;
/**
 * <p>Title: EncryptionFactory.java</p>
 * <p>Description: 3DESC加解密</p>
 */
public class ThreeDESUtil {
	private static final Logger log = Logger.getLogger(ThreeDESUtil.class.getName());
	// 定义加密算法
	private static final String Algorithm = "DESede";
	public static void main(String[] args) {
	}
	/**
	  * @Title:			encryptMode 
	  * @Description:	加密
	 */
	public static String encryptMode(String key,String src) {
		try {
			return URLEncoder.encode(Base64.encodeBase64String(encryptMode(src.getBytes("utf-8"), key)), "UTF-8");
		} catch (Exception e) {
			log.error(e);
			e.printStackTrace();
		}
		return null;
	}
	// 加密 src为源数据的字节数组
	public static byte[] encryptMode(byte[] src,String key) throws Exception {
		SecretKey deskey = new SecretKeySpec(build3Deskey(key), Algorithm);
		// 实例化cipher
		Cipher cipher = Cipher.getInstance(Algorithm);
		cipher.init(Cipher.ENCRYPT_MODE, deskey);
		return cipher.doFinal(src);
	}
	/**
	  * @Title:			decryptMode 
	  * @Description:	 解密函数
	 */
	public static String decryptMode(String key,String src) {
		try {
			src = URLDecoder.decode(src,"UTF-8");
			return new String(decryptMode(Base64.decodeBase64(src),key),"utf-8");
		} catch (Exception e) {
			log.error(e.getMessage());
		}
		return null;
	}
	// 解密函数
	public static byte[] decryptMode(byte[] src,String key) throws Exception {
		SecretKey deskey;
		deskey = new SecretKeySpec(build3Deskey(key), Algorithm);
		Cipher cipher = Cipher.getInstance(Algorithm);
		cipher.init(Cipher.DECRYPT_MODE, deskey);
		return cipher.doFinal(src);
	}
	// 根据字符串生成密钥24位的字节数组
	public static byte[] build3Deskey(String keystr) throws Exception {
		byte[] key = new byte[24];
		byte[] temp = keystr.getBytes("utf-8");
		if (key.length > temp.length) {
			System.arraycopy(temp, 0, key, 0, temp.length);
		} else {
			System.arraycopy(temp, 0, key, 0, key.length);
		}
		return key;
	}
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.xinkaipu.data.controller;
import java.util.List;
import javax.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse;
import com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.xinkaipu.data.domain.XkpPerson;
import com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.xinkaipu.data.service.IXkpPersonService;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.GetMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PostMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PutMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.DeleteMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PathVariable;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestBody;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RestController;
import com.chenrise.common.log.annotation.Log;
import com.chenrise.common.log.enums.BusinessType;
import com.chenrise.common.security.annotation.RequiresPermissions;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.controller.BaseController;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.poi.ExcelUtil;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo;
/**
 * 新开普人员信息Controller
 * 
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2025-08-15
 */
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/person")
public class XkpPersonController extends BaseController
{
    @Autowired
    private IXkpPersonService xkpPersonService;
    /**
     * 查询新开普人员信息列表
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("system:person:list")
    @GetMapping("/list")
    public TableDataInfo list(XkpPerson xkpPerson)
    {
        startPage();
        List<XkpPerson> list = xkpPersonService.selectXkpPersonList(xkpPerson);
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     * 导出新开普人员信息列表
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("system:person:export")
    @Log(title = "新开普人员信息", businessType = BusinessType.EXPORT)
    @PostMapping("/export")
    public void export(HttpServletResponse response, XkpPerson xkpPerson)
    {
        List<XkpPerson> list = xkpPersonService.selectXkpPersonList(xkpPerson);
        ExcelUtil<XkpPerson> util = new ExcelUtil<XkpPerson>(XkpPerson.class);
        util.exportExcel(response, list, "新开普人员信息数据");
    }
    /**
     * 获取新开普人员信息详细信息
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("system:person:query")
    @GetMapping(value = "/{id}")
    public AjaxResult getInfo(@PathVariable("id") Long id)
    {
        return success(xkpPersonService.selectXkpPersonById(id));
    }
    /**
     * 新增新开普人员信息
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("system:person:add")
    @Log(title = "新开普人员信息", businessType = BusinessType.INSERT)
    @PostMapping
    public AjaxResult add(@RequestBody XkpPerson xkpPerson)
    {
        return toAjax(xkpPersonService.insertXkpPerson(xkpPerson));
    }
    /**
     * 修改新开普人员信息
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("system:person:edit")
    @Log(title = "新开普人员信息", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PutMapping
    public AjaxResult edit(@RequestBody XkpPerson xkpPerson)
    {
        return toAjax(xkpPersonService.updateXkpPerson(xkpPerson));
    }
    /**
     * 删除新开普人员信息
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("system:person:remove")
    @Log(title = "新开普人员信息", businessType = BusinessType.DELETE)
	@DeleteMapping("/{ids}")
    public AjaxResult remove(@PathVariable Long[] ids)
    {
        return toAjax(xkpPersonService.deleteXkpPersonByIds(ids));
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.xinkaipu.data.domain;
import com.chenrise.common.core.annotation.Excel;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.BaseEntity;
import lombok.Data;
/**
 * 新开普人员信息对象 xkp_person
 * 
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2025-08-15
 */
@Data
public class XkpPerson extends BaseEntity {
    private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;
    /** 主键ID */
    private Long id;
    /** 人员的学工号 */
    @Excel(name = "人员的学工号")
    private String outid;
    /** 人员的姓名 */
    @Excel(name = "人员的姓名")
    private String name;
    /** 人员的身份证号 */
    @Excel(name = "人员的身份证号")
    private String sfzh;
    /** 人员的手机号 */
    @Excel(name = "人员的手机号")
    private String phone;
    /** 部门名称 */
    @Excel(name = "部门名称")
    private String dept;
    /** 识别照片 base64 字符串 */
    @Excel(name = "识别照片 base64 字符串")
    private byte[] photobase64;
    /** 人脸底库照片的质量校验状态，0 待校验，1 校验成功，2 校验失败； */
    @Excel(name = "人脸底库照片的质量校验状态，0 待校验，1 校验成功，2 校验失败；")
    private String photostatus;
    /** 人员状态,1 正常，0 无效 */
    @Excel(name = "人员状态,1 正常，0 无效")
    private String status;
    /** 人员信息对应的版本号 (数据有新增、修改、删除时,版本号
会变大，用于增量获取数据使用) */
    @Excel(name = "人员信息对应的版本号 (数据有新增、修改、删除时,版本号会变大，用于增量获取数据使用)")
    private String ver;
    private String deptId;
    private String deptCode;
    private String base64Image;
    /**
     * 人员类型 1老师 2学生
     */
    private String personType;
}

package com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.xinkaipu.data.service.impl;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.xinkaipu.data.domain.XkpPerson;
import com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.xinkaipu.data.mapper.XkpPersonMapper;
import com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.xinkaipu.data.service.IXkpPersonService;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.DateUtils;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
/**
 * 新开普人员信息Service业务层处理
 * 
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2025-08-15
 */
@Service
public class XkpPersonServiceImpl implements IXkpPersonService
{
    @Autowired
    private XkpPersonMapper xkpPersonMapper;
    /**
     * 查询新开普人员信息
     * 
     * @param id 新开普人员信息主键
     * @return 新开普人员信息
     */
    @Override
    public XkpPerson selectXkpPersonById(Long id)
    {
        return xkpPersonMapper.selectXkpPersonById(id);
    }
    /**
     * 查询新开普人员信息列表
     * 
     * @param xkpPerson 新开普人员信息
     * @return 新开普人员信息
     */
    @Override
    public List<XkpPerson> selectXkpPersonList(XkpPerson xkpPerson)
    {
        return xkpPersonMapper.selectXkpPersonList(xkpPerson);
    }
    /**
     * 新增新开普人员信息
     * 
     * @param xkpPerson 新开普人员信息
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int insertXkpPerson(XkpPerson xkpPerson)
    {
        xkpPerson.setCreateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        return xkpPersonMapper.insertXkpPerson(xkpPerson);
    }
    /**
     * 修改新开普人员信息
     * 
     * @param xkpPerson 新开普人员信息
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int updateXkpPerson(XkpPerson xkpPerson)
    {
        xkpPerson.setUpdateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        return xkpPersonMapper.updateXkpPerson(xkpPerson);
    }
    /**
     * 批量删除新开普人员信息
     * 
     * @param ids 需要删除的新开普人员信息主键
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int deleteXkpPersonByIds(Long[] ids)
    {
        return xkpPersonMapper.deleteXkpPersonByIds(ids);
    }
    /**
     * 删除新开普人员信息信息
     * 
     * @param id 新开普人员信息主键
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int deleteXkpPersonById(Long id)
    {
        return xkpPersonMapper.deleteXkpPersonById(id);
    }
    /**
     * 根据学号查询原始数据信息
     * @param outid
     * @return
     */
    @Override
    public XkpPerson selectXkpPersonByOutId(String outid) {
        return xkpPersonMapper.selectXkpPersonByOutId(outid);
    }
}

package com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.xinkaipu.handle.service;
import com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.middlebase.data.domain.XkpDept;
import com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.xinkaipu.data.domain.XkpPerson;
import java.io.IOException;
/**
 * 处理新开普人员数据Service
 *
 * @author lougang
 * @date 2025-8-20
 */
public interface IHandleXkpPersonService {
    /**
     * 添加人员信息
     * @param xkpPerson
     */
    void handlerAddPerson(XkpPerson xkpPerson) throws IOException;
    /**
     * 修改人员信息
     * @param xkpPerson
     */
    void handlerUpdatePerson(XkpPerson xkpPerson) throws IOException;
    /**
     * 删除人员信息
     * @param xkpPerson
     */
    void handlerDeletePerson(XkpPerson xkpPerson);
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.xinkaipu.handle.service.impl;
import com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.middlebase.handle.domain.SysDeptHandle;
import com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.middlebase.handle.mapper.HandleXkpDeptMapper;
import com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.xinkaipu.data.domain.XkpPerson;
import com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.xinkaipu.handle.service.IHandleXkpPersonService;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.SchoolStuInfo;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.SchoolTeaInfo;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.ISchoolStuInfoService;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.ISchoolTeaInfoService;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.mock.web.MockMultipartFile;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
import org.springframework.web.multipart.MultipartFile;
import java.io.ByteArrayInputStream;
import java.io.IOException;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
/**
 * 处理新开普人员数据Service
 *
 * @author lougang
 * @date 2025-8-20
 */
@Service
public class HandleXkpPersonServiceImpl implements IHandleXkpPersonService {
    @Autowired
    private HandleXkpDeptMapper handleXkpDeptMapper;
    @Autowired
    private ISchoolTeaInfoService schoolTeaInfoService;
    @Autowired
    private ISchoolStuInfoService schoolStuInfoService;
    /**
     * 添加人员信息
     * @param xkpPerson
     */
    @Override
    public void handlerAddPerson(XkpPerson xkpPerson) throws IOException {
        if (xkpPerson.getDeptCode() == null) {
            return;
        }
        if ("1".equals(xkpPerson.getPersonType())) {
            // 老师
            SchoolTeaInfo schoolTeaInfo = createSchoolTeaInfo(xkpPerson);
            if (schoolTeaInfo.getUserDeptId() == null) {
                System.out.println("老师部门不存在");
                return;
            }
            setBasicPersonInfo(schoolTeaInfo, xkpPerson);
            schoolTeaInfo.setPicUrl(handlePersonPhoto(xkpPerson));
            System.out.println("老师信息：" + xkpPerson.getOutid());
            schoolTeaInfoService.insertSchoolTeaInfo(schoolTeaInfo);
        } else if ("2".equals(xkpPerson.getPersonType())) {
            // 学生
            SchoolStuInfo schoolStuInfo = createSchoolStuInfo(xkpPerson);
            if (schoolStuInfo.getStuDeptId() == null) {
                System.out.println("学生部门不存在");
                return;
            }
            setStuPersonInfo(schoolStuInfo, xkpPerson);
            schoolStuInfo.setPicUrl(handlePersonPhoto(xkpPerson));
            schoolStuInfoService.insertSchoolStuInfo(schoolStuInfo);
        }
    }
    /**
     * 修改人员信息
     * @param xkpPerson
     */
    @Override
    public void handlerUpdatePerson(XkpPerson xkpPerson) throws IOException {
        if ("1".equals(xkpPerson.getPersonType())) {
            // 根据学工号查询教师信息
            SchoolTeaInfo schoolTeaInfo = schoolTeaInfoService.selectSchoolTeaInfoByTeaUserNum(xkpPerson.getOutid());
            if (schoolTeaInfo == null || xkpPerson.getDeptCode() == null) {
                return;
            }
            SysDeptHandle dept = handleXkpDeptMapper.selectByFullDeptCode(xkpPerson.getDeptCode());
            if (dept == null) {
                return;
            }
            schoolTeaInfo.setUserDeptId(dept.getDeptId());
            schoolTeaInfo.setUserDeptName(dept.getDeptName());
            setBasicPersonInfo(schoolTeaInfo, xkpPerson);
            schoolTeaInfo.setPicUrl(handlePersonPhoto(xkpPerson));
            schoolTeaInfoService.updateSchoolTeaInfo(schoolTeaInfo);
        } else if ("2".equals(xkpPerson.getPersonType())) {
            // 根据学工号查询学生信息
            SchoolStuInfo schoolStuInfo = schoolStuInfoService.selectSchoolStuInfoBystuNum(xkpPerson.getOutid());
            if (schoolStuInfo == null || xkpPerson.getDeptCode() == null) {
                return;
            }
            SysDeptHandle dept = handleXkpDeptMapper.selectByFullDeptCode(xkpPerson.getDeptCode());
            if (dept == null) {
                return;
            }
            schoolStuInfo.setStuDeptId(dept.getDeptId());
            schoolStuInfo.setStuDeptName(dept.getDeptName());
            setStuPersonInfo(schoolStuInfo, xkpPerson);
            schoolStuInfo.setPicUrl(handlePersonPhoto(xkpPerson));
            schoolStuInfoService.updateSchoolStuInfo(schoolStuInfo);
        }
    }
    /**
     * 删除人员信息
     * @param xkpPerson
     */
    @Override
    public void handlerDeletePerson(XkpPerson xkpPerson) {
        if ("1".equals(xkpPerson.getPersonType())) {
            // 根据学工号查询教师信息
            SchoolTeaInfo schoolTeaInfo = schoolTeaInfoService.selectSchoolTeaInfoByTeaUserNum(xkpPerson.getOutid());
            if (schoolTeaInfo != null) {
                schoolTeaInfoService.deleteSchoolTeaInfoByTeaUserId(schoolTeaInfo.getTeaUserId());
            }
        } else if ("2".equals(xkpPerson.getPersonType())) {
            // 根据学工号查询学生信息
            SchoolStuInfo schoolStuInfo = schoolStuInfoService.selectSchoolStuInfoBystuNum(xkpPerson.getOutid());
            if (schoolStuInfo != null) {
                schoolStuInfoService.deleteSchoolStuInfoByStuId(schoolStuInfo.getStuId());
            }
        }
    }
    /**
     * base转成MultipartFile
     * @param imageBytes 图片字节数组
     * @param filename 文件名
     * @return MultipartFile
     * @throws IOException
     */
    public MultipartFile convert(byte[] imageBytes, String filename) throws IOException {
        ByteArrayInputStream inputStream = new ByteArrayInputStream(imageBytes);
        return new MockMultipartFile(
                "file",          // name
                filename,        // original filename
                "image/",        // content type
                inputStream      // input stream
        );
    }
    /**
     * 创建教师信息对象并设置部门ID
     */
    private SchoolTeaInfo createSchoolTeaInfo(XkpPerson xkpPerson) {
        SchoolTeaInfo schoolTeaInfo = new SchoolTeaInfo();
        SysDeptHandle dept = handleXkpDeptMapper.selectByFullDeptCode(xkpPerson.getDeptCode());
        if (dept != null) {
            schoolTeaInfo.setUserDeptId(dept.getDeptId());
            schoolTeaInfo.setUserDeptName(dept.getDeptName());
        }
        return schoolTeaInfo;
    }
    /**
     * 创建学生信息对象并设置部门ID
     */
    private SchoolStuInfo createSchoolStuInfo(XkpPerson xkpPerson) {
        SchoolStuInfo schoolStuInfo = new SchoolStuInfo();
        SysDeptHandle dept = handleXkpDeptMapper.selectByFullDeptCode(xkpPerson.getDeptCode());
        if (dept != null) {
            schoolStuInfo.setStuDeptId(dept.getDeptId());
            schoolStuInfo.setStuDeptName(dept.getDeptName());
        }
        schoolStuInfo.setDataSources("1");
        return schoolStuInfo;
    }
    /**
     * 设置人员基本信息
     */
    private void setBasicPersonInfo(SchoolTeaInfo schoolTeaInfo, XkpPerson xkpPerson) {
        schoolTeaInfo.setTeaUserName(xkpPerson.getName());
        schoolTeaInfo.setTeaUserNum(xkpPerson.getOutid());
        schoolTeaInfo.setPhoneNum(xkpPerson.getPhone());
        schoolTeaInfo.setIdCard(xkpPerson.getSfzh());
    }
    /**
     * 设置学生人员基本信息
     */
    private void setStuPersonInfo(SchoolStuInfo schoolStuInfo, XkpPerson xkpPerson) {
        schoolStuInfo.setStuName(xkpPerson.getName());
        schoolStuInfo.setStuNum(xkpPerson.getOutid());
        schoolStuInfo.setPhoneNum(xkpPerson.getPhone());
        schoolStuInfo.setIdCard(xkpPerson.getSfzh());
        schoolStuInfo.setDataSources("1");
    }
    /**
     * 处理人员照片
     */
    private String handlePersonPhoto(XkpPerson xkpPerson) throws IOException {
        String url = null;
        if (xkpPerson.getPhotobase64() != null && xkpPerson.getPhotobase64().length > 0) {
            String fileName = xkpPerson.getOutid() + ".jpg";
            MultipartFile multipartFile = convert(xkpPerson.getPhotobase64(), fileName);
            // 老师学生用同一个方法
            url = schoolTeaInfoService.uploadAndCompressImage(multipartFile, fileName);
        }
        return url;
    }
    /**
     * 根据部门代码获取部门ID
     */
    private SysDeptHandle getDepartmentId(String deptCode) {
        List<String> deptCodes = splitDeptCode(deptCode);
        if (deptCodes.isEmpty()) {
            return null;
        }
        // 查询一级组织
        SysDeptHandle level1Dept = handleXkpDeptMapper.selectSysDeptHandleByDeptCode(deptCodes.get(0), 100L);
        if (level1Dept == null) {
            return null;
        }
        // 根据部门层级逐级查询
        SysDeptHandle currentDept = level1Dept;
        for (int i = 1; i < deptCodes.size(); i++) {
            currentDept = handleXkpDeptMapper.selectSysDeptHandleByParentIdAndDeptCode(
                    currentDept.getDeptId(), deptCodes.get(i));
            if (currentDept == null) {
                return null;
            }
        }
        return currentDept;
    }
    /**
     * 拆分部门代码（每3个字符一组）
     */
    private List<String> splitDeptCode(String deptCode) {
        List<String> result = new ArrayList<>();
        if (deptCode == null) {
            return result;
        }
        for (int i = 0; i < deptCode.length(); i += 3) {
            int end = Math.min(i + 3, deptCode.length());
            result.add(deptCode.substring(i, end));
        }
        return result;
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.xinkaipu.sync.controller;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.controller.BaseController;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult;
import com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.xinkaipu.abutment.domain.PersonInfo;
import com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.xinkaipu.abutment.server.AIfaceApiUtils;
import com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.xinkaipu.abutment.server.AifaceRetData;
import com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.xinkaipu.sync.service.ISyncPersonDataService;
import com.google.gson.Gson;
import com.google.gson.JsonArray;
import com.google.gson.JsonObject;
import com.google.gson.reflect.TypeToken;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.GetMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RestController;
import java.io.IOException;
import java.util.*;
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/xinkaipu")
public class SyncPersonDataController extends BaseController {
    @Autowired
    private ISyncPersonDataService syncPersonDataService;
    /**
     * 获取新开普人员信息
     *
     * @return
     */
    @GetMapping("/getPersonData")
    public AjaxResult getPersonData() throws IOException {
        syncPersonDataService.getPersonData();
        return AjaxResult.success();
    }
    /**
     * 同步获取人员数据
     * @return
     */
    @GetMapping("/xinkaipu")
    public AjaxResult xinkaipu() {
        String outid = "421024404021";
        Long ver = 0L;
        int pagesize = 100;
        try {
            AifaceRetData aifaceRetData = AIfaceApiUtils.getpersons(outid, ver, pagesize);
            JsonObject jsonObject = aifaceRetData.getRetdata();
            JsonArray personsArray = jsonObject.getAsJsonArray("persons");
            Gson gson = new Gson();
            List<Map> personInfos = gson.fromJson(personsArray, new TypeToken<List<Map>>() {
            }.getType());
            return AjaxResult.success(personInfos);
        } catch (Exception e) {
            System.out.println(e.getMessage());
            return AjaxResult.error(e.getMessage());
        }
    }
}

/**
 * 同步新开普人员数据Service
 *
 * @author lougang
 * @date 2025-8-20
 */
@Slf4j
@Service
public class SyncPersonDataServiceImpl implements ISyncPersonDataService {
    @Autowired
    private IXkpPersonService iXkpPersonService;
    @Autowired
    private IXkpErrorLogService xkpErrorLogService;
    @Autowired
    private IXkpChangesService xkpChangesService;
    @Autowired
    private IHandleXkpPersonService handleXkpPersonService;
    @Autowired
    private IHandleXkpDeptService handleXkpDeptService;
    /**
     * 同步获取人员数据
     *
     * @return
     */
    @Override
    public void getPersonData() {
        log.info("开始同步新开普人员数据");
        // 预加载本地人员 + 部门信息到内存（只加载一次）
        List<XkpPerson> localList = iXkpPersonService.selectXkpPersonList(new XkpPerson());
        Map<String, XkpPerson> localMap = localList.stream()
                .filter(p -> StringUtils.isNotBlank(p.getOutid()))
                .collect(Collectors.toMap(XkpPerson::getOutid, p -> p, (a, b) -> a));
        log.info("预加载本地人员数据完毕，共计：{}", localList.size());
        List<SysDeptHandle> sysDeptHandleList = handleXkpDeptService.handlerAllList();
        Map<String, SysDeptHandle> sysDeptHandleMap = sysDeptHandleList.stream()
                .collect(Collectors.toMap(SysDeptHandle::getFullDeptCode, d -> d, (a, b) -> a));
        String outid = "";
        int pageSize = 500;
        Long ver = 0L;
        int total = 0;
        int addCount = 0;
        int updateCount = 0;
        int deleteCount = 0;
        for (int page = 0; page < 1000; page++) {
            try {
                log.info("开始处理第 {} 页数据", page);
                AifaceRetData ret = AIfaceApiUtils.getpersons(outid, ver, pageSize);
                JsonArray personsArray = ret.getRetdata().getAsJsonArray("persons");
                List<PersonInfo> personInfos = new Gson().fromJson(
                        personsArray, new TypeToken<List<PersonInfo>>() {
                        }.getType());
                log.info("第{}页，返回数据{}条", page, personInfos.size());
                if (personInfos.isEmpty()) {
                    break;
                }
                // 更新 ver
                ver = personInfos.stream()
                        .mapToLong(PersonInfo::getVer)
                        .max()
                        .orElse(ver);
                total += personInfos.size();
                // 对当前页数据逐条处理（新增/更新）
                for (PersonInfo remotePerson : personInfos) {
                    XkpPerson local = localMap.remove(remotePerson.getOutid());
                    log.debug("处理人员数据：{}", local);
                    if (local == null) {
                        // 新增
                        XkpPerson xkpPerson = convertToXkpPerson(remotePerson, sysDeptHandleMap);
                        iXkpPersonService.insertXkpPerson(xkpPerson);
                        logChange("1", "1", new Gson().toJson(remotePerson), null);
                        try {
                            handleXkpPersonService.handlerAddPerson(xkpPerson);
                        } catch (Exception e) {
                            logError("1", e, "新增人员处理失败: " + xkpPerson.getOutid());
                        }
                        addCount++;
                    } else {
                        // 更新
                        XkpPerson updated = convertToXkpPerson(remotePerson, sysDeptHandleMap);
                        updated.setId(local.getId());
                        iXkpPersonService.updateXkpPerson(updated);
                        logChange("1", "2", new Gson().toJson(remotePerson), new Gson().toJson(local));
                        try {
                            handleXkpPersonService.handlerUpdatePerson(updated);
                        } catch (Exception e) {
                            logError("1", e, "更新人员处理失败: " + updated.getOutid());
                        }
                        updateCount++;
                    }
                    // 如果 remotePerson 里有大照片字段，处理完就清理掉引用、释放内存
                    remotePerson.setPhotobase64(null);
                }
            } catch (Exception e) {
                log.error("处理新开普人员数据时发生错误: " + e.getMessage(), e);
            }
        }
        //  循环结束后，localMap 中剩下的就是“远端不存在=需要删除”的人员
        for (XkpPerson deleted : localMap.values()) {
            iXkpPersonService.deleteXkpPersonById(deleted.getId());
            logChange("1", "3", null, new Gson().toJson(deleted));
            handleXkpPersonService.handlerDeletePerson(deleted);
        }
        log.info("新开普人员同步完毕，新增：{}，更新：{}，删除：{}，总计：{}", addCount, updateCount, deleteCount, total);
    }
    /**
     * 获取所有人员数据
     */
    private List<PersonInfo> fetchAllPersonData() {
        List<PersonInfo> allPersons = new ArrayList<>();
        String outid = "";
        int pagesize = 500;
        Long ver = 0L;
        for (int page = 0; page < 1000; page++) { // 设置合理上限
            try {
                AifaceRetData aifaceRetData = AIfaceApiUtils.getpersons(outid, ver, pagesize);
                JsonObject jsonObject = aifaceRetData.getRetdata();
                JsonArray personsArray = jsonObject.getAsJsonArray("persons");
                List<PersonInfo> personInfos = new Gson().fromJson(
                        personsArray,
                        new TypeToken<List<PersonInfo>>() {
                        }.getType()
                );
                if (personInfos.isEmpty()) {
                    break;
                }
                allPersons.addAll(personInfos);
                // 更新版本号
                ver = personInfos.stream()
                        .mapToLong(PersonInfo::getVer)
                        .max()
                        .orElse(ver);
            } catch (Exception e) {
                logError("1", e, "调用及转换新开普接口报错");
                break;
            }
        }
        return allPersons;
    }
    /**
     * 处理人员数据变更
     */
    private void processPersonDataChanges(List<PersonInfo> allPersons) {
        // 获取所有原始数据
        List<XkpPerson> xkpPersonList = iXkpPersonService.selectXkpPersonList(new XkpPerson());
        // 获取差异化数据
        CollectionCompareUtils.CompareResult<PersonInfo, XkpPerson> compareResult = CollectionCompareUtils.compareCollections(allPersons, xkpPersonList);
        // 查询部门数据
        List<SysDeptHandle> sysDeptHandleList = handleXkpDeptService.handlerAllList();
        //以fullDeptCode为key
        Map<String, SysDeptHandle> sysDeptHandleMap = sysDeptHandleList.stream().collect(Collectors.toMap(SysDeptHandle::getFullDeptCode, item -> item, (key1, key2) -> key1));
        // 批量处理数据变更
        processAddedPersons(compareResult.getAddedData(), sysDeptHandleMap);
        processUpdatedPersons(compareResult.getUpdatedData(), sysDeptHandleMap);
        processDeletedPersons(compareResult.getDeletedData());
    }
    /**
     * 处理新增人员
     */
    private void processAddedPersons(List<PersonInfo> addedPersons, Map<String, SysDeptHandle> sysDeptHandleMap) {
        System.out.println("新增人员信息，共计：" + addedPersons.size());
        for (PersonInfo person : addedPersons) {
            try {
                XkpPerson xkpPerson = convertToXkpPerson(person, sysDeptHandleMap);
                iXkpPersonService.insertXkpPerson(xkpPerson);
                logChange("1", "1", new Gson().toJson(person), null);
                handleXkpPersonService.handlerAddPerson(xkpPerson);
            } catch (Exception e) {
                logError("1", e, "新增人员处理失败: " + person.getOutid());
            }
        }
    }
    /**
     * 处理更新人员
     */
    private void processUpdatedPersons(List<PersonInfo> updatedPersons, Map<String, SysDeptHandle> sysDeptHandleMap) {
        System.out.println("修改人员信息，共计：" + updatedPersons.size());
        for (PersonInfo person : updatedPersons) {
            try {
                XkpPerson existingPerson = iXkpPersonService.selectXkpPersonByOutId(person.getOutid());
                if (existingPerson == null) {
                    continue;
                }
                XkpPerson updatedXkpPerson = convertToXkpPerson(person, sysDeptHandleMap);
                updatedXkpPerson.setId(existingPerson.getId()); // 保持ID不变
                iXkpPersonService.updateXkpPerson(updatedXkpPerson);
                logChange("1", "2", new Gson().toJson(person), new Gson().toJson(existingPerson));
                handleXkpPersonService.handlerUpdatePerson(updatedXkpPerson);
            } catch (Exception e) {
                logError("1", e, "更新人员处理失败: " + person.getOutid());
            }
        }
    }
    /**
     * 处理删除人员
     */
    private void processDeletedPersons(List<XkpPerson> deletedPersons) {
        System.out.println("删除人员信息，共计：" + deletedPersons.size());
        for (XkpPerson person : deletedPersons) {
            try {
                iXkpPersonService.deleteXkpPersonById(person.getId());
                logChange("1", "3", null, new Gson().toJson(person));
                handleXkpPersonService.handlerDeletePerson(person);
            } catch (Exception e) {
                logError("1", e, "删除人员处理失败: " + person.getOutid());
            }
        }
    }
    /**
     * PersonInfo 转 XkpPerson
     */
    private XkpPerson convertToXkpPerson(PersonInfo personInfo, Map<String, SysDeptHandle> sysDeptHandleMap) {
        XkpPerson xkpPerson = new XkpPerson();
        xkpPerson.setOutid(personInfo.getOutid());
        xkpPerson.setName(personInfo.getName());
        xkpPerson.setSfzh(personInfo.getSfzh());
        xkpPerson.setDept(personInfo.getDept());
        xkpPerson.setPhone(personInfo.getPhone());
        xkpPerson.setPhotostatus(personInfo.getPhotostatus());
        xkpPerson.setDeptId(personInfo.getDeptid());
        xkpPerson.setDeptCode(personInfo.getDeptcode());
        xkpPerson.setStatus(personInfo.getStatus());
        xkpPerson.setVer(String.valueOf(personInfo.getVer()));
        if (personInfo.getPhotobase64() != null) {
            byte[] imageData = Base64.getDecoder().decode(personInfo.getPhotobase64());
            xkpPerson.setPhotobase64(imageData);
        } else {
            xkpPerson.setPhotobase64(null);
        }
        SysDeptHandle sysDeptHandle = sysDeptHandleMap.getOrDefault(personInfo.getDeptcode(), new SysDeptHandle());
        xkpPerson.setPersonType(sysDeptHandle.getDeptType());
        return xkpPerson;
    }
    /**
     * 记录变更日志
     */
    private void logChange(String type, String changeType, String xkpData, String databaseData) {
        XkpChanges xkpChanges = new XkpChanges();
        xkpChanges.setType(type);
        xkpChanges.setChangeType(changeType);
        xkpChanges.setXkpData(xkpData);
        xkpChanges.setDatabaseData(databaseData);
        xkpChanges.setCreateTime(new Date());
        xkpChangesService.insertXkpChanges(xkpChanges);
    }
    /**
     * 记录错误日志
     */
    private void logError(String type, Exception e, String remark) {
        XkpErrorLog xkpErrorLog = new XkpErrorLog();
        xkpErrorLog.setType(type);
        xkpErrorLog.setErrorLog(ExceptionUtils.getStackTrace(e)); // 使用完整堆栈
        xkpErrorLog.setRemark(remark);
        xkpErrorLogService.insertXkpErrorLog(xkpErrorLog);
        // 同时输出到控制台
        log.error(remark + ": " + e.getMessage());
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.xinkaipu.sync.service;
import java.io.IOException;
/**
 * 同步新开普人员数据Service
 *
 * @author lougang
 * @date 2025-8-20
 */
public interface ISyncPersonDataService {
    /**
     * 同步获取人员数据
     * @return

    void getPersonData() throws IOException;
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.xinkaipu.sync.utils;
import com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.xinkaipu.abutment.domain.PersonInfo;
import com.chenrise.jufe.abutment.xinkaipu.data.domain.XkpPerson;
import lombok.AllArgsConstructor;
import lombok.Data;
import lombok.NoArgsConstructor;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.Objects;
import java.util.function.Function;
import java.util.stream.Collectors;
public class CollectionCompareUtils {
    /**
     * 比较两个集合的差异
     * @param allPersons 新数据集合
     * @param xkpPersonList 数据库现有数据集合
     * @return 差异结果对象
     */
    public static CompareResult<PersonInfo, XkpPerson> compareCollections(
            List<PersonInfo> allPersons,
            List<XkpPerson> xkpPersonList) {
        CompareResult<PersonInfo, XkpPerson> result = new CompareResult<>();
        // 1. 转换为Map以便快速查找
        Map<String, PersonInfo> newDataMap = allPersons.stream()
                .collect(Collectors.toMap(PersonInfo::getOutid, Function.identity()));
        Map<String, XkpPerson> oldDataMap = xkpPersonList.stream()
                .collect(Collectors.toMap(XkpPerson::getOutid, Function.identity()));
        // 2. 找出新增的数据（在新集合中但不在旧集合中）
        result.setAddedData(allPersons.stream()
                .filter(person -> !oldDataMap.containsKey(person.getOutid()))
                .collect(Collectors.toList()));
        // 3. 找出删除的数据（在旧集合中但不在新集合中）
        result.setDeletedData(xkpPersonList.stream()
                .filter(xkpPerson -> !newDataMap.containsKey(xkpPerson.getOutid()))
                .collect(Collectors.toList()));
        // 4. 找出需要更新的数据（在两个集合中都存在但内容不同）
        result.setUpdatedData(allPersons.stream()
                .filter(person -> oldDataMap.containsKey(person.getOutid()))
                .filter(person -> !isSamePerson(person, oldDataMap.get(person.getOutid())))
                .collect(Collectors.toList()));
        return result;
    }
    /**
     * 判断两个对象是否相同（根据业务需求自定义比较逻辑）
     */
    private static boolean isSamePerson(PersonInfo personInfo, XkpPerson xkpPerson) {
        return Objects.equals(personInfo.getOutid(), xkpPerson.getOutid()) &&
               Objects.equals(personInfo.getName(), xkpPerson.getName());
        // 可以根据需要添加更多字段比较
    }
    /**
     * 差异结果封装类
     */
    @Data
    @AllArgsConstructor
    @NoArgsConstructor
    public static class CompareResult<T, U> {
        private List<T> addedData;      // 新增的数据
        private List<U> deletedData;    // 删除的数据
        private List<T> updatedData;    // 需要更新的数据
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.aspect;
import java.lang.annotation.*;
/**
 * @Description 切面
 * @Author sunMing
 * @Date 2024-01-18 13:06:00
 */
@Target(ElementType.METHOD)
@Retention(RetentionPolicy.RUNTIME)
@Documented
public  @interface ApplyAddScope {
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.aspect;
import cn.hutool.json.JSONObject;
import cn.hutool.json.JSONUtil;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.StringUtils;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.BaseEntity;
import com.chenrise.common.security.utils.SecurityUtils;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.Bo.AssetsApplyInfoBo;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.enums.FromTypeEnum;
import com.chenrise.system.api.RemoteUserService;
import com.chenrise.system.api.domain.SysUser;
import com.chenrise.system.api.model.LoginUser;
import org.aspectj.lang.JoinPoint;
import org.aspectj.lang.annotation.Aspect;
import org.aspectj.lang.annotation.Before;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Component;
/**
 * @Description 处理切面
 * @Author sunMing
 * @Date 2024-01-18 13:13:00
 */
@Aspect
@Component
public class ApplyAddScopeAspect {
    @Autowired
    private RemoteUserService remoteUserService;
    @Before("@annotation(applyAddScope)")
    public void doBefore(JoinPoint point, ApplyAddScope applyAddScope) {
        handleDataScope(point, applyAddScope);
    }
    protected void handleDataScope(final JoinPoint joinPoint, ApplyAddScope applyAddScope) {
        // 获取当前的用户
        LoginUser loginUser = SecurityUtils.getLoginUser();
        SysUser currentUser = loginUser.getSysUser();
        dataScopeFilter(joinPoint, currentUser);
    }
    /**
     * 数据范围过滤
     *
     * @param joinPoint 切点
     * @param user      用户
     */
    public void dataScopeFilter(JoinPoint joinPoint, SysUser user) {
        Object params = joinPoint.getArgs()[0];
        if (StringUtils.isNotNull(params) && params instanceof BaseEntity) {
            AssetsApplyInfoBo applyInfo = (AssetsApplyInfoBo) params;
            if (applyInfo.getFromType() == null || !FromTypeEnum.WEB.getValue().equals(applyInfo.getFromType())) {
                applyInfo.setApplyUserId(user.getUserId());
            }
            if (applyInfo.getTransferUserId() != null) {
                AjaxResult ajaxResult = remoteUserService.getUser(applyInfo.getTransferUserId());
                if (ajaxResult.isError()) {
                    throw new RuntimeException("获取用户信息失败");
                }
                JSONObject jsonObject = JSONUtil.parseObj(ajaxResult);
                SysUser sysUser = JSONUtil.toBean(JSONUtil.toJsonStr(jsonObject.get(AjaxResult.DATA_TAG)), SysUser.class);
                applyInfo.setTransferUserName(sysUser.getNickName());
                applyInfo.setTransferDeptId(sysUser.getDept().getDeptId());
                applyInfo.setTransferDeptName(sysUser.getDept().getDeptName());
            }
        }
    }
}

package com.chenrise.jufe.config;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Value;
import org.springframework.context.annotation.Configuration;
import org.springframework.web.servlet.config.annotation.CorsRegistry;
import org.springframework.web.servlet.config.annotation.EnableWebMvc;
import org.springframework.web.servlet.config.annotation.ResourceHandlerRegistry;
import org.springframework.web.servlet.config.annotation.WebMvcConfigurer;
import javax.annotation.PostConstruct;
@Configuration
public class JufeResourceConfig implements WebMvcConfigurer {
    @Value("${file.path}")
    private String localFilePath;
    @Value("${file.prefix}")
    private String localFilePrefix;
    @PostConstruct
    public void checkPath() {
        System.out.println("【资源路径】" + localFilePath);
        System.out.println("【URL前缀】" + localFilePrefix);
    }
    @Override
    public void addResourceHandlers(ResourceHandlerRegistry registry) {
        System.err.println("【DEBUG】addResourceHandlers() 被调用了！");
        String normalizedPath = localFilePath.replace("\\", "/");
        registry.addResourceHandler(localFilePrefix + "/**")
                .addResourceLocations("file:" + normalizedPath + "/");
    }
    @Override
    public void addCorsMappings(CorsRegistry registry) {
        registry.addMapping(localFilePrefix + "/**")
                .allowedOrigins("*")
                .allowedMethods("GET");
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.config;
import cn.binarywang.wx.miniapp.api.WxMaService;
import cn.binarywang.wx.miniapp.api.impl.WxMaServiceImpl;
import cn.binarywang.wx.miniapp.config.impl.WxMaDefaultConfigImpl;
import me.chanjar.weixin.common.error.WxRuntimeException;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.boot.context.properties.EnableConfigurationProperties;
import org.springframework.context.annotation.Configuration;
import javax.annotation.PostConstruct;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.stream.Collectors;
/**
 * 微信小程序配置
 *
 * @author 曹宝金
 */
@Configuration
@EnableConfigurationProperties(WxMaProperties.class)
public class WxMaConfig {
    private final WxMaProperties properties;
    private static Map<String, WxMaService> services;
    @Autowired
    public WxMaConfig(WxMaProperties properties) {
        this.properties = properties;
    }
    /**
     * 获取服务
     *
     * @param appId 小程序appId
     * @return 服务
     **/
    public static WxMaService getService(String appId) {
        WxMaService service = services.get(appId);
        if (service == null) {
            throw new IllegalArgumentException(String.format("appId=[%s]的配置，请核实！", appId));
        }
        return service;
    }
    @PostConstruct
    public void init() {
        List<WxMaProperties.Config> configs = this.properties.getConfigs();
        if (configs == null) {
            throw new WxRuntimeException("大哥，拜托先添加下相关配置，注意别配错了！");
        }
        services = configs.stream()
                .map(a -> {
                    WxMaDefaultConfigImpl config = new WxMaDefaultConfigImpl();
                    config.setAppid(a.getAppId());
                    config.setSecret(a.getSecret());
                    config.setToken(a.getToken());
                    config.setAesKey(a.getAesKey());
                    config.setMsgDataFormat(a.getMsgDataFormat());
                    WxMaService service = new WxMaServiceImpl();
                    service.setWxMaConfig(config);
                    return service;
                }).collect(Collectors.toMap(s -> s.getWxMaConfig().getAppid(), a -> a));
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.config;
import cn.binarywang.wx.miniapp.api.WxMaService;
import cn.binarywang.wx.miniapp.api.impl.WxMaServiceImpl;
import cn.binarywang.wx.miniapp.bean.WxMaKefuMessage;
import cn.binarywang.wx.miniapp.bean.WxMaSubscribeMessage;
import cn.binarywang.wx.miniapp.config.impl.WxMaDefaultConfigImpl;
import cn.binarywang.wx.miniapp.message.WxMaMessageHandler;
import cn.binarywang.wx.miniapp.message.WxMaMessageRouter;
import com.google.common.collect.Lists;
import com.google.common.collect.Maps;
import me.chanjar.weixin.common.bean.result.WxMediaUploadResult;
import me.chanjar.weixin.common.error.WxErrorException;
import me.chanjar.weixin.common.error.WxRuntimeException;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.boot.context.properties.EnableConfigurationProperties;
import org.springframework.context.annotation.Configuration;
import javax.annotation.PostConstruct;
import java.io.File;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.stream.Collectors;
@Configuration
@EnableConfigurationProperties(WxMaProperties.class)
public class WxMaConfiguration {
    private final WxMaProperties properties;
    private static final Map<String, WxMaMessageRouter> routers = Maps.newHashMap();
    private static Map<String, WxMaService> maServices;
    @Autowired
    public WxMaConfiguration(WxMaProperties properties) {
        this.properties = properties;
    }
    public static WxMaService getMaService(String appid) {
        WxMaService wxService = maServices.get(appid);
        if (wxService == null) {
            throw new IllegalArgumentException(String.format("未找到对应appid=[%s]的配置，请核实！", appid));
        }
        return wxService;
    }
    public static WxMaMessageRouter getRouter(String appid) {
        return routers.get(appid);
    }
    @PostConstruct
    public void init() {
        List<WxMaProperties.Config> configs = this.properties.getConfigs();
        if (configs == null) {
            throw new WxRuntimeException("大哥，拜托先看下项目首页的说明（readme文件），添加下相关配置，注意别配错了！");
        }
        maServices = configs.stream()
                .map(a -> {
                    WxMaDefaultConfigImpl config = new WxMaDefaultConfigImpl();
//                WxMaDefaultConfigImpl config = new WxMaRedisConfigImpl(new JedisPool());
                    // 使用上面的配置时，需要同时引入jedis-lock的依赖，否则会报类无法找到的异常
                    config.setAppid(a.getAppId());
                    config.setSecret(a.getSecret());
                    config.setToken(a.getToken());
                    config.setAesKey(a.getAesKey());
                    config.setMsgDataFormat(a.getMsgDataFormat());
                    WxMaService service = new WxMaServiceImpl();
                    service.setWxMaConfig(config);
                    routers.put(a.getAppId(), this.newRouter(service));
                    return service;
                }).collect(Collectors.toMap(s -> s.getWxMaConfig().getAppid(), a -> a));
    }
    private WxMaMessageRouter newRouter(WxMaService service) {
        final WxMaMessageRouter router = new WxMaMessageRouter(service);
        router
                .rule().handler(logHandler).next()
                .rule().async(false).content("订阅消息").handler(subscribeMsgHandler).end()
                .rule().async(false).content("文本").handler(textHandler).end()
                .rule().async(false).content("图片").handler(picHandler).end()
                .rule().async(false).content("二维码").handler(qrcodeHandler).end();
        return router;
    }
    private final WxMaMessageHandler subscribeMsgHandler = (wxMessage, context, service, sessionManager) -> {
        service.getMsgService().sendSubscribeMsg(WxMaSubscribeMessage.builder()
                .templateId("此处更换为自己的模板id")
                .data(Lists.newArrayList(
                        new WxMaSubscribeMessage.MsgData("keyword1", "339208499")))
                .toUser(wxMessage.getFromUser())
                .build());
        return null;
    };
    private final WxMaMessageHandler logHandler = (wxMessage, context, service, sessionManager) -> {
        //log.info("收到消息：" + wxMessage.toString());
        service.getMsgService().sendKefuMsg(WxMaKefuMessage.newTextBuilder().content("收到信息为：" + wxMessage.toJson())
                .toUser(wxMessage.getFromUser()).build());
        return null;
    };
    private final WxMaMessageHandler textHandler = (wxMessage, context, service, sessionManager) -> {
        service.getMsgService().sendKefuMsg(WxMaKefuMessage.newTextBuilder().content("回复文本消息")
                .toUser(wxMessage.getFromUser()).build());
        return null;
    };
    private final WxMaMessageHandler picHandler = (wxMessage, context, service, sessionManager) -> {
        try {
            WxMediaUploadResult uploadResult = service.getMediaService()
                    .uploadMedia("image", "png",
                            ClassLoader.getSystemResourceAsStream("tmp.png"));
            service.getMsgService().sendKefuMsg(
                    WxMaKefuMessage
                            .newImageBuilder()
                            .mediaId(uploadResult.getMediaId())
                            .toUser(wxMessage.getFromUser())
                            .build());
        } catch (WxErrorException e) {
            e.printStackTrace();
        }
        return null;
    };
    private final WxMaMessageHandler qrcodeHandler = (wxMessage, context, service, sessionManager) -> {
        try {
            final File file = service.getQrcodeService().createQrcode("123", 430);
            WxMediaUploadResult uploadResult = service.getMediaService().uploadMedia("image", file);
            service.getMsgService().sendKefuMsg(
                    WxMaKefuMessage
                            .newImageBuilder()
                            .mediaId(uploadResult.getMediaId())
                            .toUser(wxMessage.getFromUser())
                            .build());
        } catch (WxErrorException e) {
            e.printStackTrace();
        }
        return null;
    };
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.config;
import org.apache.commons.lang3.builder.ToStringBuilder;
import org.apache.commons.lang3.builder.ToStringStyle;
import org.springframework.boot.context.properties.ConfigurationProperties;
import java.util.List;
/**
 * 微信小程序属性
 *
 * @author 曹宝金
 */
@ConfigurationProperties(prefix = "wx.miniapp")
public class WxMaProperties {
    /**
     * 配置列表
     **/
    private List<Config> configs;
    public List<Config> getConfigs() {
        return configs;
    }
    public void setConfigs(List<Config> configs) {
        this.configs = configs;
    }
    /**
     * 配置
     **/
    public static class Config {
        /**
         * 设置微信小程序的appId
         */
        private String appId;
        /**
         * 设置微信小程序的Secret
         */
        private String secret;
        /**
         * 设置微信小程序消息服务器配置的token
         */
        private String token;
        /**
         * 设置微信小程序消息服务器配置的EncodingAESKey
         */
        private String aesKey;
        /**
         * 消息格式，XML或者JSON
         */
        private String msgDataFormat;
        public String getAppId() {
            return appId;
        }
        public void setAppId(String appId) {
            this.appId = appId;
        }
        public String getSecret() {
            return secret;
        }
        public void setSecret(String secret) {
            this.secret = secret;
        }
        public String getToken() {
            return token;
        }
        public void setToken(String token) {
            this.token = token;
        }
        public String getAesKey() {
            return aesKey;
        }
        public void setAesKey(String aesKey) {
            this.aesKey = aesKey;
        }
        public String getMsgDataFormat() {
            return msgDataFormat;
        }
        public void setMsgDataFormat(String msgDataFormat) {
            this.msgDataFormat = msgDataFormat;
        }
        @Override
        public String toString() {
            return new ToStringBuilder(this, ToStringStyle.MULTI_LINE_STYLE)
                    .append("appId", getAppId())
                    .append("secret", getSecret())
                    .append("token", getToken())
                    .append("aesKey", getAesKey())
                    .append("msgDataFormat", getMsgDataFormat())
                    .toString();
        }
    }
}

    @GetMapping(value = "/reservation/getCountGroupByStatus")
    public AjaxResult getCountGroupByStatus(SchoolReservationInfo schoolReservationInfo)
    {
        Map<String,Object> result = new HashMap<>();
        result.put("count",0);
        result.put("count1",0);
        result.put("count2",0);
        result.put("count3",0);
        result.put("count4",0);
        result.put("count5",0);
        List<Map<String,Object>> list = schoolReservationInfoService.selectCountGroupByStatus(schoolReservationInfo);
        for(Map<String,Object> map:list){
            if(map.get("approvalStatus")!=null&&"all".equals(map.get("approvalStatus"))){
                result.put("count",map.get("count"));
            }
            if(map.get("approvalStatus")!=null&&"1".equals(map.get("approvalStatus"))){
                result.put("count1",map.get("count"));
            }
            if(map.get("approvalStatus")!=null&&"2".equals(map.get("approvalStatus"))){
                result.put("count2",map.get("count"));
            }
            if(map.get("approvalStatus")!=null&&"3".equals(map.get("approvalStatus"))){
                result.put("count3",map.get("count"));
            }
            if(map.get("approvalStatus")!=null&&"4".equals(map.get("approvalStatus"))){
                result.put("count4",map.get("count"));
            }
            if(map.get("approvalStatus")!=null&&"5".equals(map.get("approvalStatus"))){
                result.put("count5",map.get("count"));
            }
        }
        return success(result);
    }
    /**
     *
     * @Description: 可预约教室列表
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/09
     *
     * @return {@link TableDataInfo }
     */
    @GetMapping("/reservation/getRooms")
    public TableDataInfo getRooms(Long locationId,String isReservation,String roomUseable,String roomName,String applyDate)
    {
        SchoolRoom sr = new SchoolRoom();
        sr.setIsReservation(isReservation);
        sr.setRoomUseable(roomUseable);
        sr.setRoomName(roomName);
        sr.setLocationId(locationId);
        sr.getParams().put("applyDate",applyDate);
        List<SchoolRoom> rooms = schoolRoomService.selectRoomList(sr);
        List<SchoolRoom> list = new ArrayList<>();
        Calendar now = Calendar.getInstance();
        now.setTime(DateUtil.parseDate(applyDate));
        for(SchoolRoom s:rooms){
            SchoolRoomUseTime sru_query = new SchoolRoomUseTime();
            sru_query.setRoomId(s.getRoomId());
            //一周第一天是否为星期天
            boolean isFirstSunday = (now.getFirstDayOfWeek() == Calendar.SUNDAY);
            //获取周几
            int weekDay = DateUtil.dayOfWeek(DateUtil.parseDate(applyDate));
            //若一周第一天为星期天，则-1
            if(isFirstSunday){
                weekDay = weekDay - 1;
//                if(weekDay == 0){
//                    weekDay = 7;
//                }
            }
            sru_query.setWeekDay(weekDay+"");
            List<SchoolRoomUseTime> roomUseTimes = roomUseTimeService.selectSchoolRoomUseTimeList(sru_query);
            if(roomUseTimes!=null&&roomUseTimes.size()>0){
                list.add(s);
            }
        }
        DictUtils.getDictName(list);
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     *
     * @Description:教室可预约详情

    }
    /**
     *
     查询预约信息列表
     * @Description: 查询预约信息列表
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/03
     * @param schoolReservationInfo
     * @return {@link TableDataInfo }
     */
    @GetMapping("/reservation/list")
    public TableDataInfo list(SchoolReservationInfo schoolReservationInfo)
    {
        startPage();
        List<SchoolReservationInfo> list = schoolReservationInfoService.selectSchoolReservationInfoList(schoolReservationInfo);
        for(SchoolReservationInfo s:list){
            SchoolReservationTimeInfo srt_query = new SchoolReservationTimeInfo();
            srt_query.setReservationId(s.getReservationId());
            List<SchoolReservationTimeInfo> srtList = timeInfoService.selectSchoolReservationTimeInfoList(srt_query);
            String [] arr = new String[srtList.size()];
            for(int i=0;i<srtList.size();i++){
                arr[i] = srtList.get(i).getReservationStartTime()+"~"+srtList.get(i).getReservationEndTime();
            }
            s.setTimeRanges(arr);
        }
        return getDataTable(list);
    }

        if(list!=null&&list.size()>0){
            return AjaxResult.success("true");
        }else{
            return AjaxResult.success("false");
        }
    }
    /**
     *
     * @Description: 开锁
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/10
     * @param  jsonObject
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @PostMapping("/reservation/openLock")
    public AjaxResult openLock(@RequestBody JSONObject jsonObject) throws ParseException, ServerException {
        SchoolReservationInfo sri = schoolReservationInfoService.selectSchoolReservationInfoByReservationId(jsonObject.getLong("reservationId"));
        Double latitude = jsonObject.getDouble("latitude");
        Double longitude = jsonObject.getDouble("longitude");
        SchoolReservationTimeInfo query = new SchoolReservationTimeInfo();
        query.setReservationId(sri.getReservationId());
        List<SchoolReservationTimeInfo> timeInfoList = timeInfoService.selectSchoolReservationTimeInfoList(query);
        SimpleDateFormat format = new SimpleDateFormat("yyyy-MM-dd");
        SimpleDateFormat format1 = new SimpleDateFormat("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss");
        Date now = new Date();
        Boolean flag = false;
        for(SchoolReservationTimeInfo srti:timeInfoList){
            Date start = format1.parse(format.format(sri.getReservationDate())+" "+srti.getReservationStartTime()+":00");
            Date end = format1.parse(format.format(sri.getReservationDate())+" "+srti.getReservationEndTime()+":59");
            if(now.getTime()>=start.getTime()&&now.getTime()<=end.getTime()){
                flag = true;
            }
        }
        if(!flag){
            throw new ServerException("未在预约时间内，不可开锁！");
        }
        //打开空开
//        Long[] roomIds = new Long[]{Long.valueOf(sri.getRoomId())};
//        schoolRoomService.updatePowerNode(null,2L,roomIds,null,"2",null);
        DevLockInfo dli = new DevLockInfo();
        dli.setRoomId(sri.getRoomId());
        dli.setIsUsable("0");
        List<DevLockInfo> list = devLockInfoService.selectDevLockInfoList(dli);
        for(DevLockInfo di:list){
            deviceCommandService.openLockById(di.getDeviceId(), "1", "1", "预约", 5 * 60L);
        }
        return success();
    }
    /**
     * @Description:蓝牙开锁校验
     * @param jsonObject
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     * @Author: CJH
     * @Updator: CJH
     * @Date 2024/6/20 12:54
     */
    @PostMapping("/reservation/openLockByBluetooth")
    public AjaxResult openLockByBluetooth(@RequestBody JSONObject jsonObject) throws ParseException, ServerException {
        SchoolReservationInfo sri = schoolReservationInfoService.selectSchoolReservationInfoByReservationId(jsonObject.getLong("reservationId"));
        SchoolReservationTimeInfo query = new SchoolReservationTimeInfo();
        query.setReservationId(sri.getReservationId());
        List<SchoolReservationTimeInfo> timeInfoList = timeInfoService.selectSchoolReservationTimeInfoList(query);
        SimpleDateFormat format = new SimpleDateFormat("yyyy-MM-dd");
        SimpleDateFormat format1 = new SimpleDateFormat("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss");
        Date now = new Date();
        Boolean flag = false;
        for(SchoolReservationTimeInfo srti:timeInfoList){
            Date start = format1.parse(format.format(sri.getReservationDate())+" "+srti.getReservationStartTime()+":00");
            Date end = format1.parse(format.format(sri.getReservationDate())+" "+srti.getReservationEndTime()+":59");
            if(now.getTime()>=start.getTime()&&now.getTime()<=end.getTime()){
                flag = true;
            }
        }
        if(!flag){
            throw new ServerException("未在预约时间内，不可开锁！");
        }
        return success();
    }
    /**
     *
     * @Description: 关锁
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/10
     * @param roomId
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @PostMapping("/reservation/closeLock/{roomId}")
    public AjaxResult closeLock(@PathVariable("roomId") Long roomId) {
        DevLockInfo dli = new DevLockInfo();
        dli.setRoomId(roomId);
        dli.setIsUsable("0");
        List<DevLockInfo> list = devLockInfoService.selectDevLockInfoList(dli);
        for(DevLockInfo di:list){
            String deviceType = di.getDeviceType();
            //1为V型锁，只有V型锁能常闭
            if(deviceType!=null&&deviceType.equals("1")){
                deviceCommandService.openLockById(di.getDeviceId(),"2","1","",0L);
            }
        }
        return success();
    }

     *
     * @Description: 校验是否教室负责人或楼栋负责人
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2023/02/03
     * @param userId
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @GetMapping(value = "/checkPrincipal/{userId}")
    public AjaxResult checkPrincipal(@PathVariable("userId") Long userId)
    {
        Boolean flag = false;
        /**
         * 查询是否教室负责人
         * */
        Integer count = chargeRefMapper.selectCountByUserId(userId);
        /**
         * 查询是否楼栋负责人
         * */
        Integer count1 = locationMapper.selectCountByUserId(userId);
        if(count>0||count1>0){
            flag = true;
        }
        return success(flag);
    }
