    @PostMapping(value = "/reservation/signReservation")
    public AjaxResult signReservation(@RequestBody JSONObject jsonObject) throws ServerException, ParseException {
        SchoolReservationInfo sri = schoolReservationInfoService.selectSchoolReservationInfoByReservationId(jsonObject.getLong("reservationId"));
        // 2026-01-07 由于app端签到接口未传经纬度，所以暂时关闭签到范围验证
        /*Double latitude = jsonObject.getDouble("latitude");
        Double longitude = jsonObject.getDouble("longitude");*/
        SchoolReservationTimeInfo query = new SchoolReservationTimeInfo();
        query.setReservationId(sri.getReservationId());
        List<SchoolReservationTimeInfo> timeInfoList = timeInfoService.selectSchoolReservationTimeInfoList(query);
        SimpleDateFormat format = new SimpleDateFormat("yyyy-MM-dd");
        SimpleDateFormat format1 = new SimpleDateFormat("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss");
        Date now = new Date();
        Boolean flag = false;
        for(SchoolReservationTimeInfo srti:timeInfoList){
            Date start = format1.parse(format.format(sri.getReservationDate())+" "+srti.getReservationStartTime()+":00");
            Date end = format1.parse(format.format(sri.getReservationDate())+" "+srti.getReservationEndTime()+":59");
            if(now.getTime()>=start.getTime()&&now.getTime()<=end.getTime()){
                flag = true;
            }
        }
        if(!flag){
            throw new ServerException("未在预约时间内，不可签到！");
        }
        DevLockInfo dli = new DevLockInfo();
        dli.setRoomId(sri.getRoomId());
        dli.setIsUsable("0");
        // 2026-01-07 由于app端签到接口未传经纬度，所以暂时关闭签到范围验证
        /*List<DevLockInfo> list = devLockInfoService.selectDevLockInfoList(dli);
        flag = false;
        for(DevLockInfo di:list){
            String []arr = di.getLatitude().split(",");
            boolean coordinateToDistance = coordinateToDistance(di.getOpenRange(),Double.parseDouble(arr[1]), Double.parseDouble(arr[0]), latitude, longitude);
            if (!coordinateToDistance) {
                flag = true;
            }
        }
        if(!flag){
            throw new ServerException("未在开锁范围内，不可签到！");
        }*/
        SchoolReservationInfo reservationInfo = new SchoolReservationInfo();
        reservationInfo.setReservationId(jsonObject.getLong("reservationId"));
        reservationInfo.setSignFlag("1");
        schoolReservationInfoService.updateSchoolReservationInfo(reservationInfo);
        return success();
    }
    /**
     * @Description:查询教室今日课程
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-04-24 13:41:28
     * @param
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo
     */
    @GetMapping("/listRoomClass")
    public TableDataInfo listRoomClass(Long roomId,Long classDay)
    {
        SchoolTimeSchedulingBo schoolTimeScheduling = new SchoolTimeSchedulingBo();
        schoolTimeScheduling.setRoomId(roomId);
        schoolTimeScheduling.setClassDay(classDay);
        List<SchoolTimeSchedulingBo> list = schoolTimeSchedulingService.selectListRoomClass(schoolTimeScheduling);
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     * @Description:修改课程黑名单状态
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-04-24 16:51:43
     * @param schoolTimeScheduling:
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @PostMapping("/updateRoomClassStatus")
    public AjaxResult updateRoomClassStatus(@RequestBody SchoolTimeSchedulingBo schoolTimeScheduling)
    {
        Integer count= schoolTimeSchedulingService.updateRoomClassStatus(schoolTimeScheduling);
        return AjaxResult.success(count);
    }
    @GetMapping("/roomInfo/{roomId}")
    public AjaxResult roomInfo(@PathVariable("roomId") Long roomId) {
        //获取室内设备信息
        SchoolRoom schoolRoom = schoolRoomService.selectSchoolRoomByRoomId(roomId);
        SchoolBaseSetInfo baseSetInfo = baseSetInfoMapper.selectSchoolBaseSetInfoById(1L);
        if(StringUtils.isNotEmpty(schoolRoom.getWdNum())){
            if(!"-".equals(schoolRoom.getWdNum())&&
                    (Float.parseFloat(schoolRoom.getWdNum())>baseSetInfo.getMaxWd()||
                            Float.parseFloat(schoolRoom.getWdNum())<baseSetInfo.getMinWd())){
                schoolRoom.setWdgj("Y");
            }else {
                schoolRoom.setWdgj("N");
            }
            if(!"-".equals(schoolRoom.getSdNum())&&
                    (Float.parseFloat(schoolRoom.getSdNum())>baseSetInfo.getMaxSd()||
                            Float.parseFloat(schoolRoom.getSdNum())<baseSetInfo.getMinSd())){
                schoolRoom.setSdgj("Y");
            }else {
                schoolRoom.setSdgj("N");
            }
            if(!"-".equals(schoolRoom.getPm25Num())&&
                    (Float.parseFloat(schoolRoom.getPm25Num())>baseSetInfo.getMaxPm1()||
                            Float.parseFloat(schoolRoom.getPm25Num())<baseSetInfo.getMinPm1())){
                schoolRoom.setPm25gj("Y");
            }else {
                schoolRoom.setPm25gj("N");
            }
            if(!"-".equals(schoolRoom.getPm10Num())&&
                    (Float.parseFloat(schoolRoom.getPm10Num())>baseSetInfo.getMaxPm2()||
                            Float.parseFloat(schoolRoom.getPm10Num())<baseSetInfo.getMinPm2())){
                schoolRoom.setPm10gj("Y");
            }else {
                schoolRoom.setPm10gj("N");
            }
        }
        return AjaxResult.success(schoolRoom);
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 获取基础设置
     * @param
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     * @Author: CJH
     * @Updator: CJH
     * @Date 2024/1/15 13:59
     */
    @GetMapping("/baseSetInfo")
    public AjaxResult baseSetInfo() {
        return AjaxResult.success(baseSetInfoMapper.selectSchoolBaseSetInfoById(1L));
    }
    /**
     * @Description:延时
     * @param timeScheduling
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     * @Author: CJH
     * @Updator: CJH
     * @Date 2024/1/15 13:59
     */
    @PostMapping("/delayNum")
    public AjaxResult delayNum(@RequestBody SchoolTimeScheduling timeScheduling)
    {
        return toAjax(schoolTimeSchedulingService.updateSchoolTimeScheduling(timeScheduling));
    }
    /**
     * @Description:移除黑名单
     * @param
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     * @Author: CJH
     * @Updator: CJH
     * @Date 2024/2/21 13:37
     */
    @PostMapping("/removeBlack")
    public AjaxResult removeBlack()
    {
        schoolBlackInfoService.removeBlack();
        return AjaxResult.success();
    }
    /**
     * 查询问题上报列表
     */
    @GetMapping("/report/list")
    public TableDataInfo list(SchoolReport schoolReport)
    {
        schoolReport.setCreateById(SecurityUtils.getUserId());
        startPage();
        List<SchoolReport> list = reportService.selectSchoolReportList(schoolReport);
        DictUtils.getDictName(list);
        for(SchoolReport sr:list){
            if(StringUtils.isNotEmpty(sr.getPicUrls())){
                String [] arr = sr.getPicUrls().split(",");
                byte[] bytes = HttpUtil.downloadBytes(arr[0]);
                sr.getParams().put("firstPic",bytes);
            }
        }
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     * 获取问题上报详细信息
     */
    @GetMapping(value = "/report/get/{id}")
    public AjaxResult getReport(@PathVariable("id") Long id)
    {
        SchoolReport sr = reportService.selectSchoolReportById(id);
        DictUtils.getDictName(sr);
        List<byte[]> picList = new ArrayList<>();
        if(StringUtils.isNotEmpty(sr.getPicUrls())){
            String[] arr = sr.getPicUrls().split(",");
            for(String s:arr){
                byte[] bytes = HttpUtil.downloadBytes(s);
                picList.add(bytes);
            }
        }
        sr.setPicByteList(picList);
        return success(sr);
    }
    /**
     * 新增问题上报
     */
    @PostMapping("/report/add")
    public AjaxResult add(@RequestBody SchoolReport schoolReport)
    {
        schoolReport.setStatus("UNPROCESSED");
        return toAjax(reportService.insertSchoolReport(schoolReport));
    }
    /**
     * @Description:更新未响应操作记录
     * @param
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     * @Author: CJH
     * @Updator: CJH
     * @Date 2024/2/21 16:24
     */
    @PostMapping("/updateOperateLog")
    public AjaxResult updateOperateLog()
    {
        powerConLogMapper.updateDevPowerConLogByAddrssFiled();
        lockConLogService.updateDevLockConLogFailed();
        return AjaxResult.success();
    }
    public static boolean coordinateToDistance(Integer radius, double latitude1, double longitude1, double latitude2, double longitude2) {
        double a = latitude1 * Math.PI / 180.0 - latitude2 * Math.PI / 180.0;
        double b = longitude1 * Math.PI / 180.0 - longitude2 * Math.PI / 180.0;
        double s = 2 * Math.asin(Math.sqrt(Math.pow(Math.sin(a / 2), 2)
                + Math.cos(latitude1 * Math.PI / 180.0)
                * Math.cos(latitude2 * Math.PI / 180.0)
                * Math.pow(Math.sin(b / 2), 2)));
        s = s * 6378.137 * 1000;
        s = Math.round(s);
        if (s > radius) {
            return true;
        }
        return false;
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.controller;
import java.util.List;
import javax.annotation.Resource;
import com.chenrise.common.core.domain.R;
import com.chenrise.system.api.RemoteFileService;
import com.chenrise.system.api.domain.SysFile;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.*;
import com.chenrise.common.log.annotation.Log;
import com.chenrise.common.log.enums.BusinessType;
import com.chenrise.common.security.annotation.RequiresPermissions;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.ApkSource;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.IApkSourceService;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.controller.BaseController;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo;
import org.springframework.web.multipart.MultipartFile;
/**
 * apk版本Controller
 *
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2022-12-10
 */
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/apksource")
public class ApkSourceController extends BaseController
{
    @Resource
    private IApkSourceService apkSourceService;
    @Resource
    private RemoteFileService fileService;
    /**
     * 查询apk版本列表
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:apksource:list")
    @GetMapping("/list")
    public TableDataInfo list(ApkSource apkSource)
    {
        startPage();
        List<ApkSource> list = apkSourceService.selectApkSourceList(apkSource);
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     * 获取apk版本详细信息
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:apksource:query")
    @GetMapping(value = "/{id}")
    public AjaxResult getInfo(@PathVariable("id") Long id)
    {
        return success(apkSourceService.selectApkSourceById(id));
    }
    /**
     * 新增apk版本
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:apksource:add")
    @Log(title = "apk版本", businessType = BusinessType.INSERT)
    @PostMapping
    public AjaxResult add(@RequestBody ApkSource apkSource)
    {
        return toAjax(apkSourceService.insertApkSource(apkSource));
    }
    /**
     * 修改apk版本
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:apksource:edit")
    @Log(title = "apk版本", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PutMapping
    public AjaxResult edit(@RequestBody ApkSource apkSource)
    {
        return toAjax(apkSourceService.updateApkSource(apkSource));
    }
    /**
     * 删除apk版本
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:apksource:remove")
    @Log(title = "apk版本", businessType = BusinessType.DELETE)
	@DeleteMapping("/{ids}")
    public AjaxResult remove(@PathVariable Long[] ids)
    {
        return toAjax(apkSourceService.deleteApkSourceByIds(ids));
    }
    /**
     *
     * @Description: 上传APK
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/10
     * @param file
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @PostMapping("/upload")
    public AjaxResult upload(@RequestPart(value = "file") MultipartFile file){
        R<SysFile> upload = fileService.upload(file);
        return AjaxResult.success(upload.getData());
    }
    /**
     *
     * @Description: 按版本号检测APK  若有新版本返回路径
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/10
     * @param versionNum
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @GetMapping("/checkApk")
    public AjaxResult checkApk(Integer versionNum){
        ApkSource as_query = new ApkSource();
        as_query.getParams().put("versionNum",versionNum);
        List<ApkSource> list = apkSourceService.selectApkSourceList(as_query);
        ApkSource result = null;
        if(list!=null&&list.size()>0){
            result = list.get(0);
        }
        return AjaxResult.success(result);
    }
}

/**

@RestController
@RequestMapping("/audit/record")
public class ApplyAuditRecordController extends BaseController {
    @Autowired
    private IApplyAuditRecordService applyAuditRecordService;
    /**
     * 查询资产申请审核记录列表
     *
     * @param applyAuditRecord:
     * @Description: 查询资产申请审核记录列表
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2023-12-27 15:55:22
     * @return: com.chenrise.boot.common.core.page.TableDataInfo
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("audit:record:list")
    @GetMapping("/list")
    public TableDataInfo list(ApplyAuditRecord applyAuditRecord) {
        startPage();
        List<ApplyAuditRecord> list = applyAuditRecordService.selectApplyAuditRecordList(applyAuditRecord);
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     * 导出资产申请审核记录列表
     *
     * @param response:
     * @param applyAuditRecord:
     * @Description: 导出资产申请审核记录列表
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2023-12-27 15:55:25
     * @return: void
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("audit:record:export")
    @Log(title = "资产申请审核记录", businessType = BusinessType.EXPORT)
    @PostMapping("/export")
    public void export(HttpServletResponse response, ApplyAuditRecord applyAuditRecord) {
        List<ApplyAuditRecord> list = applyAuditRecordService.selectApplyAuditRecordList(applyAuditRecord);
        ExcelUtil<ApplyAuditRecord> util = new ExcelUtil<ApplyAuditRecord>(ApplyAuditRecord.class);
        util.exportExcel(response, list, "资产申请审核记录数据");
    }
    /**
     * 获取资产申请审核记录详细信息
     *
     * @param recordId:
     * @Description:
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2023-12-27 15:55:29
     * @return: com.chenrise.boot.common.core.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("audit:record:query")
    @GetMapping(value = "/{recordId}")
    public AjaxResult getInfo(@PathVariable("recordId") Long recordId) {
        return AjaxResult.success(applyAuditRecordService.selectApplyAuditRecordByRecordId(recordId));
    }
    /**

     *
     * @param applyAuditRecord:
     * @Description:
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2023-12-27 15:55:33
     * @return: com.chenrise.boot.common.core.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("audit:record:add")
    @Log(title = "资产申请审核记录", businessType = BusinessType.INSERT)
    @PostMapping
    public AjaxResult add(@RequestBody ApplyAuditRecord applyAuditRecord) {
        return toAjax(applyAuditRecordService.insertApplyAuditRecord(applyAuditRecord));
    }
    /**
     * @param applyAuditRecord:
     * @Description: 修改资产申请审核记录
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2023-12-27 15:56:57
     * @return: com.chenrise.boot.common.core.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("audit:record:edit")
    @Log(title = "资产申请审核记录", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PutMapping
    public AjaxResult edit(@RequestBody ApplyAuditRecord applyAuditRecord) {
        return toAjax(applyAuditRecordService.updateApplyAuditRecord(applyAuditRecord));

package com.chenrise.jufe.controller;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.Bo.AssetsApplyInfoBo;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.enums.FromTypeEnum;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.IAssetsApplyInfoService;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.*;
import java.util.List;
/**
 * @Description 申请相关
 * @Author sunMing
 * @Date 2024-01-30 16:51:00
 */
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/assetsApply")
public class AssetsApplyController extends BaseController {
    @Autowired
    private IAssetsApplyInfoService assetsApplyInfoService;
    /**
     * 获取我的审批列表
     *
     * @param applyType:
     * @param applyStatus:
     * @Description:
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2024-01-30 16:56:25
     * @return: com.chenrise.boot.common.core.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @GetMapping(value = "/getMyApplyList")
    public AjaxResult getMyApplyList(String applyType, String applyStatus) {
        AssetsApplyInfoBo assetsApplyInfo = new AssetsApplyInfoBo();
        assetsApplyInfo.setApplyType(applyType);
        assetsApplyInfo.setApplyStatus(applyStatus);
        assetsApplyInfo.setFromType(FromTypeEnum.HTML.getValue());
        List<AssetsApplyInfoBo> info = assetsApplyInfoService.selectAssetsApplyInfoList(assetsApplyInfo);
        return AjaxResult.success(info);
    }
    /**
     * 获取申请单详情
     *
     * @param applyId:
     * @Description:
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2024-01-30 16:58:18
     * @return: com.chenrise.boot.common.core.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @GetMapping(value = "/getMyApplyDetail")
    public AjaxResult getMyApplyDetail(Long applyId) {
        AssetsApplyInfoBo info = assetsApplyInfoService.selectAssetsApplyInfoByApplyId(applyId);
        return AjaxResult.success(info);
    }
    /**
     * 新增资产申请
     *
     * @param info:
     * @Description:
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2024-01-30 17:01:07
     * @return: com.chenrise.boot.common.core.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @PostMapping(value = "/addApplyDetail")
    public AjaxResult addApplyDetail(@RequestBody AssetsApplyInfoBo info) {
        info.setFromType(FromTypeEnum.HTML.getValue());
        int r = assetsApplyInfoService.insertAssetsApplyInfo(info);
        return AjaxResult.success(r);
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.controller;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.poi.ExcelUtil;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo;
import com.chenrise.common.log.annotation.Log;
import com.chenrise.common.log.enums.BusinessType;
import com.chenrise.common.security.annotation.RequiresPermissions;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.AssetsApplyDetailInfo;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.IAssetsApplyDetailInfoService;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.*;
import javax.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse;
import java.util.List;
/**
 * 资产申请明细Controller
 *
 * @author sunMing
 * @date 2023-12-27
 */
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/apply/detail")
public class AssetsApplyDetailInfoController extends BaseController {
    @Autowired
    private IAssetsApplyDetailInfoService assetsApplyDetailInfoService;
    /**
     * 查询资产申请明细列表
     *
     * @param assetsApplyDetailInfo:
     * @Description: 查询资产申请明细列表
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2024-01-31 14:12:57
     * @return: com.chenrise.boot.common.core.page.TableDataInfo
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("detail:infolist")
    @GetMapping("/list")
    public TableDataInfo list(AssetsApplyDetailInfo assetsApplyDetailInfo) {
        startPage();
        List<AssetsApplyDetailInfo> list = assetsApplyDetailInfoService.selectAssetsApplyDetailInfoList(assetsApplyDetailInfo);
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     * 导出资产申请明细列表
     *
     * @param response:
     * @param assetsApplyDetailInfo:
     * @Description: 导出资产申请明细列表
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2024-01-31 14:12:47
     * @return: void
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("detail:infoexport")
    @Log(title = "资产申请明细", businessType = BusinessType.EXPORT)
    @PostMapping("/export")
    public void export(HttpServletResponse response, AssetsApplyDetailInfo assetsApplyDetailInfo) {
        List<AssetsApplyDetailInfo> list = assetsApplyDetailInfoService.selectAssetsApplyDetailInfoList(assetsApplyDetailInfo);
        ExcelUtil<AssetsApplyDetailInfo> util = new ExcelUtil<>(AssetsApplyDetailInfo.class);
        util.exportExcel(response, list, "资产申请明细数据");
    }
    /**
     * 获取资产申请明细详细信息
     *
     * @param detailId:
     * @Description: 获取资产申请明细详细信息
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2024-01-31 14:12:37
     * @return: com.chenrise.boot.common.core.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("detail:infoquery")
    @GetMapping(value = "/{detailId}")
    public AjaxResult getInfo(@PathVariable("detailId") Long detailId) {
        return AjaxResult.success(assetsApplyDetailInfoService.selectAssetsApplyDetailInfoByDetailId(detailId));
    }
    /**
     * 新增资产申请明细
     *
     * @param assetsApplyDetailInfo:
     * @Description: 新增资产申请明细
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2024-01-31 14:12:28
     * @return: com.chenrise.boot.common.core.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("detail:infoadd")
    @Log(title = "资产申请明细", businessType = BusinessType.INSERT)
    @PostMapping
    public AjaxResult add(@RequestBody AssetsApplyDetailInfo assetsApplyDetailInfo) {
        return toAjax(assetsApplyDetailInfoService.insertAssetsApplyDetailInfo(assetsApplyDetailInfo));
    }
    /**
     * 修改资产申请明细
     *
     * @param assetsApplyDetailInfo:
     * @Description: 修改资产申请明细
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2024-01-31 14:12:18
     * @return: com.chenrise.boot.common.core.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("detail:infoedit")
    @Log(title = "资产申请明细", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PutMapping
    public AjaxResult edit(@RequestBody AssetsApplyDetailInfo assetsApplyDetailInfo) {
        return toAjax(assetsApplyDetailInfoService.updateAssetsApplyDetailInfo(assetsApplyDetailInfo));
    }
    /**
     * 删除资产申请明细
     *
     * @param detailIds:
     * @Description: 删除资产申请明细
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2024-01-31 14:12:04
     * @return: com.chenrise.boot.common.core.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("detail:inforemove")
    @Log(title = "资产申请明细", businessType = BusinessType.DELETE)
    @DeleteMapping("/{detailIds}")
    public AjaxResult remove(@PathVariable Long[] detailIds) {
        return toAjax(assetsApplyDetailInfoService.deleteAssetsApplyDetailInfoByDetailIds(detailIds));
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.controller;

/**

 *

 * @date 2023-12-27

@RestController
@RequestMapping("/detial/pic")
public class AssetsApplyDetailPicController extends BaseController {
    @Autowired

    /**
     * 查询申请明细图片列表
     *
     * @param assetsApplyDetailPic:
     * @Description: 查询申请明细图片列表

    @GetMapping("/list")
    public TableDataInfo list(AssetsApplyDetailPic assetsApplyDetailPic) {
        startPage();
        List<AssetsApplyDetailPic> list = assetsApplyDetailPicService.selectAssetsApplyDetailPicList(assetsApplyDetailPic);
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     * 导出申请明细图片列表
     *
     * @param response:
     * @param assetsApplyDetailPic:
     * @Description: 导出申请明细图片列表
     * @Author: sunMing

     * @return: void
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("detial:pic:export")
    @Log(title = "申请明细图片", businessType = BusinessType.EXPORT)
    @PostMapping("/export")
    public void export(HttpServletResponse response, AssetsApplyDetailPic assetsApplyDetailPic) {
        List<AssetsApplyDetailPic> list = assetsApplyDetailPicService.selectAssetsApplyDetailPicList(assetsApplyDetailPic);
        ExcelUtil<AssetsApplyDetailPic> util = new ExcelUtil<>(AssetsApplyDetailPic.class);
        util.exportExcel(response, list, "申请明细图片数据");
    }
    /**
     * 获取申请明细图片详细信息
     *
     * @param id:

     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2024-01-31 14:14:53
     * @return: com.chenrise.boot.common.core.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("detial:pic:query")
    @GetMapping(value = "/{id}")
    public AjaxResult getInfo(@PathVariable("id") Long id) {
        return AjaxResult.success(assetsApplyDetailPicService.selectAssetsApplyDetailPicById(id));
    }
    /**
     * 新增申请明细图片
     *
     * @param assetsApplyDetailPic:
     * @Description: 新增申请明细图片
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2024-01-31 14:15:02
     * @return: com.chenrise.boot.common.core.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("detial:pic:add")
    @Log(title = "申请明细图片", businessType = BusinessType.INSERT)
    @PostMapping
    public AjaxResult add(@RequestBody AssetsApplyDetailPic assetsApplyDetailPic) {
        return toAjax(assetsApplyDetailPicService.insertAssetsApplyDetailPic(assetsApplyDetailPic));
    }
    /**
     * 修改申请明细图片
     *
     * @param assetsApplyDetailPic:
     * @Description: 修改申请明细图片
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2024-01-31 14:15:13
     * @return: com.chenrise.boot.common.core.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("detial:pic:edit")
    @Log(title = "申请明细图片", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PutMapping
    public AjaxResult edit(@RequestBody AssetsApplyDetailPic assetsApplyDetailPic) {
        return toAjax(assetsApplyDetailPicService.updateAssetsApplyDetailPic(assetsApplyDetailPic));
    }
    /**

     * @Description: 删除申请明细图片

     * @Date: 2024-01-31 14:15:24

    @DeleteMapping("/{ids}")
    public AjaxResult remove(@PathVariable Long[] ids) {
        return toAjax(assetsApplyDetailPicService.deleteAssetsApplyDetailPicByIds(ids));
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.controller;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo;
import com.chenrise.common.log.annotation.Log;
import com.chenrise.common.log.enums.BusinessType;
import com.chenrise.common.security.annotation.Logical;
import com.chenrise.common.security.annotation.RequiresPermissions;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.Bo.AssetsApplyInfoBo;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.IAssetsApplyInfoService;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.*;
import java.util.List;
/**
 * 资产相关申请Controller
 *
 * @author sunMing
 * @date 2023-12-27
 */
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/apply/info")
public class AssetsApplyInfoController extends BaseController {
    @Autowired
    private IAssetsApplyInfoService assetsApplyInfoService;
    /**
     * 查询资产相关申请列表
     *
     * @param assetsApplyInfo:
     * @Description: 查询资产相关申请列表
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2024-01-31 14:16:08
     * @return: com.chenrise.boot.common.core.page.TableDataInfo
     */
    @RequiresPermissions(value = {"apply:use:list", "apply:back:list", "apply:delete:list", "apply:move:list"}, logical = Logical.OR)
    @GetMapping("/list")
    public TableDataInfo list(AssetsApplyInfoBo assetsApplyInfo) {
        startPage();
        List<AssetsApplyInfoBo> list = assetsApplyInfoService.selectAssetsApplyInfoList(assetsApplyInfo);
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     * 获取资产相关申请详细信息
     *
     * @param applyId:
     * @Description: 获取资产相关申请详细信息
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2024-01-31 14:16:19
     * @return: com.chenrise.boot.common.core.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @RequiresPermissions(value = {"approve:use:detail", "approve:back:detail", "approve:delete:detail", "approve:move:detail"}, logical = Logical.OR)
    @GetMapping(value = "/{applyId}")
    public AjaxResult getInfo(@PathVariable("applyId") Long applyId) {
        return AjaxResult.success(assetsApplyInfoService.selectAssetsApplyInfoByApplyId(applyId));
    }
    /**
     * 资产领取
     *
     * @param applyId:
     * @Description:
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2024-01-22 14:03:46
     * @return: com.chenrise.boot.common.core.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @GetMapping(value = "/getUse/{applyId}")
    public AjaxResult getUseInfo(@PathVariable("applyId") Long applyId) {
        return assetsApplyInfoService.assetsApplyInfoGetUseInfo(applyId);
    }
    /**
     * 添加请求
     *
     * @param applyInfo:
     * @Description:
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2024-01-15 15:50:24
     * @return: com.chenrise.boot.common.core.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @RequiresPermissions(value = {"approve:use:deal", "approve:back:deal", "approve:delete:deal", "approve:move:deal"}, logical = Logical.OR)
    @Log(title = "资产相关申请", businessType = BusinessType.INSERT)
    @PostMapping
    public AjaxResult add(@RequestBody AssetsApplyInfoBo applyInfo) {
        return toAjax(assetsApplyInfoService.insertAssetsApplyInfo(applyInfo));
    }
    /**
     * 资产审批
     *
     * @param assetsApplyInfo:
     * @Description: 资产审批
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2024-01-31 14:16:31
     * @return: com.chenrise.boot.common.core.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @RequiresPermissions(value = {"approve:use:deal", "approve:back:deal", "approve:delete:deal", "approve:move:deal"}, logical = Logical.OR)
    @Log(title = "资产相关申请", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PostMapping("/approve")
    public AjaxResult approve(@RequestBody AssetsApplyInfoBo assetsApplyInfo) {
        return assetsApplyInfoService.approveAssetsApplyInfo(assetsApplyInfo);
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.controller;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo;
import com.chenrise.common.log.annotation.Log;
import com.chenrise.common.log.enums.BusinessType;
import com.chenrise.common.security.annotation.Logical;
import com.chenrise.common.security.annotation.RequiresPermissions;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.AssetsClass;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.MyTreeSelect;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.vo.AssetsClassVo;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.IAssetsClassService;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.*;
import java.util.List;
/**
 * 资产分类Controller
 *
 * @author sunMing
 * @date 2023-12-27
 */
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/assets/class")
public class AssetsClassController extends BaseController {
    @Autowired
    private IAssetsClassService assetsClassService;
    /**
     * 查询资产分类列表
     *
     * @param assetsClass:
     * @Description: 查询资产分类列表
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2023-12-27 16:08:14
     * @return: com.chenrise.boot.common.core.page.TableDataInfo
     */
    @RequiresPermissions(value = {"assets:class:list", "assets:warn:list"}, logical = Logical.OR)
    @GetMapping("/list")
    public TableDataInfo list(AssetsClass assetsClass) {
        List<AssetsClass> list = assetsClassService.selectAssetsClassList(assetsClass);
        assetsClassService.createQrcode();
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     * 获取资产分类详细信息
     *
     * @param classId:
     * @Description: 获取资产分类详细信息
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2023-12-27 16:08:21
     * @return: com.chenrise.boot.common.core.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("assets:class:query")
    @GetMapping(value = "/{classId}")
    public AjaxResult getInfo(@PathVariable("classId") Long classId) {
        return AjaxResult.success(assetsClassService.selectAssetsClassByClassId(classId));
    }
    /**
     * 新增资产分类
     *
     * @param assetsClass:
     * @Description: 新增资产分类
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2023-12-27 16:08:24
     * @return: com.chenrise.boot.common.core.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("assets:class:add")
    @Log(title = "资产分类", businessType = BusinessType.INSERT)
    @PostMapping
    public AjaxResult add(@RequestBody AssetsClass assetsClass) {
        int countName = assetsClassService.selectCountNameByAssetsClass(assetsClass);
        if (countName > 0) {
            return AjaxResult.error("当前分类名称已存在，请修改后重试");
        } else {
            return toAjax(assetsClassService.insertAssetsClass(assetsClass));
        }
    }
    /**
     * 修改资产分类
     *
     * @param assetsClass:
     * @Description: 修改资产分类
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2023-12-27 16:08:27
     * @return: com.chenrise.boot.common.core.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("assets:class:edit")
    @Log(title = "资产分类", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PostMapping("/edit")
    public AjaxResult edit(@RequestBody AssetsClass assetsClass) {
        int countName = assetsClassService.selectCountNameByAssetsClass(assetsClass);
        if (countName > 0) {
            return AjaxResult.error("当前分类名称已存在，请修改后重试");
        } else {
            return toAjax(assetsClassService.updateAssetsClass(assetsClass));
        }
    }
    /**
     * 删除资产分类
     *
     * @param classIds:
     * @Description: 删除资产分类
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2023-12-27 16:08:30
     * @return: com.chenrise.boot.common.core.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("assets:class:remove")
    @Log(title = "资产分类", businessType = BusinessType.DELETE)
    @GetMapping("/remove/{classId}")
    public AjaxResult remove(@PathVariable Long classId) {
        return toAjax(assetsClassService.deleteAssetsClassByClassId(classId));
    }
    /**
     * 树结构查询
     *
     * @param assetsClass:
     * @Description:
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2023-12-28 10:16:53
     * @return: com.chenrise.boot.common.core.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @GetMapping("/treeSelect")
    public AjaxResult treeSelect(AssetsClass assetsClass) {
        List<AssetsClassVo> infos = assetsClassService.selectAssetsClassTreeList(assetsClass);
        List<MyTreeSelect> treeInfo = assetsClassService.buildRegionTreeSelect(infos);
        return AjaxResult.success(treeInfo);
    }
    /**
     * 修改资产分类
     *
     * @param assetsClass:
     * @Description: 修改资产分类
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2023-12-27 16:08:27
     * @return: com.chenrise.boot.common.core.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("assets:warn:edit")
    @Log(title = "告警设置", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PostMapping("/warnEdit")
    public AjaxResult warnEdit(@RequestBody AssetsClass assetsClass) {
        return toAjax(assetsClassService.updateWarn(assetsClass));
    }
}

     */

    }

package com.chenrise.jufe.controller;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo;
import com.chenrise.common.log.annotation.Log;
import com.chenrise.common.log.enums.BusinessType;
import com.chenrise.common.security.annotation.RequiresPermissions;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.Bo.AssetsFlowInfoBo;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.IAssetsFlowInfoService;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.*;
import java.util.List;
/**
 * 资产流产记录Controller
 *
 * @author sunMing
 * @date 2023-12-27
 */
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/flow")
public class AssetsFlowInfoController extends BaseController {
    @Autowired
    private IAssetsFlowInfoService assetsFlowInfoService;
    /**
     * 查询资产流产记录列表
     *
     * @param assetsFlowInfo:
     * @Description: 查询资产流产记录列表
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2023-12-27 16:10:18
     * @return: com.chenrise.boot.common.core.page.TableDataInfo
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("flow:info:list")
    @GetMapping("/list")
    public TableDataInfo list(AssetsFlowInfoBo assetsFlowInfo) {
        List<AssetsFlowInfoBo> list = assetsFlowInfoService.selectAssetsFlowInfoList(assetsFlowInfo);
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     * 新增资产流产记录
     *
     * @param assetsFlowInfo:
     * @Description: 新增资产流产记录
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2023-12-27 16:10:09
     * @return: com.chenrise.boot.common.core.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("flow:info:add")
    @Log(title = "资产流产记录", businessType = BusinessType.INSERT)
    @PostMapping
    public AjaxResult add(@RequestBody AssetsFlowInfoBo assetsFlowInfo) {
        return toAjax(assetsFlowInfoService.insertAssetsFlowInfo(assetsFlowInfo));
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.controller;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.poi.ExcelUtil;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo;
import com.chenrise.common.log.annotation.Log;
import com.chenrise.common.log.enums.BusinessType;
import com.chenrise.common.security.annotation.RequiresPermissions;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.AssetsFlowPic;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.IAssetsFlowPicService;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.*;
import javax.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse;
import java.util.List;
/**
 * 资产流转记录图片Controller
 *
 * @author sunMing
 * @date 2023-12-27
 */
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/flow/pic")
public class AssetsFlowPicController extends BaseController {
    @Autowired
    private IAssetsFlowPicService assetsFlowPicService;
    /**
     * 查询资产流转记录图片列表
     *
     * @param assetsFlowPic:
     * @Description: 查询资产流转记录图片列表
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2023-12-27 16:10:22
     * @return: com.chenrise.boot.common.core.page.TableDataInfo
     */

    @GetMapping("/list")
    public TableDataInfo list(AssetsFlowPic assetsFlowPic) {
        startPage();
        List<AssetsFlowPic> list = assetsFlowPicService.selectAssetsFlowPicList(assetsFlowPic);
        return getDataTable(list);

    /**

    @GetMapping(value = "/{id}")
    public AjaxResult getInfo(@PathVariable("id") Long id) {
        return AjaxResult.success(assetsFlowPicService.selectAssetsFlowPicById(id));
    }
    /**

    @PostMapping
    public AjaxResult add(@RequestBody AssetsFlowPic assetsFlowPic) {
        return toAjax(assetsFlowPicService.insertAssetsFlowPic(assetsFlowPic));
    }
    /**

     * @Description: 修改资产流转记录图片

     * @Date: 2023-12-27 16:10:34

    @Log(title = "资产流转记录图片", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)

package com.chenrise.jufe.controller;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.poi.ExcelUtil;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo;
import com.chenrise.common.log.annotation.Log;
import com.chenrise.common.log.enums.BusinessType;
import com.chenrise.common.security.annotation.RequiresPermissions;
import com.chenrise.common.security.utils.DictUtils;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.Bo.AssetsInfoBo;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.vo.AssetsInfoVo;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.IAssetsClassService;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.IAssetsExpireWarnService;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.IAssetsInfoService;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.IAssetsStockWarnService;
import com.chenrise.jufe.util.CreateWord;
import com.chenrise.jufe.util.ZngCode;
import com.chenrise.system.api.domain.SysDictData;
import com.lowagie.text.DocumentException;
import com.lowagie.text.Image;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.*;
import org.springframework.web.multipart.MultipartFile;
import javax.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse;
import java.io.IOException;
import java.util.*;
/**
 * 资产信息（主要）Controller
 *
 * @author sunMing
 * @date 2023-12-27
 */
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/assets")
public class AssetsInfoController extends BaseController {
    @Autowired
    private IAssetsInfoService assetsInfoService;
    @Autowired
    private IAssetsClassService assetsClassService;
    @Autowired
    private IAssetsStockWarnService assetsStockWarnService;
    @Autowired
    private IAssetsExpireWarnService assetsExpireWarnService;
    /**
     * 查询资产信息（主要）列表
     *
     * @param assetsInfo:
     * @Description: 查询资产信息（主要）列表
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2023-12-27 16:10:45
     * @return: com.chenrise.boot.common.core.page.TableDataInfo
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("assets:info:list")
    @GetMapping("/list")
    public TableDataInfo list(AssetsInfoBo assetsInfo) {
        startPage();
        List<AssetsInfoBo> list = assetsInfoService.selectAssetsInfoList(assetsInfo);
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     * 选择物资使用的查询
     *
     * @param assetsInfo:
     * @Description:
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2024-01-18 16:16:35
     * @return: com.chenrise.boot.common.core.page.TableDataInfo
     */
    @GetMapping("/listSelect")
    public TableDataInfo listSelect(AssetsInfoBo assetsInfo) {
        startPage();
        assetsInfo.setApproveStatus("1");
        List<AssetsInfoBo> list = assetsInfoService.selectAssetsInfoList(assetsInfo);
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     * 导出资产信息（主要）列表
     *
     * @param response:
     * @param assetsInfo:
     * @Description: 导出资产信息（主要）列表
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2023-12-27 16:10:47
     * @return: void
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("assets:info:export")
    @Log(title = "资产信息（主要）", businessType = BusinessType.EXPORT)
    @PostMapping("/export")
    public void export(HttpServletResponse response, AssetsInfoBo assetsInfo) {
        List<AssetsInfoBo> list = assetsInfoService.selectAssetsInfoList(assetsInfo);
        List<SysDictData> datas = DictUtils.getDictCache("assets_unit");
        Map<String, String> unitInfo = new HashMap<>();
        if (datas != null && datas.size() > 0) {
            for (int i = 0; i < datas.size(); i++) {
                unitInfo.put(datas.get(i).getDictValue(), datas.get(i).getDictLabel());
            }
        }
        if (list != null && list.size() > 0) {
            for (int i = 0; i < list.size(); i++) {
                list.get(i).setIndex(String.valueOf(i + 1));
                list.get(i).setUnit(unitInfo.get(list.get(i).getUnit()));
                list.get(i).setAmount(list.get(i).getAmount().setScale(2));
                if (list.get(i).getParentAssetsClassName() == null) {
                    list.get(i).setAssetsClassName(list.get(i).getAssetsClassName());
                } else {
                    list.get(i).setAssetsClassName(list.get(i).getParentAssetsClassName() + "-" + list.get(i).getAssetsClassName());
                }
            }
        }
        ExcelUtil<AssetsInfoBo> util = new ExcelUtil<>(AssetsInfoBo.class);
        util.exportExcel(response, list, "资产信息（主要）数据");
    }
    /**
     * 导出二维码
     *
     * @param response:
     * @param assetsInfo:
     * @Description: 导出二维码
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2023-12-29 10:34:15
     * @return: void
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("assets:info:exportQrCode")
    @Log(title = "资产信息（主要）", businessType = BusinessType.EXPORT)
    @PostMapping("/exportQrCode")
    public void exportQrCode(HttpServletResponse response, AssetsInfoBo assetsInfo) {
        List<AssetsInfoBo> list = assetsInfoService.selectAssetsInfoList(assetsInfo);
        if (list != null && list.size() > 0) {
            List<Image> imageList = new ArrayList<>();
            for (int i = 0; i < list.size(); i++) {
                Image imageByte = ZngCode.getQrCode(list.get(i).getAssetsCode(), list.get(i).getAssetsName());
                imageList.add(imageByte);
            }
            try {
                CreateWord.createDocContext(imageList, response);
            } catch (DocumentException e) {
                throw new RuntimeException(e);
            } catch (IOException e) {
                throw new RuntimeException(e);
            }
        }
    }
    /**
     * 获取资产信息（主要）详细信息
     *
     * @param assetsId:
     * @Description: 获取资产信息（主要）详细信息
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2023-12-27 16:10:50
     * @return: com.chenrise.boot.common.core.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("assets:info:query")
    @GetMapping(value = "/{assetsId}")
    public AjaxResult getInfo(@PathVariable("assetsId") Long assetsId) {
        return AjaxResult.success(assetsInfoService.selectAssetsInfoByAssetsId(assetsId));
    }
    /**
     * 获取资产流转记录
     *
     * @param assetsId:
     * @Description:
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2024-01-23 09:10:03
     * @return: com.chenrise.boot.common.core.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("assets:info:flowinfo")
    @GetMapping(value = "/getFlowInfo/{assetsId}")
    public AjaxResult getFlowInfo(@PathVariable("assetsId") Long assetsId) {
        return assetsInfoService.selectAssetsFlowInfoByAssetsId(assetsId);
    }
    /**
     * 新增资产信息（主要）
     *
     * @param assetsInfo:
     * @Description: 新增资产信息（主要）
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2023-12-27 16:10:53
     * @return: com.chenrise.boot.common.core.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("assets:info:add")
    @Log(title = "资产信息（主要）", businessType = BusinessType.INSERT)
    @PostMapping
    public AjaxResult add(@RequestBody AssetsInfoBo assetsInfo) {
        return toAjax(assetsInfoService.insertAssetsInfo(assetsInfo));
    }
    /**
     * 修改资产信息（主要）
     *
     * @param assetsInfo:
     * @Description: 修改资产信息（主要）
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2023-12-27 16:10:56
     * @return: com.chenrise.boot.common.core.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("assets:info:edit")
    @Log(title = "资产信息（主要）", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PostMapping("/edit")
    public AjaxResult edit(@RequestBody AssetsInfoBo assetsInfo) {
        int result = assetsInfoService.updateAssetsInfo(assetsInfo);
        if (result > 0) {
            assetsExpireWarnService.sendExpireWarnToAllUser(assetsInfo.getAssetsId());
        }
        return toAjax(result);
    }
    /**
     * 删除资产信息（主要）
     *
     * @param assetsIds:
     * @Description: 删除资产信息（主要）
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2023-12-27 16:11:00
     * @return: com.chenrise.boot.common.core.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("assets:info:remove")
    @Log(title = "资产信息（主要）", businessType = BusinessType.DELETE)
    @GetMapping("/del/{assetsIds}")
    public AjaxResult remove(@PathVariable Long[] assetsIds) {
        AjaxResult ajaxResult = assetsInfoService.deleteAssetsInfoByAssetsIds(assetsIds);
        if (ajaxResult.isSuccess()) {
            assetsStockWarnService.sendStockWarnToAllUserByAssetsIds(Arrays.asList(assetsIds));
        }
        return ajaxResult;
    }
    /**
     * 获取模板
     *
     * @param response:
     * @Description: 获取模板
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2023-12-29 12:41:52
     * @return: void
     */
    @PostMapping("/importTemplate")
    public void importTemplate(HttpServletResponse response) {
        ExcelUtil<AssetsInfoVo> util = new ExcelUtil<>(AssetsInfoVo.class);
        util.importTemplateExcel(response, "资产导入模板");
    }
    /**
     * 导入资产数据
     *
     * @param file:
     * @Description: 导入资产数据
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2023-12-29 13:44:08
     * @return: com.chenrise.boot.common.core.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @PostMapping("/importData")
    public AjaxResult importData(MultipartFile file) throws Exception {
        ExcelUtil<AssetsInfoVo> util = new ExcelUtil<>(AssetsInfoVo.class);
        List<AssetsInfoVo> list = util.importExcel(file.getInputStream());
        assetsClassService.setAssetsClassId(list);
        return assetsInfoService.importData(list);
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.controller;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.poi.ExcelUtil;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult;

/**
 * 资产图片信息Controller
 *
 * @author sunMing
 * @date 2023-12-27
 */
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/assets/pic")
public class AssetsPicController extends BaseController {
    @Autowired
    private IAssetsPicService assetsPicService;
    /**
     * 查询资产图片信息列表
     *

    public TableDataInfo list(AssetsPic assetsPic) {

     */
    @RequiresPermissions("assets:pic:query")
    @GetMapping(value = "/{id}")
    public AjaxResult getInfo(@PathVariable("id") Long id) {
        return AjaxResult.success(assetsPicService.selectAssetsPicById(id));

    /**
     * 新增资产图片信息
     *
     * @param assetsPic:

    @Log(title = "资产图片信息", businessType = BusinessType.INSERT)
    @PostMapping
    public AjaxResult add(@RequestBody AssetsPic assetsPic) {
        return toAjax(assetsPicService.insertAssetsPic(assetsPic));

    /**

        return toAjax(assetsPicService.deleteAssetsPicByIds(ids));
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.controller;
import cn.hutool.core.collection.CollectionUtil;
import cn.hutool.core.date.DateUtil;
import com.chenrise.common.core.constant.SecurityConstants;
import com.chenrise.common.core.domain.R;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo;
import com.chenrise.common.security.annotation.InnerAuth;
import com.chenrise.common.security.annotation.RequiresPermissions;
import com.chenrise.common.security.utils.SecurityUtils;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.IAssetsExpireWarnService;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.IAssetsStockWarnService;
import com.chenrise.system.api.RemoteUserService;
import com.chenrise.system.api.domain.AssetsExpireWarn;
import com.chenrise.system.api.domain.AssetsStockWarn;
import com.chenrise.system.api.domain.SysUser;
import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.*;
import javax.annotation.Resource;
import java.util.Date;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.stream.Collectors;
/**
 * 资产告警controller
 */
@RequiredArgsConstructor
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/assetsWarn")
public class AssetsWarnController extends BaseController {
    private final IAssetsExpireWarnService assetsExpireWarnService;
    private final IAssetsStockWarnService assetsStockWarnService;
    @Resource
    private RemoteUserService remoteUserService;
    @InnerAuth
    @GetMapping("/getExpireWarnList")
    public R<List<AssetsExpireWarn>> getExpireWarnList(String date) {
        Date dateTime = DateUtil.parse(date, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss");
        return R.ok(assetsExpireWarnService.getExpireWarnList(dateTime));
    }
    @InnerAuth
    @PostMapping("/saveExpireWarnList")
    public R<Void> saveExpireWarnList(@RequestBody List<AssetsExpireWarn> assetsExpireWarnList) {
        assetsExpireWarnService.saveExpireWarn(assetsExpireWarnList);
        return R.ok();
    }
    @InnerAuth
    @GetMapping("/getStockWarnList")
    public R<List<AssetsStockWarn>> getStockWarnList() {
        return R.ok(assetsStockWarnService.getStockWarnList());
    }
    @InnerAuth
    @PostMapping("/saveStockWarnList")
    public R<Void> saveStockWarnList(@RequestBody List<AssetsStockWarn> assetsStockWarnList) {
        assetsStockWarnService.saveStockWarn(assetsStockWarnList);
        return R.ok();
    }
    @RequiresPermissions("assets:stockWarn:list")
    @GetMapping("/stockWarnList")
    public TableDataInfo stockWarnList(AssetsStockWarn stockWarn) {
        startPage();
        List<AssetsStockWarn> list = assetsStockWarnService.getList(stockWarn);
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    @RequiresPermissions("assets:expireWarn:list")
    @GetMapping("/expireWarnList")
    public TableDataInfo expireWarnList(AssetsExpireWarn expireWarn) {
        startPage();
        List<AssetsExpireWarn> list = assetsExpireWarnService.getList(expireWarn);
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     * 登录成功后发送资产到期和库存告警通知
     */
    @GetMapping("/sendNoticeForLogin")
    public R<Void> sendNoticeForLogin() {
        R<List<SysUser>> userListR = remoteUserService.getUserByRoleKey(SecurityConstants.ROLE_ASSETS_WARN_NOTICE_PERMISSION, SecurityConstants.INNER);
        if (!R.isSuccess(userListR)) {
            return R.ok();
        }
        List<SysUser> users = userListR.getData();
        if (CollectionUtil.isEmpty(users)) {
            return R.ok();
        }
        List<Long> userIds = users.stream().map(SysUser::getUserId).collect(Collectors.toList());
        Long userId = SecurityUtils.getUserId();
        if (userIds.contains(userId)) {
            assetsExpireWarnService.sendExpireWarnToUserId(userId);
            assetsStockWarnService.sendStockWarnToUserId(userId);
        }
        return R.ok();
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.controller;
import com.chenrise.common.core.constant.HttpStatus;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.DateUtils;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.PageUtils;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.BaseEntity;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo;
import com.chenrise.common.security.utils.DictUtils;
import com.github.pagehelper.PageInfo;
import org.slf4j.Logger;
import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;
import org.springframework.web.bind.WebDataBinder;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.InitBinder;
import java.beans.PropertyEditorSupport;
import java.util.Date;
import java.util.List;
/**
 * web层通用数据处理
 *
 * @author chenrise
 */
public class BaseController extends com.chenrise.common.core.web.controller.BaseController
{
    protected final Logger logger = LoggerFactory.getLogger(this.getClass());
    /**
     * 响应请求分页数据
     */
    @SuppressWarnings({ "rawtypes", "unchecked" })
    protected TableDataInfo getDataTable(List<?> list)
    {
        TableDataInfo rspData = new TableDataInfo();
        rspData.setCode(HttpStatus.SUCCESS);
        rspData.setRows(list);
        rspData.setMsg("查询成功");
        rspData.setTotal(new PageInfo(list).getTotal());
        if(list != null && list.size()>0 && list.get(0) instanceof BaseEntity){
            List<? extends  BaseEntity> eList = (List<? extends BaseEntity>) list;
            DictUtils.getDictName(eList);
        }
        return rspData;
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.controller;
import cn.hutool.json.JSONObject;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.ICurriculumBoardService;
import com.chenrise.system.jufeApi.domain.CurrentWeekVo;
import com.chenrise.system.jufeApi.domain.SchoolJxzVo;
import com.fasterxml.jackson.core.JsonProcessingException;
import io.swagger.models.auth.In;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.GetMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PathVariable;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RestController;
import java.util.HashMap;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
/**
 * @ClassName CurriculumBoardController
 * @Description 课程看板Controller
 * @Author lougang
 * @Date 2024-11-01 15:50
 * @Version 1.0
 */
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/curriculumBoard")
public class CurriculumBoardController extends BaseController{
    @Autowired
    private ICurriculumBoardService curriculumBoardService;
    /**
     * 查询课程数量统计
     * @Description: 查询课程数量统计
     * @Author: lougang
     * @Date: 2024-11-01 15:57
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @GetMapping("/getDataStatistics")
    public AjaxResult getDataStatistics(){
        // 查询课程数量统计
        Integer courseCount = curriculumBoardService.getCourseCount();
        // 查询学生数量
        Integer studentCount = curriculumBoardService.getStudentCount();
        // 查询教师数量
        Integer teacherCount = curriculumBoardService.getTeacherCount();
        // 开课单位数量
        Integer openCourseDeptCount = curriculumBoardService.getOpenCourseDeptCount();
        Map<String,Integer> map = new HashMap<>();
        map.put("courseCount",courseCount);
        map.put("studentCount",studentCount);
        map.put("teacherCount",teacherCount);
        map.put("openCourseDeptCount",openCourseDeptCount);
        return AjaxResult.success(map);
    }
    /**
     * 查询课程占比
     * @Description: 查询课程占比
     * @Author: lougang
     * @Date: 2024-11-01 16:59
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @GetMapping("/getCourseProportion")
    public AjaxResult getCourseProportion(){
        // 查询课程占比
        List<JSONObject> jsonObjectList = curriculumBoardService.getCourseProportion();
        return AjaxResult.success(jsonObjectList);
    }
    /**
     * 查询教师课时排行
     * @Description: 查询教师课时排行
     * @Author: lougang
     * @Date: 2024-11-01 16:59
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @GetMapping("/getTeacherCourseProportion")
    public AjaxResult getTeacherCourseProportion(){
        // 查询教师课时排行
        List<JSONObject> jsonObjectList = curriculumBoardService.getTeacherCourseProportion();
        return AjaxResult.success(jsonObjectList);
    }
    /**
     * 查询课程安排
     * @Description: 查询课程安排
     * @Author: lougang
     * @Date: 2024-11-01 16:59
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @GetMapping("/getCourseArrangement/{week}")
    public AjaxResult getCourseArrangement(@PathVariable("week") Integer week) throws JsonProcessingException {
        // 查询教师课时排行
        Map map = curriculumBoardService.getCourseArrangement(week);
        return AjaxResult.success(map);
    }
    /**
     * 查询当前周
     * @Description: 查询当前周
     * @Author: lougang
     * @Date: 2024-11-01 16:59
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @GetMapping("/getCurrentWeek")
    public AjaxResult getCurrentWeek() {
        // 查询教师课时排行
        CurrentWeekVo currentWeekVo = curriculumBoardService.getCurrentWeek();
        return AjaxResult.success(currentWeekVo);
    }
    /**
     * 查询教学周开始时间及结束时间
     * @Description: 查询教学周开始时间及结束时间
     * @Author: lougang
     * @Date: 2024-11-01 16:59
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @GetMapping("/getWeekLastAndEndTime/{week}")
    public AjaxResult getWeekLastAndEndTime(@PathVariable("week") Integer week) {
        // 查询教师课时排行
        CurrentWeekVo currentWeekVo = curriculumBoardService.getWeekLastAndEndTime(week);
        return AjaxResult.success(currentWeekVo);
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.controller;
import com.chenrise.common.core.domain.R;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo;
import com.chenrise.common.security.annotation.RequiresPermissions;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.DevAuthorize;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.vo.DevAuthorizeVo;
import com.chenrise.jufe.factory.DeviceAuthorizeStrategyFactory;
import com.chenrise.jufe.factory.strategy.DevAuthorizeStrategy;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.IDevAuthorizeService;
import com.chenrise.system.api.enums.AuthorizeDeviceTypeEnum;
import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.*;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.stream.Collectors;
/**
 * 设备授权Controller
 */
@RequiredArgsConstructor
@RequestMapping("/devAuthorize")
@RestController
public class DevAuthorizeController extends BaseController {
    private final IDevAuthorizeService devAuthorizeService;
    private final DeviceAuthorizeStrategyFactory deviceAuthorizeStrategyFactory;
    @RequiresPermissions("dev:authorize:list")
    @GetMapping("/authorizeList")
    public TableDataInfo authorizeList(DevAuthorize devAuthorize) {
        startPage();
        List<DevAuthorize> list = devAuthorizeService.getList(devAuthorize);
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    @RequiresPermissions("dev:authorize:edit")
    @PostMapping("/editAuthorizeNum")
    public AjaxResult editAuthorizeNum(@RequestBody DevAuthorize devAuthorize) {
        return devAuthorizeService.editAuthorizeNum(devAuthorize) ? success() : error();
    }
    @GetMapping("/getAuthorizeNum")
    public R<Integer> getAuthorizeNum(@RequestParam(value = "deviceType") String deviceType) {
        return R.ok(devAuthorizeService.getAuthorizeNumByType(deviceType));
    }
    @RequiresPermissions("dev:authorize:viewList")
    @GetMapping("/viewList")
    public TableDataInfo viewList(DevAuthorize devAuthorize) {
        startPage();
        List<DevAuthorize> list = devAuthorizeService.getList(devAuthorize);
        List<DevAuthorizeVo> listVo = list.stream().map(it -> {
            DevAuthorizeVo devAuthorizeVo = new DevAuthorizeVo(it);
            AuthorizeDeviceTypeEnum deviceTypeEnum = AuthorizeDeviceTypeEnum.getByType(it.getDeviceType());
            if (deviceTypeEnum != null) {
                DevAuthorizeStrategy strategy = deviceAuthorizeStrategyFactory.getStrategy(deviceTypeEnum);
                if (strategy != null) {
                    devAuthorizeVo.setCurrentNum(strategy.getCurrentNum());
                }
            }
            return devAuthorizeVo;
        }).collect(Collectors.toList());
        return getDataTable(listVo);
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.controller;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.poi.ExcelUtil;
