/**
 * 门卡Controller
 *
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2023-04-06
 */
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/cardInfo")
public class DevCardInfoController extends BaseController
{
    @Autowired
    private IDevCardInfoService devCardInfoService;
    @Resource
    private IDevLockInfoService devLockInfoService;
    @Resource private SchoolStuInfoMapper stuInfoMapper;
    @Resource private SchoolTeaInfoMapper teaInfoMapper;
    @Resource private SchoolTempUserInfoMapper tempUserInfoMapper;
    /**
     * 查询门卡列表
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:cardInfo:list")
    @GetMapping("/list")
    public TableDataInfo list(DevCardInfo devCardInfo)
    {
        startPage();
        List<DevCardInfo> list = devCardInfoService.selectDevCardInfoList(devCardInfo);
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     * 导出门卡列表
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:cardInfo:export")
    @Log(title = "门卡", businessType = BusinessType.EXPORT)
    @PostMapping("/export")
    public void export(HttpServletResponse response, DevCardInfo devCardInfo)
    {
        List<DevCardInfo> list = devCardInfoService.selectDevCardInfoList(devCardInfo);
        ExcelUtil<DevCardInfo> util = new ExcelUtil<DevCardInfo>(DevCardInfo.class);
        util.exportExcel(response, list, "门卡数据");
    }
    /**
     * 获取门卡详细信息
     */
    @GetMapping(value = "/{id}")
    public AjaxResult getInfo(@PathVariable("id") Long id)
    {
        return success(devCardInfoService.selectDevCardInfoById(id));
    }
    /**
     * 新增门卡
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:cardInfo:add")
    @Log(title = "门卡", businessType = BusinessType.INSERT)
    @PostMapping
    public AjaxResult add(@RequestBody DevCardInfo devCardInfo)
    {
        int rt = devCardInfoService.insertDevCardInfo(devCardInfo);
        return  AjaxResult.success("操作成功", rt);
    }
    /**
     * 修改门卡
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:cardInfo:update")
    @Log(title = "门卡", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PutMapping
    public AjaxResult edit(@RequestBody DevCardInfo devCardInfo)
    {
        int rt = devCardInfoService.updateDevCardInfo(devCardInfo);
        return  AjaxResult.success("操作成功", rt);
    }
    /**
     * 删除门卡
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:cardInfo:remove")
    @Log(title = "门卡删除", businessType = BusinessType.DELETE)
	@DeleteMapping("/{ids}")
    public AjaxResult remove(@PathVariable Long[] ids)
    {
        return toAjax(devCardInfoService.deleteDevCardInfoByIds(ids));
    }
    /**
     * @Description:修改门卡状态
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-04-06 16:07:18
     * @param devCardInfo:
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @Log(title = "门卡管理", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PutMapping("/changeStatus")
    public AjaxResult changeStatus(@RequestBody DevCardInfo devCardInfo)
    {
        return toAjax(devCardInfoService.changeStatus(devCardInfo));
    }
    /**
     * @Description:添加门卡页面查询门锁
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-04-07 08:54:38
     * @param devLockInfo:
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo
     */
    @GetMapping("/listLockInfos")
    public TableDataInfo listLockInfos(DevLockInfo devLockInfo)
    {
        startPage();
        List<DevLockInfo> list = devLockInfoService.selectLocksForCards(devLockInfo);
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    @GetMapping("/listUsers")
    public AjaxResult listUsers()
    {
        List<Map<String,Object>> userGroups = new ArrayList<>();
        Map<String,Object> userGroup = new HashMap<>();
        /*userGroup.put("label","学生");
        userGroup.put("type","1");
        List<SchoolStuInfo> stuInfos = stuInfoMapper.selectSchoolStuInfoList(new SchoolStuInfo());
        userGroup.put("users",stuInfos);
        userGroups.add(userGroup);*/
        userGroup = new HashMap<>();
        userGroup.put("label","教师");
        userGroup.put("type","2");
        List<SchoolTeaInfo> teaInfos = teaInfoMapper.selectSchoolTeaInfoList(new SchoolTeaInfo());
        userGroup.put("users",teaInfos);
        userGroups.add(userGroup);
        userGroup = new HashMap<>();
        userGroup.put("label","其他人员");
        userGroup.put("type","3");
        List<SchoolTempUserInfo> tempUserInfos = tempUserInfoMapper.selectSchoolTempUserInfoList(new SchoolTempUserInfo());
        DictUtils.getDictName(tempUserInfos);
        userGroup.put("users",tempUserInfos);
        userGroups.add(userGroup);
        return success(userGroups);
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.controller;
import java.text.DecimalFormat;
import java.text.Format;
import java.util.List;
import javax.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.DateUtils;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.StringUtils;
import com.chenrise.common.datascope.annotation.DataScope;
import com.chenrise.jufe.mapper.DevClassBoardMapper;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.GetMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PostMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PutMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.DeleteMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PathVariable;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestBody;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RestController;
import com.chenrise.common.log.annotation.Log;
import com.chenrise.common.log.enums.BusinessType;
import com.chenrise.common.security.annotation.RequiresPermissions;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.DevClassBoard;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.IDevClassBoardService;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.controller.BaseController;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.poi.ExcelUtil;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo;
/**
 * 班牌信息Controller
 * 
 * @author liyiying
 * @date 2022-11-22
 */
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/board")
public class DevClassBoardController extends BaseController
{
    @Autowired
    private IDevClassBoardService devClassBoardService;
    @Autowired
    private DevClassBoardMapper devClassBoardMapper;
    /**
     * 查询班牌信息列表
     * @Description: 查询班牌信息列表
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 16:26:52
     * @param devClassBoard 班牌信息
     * @return {@link TableDataInfo }
     */
    @DataScope(deptAlias = "d", userAlias = "u")
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:board:list")
    @GetMapping("/list")
    public TableDataInfo list(DevClassBoard devClassBoard)
    {
        startPage();
        List<DevClassBoard> list = devClassBoardService.selectDevClassBoardList(devClassBoard);
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     * 导出班牌信息列表
     * @Description: 导出班牌信息列表
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 16:26:45
     * @param response 响应
     * @param devClassBoard 班牌信息
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:board:export")
    @Log(title = "班牌信息", businessType = BusinessType.EXPORT)
    @PostMapping("/export")
    public void export(HttpServletResponse response, DevClassBoard devClassBoard)
    {
        List<DevClassBoard> list = devClassBoardService.selectDevClassBoardList(devClassBoard);
        ExcelUtil<DevClassBoard> util = new ExcelUtil<DevClassBoard>(DevClassBoard.class);
        util.exportExcel(response, list, "班牌信息数据");
    }
    /**
     * 获取班牌信息详细信息
     * @Description: 获取班牌信息详细信息
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 16:26:39
     * @param boardId 需要删除的班牌信息主键集合
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:board:query")
    @GetMapping(value = "/{boardId}")
    public AjaxResult getInfo(@PathVariable("boardId") Long boardId)
    {
        return success(devClassBoardService.selectDevClassBoardByBoardId(boardId));
    }
    /**
     * 新增班牌信息
     * @Description: 新增班牌信息
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 16:26:34
     * @param devClassBoard 班牌信息
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:board:add")
    @Log(title = "班牌信息", businessType = BusinessType.INSERT)
    @PostMapping
    public AjaxResult add(@RequestBody DevClassBoard devClassBoard)
    {
        if (StringUtils.isEmpty(devClassBoard.getBoardCode())){
            String code = "BP"+ DateUtils.dateTime();
            DevClassBoard devClassBoardCont = new DevClassBoard();
            devClassBoardCont.setBoardCodeLike(code);
            Format f1=new DecimalFormat("000");
            List<DevClassBoard> coutnList = devClassBoardService.selectDevClassBoardList(devClassBoardCont);
            devClassBoard.setBoardCode("BP"+DateUtils.dateTime()+f1.format(coutnList.size()+1));
        }else{
            DevClassBoard devClassBoardCont = new DevClassBoard();
            devClassBoardCont.setBoardCode(devClassBoard.getBoardCode());
            List<DevClassBoard> coutnList = devClassBoardService.selectDevClassBoardList(devClassBoardCont);
            if (coutnList.size() > 0){
                return AjaxResult.error("班牌编号已存在");
            }
        }
        DevClassBoard devClassBoardCont = new DevClassBoard();
        devClassBoardCont.setIpAddressAccurate(devClassBoard.getIpAddress());
        List<DevClassBoard> coutnList = devClassBoardService.selectDevClassBoardList(devClassBoardCont);
        if (coutnList.size() > 0){
            return AjaxResult.error("IP已存在");
        }
        return toAjax(devClassBoardService.insertDevClassBoard(devClassBoard));
    }
    /**
     * 修改班牌信息
     * @Description: 修改班牌信息
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 16:26:16
     * @param devClassBoard 班牌信息
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:board:edit")
    @Log(title = "班牌信息", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PutMapping
    public AjaxResult edit(@RequestBody DevClassBoard devClassBoard)
    {
        return toAjax(devClassBoardService.updateDevClassBoard(devClassBoard));
    }
    /**
     * 删除班牌信息
     * @Description: 删除班牌信息
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 16:26:10
     * @param boardIds 需要删除的班牌信息主键集合
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:board:remove")
    @Log(title = "班牌信息", businessType = BusinessType.DELETE)
    @DeleteMapping("/{boardIds}")
    public AjaxResult remove(@PathVariable Long[] boardIds)
    {
//        for (Long boardId:boardIds
//        ) {
//            DevClassBoard board = devClassBoardService.selectDevClassBoardByBoardId(boardId);
//            if (board.getRoomId() != null){
//                return AjaxResult.error("班牌已关联教室，暂不可删除");
//            }
//        }
        return toAjax(devClassBoardService.deleteDevClassBoardByBoardIds(boardIds));
    }
    /**
     * 启用停用班牌信息
     * @Description: 启用停用班牌信息
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 16:26:02
     * @param boardIds
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:board:edit")
    @Log(title = "班牌信息", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PutMapping("/{boardIds}")
    public AjaxResult updateBoardStatus(@PathVariable Long[] boardIds)
    {
        return toAjax(devClassBoardService.updateDevClassBoardStatusByBoardIds(boardIds));
    }
    /**
     * 得到可用列表
     * @Description: 得到可用列表
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-11-24 17:24:05
     * @param roomId 房间id
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @GetMapping("/getUsableList/{roomId}")
    public AjaxResult getUsableList(@PathVariable String roomId)
    {
        List<DevClassBoard> list = devClassBoardMapper.getUsableList(roomId);
        return AjaxResult.success(list);
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.controller;
import com.chenrise.common.core.domain.R;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.poi.ExcelUtil;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo;
import com.chenrise.common.datascope.annotation.DataScope;
import com.chenrise.common.log.annotation.Log;
import com.chenrise.common.log.enums.BusinessType;
import com.chenrise.common.security.annotation.RequiresPermissions;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.DevGatewayInfo;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.SchoolLocation;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.DeviceCommandService;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.IDevGatewayInfoService;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.ISchoolLocationService;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.*;
import javax.annotation.Resource;
import javax.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse;
import java.util.List;
/**
 * 网关信息
 Controller
 *
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2022-11-22
 */
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/gatewayInfo")
public class DevGatewayInfoController extends BaseController
{
    @Autowired
    private IDevGatewayInfoService devGatewayInfoService;
    @Resource
    private ISchoolLocationService locationService;
    @Autowired
    private DeviceCommandService deviceCommandService;
    /**
     *
     查询网关信息列表
     * @Description: 查询网关信息列表
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/02
     * @param devGatewayInfo dev网关信息
     * @return {@link TableDataInfo }
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:gatewayInfo:list")
    @GetMapping("/list")
    public TableDataInfo list(DevGatewayInfo devGatewayInfo){
        startPage();
        List<DevGatewayInfo> list = devGatewayInfoService.selectDevGatewayInfoList(devGatewayInfo);
        for(DevGatewayInfo dgi:list){
            SchoolLocation location = locationService.selectSchoolLocationByLocationId(dgi.getBuildPosId());
            if(location!=null){
                String fullName = locationService.fullName(location);
                dgi.setBuildPosName(fullName);
            }
        }
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     *
     导出网关信息
     列表
     * @Description: 导出网关信息列表
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/02
     * @param response 响应
     * @param devGatewayInfo dev网关信息
     *
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:gatewayInfo:export")
    @Log(title = "网关信息", businessType = BusinessType.EXPORT)
    @PostMapping("/export")
    public void export(HttpServletResponse response, DevGatewayInfo devGatewayInfo){
        List<DevGatewayInfo> list = devGatewayInfoService.selectDevGatewayInfoList(devGatewayInfo);
        ExcelUtil<DevGatewayInfo> util = new ExcelUtil<DevGatewayInfo>(DevGatewayInfo.class);
        util.exportExcel(response, list, "网关信息数据");
    }
    /**
     *
     获取网关信息
     详细信息
     * @Description: 获取网关信息详细信息
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/02
     * @param deviceId 设备id
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:gatewayInfo:query")
    @GetMapping(value = "/{deviceId}")
    public AjaxResult getInfo(@PathVariable("deviceId") Long deviceId){
        return success(devGatewayInfoService.selectDevGatewayInfoByDeviceId(deviceId));
    }
    /**
     *
     新增网关信息
     * @Description: 新增网关信息
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/02
     * @param devGatewayInfo dev网关信息
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:gatewayInfo:add")
    @Log(title = "网关信息", businessType = BusinessType.INSERT)
    @PostMapping
    public AjaxResult add(@RequestBody DevGatewayInfo devGatewayInfo){
        System.out.println();
        return toAjax(devGatewayInfoService.insertDevGatewayInfo(devGatewayInfo));
    }
    /**
     *
     修改网关信息
     * @Description: 修改网关信息
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/02
     * @param devGatewayInfo dev网关信息
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:gatewayInfo:edit")
    @Log(title = "网关信息", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PutMapping
    public AjaxResult edit(@RequestBody DevGatewayInfo devGatewayInfo){
        return toAjax(devGatewayInfoService.updateDevGatewayInfo(devGatewayInfo));
    }
    /**
     *
     删除网关信息
     * @Description: 删除网关信息
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/02
     * @param deviceIds 设备id
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:gatewayInfo:remove")
    @Log(title = "网关信息", businessType = BusinessType.DELETE)
    @DeleteMapping("/{deviceIds}")
    public AjaxResult remove(@PathVariable Long[] deviceIds){
        return toAjax(devGatewayInfoService.deleteDevGatewayInfoByDeviceIds(deviceIds));
    }
    /**
     *
     查询网关信息列表
     * @Description: 查询网关信息列表
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/02
     * @param devGatewayInfo dev网关信息
     * @return {@link TableDataInfo }
     */
    @GetMapping("/listForSelect")
    public TableDataInfo listForSelect(DevGatewayInfo devGatewayInfo){
        List<DevGatewayInfo> list = devGatewayInfoService.selectDevGatewayInfoList(devGatewayInfo);
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     * 查询全部网关
     * @Description: 查询全部网关
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 16:31:34
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @DataScope(deptAlias = "d", userAlias = "u")
    @GetMapping("/getAllGatewayList")
    public AjaxResult getAllGatewayList(){
        DevGatewayInfo devGatewayInfo = new DevGatewayInfo();
        List<DevGatewayInfo> list = devGatewayInfoService.getAllGatewayList(devGatewayInfo);
        return AjaxResult.success(list);
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 发起tcp连接
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-12-15 09:45:52
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.domain.R<java.lang.Object>
     */
    @GetMapping("/tcpConnectGateway")
    public R<Object> tcpConnectGateway(){
        R<Object>  object = deviceCommandService.connectGateway();
        return object;
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.controller;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.StringUtils;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.poi.ExcelUtil;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.controller.BaseController;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo;
import com.chenrise.common.datascope.annotation.DataScope;
import com.chenrise.common.log.annotation.Log;
import com.chenrise.common.log.enums.BusinessType;
import com.chenrise.common.security.annotation.RequiresPermissions;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.DevGroupingInfo;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.DevLockInfo;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.vo.GropingVO;
import com.chenrise.jufe.mapper.DevLockInfoMapper;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.IDevGroupingInfoService;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.*;
import org.springframework.web.multipart.MultipartFile;
import javax.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse;
import java.util.Date;
import java.util.List;
/**
 * 分组信息Controller
 *
 * @author liyiying
 * @date 2022-11-22
 */
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/grouping")
public class DevGroupingInfoController extends BaseController
{
    @Autowired
    private IDevGroupingInfoService devGroupingInfoService;
    @Autowired
    private DevLockInfoMapper lockInfoMapper;
    /**
     * 查询分组信息列表查询分组信息列表
     * @Description: 查询分组信息列表
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 16:32:32
     * @param devGroupingInfo dev分组信息
     * @return {@link TableDataInfo }
     */
    @DataScope(deptAlias = "d", userAlias = "u")
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:grouping:list")
    @GetMapping("/list")
    public TableDataInfo list(DevGroupingInfo devGroupingInfo)
    {
        startPage();
        List<DevGroupingInfo> list = devGroupingInfoService.selectDevGroupingInfoList(devGroupingInfo);
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     * 导出分组信息列表
     * @Description: 导出分组信息列表
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 16:32:39
     * @param response 响应
     * @param devGroupingInfo dev分组信息
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:grouping:export")
    @Log(title = "分组信息", businessType = BusinessType.EXPORT)
    @PostMapping("/export")
    public void export(HttpServletResponse response, DevGroupingInfo devGroupingInfo)
    {
        List<DevGroupingInfo> list = devGroupingInfoService.selectDevGroupingInfoList(devGroupingInfo);
        ExcelUtil<DevGroupingInfo> util = new ExcelUtil<DevGroupingInfo>(DevGroupingInfo.class);
        util.exportExcel(response, list, "分组信息数据");
    }
    /**
     * 获取分组信息详细信息
     * @Description: 获取分组信息详细信息
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 16:32:45
     * @param deviceId 设备id
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:grouping:query")
    @GetMapping(value = "/{deviceId}")
    public AjaxResult getInfo(@PathVariable("deviceId") Long deviceId)
    {
        return success(devGroupingInfoService.selectDevGroupingInfoByDeviceId(deviceId));
    }
    /**
     * 新增分组信息
     * @Description: 新增分组信息
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 16:32:51
     * @param devGroupingInfo dev分组信息
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:grouping:add")
    @Log(title = "分组信息", businessType = BusinessType.INSERT)
    @PostMapping
    public AjaxResult add(@RequestBody DevGroupingInfo devGroupingInfo)
    {
        if (devGroupingInfo.getDeviceName() != null && StringUtils.isNotBlank(devGroupingInfo.getDeviceName())){
            DevGroupingInfo devGroupingInfoCont = new DevGroupingInfo();
            devGroupingInfoCont.setDeviceNameAccurate(devGroupingInfo.getDeviceName());
            List<DevGroupingInfo> coutnList = devGroupingInfoService.selectDevGroupingInfoList(devGroupingInfoCont);
            if (coutnList.size() > 0){
                return AjaxResult.error("分组名称已存在");
            }
        }
        if (devGroupingInfo.getDeviceIp() != null && StringUtils.isNotBlank(devGroupingInfo.getDeviceIp())){
            DevGroupingInfo devGroupingInfoCont = new DevGroupingInfo();
            devGroupingInfoCont.setDeviceIp(devGroupingInfo.getDeviceIp());
            List<DevGroupingInfo> coutnList = devGroupingInfoService.selectDevGroupingInfoList(devGroupingInfoCont);
            if (coutnList.size() > 0){
                return AjaxResult.error("IP已存在");
            }
        }
        devGroupingInfo.setIssuedStatus(1L);
        devGroupingInfo.setIssuedTime(new Date());
        return toAjax(devGroupingInfoService.insertDevGroupingInfo(devGroupingInfo));
    }
    /**
     * 修改分组信息
     * @Description: 修改分组信息
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 16:33:02
     * @param devGroupingInfo dev分组信息
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:grouping:edit")
    @Log(title = "分组信息", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PutMapping
    public AjaxResult edit(@RequestBody DevGroupingInfo devGroupingInfo)
    {
        DevGroupingInfo devGroupingInfoOld = devGroupingInfoService.selectDevGroupingInfoByDeviceId(devGroupingInfo.getDeviceId());
        if (devGroupingInfoOld.getBuildStorey()!=null && !devGroupingInfoOld.getBuildStorey().equals(devGroupingInfo.getBuildStorey())){
            DevLockInfo devLockInfo = new DevLockInfo();
            devLockInfo.setGroupId(devGroupingInfo.getDeviceId());
            List<DevLockInfo> list = lockInfoMapper.selectDevLockInfoList(devLockInfo);
            if (list.size() > 0){
                return AjaxResult.error("该网关分组楼栋信息下关联教室门锁不可进行修改");
            }
        }
        return toAjax(devGroupingInfoService.updateDevGroupingInfo(devGroupingInfo));
    }
    /**
     * 批量下发
     * @Description: 批量下发
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-12-15 12:46:51
     * @param deviceIds 设备ids
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:grouping:issue")
    @Log(title = "分组信息", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PutMapping("/issue/{deviceIds}")
    public AjaxResult issue(@PathVariable Long[] deviceIds)
    {
        return toAjax(devGroupingInfoService.issueDevGroupingInfoByDeviceIds(deviceIds));
    }
    /**
     * 删除分组信息
     * @Description: 删除分组信息
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 16:33:09
     * @param deviceIds
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:grouping:remove")
    @Log(title = "分组信息", businessType = BusinessType.DELETE)
	@DeleteMapping("/{deviceIds}")
    public AjaxResult remove(@PathVariable Long[] deviceIds)
    {
        return toAjax(devGroupingInfoService.deleteDevGroupingInfoByDeviceIds(deviceIds));
    }
    /**
     * 启用停用
     * @Description: 启用停用
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 16:33:23
     * @param deviceIds
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:grouping:edit")
    @Log(title = "分组信息", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PutMapping("/{deviceIds}")
    public AjaxResult updateBoardStatus(@PathVariable Long[] deviceIds)
    {
        return toAjax(devGroupingInfoService.updateDevGroupingInfoStatusByDeviceIds(deviceIds));
    }
    /**
     * 导入模板
     * @Description: 导入模板
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 16:44:11
     * @param response 响应
     */
    @PostMapping("/importTemplate")
    public void importTemplate(HttpServletResponse response) {
        ExcelUtil<GropingVO> util = new ExcelUtil<GropingVO>(GropingVO.class);
        util.importTemplateExcel(response,"分组导入模板");
    }
    /**
     * 导入数据
     * @Description: 导入数据
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 11:10:52
     * @param file 文件
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:grouping:in")
    @PostMapping("/importData")
    public AjaxResult importData(MultipartFile file) throws Exception {
        ExcelUtil<GropingVO> util = new ExcelUtil<>(GropingVO.class);
        List<GropingVO> list = util.importExcel(file.getInputStream());
        String message = devGroupingInfoService.importData(list);
        return AjaxResult.success(message);
    }
    /**
     * 不带权限的列表方法
     * @param devGroupingInfo
     * @return
     */
    @GetMapping("/listOnly")
    public TableDataInfo listOnly(DevGroupingInfo devGroupingInfo)
    {
        List<DevGroupingInfo> list = devGroupingInfoService.selectDevGroupingInfoList(devGroupingInfo);
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.controller;
import com.chenrise.common.core.domain.R;

/**
 * 设备控制Controller
 * 
 * @author liyiying
 * @date 2022-11-24

@RestController
@RequestMapping("/deviceControl")
public class DeviceControlController extends BaseController
{
    @Autowired
    private ISchoolRoomService schoolRoomService;
    @Autowired
    private IDevPowerNodeInfoService devPowerNodeInfoService;
    @Autowired
    private IDevGatewayInfoService devGatewayInfoService;
    /**
     * 查询教室控制列表
     * @Description: 查询教室控制列表
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-11-30 11:12:25
     * @param schoolRoom 学校房间
     * @return {@link TableDataInfo }
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:deviceControl:list")
    @GetMapping("/list")
    public TableDataInfo list(SchoolRoom schoolRoom)
    {
        startPage();
        List<Map<String,Object>> list = schoolRoomService.selectDeviceStatisticsList(schoolRoom);
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     * 查询教室控制计数
     * @Description: 查询教室控制计数

     * @Date: 2022-11-30 13:11:07

     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:deviceControl:list")
    @GetMapping("/count")
    public AjaxResult count(SchoolRoom schoolRoom)
    {
        Map<String,Object> map = schoolRoomService.selectDeviceStatisticsCount(schoolRoom);
        return AjaxResult.success(map);
    }
    /**
     * @Description:
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-01-18 14:46:04
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @GetMapping("/countListRoom")
    public AjaxResult countListRoom( SchoolRoom schoolRoom)
    {
        Map<String,Object> map = schoolRoomService.selectDeviceStatisticsCountList(schoolRoom.getRoomIds());
        return AjaxResult.success(map);
    }
    /**
     * 门锁总控-修改门锁状态
     * @Description: 门锁总控-修改门锁状态

     */

    @Log(title = "门锁总控", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PutMapping("/updateLock")
    public AjaxResult updateLock(@RequestBody DeviceControlVO vo)
    {
        return AjaxResult.success(schoolRoomService.updateLock(vo.getLocationId(),vo.getType(),vo.getRoomIds(),vo.getIds(),"5"));
    }
    /**
     * 电源总控-修改电源状态
     * @Description: 电源总控-修改电源状态

    @Log(title = "电源总控", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PutMapping("/updatePowerNode")
    public AjaxResult updatePowerNode(@RequestBody DeviceControlVO vo)
    {
        return schoolRoomService.updatePowerNode(vo.getLocationId(),vo.getType(),vo.getRoomIds(),vo.getIds(),"5",vo.getIsBatch());
    }
    /**
     * @Description:进入教室后选择部分空开进行控制

     */

    {
        return schoolRoomService.updatePowerNodeSelect(vo.getLocationId(),vo.getType(),vo.getRoomIds(),vo.getIds(),"5");
    }
    /**
     * 门锁总控-app
     * @Description: 门锁总控-app
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-12-02 10:51:04
     * @param locationId 位置标识
     * @param type 类型 1:开2:关 3:常开
     * @param roomIds 房间id
     * @param ids id
     * @return {@link R }<{@link AjaxResult }>
     */

    @PutMapping("/updateLockToApp")
    public R<AjaxResult> updateLockToApp(Long locationId,Long type,Long[] roomIds,Long[] ids)
    {
        return R.ok(AjaxResult.success(schoolRoomService.updateLock(locationId,type,roomIds,ids,"1")));
    }
    /**
     * 电源总控-app
     * @Description: 电源总控-app
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-12-02 13:23:23

     * @param ids id
     * @return {@link AjaxResult } 
     */
    @Log(title = "电源总控-app", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PutMapping("/updatePowerNodeToApp")
    public R<AjaxResult> updatePowerNodeToApp(Long locationId,Long type,Long[] roomIds,Long[] ids,Long isBatch)
    {
        return R.ok(AjaxResult.success(schoolRoomService.updatePowerNode(locationId,type,roomIds,ids,"1",isBatch)));
    }
    /**
     * 查询设备信息列表
     * @Description: 查询教室控制列表
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-11-30 11:12:25
     * @param vo 设备信息
     * @return {@link TableDataInfo }
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:deviceControl:list")
    @GetMapping("/deviceList")
    public TableDataInfo deviceList(DeviceInfoVO vo)
    {
        startPage();
        List<DeviceInfoVO> list = schoolRoomService.selectDeviceInfoVOList(vo);
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    @Log(title = "定时任务-根据最后心跳设置设备离线-空开电源", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @GetMapping("/setPowerNodeInfOffLine")
    public R<AjaxResult> setPowerNodeInfOffLine(Date time)
    {
        return R.ok(toAjax(devPowerNodeInfoService.setPowerNodeInfOffLine(time)));
    }
    /**
     * @Description:
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-04-06 09:38:44
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.domain.R<com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult>
     */

    @GetMapping("/setLockDevInfOffLine")

    {
        return R.ok(toAjax(devGatewayInfoService.setLockDevInfOffLine()));
    }

     */

    public AjaxResult resendMsgToDevice(){
        return devPowerNodeInfoService.resendMsgToDevice();
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.controller;
import cn.hutool.json.JSONObject;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.IDeviceDashboardService;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.ISchoolRoomService;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.GetMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RestController;
import javax.annotation.Resource;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
/**
 * apk版本Controller
 *
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2022-12-10
 */
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/devicedashboard")
public class DeviceDashboardController extends BaseController
{
    @Resource private IDeviceDashboardService ddService;
    @Resource private ISchoolRoomService roomService;
    /**
     * 设备统计
     * @return
     */
    @GetMapping("/sbtj")
    public AjaxResult sbtj()
    {
        int totalPower = ddService.getPowerNum(null);
        int onlinePower = ddService.getPowerNum("1");
        int totalLock = ddService.getLockNum(null);
        int onlineLock = ddService.getLockNum("1");
        int collectorNum = ddService.getCollectorNum();
        JSONObject data = new JSONObject()
                .putOnce("total", (totalPower+totalLock+collectorNum))
                .putOnce("totalPower", totalPower)
                .putOnce("onlinePower", onlinePower)
                .putOnce("totalLock", totalLock)
                .putOnce("onlineLock", onlineLock)
                .putOnce("collectorNum", collectorNum);
        return AjaxResult.success(data);
    }
    /**
     * 环境监测
     * @return
     */
    @GetMapping("/hjjc")
    public AjaxResult hjjc()
    {
        List<Map<String,Object>> list = ddService.getRoomStatus();
        String[] xDatas = list.stream().map(e -> e.get("room_id") == null ? "" : e.get("room_id").toString()).toArray(String[]::new);
        Float[] yDatas_wd = list.stream().map(e -> e.get("wd_num") == null ? 0.0f : Float.parseFloat(e.get("wd_num").toString())).toArray(Float[]::new);
        Float[] yDatas_sd = list.stream().map(e -> e.get("sd_num") == null ? 0.0f : Float.parseFloat(e.get("sd_num").toString())).toArray(Float[]::new);
        Float[] yDatas_pm25 = list.stream().map(e -> e.get("pm25_num") == null ? 0.0f : Float.parseFloat(e.get("pm25_num").toString())).toArray(Float[]::new);
        Float[] yDatas_pm10 = list.stream().map(e -> e.get("pm10_num") == null ? 0.0f : Float.parseFloat(e.get("pm10_num").toString())).toArray(Float[]::new);
        Float[] yDatas_gz = list.stream().map(e -> e.get("gz_num") == null ? 0.0f : Float.parseFloat(e.get("gz_num").toString())).toArray(Float[]::new);
        String[] deviceCodes = list.stream().map(e -> e.get("code") == null ? "" : e.get("code").toString()).toArray(String[]::new);
        JSONObject data = new JSONObject()
                .putOnce("xDatas", xDatas)
                .putOnce("yDatas_wd", yDatas_wd)
                .putOnce("yDatas_sd", yDatas_sd)
                .putOnce("yDatas_pm25", yDatas_pm25)
                .putOnce("yDatas_pm10", yDatas_pm10)
                .putOnce("yDatas_gz", yDatas_gz)
                .putOnce("device_codes", deviceCodes);
        return AjaxResult.success(data);
    }
    /**
     * 设备分布
     * @return
     */
    @GetMapping("/sbfb")
    public AjaxResult sbfb()
    {
        List<Map<String,Object>> list = ddService.getRoomDevice();
        String[] xDatas = list.stream().map(x -> x.get("room_id") == null ? "" : x.get("room_id").toString()).toArray(String[]::new);
        Integer[] yDatas_power = list.stream().map(x -> x.get("power_num") == null ? 0 : Integer.parseInt(x.get("power_num").toString())).toArray(Integer[]::new);
        Integer[] yDatas_lock = list.stream().map(x -> x.get("lock_num") == null ? 0 : Integer.parseInt(x.get("lock_num").toString())).toArray(Integer[]::new);
        Integer[] yDatas_collector = list.stream().map(x -> x.get("collector_num") == null ? 0 : Integer.parseInt(x.get("collector_num").toString())).toArray(Integer[]::new);
        JSONObject data = new JSONObject()
                .putOnce("xDatas",xDatas)
                .putOnce("yDatas_power",yDatas_power)
                .putOnce("yDatas_lock",yDatas_lock)
                .putOnce("yDatas_collector",yDatas_collector);
        return AjaxResult.success(data);
    }
    /**
     * 电池亏损
     * @return
     */
    @GetMapping("/dcks")
    public AjaxResult dcks()
    {
        List<Map<String,Object>> list = ddService.getLockPower();
        return AjaxResult.success(list);
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.controller;
import java.util.List;

/**

@RestController
@RequestMapping("/locklog")
public class DevLockConLogController extends BaseController
{
    @Autowired
    private IDevLockConLogService devLockConLogService;
    /**
     * @Description:门锁日志列表

     */

    @GetMapping("/list")
    public TableDataInfo list(DevLockConLog devLockConLog)
    {
        startPage();
        List<DevLockConLog> list = devLockConLogService.selectDevLockConLogList(devLockConLog);
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**

    @Log(title = "门锁控制日志", businessType = BusinessType.EXPORT)
    @PostMapping("/export")
    public void export(HttpServletResponse response, DevLockConLog devLockConLog)
    {
        List<DevLockConLog> list = devLockConLogService.selectDevLockConLogList(devLockConLog);
        ExcelUtil<DevLockConLog> util = new ExcelUtil<DevLockConLog>(DevLockConLog.class);
        util.exportExcel(response, list, "门锁控制记录");
    }
    /**
     * @Description:根据id查询

     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @GetMapping(value = "/{deviceId}")
    public AjaxResult getInfo(@PathVariable("deviceId") Long deviceId)
    {
        return success(devLockConLogService.selectDevLockConLogByDeviceId(deviceId));
    }
    @GetMapping(value = "/getByOperNum/{operNum}")
    public AjaxResult getByOperNum(@PathVariable("operNum") String operNum)
    {
        return success(devLockConLogService.selectDevLockConLogByOperNum(operNum));
    }
    /**
     * @Description:新增操作日志
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-11-28 14:47:20
     * @param devLockConLog:
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:locklog:add")
    @Log(title = "门锁控制日志", businessType = BusinessType.INSERT)
    @PostMapping
    public AjaxResult add(@RequestBody DevLockConLog devLockConLog)
    {
        return toAjax(devLockConLogService.insertDevLockConLog(devLockConLog));
    }
    /**
     * @Description:修改操作日志
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-11-28 14:47:34
     * @param devLockConLog:
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     */

    @Log(title = "门锁控制日志", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)

    public AjaxResult edit(@RequestBody DevLockConLog devLockConLog)
    {
        return toAjax(devLockConLogService.updateDevLockConLog(devLockConLog));
    }
    /**
     * @Description:删除操作日志

     * @param deviceIds:
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:locklog:remove")
    @Log(title = "门锁控制日志", businessType = BusinessType.DELETE)
	@DeleteMapping("/{deviceIds}")
    public AjaxResult remove(@PathVariable Long[] deviceIds)
    {
        return toAjax(devLockConLogService.deleteDevLockConLogByDeviceIds(deviceIds));
    }
    /**
     * @Description:更新门锁操作日志结果
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-02-15 13:47:10
     * @param object:
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.domain.R<java.lang.Object>
     */
    @PostMapping("/updateLogStatue")
    public R<Object> updateLogStatue(@RequestBody Object object) {
        JSONObject obj =  JSONUtil.parseObj(JSONUtil.toJsonStr(JSONUtil.toJsonStr(object)));
        Integer count = devLockConLogService.updateLogStatue(obj);
        return   R.ok("保存成功");
    }
    /**
     * @Description:密码开锁添加操作日志
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-02-20 18:54:29
     * @param deviceId: 门锁id
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.domain.R<java.lang.Integer>
     */
    @GetMapping("/addPasswordLog/{deviceId}&{numInfo}&{verNum}&{lockStatus}")
    public R<Integer> addPasswordLog(@PathVariable String deviceId,@PathVariable String numInfo,@PathVariable String verNum,@PathVariable String lockStatus) {
        return R.ok(devLockConLogService.addPasswordLog(deviceId,numInfo,verNum,lockStatus));
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.controller;
import java.util.List;

import javax.annotation.Resource;

import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.vo.PowerVo;

import com.chenrise.jufe.service.ISchoolRoomService;
import org.springframework.beans.BeanUtils;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.GetMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PostMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PutMapping;

/**
 * 门锁信息Controller
 *
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2022-11-24
 */
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/lock")
public class DevLockInfoController extends BaseController
{
    @Resource
    private IDevLockInfoService devLockInfoService;
    @Resource
    private ISchoolRoomService roomService;
    @Resource
    private ISchoolLocationService locationService;
    /**
     *
     查询门锁信息列表
     * @Description: 查询门锁信息列表
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/02
     * @param devLockInfo dev锁信息
     * @return {@link TableDataInfo }
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:lock:list")
    @GetMapping("/list")
    public TableDataInfo list(DevLockInfo devLockInfo) {
        startPage();
        List<DevLockInfo> list = devLockInfoService.selectDevLockInfoList(devLockInfo);
        for (DevLockInfo dli:list) {
            SchoolRoom room = roomService.selectSchoolRoomByRoomId(dli.getRoomId());
            if (room != null) {
                SchoolLocation location = locationService.selectSchoolLocationByLocationId(room.getLocationId());
                if (location != null) {
                    String fullName = locationService.fullName(location);
                    dli.setRoomName(fullName+"-"+room.getRoomName());
                }
            }
        }
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     *
     导出门锁信息列表
     * @Description: 导出门锁信息列表
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/02
     * @param response 响应
     * @param devLockInfo dev锁信息
     *
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:lock:export")
    @Log(title = "门锁信息", businessType = BusinessType.EXPORT)
    @PostMapping("/export")
    public void export(HttpServletResponse response, DevLockInfo devLockInfo)
    {
        List<DevLockInfo> list = devLockInfoService.selectDevLockInfoList(devLockInfo);
        ExcelUtil<DevLockInfo> util = new ExcelUtil<DevLockInfo>(DevLockInfo.class);
        util.exportExcel(response, list, "门锁信息数据");
    }
    /**
     *
     获取门锁信息详细信息
     * @Description: 获取门锁信息详细信息
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/02
     * @param deviceId 设备id
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:lock:query")
    @GetMapping(value = "/{deviceId}")
    public AjaxResult getInfo(@PathVariable("deviceId") Long deviceId)
    {
        return success(devLockInfoService.selectDevLockInfoByDeviceId(deviceId));
    }
    /**
     *
     新增门锁信息
     * @Description: 新增门锁信息
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/02
     * @param devLockInfo dev锁信息
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:lock:add")
    @Log(title = "门锁信息", businessType = BusinessType.INSERT)
    @PostMapping
    public AjaxResult add(@RequestBody DevLockInfo devLockInfo)
    {
        return toAjax(devLockInfoService.insertDevLockInfo(devLockInfo));
    }
    /**
     *
     修改门锁信息
     * @Description: 修改门锁信息
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/02
     * @param devLockInfo dev锁信息
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:lock:edit")
    @Log(title = "门锁信息", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PutMapping
    public AjaxResult edit(@RequestBody DevLockInfo devLockInfo)
    {
        return toAjax(devLockInfoService.updateDevLockInfo(devLockInfo));
    }
    /**
     *
     删除门锁信息
     * @Description: 删除门锁信息
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/02
     * @param deviceIds
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:lock:remove")
    @Log(title = "门锁信息", businessType = BusinessType.DELETE)
	@DeleteMapping("/{deviceIds}")
    public AjaxResult remove(@PathVariable Long[] deviceIds)
    {
        return toAjax(devLockInfoService.deleteDevLockInfoByDeviceIds(deviceIds));
    }
    /**
     *
     导入模板
     * @Description: 导入模板
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/02
     * @param response 响应
     *
     */
    @PostMapping("/importTemplate")
    public void importTemplate(HttpServletResponse response) {
        ExcelUtil<DevLockInfo> util = new ExcelUtil<DevLockInfo>(DevLockInfo.class);
        util.importTemplateExcel(response,"门锁导入模板");
    }
    /**
     *
     导入数据
     * @Description: 导入数据
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/02
     * @param file 文件
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
//    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:lock:in')")
    @PostMapping("/importData")
    public AjaxResult importData(MultipartFile file) throws Exception {
        ExcelUtil<DevLockInfo> util = new ExcelUtil<>(DevLockInfo.class);
        List<DevLockInfo> list = util.importExcel(file.getInputStream());
        String message = devLockInfoService.importData(list);
        return AjaxResult.success(message);
    }
    /**
     *
     设置门锁密码
     * @Description: 设置门锁密码
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/02
     * @param devLockInfo
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:lock:password")
    @Log(title = "门锁信息", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PostMapping("/setPassword")
    public AjaxResult setPassword(@RequestBody DevLockInfo devLockInfo)
    {
        List<Long> ids = null;
        if(devLockInfo.getParams().get("ids")!=null){
            ids = (List<Long>) devLockInfo.getParams().get("ids");
        }
        devLockInfoService.setPassword(ids,devLockInfo.getPassWord());
        return success();
    }
    /**
     * @Description:设置门卡
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-04-03 11:18:30
     * @param devLockInfo:
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:lock:cardInfos")
    @Log(title = "设置门卡", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PostMapping("/setCardInfos")
    public AjaxResult setCardInfos(@RequestBody DevLockInfo devLockInfo)
    {
        List<Long> ids = null;
        if(devLockInfo.getParams().get("ids")!=null){
            ids = (List<Long>) devLockInfo.getParams().get("ids");
        }
        devLockInfoService.setCardInfos(ids,devLockInfo.getCardCode());
        return success();
    }
    /**
     *
     门锁下发
     * @Description: 门锁下发
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/02
     * @param deviceIds
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:lock:issued")
    @Log(title = "门锁信息", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PostMapping("/issued/{deviceIds}")
    public AjaxResult issued(@PathVariable Long[] deviceIds)
    {
        devLockInfoService.issue(deviceIds);
        return success();
    }
    /**
     * 查询所有可用门锁
     * @Description: 查询所有可用门锁

    {

    }
    /**
     * 查询门锁列表 app
     * @Description: 查询门锁列表 app
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-12-02 14:29:17
     * @param roomId 房间id
     * @return {@link R }<{@link TableDataInfo }>
     */
    @GetMapping("/listToApp")
    public R<TableDataInfo> listToApp(Long roomId)
    {
        DevLockInfo devLockInfo = new DevLockInfo();
        devLockInfo.setRoomId(roomId);
        startPage();
        List<DevLockInfo> list = devLockInfoService.selectDevLockInfoList(devLockInfo);
        return R.ok(getDataTable(list));
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 班牌获取设备信息

    }
    /**

    public R<Integer> boardControlLock(@PathVariable Long deviceId,@PathVariable Integer openStatus,@PathVariable Long userId) {
        return R.ok(devLockInfoService.boardControlLock(deviceId,openStatus,userId));
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 首页统计信息

    public AjaxResult getFirstPageCountInfo()
    {
        FirstPageCountInfoBo countInfo= devLockInfoService.getFirstPageCountInfo();
        return AjaxResult.success(countInfo);
    }
    /**
     * 启用停用状态
     * @Description: 启用停用状态
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 16:26:02

    @Log(title = "门锁信息", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PutMapping("/{deviceIds}")
    public AjaxResult updateDevLockInfoIsUsable(@PathVariable Long[] deviceIds)
    {
        return toAjax(devLockInfoService.updateDevLockInfoIsUsable(deviceIds));

    /**
     * @Description:根据门锁id获取门卡信息
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-04-04 09:14:52
     * @param deviceId:门锁id
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:lock:cardInfos")
    @PostMapping("/getCardInfos/{deviceId}")
    public TableDataInfo getCardInfos(@PathVariable Long deviceId)
    {
        List<DevLockCardInfo> list = devLockInfoService.selectCardInfos(deviceId);
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     * @Description:更新门卡信息
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-04-04 13:11:56
     * @param devLockInfo:
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:lock:cardInfos")
    @PostMapping("/updateCardInfos")
    public AjaxResult updateCardInfos(@RequestBody DevLockInfo devLockInfo)
    {
        int r = devLockInfoService.updateCardInfos(devLockInfo);
        return AjaxResult.success(r);
    }
    @PostMapping("/updateLockOnly")
    public AjaxResult updateLockOnly(@RequestBody JSONObject jsonObject)
    {
        DevLockInfo devLockInfo = jsonObject.toBean(DevLockInfo.class);
        int r = devLockInfoService.updateDevLockInfo(devLockInfo);
        return AjaxResult.success(r);
    }

package com.chenrise.jufe.controller;
import java.util.List;
import javax.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse;
import com.chenrise.common.core.constant.UserConstants;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.vo.DevMonitorInfoVo;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.GetMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PostMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PutMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.DeleteMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PathVariable;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestBody;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RestController;
import com.chenrise.common.log.annotation.Log;
import com.chenrise.common.log.enums.BusinessType;
import com.chenrise.common.security.annotation.RequiresPermissions;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.DevMonitorInfo;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.IDevMonitorInfoService;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.controller.BaseController;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.poi.ExcelUtil;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo;
import org.springframework.web.multipart.MultipartFile;
/**
 * 监控设备Controller
 *
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2023-04-17
 */
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/monitor")
public class DevMonitorInfoController extends BaseController
{
    @Autowired
    private IDevMonitorInfoService devMonitorInfoService;
    /**
     * 查询监控设备列表
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:monitorinfo:list")
    @GetMapping("/list")
    public TableDataInfo list(DevMonitorInfo devMonitorInfo)
    {
        startPage();
        List<DevMonitorInfo> list = devMonitorInfoService.selectDevMonitorInfoList(devMonitorInfo);
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     * 导出监控设备列表
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:monitorinfo:export")
    @Log(title = "监控设备", businessType = BusinessType.EXPORT)
    @PostMapping("/export")
    public void export(HttpServletResponse response, DevMonitorInfoVo devMonitorInfo)
    {
        List<DevMonitorInfoVo> list = devMonitorInfoService.selectDevMonitorInfoList1(devMonitorInfo);
        ExcelUtil<DevMonitorInfoVo> util = new ExcelUtil<DevMonitorInfoVo>(DevMonitorInfoVo.class);
        util.exportExcel(response, list, "监控设备数据");
    }
    /**
     * 获取监控设备详细信息
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:monitorinfo:query")
    @GetMapping(value = "/{deviceId}")
    public AjaxResult getInfo(@PathVariable("deviceId") Long deviceId)
    {
        return success(devMonitorInfoService.selectDevMonitorInfoByDeviceId(deviceId));
    }
    /**
     * 获取设备数据详细信息（附带流地址）
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:monitorinfo:query")
    @GetMapping(value = "/stream/{deviceId}")
    public AjaxResult getStream(@PathVariable("deviceId") Long deviceId) {
        if (null == deviceId) {
            return error("设备ID不能为空");
        }
        DevMonitorInfo devMonitorInfo = devMonitorInfoService.selectDevMonitorInfoByDeviceId(deviceId);
        if (null == devMonitorInfo) {
            return error("设备数据不存在或已删除，请检查");
        }
        return AjaxResult.success((Object) devMonitorInfo.getStreamUrl());
    }
    /**
     * 新增监控设备
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:monitorinfo:add")
    @Log(title = "监控设备", businessType = BusinessType.INSERT)
    @PostMapping
    public AjaxResult add(@RequestBody DevMonitorInfo devMonitorInfo)
    {
        if (UserConstants.NOT_UNIQUE.equals(devMonitorInfoService.checkDeviceNo(devMonitorInfo))) {
            return error("新增监控设备'" + devMonitorInfo.getDeviceNo() + "'失败，监控编号重复");
        }
        if (UserConstants.NOT_UNIQUE.equals(devMonitorInfoService.checkCameraIp(devMonitorInfo))) {
            return error("新增监控设备'" + devMonitorInfo.getCameraIp() + "'失败，监控IP重复");
        }
        return toAjax(devMonitorInfoService.insertDevMonitorInfo(devMonitorInfo));
    }
    /**
     * 修改监控设备
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:monitorinfo:edit")
    @Log(title = "监控设备", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PutMapping
    public AjaxResult edit(@RequestBody DevMonitorInfo devMonitorInfo)
    {
        if (UserConstants.NOT_UNIQUE.equals(devMonitorInfoService.checkDeviceNo(devMonitorInfo))) {
            return error("修改监控设备'" + devMonitorInfo.getDeviceNo() + "'失败，监控编号重复");
        }
        if (UserConstants.NOT_UNIQUE.equals(devMonitorInfoService.checkCameraIp(devMonitorInfo))) {
            return error("修改监控设备'" + devMonitorInfo.getCameraIp() + "'失败，监控IP重复");
        }
        return toAjax(devMonitorInfoService.updateDevMonitorInfo(devMonitorInfo));
    }
    /**
     * 删除监控设备
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:monitorinfo:remove")
    @Log(title = "监控设备", businessType = BusinessType.DELETE)
	@DeleteMapping("/{deviceIds}")
    public AjaxResult remove(@PathVariable Long[] deviceIds)
    {
        return toAjax(devMonitorInfoService.deleteDevMonitorInfoByDeviceIds(deviceIds));
    }
    /**
     *
     导入模板
     * @Description: 导入模板
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022/12/02
     * @param response 响应
     *
     */
    @PostMapping("/importTemplate")
    public void importTemplate(HttpServletResponse response) {
        ExcelUtil<DevMonitorInfo> util = new ExcelUtil<DevMonitorInfo>(DevMonitorInfo.class);
        util.importTemplateExcel(response,"门锁导入模板");
    }
    /**
     *
     导入数据
     * @Description: 导入数据
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022/12/02
     * @param file 文件
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @PostMapping("/importData")
    public AjaxResult importData(MultipartFile file) throws Exception {
        ExcelUtil<DevMonitorInfo> util = new ExcelUtil<>(DevMonitorInfo.class);
        List<DevMonitorInfo> list = util.importExcel(file.getInputStream());
        String message = devMonitorInfoService.importData(list);
        return AjaxResult.success(message);
    }
}

/**

@RestController
@RequestMapping("/powerlog")
public class DevPowerConLogController extends BaseController
{
    @Autowired
    private IDevPowerConLogService devPowerConLogService;
    /**
     * @Description:查询电源控制日志列表
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-11-28 14:49:45
     * @param devPowerConLog:
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:powerlog:list")
    @GetMapping("/list")
    public TableDataInfo list(DevPowerConLog devPowerConLog)
    {
        startPage();
        List<DevPowerConLog> list = devPowerConLogService.selectDevPowerConLogList(devPowerConLog);
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     * @Description:导出电源控制日志列表

     * @param devPowerConLog:

     */

    @Log(title = "电源控制日志", businessType = BusinessType.EXPORT)
    @PostMapping("/export")
    public void export(HttpServletResponse response, DevPowerConLog devPowerConLog)
    {
        List<DevPowerConLog> list = devPowerConLogService.selectDevPowerConLogList(devPowerConLog);
        ExcelUtil<DevPowerConLog> util = new ExcelUtil<DevPowerConLog>(DevPowerConLog.class);
        util.exportExcel(response, list, "电源控制记录");
    }
    /**
     * @Description:获取电源控制日志详细信息
     * @Author: sunming

     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:powerlog:query")
    @GetMapping(value = "/{logId}")
    public AjaxResult getInfo(@PathVariable("logId") Long logId)
    {
        return success(devPowerConLogService.selectDevPowerConLogByLogId(logId));
    }
    /**
     * @Description:新增电源控制日志
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-11-28 14:50:12

     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     */

    @Log(title = "电源控制日志", businessType = BusinessType.INSERT)
    @PostMapping
    public AjaxResult add(@RequestBody DevPowerConLog devPowerConLog)
    {
        return toAjax(devPowerConLogService.insertDevPowerConLog(devPowerConLog));
    }
    /**
     * @Description:修改电源控制日志
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-11-28 14:50:25
     * @param devPowerConLog:
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:powerlog:edit")
    @Log(title = "电源控制日志", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PutMapping
    public AjaxResult edit(@RequestBody DevPowerConLog devPowerConLog)
    {
        return toAjax(devPowerConLogService.updateDevPowerConLog(devPowerConLog));
    }
    /**
     * @Description:删除电源控制日志
     * @Author: sunming

     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:powerlog:remove")
    @Log(title = "电源控制日志", businessType = BusinessType.DELETE)
	@DeleteMapping("/{logIds}")
    public AjaxResult remove(@PathVariable Long[] logIds)
    {
        return toAjax(devPowerConLogService.deleteDevPowerConLogByLogIds(logIds));
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.controller;
import java.rmi.ServerException;

/**
 * 空开信息Controller
 *
 * @author liyiying
 * @date 2022-11-25
 */
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/powerNode")
public class DevPowerNodeInfoController extends BaseController
{
    @Resource
    private IDevPowerNodeInfoService devPowerNodeInfoService;
    @Resource
    private ISchoolLocationService locationService;
    @Resource
    private ISchoolRoomService roomService;
    /**
     *
     查询空开信息列表
     * @Description: 查询空开信息列表
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/02
     * @param devPowerNodeInfo
     * @return {@link TableDataInfo }
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:powerNode:list")
    @GetMapping("/list")
    public TableDataInfo list(DevPowerNodeInfo devPowerNodeInfo)
    {
        List<DevPowerNodeInfo> list = devPowerNodeInfoService.selectDevPowerNodeInfoList(devPowerNodeInfo);
        for(DevPowerNodeInfo dpni:list){
            SchoolRoom room = roomService.selectSchoolRoomByRoomId(dpni.getRoomId());
            if(room!=null){
                SchoolLocation location = locationService.selectSchoolLocationByLocationId(room.getLocationId());
                if(location!=null){
                    String fullName = locationService.fullName(location);
                    dpni.setRoomName(fullName+"-"+room.getRoomName());
                }
            }
        }
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     *
     导出空开信息列表
     * @Description: 导出空开信息列表
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/02
     * @param response
     * @param devPowerNodeInfo
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:powerNode:export")
    @Log(title = "空开信息", businessType = BusinessType.EXPORT)
    @PostMapping("/export")
    public void export(HttpServletResponse response, DevPowerNodeInfo devPowerNodeInfo)
    {
        List<DevPowerNodeInfo> list = devPowerNodeInfoService.selectDevPowerNodeInfoList(devPowerNodeInfo);
        ExcelUtil<DevPowerNodeInfo> util = new ExcelUtil<DevPowerNodeInfo>(DevPowerNodeInfo.class);
        util.exportExcel(response, list, "空开信息数据");
    }
    /**
     *
     获取空开信息详细信息
     * @Description: 获取空开信息详细信息
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/02
     * @param powerNodeId
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:powerNode:query")
    @GetMapping(value = "/{powerNodeId}")
    public AjaxResult getInfo(@PathVariable("powerNodeId") Long powerNodeId)
    {
        return success(devPowerNodeInfoService.selectDevPowerNodeInfoByPowerNodeId(powerNodeId));
    }
    /**
     *
     新增空开信息
     * @Description: 新增空开信息
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/02
     * @param devPowerNodeInfo
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:powerNode:add")
    @Log(title = "空开信息", businessType = BusinessType.INSERT)
    @PostMapping
    public AjaxResult add(@RequestBody DevPowerNodeInfo devPowerNodeInfo)
    {
        DevPowerNodeInfo result =  devPowerNodeInfoService.insertDevPowerNodeInfo(devPowerNodeInfo);
        int count = result==null?0:1;
        return toAjax(count);
    }
    /**
     *
     修改空开信息
     * @Description: 修改空开信息
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/02
     * @param devPowerNodeInfo
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:powerNode:edit")
    @Log(title = "空开信息", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PutMapping
    public AjaxResult edit(@RequestBody DevPowerNodeInfo devPowerNodeInfo)
    {
        return toAjax(devPowerNodeInfoService.updateDevPowerNodeInfo(devPowerNodeInfo));
    }
    /**
     *
     删除空开信息
     * @Description: 删除空开信息
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/02
     * @param powerNodeId
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:powerNode:remove")
    @Log(title = "空开信息", businessType = BusinessType.DELETE)
	@DeleteMapping("/{powerNodeId}")
    public AjaxResult remove(@PathVariable Long powerNodeId) throws ServerException {
        return toAjax(devPowerNodeInfoService.deleteDevPowerNodeInfoByPowerNodeId(powerNodeId));
    }
    /**
     *
     获取完整的树型结构
     * @Description: 获取完整的树型结构
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/02
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @GetMapping("/tree")
    public AjaxResult getTree() {
        return success(devPowerNodeInfoService.tree());
    }
    /**
     *
     导入模板
     * @Description: 导入模板
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/02
     * @param response 响应
     *
     */
    @PostMapping("/importTemplate")
    public void importTemplate(HttpServletResponse response) {
        ExcelUtil<PowerVo> util = new ExcelUtil<PowerVo>(PowerVo.class);
        util.importTemplateExcel(response,"电源管理数据导入模板");
    }
    /**
     *
     导入数据
     * @Description: 导入数据
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/02
     * @param file 文件
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
//    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:powerNode:in')")
    @PostMapping("/importData")
    public AjaxResult importData(MultipartFile file) throws Exception {
        ExcelUtil<PowerVo> util = new ExcelUtil<>(PowerVo.class);
        List<PowerVo> list = util.importExcel(file.getInputStream());
        String message = devPowerNodeInfoService.importData(list);
        return AjaxResult.success(message);
    }
    /**
     * 查询电源信息列表app
     * @Description: 查询电源信息列表app
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-12-12 14:12:33
     * @param roomId 房间id
     * @return {@link R }<{@link TableDataInfo }>
     */
    @GetMapping("/listToApp")
    public R<AjaxResult> listToApp(Long roomId,Long nodeType)
    {
        return R.ok(AjaxResult.success(devPowerNodeInfoService.selectDevPowerNodeInfoListToApp(roomId,nodeType)));
    }
    /**
     * @Description:班牌控制
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-12-07 10:19:50
     * @param deviceId: 设备id
     * @param openStatus: 开关状态
     * @return: java.lang.Integer
     */
    @GetMapping("/boardControlPowerNode/{deviceId}&{openStatus}&{userId}")
    public R<Integer> boardControlLock(@PathVariable Long deviceId,@PathVariable Integer openStatus,@PathVariable Long userId) {
        return R.ok(devPowerNodeInfoService.boardControlPowerNode(deviceId,openStatus,userId));
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 批量控制子空开
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-01-12 16:29:28
     * @param ip: 班牌ip
     * @param openStatus: 开关状态
     * @param userId: 用户id
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.domain.R<java.lang.Integer>
     */
    @GetMapping("/boardControlAllPowerNode/{ip}&{openStatus}&{userId}")
    public R<Integer> boardControlAllPowerNode(@PathVariable String ip,@PathVariable Integer openStatus ,@PathVariable Long userId) {
        return R.ok(devPowerNodeInfoService.boardControlAllPowerNode(ip,openStatus,userId));
    }
    /**
     * @Description:根据电源想IP更新电源箱端口
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-02-14 14:24:16
     * @param ip:
     * @param port:
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.domain.R<java.lang.Integer>
     */
    @GetMapping("/updatePowerPort/{ip}/{port}")
    public R<Integer> updatePowerPort(@PathVariable("ip") String ip,@PathVariable("port") String port) {
        return R.ok(devPowerNodeInfoService.updatePowerPort(ip,port));
    }
    /**
     * @Description:创建tcp连接
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 12:55:47
     * @return: java.lang.String
     */
    @PostMapping("/addNodeInfoByInfo")
    public  R<Object> addNodeInfoByInfo( @RequestBody Object object) {
        List<Map<String,String>> ipInfos =  JSON.parseObject(JSONUtil.toJsonStr(JSONUtil.toJsonStr(object)), List.class);
        Integer count = devPowerNodeInfoService.addPowerNodeInfoByList(ipInfos);
        return   R.ok("保存成功");
    }
    /**
     * @Description:更新操作日志结果
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-02-15 11:20:54
     * @param object:
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.domain.R<java.lang.Object>
     */
    @PostMapping("/updateNodeLongsResult")
    public  R<Object> updateNodeLongsResult( @RequestBody Object object) {
        List<Map<String,String>> nodes =  JSON.parseObject(JSONUtil.toJsonStr(JSONUtil.toJsonStr(object)), List.class);
        Integer count = devPowerNodeInfoService.updateNodeLongsResult(nodes);
        return   R.ok("保存成功");
    }
    /**
     *
     删除空开信息
     * @Description: 删除空开信息
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/02
     * @param deviceIds
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:powerNode:remove")
    @Log(title = "空开信息", businessType = BusinessType.DELETE)
    @GetMapping("/delete/{deviceIds}")
    public AjaxResult delete(@PathVariable Long[] deviceIds) throws ServerException {
        for (Long deviceId:deviceIds){
            devPowerNodeInfoService.deleteDevPowerNodeInfoByPowerNodeId(deviceId);
        }
        return toAjax(1);
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 班牌控制单个空开
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-12-07 10:19:50
     * @param deviceId: 设备id
     * @param openStatus: 开关状态
     * @return: java.lang.Integer
     */
    @GetMapping("/controlOnePowerNode/{deviceId}/{openStatus}")
    public AjaxResult controlOnePowerNode(@PathVariable("deviceId") Long deviceId,@PathVariable("openStatus") Integer openStatus) {
        return toAjax(devPowerNodeInfoService.controlOnePowerNode(deviceId,openStatus));
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 班牌控制全部空开
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-12-07 10:19:50
     * @param ip: 设备id
     * @param openStatus: 开关状态
     * @return: java.lang.Integer
     */
    @GetMapping("/controlAllPowerNode/{deviceId}/{openStatus}")
    public AjaxResult controlAllPowerNode(@PathVariable("deviceId") Long deviceId,@PathVariable("openStatus") Integer openStatus) {
        return toAjax(devPowerNodeInfoService.controlAllPowerNode(deviceId,openStatus));
    }
    /**
     * 查询电源信息列表app
     * @Description: 查询电源信息列表app
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-12-12 14:12:33
     * @param roomId 房间id
     * @return {@link R }<{@link TableDataInfo }>
     */
    @GetMapping("/getPowerNodeListByRoomId/{roomId}/{nodeType}")
    public AjaxResult getPowerNodeListByRoomId(@PathVariable("roomId")Long roomId,@PathVariable("nodeType") Long nodeType)
    {
        return AjaxResult.success(devPowerNodeInfoService.getPowerNodeListByRoomId(roomId,nodeType));
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.controller;
import java.util.List;
import javax.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse;
import com.chenrise.common.core.constant.UserConstants;
import com.chenrise.common.security.utils.SecurityUtils;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.GetMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PostMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PutMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.DeleteMapping;

import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RestController;
import com.chenrise.common.log.annotation.Log;
import com.chenrise.common.log.enums.BusinessType;

/**
 * 中心服务信息Controller
 * 
 * @author chenfang
 * @date 2022-11-23
 */
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/center")
public class DevServiceCenterController extends BaseController {
    @Autowired
    private IDevServiceCenterService devServicecenterService;
    /**
     * @Description: 查询中心服务信息列表
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-11-23 17:55:32
     * @param devServiceCenter: 中心服务实体类
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("center:list")
    @GetMapping("/list")
    public TableDataInfo list(DevServiceCenter devServiceCenter) {
        startPage();
        List<DevServiceCenter> list = devServicecenterService.selectDevServiceCenterList(devServiceCenter);
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 导出中心服务信息列表
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-11-23 17:56:06
     * @param response:
     * @param devServiceCenter: 中心服务实体类
     * @return: void
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("center:export")
    @Log(title = "中心服务信息", businessType = BusinessType.EXPORT)
    @PostMapping("/export")
    public void export(HttpServletResponse response, DevServiceCenter devServiceCenter) {
        List<DevServiceCenter> list = devServicecenterService.selectDevServiceCenterList(devServiceCenter);
        ExcelUtil<DevServiceCenter> util = new ExcelUtil<DevServiceCenter>(DevServiceCenter.class);
        util.exportExcel(response, list, "中心服务信息数据");
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 获取中心服务信息详细信息
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-11-23 17:56:24
     * @param centerId: 中心服务主键
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("center:query")
    @GetMapping(value = "/{centerId}")
    public AjaxResult getInfo(@PathVariable("centerId") Long centerId) {
        return success(devServicecenterService.selectDevServiceCenterByCenterId(centerId));
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 新增中心服务信息
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-11-23 17:56:41
     * @param devServiceCenter: 中心服务实体类
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("center:add")
    @Log(title = "中心服务信息", businessType = BusinessType.INSERT)
    @PostMapping
    public AjaxResult add(@RequestBody DevServiceCenter devServiceCenter) {
        if (UserConstants.NOT_UNIQUE.equals(devServicecenterService.checkCenterIPUnique(devServiceCenter)))
        {
            return error("新增中心服务IP'" + devServiceCenter.getCenterIp() + "'失败，中心服务IP已存在");
        }
        devServiceCenter.setCreateBy(SecurityUtils.getUsername());
        return toAjax(devServicecenterService.insertDevServiceCenter(devServiceCenter));
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 修改中心服务信息
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-11-23 17:56:59
     * @param devServiceCenter: 中心服务实体类
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("center:edit")
    @Log(title = "中心服务信息", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PutMapping
    public AjaxResult edit(@RequestBody DevServiceCenter devServiceCenter) {
        if (UserConstants.NOT_UNIQUE.equals(devServicecenterService.checkCenterIPUnique(devServiceCenter)))
        {
            return error("修改位置'" + devServiceCenter.getCenterIp() + "'失败，位置名称已存在");
        }
        devServiceCenter.setUpdateBy(SecurityUtils.getUsername());
        return toAjax(devServicecenterService.updateDevServiceCenter(devServiceCenter));
    }
    /**
     *
     */
    /**
     * @Description: 删除中心服务信息
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-11-23 17:58:32
     * @param centerIds: 中心服务信息主键集合
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("center:remove")
    @Log(title = "中心服务信息", businessType = BusinessType.DELETE)
	@DeleteMapping("/{centerIds}")
    public AjaxResult remove(@PathVariable Long[] centerIds) {
        return toAjax(devServicecenterService.deleteDevServiceCenterByCenterIds(centerIds));
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.controller;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.controller.BaseController;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo;
import com.chenrise.common.log.annotation.Log;
import com.chenrise.common.log.enums.BusinessType;
import com.chenrise.common.security.annotation.RequiresPermissions;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.DevSpeaker;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.IDevSpeakerService;
import com.chenrise.system.api.RemoteDeviceService;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Value;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.*;
import javax.annotation.Resource;
import java.util.HashMap;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture;
/**
 *数据Controller
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2023-06-01
 */
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/speaker")
public class DevSpeakerController extends BaseController
{
    @Resource
    private IDevSpeakerService speakerService;
    /**
     * 查询数据列表
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:speaker:list")
    @GetMapping("/list")
    public TableDataInfo list(DevSpeaker speaker)
    {
        startPage();
        List<DevSpeaker> list = speakerService.list(speaker);
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     * 获取数据详细信息
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:speaker:query")
    @GetMapping(value = "/{id}")
    public AjaxResult getInfo(@PathVariable("id") Long id)
    {
        return success(speakerService.get(id));
    }
    /**
     * 新增数据
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:speaker:add")
    @Log(title = "数据", businessType = BusinessType.INSERT)
    @PostMapping
    public AjaxResult add(@RequestBody DevSpeaker speaker)
    {
        return toAjax(speakerService.insert(speaker));
    }
    /**
     * 修改数据
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:speaker:edit")
    @Log(title = "数据", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PutMapping
    public AjaxResult edit(@RequestBody DevSpeaker speaker)
    {
        return toAjax(speakerService.update(speaker));
    }
    /**
     * 删除数据
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:speaker:remove")
    @Log(title = "数据", businessType = BusinessType.DELETE)
	@DeleteMapping("/{ids}")
    public AjaxResult remove(@PathVariable Long[] ids)
    {
        return toAjax(speakerService.deleteByIds(ids));
    }
    /**
     * 测试数据
     */
    @PostMapping("/test")
    public AjaxResult test(@RequestBody DevSpeaker speaker)
    {
        speakerService.playAudio(speaker);
        return success();
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.controller;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.poi.ExcelUtil;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo;
import com.chenrise.common.log.annotation.Log;
import com.chenrise.common.log.enums.BusinessType;
import com.chenrise.common.security.annotation.RequiresPermissions;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.FlowSet;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.IFlowSetService;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.*;
import javax.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse;
import java.util.List;
/**
 * 审批流配置信息Controller
 *
 * @author sunMing
 * @date 2023-12-27
 */
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/workflow/set")
public class FlowSetController extends BaseController {
    @Autowired
    private IFlowSetService flowSetService;
    /**
     * 查询审批流配置信息列表
     *
     * @param flowSet:
     * @Description: 查询审批流配置信息列表
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2023-12-27 16:11:35
     * @return: com.chenrise.boot.common.core.page.TableDataInfo
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("workflow:set:list")
    @GetMapping("/list")
    public TableDataInfo list(FlowSet flowSet) {
        startPage();
        List<FlowSet> list = flowSetService.selectFlowSetList(flowSet);
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     * 导出审批流配置信息列表
     *
     * @param response:
     * @param flowSet:
     * @Description: 导出审批流配置信息列表
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2023-12-27 16:11:38
     * @return: void
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("workflow:set:export")
    @Log(title = "审批流配置信息", businessType = BusinessType.EXPORT)
    @PostMapping("/export")
    public void export(HttpServletResponse response, FlowSet flowSet) {
        List<FlowSet> list = flowSetService.selectFlowSetList(flowSet);
        ExcelUtil<FlowSet> util = new ExcelUtil<>(FlowSet.class);
        util.exportExcel(response, list, "审批流配置信息数据");
    }
    /**
     * 获取审批流配置信息详细信息
     *
     * @param setId:
     * @Description: 获取审批流配置信息详细信息
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2023-12-27 16:11:42
     * @return: com.chenrise.boot.common.core.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("workflow:set:query")
    @GetMapping(value = "/{setId}")
    public AjaxResult getInfo(@PathVariable("setId") Long setId) {
        return AjaxResult.success(flowSetService.selectFlowSetBySetId(setId));
    }
    /**
     * 新增审批流配置信息
     *
     * @param flowSet:
     * @Description: 新增审批流配置信息
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2023-12-27 16:11:45
     * @return: com.chenrise.boot.common.core.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("workflow:set:add")
    @Log(title = "审批流配置信息", businessType = BusinessType.INSERT)
    @PostMapping
    public AjaxResult add(@RequestBody FlowSet flowSet) {
        return toAjax(flowSetService.insertFlowSet(flowSet));
    }
    /**
     * 修改审批流配置信息
     *
     * @param flowSet:
     * @Description: 修改审批流配置信息
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2023-12-27 16:11:48
     * @return: com.chenrise.boot.common.core.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("workflow:set:edit")
    @Log(title = "审批流配置信息", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PutMapping
    public AjaxResult edit(@RequestBody FlowSet flowSet) {
        return toAjax(flowSetService.updateFlowSet(flowSet));
    }
    /**
     * 删除审批流配置信息
     *
     * @param setIds:
     * @Description: 删除审批流配置信息
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2023-12-27 16:11:51
     * @return: com.chenrise.boot.common.core.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("workflow:set:remove")
    @Log(title = "审批流配置信息", businessType = BusinessType.DELETE)
    @DeleteMapping("/{setIds}")
    public AjaxResult remove(@PathVariable Long[] setIds) {
        return toAjax(flowSetService.deleteFlowSetBySetIds(setIds));
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.controller;
import cn.hutool.core.date.DateUtil;

/**
 * apk版本Controller
 *
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2022-12-10
