@RestController
@RequestMapping("/index")
public class IndexController extends BaseController
{
    @Resource private DevGatewayInfoMapper gatewayInfoMapper;
    @Resource private DevGroupingInfoMapper groupingInfoMapper;
    @Resource private DevLockInfoMapper lockInfoMapper;
    @Resource private IIndexService indexService;
    @Resource private ISchoolLocationService locationService;
    @Resource private ISchoolTimeSchedulingExchangeService sseService;
    @Resource
    private SchoolTimeSchedulingMapper timeSchedulingMapper;
    @Resource
    private IDevPowerNodeInfoService powerNodeInfoService;
    /**
     * @Description:教室按钮和数目

     * @Author: CJH
     * @Updator: CJH

    @GetMapping("/getRoomStatusNums")
    public AjaxResult getRoomStatusNums()
    {

        map.put("key","ykjs");
        map.put("name","有课教室数");
        list.add(map);
        map = new HashMap<>();

        map.put("name","有课未加电");
        list.add(map);
        map = new HashMap<>();
        map.put("key","wkjd");
        map.put("name","无课加电");
        list.add(map);
        map = new HashMap<>();
        map.put("key","wkkc");
        map.put("name","无课开窗");
        list.add(map);
        map = new HashMap<>();
        map.put("key","wkks");
        map.put("name","无课开锁");
        list.add(map);
        map = new HashMap<>();
        map.put("key","wkkm");
        map.put("name","无课开门");
        list.add(map);
        map = new HashMap<>();
        map.put("key","ykwks");
        map.put("name","有课未开锁");
        list.add(map);
        map = new HashMap<>();
        map.put("key","dcks");
        map.put("name","电池亏电");
        list.add(map);
        map = new HashMap<>();
        map.put("key","wdbj");
        map.put("name","温度报警");
        list.add(map);
        map = new HashMap<>();
        map.put("key","sdbj");
        map.put("name","湿度报警");
        list.add(map);
        map = new HashMap<>();
        map.put("key","sjbj");
        map.put("name","水浸报警");
        list.add(map);
        map = new HashMap<>();
        map.put("key","ygbj");
        map.put("name","烟感报警");
        list.add(map);
        map = new HashMap<>();
        map.put("key","gjbj");
        map.put("name","光照报警");
        list.add(map);
        map = new HashMap<>();
        map.put("key","sfpm1");
        map.put("name","PM2.5报警");
        list.add(map);
        map = new HashMap<>();
        map.put("key","sfpm2");
        map.put("name","PM10报警");
        list.add(map);
        for(Map m:list){
            int count = indexService.getRoomCount(String.valueOf(m.get("key")));
            m.put("count",count);
        }
        return AjaxResult.success(list);
    }
    /**
     * @Description:教室列表
     * @param querys
        * @param isSchedule
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo
     * @Author: CJH
     * @Updator: CJH
     * @Date 2024/4/28 9:22
     */
    @GetMapping("/roomList")
    public TableDataInfo roomList(String querys,String isSchedule)
    {
        String [] arr = null;
        if(StringUtils.isNotBlank(querys)){
            arr = querys.split(",");
        }
        List<Map<String,Object>> list = indexService.getRoomList(null,isSchedule,arr);
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     * @Description:设备在线统计
     * @param
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     * @Author: CJH
     * @Updator: CJH
     * @Date 2024/4/28 9:22
     */
    @GetMapping("/getDeviceNums")
    public AjaxResult getDeviceNums()
    {
        Map<String,Object> result = new HashMap<>();
        DevPowerNodeInfo query_p = new DevPowerNodeInfo();
        Integer countPower = powerNodeInfoService.count(query_p);
        result.put("powerNum",countPower);
        query_p.setOnlineStatus("1");
        Integer onCountPower = powerNodeInfoService.count(query_p);
        result.put("onPowerNum",onCountPower);
        DevLockInfo query_l = new DevLockInfo();
        Integer count = lockInfoMapper.getCount(query_l);
        result.put("lockNum",count);
        query_l.setOnlineStatus("1");
        Integer onCount = lockInfoMapper.getCount(query_l);
        result.put("onLockNum",onCount);
        return AjaxResult.success(result);
    }
    /**
     * @Description:教室列表
     * @param querys
     * @param isSchedule
     * @param roomId
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo
     * @Author: CJH
     * @Updator: CJH
     * @Date 2024/4/28 9:22
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:schoolroom:overview")
    @GetMapping("/roomOverview")
    public TableDataInfo roomOverview(String querys,String isSchedule,Long roomId)
    {
        String [] arr = null;
        if(StringUtils.isNotBlank(querys)){
            arr = querys.split(",");
        }
        startPage();
        List<Map<String,Object>> list = indexService.getRoomList(roomId,isSchedule,arr);
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     * @Description:门锁树
     * @param
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     * @Author: CJH
     * @Updator: CJH
     * @Date 2024/4/28 9:21
     */
    @GetMapping("/getGatewayTree")
    public AjaxResult getGatewayTree()
    {
        List<Map<String,Object>> results = new ArrayList<>();
        Map<String,Object> result = new HashMap<>();
        result.put("name","物联网平台");
        result.put("type",1);
        List<Map<String,Object>> gates = new ArrayList<>();
        List<DevGatewayInfo> gatewayInfos = gatewayInfoMapper.selectDevGatewayInfoList(new DevGatewayInfo());
        for(DevGatewayInfo dgi:gatewayInfos){
            Map<String,Object> gate = new HashMap<>();
            gate.put("name",dgi.getDeviceName()+"("+dgi.getBuildPosName()+")");
            gate.put("type",2);
            List<Map<String,Object>> buildings = new ArrayList<>();
            SchoolLocation query_sl = new SchoolLocation();
            query_sl.setParentId(dgi.getBuildPosId());
            List<SchoolLocation> locations = locationService.selectLocationList(query_sl);
            for(SchoolLocation sl:locations){
                Map<String,Object> building = new HashMap<>();
                building.put("name",sl.getLocationName()+"分组");
                building.put("type",3);
                DevGroupingInfo query_gi = new DevGroupingInfo();
                query_gi.setUpId(dgi.getDeviceId());
                query_gi.setBuildPosId(sl.getLocationId());
                List<DevGroupingInfo> groupingInfos = groupingInfoMapper.selectDevGroupingInfoList(query_gi);
                List<DevGroupingInfo> onlineGroups = groupingInfos.stream().filter(item->"1".equals(item.getOnlineStatus())).collect(Collectors.toList());
                List<DevGroupingInfo> offlineGroups = groupingInfos.stream().filter(item->"0".equals(item.getOnlineStatus())).collect(Collectors.toList());
                List<Map<String,Object>> groups = new ArrayList<>();
                Map<String,Object> onGroup = new HashMap<>();
                onGroup.put("name","在线");
                onGroup.put("type",4);
                onGroup.put("value",onlineGroups.size());
                List<Map<String,Object>> locks = new ArrayList<>();
                Map<String,Object> onLock = new HashMap<>();
                onLock.put("name","在线\n门锁");
                onLock.put("type",6);
                Long [] onlineGroupIds = onlineGroups.stream().map(item->item.getDeviceId()).toArray(Long[]::new);
                DevLockInfo query_lock = new DevLockInfo();
                query_lock.setGatewayId(dgi.getDeviceId());
                query_lock.setGroupIds(onlineGroupIds);
                query_lock.setOnlineStatus("1");
                int count = lockInfoMapper.getCount(query_lock);
                onLock.put("value",onlineGroupIds.length==0?0:count);
                locks.add(onLock);
                Map<String,Object> offLock = new HashMap<>();
                query_lock.setGroupIds(onlineGroupIds);
                query_lock.setOnlineStatus("0");
                count = lockInfoMapper.getCount(query_lock);
                offLock.put("value",onlineGroupIds.length==0?0:count);
                offLock.put("name","离线\n门锁");
                offLock.put("type",7);
                offLock.put("locationId",sl.getLocationId());
                locks.add(offLock);
                onGroup.put("children",locks);
                groups.add(onGroup);
                Map<String,Object> offGroup = new HashMap<>();
                offGroup.put("name","离线");
                offGroup.put("type",5);
                offGroup.put("value",offlineGroups.size());
                offGroup.put("locationId",sl.getLocationId());
                offGroup.put("gatewayId",dgi.getDeviceId());
                groups.add(offGroup);
                building.put("children",groups);
                buildings.add(building);
            }
            gate.put("children",buildings);
            gates.add(gate);
        }
        result.put("children",gates);
        results.add(result);
        return AjaxResult.success(results);
    }
    /**
     * @Description:电源树
     * @param
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     * @Author: CJH
     * @Updator: CJH
     * @Date 2024/4/28 9:21
     */
    @GetMapping("/getPowerTree")
    public AjaxResult getPowerTree()
    {
        List<Map<String,Object>> results = new ArrayList<>();
        Map<String,Object> result = new HashMap<>();
        result.put("name","物联网平台");
        result.put("type",1);
        List<Map<String,Object>> locations = new ArrayList<>();
        SchoolLocation query_sl = new SchoolLocation();
        query_sl.setParentId(1L);
        List<SchoolLocation> schoolLocations = locationService.selectLocationList(query_sl);
        for(SchoolLocation sl:schoolLocations){
            Map<String,Object> location = new HashMap<>();
            location.put("name",sl.getLocationName());
            location.put("type",2);
            List<Map<String,Object>> floors = new ArrayList<>();
            SchoolLocation query_ssl = new SchoolLocation();
            query_ssl.setParentId(sl.getLocationId());
            List<SchoolLocation> schoolFloors = locationService.selectLocationList(query_ssl);
            for(SchoolLocation sf:schoolFloors){
                Map<String,Object> floor = new HashMap<>();
                floor.put("name",sf.getLocationName());
                floor.put("type",3);
                int zcount = indexService.getPowerNum2(sf.getLocationId(),"2",null);
                List<Map<String,Object>> zmaps = new ArrayList<>();
                Map<String,Object> onzmap = new HashMap<>();
                onzmap.put("name","总");
                onzmap.put("type",4);
                onzmap.put("value",zcount);
                List<Map<String,Object>> subMaps = new ArrayList<>();
                Map<String,Object> onSubMap1 = new HashMap<>();
                onSubMap1.put("name","在");
                onSubMap1.put("type",6);
                int count1 = indexService.getPowerNum2(sf.getLocationId(),"2","1");;
                onSubMap1.put("value",count1);
                subMaps.add(onSubMap1);
                Map<String,Object> offSubMap1 = new HashMap<>();
                offSubMap1.put("name","离");
                offSubMap1.put("type",7);
                offSubMap1.put("locationId",sf.getLocationId());
                int count2 = indexService.getPowerNum2(sf.getLocationId(),"2","0");;
                offSubMap1.put("value",count2);
                subMaps.add(offSubMap1);
                onzmap.put("children",subMaps);
                zmaps.add(onzmap);
                int subCount = indexService.getPowerNum2(sf.getLocationId(),"4",null);
                Map<String,Object> offzmap = new HashMap<>();
                offzmap.put("name","子");
                offzmap.put("type",5);
                offzmap.put("value",subCount);
                subMaps = new ArrayList<>();
                Map<String,Object> onSubMap2 = new HashMap<>();
                onSubMap2.put("name","在");
                onSubMap2.put("type",6);
                int count3 = indexService.getPowerNum2(sf.getLocationId(),"4","1");
                onSubMap2.put("value",count3);
                subMaps.add(onSubMap2);
                Map<String,Object> offSubMap2 = new HashMap<>();
                offSubMap2.put("name","离");
                offSubMap2.put("type",8);
                offSubMap2.put("locationId",sf.getLocationId());
                int count4 = indexService.getPowerNum2(sf.getLocationId(),"4","0");
                offSubMap2.put("value",count4);
                subMaps.add(offSubMap2);
                offzmap.put("children",subMaps);
                zmaps.add(offzmap);
                floor.put("children",zmaps);
                floors.add(floor);
            }
            location.put("children",floors);
            locations.add(location);
        }
        result.put("children",locations);
        results.add(result);
        return AjaxResult.success(results);
    }
    /**
     * @Description:门锁电量柱图
     * @param
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     * @Author: CJH
     * @Updator: CJH
     * @Date 2024/4/28 9:21
     */
    @GetMapping("/getLockBar")
    public AjaxResult getLockBar()
    {
        JSONObject result = new JSONObject();
        List<Map<String,Object>> list = indexService.getLockBar();
        String [] xDatas = list.stream().map(item->String.valueOf(item.get("label"))).toArray(String[]::new);
        Integer [] yDatas = list.stream().map(item->Integer.parseInt(String.valueOf(item.get("count")))).toArray(Integer[]::new);
        result.put("xDatas",xDatas);
        result.put("yDatas",yDatas);
        return AjaxResult.success(result);
    }
    /**
     * @Description:百分比
     * @param
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     * @Author: CJH
     * @Updator: CJH
     * @Date 2024/4/28 9:20
     */
    @GetMapping("/getPowNum")
    public AjaxResult getPowNum()
    {
        JSONObject result = new JSONObject();
        int lockNumOn = indexService.getLockNum("1");
        int lockNumOff = indexService.getLockNum("0");
        result.put("lockPercent", (lockNumOn+lockNumOff)==0?0:NumberUtil.round(((lockNumOn/(double)(lockNumOn+lockNumOff))*100),2));
        int powerNumOn = indexService.getPowerNum("1");
        int powerNumOff = indexService.getPowerNum("0");
        result.put("powerPercent", (powerNumOn+powerNumOff)==0?0:NumberUtil.round(((powerNumOn/(double)(powerNumOn+powerNumOff))*100),2));
        Map<String,Object> weekAndClassNo = timeSchedulingMapper.selectWeekAndClassNo();
        if(weekAndClassNo!=null){
            result.put("techingWeek", StringUtils.leftPad(String.valueOf(weekAndClassNo.get("teaching_week")),2,"0"));
            result.put("classSection",StringUtils.leftPad(String.valueOf(weekAndClassNo.get("class_section")),2,"0"));
        }
        return AjaxResult.success(result);
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 调课列表
     * @param
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     * @Author: CJH
     * @Updator: CJH
     * @Date 2024/4/28 9:20
     */
    @GetMapping("/getExchanges")
    public AjaxResult getExchanges()
    {
        SchoolTimeSchedulingExchange sse = new SchoolTimeSchedulingExchange();
        sse.getParams().put("start", DateUtil.beginOfDay(new Date()));
        sse.getParams().put("end", DateUtil.endOfDay(new Date()));
        List<SchoolTimeSchedulingExchange> list = sseService.selectSchoolTimeSchedulingExchangeList(sse);
        DictUtils.getDictName(list);
        return AjaxResult.success(list);
    }
    /*
    * 首页弹出离线分组列表
    * */
    @GetMapping("/listGroups")
    public TableDataInfo listGroups(DevGroupingInfo groupingInfo)
    {
        groupingInfo.setOnlineStatus("0");
        startPage();
        List<DevGroupingInfo> list = groupingInfoMapper.selectDevGroupingInfoList(groupingInfo);
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     * 首页弹出离线门锁
     * */
    @GetMapping("/listLocks")
    public TableDataInfo listLocks(DevLockInfo lockInfo)
    {
        if(lockInfo.getLocationId()!=null){
            DevGroupingInfo query_gi = new DevGroupingInfo();
            query_gi.setBuildPosId(lockInfo.getLocationId());
            List<DevGroupingInfo> groupingInfos = groupingInfoMapper.selectDevGroupingInfoList(query_gi);
            List<DevGroupingInfo> onlineGroups = groupingInfos.stream().filter(item->"1".equals(item.getOnlineStatus())).collect(Collectors.toList());
            Long [] onlineGroupIds = onlineGroups.stream().map(item->item.getDeviceId()).toArray(Long[]::new);
            lockInfo.setGroupIds(onlineGroupIds);
        }
        startPage();
        List<DevLockInfo> list = lockInfoMapper.selectDevLockInfoList(lockInfo);
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     * 首页弹出电源列表
     * */
    @GetMapping("/listPowers")
    public TableDataInfo listPowers(DevPowerNodeInfo powerNodeInfo)
    {
        startPage();
        List<DevPowerNodeInfo> list = indexService.powerList(powerNodeInfo.getLocationId(),powerNodeInfo.getDeviceNodeType(),"0");
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.controller;
import java.util.List;
import javax.annotation.Resource;
import javax.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.StringUtils;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.DevPowerNodeInfo;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.SchoolLocation;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.SchoolRoom;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.IDevPowerNodeInfoService;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.ISchoolLocationService;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.ISchoolRoomService;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.GetMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PostMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PutMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.DeleteMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PathVariable;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestBody;

import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.PowerNodeWhiteList;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.IPowerNodeWhiteListService;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.poi.ExcelUtil;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo;
/**
 * 电源白名单Controller
 *
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2022-12-02
 */
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/whiteList")
public class PowerNodeWhiteListController extends BaseController {
    @Autowired
    private IPowerNodeWhiteListService powerNodeWhiteListService;
    @Autowired
    private IDevPowerNodeInfoService devPowerNodeInfoService;
    @Autowired
    private ISchoolLocationService locationService;
    @Autowired
    private ISchoolRoomService roomService;
    /**
     * @Description: 列表
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022/12/02 11:23:23
     * @param locationId 位置标识
     * @param ids ids
     * @return {@link TableDataInfo }
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:whiteList:devicelist")
    @GetMapping("/location/list")
    public TableDataInfo selectLocationUnderDevice(Long locationId,Long[] roomIds,Long[] ids) {
        List<DevPowerNodeInfo> list = powerNodeWhiteListService.selectLocationUnderDevice(locationId,roomIds,ids);
        for (DevPowerNodeInfo devPowerNodeInfo : list) {
            SchoolRoom room = roomService.selectSchoolRoomByRoomId(devPowerNodeInfo.getRoomId());
            if(room!=null){
                SchoolLocation location = locationService.selectSchoolLocationByLocationId(room.getLocationId());
                if(location!=null){
                    String fullName = locationService.fullName(location);
                    devPowerNodeInfo.setRoomName(fullName+"-"+room.getRoomName());
                }
            }
        }
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 列表
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022/12/02 11:23:23
     * @param powerNodeWhiteList 权力节点白名单
     * @return {@link TableDataInfo }
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:whiteList:list")
    @GetMapping("/list")
    public TableDataInfo list(PowerNodeWhiteList powerNodeWhiteList) {
        startPage();
        List<PowerNodeWhiteList> list = powerNodeWhiteListService.selectPowerNodeWhiteListList(powerNodeWhiteList);
        for(PowerNodeWhiteList temp:list){
            SchoolRoom room = roomService.selectSchoolRoomByRoomId(temp.getRoomId());
             SchoolLocation location = locationService.selectSchoolLocationByLocationId(room.getLocationId());
            if(location!=null){
                String fullName = locationService.fullName(location);
                temp.setRoomName(fullName+"-"+room.getRoomName());
            }
        }
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 导出电源白名单列表
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022/12/14 09:53:37
     * @param response 响应
     * @param powerNodeWhiteList 白名单list
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:whiteList:export")
    @Log(title = "电源白名单", businessType = BusinessType.EXPORT)
    @PostMapping("/export")
    public void export(HttpServletResponse response, PowerNodeWhiteList powerNodeWhiteList) {
        List<PowerNodeWhiteList> list = powerNodeWhiteListService.selectPowerNodeWhiteListList(powerNodeWhiteList);
        ExcelUtil<PowerNodeWhiteList> util = new ExcelUtil<PowerNodeWhiteList>(PowerNodeWhiteList.class);
        util.exportExcel(response, list, "电源白名单数据");
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 获取电源白名单详细信息
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022/12/14 09:53:55
     * @param powerNodeWhiteId 白名单id
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:whiteList:query")
    @GetMapping(value = "/{powerNodeWhiteId}")
    public AjaxResult getInfo(@PathVariable("powerNodeWhiteId") Long powerNodeWhiteId) {
        return success(powerNodeWhiteListService.selectPowerNodeWhiteListByPowerNodeWhiteId(powerNodeWhiteId));
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 新增电源白名单
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022/12/14 09:54:18
     * @param powerNodeIds 白名单ids
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:whiteList:add")
    @Log(title = "电源白名单", businessType = BusinessType.INSERT)
    @GetMapping("addPowerNodeWhiteList/{powerNodeIds}")
    public AjaxResult add(@PathVariable("powerNodeIds") Long[] powerNodeIds) {
        PowerNodeWhiteList powerNodeWhiteList = new PowerNodeWhiteList();
        List<PowerNodeWhiteList> powerNodeWhiteLists = powerNodeWhiteListService.selectPowerNodeWhiteListList(powerNodeWhiteList);
        for (PowerNodeWhiteList nodeWhiteList : powerNodeWhiteLists) {
            PowerNodeWhiteList powerNodeWhiteList1 = powerNodeWhiteListService.selectPowerNodeNum(nodeWhiteList.getPowerNodeNum());
            for (Long powerNodeId : powerNodeIds) {
                    DevPowerNodeInfo devPowerNodeInfo = devPowerNodeInfoService.selectDevPowerNodeInfoByPowerNodeId(powerNodeId);
                    devPowerNodeInfoService.updateDevPowerNodeInfoInWhiteList(devPowerNodeInfo);
                    if(powerNodeId.equals(powerNodeWhiteList1.getPowerNodeId())){
                        return error("该设备已添加白名单");
                    }
            }
        }
        return toAjax(powerNodeWhiteListService.insertPowerNodeWhiteList(powerNodeIds));
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 修改电源白名单
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022/12/14 09:58:23
     * @param powerNodeWhiteList 权力节点白名单
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:whiteList:edit")
    @Log(title = "电源白名单", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PutMapping
    public AjaxResult edit(@RequestBody PowerNodeWhiteList powerNodeWhiteList) {
        return toAjax(powerNodeWhiteListService.updatePowerNodeWhiteList(powerNodeWhiteList));
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 删除电源白名单
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022/12/14 09:58:30
     * @param powerNodeWhiteIds 权力白色节点id
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:whiteList:remove")
    @Log(title = "电源白名单", businessType = BusinessType.DELETE)
	@DeleteMapping("/{powerNodeWhiteIds}")
    public AjaxResult remove(@PathVariable Long[] powerNodeWhiteIds) {
        return toAjax(powerNodeWhiteListService.deletePowerNodeWhiteListByPowerNodeWhiteIds(powerNodeWhiteIds));
    }
    /**
     *
     查询空开信息列表
     * @Description: 查询空开信息列表
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/02
     * @param devPowerNodeInfo
     * @return {@link TableDataInfo }
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:whiteList:powerNode:list")
    @GetMapping("/powerNode/list")
    public TableDataInfo powerNode(DevPowerNodeInfo devPowerNodeInfo) {
        List<DevPowerNodeInfo> list = devPowerNodeInfoService.selectDevPowerNodeInfoList(devPowerNodeInfo);
        for (DevPowerNodeInfo powerNodeInfo : list) {
            SchoolRoom room = roomService.selectSchoolRoomByRoomId(powerNodeInfo.getRoomId());
            if(room!=null){
                SchoolLocation location = locationService.selectSchoolLocationByLocationId(room.getLocationId());
                if(location!=null){
                    String fullName = locationService.fullName(location);
                    powerNodeInfo.setRoomName(fullName+"-"+room.getRoomName());
                }
            }
        }
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     *
     获取空开信息详细信息
     * @Description: 获取空开信息详细信息
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/02
     * @param powerNodeId
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:whiteList:powerNode:query")
    @GetMapping(value = "/powerNode/{powerNodeId}")
    public AjaxResult getPowerNode(@PathVariable("powerNodeId") Long powerNodeId) {
        return success(devPowerNodeInfoService.selectDevPowerNodeInfoByPowerNodeId(powerNodeId));
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.controller;
import cn.hutool.core.date.DateField;
import cn.hutool.core.date.DateUtil;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.DateUtils;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.StringUtils;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo;
import com.chenrise.common.log.annotation.Log;
import com.chenrise.common.log.enums.BusinessType;
import com.chenrise.common.security.annotation.RequiresPermissions;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.SchoolRoom;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.ISchoolRoomService;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.ISchoolRoomUseTimeService;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.*;
import javax.annotation.Resource;
import java.util.List;
/**
 * 房间Controller
 *
 * @author liyiying
 * @date 2022-11-24
 */
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/reservation/set")
public class ReservationSetController extends BaseController
{
    @Resource
    private ISchoolRoomService schoolRoomService;
    @Resource
    private ISchoolRoomUseTimeService schoolRoomUseTimeService;
    /**
     *
     可预约教室列表
     * @Description: 可预约教室列表
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/02
     * @param schoolRoom
     * @return {@link TableDataInfo }
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:reservationset:list")
    @GetMapping("/list")
    public TableDataInfo list(SchoolRoom schoolRoom)
    {
        startPage();
        List<SchoolRoom> list = schoolRoomService.selectRoomList(schoolRoom);
        for (SchoolRoom room:list) {
            List<String> weekList = schoolRoomUseTimeService.getWeekDaysByRoomId(room.getRoomId());
            List<String> timeList = schoolRoomUseTimeService.getTimeRangesRoomId(room.getRoomId());
            room.setWeekDays(weekList.stream().toArray(String[]::new));
            room.setTimeRanges(timeList.stream().toArray(String[]::new));
        }
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     *
     单个查询
     * @Description: 单个查询
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/02
     * @param roomId
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:reservationset:query")
    @GetMapping(value = "/{roomId}")
    public AjaxResult getInfo(@PathVariable("roomId") Long roomId)
    {
        return success(schoolRoomService.selectSchoolRoomByRoomId(roomId));
    }
    /**
     *
     修改可预约教室
     * @Description: 修改可预约教室
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/02
     * @param schoolRoom
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:reservationset:edit")
    @Log(title = "房间", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PutMapping
    public AjaxResult edit(@RequestBody SchoolRoom schoolRoom)
    {
        schoolRoom.setIsReservation("1");
        if(schoolRoom.getReservationStart()!=null){
            schoolRoom.setReservationStart(DateUtil.beginOfDay(schoolRoom.getReservationStart()));
        }
        if(schoolRoom.getReservationEnd()!=null){
            schoolRoom.setReservationEnd(DateUtil.offset(DateUtil.endOfDay(schoolRoom.getReservationEnd()), DateField.MILLISECOND,-999));
        }
//        if(null == schoolRoom.getReservationDaysInfo() || "0".equals(schoolRoom.getReservationDaysInfo().toString())){
//            schoolRoom.setReservationDaysInfo(1L);
//        }
        return toAjax(schoolRoomService.updateSchoolRoom(schoolRoom));
    }
    /**
     *
     移除可预约教室
     * @Description: 移除可预约教室
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/02
     * @param roomId
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:reservationset:remove")
    @Log(title = "房间", businessType = BusinessType.DELETE)
	@DeleteMapping("/{roomId}")
    public AjaxResult remove(@PathVariable Long roomId)
    {
        SchoolRoom room = new SchoolRoom();
        room.setRoomId(roomId);
        room.setIsReservation("2");
        room.setRoomUseable("1");
        return toAjax(schoolRoomService.updateSchoolRoom(room));
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.controller;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult;
import com.chenrise.common.redis.service.RedisService;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.SchedulingSetting;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.ISchoolCourseSectionService;
import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.*;
import static com.chenrise.common.core.constant.CacheConstants.SCHEDULING_CONFIG_KEY;
/**
 * 课表设置
 */
@RequiredArgsConstructor
@RequestMapping("/schedulingSetting")
@RestController
public class SchedulingSettingController {
    private final RedisService redisService;
    private final ISchoolCourseSectionService schoolCourseSectionService;
    @GetMapping
    public AjaxResult getInfo() {
        SchedulingSetting schedulingSetting = new SchedulingSetting();
        if (redisService.hasKey(SCHEDULING_CONFIG_KEY)) {
            schedulingSetting = redisService.getCacheObject(SCHEDULING_CONFIG_KEY);
        }
        return AjaxResult.success(schedulingSetting);
    }
    @PostMapping
    public AjaxResult update(@RequestBody SchedulingSetting schedulingSetting) {
        redisService.setCacheObject(SCHEDULING_CONFIG_KEY, schedulingSetting);
        schoolCourseSectionService.updateCourseTimeBySemester(schedulingSetting.getSemesterType());
        return AjaxResult.success();
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.controller;
import cn.hutool.core.date.DateUtil;
import com.chenrise.common.core.domain.R;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.poi.ExcelUtil;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.SchoolBaseSetInfo;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.SchoolStuInfo;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.ISchoolBaseSetInfoService;
import com.chenrise.system.api.RemoteFileService;
import com.chenrise.system.api.domain.SysFile;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.*;
import com.chenrise.common.log.annotation.Log;
import com.chenrise.common.log.enums.BusinessType;
import com.chenrise.common.security.annotation.RequiresPermissions;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.controller.BaseController;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult;
import org.springframework.web.multipart.MultipartFile;
import javax.annotation.Resource;
import java.util.Date;
import java.util.List;
/** 学校基础信息设置Controller
 *
 * 
 * @author liyiying
 * @date 2022-12-09
 */
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/baseSetInfo")
public class SchoolBaseSetInfoController extends BaseController
{
    @Autowired
    private ISchoolBaseSetInfoService schoolBaseSetInfoService;
    @Resource
    private RemoteFileService fileService;
    /**
     * 获取学校基础信息设置详细信息
     * @Description: 获取学校基础信息设置详细信息
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-12-09 14:15:37
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:baseSetInfo:query")
    @GetMapping
    public AjaxResult getInfo()
    {
        SchoolBaseSetInfo baseSetInfo = schoolBaseSetInfoService.selectSchoolBaseSetInfoById(1L);
        if(baseSetInfo.getAutoRemoveBlack()!=0){
            Long remainDays = DateUtil.betweenDay(new Date(),DateUtil.offsetDay(baseSetInfo.getLastRemoveTime(),baseSetInfo.getAutoRemoveBlack()),true);
            baseSetInfo.setRemainDays(remainDays);
        }
        return success(baseSetInfo);
    }
    /**
     * 修改学校基础信息设置
     * @Description: 修改学校基础信息设置
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-12-09 14:15:47
     * @param schoolBaseSetInfo 学校基础设置信息
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:baseSetInfo:edit")
    @Log(title = "学校基础信息设置", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PutMapping
    public AjaxResult edit(@RequestBody SchoolBaseSetInfo schoolBaseSetInfo)
    {
        if(schoolBaseSetInfo.getAutoRemoveBlack()!=0){
            schoolBaseSetInfo.setLastRemoveTime(new Date());
        }
        return toAjax(schoolBaseSetInfoService.updateSchoolBaseSetInfo(schoolBaseSetInfo));
    }
    /**
     *
     * @Description: 上传音频
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/10
     * @param file
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @PostMapping("/upload")
    public AjaxResult upload(@RequestPart(value = "file") MultipartFile file){
        R<SysFile> upload = fileService.upload(file);
        return AjaxResult.success(upload.getData());
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.controller;
import java.rmi.ServerException;

/**
 * 预约黑名单Controller
 *
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2022-12-03
 */
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/black")
public class SchoolBlackInfoController extends BaseController
{
    @Autowired
    private ISchoolBlackInfoService schoolBlackInfoService;
    @Resource private RemoteUserService userService;
    @Resource private SchoolBaseSetInfoMapper baseSetInfoMapper;
    /**
     *
     查询预约黑名单列表
     * @Description: 查询预约黑名单列表
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/03
     * @param schoolBlackInfo
     * @return {@link TableDataInfo }
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:black:list")
    @GetMapping("/list")
    public TableDataInfo list(SchoolBlackInfo schoolBlackInfo)
    {
        startPage();
        List<SchoolBlackInfo> list = schoolBlackInfoService.selectSchoolBlackInfoList(schoolBlackInfo);
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     *
     导出预约黑名单列表
     * @Description: 导出预约黑名单列表
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/03
     * @param response
     * @param schoolBlackInfo
     *
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:black:export")
    @Log(title = "预约黑名单", businessType = BusinessType.EXPORT)
    @PostMapping("/export")
    public void export(HttpServletResponse response, SchoolBlackInfo schoolBlackInfo)
    {
        List<SchoolBlackInfo> list = schoolBlackInfoService.selectSchoolBlackInfoList(schoolBlackInfo);
        ExcelUtil<SchoolBlackInfo> util = new ExcelUtil<SchoolBlackInfo>(SchoolBlackInfo.class);
        util.exportExcel(response, list, "预约黑名单数据");
    }
    /**
     *
     获取预约黑名单详细信息
     * @Description: 获取预约黑名单详细信息
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/03
     * @param blackInfoId
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:black:query")
    @GetMapping(value = "/{blackInfoId}")
    public AjaxResult getInfo(@PathVariable("blackInfoId") Long blackInfoId)
    {
        return success(schoolBlackInfoService.selectSchoolBlackInfoByBlackInfoId(blackInfoId));
    }
    /**
     *
     新增预约黑名单
     * @Description: 新增预约黑名单
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/03
     * @param schoolBlackInfo
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:black:add")
    @Log(title = "预约黑名单", businessType = BusinessType.INSERT)
    @PostMapping
    public AjaxResult add(@RequestBody SchoolBlackInfo schoolBlackInfo) throws ServerException {
        schoolBlackInfo.setType("HAND");
        return toAjax(schoolBlackInfoService.insertSchoolBlackInfo(schoolBlackInfo));
    }
    /**
     *
     修改预约黑名单
     * @Description: 修改预约黑名单
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/03
     * @param schoolBlackInfo
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:black:edit")
    @Log(title = "预约黑名单", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PutMapping
    public AjaxResult edit(@RequestBody SchoolBlackInfo schoolBlackInfo)
    {
        return toAjax(schoolBlackInfoService.updateSchoolBlackInfo(schoolBlackInfo));
    }
    /**
     *
     删除预约黑名单
     * @Description: 删除预约黑名单
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/03
     * @param object
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:black:remove")
    @Log(title = "预约黑名单", businessType = BusinessType.DELETE)
	@DeleteMapping("/")
    public AjaxResult remove(@RequestBody JSONObject object)
    {
        return toAjax(schoolBlackInfoService.deleteSchoolBlackInfoByBlackInfoId(object));
    }
    @GetMapping(value = "/getBreakNum/{userId}")
    public AjaxResult getBreakNum(@PathVariable("userId") Long userId)
    {
        SchoolBaseSetInfo baseSetInfo = baseSetInfoMapper.selectSchoolBaseSetInfoById(1L);
        AjaxResult result = userService.getUser(userId);
        JSONObject jsonObject = JSONUtil.parseObj(result);
        SysUser user = JSONUtil.toBean(JSONUtil.toJsonStr(jsonObject.get("data")), SysUser.class);
        Map<String,Object> map = new HashMap<>();
        map.put("userBreakNum",user.getBreakNum()==null?0:user.getBreakNum());
        map.put("maxBreakNum",baseSetInfo.getMaxBreakNum());
        return success(map);
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.controller;
import cn.hutool.core.collection.CollectionUtil;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.poi.ExcelUtil;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.controller.BaseController;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo;
import com.chenrise.common.log.annotation.Log;
import com.chenrise.common.log.enums.BusinessType;
import com.chenrise.common.security.annotation.RequiresPermissions;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.DevMonitorInfo;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.SchoolCourse;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.SchoolCourseSync;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.IDevMonitorInfoService;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.ISchoolCourseService;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.ISchoolCourseSyncService;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.ISchoolRoomService;
import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;

/**
 * 学校课程Controller
 * @author sunming
 * @date 2022-12-05
 */
@RequiredArgsConstructor
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/course")
public class SchoolCourseController extends BaseController
{
    private final ISchoolCourseService schoolCourseService;
    private final IDevMonitorInfoService monitorInfoService;
    private final ISchoolRoomService schoolRoomService;
    private final ISchoolCourseSyncService schoolCourseSyncService;
    /**
     * @Description:查询学校课程列表
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-12-05 09:40:22
     * @param schoolCourse:
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:course:list")
    @GetMapping("/list")
    public TableDataInfo list(SchoolCourse schoolCourse)
    {
        startPage();
        List<SchoolCourse> list = schoolCourseService.selectSchoolCourseList(schoolCourse);
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     * @Description:导出学校课程列表
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-12-05 09:40:28
     * @param response:
     * @param schoolCourse:
     * @return: void
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:course:export")
    @Log(title = "学校课程", businessType = BusinessType.EXPORT)
    @PostMapping("/export")
    public void export(HttpServletResponse response, SchoolCourse schoolCourse)
    {
        List<SchoolCourse> list = schoolCourseService.selectSchoolCourseList(schoolCourse);
        ExcelUtil<SchoolCourse> util = new ExcelUtil<SchoolCourse>(SchoolCourse.class);
        util.exportExcel(response, list, "学校课程数据");
    }
    /**
     * @Description:获取学校课程详细信息
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-12-05 09:40:33
     * @param courseId:
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:course:query")
    @GetMapping(value = "/{courseId}")
    public AjaxResult getInfo(@PathVariable("courseId") Long courseId)
    {
        return success(schoolCourseService.selectSchoolCourseByCourseId(courseId));
    }
    /**
     * @Description:新增学校课程
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-12-05 09:40:43
     * @param schoolCourse:
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:course:add")
    @Log(title = "学校课程", businessType = BusinessType.INSERT)
    @PostMapping
    public AjaxResult add(@RequestBody SchoolCourse schoolCourse)
    {
        return toAjax(schoolCourseService.insertSchoolCourse(schoolCourse));
    }
    /**
     * @Description:修改学校课程
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-12-05 09:40:47
     * @param schoolCourse:
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:course:edit")
    @Log(title = "学校课程", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PutMapping
    public AjaxResult edit(@RequestBody SchoolCourse schoolCourse)
    {
        return toAjax(schoolCourseService.updateSchoolCourse(schoolCourse));
    }
    /**
     * @Description:删除学校课程
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-12-05 09:40:50
     * @param courseIds:
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:course:remove")
    @Log(title = "学校课程", businessType = BusinessType.DELETE)
	@DeleteMapping("/{courseIds}")
    public AjaxResult remove(@PathVariable Long[] courseIds)
    {
        return toAjax(schoolCourseService.deleteSchoolCourseByCourseIds(courseIds));
    }
    /**
     * @Description:根据IP地址信息查当前房间信息
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-12-05 13:09:52
     * @param ip:
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @GetMapping("/getBoardAllInfo/{ip}")
    public Map<String,Object> getBoardAllInfo(@PathVariable("ip") String ip) {
        return schoolCourseService.getBoardAllInfo(ip);
    }
    @GetMapping("/getMonitors/{roomId}")
    public AjaxResult getMonitors(@PathVariable("roomId") Long roomId) {
        List<Map<String,Object>> list = new ArrayList<>();
        DevMonitorInfo query = new DevMonitorInfo();
        query.setRoomId(roomId);
        List<DevMonitorInfo> monitorInfos = monitorInfoService.selectDevMonitorInfoList(query);
        for(DevMonitorInfo di:monitorInfos){
            Map<String,Object> map = new HashMap<>();
            map.put("name",di.getDeviceName());
            String url = "rtsp://"+di.getCameraUser()+":"+di.getCameraPassword()+"@"+di.getCameraIp()+":"+di.getCameraPort()+"/h264/ch1/main/av_stream";
            map.put("url",url);
            list.add(map);
        }
        return AjaxResult.success(list);
    }
    /**
     *
     * @Description: 定时同步课程
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2023/01/10
     * @param
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @Log(title = "课程", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PostMapping("/syncCourse")
    public AjaxResult syncScheduling()
    {
        schoolCourseService.sync();
        return success();
    }
    /**
     * 同步吉林工商课程数据
     */
    @PostMapping("/syncCourse/jlgs")
    public AjaxResult syncCourseForJlgs() {
        // 查询房间信息
        List<String> roomCodeList = schoolRoomService.getAllRoomCodeList();
        if (CollectionUtil.isEmpty(roomCodeList)) {
            return warn("未查询到教室信息！");
        }
        List<SchoolCourseSync> schoolCourseSyncList = schoolCourseSyncService.semesterListByRoomCode(roomCodeList);
        if (CollectionUtil.isEmpty(schoolCourseSyncList)) {
            return warn("未查询到课程信息！");
        }
        schoolCourseService.syncCourseForJlgs(schoolCourseSyncList);
        return success();
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.controller;
import com.chenrise.common.core.constant.UserConstants;
import com.chenrise.common.core.domain.R;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.DateUtils;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.poi.ExcelUtil;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.controller.BaseController;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo;
import com.chenrise.common.log.annotation.Log;
import com.chenrise.common.log.enums.BusinessType;
import com.chenrise.common.security.annotation.RequiresPermissions;
import com.chenrise.common.security.utils.SecurityUtils;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.SchoolLocation;
import com.chenrise.jufe.mapper.SchoolLocationMapper;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.ISchoolLocationService;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.ISchoolRoomService;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.*;
import javax.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse;
import java.io.IOException;
import java.util.Arrays;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.stream.Collectors;
/**
 * 楼栋Controller
 *
 * @author chenfang
 * @date 2022-11-21
 */
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/location")
public class SchoolLocationController extends BaseController {
    @Autowired
    private ISchoolLocationService schoolLocationService;
    @Autowired
    private ISchoolRoomService schoolRoomService;
    @Autowired
    private SchoolLocationMapper schoolLocationMapper;
    /**
     * @Description: 查询楼栋列表
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-11-23 17:13:00
     * @param schoolLocation: 楼栋实体类
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:location:list")
    @GetMapping("/list")
    public TableDataInfo list(SchoolLocation schoolLocation) {
        startPage();
        List<SchoolLocation> list = schoolLocationService.selectSchoolLocationList(schoolLocation);
        for (SchoolLocation location:list) {
            Map<String,String> map = schoolLocationMapper.selectUsernameByLocationId(location.getLocationId());
            if (map != null){
                location.setPrincipal(Arrays.stream(map.get("ids").split(",")).map(s -> Long.parseLong(s.trim())).collect(Collectors.toList()).toArray(new Long[]{}));
                location.setUserName(map.get("names"));
            }
        }
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 导出楼栋列表
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-11-23 17:13:36
     * @param response:
     * @param schoolLocation: 楼栋实体类
     * @return: void
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:location:export")
    @Log(title = "楼栋", businessType = BusinessType.EXPORT)
    @PostMapping("/export")
    public void export(HttpServletResponse response, SchoolLocation schoolLocation) {
        List<SchoolLocation> list = schoolLocationService.selectSchoolLocationList(schoolLocation);
        ExcelUtil<SchoolLocation> util = new ExcelUtil<SchoolLocation>(SchoolLocation.class);
        util.exportExcel(response, list, "楼栋数据");
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 获取楼栋详细信息
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-11-23 17:13:54
     * @param locationId: 楼栋id
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:location:query")
    @GetMapping(value = "/{locationId}")
    public AjaxResult getInfo(@PathVariable("locationId") Long locationId) {
        return success(schoolLocationService.selectSchoolLocationByLocationId(locationId));
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 新增楼栋
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-11-23 17:14:20
     * @param schoolLocation: 楼栋实体类
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:location:add")
    @Log(title = "楼栋", businessType = BusinessType.INSERT)
    @PostMapping
    public AjaxResult add(@RequestBody SchoolLocation schoolLocation) {
        if (UserConstants.NOT_UNIQUE.equals(schoolLocationService.checklocationNameUnique(schoolLocation)))
        {
            return error("新增楼栋'" + schoolLocation.getLocationName() + "'失败，楼栋名称已存在");
        }
        SchoolLocation info = schoolLocationMapper.selectSchoolLocationByLocationId(schoolLocation.getParentId());
        if (info == null) {
            schoolLocation.setAncestors("0");
        } else {
            schoolLocation.setAncestors(info.getAncestors() + "," + schoolLocation.getParentId());
        }
        schoolLocation.setCreateBy(SecurityUtils.getUsername());
        schoolLocation.setCreateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        schoolLocation.setDataSources("2");
        return toAjax(schoolLocationService.insertSchoolLocation(schoolLocation));
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 修改楼栋
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-11-23 17:14:20
     * @param schoolLocation: 楼栋实体类
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:location:edit")
    @Log(title = "楼栋", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PutMapping
    public AjaxResult edit(@RequestBody SchoolLocation schoolLocation) {
        Long deptId = schoolLocation.getDeptId();
        if (UserConstants.NOT_UNIQUE.equals(schoolLocationService.checklocationNameUnique(schoolLocation)))
        {
            return error("修改楼栋'" + schoolLocation.getLocationName() + "'失败，楼栋名称已存在");
        }
        else if (schoolLocation.getParentId().equals(deptId))
        {
            return error("修改楼栋'" + schoolLocation.getLocationName() + "'失败，上级楼栋不能是自己");
        }
        schoolLocation.setUpdateBy(SecurityUtils.getUsername());
        schoolLocation.setUpdateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        return toAjax(schoolLocationService.updateSchoolLocation(schoolLocation));
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 批量修改楼栋负责人
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-11-23 17:14:20
     * @param schoolLocation: 楼栋实体类
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:location:editPrincipal")
    @Log(title = "楼栋", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PutMapping("/editPrincipal")
    public AjaxResult editPrincipal(@RequestBody SchoolLocation schoolLocation) {
        schoolLocation.setUpdateBy(SecurityUtils.getUsername());
        return toAjax(schoolLocationService.updateSchoolLocationPrincipal(schoolLocation));
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 删除楼栋
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-11-23 17:14:55
     * @param locationIds: 楼栋id集合
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:location:remove")
    @Log(title = "楼栋", businessType = BusinessType.DELETE)
    @DeleteMapping("/{locationIds}")
    public AjaxResult remove(@PathVariable Long[] locationIds) {
        for (Long locationId : locationIds) {
            if (schoolLocationService.hasChildByLocationId(locationId))
            {
                return warn("存在下级楼栋,不允许删除");
            }
            if (schoolLocationService.hasChildByRoomId(locationId))
            {
                return warn("存在下级教室,不允许删除");
            }
        }
        return toAjax(schoolLocationService.deleteSchoolLocationByLocationIds(locationIds));
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 获取部门树列表
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-11-23 17:15:22
     * @param schoolLocation: 楼栋实体类
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:location:level")
    @GetMapping("/level")
    public AjaxResult locationTree(SchoolLocation schoolLocation) {
        return success(schoolLocationService.selectLocationTreeList(schoolLocation));
    }
    @GetMapping("/level1")
    public AjaxResult level1() {
        return success(schoolLocationService.treeTwo());
    }
    /**
     * 得到所有位置列表
     * @Description: 得到所有位置列表
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-11-23 14:44:07
     * @param id id
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:location:getAllLocationList")
    @GetMapping("/getAllLocationList/{id}")
    public AjaxResult getAllLocationList(@PathVariable Long id) {
        return AjaxResult.success(schoolLocationService.getAllLocationListById(id));
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 获取完整的 location和room树型结构
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022/12/14 10:09:52
     * @param isReservation 是预订
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @GetMapping("/tree")
    public AjaxResult locationTree(String isReservation) {
        return success(schoolLocationService.tree(isReservation));
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 获取完整的 location和room树型结构及班牌
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022/12/14 10:10:04
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @GetMapping("/treeBoard")
    public AjaxResult locationAndBOardTree() {
        return success(schoolLocationService.treeAndBoard());
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 获取完整的 location和room树型结构
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022/12/14 10:10:12
     * @return {@link R }<{@link List }<{@link Map }<{@link String },{@link Object }>>>
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:location:allTree")
    @GetMapping("/allTree")
    public R<List<Map<String,Object>>> locationAllTree() {
        return R.ok(schoolLocationService.tree(""));
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 查询负责人列表
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-12-07 19:34:02
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:location:principalList")
    @GetMapping("/principalList")
    public AjaxResult principalList() {
        List<Map<String,String>> list = schoolRoomService.selectPrincipalList();
        return AjaxResult.success(list);
    }
    /**
     * 获取完整的 location和room树型结构 APP
     * @Description: 获取完整的 location和room树型结构 APP
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-12-15 11:25:29
     * @return {@link R }<{@link List }<{@link Map }<{@link String }, {@link Object }>>>
     */
    @GetMapping("/allTreeToApp")
    public R<List<Map<String,Object>>> locationAllTreeToApp() {
        return R.ok(schoolLocationService.tree(""));
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 获取楼层数
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2023/01/10 11:12:31
     * @param locationName 楼栋名称
     * @param locationFloor 楼层数
     * @return {@link Long }
     */
    @GetMapping("/getLocationFloor")
    public Long getLocationFloor( String locationName, Long locationFloor) {
        Long locationFloorNum = schoolLocationService.getLocationFloor(locationName, locationFloor);
        return locationFloorNum;
    }
    @GetMapping("/jufeApiGetSysLq")
    public AjaxResult jufeApiGetSysLq() throws IOException {
        int i = schoolLocationService.jufeApiGetSysLq();
        return AjaxResult.success(i);
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.controller;
import cn.hutool.core.date.DateUtil;
import com.chenrise.common.core.constant.HttpStatus;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.PageUtils;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.poi.ExcelUtil;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.controller.BaseController;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo;
import com.chenrise.common.log.annotation.Log;
import com.chenrise.common.log.enums.BusinessType;
import com.chenrise.common.security.annotation.RequiresPermissions;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.SchoolMeetingInfo;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.vo.PhotoDTO;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.ISchoolMeetingInfoService;
import com.github.pagehelper.Page;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.*;
import javax.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse;
import java.util.Date;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.Objects;
/**
 * 会议信息Controller
 * 
 * @author zzy
 * @date 2025-05-06
 */
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/meetingInfo")
public class SchoolMeetingInfoController extends BaseController
{
    @Autowired
    private ISchoolMeetingInfoService schoolMeetingInfoService;
    /**
     * 查询会议信息列表
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("schoolMeetingInfo:meetingInfo:list")
    @GetMapping("/list")
    public TableDataInfo list(SchoolMeetingInfo schoolMeetingInfo)
    {
        startPage();
        List<SchoolMeetingInfo> list = schoolMeetingInfoService.selectSchoolMeetingInfoList(schoolMeetingInfo);
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     * 导出会议信息列表
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("schoolMeetingInfo:meetingInfo:export")
    @Log(title = "导出会议信息", businessType = BusinessType.EXPORT)
    @PostMapping("/export")
    public void export(HttpServletResponse response, SchoolMeetingInfo schoolMeetingInfo)
    {
        List<SchoolMeetingInfo> list = schoolMeetingInfoService.selectSchoolMeetingInfoList(schoolMeetingInfo);
        ExcelUtil<SchoolMeetingInfo> util = new ExcelUtil<SchoolMeetingInfo>(SchoolMeetingInfo.class);
        util.exportExcel(response, list, "会议信息数据");
    }
    /**
     * 导出会议详情列表
     */
    @Log(title = "会议信息", businessType = BusinessType.EXPORT)
    @PostMapping("/exportMeetingInfo")
    public void exportMeetingInfo(HttpServletResponse response, SchoolMeetingInfo schoolMeetingInfo) {
        schoolMeetingInfoService.output(response, schoolMeetingInfo);
    }
    /**
     * 获取会议信息详细信息
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("schoolMeetingInfo:meetingInfo:list")
    @GetMapping(value = "/{id}")
    public AjaxResult getInfo(@PathVariable("id") Long id)
    {
        return success(schoolMeetingInfoService.selectSchoolMeetingInfoById(id));
    }
    /**
     * 获取详情参会人员信息
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("schoolMeetingInfo:meetingInfo:list")
    @GetMapping(value = "/getItemsInfo")
    public TableDataInfo getItemsInfo(Long meetingId)
    {
        startPage();
        Page<Map<String, Object>> list = schoolMeetingInfoService.selectSchoolMeetingitemsById(meetingId);
        TableDataInfo dataTable = getDataTable(list);
        dataTable.setTotal(list.getTotal());
        dataTable.setRows(list.getResult());
        return dataTable;
    }
    /**
     * 新增会议信息
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("schoolMeetingInfo:meetingInfo:add")
    @Log(title = "会议信息", businessType = BusinessType.INSERT)
    @PostMapping
    public AjaxResult add(@RequestBody Map<String, Object> map)
    {
        return schoolMeetingInfoService.insertSchoolMeetingInfo(map);
    }
    /**
     * 修改会议信息
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("schoolMeetingInfo:meetingInfo:edit")
    @Log(title = "会议信息", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PutMapping
    public AjaxResult edit(@RequestBody Map<String, Object> map)
    {
        return schoolMeetingInfoService.updateSchoolMeetingInfo(map);
    }
    /**
     * 修改会议详情
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("schoolMeetingInfo:meetingInfo:edit")
    @Log(title = "修改会议详情", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PutMapping("/editDetails")
    public AjaxResult editDetails(@RequestBody Map<String, Object> map)
    {
        return toAjax(schoolMeetingInfoService.editDetails(map));
    }
    /**
     * 删除会议信息
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("schoolMeetingInfo:meetingInfo:remove")
    @Log(title = "会议信息", businessType = BusinessType.DELETE)
	@DeleteMapping("/{ids}")
    public AjaxResult remove(@PathVariable Long[] ids)
    {
        return toAjax(schoolMeetingInfoService.deleteSchoolMeetingInfoByIds(ids));
    }
    /**
     * 查询会议人员列表
     *
     * */
    @RequiresPermissions("schoolMeetingInfo:meetingInfo:list")
    @Log(title = "查询会议人员", businessType = BusinessType.DELETE)
    @GetMapping("/getItems")
    public TableDataInfo getItems(@RequestParam(required = false) Map<String, Object> map)
    {
        startPage();
        return schoolMeetingInfoService.getItems(map);
    }
    /**
     * 发布会议消息
     *
     * */
    @RequiresPermissions("schoolMeetingInfo:meetingInfo:list")
    @Log(title = "发布会议", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @GetMapping("/publishMeeting")
    public AjaxResult publishMeeting(
            @RequestParam("meetingId") Long meetingId,
            @RequestParam(name = "state", required = false) String state,
            @RequestParam(name = "startTime", required = false) String startTime) {
        return schoolMeetingInfoService.publishMeeting(meetingId, state,startTime)==1?
                AjaxResult.success("发布成功!"):AjaxResult.error("发布失败,请修改会议时间!");
    }
    /**
     *  定时更新会议状态
     * */
    @Log(title = "检查会议状态", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @GetMapping("/checkMeetingState")
    public void checkMeetingState(){
        schoolMeetingInfoService.updatePublishedToStarted();
    }
    /**
     * 会议签到接口
     *
     * @param meetingId 会议ID（必填）
     * @param userId    用户ID（必填）
     * @param state     签到状态（可选）
     * @param signIn     签到时间（可选）
     * @return AjaxResult 操作结果
     */
    @Log(title = "签到", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PostMapping("/meetingSignIn")
    public AjaxResult signIn(
            @RequestBody Map<String, Object> map) {
        // 参数校验
        if (map.get("meetingId") == null || map.get("teaUserId") == null) {
            return AjaxResult.error("参数缺失");
        }
        Date date;
        try {
            date = DateUtil.parse(Objects.toString(map.get("signIn")), "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm");
        }catch (Exception e){
            System.out.println(e.getMessage());
            date= new Date();
        }
        try {
            return schoolMeetingInfoService.signIn(
                    Long.parseLong(Objects.toString(map.get("meetingId"))),
                    Objects.toString(map.get("teaUserId")),
                    Objects.toString(map.get("signInStatus"),"1"),
                    date);
        } catch (Exception e) {
            // 日志记录异常
            e.printStackTrace();
            return AjaxResult.error("系统异常，请稍后再试"+e.getMessage());
        }
    }
    /**
     * 班牌查询当天会议接口
     */
    @GetMapping("/boredGetMeeting")
    public TableDataInfo boredGetMeeting(@RequestParam String ip)
    {
        List<Map<String, Object>> list = schoolMeetingInfoService.boredGetMeeting(ip);
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     * 获取照片
     * */
    @GetMapping("/boredGetPhoto")
    public TableDataInfo boredGetPhoto(@RequestParam(defaultValue = "1") Integer pageNum,
                                    @RequestParam(defaultValue = "9999") Integer pageSize)
    {
        PageUtils.startPage(pageNum, pageSize);
        Page<PhotoDTO> photoDTOS = schoolMeetingInfoService.boredGetPhoto();
        TableDataInfo result = new TableDataInfo();
        result.setRows(photoDTOS);
        result.setTotal(photoDTOS.getTotal());
        result.setCode(photoDTOS.isEmpty()?HttpStatus.ERROR: HttpStatus.SUCCESS);
        return result;
    }
}

    @PostMapping
    public AjaxResult add(@RequestBody SchoolMeetingItem schoolMeetingItem)
    {

    @PutMapping
    public AjaxResult edit(@RequestBody SchoolMeetingItem schoolMeetingItem)
    {
        return toAjax(schoolMeetingItemService.updateSchoolMeetingItem(schoolMeetingItem));
    }
    /**

     */

    @Log(title = "会议信息参会人员关联", businessType = BusinessType.DELETE)
	@DeleteMapping("/{ids}")

package com.chenrise.jufe.controller;

@RequestMapping("/schoolMeetingWarn")
public class SchoolMeetingWarnController extends BaseController {

        schoolMeetingWarnService.sendMeetingWarn();
        return R.ok();

    @GetMapping("/list")
    public TableDataInfo list(SchoolMeetingWarn schoolMeetingWarn) {

        startPage();

        return getDataTable(list);

@RestController
@RequestMapping("/messageInfo")
public class SchoolNoticeInfoController extends BaseController {
    @Autowired
    private ISchoolNoticeInfoService schoolNoticeInfoService;
    /**
     查询通知信息列表
     * @Description: 查询通知信息列表
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022/12/14 09:37:09
     * @param schoolNoticeInfo 学校通知信息
     * @return {@link TableDataInfo }
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:messageInfo:list")
    @GetMapping("/list")
    public TableDataInfo list(SchoolNoticeInfo schoolNoticeInfo) {
        startPage();
        List<SchoolNoticeInfo> list = schoolNoticeInfoService.selectSchoolNoticeInfoList(schoolNoticeInfo);
        return getDataTable(list);

    @Log(title = "通知信息", businessType = BusinessType.EXPORT)
    @PostMapping("/export")

    public AjaxResult add(@RequestBody SchoolNoticeInfo schoolNoticeInfo) {
        return toAjax(schoolNoticeInfoService.insertSchoolNoticeInfo(schoolNoticeInfo));
    }
    /**
     修改通知信息
     * @Description: 修改通知信息

     * @param schoolNoticeInfo 学校通知信息

     */

    @Log(title = "通知信息", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PutMapping
    public AjaxResult edit(@RequestBody SchoolNoticeInfo schoolNoticeInfo) {
        return toAjax(schoolNoticeInfoService.updateSchoolNoticeInfo(schoolNoticeInfo));
    }
    /**
     修改通知信息

	@DeleteMapping("/{noticeIds}")
    public AjaxResult remove(@PathVariable Long[] noticeIds) {

package com.chenrise.jufe.controller;
import java.util.Date;
import java.util.List;
import javax.annotation.Resource;
import javax.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse;
import cn.hutool.core.date.DateField;
import cn.hutool.core.date.DateUtil;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.StringUtils;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.GetMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PostMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PutMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.DeleteMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PathVariable;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestBody;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RestController;
import com.chenrise.common.log.annotation.Log;
import com.chenrise.common.log.enums.BusinessType;
import com.chenrise.common.security.annotation.RequiresPermissions;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.SchoolReport;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.ISchoolReportService;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.poi.ExcelUtil;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo;
/**
 * 问题上报Controller
 *
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2024-01-16
 */
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/report")
public class SchoolReportController extends BaseController
{
    @Resource
    private ISchoolReportService schoolReportService;
    /**
     * 查询问题上报列表
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:report:list")
    @GetMapping("/list")
    public TableDataInfo list(SchoolReport schoolReport)
    {
        startPage();
        List<SchoolReport> list = schoolReportService.selectSchoolReportList(schoolReport);
        for(SchoolReport sr:list){
            if(StringUtils.isNotEmpty(sr.getPicUrls())){
                sr.setPicList(sr.getPicUrls().split(","));
            }
        }
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     * 导出问题上报列表
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:report:export")
    @Log(title = "问题上报", businessType = BusinessType.EXPORT)
    @PostMapping("/export")
    public void export(HttpServletResponse response, SchoolReport schoolReport)
    {
        List<SchoolReport> list = schoolReportService.selectSchoolReportList(schoolReport);
        ExcelUtil<SchoolReport> util = new ExcelUtil<SchoolReport>(SchoolReport.class);
        util.exportExcel(response, list, "问题上报数据");
    }
    /**
     * 获取问题上报详细信息
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:report:query")
    @GetMapping(value = "/{id}")
    public AjaxResult getInfo(@PathVariable("id") Long id)
    {
        return success(schoolReportService.selectSchoolReportById(id));
    }
    /**
     * 新增问题上报
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:report:add")
    @Log(title = "问题上报", businessType = BusinessType.INSERT)
    @PostMapping
    public AjaxResult add(@RequestBody SchoolReport schoolReport)
    {
        return toAjax(schoolReportService.insertSchoolReport(schoolReport));
    }
    /**
     * 修改问题上报
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:report:edit")
    @Log(title = "问题上报", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PutMapping
    public AjaxResult edit(@RequestBody SchoolReport schoolReport)
    {
        return toAjax(schoolReportService.updateSchoolReport(schoolReport));
    }
    /**
     * 删除问题上报
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:report:remove")
    @Log(title = "问题上报", businessType = BusinessType.DELETE)
	@DeleteMapping("/{ids}")
    public AjaxResult remove(@PathVariable Long[] ids)
    {
        return toAjax(schoolReportService.deleteSchoolReportByIds(ids));
    }
    /**
     * @Description:处理上报问题
     * @param schoolReport
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     * @Author: CJH
     * @Updator: CJH
     * @Date 2024/1/17 12:50
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:report:audit")
    @Log(title = "问题上报", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PostMapping("/audit")
    public AjaxResult audit(@RequestBody SchoolReport schoolReport)
    {
        schoolReportService.auditReport(schoolReport);
        return AjaxResult.success();
    }
    /**
     * @Description:首页列表
     * @param schoolReport
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo
     * @Author: CJH
     * @Updator: CJH
     * @Date 2024/4/25 16:34
     */
    @GetMapping("/nowlist")
    public TableDataInfo nowlist(SchoolReport schoolReport)
    {
        Date start = null;
        Date end = new Date();
        schoolReport.setStatus("UNPROCESSED");
        schoolReport.getParams().put("orderBy"," order by create_time asc ");
        if("DAY".equals(schoolReport.getQueryType())){
            start = DateUtil.beginOfDay(end);
        }else if("MONTH".equals(schoolReport.getQueryType())){
            start = DateUtil.beginOfMonth(end);
        }else if("YEAR".equals(schoolReport.getQueryType())){
            start = DateUtil.beginOfYear(end);
        }else{
            end = null;
        }
        schoolReport.getParams().put("start",start);
        schoolReport.getParams().put("end",end);
        startPage();
        List<SchoolReport> list = schoolReportService.selectSchoolReportList(schoolReport);
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     * 查询首页问题上报列表
     * @Description: 查询首页问题上报列表
     * @param schoolReport
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo
     * @Author: CJH
     * @Updator: CJH
     * @Date 2024/4/25 16:34
     */
    @GetMapping("/getSchoolReport")
    public TableDataInfo getSchoolReport(SchoolReport schoolReport)
    {
        Date start = null;
        Date end = new Date();
        schoolReport.setStatus("UNPROCESSED");
        schoolReport.getParams().put("orderBy"," order by create_time asc ");
        if("DAY".equals(schoolReport.getQueryType())){
            start = DateUtil.beginOfDay(end);
        }else if("MONTH".equals(schoolReport.getQueryType())){
            start = DateUtil.beginOfMonth(end);
        }else if("YEAR".equals(schoolReport.getQueryType())){
            start = DateUtil.beginOfYear(end);
        }else{
            end = null;
        }
        schoolReport.getParams().put("start",start);
        schoolReport.getParams().put("end",end);
        List<SchoolReport> list = schoolReportService.getSchoolReportList(schoolReport);
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
}

/**
 * 预约信息Controller
 *
 * @author liyiying
 * @date 2022-12-03
 */
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/reservation")
public class SchoolReservationInfoController extends BaseController
{
    @Autowired
    private ISchoolReservationInfoService schoolReservationInfoService;
    @Resource
    private ISchoolReservationTimeInfoService timeInfoService;
    @Resource
    private ISchoolBaseSetInfoService baseSetInfoService;
    @Resource
    private ISchoolRoomService roomService;
    @Resource
    private ISchoolLocationService locationService;
    /**
     *
     查询预约信息列表
     * @Description: 查询预约信息列表
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/03
     * @param schoolReservationInfo
     * @return {@link TableDataInfo }
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:reservation:list")
    @GetMapping("/list")
    public TableDataInfo list(SchoolReservationInfo schoolReservationInfo)
    {
        startPage();
        List<SchoolReservationInfo> list = schoolReservationInfoService.selectSchoolReservationInfoList(schoolReservationInfo);
        for(SchoolReservationInfo s:list){
            SchoolReservationTimeInfo srt_query = new SchoolReservationTimeInfo();
            srt_query.setReservationId(s.getReservationId());
            List<SchoolReservationTimeInfo> srtList = timeInfoService.selectSchoolReservationTimeInfoList(srt_query);
            s.setTimeInfoList(srtList);
            SchoolRoom room = roomService.selectSchoolRoomByRoomId(s.getRoomId());
            if(room!=null){
                SchoolLocation location = locationService.selectSchoolLocationByLocationId(room.getLocationId());
                if(location!=null){
                    String fullName = locationService.fullName(location);
                    s.setLocationName(fullName);
                }
            }
        }
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     *
     导出预约信息列表
     * @Description: 导出预约信息列表
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/03
     * @param response
     * @param schoolReservationInfo
     *
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:reservation:export")
    @Log(title = "预约信息", businessType = BusinessType.EXPORT)
    @PostMapping("/export")
    public void export(HttpServletResponse response, SchoolReservationInfo schoolReservationInfo)
    {
        List<SchoolReservationInfo> list = schoolReservationInfoService.selectSchoolReservationInfoList(schoolReservationInfo);
        for(SchoolReservationInfo sri:list){
            String str = DateUtil.format(sri.getReservationDate(),"yyyy-MM-dd")+" ";
            SchoolReservationTimeInfo srt_query = new SchoolReservationTimeInfo();
            srt_query.setReservationId(sri.getReservationId());
            List<SchoolReservationTimeInfo> srtList = timeInfoService.selectSchoolReservationTimeInfoList(srt_query);
            for(SchoolReservationTimeInfo srti:srtList){
                str+= srti.getReservationStartTime() + " ~ " + srti.getReservationEndTime();
            }
            sri.setReservationDateStr(str);
        }
        ExcelUtil<SchoolReservationInfo> util = new ExcelUtil<SchoolReservationInfo>(SchoolReservationInfo.class);
        util.exportExcel(response, list, "预约信息数据");
    }
    /**
     *
     获取预约信息详细信息
     * @Description: 获取预约信息详细信息
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/03
     * @param reservationId
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:reservation:query")
    @GetMapping(value = "/{reservationId}")
    public AjaxResult getInfo(@PathVariable("reservationId") Long reservationId)
    {
        return success(schoolReservationInfoService.selectSchoolReservationInfoByReservationId(reservationId));
    }
    /**
     *
     新增预约信息
     * @Description: 新增预约信息
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/03
     * @param schoolReservationInfo
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:reservation:add")
    @Log(title = "预约信息", businessType = BusinessType.INSERT)
    @PostMapping
    public AjaxResult add(@RequestBody SchoolReservationInfo schoolReservationInfo)
    {
        return toAjax(schoolReservationInfoService.insertSchoolReservationInfo(schoolReservationInfo));
    }
    /**
     *
     修改预约信息
     * @Description: 修改预约信息
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/03
     * @param schoolReservationInfo
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:reservation:edit")
    @Log(title = "预约信息", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PutMapping
    public AjaxResult edit(@RequestBody SchoolReservationInfo schoolReservationInfo)
    {
        return toAjax(schoolReservationInfoService.updateSchoolReservationInfo(schoolReservationInfo));
    }
    /**
     *
     删除预约信息
     * @Description: 删除预约信息
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/03
     * @param reservationIds
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:reservation:remove")
    @Log(title = "预约信息", businessType = BusinessType.DELETE)
	@DeleteMapping("/{reservationIds}")
    public AjaxResult remove(@PathVariable Integer[] reservationIds)
    {
        return toAjax(schoolReservationInfoService.deleteSchoolReservationInfoByReservationIds(reservationIds));
    }
    /**
     *
     审核预约信息
     * @Description: 审核预约信息
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/03
     * @param schoolReservationInfo
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:reservation:audit")
    @Log(title = "预约信息", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PostMapping("/audit")
    public AjaxResult audit(@RequestBody SchoolReservationInfo schoolReservationInfo)
    {
        schoolReservationInfoService.audit(schoolReservationInfo);
        return AjaxResult.success();
    }
}

    }
