package com.chenrise.jufe.controller;
import java.util.Date;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture;
import javax.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse;
import cn.hutool.core.date.DateUtil;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.Bo.SchoolRoomAudioInfoBo;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Value;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.GetMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PostMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PutMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.DeleteMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PathVariable;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestBody;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RestController;
import com.chenrise.common.log.annotation.Log;
import com.chenrise.common.log.enums.BusinessType;
import com.chenrise.common.security.annotation.RequiresPermissions;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.SchoolRoomAudioInfo;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.ISchoolRoomAudioInfoService;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.poi.ExcelUtil;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo;
/**
 * 教室音频设置Controller
 *
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2023-05-04
 */
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/audio")
public class SchoolRoomAudioInfoController extends BaseController
{
    @Autowired
    private ISchoolRoomAudioInfoService schoolRoomAudioInfoService;
    @Value("${device.deviceType}")
    private String deviceType;
    /**
     * 查询教室音频设置列表
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:audio:list")
    @GetMapping("/list")
    public TableDataInfo list(SchoolRoomAudioInfo schoolRoomAudioInfo)
    {
        startPage();
        List<SchoolRoomAudioInfoBo> list = schoolRoomAudioInfoService.selectSchoolRoomAudioInfoList(schoolRoomAudioInfo);
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     * 导出教室音频设置列表
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:audio:export")
    @Log(title = "教室音频设置", businessType = BusinessType.EXPORT)
    @PostMapping("/export")
    public void export(HttpServletResponse response, SchoolRoomAudioInfo schoolRoomAudioInfo)
    {
        List<SchoolRoomAudioInfoBo> list = schoolRoomAudioInfoService.selectSchoolRoomAudioInfoList(schoolRoomAudioInfo);
        ExcelUtil<SchoolRoomAudioInfoBo> util = new ExcelUtil<SchoolRoomAudioInfoBo>(SchoolRoomAudioInfoBo.class);
        util.exportExcel(response, list, "教室音频设置数据");
    }
    /**
     * 获取教室音频设置详细信息
     */
    @GetMapping(value = "/{id}")
    public AjaxResult getInfo(@PathVariable("id") Long id)
    {
        return success(schoolRoomAudioInfoService.selectSchoolRoomAudioInfoById(id));
    }
    /**
     * 新增教室音频设置
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:audio:add")
    @Log(title = "教室音频设置", businessType = BusinessType.INSERT)
    @PostMapping
    public AjaxResult add(@RequestBody SchoolRoomAudioInfoBo schoolRoomAudioInfoBo)
    {
        return toAjax(schoolRoomAudioInfoService.insertSchoolRoomAudioInfo(schoolRoomAudioInfoBo));
    }
    /**
     * 修改教室音频设置
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:audio:edit")
    @Log(title = "教室音频设置", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PutMapping
    public AjaxResult edit(@RequestBody SchoolRoomAudioInfoBo schoolRoomAudioInfoBo)
    {
        return toAjax(schoolRoomAudioInfoService.updateSchoolRoomAudioInfo(schoolRoomAudioInfoBo));
    }
    /**
     * 删除教室音频设置
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:audio:remove")
    @Log(title = "教室音频设置", businessType = BusinessType.DELETE)
	@DeleteMapping("/{ids}")
    public AjaxResult remove(@PathVariable Long[] ids)
    {
        return toAjax(schoolRoomAudioInfoService.deleteSchoolRoomAudioInfoByIds(ids));
    }
    /**
     * 播放教室音频
     */
    @PostMapping("/playAudio")
    public AjaxResult play(@RequestBody SchoolRoomAudioInfoBo schoolRoomAudioInfoBo)
    {
        //deviceType 播放设备  1班牌  2扬声器
        if("1".equals(deviceType)){
            schoolRoomAudioInfoService.playSchoolRoomAudioInfo(schoolRoomAudioInfoBo);
        }else if("2".equals(deviceType)){
            //playStatus 1播放  2停止
            if(schoolRoomAudioInfoBo.getPlayStatus() == 1){
                CompletableFuture.runAsync(() -> {
                    schoolRoomAudioInfoService.playAudioInfoOnSpeaker(schoolRoomAudioInfoBo);
                });
            }else{
                if(schoolRoomAudioInfoBo.getType()!=null){
                    CompletableFuture.runAsync(() -> {
                        schoolRoomAudioInfoService.stopPlayInfoOnSpeaker(schoolRoomAudioInfoBo.getType());
                    });
                }else{
                    CompletableFuture.runAsync(() -> {
                        //停止播放音频文件
                        schoolRoomAudioInfoService.stopPlayInfoOnSpeaker("1");
                    });
                    CompletableFuture.runAsync(() -> {
                        //停止播放 文本格式
                        schoolRoomAudioInfoService.stopPlayInfoOnSpeaker("2");
                    });
                }
            }
        }
        return success();
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.controller;
import com.chenrise.common.core.domain.R;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.poi.ExcelUtil;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.controller.BaseController;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo;
import com.chenrise.common.log.annotation.Log;
import com.chenrise.common.log.enums.BusinessType;
import com.chenrise.common.security.annotation.RequiresPermissions;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.*;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.vo.RoomInVO;
import com.chenrise.jufe.mapper.DevMonitorInfoMapper;
import com.chenrise.jufe.mapper.SchoolRoomChargeRefMapper;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.*;
import com.chenrise.system.api.RemotePowerService;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.*;
import org.springframework.web.multipart.MultipartFile;
import javax.annotation.Resource;
import javax.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse;
import java.util.Arrays;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.stream.Collectors;
/**
 * 房间Controller
 *
 * @author liyiying
 * @date 2022-11-24
 */
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/room")
public class SchoolRoomController extends BaseController
{
    @Resource
    private ISchoolRoomService schoolRoomService;
    @Resource
    private ISchoolLocationService schoolLocationService;
    @Resource
    private SchoolRoomChargeRefMapper schoolRoomChargeRefMapper;
    @Resource private RemotePowerService remotePowerService;
    @Resource private DevMonitorInfoMapper monitorInfoMapper;
    @Resource private IDevClassBoardService classBoardService;
    @Resource private ISchoolTimeSchedulingService schedulingService;
    @Resource
    private DeviceCommandService deviceCommandService;
    /**
     * 查询房间列表
     * @Description: 查询房间列表
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 16:43:31
     * @param schoolRoom 学校房间
     * @return {@link TableDataInfo }
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:room:list")
    @GetMapping("/list")
    public TableDataInfo list(SchoolRoom schoolRoom)
    {
        startPage();
        List<SchoolRoom> list = schoolRoomService.selectSchoolRoomList(schoolRoom);
        for (SchoolRoom room:list
             ) {
            Map<String,String> map = schoolRoomChargeRefMapper.selectPrincipalByRoomId(room.getRoomId());
            if (map != null){
                room.setPrincipal(Arrays.stream(map.get("ids").split(",")).map(s -> Long.parseLong(s.trim())).collect(Collectors.toList()).toArray(new Long[]{}));
                room.setPrincipalNames(map.get("names"));
            }
            DevClassBoard query = new DevClassBoard();
            query.setRoomId(room.getRoomId());
            List<DevClassBoard> classBoards = classBoardService.selectDevClassBoardList(query);
            if(classBoards!=null&&classBoards.size()>0){
                Long [] boardIds = classBoards.stream().map(DevClassBoard::getBoardId).toArray(Long[]::new);
                String boardName =  String.join(",",classBoards.stream().map(DevClassBoard::getBoardName).toArray(String[]::new));
                room.setBoardIds(boardIds);
                room.setBoardName(boardName);
            }
        }
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     * 导出房间列表
     * @Description: 导出房间列表
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 16:43:39
     * @param response 响应
     * @param schoolRoom 学校房间
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:room:export")
    @Log(title = "房间", businessType = BusinessType.EXPORT)
    @PostMapping("/export")
    public void export(HttpServletResponse response, SchoolRoom schoolRoom)
    {
        List<SchoolRoom> list = schoolRoomService.selectSchoolRoomList(schoolRoom);
        ExcelUtil<SchoolRoom> util = new ExcelUtil<SchoolRoom>(SchoolRoom.class);
        util.exportExcel(response, list, "房间数据");
    }
    /**
     * 获取房间详细信息
     * @Description: 获取房间详细信息
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 16:43:46
     * @param roomId 房间id
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:room:query")
    @GetMapping(value = "/{roomId}")
    public AjaxResult getInfo(@PathVariable("roomId") Long roomId)
    {
        SchoolRoom sr = schoolRoomService.selectSchoolRoomByRoomId(roomId);
        SchoolLocation location = schoolLocationService.selectSchoolLocationByLocationId(sr.getLocationId());
        if(location!=null){
            String fullName = schoolLocationService.fullName(location);
            sr.setLocationName(fullName);
        }
        return success(sr);
    }
    /**
     * 新增房间
     * @Description: 新增房间
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 16:43:53
     * @param schoolRoom 学校房间
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:room:add")
    @Log(title = "房间", businessType = BusinessType.INSERT)
    @PostMapping
    public AjaxResult add(@RequestBody SchoolRoom schoolRoom) {
//        SchoolLocation location = schoolLocationService.selectSchoolLocationByLocationId(schoolRoom.getLocationId());
//        String[] split = location.getAncestors().split(",");
//        if(split.length != 3){
//            return AjaxResult.error("");
//        }
        schoolRoom.setSourceType("2");
        return toAjax(schoolRoomService.insertSchoolRoom(schoolRoom));
    }
    /**
     * 修改房间
     * @Description: 修改房间
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 16:43:58
     * @param schoolRoom 学校房间
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:room:edit")
    @Log(title = "房间", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PutMapping
    public AjaxResult edit(@RequestBody SchoolRoom schoolRoom)
    {
        schoolRoom.setIsReservation(null);
        return toAjax(schoolRoomService.updateSchoolRoom(schoolRoom));
    }
    /**
     * 删除房间
     * @Description: 删除房间
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 16:44:04
     * @param roomIds 房间id
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:room:remove")
    @Log(title = "房间", businessType = BusinessType.DELETE)
	@DeleteMapping("/{roomIds}")
    public AjaxResult remove(@PathVariable Long[] roomIds)
    {
        return schoolRoomService.deleteSchoolRoomByRoomIds(roomIds);
    }
    /**
     * 导入模板
     * @Description: 导入模板
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 16:44:11
     * @param response 响应
     */
    @PostMapping("/importTemplate")
    public void importTemplate(HttpServletResponse response) {
        ExcelUtil<RoomInVO> util = new ExcelUtil<RoomInVO>(RoomInVO.class);
        util.importTemplateExcel(response,"教室导入模板");
    }
    /**
     * @Description:api接口对接更新教室信息
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-01-10 14:49:02
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @PostMapping("/importApiRoom")
    public AjaxResult importApiRoomInfo(){
        return schoolRoomService.importApiRoomInfo();
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 查询当前班牌当前人是否未负责人
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-01-13 11:30:23
     * @param userId:
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @PostMapping("/selectRoomChargeByUserId/{userId}&{ip}")
    public Integer selectRoomChargeByUserId(@PathVariable("userId") Long userId,@PathVariable("ip") String ip){
        return schoolRoomService.selectRoomChargeByUserId(userId,ip);
    }
    /**
     * 导入数据
     * @Description: 导入数据
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 11:10:52
     * @param file 文件
     * @param locationId 位置标识
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:room:in")
    @PostMapping("/importData")
    public AjaxResult importData(MultipartFile file, Long locationId) throws Exception {
        ExcelUtil<RoomInVO> util = new ExcelUtil<>(RoomInVO.class);
        List<RoomInVO> list = util.importExcel(file.getInputStream());
        String message = schoolRoomService.importData(list,locationId);
        return AjaxResult.success(message);
    }
    /**
     * 批量修改
     * @Description: 批量修改
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 16:44:21
     * @param schoolRoom 学校房间
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:room:edit")
    @Log(title = "房间", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PutMapping("/batchSet")
    public AjaxResult batchSet(@RequestBody SchoolRoom schoolRoom)
    {
        return toAjax(schoolRoomService.batchSet(schoolRoom));
    }
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:room:delayNum")
    @Log(title = "房间", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PostMapping("/delayNum")
    public AjaxResult delayNum(@RequestBody SchoolTimeScheduling timeScheduling)
    {
        return toAjax(schedulingService.updateSchoolTimeScheduling(timeScheduling));
    }
    /**
     * 查询不带分页不带权限的列表
     * @param schoolRoom
     * @return
     */
    @GetMapping("/listOnly")
    public TableDataInfo listOnly(SchoolRoom schoolRoom)
    {
        if(schoolRoom.getParams().get("locationIds")!=null){
            schoolRoom.getParams().put("locationIds",String.valueOf(schoolRoom.getParams().get("locationIds")).split(","));
        }
        List<SchoolRoom> list = schoolRoomService.selectRoomList(schoolRoom);
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     * 查询教室列表 对外接口
     * @Description: 查询教室列表 对外接口
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-11-30 11:12:25
     * @param locationIds 位置id
     * @param roomCode 教室名称
     * @return {@link TableDataInfo }
     */
    @GetMapping("/listToApp")
    public R<TableDataInfo> listToApp(Long [] locationIds, String roomCode)
    {
        SchoolRoom schoolRoom = new SchoolRoom();
        schoolRoom.setLocationIds(locationIds);
        schoolRoom.setRoomCode(roomCode);
        startPage();
        List<SchoolRoom> list = schoolRoomService.selectSchoolRoomListToApp(schoolRoom);
        for(SchoolRoom sr:list){
            SchoolLocation location = schoolLocationService.selectSchoolLocationByLocationId(sr.getLocationId());
            if(location!=null){
                String fullName = schoolLocationService.fullName(location);
                sr.setLocationName(fullName);
            }
        }
        return R.ok(getDataTable(list));
    }
//    @GetMapping("/listOnly")
//    public AjaxResult listOnly()
//    {
//        List<SchoolRoom> list = schoolRoomService.selectSchoolRoomListToApp(new SchoolRoom());
//        return AjaxResult.success(list);
//    }
    /**
     * 查询负责人列表
     * @Description: 查询负责人列表
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-12-07 19:34:02
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @GetMapping("/principalList")
    public AjaxResult principalList() {
        List<Map<String,String>> list = schoolRoomService.selectPrincipalList();
        return AjaxResult.success(list);
    }
    @GetMapping("/roomInfo/{roomId}")
    public AjaxResult roomInfo(@PathVariable("roomId") Long roomId) {
        //获取室内设备信息
        SchoolRoom schoolRoom = schoolRoomService.selectSchoolRoomByRoomId(roomId);
        return AjaxResult.success(schoolRoom);
    }
    @GetMapping("/getMonitors/{roomId}")
    public AjaxResult getMonitors(@PathVariable("roomId")Long roomId) {
        DevMonitorInfo query = new DevMonitorInfo();
        query.setRoomId(roomId);
        List<DevMonitorInfo> list = monitorInfoMapper.selectDevMonitorInfoList(query);
        return AjaxResult.success(list);
    }
    @GetMapping("/openLockByAPP/{id}")
    public AjaxResult openLockByAPP(@PathVariable("id") Long id) {
        deviceCommandService.openLockById(id, "1", "1", "", 5 * 60L);
        return AjaxResult.success();
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.controller;
import java.util.List;
import javax.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.SchoolRoomUseTime;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.ISchoolRoomUseTimeService;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.GetMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PostMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PutMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.DeleteMapping;

import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestBody;

/**
 * 房间可用时间段设置Controller
 *
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2022-11-30
 */
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/roomset")
public class SchoolRoomUseTimeController extends BaseController
{
    @Autowired
    private ISchoolRoomUseTimeService schoolRoomUseTimeService;
    /**
     * 查询房间可用时间段设置列表
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:roomset:list")
    @GetMapping("/list")
    public TableDataInfo list(SchoolRoomUseTime schoolRoomUseTime)
    {
        startPage();
        List<SchoolRoomUseTime> list = schoolRoomUseTimeService.selectSchoolRoomUseTimeList(schoolRoomUseTime);
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     * 导出房间可用时间段设置列表
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:roomset:export")
    @Log(title = "房间可用时间段设置", businessType = BusinessType.EXPORT)
    @PostMapping("/export")
    public void export(HttpServletResponse response, SchoolRoomUseTime schoolRoomUseTime)
    {
        List<SchoolRoomUseTime> list = schoolRoomUseTimeService.selectSchoolRoomUseTimeList(schoolRoomUseTime);
        ExcelUtil<SchoolRoomUseTime> util = new ExcelUtil<SchoolRoomUseTime>(SchoolRoomUseTime.class);
        util.exportExcel(response, list, "房间可用时间段设置数据");
    }
    /**
     * 获取房间可用时间段设置详细信息
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:roomset:query")
    @GetMapping(value = "/{userTimeId}")
    public AjaxResult getInfo(@PathVariable("userTimeId") Long userTimeId)
    {
        return success(schoolRoomUseTimeService.selectSchoolRoomUseTimeByUserTimeId(userTimeId));
    }
    /**
     * 新增房间可用时间段设置
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:roomset:add")
    @Log(title = "房间可用时间段设置", businessType = BusinessType.INSERT)
    @PostMapping
    public AjaxResult add(@RequestBody SchoolRoomUseTime schoolRoomUseTime)
    {
        return toAjax(schoolRoomUseTimeService.insertSchoolRoomUseTime(schoolRoomUseTime));
    }
    /**
     * 修改房间可用时间段设置
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:roomset:edit")
    @Log(title = "房间可用时间段设置", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PutMapping
    public AjaxResult edit(@RequestBody SchoolRoomUseTime schoolRoomUseTime)
    {
        return toAjax(schoolRoomUseTimeService.updateSchoolRoomUseTime(schoolRoomUseTime));
    }
    /**
     * 删除房间可用时间段设置
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:roomset:remove")
    @Log(title = "房间可用时间段设置", businessType = BusinessType.DELETE)
	@DeleteMapping("/{userTimeIds}")
    public AjaxResult remove(@PathVariable Long[] userTimeIds)
    {
        return toAjax(schoolRoomUseTimeService.deleteSchoolRoomUseTimeByUserTimeIds(userTimeIds));
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.controller;
import java.io.IOException;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
import javax.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse;
import cn.hutool.core.bean.BeanUtil;
import com.chenrise.common.core.constant.HttpStatus;
import com.chenrise.common.core.constant.UserConstants;
import com.chenrise.common.core.domain.R;
import com.chenrise.common.security.utils.SecurityUtils;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.SchoolStuInfoCopy;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.SchoolTeaInfo;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.ISchoolTeaInfoService;
import com.chenrise.system.api.RemoteDeptService;
import com.chenrise.system.api.domain.SysDept;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.*;
import com.chenrise.common.log.annotation.Log;
import com.chenrise.common.log.enums.BusinessType;
import com.chenrise.common.security.annotation.RequiresPermissions;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.SchoolStuInfo;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.ISchoolStuInfoService;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.controller.BaseController;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.poi.ExcelUtil;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo;
import org.springframework.web.multipart.MultipartFile;
/**
 * 学生信息Controller
 *
 * @author chenfang
 * @date 2022-11-29
 */
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/stu")
public class SchoolStuInfoController extends BaseController {
    @Autowired
    private ISchoolStuInfoService schoolStuInfoService;
    @Autowired
    private RemoteDeptService remoteDeptService;
    @Autowired
    private ISchoolTeaInfoService schoolTeaInfoService;
    /**
     * @Description: 查询学生信息列表
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-12-1 17:13:00
     * @param schoolStuInfo: 学生实体类
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:stuinfo:list")
    @GetMapping("/list")
    public TableDataInfo list(SchoolStuInfo schoolStuInfo) {
        startPage();
        List<SchoolStuInfo> list = schoolStuInfoService.selectSchoolStuInfoList(schoolStuInfo);
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 导出学生信息列表
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-12-1 17:13:00
     * @param schoolStuInfo: 学生实体类
     * @param response:
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:stuinfo:export")
    @Log(title = "学生信息", businessType = BusinessType.EXPORT)
    @PostMapping("/export")
    public void export(HttpServletResponse response, SchoolStuInfo schoolStuInfo) {
        List<SchoolStuInfo> list = schoolStuInfoService.selectSchoolStuInfoList(schoolStuInfo);
        ExcelUtil<SchoolStuInfoCopy> util1 = new ExcelUtil<SchoolStuInfoCopy>(SchoolStuInfoCopy.class);
        ArrayList<SchoolStuInfoCopy> schoolStuInfoCopyList = new ArrayList<>();
        for (int i = 0; i < list.size(); i++) {
            SchoolStuInfoCopy schoolStuInfoCopy = new SchoolStuInfoCopy();
            BeanUtil.copyProperties(list.get(i),schoolStuInfoCopy);
            schoolStuInfoCopyList.add(schoolStuInfoCopy);
        }
        util1.exportExcel(response, schoolStuInfoCopyList, "学生信息数据");
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 获取学生信息详细信息
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-12-1 17:13:00
     * @param stuId: 学生主键
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:stuinfo:query")
    @GetMapping(value = "/{stuId}")
    public AjaxResult getInfo(@PathVariable("stuId") Long stuId) {
        return success(schoolStuInfoService.selectSchoolStuInfoByStuId(stuId));
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 获取学生信息详细信息
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-12-1 17:13:00
     * @param stuId: 学生主键
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo
     */
    @GetMapping( "/getStuInfe/{stuNum}")
    public SchoolStuInfo getStuInfo(@PathVariable("stuNum") String stuNum) {
        return schoolStuInfoService.selectSchoolStuInfoBystuNum(stuNum);
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 新增学生信息
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-12-1 17:13:00
     * @param schoolStuInfo: 学生实体类
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:stuinfo:add")
    @Log(title = "学生信息", businessType = BusinessType.INSERT)
    @PostMapping
    public AjaxResult add(@RequestBody SchoolStuInfo schoolStuInfo) {
        SchoolTeaInfo schoolTeaInfo = new SchoolTeaInfo();
        schoolTeaInfo.setTeaUserNum(schoolStuInfo.getStuNum());
        if (UserConstants.NOT_UNIQUE.equals(schoolTeaInfoService.checkUserNum(schoolTeaInfo))) {
            return error("新增学生失败，学号'" + schoolTeaInfo.getTeaUserNum() + "'与教师工号重复");
        }
        if (UserConstants.NOT_UNIQUE.equals(schoolStuInfoService.checkStuNum(schoolStuInfo))) {
            return error("新增学生失败，学号'" + schoolStuInfo.getStuNum() + "'已存在");
        }
        if (UserConstants.NOT_UNIQUE.equals(schoolStuInfoService.checkPhoneNum(schoolStuInfo))) {
            return error("新增学生失败，电话号'" + schoolStuInfo.getPhoneNum() + "'已存在");
        }
        if (UserConstants.NOT_UNIQUE.equals(schoolStuInfoService.checkIdCard(schoolStuInfo))) {
            return error("新增学生失败，身份证号'" + schoolStuInfo.getIdCard() + "'已存在");
        }
        schoolStuInfo.setCreateBy(SecurityUtils.getUsername());
        R<SysDept> sysDeptR = remoteDeptService.selectDeptById(schoolStuInfo.getStuDeptId());
        schoolStuInfo.setStuDeptName(sysDeptR.getData().getDeptName());
        return toAjax(schoolStuInfoService.insertSchoolStuInfo(schoolStuInfo));
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 修改学生信息
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-12-1 17:13:00
     * @param schoolStuInfo: 学生实体类
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:stuinfo:edit")
    @Log(title = "学生信息", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PutMapping
    public AjaxResult edit(@RequestBody SchoolStuInfo schoolStuInfo) {
        if (UserConstants.NOT_UNIQUE.equals(schoolStuInfoService.checkPhoneNum(schoolStuInfo))) {
            return error("修改学生失败，电话号'" + schoolStuInfo.getPhoneNum() + "'已存在");
        }
        if (UserConstants.NOT_UNIQUE.equals(schoolStuInfoService.checkIdCard(schoolStuInfo))) {
            return error("修改学生失败，身份证号'" + schoolStuInfo.getIdCard() + "'已存在");
        }
        return toAjax(schoolStuInfoService.updateSchoolStuInfo(schoolStuInfo));
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 修改学生信息   远程调用
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-12-1 17:13:00
     * @param schoolStuInfo: 学生实体类
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo
     */
    @Log(title = "学生信息", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PutMapping("/editStudent")
    public AjaxResult editByStuNum(@RequestBody SchoolStuInfo schoolStuInfo) {
        if (UserConstants.NOT_UNIQUE.equals(schoolStuInfoService.checkPhoneNum(schoolStuInfo))) {
            return error("修改学生失败，电话号'" + schoolStuInfo.getPhoneNum() + "'已存在");
        }
        if (UserConstants.NOT_UNIQUE.equals(schoolStuInfoService.checkIdCard(schoolStuInfo))) {
            return error("修改学生失败，身份证号'" + schoolStuInfo.getIdCard() + "'已存在");
        }
        return toAjax(schoolStuInfoService.updateSchoolStuInfoByStuNum(schoolStuInfo));
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 删除学生信息
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-12-1 17:13:00
     * @param stuIds: 学生主键集合
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:stuinfo:remove")
    @Log(title = "学生信息", businessType = BusinessType.DELETE)
	@DeleteMapping("/{stuIds}")
    public AjaxResult remove(@PathVariable Long[] stuIds)
    {
        return toAjax(schoolStuInfoService.deleteSchoolStuInfoByStuIds(stuIds));
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 删除学生信息(远程调用)
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-12-1 17:13:00
     * @param stuNum: 学工号
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo
     */
    @Log(title = "学生信息", businessType = BusinessType.DELETE)
    @DeleteMapping("/removeStudent/{stuNum}")
    public AjaxResult deleteSchoolStuInfoByStuNum(@PathVariable("stuNum") String stuNum)
    {
        return toAjax(schoolStuInfoService.deleteSchoolStuInfoByStuNum(stuNum));
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 导入
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-11-25 13:30:07
     * @param file:
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @Log(title = "学生", businessType = BusinessType.IMPORT)
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:stuinfo:import")
    @PostMapping("/importSchoolStuInfo")
    public AjaxResult importSchoolStuInfo(MultipartFile file) throws Exception {
        ExcelUtil<SchoolStuInfo> util = new ExcelUtil<>(SchoolStuInfo.class);
        List<SchoolStuInfo> list = util.importExcel(file.getInputStream());
        String message = schoolStuInfoService.importSchoolStuInfo(list);
        return AjaxResult.success(message);
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 下载模板
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-11-25 15:54:13
     * @param response:
     * @return: void
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:stuinfo:importStuTemplate")
    @PostMapping("/importStuTemplate")
    public void importStuTemplate(HttpServletResponse response) throws IOException {
        ExcelUtil<SchoolStuInfo> util = new ExcelUtil<SchoolStuInfo>(SchoolStuInfo.class);
        util.importTemplateExcel(response,"学生数据");
    }
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:stuinfo:getStu")
    @GetMapping(value = "/getStu")
    public AjaxResult getStu(String userName,String password) {
        SchoolStuInfo stu_query = new SchoolStuInfo();
        stu_query.setStuNum(userName);
        List<SchoolStuInfo> schoolStuInfos = schoolStuInfoService.selectSchoolStuInfoList(stu_query);
        if(schoolStuInfos!=null&&schoolStuInfos.size()>0){
            if(!SecurityUtils.matchesPassword(password, schoolStuInfos.get(0).getPassword())){
                return AjaxResult.error(HttpStatus.WARN,"密码不正确！");
            }
            return success(schoolStuInfos.get(0));
        }else{
            return AjaxResult.error(HttpStatus.WARN,"用户不存在！");
        }
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 校api得到学生数据
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2023/01/12 12:38:37
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @GetMapping("/jufeApiGetSysXs")
    public AjaxResult jufeApiGetSysXs() throws IOException {
        int i = schoolStuInfoService.jufeApiGetSysXs();
        return AjaxResult.success(i);
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.controller;
import com.chenrise.common.core.domain.R;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.poi.ExcelUtil;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.controller.BaseController;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo;
import com.chenrise.common.log.annotation.Log;
import com.chenrise.common.log.enums.BusinessType;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.Bo.SchoolTaskInfoBo;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.SchoolTaskInfo;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.ISchoolTaskInfoService;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.*;
import javax.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse;
import java.util.Date;
import java.util.List;
/**
 * @Description:任务控制类
 * @Author: sunming
 * @Date: 2022-11-29 16:02:25
 */
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/schtask")
public class SchoolTaskInfoController extends BaseController
{
    @Autowired
    private ISchoolTaskInfoService schoolTaskInfoService;
    /**
     * @Description:查询任务信息列表
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 16:02:55
     * @param schoolTaskInfoBo: 查询实体
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo
     */
    @GetMapping("/list")
    public TableDataInfo list(SchoolTaskInfoBo schoolTaskInfoBo)
    {
        startPage();
        List<SchoolTaskInfoBo> list = schoolTaskInfoService.selectSchoolTaskInfoBoList(schoolTaskInfoBo);
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     * @Description:导出任务
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 16:03:18
     * @param response:
     * @param schoolTaskInfo:
     * @return: void
     */
    @Log(title = "任务信息", businessType = BusinessType.EXPORT)
    @PostMapping("/export")
    public void export(HttpServletResponse response, SchoolTaskInfoBo schoolTaskInfo)
    {
        List<SchoolTaskInfo> list = schoolTaskInfoService.selectSchoolTaskInfoList(schoolTaskInfo);
        ExcelUtil<SchoolTaskInfo> util = new ExcelUtil<SchoolTaskInfo>(SchoolTaskInfo.class);
        util.exportExcel(response, list, "任务信息主数据");
    }
    /**
     * @Description:获取任务详细信息
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 16:03:33
     * @param taskId: 任务id
     * @return: 任务实体
     */
    @GetMapping(value = "/{taskId}")
    public AjaxResult getInfo(@PathVariable("taskId") Long taskId)
    {
        return success(schoolTaskInfoService.selectSchoolTaskInfoByTaskId(taskId));
    }
    /**
     * @Description:新增任务信息
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 16:03:55
     * @param schoolTaskInfoBo: 包含周期信息，设备开关时间，关联房间信息
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @Log(title = "任务信息", businessType = BusinessType.INSERT)
    @PostMapping
    public AjaxResult add(@RequestBody SchoolTaskInfoBo schoolTaskInfoBo)
    {
        return toAjax(schoolTaskInfoService.insertSchoolTaskInfo(schoolTaskInfoBo));
    }
    /**
     * @Description:修改任务信息
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 16:04:32
     * @param schoolTaskInfoBo:包含周期信息，设备开关时间，关联房间信息
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @Log(title = "任务信息", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PutMapping
    public AjaxResult edit(@RequestBody SchoolTaskInfoBo schoolTaskInfoBo)
    {
        return toAjax(schoolTaskInfoService.updateSchoolTaskInfo(schoolTaskInfoBo));
    }
    /**
     * @Description:批量或者单个删除任务信息
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 16:04:43
     * @param taskIds: 任务id集合
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @Log(title = "任务信息", businessType = BusinessType.DELETE)
	@DeleteMapping("/{taskIds}")
    public AjaxResult remove(@PathVariable Long[] taskIds)
    {
        return toAjax(schoolTaskInfoService.deleteSchoolTaskInfoByTaskIds(taskIds));
    }
    /**
     * @Description:强制结束任务
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-12-01 13:43:30
     * @param taskIds: 任务id
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @Log(title = "任务信息", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @GetMapping("/cancel/{taskIds}")
    public AjaxResult cancel(@PathVariable Long[] taskIds)
    {
        return toAjax(schoolTaskInfoService.cancelSchoolTaskInfoByTaskIds(taskIds));
    }
    /**
     * 执行学校任务
     * @Description: 执行学校任务
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-12-08 09:29:29
     * @param sTime 开始时间
     * @param eTime 结束时间
     * @return {@link R }<{@link AjaxResult }>
     */
    @Log(title = "定时任务-执行学校定时任务", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @GetMapping("/carrySchoolTask")
    public R<AjaxResult> carrySchoolTask(Date sTime,Date eTime)
    {
        return R.ok(toAjax(schoolTaskInfoService.carrySchoolTask(sTime,eTime)));
    }
    @Log(title = "定时任务-执行学校课程定时任务", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @GetMapping("/carrySchoolCourse")
    public R<AjaxResult> carrySchoolCourse(Date sTime,Date eTime) throws InterruptedException {
        schoolTaskInfoService.carrySchoolCourse(sTime,eTime);
        return R.ok();
    }
    @Log(title = "定时任务-执行学校预约定时任务", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @GetMapping("/carrySchoolToMakeAnAppointment")
    public R<AjaxResult> carrySchoolToMakeAnAppointment(Date sTime,Date eTime)
    {
        return R.ok(toAjax(schoolTaskInfoService.carrySchoolToMakeAnAppointment(sTime,eTime)));
    }
    @GetMapping("/dealGoToClassOpenDoor")
    public R<AjaxResult> dealGoToClassOpenDoor(Date sTime, Date eTime) throws InterruptedException {
        schoolTaskInfoService.dealGoToClassOpenDoor(sTime, eTime);
        return R.ok();
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.controller;
import java.io.IOException;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.nio.file.Paths;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
import javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest;
import javax.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse;
import cn.hutool.core.bean.BeanUtil;
import com.chenrise.common.core.constant.UserConstants;
import com.chenrise.common.core.domain.R;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.SchoolStuInfo;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.SchoolStuInfoCopy;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.SchoolTeaInfoCopy;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.ISchoolStuInfoService;
import com.chenrise.system.api.RemoteFileService;
import com.chenrise.system.api.domain.SysFile;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Value;
import org.springframework.core.io.FileSystemResource;

import com.chenrise.common.security.annotation.RequiresPermissions;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.SchoolTeaInfo;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.ISchoolTeaInfoService;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.controller.BaseController;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.poi.ExcelUtil;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo;
import org.springframework.web.multipart.MultipartFile;
/**
 * 教师信息Controller
 * 
 * @author chenfang
 * @date 2022-11-24
 */
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/teaInfo")
public class SchoolTeaInfoController extends BaseController {
    @Autowired
    private ISchoolTeaInfoService schoolTeaInfoService;
    @Autowired
    private RemoteFileService remoteFileService;
    @Autowired
    private ISchoolStuInfoService schoolStuInfoService;
    /**
     * @Description: 查询教师信息列表
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 16:51:49
     * @param schoolTeaInfo 教师信息
     * @return {@link TableDataInfo }
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:teaInfo:list")
    @GetMapping("/list")
    public TableDataInfo list(SchoolTeaInfo schoolTeaInfo) {
        startPage();
        List<SchoolTeaInfo> list = schoolTeaInfoService.selectSchoolTeaInfoList(schoolTeaInfo);
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 导出教师信息列表
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 16:51:49
     * @param schoolTeaInfo: 教师实体类
     * @param response:
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:teaInfo:export")
    @Log(title = "教师信息", businessType = BusinessType.EXPORT)
    @PostMapping("/export")
    public void export(HttpServletResponse response, SchoolTeaInfo schoolTeaInfo) {
        List<SchoolTeaInfo> list = schoolTeaInfoService.selectSchoolTeaInfoList(schoolTeaInfo);
        ExcelUtil<SchoolTeaInfoCopy> util1 = new ExcelUtil<SchoolTeaInfoCopy>(SchoolTeaInfoCopy.class);
        ArrayList<SchoolTeaInfoCopy> schoolTeaInfoCopyList = new ArrayList<>();
        for (int i = 0; i < list.size(); i++) {
            SchoolTeaInfoCopy schoolTeaInfoCopy = new SchoolTeaInfoCopy();
            BeanUtil.copyProperties(list.get(i),schoolTeaInfoCopy);
            schoolTeaInfoCopyList.add(schoolTeaInfoCopy);
        }
        util1.exportExcel(response, schoolTeaInfoCopyList, "教师信息数据");
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 获取教师信息详细信息
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 16:51:49
     * @param teaUserId: 教师主键
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:teaInfo:query")
    @GetMapping(value = "/{teaUserId}")
    public AjaxResult getInfo(@PathVariable("teaUserId") Long teaUserId) {
        return success(schoolTeaInfoService.selectSchoolTeaInfoByTeaUserId(teaUserId));
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 获取学生信息详细信息
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-12-1 17:13:00
     * @param stuId: 学生主键
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo
     */
    @GetMapping( "/getTeaInfo/{teaUserNum}")
    public SchoolTeaInfo getTeaInfo(@PathVariable("teaUserNum") String teaUserNum) {
        return schoolTeaInfoService.selectSchoolTeaInfoByTeaUserNum(teaUserNum);
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 新增教师信息
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 16:51:49
     * @param schoolTeaInfo: 教师实体类
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:teaInfo:add")
    @Log(title = "教师信息", businessType = BusinessType.INSERT)
    @PostMapping
    public AjaxResult add(@RequestBody SchoolTeaInfo schoolTeaInfo) {
        SchoolStuInfo schoolStuInfo = new SchoolStuInfo();
        schoolStuInfo.setStuNum(schoolTeaInfo.getTeaUserNum());
        if (UserConstants.NOT_UNIQUE.equals(schoolStuInfoService.checkStuNum(schoolStuInfo))) {
            return error("新增教师失败，与学生'" + schoolStuInfo.getStuNum() + "'学号重复");
        }
        if (UserConstants.NOT_UNIQUE.equals(schoolTeaInfoService.checkUserNum(schoolTeaInfo))) {
            return error("新增教师失败，工号'" + schoolTeaInfo.getTeaUserNum() + "'已存在");
        }
        if (UserConstants.NOT_UNIQUE.equals(schoolTeaInfoService.checkPhoneNum(schoolTeaInfo))) {
            return error("新增教师失败，电话号'" + schoolTeaInfo.getPhoneNum() + "'已存在");
        }
        if (UserConstants.NOT_UNIQUE.equals(schoolTeaInfoService.checkIdCard(schoolTeaInfo))) {
            return error("新增教师失败，身份证号'" + schoolTeaInfo.getIdCard() + "'已存在");
        }
        return toAjax(schoolTeaInfoService.insertSchoolTeaInfo(schoolTeaInfo));
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 修改教师信息
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 16:51:49
     * @param schoolTeaInfo: 教师实体类
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:teaInfo:edit")
    @Log(title = "教师信息", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PutMapping
    public AjaxResult edit(@RequestBody SchoolTeaInfo schoolTeaInfo) {
        if (UserConstants.NOT_UNIQUE.equals(schoolTeaInfoService.checkPhoneNum(schoolTeaInfo))) {
            return error("修改教师失败，电话号'" + schoolTeaInfo.getPhoneNum() + "'已存在");
        }
        if (UserConstants.NOT_UNIQUE.equals(schoolTeaInfoService.checkIdCard(schoolTeaInfo))) {
            return error("修改教师失败，身份证号'" + schoolTeaInfo.getIdCard() + "'已存在");
        }
        return toAjax(schoolTeaInfoService.updateSchoolTeaInfo(schoolTeaInfo));
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 修改教师信息
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 16:51:49
     * @param schoolTeaInfo: 教师实体类
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo
     */
    @Log(title = "教师信息", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PutMapping("/editTeacher")
    public AjaxResult editTeacher(@RequestBody SchoolTeaInfo schoolTeaInfo) {
        if (UserConstants.NOT_UNIQUE.equals(schoolTeaInfoService.checkPhoneNum(schoolTeaInfo))) {
            return error("修改教师失败，电话号'" + schoolTeaInfo.getPhoneNum() + "'已存在");
        }
        if (UserConstants.NOT_UNIQUE.equals(schoolTeaInfoService.checkIdCard(schoolTeaInfo))) {
            return error("修改教师失败，身份证号'" + schoolTeaInfo.getIdCard() + "'已存在");
        }
        return toAjax(schoolTeaInfoService.updateSchoolTeaInfoByTeaUserNum(schoolTeaInfo));
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 删除教师信息
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 16:51:49
     * @param teaUserIds: 教师实体类
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:teaInfo:remove")
    @Log(title = "教师信息", businessType = BusinessType.DELETE)
    @DeleteMapping("/{teaUserIds}")
    public AjaxResult remove(@PathVariable Long[] teaUserIds) {
        return toAjax(schoolTeaInfoService.deleteSchoolTeaInfoByTeaUserIds(teaUserIds));
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 删除教师信息(远程调用)
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 16:51:49
     * @param teaUserNum: 教师实体类
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo
     */
    @Log(title = "教师信息", businessType = BusinessType.DELETE)
    @DeleteMapping("/removeTeacher/{teaUserNum}")
    public AjaxResult deleteSchoolTeaInfoByTeaUserNum(@PathVariable("teaUserNum") String teaUserNum) {
        return toAjax(schoolTeaInfoService.deleteSchoolTeaInfoByTeaUserNum(teaUserNum));
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 导入
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-11-25 13:30:07
     * @param file:
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @Log(title = "教师", businessType = BusinessType.IMPORT)
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:teaInfo:import")
    @PostMapping("/importSchoolTeaInfo")
    public AjaxResult importSchoolTeaInfo(MultipartFile file) throws Exception {
        ExcelUtil<SchoolTeaInfo> util = new ExcelUtil<>(SchoolTeaInfo.class);
        List<SchoolTeaInfo> list = util.importExcel(file.getInputStream());
        String message = schoolTeaInfoService.importSchoolTeaInfo(list);
        return AjaxResult.success(message);
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 下载模板
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-11-25 15:54:13
     * @param response:
     * @return: void
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:teaInfo:importTeaTemplate")
    @PostMapping("/importTeaTemplate")
    public void importTeaTemplate(HttpServletResponse response) throws IOException {
        ExcelUtil<SchoolTeaInfo> util = new ExcelUtil<>(SchoolTeaInfo.class);
        util.importTemplateExcel(response,"教师数据");
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 上传文件
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-11-25 15:54:13
     * @param file 文件信息
     * @return 结果
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:teaInfo:upload")
    @PostMapping("/upload")
    public AjaxResult upload(@RequestPart(value = "file") MultipartFile file){
        R<SysFile> upload = remoteFileService.upload(file);
        return AjaxResult.success(upload.getData());
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 校api得到教职工数据
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2023/01/12 12:38:37
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @GetMapping("/jufeApiGetSysJzg")
    public AjaxResult jufeApiGetSysJzg() throws IOException {
        int i = schoolTeaInfoService.jufeApiGetSysJzg();
        return AjaxResult.success(i);
    }
    /**
     * 教师人脸图片上传
     */
    @PostMapping("/uploadPic")
    public AjaxResult uploadImage(@RequestParam("file") MultipartFile file) {
        String fileName = file.getOriginalFilename();
        if (file == null || file.isEmpty()) {
            return AjaxResult.error("上传文件不能为空");
        }
        if (fileName == null || fileName.trim().isEmpty()) {
            return AjaxResult.error("文件名不能为空");
        }
        try {
            System.err.println("上传文件名：" + fileName);
            String imageUrl = schoolTeaInfoService.uploadAndCompressImage(file, fileName);
            return AjaxResult.success(imageUrl);
        } catch (Exception e) {
            return AjaxResult.error("文件上传失败：" + e.getMessage());
        }
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.controller;
import java.io.IOException;
import java.text.DecimalFormat;
import java.text.Format;
import java.util.List;
import javax.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse;
import com.chenrise.common.core.constant.UserConstants;
import com.chenrise.common.core.domain.R;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.StringUtils;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.poi.ExcelUtil;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.controller.BaseController;
import com.chenrise.common.security.utils.DictUtils;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.vo.SchoolTempUserInfoVo;
import com.chenrise.system.api.RemoteDeptService;
import com.chenrise.system.api.RemoteFileService;
import com.chenrise.system.api.domain.SysDept;
import com.chenrise.system.api.domain.SysFile;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;

/**
 * 其他人员Controller
 *
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2022-11-24
 */
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/tempUser")
public class SchoolTempUserInfoController extends BaseController {
    @Autowired
    private ISchoolTempUserInfoService schoolTempUserInfoService;
    @Autowired
    private RemoteDeptService remoteDeptService;
    @Autowired
    private RemoteFileService remoteFileService;
    /**
     * @Description: 查询其他人员列表
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-12-1 17:13:00
     * @param schoolTempUserInfo: 其他人员实体类
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:tempUser:list")
    @GetMapping("/list")
    public TableDataInfo list(SchoolTempUserInfo schoolTempUserInfo) {
        startPage();
        List<SchoolTempUserInfo> list = schoolTempUserInfoService.selectSchoolTempUserInfoList(schoolTempUserInfo);
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     * @Description:设置临时人员有效时间
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-04-10 13:53:23
     * @param schoolTempUserInfo:
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:tempUser:setStatusDates")
    @Log(title = "设置临时人员有效时间", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PostMapping("/setStatusDates")
    public AjaxResult setStatusDates(@RequestBody SchoolTempUserInfo schoolTempUserInfo)
    {
        schoolTempUserInfoService.setStatusDates(schoolTempUserInfo);
        return success();
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 导出其他人员列表
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-12-1 17:13:00
     * @param schoolTempUserInfo: 其他人员实体类
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:tempUser:export")
    @Log(title = "其他人员", businessType = BusinessType.EXPORT)
    @PostMapping("/export")
    public void export(HttpServletResponse response, SchoolTempUserInfoVo schoolTempUserInfo) {
        List<SchoolTempUserInfoVo> list = schoolTempUserInfoService.selectSchoolTempUserInfoList1(schoolTempUserInfo);
        DictUtils.getDictName(list);
        for(SchoolTempUserInfoVo st:list){
            if(StringUtils.isNotEmpty(st.getJob())){
                st.setJob(String.valueOf(DictUtils.getDictLabel("temp_user_type",st.getJob())));
            }
        }
        ExcelUtil<SchoolTempUserInfoVo> util = new ExcelUtil<SchoolTempUserInfoVo>(SchoolTempUserInfoVo.class);
        util.exportExcel(response, list, "其他人员数据");
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 获取其他人员详细信息
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-12-1 17:13:00
     * @param tempUserId: 其他人员主键
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:tempUser:query")
    @GetMapping(value = "/{tempUserId}")
    public AjaxResult getInfo(@PathVariable("tempUserId") Long tempUserId) {
        return success(schoolTempUserInfoService.selectSchoolTempUserInfoByTempUserId(tempUserId));
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 获取其他人员信息详细信息    远程调用
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-12-1 17:13:00
     * @param phoneNum: 电话号
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo
     */
    @GetMapping( "/getTempUserInfo/{phoneNum}")
    public SchoolTempUserInfo getTempUserInfo(@PathVariable("phoneNum") String phoneNum) {
        return schoolTempUserInfoService.selectSchoolTempUserInfoByPhoneNum(phoneNum);
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 新增其他人员
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-12-1 17:13:00
     * @param schoolTempUserInfo: 其他人员实体类
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:tempUser:add")
    @Log(title = "其他人员", businessType = BusinessType.INSERT)
    @PostMapping
    public AjaxResult add(@RequestBody SchoolTempUserInfo schoolTempUserInfo) {
        if (UserConstants.NOT_UNIQUE.equals(schoolTempUserInfoService.checkExistByPhoneNum(schoolTempUserInfo))) {
            return error("新增其他人员失败，电话号'" + schoolTempUserInfo.getPhoneNum() + "'已存在");
        }
        if (UserConstants.NOT_UNIQUE.equals(schoolTempUserInfoService.checkExistByIdCard(schoolTempUserInfo))) {
            return error("新增其他人员失败，身份证号'" + schoolTempUserInfo.getIdCard() + "'已存在");
        }
        R<SysDept> sysDeptR = remoteDeptService.selectDeptById(schoolTempUserInfo.getUnitId());
        SchoolTempUserInfo schoolTempUserInfo1 = new SchoolTempUserInfo();
        List<SchoolTempUserInfo> schoolTempUserInfos = schoolTempUserInfoService.selectTempUserCodeCount(schoolTempUserInfo1);
        Format f1=new DecimalFormat("000000");
        if(0 == schoolTempUserInfos.size()){
            schoolTempUserInfo.setTempUserCode("qtry"+f1.format(1));
        }else {
            schoolTempUserInfo.setTempUserCode("qtry"+f1.format(schoolTempUserInfos.size()+1));
        }
        schoolTempUserInfo.setUnitName(sysDeptR.getData().getDeptName());
        return toAjax(schoolTempUserInfoService.insertSchoolTempUserInfo(schoolTempUserInfo));
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 修改其他人员
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-12-1 17:13:00
     * @param schoolTempUserInfo: 其他人员实体类
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:tempUser:edit")
    @Log(title = "其他人员", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PutMapping
    public AjaxResult edit(@RequestBody SchoolTempUserInfo schoolTempUserInfo) {
        if (UserConstants.NOT_UNIQUE.equals(schoolTempUserInfoService.checkExistByPhoneNum(schoolTempUserInfo))) {
            return error("修改其他人员失败，电话号'" + schoolTempUserInfo.getPhoneNum() + "'已存在");
        }
        if (UserConstants.NOT_UNIQUE.equals(schoolTempUserInfoService.checkExistByIdCard(schoolTempUserInfo))) {
            return error("修改其他人员失败，身份证号'" + schoolTempUserInfo.getIdCard() + "'已存在");
        }
        return toAjax(schoolTempUserInfoService.updateSchoolTempUserInfo(schoolTempUserInfo));
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 修改其他人员    远程调用
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-12-1 17:13:00
     * @param schoolTempUserInfo: 其他人员实体类
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo
     */
    @Log(title = "其他人员", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PutMapping("/editTempUserInfo")
    public AjaxResult editTempUserInfo(@RequestBody SchoolTempUserInfo schoolTempUserInfo) {
        return toAjax(schoolTempUserInfoService.updateSchoolTempUserInfoByPhoneNum(schoolTempUserInfo));
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 批量删除其他人员
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-12-1 17:13:00
     * @param tempUserIds: 其他人员主键数组
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:tempUser:remove")
    @Log(title = "其他人员", businessType = BusinessType.DELETE)
	@DeleteMapping("/{tempUserIds}")
    public AjaxResult remove(@PathVariable Long[] tempUserIds) {
        return toAjax(schoolTempUserInfoService.deleteSchoolTempUserInfoByTempUserIds(tempUserIds));
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 删除其他人员(远程调用)
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-12-1 17:13:00
     * @param phoneNum: 电话号
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo
     */
    @Log(title = "其他人员", businessType = BusinessType.DELETE)
    @DeleteMapping("/removeTempUserInfo/{phoneNum}")
    public AjaxResult deleteSchoolTempUserInfoByPhoneNum(@PathVariable("phoneNum") String phoneNum) {
        return toAjax(schoolTempUserInfoService.deleteSchoolTempUserInfoByPhoneNum(phoneNum));
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 导入
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-11-25 13:30:07
     * @param file:
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @Log(title = "其他人员", businessType = BusinessType.IMPORT)
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:tempUser:import")
    @PostMapping("/importSchoolTempUserInfo")
    public AjaxResult importSchoolTempUserInfo(MultipartFile file) throws Exception {
        ExcelUtil<SchoolTempUserInfo> util = new ExcelUtil<SchoolTempUserInfo>(SchoolTempUserInfo.class);
        List<SchoolTempUserInfo> userList = util.importExcel(file.getInputStream());
        String message = schoolTempUserInfoService.importSchoolTempUserInfo(userList);
        return success(message);
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 下载模板
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-11-25 15:54:13
     * @param response:
     * @return: void
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:tempUser:importLsgTemplate")
    @PostMapping("/importLsgTemplate")
    public void importLsgTemplate(HttpServletResponse response) throws IOException{
        ExcelUtil<SchoolTempUserInfo> util = new ExcelUtil<SchoolTempUserInfo>(SchoolTempUserInfo.class);
        util.importTemplateExcel(response,"其他人员数据");
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 上传文件
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-11-25 15:54:13
     * @param file 文件信息
     * @return 结果
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:tempUser:upload")
    @PostMapping("/upload")
    public AjaxResult upload(@RequestPart(value = "file") MultipartFile file){
        R<SysFile> upload = remoteFileService.upload(file);
        return AjaxResult.success(upload.getData());
    }
    /**
     * @Description:变更临时人员状态
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-04-14 13:46:14
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @PostMapping("/updateTempUserStatus")
    public AjaxResult updateTempUserStatus(){
        return schoolTempUserInfoService.updateTempUserStatus();
    }
}

        util.exportExcel(response, list, "课程时间调度数据");

    /**

    }

    }

    @Log(title = "课程时间调度", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PutMapping
    public AjaxResult edit(@RequestBody SchoolTimeScheduling schoolTimeScheduling)
    {
        return toAjax(schoolTimeSchedulingService.updateSchoolTimeScheduling(schoolTimeScheduling));
    }
    /**
     * @Description:删除课程时间调度
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-12-05 09:42:21
     * @param schedulingIds:
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jufe:scheduling:remove")
    @Log(title = "课程时间调度", businessType = BusinessType.DELETE)
	@DeleteMapping("/{schedulingIds}")
    public AjaxResult remove(@PathVariable Long[] schedulingIds)
    {
        return toAjax(schoolTimeSchedulingService.deleteSchoolTimeSchedulingBySchedulingIds(schedulingIds));
    }
    /**
     *
     * @Description: 定时同步课程
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2023/01/10
     * @param
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @Log(title = "课程时间调度", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PostMapping("/syncScheduling")
    public AjaxResult syncScheduling()
    {
        schoolTimeSchedulingService.sync();
        return success();
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 同步当天课程安排信息
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-02-01 09:02:25
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @Log(title = "当天课程时间调度", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PostMapping("/syncSchedulingDay")
    public AjaxResult syncSchedulingDay()
    {
        schoolTimeSchedulingService.syncCourseSchDay();
        return success();
    }
    /**
     * @Description:同步一周课程安排信息
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-02-01 09:03:03
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @Log(title = "按周课程时间调度", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PostMapping("/syncSchedulingWeek")
    public AjaxResult syncSchedulingWeek()
    {
        schoolTimeSchedulingService.syncCourseSchWeek();
        return success();
    }
    /**
     * 同步吉林工商课表数据
     */
    @PostMapping("/syncScheduling/jlgs")
    public AjaxResult syncSchedulingForJlgs() {
        SchedulingSetting schedulingSetting = redisService.getCacheObject(SCHEDULING_CONFIG_KEY);
        if (schedulingSetting == null) {
            log.error("课表设置未配置，请检查redis key:{}", SCHEDULING_CONFIG_KEY);
            throw new RuntimeException("请先配置课表设置");
        }
        log.info("同步课表，教学周第一天：{}，学年：{},学期类型：{}", schedulingSetting.getSchoolWeekStartDay(), schedulingSetting.getSchoolYear(), schedulingSetting.getSemesterType());
        // 查询房间信息
        Map<String, SchoolRoom> roomCodeMap = schoolRoomService.getSyncRoomCodeMap();
        if (CollectionUtil.isEmpty(roomCodeMap.keySet())) {
            return warn("未查询到教室信息！");
        }
        List<String> roomCodeList = new ArrayList<>(roomCodeMap.keySet());
        List<SchoolTimeSchedulingSync> schoolTimeSchedulingSyncs = schoolTimeSchedulingSyncService.listByRoomCodesAndTerm(roomCodeList, schedulingSetting);
        if (CollectionUtil.isEmpty(schoolTimeSchedulingSyncs)) {
            return warn("未查询到课程信息！");
        }
        Map<String, SysJcxx> jcxxMap = schoolTimeSchedulingSyncService.getJcxxMap(schedulingSetting);
        List<SchoolTimeScheduling> list = schoolTimeSchedulingService.buildSchedulingForJlgs(schoolTimeSchedulingSyncs,
                roomCodeMap, schedulingSetting, jcxxMap);
        schoolTimeSchedulingService.updateForSync(list);
        return success();
    }
}

package com.chenrise.jufe.controller;
import cn.hutool.core.date.DateUtil;
import cn.hutool.core.util.NumberUtil;
import cn.hutool.json.JSONObject;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.StringUtils;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo;
import com.chenrise.common.security.annotation.RequiresPermissions;
import com.chenrise.common.security.utils.DictUtils;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.*;
import com.chenrise.jufe.mapper.DevGatewayInfoMapper;
import com.chenrise.jufe.mapper.DevGroupingInfoMapper;
import com.chenrise.jufe.mapper.DevLockInfoMapper;
import com.chenrise.jufe.mapper.SchoolTimeSchedulingMapper;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.*;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.GetMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PathVariable;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RestController;
import javax.annotation.Resource;
import java.util.*;
import java.util.stream.Collectors;
/**
 * apk版本Controller
 *
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2022-12-10
 */
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/sharedashboard")
public class ShareDashboardController extends BaseController
{
    @Resource private IShareDashboardService sdService;
    @Resource private ISchoolRoomService roomService;
    /**
     * 预约统计
     * @return
     */
    @GetMapping("/yytj")
    public AjaxResult yytj()
    {
        Map<String, Object> map = new HashMap<>();
        int total = sdService.getReservationCounts(map);
        map.put("reservationDate", DateUtil.today());
        int today = sdService.getReservationCounts(map);
        map.put("signFlag", "1");
        int signToday = sdService.getReservationCounts(map);
        map.put("signNow", "1");
        int signNow = sdService.getReservationCounts(map);
        SchoolRoom query = new SchoolRoom();
        query.setIsReservation("1");
        List<SchoolRoom> list = roomService.selectSchoolRoomList(query);
        long seatNum = list.isEmpty() ? 0 : list.stream().map(SchoolRoom::getSeatNum).reduce(0L, (a, b) -> a + b);
        JSONObject data = new JSONObject()
                .putOnce("total", total)
                .putOnce("today", today)
                .putOnce("signToday", signToday)
                .putOnce("signNow", signNow)
                .putOnce("seatNum", seatNum);
        return AjaxResult.success(data);
    }
    /**
     * 预约趋势
     * @return
     */
    @GetMapping("/yyqs/{type}")
    public AjaxResult yyqs(@PathVariable String type)
    {
        List<Map<String,Object>> list;
        if("YEAR".equals(type)){
            list = sdService.getYyqsByMonth();
        }else if("MONTH".equals(type)){
            list = sdService.getYyqsByDay();
        } else {
            list = null;
        }
        JSONObject data = new JSONObject();
        if(!list.isEmpty()){
            String [] xDatas = list.stream().map(x->x.get("date").toString()).distinct().toArray(String[]::new);
            String [] legends = list.stream().filter(x->x.get("room_id")!=null).map(x->x.get("room_id").toString()).distinct().toArray(String[]::new);
            List<Map<String,Object>> ydatas = new ArrayList<>();
            Arrays.stream(legends).forEach(e->{
                Map<String,Object> map = new HashMap<>();
                int[] ydata = new int[xDatas.length];
                for(int i=0;i<xDatas.length;i++){
                    int finalI = i;
                    list.stream().forEach(item->{
                        JSONObject obj = new JSONObject(item);
                        if(e.equals(obj.getStr("room_id"))&&xDatas[finalI].equals(obj.getStr("date"))){
                            ydata[finalI] = obj.getInt("count");
                        }
                    });
                }
                map.put(e, ydata);
                ydatas.add(map);
            });
            data.putOnce("xDatas",xDatas).putOnce("legends",legends).putOnce("ydatas",ydatas);
        }
        return AjaxResult.success(data);
    }
    /**
     * 部门预约情况top5
     * @return
     */
    @GetMapping("/bmyy/{type}")
    public AjaxResult bmyy(@PathVariable String type)
    {
        List<Map<String,Object>> list = sdService.getBmyy(type);
        Integer [] ydata1 = new Integer[list.size()];
        for (int i=0;i<list.size();i++) {
            // 查询该部门爽约次数
            Integer count = sdService.getSyCount(type,Long.parseLong(String.valueOf(list.get(i).get("dept_id"))));
            ydata1[i] = count;
        }
        String [] xDatas = list.stream().map(x->x.get("dept_name").toString()).toArray(String[]::new);
        Integer [] ydata = list.stream().map(x->Integer.parseInt(x.get("count").toString())).toArray(Integer[]::new);
        JSONObject data = new JSONObject()
                .putOnce("xDatas",xDatas)
                .putOnce("ydata",ydata)
                .putOnce("ydata1",ydata1);
        return AjaxResult.success(data);
    }
    /**
     * 时间趋势
     * @return
     */
    @GetMapping("/sjqs")
    public AjaxResult sjqs()
    {
        List<Map<String,Object>> list = sdService.getSjqs();
        String [] xDatas = list.stream().map(x->x.get("time_slot").toString()).toArray(String[]::new);
        Integer [] ydata = list.stream().map(x->Integer.parseInt(x.get("count").toString())).toArray(Integer[]::new);
        JSONObject data = new JSONObject()
                .putOnce("xDatas",xDatas)
                .putOnce("ydata",ydata);
        return AjaxResult.success(data);
    }
    /**
     * 教室类型
     * @return
     */
    @GetMapping("/jslx")
    public AjaxResult jslx()
    {
        List<Map<String,Object>> list = sdService.getJslx();
        List<Map<String,Object>> result = list.stream().map(item->{
            Map<String,Object> map = new HashMap<>();
            map.put("name",item.get("room_type_name"));
            map.put("value",item.get("count"));
            return map;
        }).collect(Collectors.toList());
        return AjaxResult.success(result);
    }
    /**
     * 预约类型
     * @return
     */
    @GetMapping("/yylx/{type}")
    public AjaxResult yylx(@PathVariable String type)
    {
        List<Map<String,Object>> list = sdService.getYylx(type);
        List<Map<String,Object>> result = list.stream().map(item->{
            Map<String,Object> map = new HashMap<>();
            map.put("name",item.get("room_type_name"));
            map.put("value",item.get("count"));
            return map;
        }).collect(Collectors.toList());
        return AjaxResult.success(result);
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.controller;
import cn.hutool.json.JSONObject;
import cn.hutool.json.JSONUtil;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult;

import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.TeachingInspection;

import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.*;

import java.util.List;
/**
 * Controller
 *
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2022-12-10
 */
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/teaching/inspection")
public class TeachingInspectionController extends BaseController
{
    @Resource
    private ITeachingInspectionService tiService;
    /**
     * 查询列表
     */
    @GetMapping("/list")
    public TableDataInfo list(TeachingInspection ti)
    {
        startPage();
        List<TeachingInspection> list = tiService.list(ti);
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     * 获取详细信息
     */
    @GetMapping(value = "/{id}")
    public AjaxResult getInfo(@PathVariable("id") Long id)
    {
        return success(tiService.get(id));
    }
    /**
     * 新增
     */
    @Log(title = "巡课", businessType = BusinessType.INSERT)
    @PostMapping("/add")
    public AjaxResult add(@RequestBody JSONObject obj)
    {
        TeachingInspection ti = JSONUtil.toBean(obj,TeachingInspection.class);
        return toAjax(tiService.insert(ti));
    }
    /**
     * 修改
     */
    @Log(title = "巡课", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PutMapping("/edit")
    public AjaxResult edit(@RequestBody TeachingInspection ti)
    {
        return toAjax(tiService.update(ti));
    }
    /**
     * 删除
     */
    @Log(title = "巡课", businessType = BusinessType.DELETE)
	@DeleteMapping("/{ids}")
    public AjaxResult remove(@PathVariable Long[] ids)
    {
        return toAjax(tiService.deleteByIds(ids));
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.controller;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.poi.ExcelUtil;

import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.*;
