/**
 * 审批类型关联工作流Controller
 *
 * @author sunMing
 * @date 2023-12-27
 */
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/workflow/ref")
public class TypeFlowRefController extends BaseController {
    @Autowired
    private ITypeFlowRefService typeFlowRefService;
    /**
     * 查询审批类型关联工作流列表
     *
     * @param typeFlowRef:
     * @Description: 查询审批类型关联工作流列表
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2023-12-27 16:00:52
     * @return: com.chenrise.boot.common.core.page.TableDataInfo
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("workflow:ref:list")
    @GetMapping("/list")
    public TableDataInfo list(TypeFlowRef typeFlowRef) {
        startPage();
        List<TypeFlowRef> list = typeFlowRefService.selectTypeFlowRefList(typeFlowRef);
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     * 导出审批类型关联工作流列表
     *
     * @param response:
     * @param typeFlowRef:
     * @Description: 导出审批类型关联工作流列表
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2023-12-27 16:00:55
     * @return: void
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("workflow:ref:export")
    @Log(title = "审批类型关联工作流", businessType = BusinessType.EXPORT)
    @PostMapping("/export")
    public void export(HttpServletResponse response, TypeFlowRef typeFlowRef) {
        List<TypeFlowRef> list = typeFlowRefService.selectTypeFlowRefList(typeFlowRef);
        ExcelUtil<TypeFlowRef> util = new ExcelUtil<>(TypeFlowRef.class);
        util.exportExcel(response, list, "审批类型关联工作流数据");
    }
    /**
     * 获取审批类型关联工作流详细信息
     *
     * @param id:
     * @Description: 获取审批类型关联工作流详细信息
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2023-12-27 16:00:59
     * @return: com.chenrise.boot.common.core.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("workflow:ref:query")
    @GetMapping(value = "/{id}")
    public AjaxResult getInfo(@PathVariable("id") Long id) {
        return AjaxResult.success(typeFlowRefService.selectTypeFlowRefById(id));
    }
    /**
     * 新增审批类型关联工作流
     *
     * @param typeFlowRef:
     * @Description: 新增审批类型关联工作流
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2023-12-27 16:01:03
     * @return: com.chenrise.boot.common.core.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("workflow:ref:add")
    @Log(title = "审批类型关联工作流", businessType = BusinessType.INSERT)
    @PostMapping
    public AjaxResult add(@RequestBody TypeFlowRef typeFlowRef) {
        return toAjax(typeFlowRefService.insertTypeFlowRef(typeFlowRef));
    }
    /**
     * 修改审批类型关联工作流
     *
     * @param typeFlowRef:
     * @Description: 修改审批类型关联工作流
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2023-12-27 16:01:06
     * @return: com.chenrise.boot.common.core.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("workflow:ref:edit")
    @Log(title = "审批类型关联工作流", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PutMapping
    public AjaxResult edit(@RequestBody TypeFlowRef typeFlowRef) {
        return toAjax(typeFlowRefService.updateTypeFlowRef(typeFlowRef));
    }
    /**
     * 删除审批类型关联工作流
     *
     * @param ids:
     * @Description: 删除审批类型关联工作流
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2023-12-27 16:01:10
     * @return: com.chenrise.boot.common.core.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("workflow:ref:remove")
    @Log(title = "审批类型关联工作流", businessType = BusinessType.DELETE)
    @DeleteMapping("/{ids}")
    public AjaxResult remove(@PathVariable Long[] ids) {
        return toAjax(typeFlowRefService.deleteTypeFlowRefByIds(ids));
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.controller;
import cn.hutool.core.date.DateField;
import cn.hutool.core.date.DateUtil;
import cn.hutool.json.JSONObject;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.DevMonitorInfo;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.WarningInfo;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.IDevMonitorInfoService;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.IWarningInfoService;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.*;
import javax.annotation.Resource;
import java.util.*;
import java.util.concurrent.atomic.AtomicReference;
/**
 * Controller
 *
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2022-12-10
 */
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/warning/info")
public class WarningInfoController extends BaseController
{
    @Resource
    private IWarningInfoService warningInfoService;
    @Resource
    private IDevMonitorInfoService monitorInfoService;
    /**
     * @Description:列表
     * @param warningInfo
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo
     * @Author: CJH
     * @Updator: CJH
     * @Date 2024/4/23 15:53
     */
    @GetMapping("/list")
    public TableDataInfo list(WarningInfo warningInfo)
    {
        startPage();
        List<WarningInfo> list = warningInfoService.list(warningInfo);
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     * @Description:新增
     * @param obj
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     * @Author: CJH
     * @Updator: CJH
     * @Date 2024/4/23 15:53
     */
    @PostMapping("/add")
    public AjaxResult add(@RequestBody JSONObject obj)
    {
        return toAjax(warningInfoService.insert(obj));
    }
    /**
     * @Description:发送推送
     * @param
     * @return: void
     * @Author: CJH
     * @Updator: CJH
     * @Date 2024/4/23 15:54
     */
    @PostMapping("/sendMessage")
    public void sendMessage()
    {
        warningInfoService.sendMessage();
    }
    /**
     * @Description:课表发现报警
     * @param
     * @return: void
     * @Author: CJH
     * @Updator: CJH
     * @Date 2024/4/23 15:54
     */
    @PostMapping("/findRoomWarning")
    public void findRoomWarning()
    {
        warningInfoService.findRoomWarning();
    }
    /**
     * @Description:按房间 列表
     * @param obj
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo
     * @Author: CJH
     * @Updator: CJH
     * @Date 2024/4/23 15:54
     */
    @GetMapping("/listByRoom")
    public TableDataInfo listByRoom(@RequestParam Map<String,Object> obj)
    {
        startPage();
        List<JSONObject> list = warningInfoService.countByRoomId(obj);
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     * @Description:获取图标top10
     * @param
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     * @Author: CJH
     * @Updator: CJH
     * @Date 2024/4/25 13:01
     */
    @GetMapping("/getTops")
    public AjaxResult getTops() {
        JSONObject result = new JSONObject();
        List<JSONObject> types = new ArrayList<>();
        types.add(new JSONObject().putOnce("power_num","电异常"));
        types.add(new JSONObject().putOnce("lock_num","锁异常"));
        types.add(new JSONObject().putOnce("sj_num","水浸"));
        types.add(new JSONObject().putOnce("yg_num","烟感"));
        types.add(new JSONObject().putOnce("cc_num","窗磁"));
        types.add(new JSONObject().putOnce("wd_num","温度"));
        types.add(new JSONObject().putOnce("sd_num","湿度"));
        types.add(new JSONObject().putOnce("gz_num","光照"));
        types.add(new JSONObject().putOnce("pm25_num","PM2.5"));
        types.add(new JSONObject().putOnce("pm10_num","PM10"));
        String[] legends = types.stream().map(e->{
            StringBuffer buffer = new StringBuffer();
            e.keySet().forEach(i->{
                buffer.append(e.getStr(i));
            });
            return buffer.toString();
        }).toArray(String[]::new);
        result.putOnce("legends",legends);
        JSONObject obj = new JSONObject();
        Date end = new Date();
        Date start = DateUtil.offset(end,DateField.MINUTE,-1);
        obj.putOnce("start",start);
        obj.putOnce("end",end);
        obj.putOnce("limit"," limit 10 ");
        List<JSONObject> list = warningInfoService.countByRoomId(obj);
        if(list!=null&&list.size()>0){
            String[] xDatas = list.stream().map(map->map.getStr("room_id")).toArray(String[]::new);
            result.putOnce("xDatas",xDatas);
            List<JSONObject> yDatas = new ArrayList<>();
            types.stream().forEach(e->{
                e.keySet().forEach(s -> {
                    JSONObject jsonObject = new JSONObject();
                    jsonObject.putOnce("name",e.getStr(s));
                    jsonObject.putOnce("type","bar");
                    jsonObject.putOnce("stack","Total");
                    Integer[] arr = list.stream().map(map->map.getInt(s)).toArray(Integer[]::new);
                    jsonObject.putOnce("data",arr);
                    yDatas.add(jsonObject);
                });
            });
            result.putOnce("yDatas",yDatas);
        }
        return AjaxResult.success(result);
    }
    @GetMapping("/count")
    public AjaxResult count(){
        Map<String,Object> result = new HashMap<>();
        JSONObject obj = null;
        Date start = null;
        Date end = null;
        List<JSONObject> list = null;
        Integer count = 0;
        //全部报警
        obj = new JSONObject();
        list = warningInfoService.countByRoomId(obj);
        count = list.stream().mapToInt(item->item.getInt("total")).sum();
        result.put("totalWarning",count);
        //获取今日报警
        start = DateUtil.beginOfDay(new Date());
        end = new Date();
        obj = new JSONObject();
        obj.putOnce("start",start);
        obj.putOnce("end",end);
        list = warningInfoService.countByRoomId(obj);
        count = list.stream().mapToInt(item->item.getInt("total")).sum();
        result.put("todayWarning",count);
        //获取实时（一分钟以内算实时）报警
        end = new Date();
        start = DateUtil.offset(end, DateField.MINUTE,-1);
        obj = new JSONObject();
        obj.putOnce("start",start);
        obj.putOnce("end",end);
        list = warningInfoService.countByRoomId(obj);
        count = list.stream().mapToInt(item->item.getInt("total")).sum();
        result.put("nowWarning",count);
        return AjaxResult.success(result);
    }
    @GetMapping("/nowlist")
    public TableDataInfo nowlist(@RequestParam Map map)
    {
        Date now = new Date();
        map.put("start",DateUtil.offset(now,DateField.MINUTE,-1));
        map.put("end",now);
        startPage();
        List<WarningInfo> list = warningInfoService.nowList(map);
        for(WarningInfo wi:list){
            DevMonitorInfo query = new DevMonitorInfo();
            query.setRoomId(wi.getRoomId());
            List<DevMonitorInfo> infos = monitorInfoService.selectDevMonitorInfoList(query);
            wi.getParams().put("cameras",infos);
        }
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     * 查询实时报警分类
     * @Description: 查询实时报警分类
     * @Author: lougang
     * @Date: 2024-11-01 13:34
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo
     */
    @GetMapping("/getAlarmClassification")
    public AjaxResult getAlarmClassification() {
        Map<String,Object> result = new HashMap<>();
        JSONObject obj = null;
        Date start = null;
        Date end = null;
        List<JSONObject> list = null;
        Integer count = 0;
        //获取实时（一分钟以内算实时）报警
        end = new Date();
        start = DateUtil.offset(end, DateField.MINUTE,-1);
        obj = new JSONObject();
        obj.putOnce("start",start);
        obj.putOnce("end",end);
        JSONObject alarmClassification = warningInfoService.getAlarmClassification(obj);
        return AjaxResult.success(alarmClassification);
    }
    /**
     * 报警跟踪趋势(按月)
     * @Description: 报警跟踪趋势(按月)
     * @Author: lougang
     * @Date: 2024-11-01 14:56
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @GetMapping("/getAlarmTrackingTrendByMonth")
    public AjaxResult getAlarmTrackingTrendByMonth() {
        // 按月查询报警趋势
        List<JSONObject> alarmTrackingTrendByMonthList = warningInfoService.getAlarmTrackingTrendByMonth();
        return AjaxResult.success(alarmTrackingTrendByMonthList);
    }
    /**
     * 报警跟踪趋势(按年)
     * @Description: 报警跟踪趋势(按月)
     * @Author: lougang
     * @Date: 2024-11-01 14:56
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @GetMapping("/getAlarmTrackingTrendByYear")
    public AjaxResult getAlarmTrackingTrendByYear() {
        // 按月查询报警趋势
        List<JSONObject> alarmTrackingTrendByYearList = warningInfoService.getAlarmTrackingTrendByYear();
        return AjaxResult.success(alarmTrackingTrendByYearList);
    }
}

/**

    @Excel(name = "审批人名称")

    @Excel(name = "审批步骤")

            .toString();
    }

package com.chenrise.jufe.domain;
import com.chenrise.common.core.annotation.Excel;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.BaseEntity;
import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonFormat;
import lombok.Data;
import org.apache.commons.lang3.builder.ToStringBuilder;
import org.apache.commons.lang3.builder.ToStringStyle;
import java.util.Date;
/**
 * 资产相关申请对象 ass_assets_apply_info
 * 
 * @author sunMing
 * @date 2023-12-27
 */
@Data
public class AssetsApplyInfo extends BaseEntity {
    private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;
    /** 主键id */
    private Long applyId;
    /** 申请描述 */
    @Excel(name = "申请描述")
    private String applyDesc;
    /** 申请时间 */
    @JsonFormat(pattern = "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")
    @Excel(name = "申请时间", width = 30, dateFormat = "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")
    private Date applyTime;
    /** 审批完结时间 */
    @JsonFormat(pattern = "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")
    private Date approveEndTime;
    /** 申请人id */
    @Excel(name = "申请人id")
    private Long applyUserId;
    /** 申请人名称 */
    @Excel(name = "申请人名称")
    private String applyUserName;
    /** 申请人部门 */
    @Excel(name = "申请人部门")
    private Long applyDeptId;
    /** 申请人部门名称 */
    @Excel(name = "申请人部门名称")
    private String applyDeptName;
    /** 申请状态 字典 apply_status */
    @Excel(name = "申请状态 字典 apply_status")
    private String applyStatus;
    /** 申请类型 字典apply_type */
    @Excel(name = "申请类型 字典apply_type")
    private String applyType;
    /** 审批流转状态 */
    @Excel(name = "审批流转状态")
    private String applyFlowSatus;
    /** 申请原因 */
    @Excel(name = "申请原因")
    private String applyReason;
    /** 申请备注 */
    @Excel(name = "申请备注")
    private String applyRemark;
    /** 审批步骤 */
    @Excel(name = "审批步骤")
    private Long auditStep;
    /** 转移用户id */
    @Excel(name = "转移用户id")
    private Long transferUserId;
    /** 转移用户名称 */
    @Excel(name = "转移用户名称")
    private String transferUserName;
    /** 转移部门id */
    @Excel(name = "转移部门id")
    private Long transferDeptId;
    /** 转移部门名称 */
    @Excel(name = "转移部门名称")
    private String transferDeptName;
    /** 领取状态 0未领取 1已领取 */
    @Excel(name = "领取状态 0未领取 1已领取")
    private String receiveStatus;
    /** 领取时间 */
    @JsonFormat(pattern = "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")
    private Date receiveTime;
    /** 创建人id */
    private Long createById;
    /** 更新人id */
    private Long updateById;
    /** 删除状态 0正常 1删除 */
    private String delFlag;
    /** 创建人所属部门 */
    private Long deptId;
    /** 拒绝原因 */
    private String approveReason;
    /** 是否发送领用提醒 */
    private String isSend;
    /** 是否重新提交 */
    private String isResubmit;
    @Override
    public String toString() {
        return new ToStringBuilder(this,ToStringStyle.MULTI_LINE_STYLE)
            .append("applyId", getApplyId())
            .append("applyDesc", getApplyDesc())
            .append("applyTime", getApplyTime())
            .append("applyUserId", getApplyUserId())
            .append("applyUserName", getApplyUserName())
            .append("applyDeptId", getApplyDeptId())
            .append("applyDeptName", getApplyDeptName())
            .append("applyStatus", getApplyStatus())
            .append("applyType", getApplyType())
            .append("applyFlowSatus", getApplyFlowSatus())
            .append("applyReason", getApplyReason())
            .append("applyRemark", getApplyRemark())
            .append("auditStep", getAuditStep())
            .append("transferUserId", getTransferUserId())
            .append("transferUserName", getTransferUserName())
            .append("transferDeptId", getTransferDeptId())
            .append("transferDeptName", getTransferDeptName())
            .append("receiveStatus", getReceiveStatus())
            .append("createById", getCreateById())
            .append("createBy", getCreateBy())
            .append("createTime", getCreateTime())
            .append("updateById", getUpdateById())
            .append("updateBy", getUpdateBy())
            .append("updateTime", getUpdateTime())
            .append("delFlag", getDelFlag())
            .append("remark", getRemark())
            .append("deptId", getDeptId())
            .toString();
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.domain;
import com.chenrise.common.core.annotation.Excel;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.BaseEntity;
import org.apache.commons.lang3.builder.ToStringBuilder;
import org.apache.commons.lang3.builder.ToStringStyle;
/**
 * stop对象 ass_assets_apply_step
 * 
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2024-01-16
 */
public class AssetsApplyStep extends BaseEntity
{
    private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;
    /** 主键id */
    private Long id;
    /** 申请单id */
    @Excel(name = "申请单id")
    private Long applyId;
    /** 审批步骤 */
    @Excel(name = "审批步骤")
    private Long step;
    public void setId(Long id) 
    {
        this.id = id;
    }
    public Long getId() 
    {
        return id;
    }
    public void setApplyId(Long applyId) 
    {
        this.applyId = applyId;
    }
    public Long getApplyId() 
    {
        return applyId;
    }
    public void setStep(Long step) 
    {
        this.step = step;
    }
    public Long getStep() 
    {
        return step;
    }
    @Override
    public String toString() {
        return new ToStringBuilder(this,ToStringStyle.MULTI_LINE_STYLE)
            .append("id", getId())
            .append("applyId", getApplyId())
            .append("step", getStep())
            .append("createTime", getCreateTime())
            .toString();
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.domain;

/**

@Data
public class AssetsClass extends BaseEntity {

    @Excel(name = "父节点id")
    private Long parentId;

    private Long updateById;

    private String delFlag;
    /** 创建人部门id */
    private Long deptId;

            .append("updateTime", getUpdateTime())

            .append("deptId", getDeptId())

public class AssetsFlowInfo extends BaseEntity {

    @Excel(name = "资产流转方式，1行政专员流转 2他人转移 3自己申请")
    private String flowWay;
    /** 流转前所属部门id */

    private String befDeptName;
    /** 流转前所属用户id */

    @Excel(name = "流转前所属用户名称")

    private String flowRemark;

    private Long createById;

    @Excel(name = "转移用户id")
    private Long transferUserId;

    @Excel(name = "转移用户名称")

    private Long transferDeptId;
    /** 转移部门名称 */
    @Excel(name = "转移部门名称")
    private String transferDeptName;
    /** 更新时间 */
    @Excel(name = "更新时间")
    private Long updateById;
    /** 更新人名称 */
    @Excel(name = "更新人名称")
    private String updateByName;
    /** 删除状态  0正常 1删除 */
    private String delFlag;
    /** 部门id */
    @Excel(name = "部门id")
    private Long depId;
    @Override
    public String toString() {
        return new ToStringBuilder(this,ToStringStyle.MULTI_LINE_STYLE)
            .append("flowId", getFlowId())
            .append("applyId", getApplyId())
            .append("assetsId", getAssetsId())
            .append("flowType", getFlowType())
            .append("flowWay", getFlowWay())
            .append("befDeptId", getBefDeptId())
            .append("befDeptName", getBefDeptName())
            .append("befUserId", getBefUserId())
            .append("befUserName", getBefUserName())
            .append("flowReason", getFlowReason())
            .append("flowRemark", getFlowRemark())
            .append("createById", getCreateById())
            .append("createBy", getCreateBy())
            .append("createTime", getCreateTime())
            .append("updateById", getUpdateById())
            .append("updateByName", getUpdateByName())
            .append("updateTime", getUpdateTime())
            .append("delFlag", getDelFlag())
            .append("remark", getRemark())
            .append("depId", getDepId())
            .toString();

package com.chenrise.jufe.domain;
import com.chenrise.common.core.annotation.Excel;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.BaseEntity;

import lombok.Data;
import org.apache.commons.lang3.builder.ToStringBuilder;
import org.apache.commons.lang3.builder.ToStringStyle;
import java.math.BigDecimal;
import java.util.Date;
/**
 * 资产信息（主要）对象 ass_assets_info
 * 
 * @author sunMing
 * @date 2023-12-27
 */
@Data
public class AssetsInfo extends BaseEntity {
    private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;
    /** 资产id */
    private Long assetsId;
    /** 资产名称 */
    @Excel(name = "资产名称",sort = 4)
    private String assetsName;
    /** 资产状态 字典assets_status */
    @Excel(name = "资产状态",sort = 2 ,readConverterExp = "0=闲置,1=在用")
    private String assetsStatus;
    /** 资产编号 */
    @Excel(name = "资产编号",sort = 3 )
    private String assetsCode;
    /** 资产分类id */
    private Long assetsClass;
    /** 资产分类名称 */
    @Excel(name = "资产分类",sort = 5)
    private String assetsClassName;
    /** 型号 */
    private String model;
    /** 计量单位 */
    @Excel(name = "计量单位",sort = 6)
    private String unit;
    /** 来源 */
    private String source;
    /** 品牌 */
    private String brand;
    /** 采购时间 */
    @JsonFormat(pattern = "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")
    private Date procureTime;
    /** 采购人 */
    private String procureUserName;
    /** 质保 */
    private String warranty;
    /** 数量 都是1 */
    private Long num;
    /** 金额 */
    @Excel(name = "金额",sort = 7)
    private BigDecimal amount;
    /** 创建人id */
    private Long createById;
    /** 更新人id */
    private Long updateById;
    /** 创建人部门id */
    private Long deptId;
    /** 删除状态 0正常 1删除 */
    private String delFlag;
    /**
     * 有效期
     */
    @JsonFormat(pattern = "yyyy-MM-dd")
    private Date expirationDate;
    @Override
    public String toString() {
        return new ToStringBuilder(this,ToStringStyle.MULTI_LINE_STYLE)
            .append("assetsId", getAssetsId())
            .append("assetsStatus", getAssetsStatus())
            .append("assetsCode", getAssetsCode())
            .append("assetsClass", getAssetsClass())
            .append("assetsClassName", getAssetsClassName())
            .append("model", getModel())
            .append("unit", getUnit())
            .append("source", getSource())
            .append("brand", getBrand())
            .append("procureTime", getProcureTime())
            .append("procureUserName", getProcureUserName())
            .append("warranty", getWarranty())
            .append("num", getNum())
            .append("amount", getAmount())
            .append("createById", getCreateById())
            .append("createBy", getCreateBy())
            .append("createTime", getCreateTime())
            .append("updateById", getUpdateById())
            .append("updateBy", getUpdateBy())
            .append("updateTime", getUpdateTime())
            .append("deptId", getDeptId())
            .append("delFlag", getDelFlag())
            .append("remark", getRemark())
                .append("expirationDate", getExpirationDate())
            .toString();
    }
}

@Data

public class DevLockCardInfo extends BaseEntity

    private Long id;

    private Long cardId;
    /** 门锁id */
    @Excel(name = "门锁id")
    private Long lockId;
    /** 门卡序号  对3求余加一是门卡序号  1:nfc1  2:nfc2 3:nfc3，对3整除是用户排序 */
    @Excel(name = "门卡序号  对3求余加一是门卡序号  1:nfc1  2:nfc2 3:nfc3，对3整除是用户排序")
    private Integer cardSort;
    /** 门卡编号 */
    @Excel(name = "门卡编号")
    private String cardCode;
    /** 添加时间 */
    @JsonFormat(pattern = "yyyy-MM-dd")
    @Excel(name = "添加时间", width = 30, dateFormat = "yyyy-MM-dd")
    private Date addTime;
    public void setId(Long id) 
    {
        this.id = id;
    }
    public Long getId() 
    {
        return id;
    }
    public void setCardId(Long cardId) 
    {
        this.cardId = cardId;
    }
    public Long getCardId() 
    {
        return cardId;
    }
    public void setLockId(Long lockId) 
    {
        this.lockId = lockId;
    }
    public Long getLockId() 
    {
        return lockId;
    }
    public void setCardSort(Integer cardSort)
    {
        this.cardSort = cardSort;
    }
    public Integer getCardSort()
    {
        return cardSort;
    }
    public void setCardCode(String cardCode) 
    {
        this.cardCode = cardCode;
    }
    public String getCardCode() 
    {
        return cardCode;
    }
    public void setAddTime(Date addTime) 
    {
        this.addTime = addTime;
    }
    public Date getAddTime() 
    {
        return addTime;
    }
}

    @Override
    public String toString() {
        return new ToStringBuilder(this, ToStringStyle.MULTI_LINE_STYLE)
                .append("deviceId", getDeviceId())
                .append("roomId", getRoomId())
                .append("roomName", getRoomName())
                .append("deviceNo", getDeviceNo())
                .append("roomNo", getRoomNo())
                .append("deviceName", getDeviceName())
                .append("deviceType", getDeviceType())
                .append("deviceManufacturer", getDeviceManufacturer())
                .append("remark", getRemark())
                .append("delFlag", getDelFlag())
                .append("onlineStatus", getOnlineStatus())
                .append("createBy", getCreateBy())
                .append("createTime", getCreateTime())
                .append("updateBy", getUpdateBy())
                .append("updateTime", getUpdateTime())
                .append("cameraUser", getCameraUser())
                .append("cameraPassword", getCameraPassword())
                .append("cameraIp", getCameraIp())
                .append("cameraPort", getCameraPort())
                .append("streamType", getStreamType())
                .append("protocol", getProtocol())
                .append("transmode", getTransmode())
                .toString();
    }
}

            .append("remark", getRemark())
            .append("delFalg", getDelFalg())

            .append("nodeType", getNodeType())
            .toString();

package com.chenrise.jufe.domain;

/**
 * 空开信息对象 dev_power_node_info
 *
 * @author liyiying
 * @date 2022-11-29
 */
@Data
@ToString
public class DevPowerNodeInfo extends BaseEntity
{
    private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;
    /** 主键id */
    private Long powerNodeId;
    /** 空开编号 */

    @Excel(name = "祖父级id")
    private String ancestors;

    @Excel(name = "所在电源箱id")
    private Long parentId;
    /** 所在电源箱id */
    @Excel(name = "所在电源箱id")
    private Long powerId;
    /** 在电源箱内序号 */
    @Excel(name = "在电源箱内序号")
    private Long sortNum;

    @Excel(name = "所在电源箱ip")
    private String ipAddress;

    @Excel(name = "端口号")
    private String port;
    /** mac */
    @Excel(name = "mac")
    private String mac;
    /** 空开所在位置 */
    @Excel(name = "空开所在位置")
    private String powerNodePos;
    /** 在现状态 1在线 0离线 */
    @Excel(name = "在现状态 1在线 0离线")
    @Dict("online_status")
    private String onlineStatus;
    /** 开关状态 1开 0关 */
    @Excel(name = "开关状态 1开 0关")
    @Dict("operation_onoff_pow")
    private String onoffStatus;
    /** 是否需要手动合闸 1是 0否 */
    @Excel(name = "是否需要手动合闸 1是 0否")
    private String isForbNetcon;
    /** 创建人id */
    @Excel(name = "创建人id")
    private Long createById;
    /** 更新人id */
    @Excel(name = "更新人id")
    private Long updateById;
    /** 删除状态 1删除 0正常 */
    private Long delFlag;
    /** 部门id */
    @Excel(name = "部门id")
    private Long deptId;
    /** 空开类型，1总空开 2子空开  */
    @Excel(name = "空开类型，1总空开 2子空开 ")
    private String nodeType;
    /** 是否在白名单内  1是 0否 */
    @Excel(name = "是否在白名单内  1是 0否")
    private Long inWhiteList;
    /** 添加百名单时间 */
    @JsonFormat(pattern = "yyyy-MM-dd")
    @Excel(name = "添加百名单时间", width = 30, dateFormat = "yyyy-MM-dd")
    private Date inWhiteTime;
    /** 添加百名单人id */
    @Excel(name = "添加百名单人id")
    private Long addWhiteUserId;
    /** 添加百名单人名称 */
    @Excel(name = "添加百名单人名称")
    private String addWhiteUserName;
    /** 房间id */
    @Excel(name = "房间id")
    private Long roomId;
    /** 房间编号 */
    @Excel(name = "房间编号")
    private String roomCode;
    /** 房间名称 */
    @Excel(name = "房间名称")
    private String roomName;
    /** 设备层级 */
    @Excel(name = "设备层级")
    private Long deviceLevel;
    /** 设备类型，1电源箱 2空开 */
    @Excel(name = "设备类型，1电源箱 2空开")
    @Dict("device_node_type")
    private String deviceNodeType;
    /** 手动分闸  */
    @Excel(name = "手动分闸 ")
    private String netcon;
    /** 当前功率 */
    @Excel(name = "当前功率")
    private BigDecimal pwr;
    /** 当前电压 */
    @Excel(name = "当前电压")
    private Float vol;
    /** 当前电流 */
    @Excel(name = "当前电流")
    private Float cur;
    /** 上次心跳信息 */
    @JsonFormat(pattern = "yyyy-MM-dd")
    @Excel(name = "上次心跳信息", width = 30, dateFormat = "yyyy-MM-dd")
    private Date lastBitTime;
    /** 非管理用户id（查询用） */
    private Long userId;
    private Long locationId;
    private String oldPw;
    private String newPw;
}

    }

    {
        this.powerId = powerId;

        return powerId;

        this.address = address;

        this.parentId = parentId;

    {
        this.name = name;
    }
    public String getName() 
    {
        return name;
    }
    public void setAddType(String addType) 
    {
        this.addType = addType;
    }
    public String getAddType() 
    {
        return addType;
    }
    public void setPowerIp(String powerIp) 
    {
        this.powerIp = powerIp;
    }
    public String getPowerIp() 
    {
        return powerIp;
    }
    public void setPort(Long port) 
    {
        this.port = port;
    }
    public Long getPort() 
    {
        return port;
    }
    public void setCreateById(Long createById) 
    {
        this.createById = createById;
    }
    public Long getCreateById() 
    {
        return createById;
    }
    public void setUdpateById(Long udpateById) 
    {
        this.udpateById = udpateById;
    }
    public Long getUdpateById()

    {
        this.deptId = deptId;
    }

    {
        return deptId;
    }

    {
        this.powerType = powerType;
    }
    public String getPowerType() 
    {
        return powerType;
    }
    public void setParentPowerId(Long parentPowerId) 
    {
        this.parentPowerId = parentPowerId;
    }
    public Long getParentPowerId() 
    {
        return parentPowerId;
    }
    @Override
    public String toString() {
        return new ToStringBuilder(this, ToStringStyle.MULTI_LINE_STYLE)
            .append("powerId", getPowerId())
            .append("address", getAddress())
            .append("addTime", getAddTime())
            .append("parentId", getParentId())

            .append("updateTime", getUpdateTime())
            .append("remark", getRemark())
            .append("delFlag", getDelFlag())
            .append("deptId", getDeptId())
            .append("powerType", getPowerType())
            .append("parentPowerId", getParentPowerId())
            .toString();
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.domain;
import com.chenrise.common.core.annotation.Excel;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.BaseEntity;
import org.apache.commons.lang3.builder.ToStringBuilder;
import org.apache.commons.lang3.builder.ToStringStyle;
import javax.validation.constraints.NotBlank;
import javax.validation.constraints.Size;
/**
 * 中心服务信息对象 dev_service_centre
 * 
 * @author chenfang
 * @date 2022-11-23
 */
public class DevServiceCenter extends BaseEntity {
    private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;
    /** 主键id */
    private Long centerId;
    /** 中心服务器编号 */
    @Excel(name = "中心服务器编号")
    private String centerCode;
    /** 中心服务器名称 */
    @Excel(name = "中心服务器名称")
    private String centerName;
    /** 中心服务ip */
    @Excel(name = "中心服务器IP")
    private String centerIp;
    /** 中心服务mac地址 */
    @Excel(name = "中心服务器MAC")
    private String centerMac;
    /** 类型 */
    @Excel(name = "中心服务器类型",readConverterExp = "1=监控")
    private String centerType;
    /** 创建人id */
    private Long createById;
    /** 更新人id */
    private Long updateById;
    /** 删除状态 1删除 0正常 */
    private Long delFlag;
    /** 部门id */
    private Long deptId;
    public void setCenterId(Long centerId) 
    {
        this.centerId = centerId;
    }
    public Long getCenterId() 
    {
        return centerId;
    }
    public void setCenterCode(String centerCode) 
    {
        this.centerCode = centerCode;
    }
    @NotBlank(message = "中心服务器编号不能为空")
    @Size(max = 20, message = "中心服务器编号长度不能超过20个字符")
    public String getCenterCode() 
    {
        return centerCode;
    }
    public void setCenterName(String centerName) 
    {
        this.centerName = centerName;
    }
    @NotBlank(message = "中心服务器名称不能为空")
    @Size(max = 20, message = "中心服务器名称长度不能超过20个字符")
    public String getCenterName() 
    {
        return centerName;
    }
    public void setCenterIp(String centerIp) 
    {
        this.centerIp = centerIp;
    }
    @NotBlank(message = "中心服务器IP不能为空")
    @Size(max = 20, message = "中心服务器IP长度不能超过20个字符")
    public String getCenterIp() 
    {
        return centerIp;
    }
    public void setCenterMac(String centerMac) 
    {
        this.centerMac = centerMac;
    }
    @NotBlank(message = "中心服务器MAC不能为空")
    @Size(max = 20, message = "中心服务器MAC长度不能超过20个字符")
    public String getCenterMac() 
    {
        return centerMac;
    }
    public void setCenterType(String centerType) 
    {
        this.centerType = centerType;
    }
    @NotBlank(message = "中心服务器类型不能为空")
    public String getCenterType() 
    {
        return centerType;
    }
    public void setCreateById(Long createById) 
    {
        this.createById = createById;
    }
    public Long getCreateById() 
    {
        return createById;
    }
    public void setUpdateById(Long updateById) 
    {
        this.updateById = updateById;
    }
    public Long getUpdateById() 
    {
        return updateById;
    }
    public void setDelFlag(Long delFlag) 
    {
        this.delFlag = delFlag;
    }
    public Long getDelFlag() 
    {
        return delFlag;
    }
    public void setDeptId(Long deptId) 
    {
        this.deptId = deptId;
    }
    public Long getDeptId() 
    {
        return deptId;
    }
    @Override
    public String toString() {
        return new ToStringBuilder(this, ToStringStyle.MULTI_LINE_STYLE)
            .append("centerId", getCenterId())
            .append("centerCode", getCenterCode())
            .append("centerName", getCenterName())
            .append("centerIp", getCenterIp())
            .append("centerMac", getCenterMac())
            .append("centerType", getCenterType())
            .append("createById", getCreateById())
            .append("createBy", getCreateBy())
            .append("createTime", getCreateTime())
            .append("updateById", getUpdateById())
            .append("updateBy", getUpdateBy())
            .append("updateTime", getUpdateTime())
            .append("remark", getRemark())
            .append("delFlag", getDelFlag())
            .append("deptId", getDeptId())
            .toString();
    }
}

package com.chenrise.jufe.domain;

 * 工作流步骤信息对象 ass_flow_set_detail
 * 
 * @author sunMing
 * @date 2023-12-27
 */
@Data
public class FlowSetDetail extends BaseEntity {
    private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;
    /** 主键id */
    private Long id;
    /** 审批步骤 */
    private Long auditStep;
    /** 步骤名称 */
    private String auditStepName;

    private String auditUserType;

    private String auditUserValue;

            .append("id", getId())
            .append("auditStep", getAuditStep())
            .append("auditStepName", getAuditStepName())
            .append("auditUserType", getAuditUserType())
            .append("auditUserValue", getAuditUserValue())
            .append("setId", getSetId())
            .toString();
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.domain;
import cn.hutool.core.bean.BeanUtil;
import cn.hutool.core.date.DateUtil;
import com.chenrise.system.api.domain.SysDept;
import org.apache.poi.ss.usermodel.*;
import org.apache.poi.ss.util.CellRangeAddress;
import org.apache.poi.xssf.usermodel.XSSFWorkbook;
import java.io.IOException;
import java.io.OutputStream;
import java.text.SimpleDateFormat;
import java.util.Date;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.Objects;
public class MeetingExporter {
    public void export(Map<String, Object> meetingInfo, List<Map<String, Object>> meetingItems, OutputStream outputStream) throws IOException {
        Workbook workbook = new XSSFWorkbook();
        Sheet sheet = workbook.createSheet(getString(meetingInfo.get("name"))+"会议信息");
        CellStyle centeredStyle = workbook.createCellStyle();
        centeredStyle.setAlignment(HorizontalAlignment.CENTER); // 水平居中
        centeredStyle.setVerticalAlignment(VerticalAlignment.CENTER); // 垂直居中
//        centeredStyle.setBorderTop(BorderStyle.THIN);
//        centeredStyle.setTopBorderColor(IndexedColors.BLACK.getIndex());
//        centeredStyle.setBorderBottom(BorderStyle.THIN);
//        centeredStyle.setBottomBorderColor(IndexedColors.BLACK.getIndex());
//        centeredStyle.setBorderLeft(BorderStyle.THIN);
//        centeredStyle.setLeftBorderColor(IndexedColors.BLACK.getIndex());
//        centeredStyle.setBorderRight(BorderStyle.THIN);
//        centeredStyle.setRightBorderColor(IndexedColors.BLACK.getIndex());
        // 设置标题行
        Row titleRow = sheet.createRow(0);
        titleRow.createCell(0).setCellValue("会议信息");
        sheet.addMergedRegion(new CellRangeAddress(0, 0, 0, 5));
//        titleRow.setRowStyle(centeredStyle);
        int rowIndex = 1;
        // 填充会议基本信息
        createMergedCell(sheet, rowIndex++, "会议主题:", getString(meetingInfo.get("name")));
        System.out.println("name"+getString(meetingInfo.get("name")));
        createMergedCell(sheet, rowIndex++, "会议地点:", getString(meetingInfo.get("locationName")));
        System.out.println("locationName"+getString(meetingInfo.get("locationName")));
        Date startTime = (Date) meetingInfo.get("startTime");
        Date endTime = (Date) meetingInfo.get("endTime");
        String startTimeStr = DateUtil.format(startTime, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss");
        String endTimeStr = DateUtil.format(endTime, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss");
        String formattedTime = "";
        if (startTimeStr != null && endTimeStr != null) {
            formattedTime = formatDate(startTimeStr) + " - " + formatDate(endTimeStr);
        }
        createMergedCell(sheet, rowIndex++, "会议时间:", formattedTime);
        Map<String, Object> initiatorObj = BeanUtil.beanToMap(meetingInfo.get("initiator"));
        String initiatorName = getString(((Map<?, ?>) initiatorObj).get("nickName"));
        createMergedCell(sheet, rowIndex++, "发起人:", initiatorName);
        createMergedCell(sheet, rowIndex++, "会议内容:", getString(meetingInfo.get("details")));
        int items = rowIndex++;
        Row headRow = sheet.createRow(items);
        headRow.createCell(0).setCellValue("参会情况");
        sheet.addMergedRegion(new CellRangeAddress(items, items, 0, 5));
        // 应用样式到单元格
        headRow.setRowStyle(centeredStyle);
        // 表头
        Row headerRow = sheet.createRow(rowIndex++);
        String[] headers = {"序号", "姓名", "教职工号", "所在院系/部门", "签到状态", "签到时间"};
        for (int i = 0; i < headers.length; i++) {
            headerRow.createCell(i).setCellValue(headers[i]);
        }
        // 数据填充
        int index = 1;
        CellStyle dateCellStyle = createDateCellStyle(workbook);
        for (Map<String, Object> item : meetingItems) {
            Row dataRow = sheet.createRow(rowIndex++);
            dataRow.createCell(0).setCellValue(index++); // 序号
            dataRow.createCell(1).setCellValue(getString(item.get("nickName"))); // 姓名
            dataRow.createCell(2).setCellValue(getString(item.get("userName"))); // 教职工号
            Object deptObj = item.get("dept");
            String deptName = "";
            if (deptObj instanceof SysDept) {
                deptName = ((SysDept) deptObj).getDeptName();
            }
            dataRow.createCell(3).setCellValue(deptName); // 所在院系/部门
            dataRow.createCell(4).setCellValue(getStateDescription(getString(item.get("signInStatus")))); // 签到状态
            Cell timeCell = dataRow.createCell(5);
            Date signinTime = (Date) item.get("signInTime");
            if (signinTime != null) {
                try {
                    timeCell.setCellValue(DateUtil.format(signinTime, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"));
                } catch (Exception ignored) {}
                timeCell.setCellStyle(dateCellStyle);
            }
        }
        // 自动调整列宽
        for (int i = 0; i < headers.length; i++) {
            sheet.autoSizeColumn(i); // 对第i列进行宽度自适应
            // 设置最小宽度为23个字符宽度
            sheet.setColumnWidth(i, Math.max(sheet.getColumnWidth(i), 23 * 256));
        }
        // 写出到输出流
        workbook.write(outputStream);
        workbook.close();
    }
    private void createMergedCell(Sheet sheet, int rowIndex, String label, String value) {
        Row row = sheet.createRow(rowIndex);
        row.createCell(0).setCellValue(label);
        row.createCell(1).setCellValue(value);
        // 仅合并标签（0）和值（1）所在的列，避免覆盖其他列
        sheet.addMergedRegion(new CellRangeAddress(rowIndex, rowIndex, 1, 5));
    }
    private String getString(Object obj) {
        return obj == null ? "" : Objects.toString(obj);
    }
    private String formatDate(String datetime) {
        if (datetime == null || datetime.isEmpty()) return "";
        try {
            long timestamp = Long.parseLong(datetime);
            return new SimpleDateFormat("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss").format(new Date(timestamp));
        } catch (NumberFormatException e) {
            return datetime; // 已经是字符串格式的时间，直接返回
        }
    }
    private CellStyle createDateCellStyle(Workbook workbook) {
        CellStyle cellStyle = workbook.createCellStyle();
        DataFormat format = workbook.createDataFormat();
        cellStyle.setDataFormat(format.getFormat("yyyy-mm-dd hh:mm:ss"));
        return cellStyle;
    }
    private String getStateDescription(String state) {
        if (state == null) return "";
        switch (state) {
            case "0": return "未到";
            case "1": return "已到";
            case "2": return "迟到";
            case "3": return "请假";
            default: return "";
        }
    }
}

import com.chenrise.system.api.domain.SysDept;
import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonInclude;
import java.io.Serializable;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.stream.Collectors;
public class MyTreeSelect implements Serializable {
    private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;
    /**  节点ID */
    private Long id;
    /** 节点名称 */
    private String label;
    /** 父节点id */
    private Long parentId;
    /**  子节点   */
    @JsonInclude(JsonInclude.Include.NON_EMPTY)
    private List<MyTreeSelect> children;
    public MyTreeSelect() {
    }
    public Long getId() {
        return id;
    }
    public void setId(Long id) {
        this.id = id;
    }
    public String getLabel() {
        return label;
    }
    public void setLabel(String label) {
        this.label = label;
    }
    public List<MyTreeSelect> getChildren() {
        return children;
    }
    public void setChildren(List<MyTreeSelect> children) {
        this.children = children;
    }
    public Long getParentId() {
        return parentId;
    }
    public void setParentId(Long parentId) {
        this.parentId = parentId;
    }
}

            .toString();

package com.chenrise.jufe.domain;
import com.chenrise.common.core.annotation.Excel;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.BaseEntity;
import org.apache.commons.lang3.builder.ToStringBuilder;
import org.apache.commons.lang3.builder.ToStringStyle;
import javax.validation.constraints.NotBlank;
import javax.validation.constraints.Size;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
/**
 * 楼栋对象 school_location
 *
 * @author chenfang
 * @date 2022-11-21
 */
public class SchoolLocation extends BaseEntity
{
    private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;
    /** 楼栋id */
    private Long locationId;
    /** 楼栋名称 */
    @Excel(name = "名称")
    private String locationName;
    /** 父级id */
    private Long parentId;
    /** 父级名称 */
    private String parentName;
    /** 祖级列表 */
    private String ancestors;
    /** 楼层数 */
    private Long locationFloor;
    /** 别名 */
    @Excel(name = "别名")
    private String anotherName;
    /** 负责人id */
    private Long userId;
    /** 负责人集合 */
    private Long[] principal;
    /** 负责人名称 */
    @Excel(name = "负责人")
    private String userName;
    /** 删除状态 1删除 0正常 */
    private Long delFlag;
    /** 部门id */
    private Long deptId;
    /** 部门id */
    private Long localtionNum;
    /** 数据权限 */
    @Excel(name = "数据权限",readConverterExp = "1=对接,2=自建")
    private String dataSources;
    public Long getLocaltionNum() {
        return localtionNum;
    }
    public void setLocaltionNum(Long localtionNum) {
        this.localtionNum = localtionNum;
    }
    /** 子部门 */
    private List<SchoolLocation> children = new ArrayList<SchoolLocation>();
    /** id集合 */
    private Long[] ids;
    public Long[] getIds() {
        return ids;
    }
    public void setIds(Long[] ids) {
        this.ids = ids;
    }
    public void setLocationId(Long locationId)
    {
        this.locationId = locationId;
    }
    public Long getLocationId()
    {
        return locationId;
    }
    public void setLocationName(String locationName)
    {
        this.locationName = locationName;
    }
    @NotBlank(message = "楼栋名称不能为空")
    @Size(max = 20, message = "楼栋名称长度不能超过20个字符")
    public String getLocationName()
    {
        return locationName;
    }
    public void setAnotherName(String anotherName)
    {
        this.anotherName = anotherName;
    }
    public Long getParentId() {return parentId;}
    public void setParentId(Long parentId) {this.parentId = parentId;}
    public String getAncestors() {return ancestors;}
    public void setAncestors(String ancestors) {this.ancestors = ancestors;}
    @NotBlank(message = "别名不能为空")
    @Size(max = 20, message = "别名长度不能超过20个字符")
    public String getAnotherName()
    {
        return anotherName;
    }
    public void setUserId(Long userId)
    {
        this.userId = userId;
    }
    public Long getUserId()
    {
        return userId;
    }
    public void setUserName(String userName)
    {
        this.userName = userName;
    }
    @NotBlank(message = "负责人名称不能为空")
    @Size(max = 20, message = "负责人名称长度不能超过20个字符")
    public String getUserName()
    {
        return userName;
    }
    public void setDelFlag(Long delFlag)
    {
        this.delFlag = delFlag;
    }
    public Long getDelFlag()
    {
        return delFlag;
    }
    public void setDeptId(Long deptId)
    {
        this.deptId = deptId;
    }
    public Long getDeptId()
    {
        return deptId;
    }
    public List<SchoolLocation> getChildren()
    {
        return children;
    }
    public void setChildren(List<SchoolLocation> children)
    {
        this.children = children;
    }
    public Long[] getPrincipal() {
        return principal;
    }
    public void setPrincipal(Long[] principal) {
        this.principal = principal;
    }
    public String getDataSources() {
        return dataSources;
    }
    public void setDataSources(String dataSources) {
        this.dataSources = dataSources;
    }
    public Long getLocationFloor() {return locationFloor;}
    public void setLocationFloor(Long locationFloor) {this.locationFloor = locationFloor;}
    public String getParentName() {return parentName;}
    public void setParentName(String parentName) {this.parentName = parentName;}
    @Override
    public String toString() {
        return new ToStringBuilder(this,ToStringStyle.MULTI_LINE_STYLE)
                .append("locationId", getLocationId())
                .append("locationName", getLocationName())
                .append("parentId", getParentId())
                .append("parentName", getParentName())
                .append("ancestors", getAncestors())
                .append("locationFloor", getLocationFloor())
                .append("anotherName", getAnotherName())
                .append("userId", getUserId())
                .append("userName", getUserName())
                .append("createBy", getCreateBy())
                .append("createTime", getCreateTime())
                .append("updateBy", getUpdateBy())
                .append("updateTime", getUpdateTime())
                .append("remark", getRemark())
                .append("delFlag", getDelFlag())
                .append("dataSources", getDataSources())
                .append("ids", getIds())
                .append("deptId", getDeptId())
                .toString();
    }
}

/**
 * 负责人楼栋关联对象 school_location_charge_ref
 * 
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2022-12-08
 */
public class SchoolLocationChargeRef extends BaseEntity
{
    private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;
    /** 主键 */
    private Long id;
    /** 负责人id */
    @Excel(name = "负责人id")
    private Long chargeUserId;
    /** 位置id */
    @Excel(name = "位置id")
    private Long locationId;
    /** 删除状态 0 正常 1删除 */
    private Long delFlag;
    public void setId(Long id) 
    {
        this.id = id;
    }
    public Long getId() 
    {
        return id;
    }
    public void setChargeUserId(Long chargeUserId) 
    {
        this.chargeUserId = chargeUserId;
    }
    public Long getChargeUserId() 
    {
        return chargeUserId;
    }
    public void setLocationId(Long locationId) 
    {
        this.locationId = locationId;
    }
    public Long getLocationId() 
    {
        return locationId;
    }
    public void setDelFlag(Long delFlag) 
    {
        this.delFlag = delFlag;
    }
    public Long getDelFlag() 
    {
        return delFlag;
    }
    @Override
    public String toString() {
        return new ToStringBuilder(this, ToStringStyle.MULTI_LINE_STYLE)
            .append("id", getId())
            .append("chargeUserId", getChargeUserId())
            .append("locationId", getLocationId())
            .append("delFlag", getDelFlag())
            .toString();
    }
}

public class SchoolNoticeInfo extends BaseEntity

    @Excel(name = "发布人名称")

    /** 发布状态 （1待发布  2已发布  3 取消发布）字典（release_status） */
    @Excel(name = "发布状态 ", readConverterExp = "1=待发布,2=已发布,3=,取=消发布")
    private String releaseStatus;
    @Dict("sys_yes_no")
    private String topping;
    /** 通知等级 */
    @Excel(name = "通知等级")
    private Float noticeLevel;
    /** 创建时间 */
    @JsonFormat(pattern = "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")
    @Excel(name = "创建时间", width = 30, dateFormat = "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")
    private Date addTime;
    /** 发布时间 */
    @JsonFormat(pattern = "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")
    @Excel(name = "发布时间", width = 30, dateFormat = "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")
    private Date releaseTime;
    /** 结束时间 */
    @JsonFormat(pattern = "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")
    @Excel(name = "结束时间", width = 30, dateFormat = "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")
    private Date endTime;
    /** 添加人名称 */
    @Excel(name = "添加人名称")
    private Long createById;
    /** 修改人名称 */
    @Excel(name = "修改人名称")
    private Long updateById;
    /** 是否删除 0正常 1删除 */
    private Long delFlag;
    /** 房间idList */
    private List<String> roomIds;
    private String boardName;
    private String picUrl;
    private String videoUrl;
    public String getTopping() {
        return topping;
    }
    public void setTopping(String topping) {
        this.topping = topping;
    }
    public String getPicUrl() {
        return picUrl;
    }
    public void setPicUrl(String picUrl) {
        this.picUrl = picUrl;
    }
    public String getVideoUrl() {
        return videoUrl;
    }
    public void setVideoUrl(String videoUrl) {
        this.videoUrl = videoUrl;
    }
    public void setNoticeId(Long noticeId)
    {
        this.noticeId = noticeId;
    }
    public Long getNoticeId()
    {
        return noticeId;
    }
    public void setNoticeName(String noticeName)
    {
        this.noticeName = noticeName;
    }
    public String getNoticeName()
    {
        return noticeName;
    }
    public void setNoticeInfo(String noticeInfo)
    {
        this.noticeInfo = noticeInfo;
    }
    public String getNoticeInfo()
    {
        return noticeInfo;
    }
    public void setReleaseUserId(String releaseUserId)
    {
        this.releaseUserId = releaseUserId;
    }
    public String getReleaseUserId()
    {
        return releaseUserId;
    }
    public void setReleaseUserName(String releaseUserName)
    {
        this.releaseUserName = releaseUserName;
    }
    public String getReleaseUserName()
    {
        return releaseUserName;
    }
    public void setReleaseStatus(String releaseStatus)
    {
        this.releaseStatus = releaseStatus;
    }
    public String getReleaseStatus()
    {
        return releaseStatus;
    }
    public Float getNoticeLevel() {
        return noticeLevel;
    }
    public void setNoticeLevel(Float noticeLevel) {
        this.noticeLevel = noticeLevel;
    }
    public void setAddTime(Date addTime)
    {
        this.addTime = addTime;
    }
    public Date getAddTime()
    {
        return addTime;
    }
    public void setReleaseTime(Date releaseTime)
    {
        this.releaseTime = releaseTime;
    }
    public Date getReleaseTime()
    {
        return releaseTime;
    }
    public void setCreateById(Long createById)
    {
        this.createById = createById;
    }
    public Long getCreateById()
    {
        return createById;
    }
    public void setUpdateById(Long updateById)
    {
        this.updateById = updateById;
    }
    public Long getUpdateById()
    {
        return updateById;
    }
    public void setDelFlag(Long delFlag)
    {
        this.delFlag = delFlag;
    }
    public Long getDelFlag()
    {
        return delFlag;
    }
    public Date getEndTime() {return endTime;}
    public void setEndTime(Date endTime) {this.endTime = endTime;}
    public List<String> getRoomIds() {
        return roomIds;
    }
    public void setRoomIds(List<String> roomIds) {
        this.roomIds = roomIds;
    }
    public String getBoardName() {
        return boardName;
    }
    public void setBoardName(String boardName) {
        this.boardName = boardName;
    }
    @Override
    public String toString() {
        return new ToStringBuilder(this, ToStringStyle.MULTI_LINE_STYLE)
                .append("noticeId", getNoticeId())
                .append("noticeName", getNoticeName())
                .append("noticeInfo", getNoticeInfo())
                .append("releaseUserId", getReleaseUserId())
                .append("releaseUserName", getReleaseUserName())
                .append("releaseStatus", getReleaseStatus())
                .append("noticeLevel", getNoticeLevel())
                .append("addTime", getAddTime())
                .append("releaseTime", getReleaseTime())
                .append("createBy", getCreateBy())
                .append("createById", getCreateById())
                .append("createTime", getCreateTime())
                .append("updateBy", getUpdateBy())
                .append("updateById", getUpdateById())
                .append("updateTime", getUpdateTime())
                .append("remark", getRemark())
                .append("delFlag", getDelFlag())
                .append("boardName", getBoardName())
                .append("endTime", getEndTime())
                .toString();
    }
}

    @Excel(name = "申请时间", dateFormat = "yyyy-MM-dd  HH:mm:ss",sort = 3)
    private Date reservationTime;
    /** 预约审批设置*/
    @Dict("approval_type")
    @Excel(name="审批方式",readConverterExp="1=手动审批,2=自动审批",sort=8)
    private String approvalType;
    /** 审批状态 1 待审批  2审批通过 3审批驳回  */
    @Excel(name = "状态",readConverterExp = "1=待审批,2=已通过,3=已拒绝,4=已取消,5=已失效",sort=9)
    @Dict("approval_status")
    private String approvalStatus;
    /** 审批人id */
    private Long approvalUserId;
    /** 审批时间 */
    @JsonFormat(pattern = "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")
    private Date approvalTime;

    private String approvalUserName;
    /** 审批意见 */

    private String reservationTimeInfo;

    private Long updateById;
    /** 删除状态  1删除 0正常 */
    private Long delFlag;
    /** 部门id */
    private Long deptId;
    /** 预约取消类型 1主动退订 2课表占用（全部时间段被占用则主单取消） */
    private String reservationCancelType;
    /** 预约取消原因 */
    private String reservationCancelReason;
    /** 预约人openId */
    private String userOpenId;
    /**  部门*/
    @Excel(name = "预约部门",sort = 5)
    private String deptName;
    private Long[] ids;
    private String [] timeRanges;
    private List<DevLockInfo> locks;
    //冗余字段，用于小程序接口，标记我的申请还是我审核的
    private String approval;
    //冗余字段 开锁范围 取所有锁中最小的
    private Integer openRange;
    /**
     * 是否课表占用  0未占用 1占用
     * */
    private String courseUse;
    List<SchoolReservationTimeInfo> timeInfoList;
    /**
    * 是否签到  0未签到 1已签到
    * */
    @Excel(name="签到",readConverterExp = "0=未签到,1=已签到",sort = 10)
    private String signFlag;
    private String inBlack;
    /** 房间类型 (1实验楼 2实训楼) */
    @Dict("room_type")
    private String roomType;
}

import java.util.Date;

/**
 * 预约信息中时间段选择对象 school_reservation_time_info
 *
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2022-12-03
 */
public class SchoolReservationTimeInfo extends BaseEntity
{
    private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;
    /** 主键id */
    private Long id;

    @Excel(name = "房间id")

    @Excel(name = "预约开始时间", width = 30)
    private String reservationStartTime;
    /** 预约结束时间 */
    @Excel(name = "预约结束时间", width = 30)
    private String reservationEndTime;
    /** 是否被课表占用  0未占用 1已占用 字典is_or_not */
    @Excel(name = "是否被课表占用  0未占用 1已占用 字典is_or_not")
    @Dict("is_or_not")
    private String occupyStatus;
    /** 创建人id */
    @Excel(name = "创建人id")
    private Long createById;
    /** 更新人id */
    @Excel(name = "更新人id")
    private Long updateById;
    /** 删除状态 0正常 1删除 */
    private Long delFlag;
    /** 部门id */
    @Excel(name = "部门id")
    private Long deptId;
    public void setId(Long id)
    {
        this.id = id;
    }
    public Long getId()
    {
        return id;
    }
    public void setReservationId(Long reservationId)
    {
        this.reservationId = reservationId;
    }
    public Long getReservationId()
    {
        return reservationId;
    }
    public void setRoomId(Long roomId)
    {
        this.roomId = roomId;
    }
    public Long getRoomId()
    {
        return roomId;
    }
    public String getReservationStartTime() {
        return reservationStartTime;
    }
    public void setReservationStartTime(String reservationStartTime) {
        this.reservationStartTime = reservationStartTime;
    }
    public String getReservationEndTime() {
        return reservationEndTime;
    }
    public void setReservationEndTime(String reservationEndTime) {
        this.reservationEndTime = reservationEndTime;
    }
    public void setOccupyStatus(String occupyStatus)
    {
        this.occupyStatus = occupyStatus;
    }
    public String getOccupyStatus()
    {
        return occupyStatus;
    }
    public void setCreateById(Long createById)
    {
        this.createById = createById;
    }
    public Long getCreateById()
    {
        return createById;
    }
    public void setUpdateById(Long updateById)
    {
        this.updateById = updateById;
    }
    public Long getUpdateById()
    {
        return updateById;
    }
    public void setDelFlag(Long delFlag)
    {
        this.delFlag = delFlag;
    }
    public Long getDelFlag()
    {
        return delFlag;
    }
    public void setDeptId(Long deptId)
    {
        this.deptId = deptId;
    }
    public Long getDeptId()
    {
        return deptId;
    }
    @Override
    public String toString() {
        return new ToStringBuilder(this, ToStringStyle.MULTI_LINE_STYLE)
            .append("id", getId())
            .append("reservationId", getReservationId())
            .append("roomId", getRoomId())
            .append("reservationStartTime", getReservationStartTime())
            .append("reservationEndTime", getReservationEndTime())
            .append("occupyStatus", getOccupyStatus())
            .append("createById", getCreateById())
            .append("createBy", getCreateBy())
            .append("createTime", getCreateTime())
            .append("updateById", getUpdateById())
            .append("updateBy", getUpdateBy())
            .append("updateTime", getUpdateTime())
            .append("delFlag", getDelFlag())
            .append("deptId", getDeptId())
            .toString();
    }

package com.chenrise.jufe.domain;
import com.chenrise.common.core.annotation.Dict;

import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonFormat;
import lombok.Data;
import java.util.Date;
/**
 * 房间对象 school_room
 *
 * @author liyiying
 * @date 2022-11-24
 */
@Data
public class SchoolRoom extends BaseEntity
{
    private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;
    /** id */
    private Long roomId;
    /** 房间编号 */
    @Excel(name = "房间编号")
    private String roomCode;
    /**
     * 同步房间编号
     */
    private String syncRoomCode;
    /** 房间名称 */
    @Excel(name = "房间名称")
    private String roomName;
    /** 房间别名 */
    @Excel(name = "房间别名")
    private String roomBm;
    /** 楼群 */
    @Excel(name = "楼群")
    private String buildings;
    /** 楼层 */
    @Excel(name = "楼层")
    private Long floor;
    /** 面积 */
    @Excel(name = "面积")
    private Long square;
    /** 座位数 */
    @Excel(name = "座位数")
    private Long seatNum;
    /** 电脑数 */
    @Excel(name = "电脑数")
    private Long computersNum;
    /** 多媒体( 1是 0否) */
    @Excel(name = "多媒体( 1是 0否)")
    private String isMultimedia;
    /** 是否复用( 1是 0否) */
    @Excel(name = "是否复用( 1是 0否)")
    private String isMultiplex;
    /** 是否排课( 1是 0否) */
    @Excel(name = "是否排课( 1是 0否)")
    private String isSchedule;
    /** 单位代码 */
    @Excel(name = "单位代码")
    private String unitCode;
    /** 类别 */
    @Excel(name = "类别")
    private String category;
    /** 子类别 */
    @Excel(name = "子类别")
    private String categorySub;
    /** 使用 */
    @Excel(name = "使用")
    private String useInfo;
    /** 使用计划 */
    @Excel(name = "使用计划")
    private String usePlan;
    /** 创建人id */
    @Excel(name = "创建人id")
    private Long createById;
    /** 更新人id */
    @Excel(name = "更新人id")
    private Long updateById;
    /** 来源 (1 数据对接 2本地添加) */
    @Excel(name = "来源 (1 数据对接 2本地添加)")
    private String sourceType;
    /** 房间类型 (1实验楼 2实训楼) */
    @Excel(name = "房间类型 (1公共教室 2特殊教室)")
    @Dict("room_type")
    private String roomType;
    /** 是否可预约 (1可预约 2不可预约 默认为不可预约) */
    @Excel(name = "是否可预约 (1可预约 2不可预约 默认为不可预约)")
    @Dict("is_reservation")
    private String isReservation;
    /**
     * 可预约开始时间
     * */
    @JsonFormat(pattern = "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")
    private Date reservationStart;
    /**
     * 可预约结束时间
     * */
    @JsonFormat(pattern = "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")
    private Date reservationEnd;
    /** 预约时间段 */
    @Excel(name = "预约时间段")
    private String reservationTimeInfo;

    private String audioUrl;

    @Excel(name = "上传人名称")
    private String uploadUserName;
    /** 播放时间 （默认是null则不进行定时播放） */
    @Excel(name = "播放时间 ", readConverterExp = "默=认是null则不进行定时播放")
    private Date runTime;

    @Excel(name = "创建人id")

    @Excel(name = "部门")
    private Long deptId;
    /** 是否删除 （0删除 ，1正常） */
    private Long delFlag;
}

/**
 * 负责人房间关联对象 school_room_charge_ref
 * 
 * @author liyiying
 * @date 2022-11-25

public class SchoolRoomChargeRef extends BaseEntity
{

    private Long id;

    @Excel(name = "房间id")

    private Long delFlag;

    {
        this.id = id;
    }

    {
        return id;
    }
    public void setChargeUserId(Long chargeUserId)

        this.chargeUserId = chargeUserId;

    {
        this.delFlag = delFlag;
    }

    {
        return delFlag;
    }

        return new ToStringBuilder(this, ToStringStyle.MULTI_LINE_STYLE)
            .append("id", getId())
            .append("chargeUserId", getChargeUserId())
            .append("roomId", getRoomId())
            .append("delFlag", getDelFlag())
            .toString();
    }

public class SchoolRoomUseTime extends BaseEntity
{

    private Long userTimeId;

    @Excel(name = "结束时间")
    private String endTimeInfo;
    /** 创建人id */
    @Excel(name = "创建人id")
    private Long createById;
    /** 更新人id */
    @Excel(name = "更新人id")
    private Long updateById;
    /** 删除状态 1删除 0正常 */
    private Long delFlag;
    /** 部门id */
    @Excel(name = "部门id")
    private Long deptId;
    public void setUserTimeId(Long userTimeId)
    {
        this.userTimeId = userTimeId;
    }
    public Long getUserTimeId()
    {
        return userTimeId;
    }
    public void setRoomId(Long roomId)
    {
        this.roomId = roomId;
    }
    public Long getRoomId()
    {
        return roomId;
    }
    public void setWeekDay(String weekDay)
    {
        this.weekDay = weekDay;
    }
    public String getWeekDay()
    {
        return weekDay;
    }
    public void setStartTimeInfo(String startTimeInfo)
    {
        this.startTimeInfo = startTimeInfo;
    }
    public String getStartTimeInfo()
    {
        return startTimeInfo;
    }
    public void setEndTimeInfo(String endTimeInfo)
    {
        this.endTimeInfo = endTimeInfo;
    }
    public String getEndTimeInfo()
    {
        return endTimeInfo;
    }
    public void setCreateById(Long createById)
    {
        this.createById = createById;
    }
    public Long getCreateById()
    {
        return createById;
    }
    public void setUpdateById(Long updateById)
    {
        this.updateById = updateById;
    }
    public Long getUpdateById()
    {
        return updateById;
    }
    public void setDelFlag(Long delFlag)
    {
        this.delFlag = delFlag;
    }
    public Long getDelFlag()
    {
        return delFlag;
    }
    public void setDeptId(Long deptId)
    {
        this.deptId = deptId;
    }
    public Long getDeptId()
    {
        return deptId;
    }
    @Override
    public String toString() {
        return new ToStringBuilder(this, ToStringStyle.MULTI_LINE_STYLE)
            .append("userTimeId", getUserTimeId())
            .append("roomId", getRoomId())
            .append("weekDay", getWeekDay())
            .append("startTimeInfo", getStartTimeInfo())
            .append("endTimeInfo", getEndTimeInfo())
            .append("createById", getCreateById())
            .append("createBy", getCreateBy())
            .append("createTime", getCreateTime())
            .append("updateById", getUpdateById())
            .append("updateBy", getUpdateBy())
            .append("updateTime", getUpdateTime())
            .append("delFlag", getDelFlag())
            .append("remark", getRemark())
            .append("deptId", getDeptId())
            .toString();
    }
}

        this.password = password;

            .append("collegeName", getCollegeName())
            .append("picUrl", getPicUrl())

            .append("delFlag", getDelFlag())

            .append("stuType", getStuType())
            .append("address", getAddress())

            .toString();

    /** 部门id */
    private Long deptId;
    /** 删除状态 0正常 1删除 */
    private Long delFlag;
    /** 班级编号 */
    private String classCode;
    /** 密码 */
    private String password;
    /** 住址 */
    private String address;
    /** 数据来源 */
    private String dataSources;
    /**  微信小程序openId*/
    private String openId;
    public String getOpenId() {
        return openId;
    }
    public void setOpenId(String openId) {
        this.openId = openId;
    }
    public void setStuId(Long stuId)
    {
        this.stuId = stuId;
    }
    public Long getStuId()
    {
        return stuId;
    }
    public void setStuNum(String stuNum)
    {
        this.stuNum = stuNum;
    }
    @NotBlank(message = "学号不能为空")
    @Size(max = 16,min = 6,message = "学号长度不能低于6，不能高于16")
    public String getStuNum()
    {
        return stuNum;
    }
    public void setStuName(String stuName)
    {
        this.stuName = stuName;
    }
    @NotBlank(message = "姓名不能为空")
    @Size(max = 30, message = "姓名长度不能超过30个字符")
    public String getStuName()
    {
        return stuName;
    }
    public void setIdCard(String idCard)
    {
        this.idCard = idCard;
    }
    public String getIdCard()
    {
        return idCard;
    }
    public void setSex(String sex)
    {
        this.sex = sex;
    }
    public String getSex()
    {
        return sex;
    }
    public void setPhoneNum(String phoneNum)
    {
        this.phoneNum = phoneNum;
    }
    public String getPhoneNum()
    {
        return phoneNum;
    }
    public void setStuDeptId(Long stuDeptId)
    {
        this.stuDeptId = stuDeptId;
    }
    public Long getStuDeptId()
    {
        return stuDeptId;
    }
    public void setStuDeptName(String stuDeptName)
    {
        this.stuDeptName = stuDeptName;
    }
    @NotBlank(message = "所在院系/部门名称不能为空")
    public String getStuDeptName()
    {
        return stuDeptName;
    }
    public void setCollegeCode(String collegeCode)
    {
        this.collegeCode = collegeCode;
    }
    public String getCollegeCode()
    {
        return collegeCode;
    }
    public void setCollegeName(String collegeName)
    {
        this.collegeName = collegeName;
    }
    public String getCollegeName()
    {
        return collegeName;
    }
    public void setPicUrl(String picUrl)
    {
        this.picUrl = picUrl;
    }
    public String getPicUrl()
    {
        return picUrl;
    }
    public void setCreateById(Long createById)
    {
        this.createById = createById;
    }
    public Long getCreateById()
    {
        return createById;
    }
    public void setIntoYear(String intoYear)
    {
        this.intoYear = intoYear;
    }
    public String getIntoYear()
    {
        return intoYear;
    }
    public void setUpdateById(Long updateById)
    {
        this.updateById = updateById;
    }
    public Long getUpdateById()
    {
        return updateById;
    }
    public void setDeptId(Long deptId)
    {
        this.deptId = deptId;
    }
    public Long getDeptId()
    {
        return deptId;
    }
    public void setDelFlag(Long delFlag)
    {
        this.delFlag = delFlag;
    }
    public Long getDelFlag()
    {
        return delFlag;
    }
    public void setClassCode(String classCode)
    {
        this.classCode = classCode;
    }
    public String getClassCode()
    {
        return classCode;
    }
    public void setClassName(String className)
    {
        this.className = className;
    }
    public String getClassName()
    {
        return className;
    }
    public void setStuType(String stuType)
    {
        this.stuType = stuType;
    }
    @NotBlank(message = "学生类型不能为空")
    public String getStuType()
    {
        return stuType;
    }
    public void setPassword(String password)
    {
        this.password = password;
    }
    public String getPassword()
    {
        return password;
    }
    public String getAddress() {return address;}
    public void setAddress(String address) {this.address = address;}
    public String getDataSources() {return dataSources;}
    public void setDataSources(String dataSources) {this.dataSources = dataSources;}
    @Override
    public String toString() {
        return new ToStringBuilder(this, ToStringStyle.MULTI_LINE_STYLE)
            .append("stuId", getStuId())
            .append("stuNum", getStuNum())
            .append("stuName", getStuName())
            .append("idCard", getIdCard())
            .append("sex", getSex())
            .append("phoneNum", getPhoneNum())
            .append("stuDeptId", getStuDeptId())
            .append("stuDeptName", getStuDeptName())
            .append("collegeCode", getCollegeCode())
            .append("collegeName", getCollegeName())
            .append("picUrl", getPicUrl())
            .append("createById", getCreateById())
            .append("createBy", getCreateBy())
            .append("intoYear", getIntoYear())
            .append("createTime", getCreateTime())
            .append("updateById", getUpdateById())
            .append("updateBy", getUpdateBy())
            .append("updateTime", getUpdateTime())
            .append("deptId", getDeptId())
            .append("delFlag", getDelFlag())
            .append("classCode", getClassCode())
            .append("className", getClassName())
            .append("stuType", getStuType())
            .append("address", getAddress())
            .append("dataSources", getDataSources())
            .append("password", getPassword())
            .toString();
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.domain;
import java.util.Date;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.BaseEntity;
import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonFormat;

import lombok.Data;
import org.apache.commons.lang3.builder.ToStringBuilder;
import org.apache.commons.lang3.builder.ToStringStyle;
/**
 * 任务周期信息对象 school_task_cycle_info
 * 
 * @author sunming
 * @date 2022-11-29
 */
@Data
public class SchoolTaskCycleInfo extends BaseEntity
{
    private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;
    /** 主键id */
    private Long infoId;
    /** 任务id */
    @Excel(name = "任务id")
    private Long taskId;
    /** 任务周期 1每天 2每周 3自定义 */
    @Excel(name = "任务周期 1每天 2每周 3自定义")
    private String taskCycle;
    /** 执行周期开始日期 */
    @JsonFormat(pattern = "yyyy-MM-dd")
    @Excel(name = "执行周期开始日期", width = 30, dateFormat = "yyyy-MM-dd")
    private Date taskCycleStartDate;
    /** 执行周期结束日期 */
    @JsonFormat(pattern = "yyyy-MM-dd")
    @Excel(name = "执行周期结束日期", width = 30, dateFormat = "yyyy-MM-dd")
    private Date taskCycleEndDate;
    /** 周几 */
    @Excel(name = "周几")
    private Long weekDay;
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.domain;
import java.util.Date;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.BaseEntity;
import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonFormat;
import com.chenrise.common.core.annotation.Excel;
import org.apache.commons.lang3.builder.ToStringBuilder;
import org.apache.commons.lang3.builder.ToStringStyle;
/**
 * 任务信息主对象 school_task_info
 * 
 * @author sunming
 * @date 2022-11-30
 */
public class SchoolTaskInfo extends BaseEntity
{
    private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;
    /** 主键id */
    private Long taskId;
    /** 任务名称 */
    @Excel(name = "任务名称")
    private String taskName;
    /** 任务周期 1每天 2每周 3自定义 */
    @Excel(name = "任务周期 1每天 2每周 3自定义")
    private String taskCycle;
    /** 任务开始执行日期 */
    @JsonFormat(pattern = "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")
    @Excel(name = "任务开始执行日期", width = 30, dateFormat = "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")
    private Date taskStartTime;
    /** 任务结束执行日期 */
    @JsonFormat(pattern = "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")
    @Excel(name = "任务结束执行日期", width = 30, dateFormat = "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")
    private Date taskEndTime;
    /** 任务状态 1未执行 2执行中 3执行结束 4强制结束 */
    @Excel(name = "任务状态 1未执行 2执行中 3执行结束 4强制结束")
    private String taskStatus;
    /** 创建人id */
    @Excel(name = "创建人id")
    private Long createById;
    /** 更新人id */
    @Excel(name = "更新人id")
    private Long updateById;
    /** 是否删除 0正常 1删除 */
    private Long delFlag;
    /** 权限部门id */
    @Excel(name = "权限部门id")
    private Long deptId;
    public void setTaskId(Long taskId) 
    {
        this.taskId = taskId;
    }
    public Long getTaskId() 
    {
        return taskId;
    }
    public void setTaskName(String taskName) 
    {
        this.taskName = taskName;
    }
    public String getTaskName() 
    {
        return taskName;
    }
    public void setTaskCycle(String taskCycle) 
    {
        this.taskCycle = taskCycle;
    }
    public String getTaskCycle() 
    {
        return taskCycle;
    }
    public void setTaskStartTime(Date taskStartTime) 
    {
        this.taskStartTime = taskStartTime;
    }
    public Date getTaskStartTime() 
    {
        return taskStartTime;
    }
    public void setTaskEndTime(Date taskEndTime) 
    {
        this.taskEndTime = taskEndTime;
    }
    public Date getTaskEndTime() 
    {
        return taskEndTime;
    }
    public void setTaskStatus(String taskStatus) 
    {
        this.taskStatus = taskStatus;
    }
    public String getTaskStatus() 
    {
        return taskStatus;
    }
    public void setCreateById(Long createById) 
    {
        this.createById = createById;
    }
    public Long getCreateById() 
    {
        return createById;
    }
    public void setUpdateById(Long updateById) 
    {
        this.updateById = updateById;
    }
    public Long getUpdateById() 
    {
        return updateById;
    }
    public void setDelFlag(Long delFlag) 
    {
        this.delFlag = delFlag;
    }
    public Long getDelFlag() 
    {
        return delFlag;
    }
    public void setDeptId(Long deptId) 
    {
        this.deptId = deptId;
    }
    public Long getDeptId() 
    {
        return deptId;
    }
    @Override
    public String toString() {
        return new ToStringBuilder(this, ToStringStyle.MULTI_LINE_STYLE)
            .append("taskId", getTaskId())
            .append("taskName", getTaskName())
            .append("taskCycle", getTaskCycle())
            .append("taskStartTime", getTaskStartTime())
            .append("taskEndTime", getTaskEndTime())
            .append("taskStatus", getTaskStatus())
            .append("remark", getRemark())
            .append("createById", getCreateById())
            .append("createBy", getCreateBy())
            .append("createTime", getCreateTime())
            .append("updateById", getUpdateById())
            .append("updateBy", getUpdateBy())
            .append("updateTime", getUpdateTime())
            .append("delFlag", getDelFlag())
            .append("deptId", getDeptId())
            .toString();
    }
}

package com.chenrise.jufe.domain;

public class SchoolTeaInfo extends BaseEntity

    private String userDeptName;
    /** 性别 1男 2女 3不详 */
    @Excel(name = "性别", combo = {"男", "女"}, readConverterExp = "1=男,2=女")
    private String sex;

    private String phoneNum;

    private Date changeStatusTime;
    private Long[] ids;
    public Long[] getIds() {
        return ids;
    }
    public void setIds(Long[] ids) {
        this.ids = ids;
    }
    public void setTeaUserId(Long teaUserId)
    {
        this.teaUserId = teaUserId;

    {
        return teaUserId;
    }

    {
        this.teaUserNum = teaUserNum;
    }
