    public String getTeaUserNum()
    {
        return teaUserNum;
    }
    public void setTeaUserName(String teaUserName)
    {
        this.teaUserName = teaUserName;
    }
    public String getTeaUserName()
    {
        return teaUserName;
    }
    public void setSex(String sex)
    {
        this.sex = sex;
    }
    public String getSex()
    {
        return sex;
    }
    public void setPhoneNum(String phoneNum)
    {
        this.phoneNum = phoneNum;
    }
    public String getPhoneNum()
    {
        return phoneNum;
    }
    public void setUserDeptId(Long userDeptId)
    {
        this.userDeptId = userDeptId;
    }
    public Long getUserDeptId()
    {
        return userDeptId;
    }
    public void setUserDeptName(String userDeptName)
    {
        this.userDeptName = userDeptName;
    }
    public String getUserDeptName()
    {
        return userDeptName;
    }
    public void setDeptId(Long deptId)
    {
        this.deptId = deptId;
    }
    public Long getDeptId()
    {
        return deptId;
    }
    public void setDelFlag(Long delFlag)
    {
        this.delFlag = delFlag;
    }
    public Long getDelFlag()
    {
        return delFlag;
    }
    public void setPassword(String password)
    {
        this.password = password;
    }
    public String getPassword()
    {
        return password;
    }
    public void setIdCard(String idCard)
    {
        this.idCard = idCard;
    }
    public String getIdCard()
    {
        return idCard;
    }
    public String getPicUrl() {return picUrl;}
    public void setPicUrl(String picUrl) {this.picUrl = picUrl;}
    public String getAddress() {return address;}
    public void setAddress(String address) {this.address = address;}
    public String getDataSources() {return dataSources;}
    public void setDataSources(String dataSources) {this.dataSources = dataSources;}
    public String getEmail() {return email;}
    public void setEmail(String email) {this.email = email;}
    public String getUpdateFlag() {
        return updateFlag;
    }
    public void setUpdateFlag(String updateFlag) {
        this.updateFlag = updateFlag;
    }
    public String getInSchoolStatus() {
        return inSchoolStatus;
    }
    public void setInSchoolStatus(String inSchoolStatus) {
        this.inSchoolStatus = inSchoolStatus;
    }
    public Date getChangeStatusTime() {
        return changeStatusTime;
    }
    public void setChangeStatusTime(Date changeStatusTime) {
        this.changeStatusTime = changeStatusTime;
    }
    @Override
    public String toString() {
        return new ToStringBuilder(this, ToStringStyle.MULTI_LINE_STYLE)
                .append("teaUserId", getTeaUserId())
                .append("teaUserNum", getTeaUserNum())
                .append("teaUserName", getTeaUserName())
                .append("sex", getSex())
                .append("phoneNum", getPhoneNum())
                .append("userDeptId", getUserDeptId())
                .append("userDeptName", getUserDeptName())
                .append("createById", getCreateById())
                .append("createBy", getCreateBy())
                .append("createTime", getCreateTime())
                .append("updateById", getUpdateById())
                .append("updateBy", getUpdateBy())
                .append("updateTime", getUpdateTime())
                .append("deptId", getDeptId())
                .append("delFlag", getDelFlag())
                .append("password", getPassword())
                .append("idCard", getIdCard())
                .append("address", getAddress())
                .append("dataSources", getDataSources())
                .append("email", getEmail())
                .append("picUrl", getPicUrl())
                .toString();
    }
}

    }
    public String getIdCard()
    {
        return idCard;
    }
    public String getPicUrl() {return picUrl;}
    public void setPicUrl(String picUrl) {this.picUrl = picUrl;}
    public String getAddress() {return address;}
    public void setAddress(String address) {this.address = address;}
    public String getDataSources() {return dataSources;}
    public void setDataSources(String dataSources) {this.dataSources = dataSources;}
    public String getEmail() {return email;}
    public void setEmail(String email) {this.email = email;}
    @Override
    public String toString() {
        return new ToStringBuilder(this, ToStringStyle.MULTI_LINE_STYLE)
                .append("teaUserId", getTeaUserId())
                .append("teaUserNum", getTeaUserNum())
                .append("teaUserName", getTeaUserName())
                .append("sex", getSex())
                .append("phoneNum", getPhoneNum())
                .append("userDeptId", getUserDeptId())
                .append("userDeptName", getUserDeptName())
                .append("createById", getCreateById())
                .append("createBy", getCreateBy())
                .append("createTime", getCreateTime())
                .append("updateById", getUpdateById())
                .append("updateBy", getUpdateBy())
                .append("updateTime", getUpdateTime())
                .append("deptId", getDeptId())
                .append("delFlag", getDelFlag())
                .append("password", getPassword())
                .append("idCard", getIdCard())
                .append("address", getAddress())
                .append("dataSources", getDataSources())
                .append("email", getEmail())
                .append("picUrl", getPicUrl())
                .toString();
    }
}

    private Date statusEndDateSel;

    private Map<String, Object> params;
    /** 批量操作的ids */
    private Long[] ids;
}

@Data
public class AssetsInfoVo  implements Serializable {
    /** 资产分类 */

    @ImportRules(colName = "资产分类名称", notNull = true, stringLength = 50)
    private String assetsClassName;

    private Long assetsClass;

    @ImportRules(colName = "型号", notNull = true, stringLength = 40)
    private String model;

    private String assetsName;

    @ImportRules(colName="采购时间",notNull=true)

    private String procureUserName;
    /** 来源 */

    @ImportRules(colName="来源",notNull=true,dictName = "assets_source")
    private String source;
    /** 质保 */

    @ImportRules(colName="质保",notNull=true,stringLength = 10)
    private String warranty;
    /** 金额 */

    @ImportRules(colName="金额",notNull=true,intLength = 10,fraLength = 2)
    private BigDecimal amount;
    /** 品牌 */

    @ImportRules(colName="品牌",notNull=true,stringLength = 20)
    private String brand;
    /** 数量 */
    @Excel(name = "数量(非必填)",sort = 10)
    private Integer countNum;
}

/**
 * 设备授权VO
 */
@EqualsAndHashCode(callSuper = true)
@Data
public class DevAuthorizeVo extends DevAuthorize {
    /**
     * 当前设备数量
     */
    private int currentNum;
    public DevAuthorizeVo(DevAuthorize devAuthorize) {
        this.setId(devAuthorize.getId());
        this.setDeviceType(devAuthorize.getDeviceType());
        this.setAuthorizeNum(devAuthorize.getAuthorizeNum());
        this.setUpdateById(devAuthorize.getUpdateById());
        this.setUpdateBy(devAuthorize.getUpdateBy());
        this.setUpdateTime(devAuthorize.getUpdateTime());
    }
}

/**
 * 分组VO
 * @author lyy
 * @date 2022-11-29 17:06:43
 */
@Data
public class GropingVO implements Serializable {
    private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;
    /** 网关名称(必填) */
    @Excel(name = "网关名称(必填)")
    private String upName;
    /** 分组名称(必填) */
    @Excel(name = "分组名称(必填)")
    private String deviceName;
    /** 分组IP(必填) */
    @Excel(name = "分组IP(必填)")
    private String deviceIp;
    /** 分组MAC(必填) */
    @Excel(name = "分组MAC(必填)")
    private String deviceMac;
    @Excel(name = "分组端口(必填)")
    private String devicePort;
    @Excel(name = "楼栋(必填)")
    private String locationName;
    public String getUpName() {
        return upName;
    }
    public void setUpName(String upName) {
        this.upName = upName;
    }
    public String getDeviceName() {
        return deviceName;
    }
    public void setDeviceName(String deviceName) {
        this.deviceName = deviceName;
    }
    public String getDeviceIp() {
        return deviceIp;
    }
    public void setDeviceIp(String deviceIp) {
        this.deviceIp = deviceIp;
    }
    public String getDeviceMac() {
        return deviceMac;
    }
    public void setDeviceMac(String deviceMac) {
        this.deviceMac = deviceMac;
    }
    public String getDevicePort() {
        return devicePort;
    }
    public void setDevicePort(String devicePort) {
        this.devicePort = devicePort;
    }
    public String getLocationName() {
        return locationName;
    }
    public void setLocationName(String locationName) {
        this.locationName = locationName;
    }
}

import lombok.NonNull;
import javax.validation.Valid;
import javax.validation.constraints.NotBlank;
import javax.validation.constraints.NotNull;
import java.io.Serializable;
import java.util.List;
/**
 * 电源VO 导入用
 * @author chengjihong
 * @date 2022-11-29 17:06:43
 */
@Data
public class PowerVo implements Serializable {
    private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;
    /** excel 序号 */
    private Integer rowIndex;
    /** excel 上级编号 */
    private String parentCode;
    /** excel 编号 */
    private String code;
    /** excel 名称 */
    @Excel(name = "名称")
    private String name;
    /** excel ip */
    @Excel(name = "ip")
    private String ip;
    /** excel 教室编号 */
    @Excel(name = "教室编号")
    private Long roomId;
    /** excel 空开数量 */
    private Integer subNums;
    /** excel 电源类型 */
    private String type;
    private List<PowerVo> subList;
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.domain.vo;
import com.chenrise.common.core.annotation.Excel;
import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonFormat;
import lombok.Data;
import java.io.Serializable;
import java.util.Date;
import java.util.List;
/**
 * 门锁VO
 * @author lyy
 * @date 2022-11-29 17:06:43
 */
@Data
public class RoomInVO implements Serializable {
    private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;
    @Excel(name = "教室编号(必填)")
    private String roomCode;
    /** 教室名称(必填) */
    @Excel(name = "教室名称(必填)")
    private String roomName;
    /** 教室别名 */
    @Excel(name = "教室别名")
    private String roomBm;
    /** 可容纳人数(必填) */
    private Long seatNum;
    /** 所属部门(必填) */
    @Excel(name = "所属部门(必填)")
    private String chargeDeptName;
    /** 班牌编号 */
    @Excel(name = "班牌编号")
    private String boardCodes;
    /** 门锁编号 */
    private String lockCodes;
    /** 电源编号 */
    private String roomPowerCodes;
    public String getRoomCode() {
        return roomCode;
    }
    public void setRoomCode(String roomCode) {
        this.roomCode = roomCode;
    }
    public String getRoomName() {
        return roomName;
    }
    public void setRoomName(String roomName) {
        this.roomName = roomName;
    }
    public String getRoomBm() {
        return roomBm;
    }
    public void setRoomBm(String roomBm) {
        this.roomBm = roomBm;
    }
    public Long getSeatNum() {
        return seatNum;
    }
    public void setSeatNum(Long seatNum) {
        this.seatNum = seatNum;
    }
    public String getChargeDeptName() {
        return chargeDeptName;
    }
    public void setChargeDeptName(String chargeDeptName) {
        this.chargeDeptName = chargeDeptName;
    }
    public String getBoardCodes() {
        return boardCodes;
    }
    public void setBoardCodes(String boardCodes) {
        this.boardCodes = boardCodes;
    }
    public String getLockCodes() {
        return lockCodes;
    }
    public void setLockCodes(String lockCodes) {
        this.lockCodes = lockCodes;
    }
    public String getRoomPowerCodes() {
        return roomPowerCodes;
    }
    public void setRoomPowerCodes(String roomPowerCodes) {
        this.roomPowerCodes = roomPowerCodes;
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.domain.vo;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.SchoolLocation;
import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonInclude;
import java.io.Serializable;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.stream.Collectors;
/**
 * Treeselect树结构实体类
 * 
 * @author chenrise
 */
public class SchoolLocationTreeSelect implements Serializable
{
    private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;
    /** 节点ID */
    private Long id;
    /** 节点名称 */
    private String label;
    /** 子节点 */
    @JsonInclude(JsonInclude.Include.NON_EMPTY)
    private List<SchoolLocationTreeSelect> children;
    public SchoolLocationTreeSelect()
    {
    }
    public SchoolLocationTreeSelect(SchoolLocation schoolLocation)
    {
        this.id = schoolLocation.getLocationId();
        this.label = schoolLocation.getLocationName();
        this.children = schoolLocation.getChildren().stream().map(SchoolLocationTreeSelect::new).collect(Collectors.toList());
    }
    public Long getId()
    {
        return id;
    }
    public void setId(Long id)
    {
        this.id = id;
    }
    public String getLabel()
    {
        return label;
    }
    public void setLabel(String label)
    {
        this.label = label;
    }
    public List<SchoolLocationTreeSelect> getChildren()
    {
        return children;
    }
    public void setChildren(List<SchoolLocationTreeSelect> children)
    {
        this.children = children;
    }
}

/**
 * 学校临时工用户信息对象 school_temp_user_info
 *
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2022-11-24
 */
@Data
public class SchoolTempUserInfoVo extends BaseEntity {
    private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;
    /** 临时人员id */
    private Long tempUserId;
    /** 临时人员姓名 */
    @Excel(name = "姓名")
    private String tempUserName;
    /** 临时人员编号 */
    private String tempUserCode;
    /** 身份证号 */
    @Excel(name = "身份证号")
    private String idCard;
    /** 联系电话，不可重复 */
    @Excel(name = "联系电话")
    private String phoneNum;
    /** 所在部门，院系id */
    private Long unitId;
    /** 所在部门院系名称 */
    @Excel(name = "所在院系/部门")
    private String unitName;
    /** 岗位 */
    @Excel(name = "岗位")
    private String job;
    /** 性别 1男 2女 3不详 */
    @Excel(name = "性别", readConverterExp = "1=男,2=女")
    private String sex;
    /** 修改标识 1修改人员信息同步到用户 2修改用户同步到人员信息 */
    private String updateFlag;
    /** 创建人id */
    private Long createById;
    /** 更新人id */
    private Long updateById;
    /** 删除状态 1删除 0正常 */
    private String delFlag;
    /** 权限设置部门id */
    private Long deptId;
    /** 照片 */
    private String picUrl;
    /** 住址 */
    private String address;
    /** 密码 */
    private String password;
    /** 临时工单位 */
    private String tempUnit;
    /** 有效状态开始时间 */
    @Excel(name = "有效开始时间",dateFormat = "yyyy-MM-dd")
    @JsonFormat(pattern = "yyyy-MM-dd")
    private Date statusStartDate;
    /** 有效状态结束时间 */
    @Excel(name = "有效结束时间",dateFormat = "yyyy-MM-dd")
    @JsonFormat(pattern = "yyyy-MM-dd")
    private Date statusEndDate;
    /** 在校状态   1 有效 2失效 */
    @Excel(name = "状态",readConverterExp = "1=有效,2=无效")
    private String inSchoolStatus;
    @Excel(name = "备注")
    private String remark;
    /** 批量操作的ids */
    private Long[] ids;
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.domain;
import com.chenrise.common.core.annotation.Dict;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.BaseEntity;
import lombok.Data;
import lombok.EqualsAndHashCode;
import lombok.ToString;
import nonapi.io.github.classgraph.json.Id;
/**
 * apk版本对象 apk_source
 *
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2022-12-10
 */
@EqualsAndHashCode(callSuper = true)
@Data
@ToString
public class WarningInfo extends BaseEntity
{
    private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;
    @Id
    private Long id;
    //告警大类  字典
    @Dict("dev_warning_type")
    private String type;
    //告警小类 字典
    @Dict("dev_sub_warning_type")
    private String subType;
    //设备名称
    private String deviceName;
    //所属房间
    private Long roomId;
    //位置
    private String position;
    //是否推送 字典
    @Dict("sys_yes_no")
    private String status;
    private String num;
    private String unit;
    private String duration;
    /**
     * 教室编号
     */
    private String roomCode;
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.factory;
import com.chenrise.jufe.factory.strategy.DevAuthorizeStrategy;
import com.chenrise.jufe.factory.strategy.impl.*;
import com.chenrise.system.api.enums.AuthorizeDeviceTypeEnum;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Component;
import javax.annotation.Resource;
/**
 * 设备授权策略工厂
 */
@Component
public class DeviceAuthorizeStrategyFactory {
    @Resource
    private PowerAuthorizeStrategy powerAuthorizeStrategy;
    @Resource
    private ClassBoardAuthorizeStrategy classBoardAuthorizeStrategy;
    @Resource
    private LockAuthorizeStrategy lockAuthorizeStrategy;
    @Resource
    private MonitorAuthorizeStrategy monitorAuthorizeStrategy;
    @Resource
    private NetworkCollectorAuthorizeStrategy networkCollectorAuthorizeStrategy;
    public DevAuthorizeStrategy getStrategy(AuthorizeDeviceTypeEnum deviceType) {
        switch (deviceType) {
            case POWER:
                return powerAuthorizeStrategy;
            case CLASS_BOARD:
                return classBoardAuthorizeStrategy;
            case LOCK:
                return lockAuthorizeStrategy;
            case MONITOR:
                return monitorAuthorizeStrategy;
            case NETWORK_COLLECTOR:
                return networkCollectorAuthorizeStrategy;
            default:
                throw new IllegalArgumentException("不支持的设备类型: " + deviceType);
        }
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.factory.strategy;
/**
 * 设备授权策略接口
 */
public interface DevAuthorizeStrategy {
    /**
     * 获取当前设备数
     *
     * @return 当前设备数
     */
    int getCurrentNum();
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.factory.strategy.impl;
import com.chenrise.jufe.factory.strategy.DevAuthorizeStrategy;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.IDevClassBoardService;
import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
@RequiredArgsConstructor
@Service
public class ClassBoardAuthorizeStrategy implements DevAuthorizeStrategy {
    private final IDevClassBoardService devClassBoardService;
    @Override
    public int getCurrentNum() {
        return devClassBoardService.getCurrentNum();
    }
}

package com.chenrise.jufe.factory.strategy.impl;
import com.chenrise.jufe.factory.strategy.DevAuthorizeStrategy;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.IDevMonitorInfoService;
import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;

@RequiredArgsConstructor

package com.chenrise.jufe.factory.strategy.impl;
import com.chenrise.common.core.domain.R;
import com.chenrise.jufe.factory.strategy.DevAuthorizeStrategy;
import com.chenrise.system.api.RemoteDeviceService;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
import javax.annotation.Resource;
@Service
public class NetworkCollectorAuthorizeStrategy implements DevAuthorizeStrategy {
    @Resource
    private RemoteDeviceService remoteDeviceService;
    @Override
    public int getCurrentNum() {
        R<Integer> collectorCurrentNumR = remoteDeviceService.getCollectorCurrentNum();
        if (R.isError(collectorCurrentNumR)) {
            throw new RuntimeException("获取网络采集器数量失败");
        }
        return collectorCurrentNumR.getData();
    }
}

import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
@RequiredArgsConstructor
@Service
public class PowerAuthorizeStrategy implements DevAuthorizeStrategy {
    private final IDevPowerNodeInfoService devPowerNodeInfoService;
    @Override
    public int getCurrentNum() {
        return devPowerNodeInfoService.getCurrentNum();
    }
}

{

     * @return apk版本
     */
    public ApkSource selectApkSourceById(Long id);

     * 查询apk版本列表
     * 
     * @param apkSource apk版本
     * @return apk版本集合
     */
    public List<ApkSource> selectApkSourceList(ApkSource apkSource);
    /**
     * 新增apk版本
     * 
     * @param apkSource apk版本
     * @return 结果
     */
    public int insertApkSource(ApkSource apkSource);
    /**
     * 修改apk版本
     * 
     * @param apkSource apk版本
     * @return 结果
     */
    public int updateApkSource(ApkSource apkSource);
    /**
     * 删除apk版本
     * 
     * @param id apk版本主键
     * @return 结果
     */

    /**

     * 
     * @param ids 需要删除的数据主键集合
     * @return 结果
     */
    public int deleteApkSourceByIds(Long[] ids);
}

     * @return 结果

}

package com.chenrise.jufe.mapper;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.AssetsApplyDetailPic;
import org.apache.ibatis.annotations.Mapper;
import org.apache.ibatis.annotations.Param;
import java.util.List;
/**
 * 申请明细图片Mapper接口
 *

 */
public interface DevLockConLogMapper
{
    /**
     * @Description: 查询门锁控制日志

package com.chenrise.jufe.service;
import com.chenrise.common.core.domain.R;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo;
/**
 * @Description 指令下发
 * @Author sunming
 * @Date 2022-12-08 11:30:00
 */
public interface DeviceCommandService {
    R<Object> connectGateway();
    /**
     * @Description:门锁常开长关
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-12-09 12:48:32
     * @param id:
     * @param status: 1：常开   2：常闭
     * @return: void
     */
    void openLockById(Long id,String status,String controlType,String courseName,Long seconds);
    /**
     * @Description:门锁开
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-12-09 12:48:59
     * @param id:门锁id
     * @return: void
     */
//    void openLockOneTimeById(Long id,String controlType,String courseName);
    /**
     * @Description:设备信息下发
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-12-09 12:54:26
     * @param id: 设备id
     * @param commandType: 设备以及编码
     *   新增、下发 分组信息:  41
     *   修改分组信息:        42
     *   新增、下发 门锁信息:  81
     *   修改门锁  :         82
     * @return: void
     */
    void lockDeviceIssuing(Long id,String commandType);
    /**
     * @Description: 下发密码 删除密码
     * @Author: sunming  经过测试可以成功用密码开锁  涉及到十六进制小端格式
     * @Date: 2022-12-09 13:07:57
     * @param id: 门锁id
     * @param value: 新的值，新的值为空字符串""则为清除密码
     * @param valueOld: 旧的值
     * @param passType: 类型， 4 密码    3 nfc3 2 nfc2  1 nfc1
     * @return: void
     */
    void lockAddPassword(Long id,  String  value,String valueOld,Integer passType,String userId);
    /**
     * @Description:电源设备控制
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-12-09 13:12:17
     * @param id: 空开id
     * @param status: 开关类型 ： 1  开 0 关
     * @return: void
     */
    void powerControl(Long id, String status);
}

/**

 */
public interface IDevAuthorizeService {

     * 查询设备授权列表
     *
     * @param devAuthorize 查询条件
     * @return 结果
     */
    List<DevAuthorize> getList(DevAuthorize devAuthorize);

     * 修改授权数量
     *
     * @param devAuthorize 添加授权数量
     * @return 结果
     */
    boolean editAuthorizeNum(DevAuthorize devAuthorize);
    /**
     * 根据设备类型查询授权数量
     *
     * @param deviceType 设备类型
     * @return 授权数量

    int getAuthorizeNumByType(String deviceType);

     * @param currentNum 当前授权数量
     * @return 结果 true:通过 false:不通过

    boolean checkDeviceAuthorizeNum(AuthorizeDeviceTypeEnum deviceType, int currentNum);

package com.chenrise.jufe.service.impl;
import java.util.List;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.DateUtils;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
import com.chenrise.jufe.mapper.ApkSourceMapper;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.ApkSource;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.IApkSourceService;
import javax.annotation.Resource;
/**
 * apk版本Service业务层处理
 *
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2022-12-10
 */
@Service
public class ApkSourceServiceImpl implements IApkSourceService
{
    @Resource
    private ApkSourceMapper apkSourceMapper;
    /**
     * 查询apk版本
     *
     * @param id apk版本主键
     * @return apk版本
     */
    @Override
    public ApkSource selectApkSourceById(Long id)
    {
        return apkSourceMapper.selectApkSourceById(id);
    }
    /**
     * 查询apk版本列表
     *
     * @param apkSource apk版本
     * @return apk版本
     */
    @Override
    public List<ApkSource> selectApkSourceList(ApkSource apkSource)
    {
        return apkSourceMapper.selectApkSourceList(apkSource);
    }
    /**
     * 新增apk版本
     *
     * @param apkSource apk版本
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int insertApkSource(ApkSource apkSource)
    {
        apkSource.setCreateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        return apkSourceMapper.insertApkSource(apkSource);
    }
    /**
     * 修改apk版本
     *
     * @param apkSource apk版本
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int updateApkSource(ApkSource apkSource)
    {
        return apkSourceMapper.updateApkSource(apkSource);
    }
    /**
     * 批量删除apk版本
     *
     * @param ids 需要删除的apk版本主键
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int deleteApkSourceByIds(Long[] ids)
    {
        return apkSourceMapper.deleteApkSourceByIds(ids);
    }
    /**
     * 删除apk版本信息
     *
     * @param id apk版本主键
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int deleteApkSourceById(Long id)
    {
        return apkSourceMapper.deleteApkSourceById(id);
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.service.impl;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.DateUtils;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.ApkSource;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.AppLog;
import com.chenrise.jufe.mapper.ApkSourceMapper;
import com.chenrise.jufe.mapper.AppLogMapper;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.IApkSourceService;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.IAppLogService;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
import javax.annotation.Resource;
import java.util.List;
/**
 * apk版本Service业务层处理
 *
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2022-12-10
 */
@Service
public class AppLogServiceImpl implements IAppLogService
{
    @Resource
    private AppLogMapper appLogMapper;
    @Override
    public int insertAppLog(AppLog appLog)
    {
        appLog.setCreateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        return appLogMapper.insertAppLog(appLog);
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.service.impl;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.ApplyAuditRecord;
import com.chenrise.jufe.mapper.ApplyAuditRecordMapper;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.IApplyAuditRecordService;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
import java.util.List;
/**
 * 资产申请审核记录Service业务层处理
 *
 * @author sunMing
 * @date 2023-12-27
 */
@Service
public class ApplyAuditRecordServiceImpl implements IApplyAuditRecordService {
    @Autowired
    private ApplyAuditRecordMapper applyAuditRecordMapper;
    /**
     * 查询资产申请审核记录
     *
     * @param recordId 资产申请审核记录主键
     * @return 资产申请审核记录
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2023-12-27 16:11:08
     */
    @Override
    public ApplyAuditRecord selectApplyAuditRecordByRecordId(Long recordId) {
        return applyAuditRecordMapper.selectApplyAuditRecordByRecordId(recordId);
    }
    /**
     * 查询资产申请审核记录列表
     *
     * @param applyAuditRecord 资产申请审核记录
     * @return 资产申请审核记录
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2023-12-27 16:11:08
     */
    @Override
    public List<ApplyAuditRecord> selectApplyAuditRecordList(ApplyAuditRecord applyAuditRecord) {
        return applyAuditRecordMapper.selectApplyAuditRecordList(applyAuditRecord);
    }
    /**
     * 新增资产申请审核记录
     *
     * @param applyAuditRecord 资产申请审核记录
     * @return 结果
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2023-12-27 16:11:08
     */
    @Override
    public int insertApplyAuditRecord(ApplyAuditRecord applyAuditRecord) {
        return applyAuditRecordMapper.insertApplyAuditRecord(applyAuditRecord);
    }
    /**
     * 修改资产申请审核记录
     *
     * @param applyAuditRecord 资产申请审核记录
     * @return 结果
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2023-12-27 16:11:08
     */
    @Override
    public int updateApplyAuditRecord(ApplyAuditRecord applyAuditRecord) {
        return applyAuditRecordMapper.updateApplyAuditRecord(applyAuditRecord);
    }
    /**
     * 批量删除资产申请审核记录
     *
     * @param recordIds 需要删除的资产申请审核记录主键
     * @return 结果
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2023-12-27 16:11:08
     */
    @Override
    public int deleteApplyAuditRecordByRecordIds(Long[] recordIds) {
        return applyAuditRecordMapper.deleteApplyAuditRecordByRecordIds(recordIds);
    }
    /**
     * 删除资产申请审核记录信息
     *
     * @param recordId 资产申请审核记录主键
     * @return 结果
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2023-12-27 16:11:08
     */
    @Override
    public int deleteApplyAuditRecordByRecordId(Long recordId) {
        return applyAuditRecordMapper.deleteApplyAuditRecordByRecordId(recordId);
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.service.impl;

    @Override
    public int deleteApplyAuditUserById(Long id) {
        return applyAuditUserMapper.deleteApplyAuditUserById(id);
    }
}

package com.chenrise.jufe.service.impl;
import cn.hutool.core.collection.CollectionUtil;
import cn.hutool.json.JSONObject;
import cn.hutool.json.JSONUtil;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.DateUtils;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.StringUtils;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult;
import com.chenrise.common.security.utils.SecurityUtils;
import com.chenrise.jufe.aspect.ApplyAddScope;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.*;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.Bo.AssetsApplyDetailInfoBo;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.Bo.AssetsApplyInfoBo;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.Bo.AssetsInfoBo;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.Bo.FlowSetDetailBo;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.enums.*;
import com.chenrise.jufe.mapper.*;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.IAssetsApplyInfoService;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.IAssetsExpireWarnService;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.IAssetsStockWarnService;
import com.chenrise.system.api.RemoteUserService;
import com.chenrise.system.api.domain.SysRole;
import com.chenrise.system.api.domain.SysUser;
import com.chenrise.system.api.model.LoginUser;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
import org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.Arrays;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.stream.Collectors;
/**
 * 资产相关申请Service业务层处理
 *
 * @author sunMing
 * @date 2023-12-27
 */
@Service
public class AssetsApplyInfoServiceImpl implements IAssetsApplyInfoService {
    @Autowired
    private AssetsApplyInfoMapper assetsApplyInfoMapper;
    @Autowired
    private AssetsApplyDetailInfoMapper applyDetailInfoMapper;
    @Autowired
    private AssetsApplyDetailPicMapper applyDetailPicMapper;
    @Autowired
    private AssetsInfoMapper assetsInfoMapper;
    @Autowired
    private AssetsApplyStepMapper assetsApplyStepMapper;
    @Autowired
    private FlowSetDetailMapper flowSetDetailMapper;
    @Autowired
    private ApplyAuditUserMapper applyAuditUserMapper;
    @Autowired
    private ApplyAuditRecordMapper applyAuditRecordMapper;
    @Autowired
    private RemoteUserService remoteUserService;
    @Autowired
    private AssetsUserRefMapper assetsUserRefMapper;
    @Autowired
    private AssetsFlowInfoMapper assetsFlowInfoMapper;
    @Autowired
    private IAssetsStockWarnService assetsStockWarnService;
    @Autowired
    private IAssetsExpireWarnService assetsExpireWarnService;
    private static Long endValue = 99L;
    /**
     * 查询资产相关申请
     *
     * @param applyId 资产相关申请主键
     * @return 资产相关申请
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2023-12-27 16:11:08
     */
    @Override
    public AssetsApplyInfoBo selectAssetsApplyInfoByApplyId(Long applyId) {
        AssetsApplyInfoBo info = assetsApplyInfoMapper.selectAssetsApplyInfoByApplyId(applyId);
        List<AssetsApplyDetailInfoBo> detailInfo = info.getDetailInfo();
        if (detailInfo != null && detailInfo.size() > 0) {
            for (int i = 0; i < detailInfo.size(); i++) {
                AssetsInfoBo assetsInfo = assetsInfoMapper.selectAssetsInfoByAssetsId(detailInfo.get(i).getAssetsId());
                detailInfo.get(i).setAssetsInfo(assetsInfo);
            }
        }
        info.setDetailInfo(detailInfo);
        List<FlowSetDetailBo> setDetails = flowSetDetailMapper.selectFlowSetDetailApplyType(info);
        if (setDetails != null) {
            info.setAllStepCount(setDetails.size());
            info.setSetDetails(setDetails);
        }
        List<FlowSetDetailBo> setDetailsHtml = flowSetDetailMapper.selectFlowSetDetailHtmlApplyType(info);
        if (setDetailsHtml != null) {
            info.setAllStepCount(setDetailsHtml.size());
            info.setSetDetailsHtml(setDetailsHtml);
        }
        LoginUser loginUser = SecurityUtils.getLoginUser();
        List<SysRole> xzzgs = SecurityUtils.getLoginUser().getSysUser().getRoles().stream().filter(roole -> "XZZG".equals(roole.getRoleKey())).collect(Collectors.toList());
        if (StringUtils.isNotNull(loginUser)) {
            SysUser currentUser = loginUser.getSysUser();
            // 如果是超级管理员，则不过滤数据
            if (StringUtils.isNotNull(currentUser) && !currentUser.isAdmin() && xzzgs.size() == 0) {
                int approveCount = assetsApplyInfoMapper.getApproveCount(applyId, SecurityUtils.getUserId());
                info.setIsApproveBtn(approveCount > 0 ? 1 : 0);
            } else {
                if (info.getApplyStatus().equals(ApplyStatusEnum.WAIT_APPROVE.getValue()) ||
                        info.getApplyStatus().equals(ApplyStatusEnum.APPROVE.getValue())) {
                    info.setIsApproveBtn(1);
                } else {
                    info.setIsApproveBtn(0);
                }
            }
        }
        return info;
    }
    /**
     * 查询资产相关申请列表
     *
     * @param applyInfo 资产相关申请
     * @return 资产相关申请
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2023-12-27 16:11:08
     */
    @Override
    public List<AssetsApplyInfoBo> selectAssetsApplyInfoList(AssetsApplyInfoBo applyInfo) {
        LoginUser loginUser = SecurityUtils.getLoginUser();
        SysUser user = loginUser.getSysUser();
        if (user == null) {
            throw new RuntimeException("为获取到登录信息");
        }
        List<SysRole> xzzgs = SecurityUtils.getLoginUser().getSysUser().getRoles().stream().filter(roole -> "XZZG".equals(roole.getRoleKey())).collect(Collectors.toList());
        if (applyInfo.getFromType() != null && FromTypeEnum.WEB.getValue().equals(applyInfo.getFromType())) {
            user.isAdmin();
            List<SysRole> zys = SecurityUtils.getLoginUser().getSysUser().getRoles().stream().filter(roole -> "ZY".equals(roole.getRoleKey())).collect(Collectors.toList());
            if (!user.isAdmin() && zys.size() == 0 && xzzgs.size() == 0) {
                List<SysRole> bmzgs = SecurityUtils.getLoginUser().getSysUser().getRoles().stream().filter(roole -> "BMZG".equals(roole.getRoleKey())).collect(Collectors.toList());
                if (bmzgs.size() > 0) {
                    user.getDeptId();
                    applyInfo.setApplyDeptId(user.getDeptId());
                } else {
                    applyInfo.setApplyUserId(user.getUserId());
                }
            }
            if (!user.isAdmin() && xzzgs.size() == 0) {
                applyInfo.setLoginUserId(user.getUserId());
            }
        } else {
            applyInfo.setApplyUserId(user.getUserId());
        }
        List<AssetsApplyInfoBo> infos = assetsApplyInfoMapper.selectAssetsApplyInfoList(applyInfo);
        if (user.isAdmin() || xzzgs.size() > 0) {
            if (infos != null && infos.size() > 0) {
                for (int i = 0; i < infos.size(); i++) {
                    if (infos.get(i).getApplyStatus().equals(ApplyStatusEnum.WAIT_APPROVE.getValue()) ||
                            infos.get(i).getApplyStatus().equals(ApplyStatusEnum.APPROVE.getValue())) {
                        infos.get(i).setIsApproveBtn(1);
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        return infos;
    }
    /**
     * 新增资产相关申请
     *
     * @param assetsApplyInfo 资产相关申请
     * @return 结果
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2023-12-27 16:11:08
     */
    @Override
    @Transactional(rollbackFor = Exception.class)
    @ApplyAddScope
    public int insertAssetsApplyInfo(AssetsApplyInfoBo assetsApplyInfo) {
        List<AssetsApplyDetailInfoBo> detailInfo = assetsApplyInfo.getDetailInfo();
        Long applyId = assetsApplyInfo.getApplyId();
        if (applyId != null) {
            assetsApplyInfoMapper.updateAssetsApplyIsResubmit(applyId);
        }
        Long loginUserId = SecurityUtils.getUserId();
        Long[] assetsIds = null;
        if (detailInfo != null && detailInfo.size() > 0) {
            assetsIds = new Long[detailInfo.size()];
            for (int i = 0; i < detailInfo.size(); i++) {
                assetsIds[i] = detailInfo.get(i).getAssetsId();
            }
        } else if (!ApplyTypeEnum.USE.getValue().equals(assetsApplyInfo.getApplyType())) {
            throw new RuntimeException("请选择操作资产明细");
        }
        if (assetsApplyInfo.getFromType() == null || !FromTypeEnum.WEB.getValue().equals(assetsApplyInfo.getFromType())
                || ApplyTypeEnum.DELETE.getValue().equals(assetsApplyInfo.getApplyType())) {
            assetsApplyInfo.setApplyUserId(loginUserId);
        }
        AjaxResult sysUserResult = remoteUserService.getUser(assetsApplyInfo.getApplyUserId());
        if (sysUserResult.isError()) {
            throw new RuntimeException("获取用户信息失败");
        }
        JSONObject jsonObject = JSONUtil.parseObj(sysUserResult);
        SysUser sysUser = JSONUtil.toBean(JSONUtil.toJsonStr(jsonObject.get(AjaxResult.DATA_TAG)), SysUser.class);
        assetsApplyInfo.setApplyDeptId(sysUser.getDept().getDeptId());
        assetsApplyInfo.setApplyUserName(sysUser.getNickName());
        assetsApplyInfo.setApplyDeptName(sysUser.getDept().getDeptName());
        assetsApplyInfo.setCreateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        assetsApplyInfo.setCreateById(SecurityUtils.getUserId());
        assetsApplyInfo.setCreateBy(SecurityUtils.getLoginUser().getSysUser().getNickName());
        assetsApplyInfo.setApplyTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        if (!(FromTypeEnum.HTML.getValue().equals(assetsApplyInfo.getFromType()) && assetsApplyInfo.getApplyType().equals(ApplyTypeEnum.USE.getValue()))) {
            checkTypeInfo(assetsIds, assetsApplyInfo);
        }
        assetsApplyInfoMapper.insertAssetsApplyInfo(assetsApplyInfo);
        if (detailInfo != null && detailInfo.size() > 0) {
            for (int i = 0; i < detailInfo.size(); i++) {
                detailInfo.get(i).setSort(Long.valueOf(i));
                detailInfo.get(i).setApplyId(assetsApplyInfo.getApplyId());
                applyDetailInfoMapper.insertAssetsApplyDetailInfo(detailInfo.get(i));
                List<AssetsApplyDetailPic> picList = detailInfo.get(i).getPicList();
                if (picList != null && picList.size() > 0) {
                    for (int j = 0; j < picList.size(); j++) {
                        picList.get(j).setSort(Long.valueOf(j));
                        picList.get(j).setDetailId(detailInfo.get(i).getDetailId());
                        applyDetailPicMapper.insertAssetsApplyDetailPic(picList.get(j));
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        assetsApplyStepMapper.addStepInfoToData(assetsApplyInfo);
        List<FlowSetDetailBo> detailBos = flowSetDetailMapper.selectFlowSetDetailByApply(assetsApplyInfo);
        if (detailBos == null || detailBos.size() == 0) {
            throw new RuntimeException("当前申请类型未设置审批流程，请联系管理人员");
        }
        List<ApplyAuditUser> auditUsers = new ArrayList<>();
        for (int i = 0; i < detailBos.size(); i++) {
            Long userId = detailBos.get(i).getUserId();
            Long auditStep = detailBos.get(i).getAuditStep();
            if (auditStep != 99) {
                if (userId == null) {
                    throw new RuntimeException(detailBos.get(i).getAuditStepName() + "未查询到响应的审批人，无法进行申请");
                }
                ApplyAuditUser auditUser = new ApplyAuditUser();
                auditUser.setApplyId(assetsApplyInfo.getApplyId());
                auditUser.setAuditStep(detailBos.get(i).getAuditStep());
                auditUser.setAuditUserId(detailBos.get(i).getUserId());
                auditUser.setAuditUserName(detailBos.get(i).getUserName());
                auditUser.setCreateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
                auditUsers.add(auditUser);
            }
        }
        applyAuditUserMapper.insertApplyAuditAllUser(auditUsers);
        setRecordInfo(assetsApplyInfo);
        return 1;
    }
    /**
     * 校验明细信息
     *
     * @param assetsIds:
     * @param assetsApplyInfo:
     * @Description: 校验明细信息
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2024-01-18 14:10:22
     * @return: void
     */
    private void checkTypeInfo(Long[] assetsIds, AssetsApplyInfoBo assetsApplyInfo) {
        List<AssetsApplyDetailInfo> applyNow = applyDetailInfoMapper.selectAssetsApplyNow(assetsIds);
        String assetsInfo = "";
        if (applyNow != null && applyNow.size() > 0) {
            for (int i = 0; i < applyNow.size(); i++) {
                assetsInfo += "编号：" + applyNow.get(i).getAssetsCode();
                if (i != applyNow.size() - 1) {
                    assetsInfo += ",";
                } else {
                    assetsInfo += "；";
                }
            }
            throw new RuntimeException(StringUtils.format("所选资产{}正在审批中，请重新选择", assetsInfo));
        }
        if (ApplyTypeEnum.USE.getValue().equals(assetsApplyInfo.getApplyType())) {
            Boolean flagInfo = getIsFreeStatus(assetsIds, AssetsStatusEnum.USE.getValue());
            if (flagInfo) {
                throw new RuntimeException("请选择闲置的资产进行领用申请");
            }
            List<AssetsApplyDetailInfo> waitUse = applyDetailInfoMapper.selectAssetsWaitUserApplyNow(assetsIds);
            String waitUseInfo = "";
            if (waitUse != null && waitUse.size() > 0) {
                for (int i = 0; i < waitUse.size(); i++) {
                    waitUseInfo += "编号：" + waitUse.get(i).getAssetsCode();
                    if (i != waitUse.size() - 1) {
                        waitUseInfo += ",";
                    } else {
                        waitUseInfo += "；";
                    }
                }
                throw new RuntimeException(StringUtils.format("所选资产{}等待他人领用，请重新选择", waitUseInfo));
            }
        } else if (ApplyTypeEnum.BACK.getValue().equals(assetsApplyInfo.getApplyType())) {
            Boolean flagInfo = getIsFreeStatus(assetsIds, AssetsStatusEnum.FREE.getValue());
            if (flagInfo) {
                throw new RuntimeException("请选择在用的资产进行退库申请");
            }
        } else if (ApplyTypeEnum.DELETE.getValue().equals(assetsApplyInfo.getApplyType())) {
            Boolean flagInfo = getIsFreeStatus(assetsIds, AssetsStatusEnum.USE.getValue());
            if (flagInfo) {
                throw new RuntimeException("请选择闲置的资产进行报废申请");
            }
        } else if (ApplyTypeEnum.MOVE.getValue().equals(assetsApplyInfo.getApplyType())) {
            Boolean flagInfo = getIsFreeStatus(assetsIds, AssetsStatusEnum.FREE.getValue());
            if (flagInfo) {
                throw new RuntimeException("请选择在用的资产进转移申请");
            }
        } else {
            throw new RuntimeException("请选择申请类型");
        }
    }
    /**
     * 添加步骤信息
     *
     * @param assetsApplyInfo:
     * @Description: 添加步骤信息
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2024-01-17 15:31:24
     * @return: void
     */
    private void setRecordInfo(AssetsApplyInfoBo assetsApplyInfo) {
        ApplyAuditRecord record = new ApplyAuditRecord();
        record.setApplyId(assetsApplyInfo.getApplyId());
        record.setUserId(SecurityUtils.getUserId());
        record.setUserName(SecurityUtils.getLoginUser().getSysUser().getNickName());
        record.setAuditStep(0L);
        record.setAuditTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        record.setAuditResult("1");
        applyAuditRecordMapper.insertApplyAuditRecord(record);
    }
    /**
     * 审核事添加审核记录
     *
     * @param assetsApplyInfo:
     * @Description:
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2024-01-19 13:30:48
     * @return: void
     */
    private void setRecordInfoForOpt(AssetsApplyInfoBo assetsApplyInfo) {
        ApplyAuditRecord record = new ApplyAuditRecord();
        record.setApplyId(assetsApplyInfo.getApplyId());
        record.setUserId(SecurityUtils.getUserId());
        record.setUserName(SecurityUtils.getLoginUser().getSysUser().getNickName());
        record.setAuditStep(assetsApplyInfo.getAuditStep());
        record.setAuditTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        record.setAuditRemark(assetsApplyInfo.getApproveReason());
        record.setAuditResult(assetsApplyInfo.getOptType());
        applyAuditRecordMapper.insertApplyAuditRecord(record);
    }
    /**
     * 判断是否是闲置状态
     *
     * @Description:
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2024-01-15 16:44:13
     * @return: java.lang.Boolean
     */
    private Boolean getIsFreeStatus(Long[] assetsIds, String assetsStatus) {
        Integer count = assetsInfoMapper.getAssetsInfosStatus(assetsIds, assetsStatus);
        return count > 0;
    }
    /**

    public int deleteAssetsApplyInfoByApplyId(Long applyId) {

    }
    /**
     * 审批权限判断
     *
     * @param assetsApplyInfo:
     * @Description:
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2024-01-30 08:36:01
     * @return: void
     */
    private Long checkApproveAuth(AssetsApplyInfoBo assetsApplyInfo) {
        Long applyId = assetsApplyInfo.getApplyId();
        LoginUser loginUser = SecurityUtils.getLoginUser();
        SysUser user = loginUser.getSysUser();
        SysUser currentUser = loginUser.getSysUser();
        if (user == null) {
            throw new RuntimeException("为获取到登录信息");
        }
        List<SysRole> xzzgs = currentUser.getRoles().stream().filter(roole -> "XZZG".equals(roole.getRoleKey())).collect(Collectors.toList());
        int approveCount = assetsApplyInfoMapper.getApproveCount(applyId, SecurityUtils.getUserId());
        AssetsApplyInfoBo info = assetsApplyInfoMapper.selectAssetsApplyInfoByApplyId(applyId);
        Long currentStep = info.getAuditStep();
        if (approveCount == 0 && !currentUser.isAdmin() && xzzgs.size() == 0) {
            throw new RuntimeException("当前人员没有审批权限");
        }
        if (!ApplyStatusEnum.WAIT_APPROVE.getValue().equals(info.getApplyStatus()) && !ApplyStatusEnum.APPROVE.getValue().equals(info.getApplyStatus())) {
            throw new RuntimeException("当前人员没有审批权限");
        }
        return currentStep;
    }
    /**
     * 资产审批
     *
     * @param assetsApplyInfo:
     * @Description: 资产审批
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2024-01-19 10:54:16
     * @return: com.chenrise.boot.common.core.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @Override
    @Transactional(rollbackFor = Exception.class)
    public AjaxResult approveAssetsApplyInfo(AssetsApplyInfoBo assetsApplyInfo) {
        Long currentStep = checkApproveAuth(assetsApplyInfo);
        Long nextStep = applyAuditUserMapper.selectNextStepInfoByApplyInfo(assetsApplyInfo);
        if (nextStep == null) {
            nextStep = 99L;
        }
        if (OptTypeEnum.REJECT.getValue().equals(assetsApplyInfo.getOptType())) {
            assetsApplyInfo.setApplyStatus(ApplyStatusEnum.REJECT.getValue());
            assetsApplyInfo.setApplyFlowSatus("100");
            assetsApplyInfoMapper.updateAssetsApplyInfo(assetsApplyInfo);
            assetsApplyInfo.setAuditStep(assetsApplyInfo.getAuditStep());
            setRecordInfoForOpt(assetsApplyInfo);
            return AjaxResult.success("驳回成功");
        }
        List<AssetsApplyDetailInfoBo> detailInfo = assetsApplyInfo.getDetailInfo();
        Long[] ids = null;
        if (detailInfo == null || detailInfo.size() == 0) {
            if (!ApplyTypeEnum.USE.getValue().equals(assetsApplyInfo.getApplyType()) || nextStep.longValue() == endValue.longValue()) {
                throw new RuntimeException("请选择资产信息");
            }
        } else {
            ids = new Long[detailInfo.size()];
            for (int i = 0; i < detailInfo.size(); i++) {
                ids[i] = detailInfo.get(i).getAssetsId();
                if (ApplyTypeEnum.USE.getValue().equals(assetsApplyInfo.getApplyType())) {
                    if (detailInfo.get(i).getDetailId() == null) {
                        detailInfo.get(i).setApplyId(assetsApplyInfo.getApplyId());
                        detailInfo.get(i).setSort(Long.parseLong(String.valueOf(i)));
                        applyDetailInfoMapper.insertAssetsApplyDetailInfo(detailInfo.get(i));
                    }
                }
                checkAssetsStatus(assetsApplyInfo, detailInfo.get(i));
            }
        }
        if (nextStep.longValue() == endValue.longValue()) {
            assetsApplyInfo.setApplyStatus(ApplyStatusEnum.PASS.getValue());
            assetsApplyInfo.setApproveEndTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
            if (ApplyTypeEnum.USE.getValue().equals(assetsApplyInfo.getApplyType())) {
            } else if (ApplyTypeEnum.BACK.getValue().equals(assetsApplyInfo.getApplyType())) {
                assetsInfoMapper.updateAssetsInfoFree(ids, AssetsStatusEnum.FREE.getValue());
                assetsUserRefMapper.deleteByAssetsIds(ids);
                addFlowInfoBack(assetsApplyInfo, detailInfo);
                assetsExpireWarnService.sendExpireWarnToAllUser(Arrays.asList(ids));
            } else if (ApplyTypeEnum.MOVE.getValue().equals(assetsApplyInfo.getApplyType())) {
                assetsUserRefMapper.updateAssetsIdsRes(ids, assetsApplyInfo.getTransferUserId(), assetsApplyInfo.getApplyId());
                addFlowInfoMove(assetsApplyInfo, detailInfo);
                assetsApplyInfo.setReceiveTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
            } else if (ApplyTypeEnum.DELETE.getValue().equals(assetsApplyInfo.getApplyType())) {
                assetsInfoMapper.updateAssetsInfoDelete(ids);
                assetsStockWarnService.sendStockWarnToAllUserByAssetsIds(Arrays.asList(ids));
            }
        } else {
            assetsApplyInfo.setApplyStatus(ApplyStatusEnum.APPROVE.getValue());
        }
        assetsApplyInfo.setApplyFlowSatus(String.valueOf(nextStep));
        assetsApplyInfo.setAuditStep(nextStep);
        assetsApplyInfoMapper.updateAssetsApplyInfo(assetsApplyInfo);
        assetsApplyInfo.setAuditStep(currentStep);
        setRecordInfoForOpt(assetsApplyInfo);
        /*try {
            if (nextStep.longValue() == endValue.longValue() && ApplyTypeEnum.USE.getValue().equals(assetsApplyInfo.getApplyType())) {
                Long[] userIds = new Long[]{assetsApplyInfo.getApplyUserId()};
                sendDingMsgService.sendPassApplyInfoToUser(userIds);
            }
        } catch (Exception e) {
            e.printStackTrace();
        }*/
        return AjaxResult.success("操作成功");
    }
    /**
     * 领取操作
     *
     * @param applyId:
     * @Description:
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2024-01-22 14:13:17
     * @return: com.chenrise.boot.common.core.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @Override
    @Transactional(rollbackFor = Exception.class)
    public AjaxResult assetsApplyInfoGetUseInfo(Long applyId) {
        AssetsApplyInfoBo info = assetsApplyInfoMapper.selectAssetsApplyInfoByApplyId(applyId);
        Long userId = SecurityUtils.getUserId();
        if (info.getApplyUserId().longValue() != userId.longValue()) {
            return AjaxResult.error("只可本人进行领取！");
        }
        if (!ApplyStatusEnum.PASS.getValue().equals(info.getApplyStatus())) {
            return AjaxResult.error("当前审批未完结，或者已领取，请重试！");
        }
        List<AssetsApplyDetailInfoBo> detailInfo = info.getDetailInfo();
        List<Long> assetsIds = new ArrayList<>();
        for (int i = 0; i < detailInfo.size(); i++) {
            AssetsInfo assetsInfoSel = assetsInfoMapper.selectAssetsInfoByAssetsId(detailInfo.get(i).getAssetsId());
            if (assetsInfoSel == null || DelFlagEnum.DELETE.getValue().equals(assetsInfoSel.getDelFlag())) {
                throw new RuntimeException("资产：" + assetsInfoSel.getAssetsName() + "已被删除无法领取，请重新申请当前资产");
            }
            AssetsInfo assetsInfo = new AssetsInfo();
            assetsInfo.setAssetsId(detailInfo.get(i).getAssetsId());
            assetsInfo.setAssetsStatus(AssetsStatusEnum.USE.getValue());
            assetsInfoMapper.updateAssetsInfo(assetsInfo);
            // 2 添加关联信息
            AssetsUserRef ref = new AssetsUserRef();
            ref.setAssetsId(detailInfo.get(i).getAssetsId());
            ref.setApplyId(detailInfo.get(i).getApplyId());
            ref.setUserId(info.getApplyUserId());
            ref.setDeptId(info.getApplyDeptId());
            ref.setCreateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
            try {
                assetsUserRefMapper.insertAssetsUserRef(ref);
            } catch (Exception e) {
            }
            // 3 添加流转信息
            AssetsFlowInfo flowInfo = new AssetsFlowInfo();
            flowInfo.setApplyId(detailInfo.get(i).getApplyId());
            flowInfo.setAssetsId(detailInfo.get(i).getAssetsId());
            flowInfo.setFlowType(info.getApplyType());
            flowInfo.setFlowReason(info.getApplyReason());
            flowInfo.setFlowRemark(info.getApplyRemark());
            flowInfo.setTransferDeptId(info.getApplyDeptId());
            flowInfo.setTransferDeptName(info.getApplyDeptName());
            flowInfo.setTransferUserId(info.getApplyUserId());
            flowInfo.setTransferUserName(info.getApplyUserName());
            flowInfo.setCreateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
            assetsFlowInfoMapper.insertAssetsFlowInfo(flowInfo);
            assetsIds.add(assetsInfo.getAssetsId());
        }
        info.setApplyStatus(ApplyStatusEnum.USE.getValue());
        info.setReceiveTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        assetsApplyInfoMapper.updateAssetsApplyInfo(info);
        if (CollectionUtil.isNotEmpty(assetsIds)) {
            assetsStockWarnService.sendStockWarnToAllUserByAssetsIds(assetsIds);
        }
        return AjaxResult.success("领取成功");
    }
    /**
     * 分页分页table数量统计
     *
     * @param applyType:
     * @Description:
     * @Author: sunMing

        return AjaxResult.success(countInfo);
    }

            sendDingMsgService.sendUnUseInfoToUser(userIds);
            assetsApplyInfoMapper.updateAssetsApplyIsSend();

    /**
     * 发送未退还提醒
     *

        /*int useCount = assetsUserRefMapper.selectCountInfoByUserId(userId);
        if (useCount > 0) {
            String userName = sysUserMyMapper.selectUserNameByUserId(userId);
            List<Long> userIds = sysUserMyMapper.selectXzzyUserIds();
            if (userIds != null && userIds.size() > 0) {
                Long[] userArr = new Long [userIds.size()];
                for (int i = 0;i < userIds.size();i++) {
                    userArr[i] = userIds.get(i);

                sendDingMsgService.sendMassgeUnbackToXzzyUser(userArr,userName);
            }
        }*/
        assetsApplyInfoMapper.updateApplySystemReject(userId);

    /**
     * 校验资产申请状态
     *
     * @param assetsIds:
     * @Description:
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2024-02-27 09:49:51
     * @return: com.chenrise.boot.common.core.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @Override
    public AjaxResult checkStatusInfo(Long[] assetsIds) {
        List<AssetsApplyDetailInfo> applyNow = applyDetailInfoMapper.selectAssetsApplyNow(assetsIds);
        String assetsInfo = "";
        if (applyNow != null && applyNow.size() > 0) {
            for (int i = 0; i < applyNow.size(); i++) {
                assetsInfo += "编号：" + applyNow.get(i).getAssetsCode();
                if (i != applyNow.size() - 1) {
                    assetsInfo += ",";
                } else {
                    assetsInfo += "；";
                }
            }
            return AjaxResult.error(StringUtils.format("所选资产{}正在审批中,无法进行操作", assetsInfo));
        }
        return AjaxResult.success();
    }
    /**
     * 增加转移流传记录
     *
     * @param assetsApplyInfo:
     * @param detailInfo:
     * @Description: 增加转移流传记录
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2024-01-22 13:55:01
     * @return: void
     */
    private void addFlowInfoMove(AssetsApplyInfoBo assetsApplyInfo, List<AssetsApplyDetailInfoBo> detailInfo) {
        for (int i = 0; i < detailInfo.size(); i++) {
            AssetsFlowInfo flowInfo = new AssetsFlowInfo();
            flowInfo.setApplyId(detailInfo.get(i).getApplyId());
            flowInfo.setAssetsId(detailInfo.get(i).getAssetsId());
            flowInfo.setFlowType(assetsApplyInfo.getApplyType());
            flowInfo.setFlowReason(assetsApplyInfo.getApplyReason());
            flowInfo.setFlowRemark(assetsApplyInfo.getApplyRemark());
            flowInfo.setTransferDeptId(assetsApplyInfo.getTransferDeptId());
            flowInfo.setTransferDeptName(assetsApplyInfo.getTransferDeptName());
            flowInfo.setTransferUserId(assetsApplyInfo.getTransferUserId());
            flowInfo.setTransferUserName(assetsApplyInfo.getTransferUserName());
            flowInfo.setCreateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
            assetsFlowInfoMapper.insertAssetsFlowInfo(flowInfo);
        }
    }
    /**
     * 增加退库流转信息
     *
     * @param assetsApplyInfo:
     * @param detailInfo:
     * @Description:
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2024-01-22 13:45:19
     * @return: void
     */
    private void addFlowInfoBack(AssetsApplyInfoBo assetsApplyInfo, List<AssetsApplyDetailInfoBo> detailInfo) {
        for (int i = 0; i < detailInfo.size(); i++) {
            AssetsFlowInfo flowInfo = new AssetsFlowInfo();
            flowInfo.setApplyId(detailInfo.get(i).getApplyId());
            flowInfo.setAssetsId(detailInfo.get(i).getAssetsId());
            flowInfo.setFlowType(assetsApplyInfo.getApplyType());
            flowInfo.setFlowReason(assetsApplyInfo.getApplyReason());
            flowInfo.setFlowRemark(assetsApplyInfo.getApplyRemark());
            flowInfo.setTransferDeptId(assetsApplyInfo.getApplyDeptId());
            flowInfo.setTransferDeptName(assetsApplyInfo.getApplyDeptName());
            flowInfo.setTransferUserId(assetsApplyInfo.getApplyUserId());
            flowInfo.setTransferUserName(assetsApplyInfo.getApplyUserName());
            flowInfo.setCreateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
            assetsFlowInfoMapper.insertAssetsFlowInfo(flowInfo);
        }
    }
    /**
     * 校验资产状态
     *
     * @Description: 校验资产状态
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2024-01-22 11:22:57
     * @return: void
     */
    private void checkAssetsStatus(AssetsApplyInfoBo assetsApplyInfo, AssetsApplyDetailInfoBo detailInfoBo) {
        if (ApplyTypeEnum.USE.getValue().equals(assetsApplyInfo.getApplyType())) {
            Integer count = applyDetailInfoMapper.selectAssetsInuseStatus(detailInfoBo);
            if (count > 0) {
                throw new RuntimeException("资产：" + detailInfoBo.getAssetsName() + ",已被其他人申请或使用，无法通过审批操作");
            }
        } else if (ApplyTypeEnum.BACK.getValue().equals(assetsApplyInfo.getApplyType())) {
            detailInfoBo.setUserId(assetsApplyInfo.getApplyUserId());
            Integer count = applyDetailInfoMapper.selectAssetsBelongApplyUser(detailInfoBo);
            if (count == 0) {
                throw new RuntimeException("资产：" + detailInfoBo.getAssetsName() + ",不归属当前申请人，无法通过审批操作");
            }
        } else if (ApplyTypeEnum.DELETE.getValue().equals(assetsApplyInfo.getApplyType())) {
            Integer count = applyDetailInfoMapper.selectAssetsInuseStatus(detailInfoBo);
            if (count > 0) {
                throw new RuntimeException("资产：" + detailInfoBo.getAssetsName() + ",已被其他人申请或使用，无法通过审批操作");
            }
        } else if (ApplyTypeEnum.MOVE.getValue().equals(assetsApplyInfo.getApplyType())) {
            detailInfoBo.setUserId(assetsApplyInfo.getApplyUserId());
            Integer count = applyDetailInfoMapper.selectAssetsBelongApplyUser(detailInfoBo);
            if (count == 0) {
                throw new RuntimeException("资产：" + detailInfoBo.getAssetsName() + ",不归属当前申请人，无法通过审批操作");
            }
        }
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.service.impl;
import cn.hutool.core.collection.CollectionUtil;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.DateUtils;
import com.chenrise.common.security.utils.SecurityUtils;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.AssetsClass;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.MyTreeSelect;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.vo.AssetsClassVo;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.vo.AssetsInfoVo;
import com.chenrise.jufe.mapper.AssetsClassMapper;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.IAssetsClassService;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.IAssetsExpireWarnService;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.IAssetsStockWarnService;
import com.chenrise.system.api.model.LoginUser;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.Optional;
import java.util.stream.Collectors;
/**
 * 资产分类Service业务层处理
 *
 * @author sunMing
 * @date 2023-12-27
 */
@Service
public class AssetsClassServiceImpl implements IAssetsClassService {
    @Autowired
    private AssetsClassMapper assetsClassMapper;
    @Autowired
    private IAssetsExpireWarnService assetsExpireWarnService;
    @Autowired
    private IAssetsStockWarnService assetsStockWarnService;
    /**
     * 查询资产分类
     *
     * @param classId 资产分类主键
     * @return 资产分类
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2023-12-27 16:11:08
     */
    @Override
    public AssetsClass selectAssetsClassByClassId(Long classId) {
        return assetsClassMapper.selectAssetsClassByClassId(classId);
    }
    /**
     * 查询资产分类列表
     *
     * @param assetsClass 资产分类
     * @return 资产分类
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2023-12-27 16:11:08
     */
    @Override
    public List<AssetsClass> selectAssetsClassList(AssetsClass assetsClass) {
        return assetsClassMapper.selectAssetsClassList(assetsClass);
    }
    /**
     * 新增资产分类
     *
     * @param assetsClass 资产分类
     * @return 结果
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2023-12-27 16:11:08
     */
    @Override
    public int insertAssetsClass(AssetsClass assetsClass) {
        assetsClass.setCreateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        LoginUser loginUser = SecurityUtils.getLoginUser();
        Optional.of(loginUser).ifPresent(user -> {
            assetsClass.setCreateBy(user.getSysUser().getNickName());
            assetsClass.setCreateById(user.getSysUser().getUserId());
        });
        return assetsClassMapper.insertAssetsClass(assetsClass);
    }
    /**
     * 修改资产分类
     *
     * @param assetsClass 资产分类
     * @return 结果
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2023-12-27 16:11:08
     */
    @Override
    public int updateAssetsClass(AssetsClass assetsClass) {
        assetsClass.setUpdateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        LoginUser loginUser = SecurityUtils.getLoginUser();
        Optional.of(loginUser).ifPresent(user -> {
            assetsClass.setUpdateBy(user.getSysUser().getNickName());
            assetsClass.setUpdateById(user.getSysUser().getUserId());
        });
        return assetsClassMapper.updateAssetsClass(assetsClass);
    }
    /**
     * 批量删除资产分类
     *
     * @param classIds 需要删除的资产分类主键
     * @return 结果
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2023-12-27 16:11:08
     */
    @Override
    public int deleteAssetsClassByClassIds(Long[] classIds) {
        return assetsClassMapper.deleteAssetsClassByClassIds(classIds);
    }
    /**
     * 删除资产分类信息
     *
     * @param classId 资产分类主键
     * @return 结果
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2023-12-27 16:11:08
     */
    @Override
    public int deleteAssetsClassByClassId(Long classId) {
        AssetsClass assetsClass = new AssetsClass();
        assetsClass.setParentId(classId);
        List<AssetsClass> assetsClasses = assetsClassMapper.selectAssetsClassList(assetsClass);
        if (CollectionUtil.isNotEmpty(assetsClasses)) {
            throw new RuntimeException("该分类下存在下级分类，暂不可删除");
        }
        int useNum = assetsClassMapper.selectUseNumByClassId(classId);
        if (useNum > 0) {
            throw new RuntimeException("该分类已关联资产，暂时不可删除");
        }
        return assetsClassMapper.deleteAssetsClassByClassId(classId);
    }
    /**
     * 查询名称是否存在
     *
     * @param assetsClass:
     * @Description: 查询名称是否存在
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2023-12-28 09:43:34
     * @return: int
     */
    @Override
    public int selectCountNameByAssetsClass(AssetsClass assetsClass) {
        return assetsClassMapper.selectCountNameByAssetsClass(assetsClass);
    }
    /**
     * 查询树结构
     *
     * @param assetsClass:
     * @Description: 查询树结构
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2023-12-28 10:17:35
     * @return: java.util.List<com.chenrise.boot.assets.domain.vo.AssetsClassVo>
     */
    @Override
    public List<AssetsClassVo> selectAssetsClassTreeList(AssetsClass assetsClass) {
        return assetsClassMapper.selectAssetsClassTreeList(assetsClass);
    }
    /**
     * 构造树
     *
     * @param infos:
     * @Description: 构造树
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2023-12-28 10:17:59
     * @return: java.util.List<com.chenrise.boot.common.core.domain.TreeSelect>
     */
    @Override
    public List<MyTreeSelect> buildRegionTreeSelect(List<AssetsClassVo> infos) {
        if (infos != null && infos.size() > 0) {
            List<MyTreeSelect> trees = new ArrayList<>();
            for (int i = 0; i < infos.size(); i++) {
                MyTreeSelect t = new MyTreeSelect();
                t.setId(infos.get(i).getClassId());
                t.setLabel(infos.get(i).getClassName());
                t.setParentId(infos.get(i).getParentId());
                List<MyTreeSelect> cTrees = buildRegionTreeSelect(infos.get(i).getChildren());
                if (cTrees != null && cTrees.size() > 0) {
                    t.setChildren(cTrees);
                }
                trees.add(t);
            }
            return trees;
        } else {
            return null;
        }
    }
    /**
     * 生成二维码
     *
     * @Description:
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2023-12-29 08:26:52
     * @return: void
     */
    @Override
    public void createQrcode() {
    }
    /**
     * 获取商品分类id
     *
     * @param list:
     * @Description:
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2024-03-05 08:35:00
     * @return: void
     */
    @Override
    public void setAssetsClassId(List<AssetsInfoVo> list) {
        List<AssetsClass> classInfos = assetsClassMapper.selectAssetsUseInfo();
        // 以父节点名称-子节点名称为键
        Map<String, Long> classMap = classInfos.stream()
                .collect(Collectors.toMap(
                        classInfo -> classInfo.getParentName() + "-" + classInfo.getClassName(),
                        AssetsClass::getClassId
                        , (key1, key2) -> key1
                ));
        for (AssetsInfoVo assetsInfoVo : list) {
            assetsInfoVo.setAssetsClass(classMap.get(assetsInfoVo.getAssetsClassName()));
        }
    }
    @Override
    public int updateWarn(AssetsClass assetsClass) {
        int result = assetsClassMapper.updateWarn(assetsClass);
        if (result > 0) {
            assetsExpireWarnService.sendExpireWarnToAllUserForClassId(assetsClass.getClassId());
            assetsStockWarnService.sendStockWarnToAllUser(assetsClass.getClassId());
        }
        return result;
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.service.impl;
import cn.hutool.core.collection.CollectionUtil;
import com.chenrise.common.core.constant.SecurityConstants;
import com.chenrise.common.core.domain.R;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.Bo.WarnQueryBo;
import com.chenrise.jufe.mapper.AssetsExpireWarnMapper;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.IAssetsExpireWarnService;
import com.chenrise.system.api.RemoteUserService;
import com.chenrise.system.api.RemoteWsService;
import com.chenrise.system.api.domain.AssetsExpireWarn;
import com.chenrise.system.api.domain.SysUser;
import com.chenrise.system.api.domain.WsSendMessage;
import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
import org.springframework.scheduling.annotation.Async;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
import javax.annotation.Resource;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.Date;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.stream.Collectors;
import static com.chenrise.common.core.constant.WsConstants.WS_ALERT_TYPE_EXPIRE;
@RequiredArgsConstructor
@Service
public class AssetsExpireWarnServiceImpl implements IAssetsExpireWarnService {
    private final AssetsExpireWarnMapper assetsExpireWarnMapper;
    @Resource
    private RemoteWsService remoteWsService;
    @Resource
    private RemoteUserService remoteUserService;
    @Override
    public void saveExpireWarn(List<AssetsExpireWarn> assetsExpireWarnList) {
        if (CollectionUtil.isEmpty(assetsExpireWarnList)) {
            return;
        }
        int MAX_SIZE = 50;
        List<List<AssetsExpireWarn>> lists = CollectionUtil.split(assetsExpireWarnList, MAX_SIZE);
        for (List<AssetsExpireWarn> list : lists) {
            assetsExpireWarnMapper.saveBatch(list);
        }
    }
    @Override
    public List<AssetsExpireWarn> getExpireWarnList(Date date) {
        WarnQueryBo warnQueryBo = new WarnQueryBo();
        warnQueryBo.setDate(date);
        return assetsExpireWarnMapper.selectWarnList(warnQueryBo);
    }
    @Override
    public List<AssetsExpireWarn> getList(AssetsExpireWarn expireWarn) {
        return assetsExpireWarnMapper.selectList(expireWarn);
    }
    @Override
    public void sendExpireWarnToUserId(Long userId) {
        List<AssetsExpireWarn> expireWarnList = this.getExpireWarnList(new Date());
        if (CollectionUtil.isNotEmpty(expireWarnList)) {
            List<Long> userIdList = new ArrayList<>();
            userIdList.add(userId);
            expireWarnList.forEach(it -> {
                WsSendMessage wsSendMessage = new WsSendMessage();
                wsSendMessage.setUserIds(userIdList);
                wsSendMessage.setType(WS_ALERT_TYPE_EXPIRE);
                wsSendMessage.setData(it);
                remoteWsService.send(wsSendMessage);
            });
        }
    }
    @Override
    public void sendExpireWarnToAllUser(Long assetsId) {
        WarnQueryBo warnQueryBo = new WarnQueryBo();
        warnQueryBo.setAssetsId(assetsId);
        warnQueryBo.setDate(new Date());
        List<AssetsExpireWarn> expireWarnList = assetsExpireWarnMapper.selectWarnList(warnQueryBo);
        saveAndSend(expireWarnList);
    }
    @Override
    public void sendExpireWarnToAllUser(List<Long> assetsIds) {
        WarnQueryBo warnQueryBo = new WarnQueryBo();
        warnQueryBo.setAssetsIds(assetsIds);
        warnQueryBo.setDate(new Date());
        List<AssetsExpireWarn> expireWarnList = assetsExpireWarnMapper.selectWarnList(warnQueryBo);
        saveAndSend(expireWarnList);
    }
    @Override
    public void sendExpireWarnToAllUserForClassId(Long classId) {
        WarnQueryBo warnQueryBo = new WarnQueryBo();
        warnQueryBo.setClassId(classId);
        warnQueryBo.setDate(new Date());
        List<AssetsExpireWarn> expireWarnList = assetsExpireWarnMapper.selectWarnList(warnQueryBo);
        saveAndSend(expireWarnList);
    }
    @Async
    public void saveAndSend(List<AssetsExpireWarn> expireWarnList) {
        if (CollectionUtil.isEmpty(expireWarnList)) {
            return;
        }
        R<List<SysUser>> userListR = remoteUserService.getUserByRoleKey(SecurityConstants.ROLE_ASSETS_WARN_NOTICE_PERMISSION, SecurityConstants.INNER);
        if (!R.isSuccess(userListR)) {
            return;
        }
        List<SysUser> users = userListR.getData();
        if (CollectionUtil.isEmpty(users)) {
            return;
        }
        String userIdsStr = users.stream().map(u -> String.valueOf(u.getUserId())).collect(Collectors.joining(","));
        String nickNamesStr = users.stream().map(SysUser::getNickName).collect(Collectors.joining(","));
        List<Long> userIds = users.stream().map(SysUser::getUserId).collect(Collectors.toList());
        Date now = new Date();
        expireWarnList.forEach(it -> {
            it.setReceiveUser(nickNamesStr);
            it.setReceiveUserIds(userIdsStr);
            it.setWarnTime(now);
            WsSendMessage wsSendMessage = new WsSendMessage();
            wsSendMessage.setUserIds(userIds);
            wsSendMessage.setType(WS_ALERT_TYPE_EXPIRE);
            wsSendMessage.setData(it);
            remoteWsService.send(wsSendMessage);
        });
        if (CollectionUtil.isNotEmpty(expireWarnList)) {
            this.saveExpireWarn(expireWarnList);
        }
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.service.impl;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult;
import com.chenrise.jufe.mapper.AssetsApplyInfoMapper;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.AssetsFirstPageCountService;

/**

 */

        return AjaxResult.success(countInfo);

     * @param classId:

     * @Date: 2024-01-24 09:09:53
     * @return: com.chenrise.boot.common.core.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @Override
    public AjaxResult getAssetsTypeCountInfo(Long classId) {

            classId = 0L;

    public AjaxResult getAssetsStatusCountInfo() {
        List<Map> countInfo = assetsApplyInfoMapper.getAssetsStatusCountInfo();
        return AjaxResult.success(countInfo);
    }
}
