package com.chenrise.jufe.service.impl;
import cn.hutool.json.JSONUtil;
import com.alibaba.fastjson.JSON;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.DateUtils;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult;
import com.chenrise.common.security.utils.SecurityUtils;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.AssetsPic;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.Bo.AssetsFlowInfoBo;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.Bo.AssetsInfoBo;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.enums.AssetsStatusEnum;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.vo.AssetsInfoVo;
import com.chenrise.jufe.mapper.AssetsFlowInfoMapper;
import com.chenrise.jufe.mapper.AssetsInfoMapper;
import com.chenrise.jufe.mapper.AssetsPicMapper;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.IAssetsApplyInfoService;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.IAssetsInfoService;
import com.chenrise.jufe.util.ImportDataCheck;
import com.chenrise.jufe.util.ZngCode;
import lombok.Synchronized;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
import org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;
import java.time.LocalDate;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
/**
 * 资产信息（主要）Service业务层处理
 *
 * @author sunMing
 * @date 2023-12-27
 */
@Service
public class AssetsInfoServiceImpl implements IAssetsInfoService {
    @Autowired
    private AssetsInfoMapper assetsInfoMapper;
    @Autowired
    private AssetsPicMapper assetsPicMapper;
    @Autowired
    private AssetsFlowInfoMapper assetsFlowInfoMapper;
    @Autowired
    private IAssetsApplyInfoService assetsApplyInfoService;
    /**
     * 查询资产信息（主要）
     *
     * @param assetsId 资产信息（主要）主键
     * @return 资产信息（主要）
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2023-12-27 16:11:08
     */
    @Override
    public AssetsInfoBo selectAssetsInfoByAssetsId(Long assetsId) {
        AssetsInfoBo info = assetsInfoMapper.selectAssetsInfoByAssetsId(assetsId);
        String base64 = ZngCode.getQrCodeBase64(info.getAssetsCode(), info.getAssetsName());
        info.setQrCode(base64);
        return info;
    }
    /**
     * 根据扫码结果获取详细信息
     *
     * @param code:
     * @Description: 根据扫码结果获取详细信息
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2024-01-25 09:48:03
     * @return: com.chenrise.boot.common.core.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @Override
    public AjaxResult getAssetsDetailInfoByCode(String code) {
        AssetsInfoBo info = assetsInfoMapper.getAssetsDetailInfoByCode(code);
        return AjaxResult.success(info);
    }
    /**
     * 查询资产信息（主要）列表
     *
     * @param assetsInfo 资产信息（主要）
     * @return 资产信息（主要）
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2023-12-27 16:11:08
     */
    @Override
    public List<AssetsInfoBo> selectAssetsInfoList(AssetsInfoBo assetsInfo) {
        return assetsInfoMapper.selectAssetsInfoList(assetsInfo);
    }
    /**
     * 新增资产信息（主要）
     *
     * @param assetsInfo 资产信息（主要）
     * @return 结果
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2023-12-27 16:11:08
     */
    @Override
    @Transactional(rollbackFor = Exception.class)
    public int insertAssetsInfo(AssetsInfoBo assetsInfo) {
        List<AssetsPic> picList = assetsInfo.getAssetsPicList();
        String codeInfo = getWzNo();
        assetsInfo.setAssetsCode(codeInfo);
        assetsInfo.setCreateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        assetsInfo.setCreateById(SecurityUtils.getUserId());
        assetsInfo.setCreateBy(SecurityUtils.getLoginUser().getSysUser().getNickName());
        int res = assetsInfoMapper.insertAssetsInfo(assetsInfo);
        if (picList != null && picList.size() > 0) {
            for (int i = 0; i < picList.size(); i++) {
                picList.get(i).setAssetsId(assetsInfo.getAssetsId());
                picList.get(i).setSort((long) i);
                assetsPicMapper.insertAssetsPic(picList.get(i));
            }
        }
        return res;
    }
    /**
     * 生成物资编号
     *
     * @Description:
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2024-01-02 13:13:00
     * @return: java.lang.String
     */
    @Synchronized
    private String getWzNo() {
        LocalDate date = LocalDate.now();
        Integer dataCount = assetsInfoMapper.getAllCountInfo();
        dataCount = dataCount + 1;
        // 将数据数量转化为字符串，不足6位用0补齐
        String dataCountStr = String.format("%07d", dataCount);
        // 返回最终的编号
        return "WZ1" + dataCountStr;
    }
    /**
     * 修改资产信息（主要）
     *
     * @param assetsInfo 资产信息（主要）
     * @return 结果
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2023-12-27 16:11:08
     */
    @Override
    @Transactional(rollbackFor = Exception.class)
    public int updateAssetsInfo(AssetsInfoBo assetsInfo) {
        List<AssetsPic> picList = assetsInfo.getAssetsPicList();
        assetsPicMapper.deleteAssetsPicByAssetsId(assetsInfo.getAssetsId());
        if (picList != null && picList.size() > 0) {
            for (int i = 0; i < picList.size(); i++) {
                picList.get(i).setAssetsId(assetsInfo.getAssetsId());
                picList.get(i).setSort((long) i);
                assetsPicMapper.insertAssetsPic(picList.get(i));
            }
        }
        assetsInfo.setUpdateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        assetsInfo.setUpdateById(SecurityUtils.getUserId());
        assetsInfo.setUpdateBy(SecurityUtils.getLoginUser().getSysUser().getNickName());
        return assetsInfoMapper.updateAssetsInfo(assetsInfo);
    }
    /**
     * 批量删除资产信息（主要）
     *
     * @param assetsIds 需要删除的资产信息（主要）主键
     * @return 结果
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2023-12-27 16:11:08
     */
    @Override
    public AjaxResult deleteAssetsInfoByAssetsIds(Long[] assetsIds) {
        Boolean flag = false;
        for (int i = 0; i < assetsIds.length; i++) {
            AssetsInfoBo info = assetsInfoMapper.selectAssetsInfoByAssetsId(assetsIds[i]);
            if (info.getAssetsStatus().equals(AssetsStatusEnum.USE.getValue())) {
                flag = true;
                break;
            }
        }
        if (flag) {
            return AjaxResult.error("在用的资产无法进行删除");
        }
        AjaxResult result = assetsApplyInfoService.checkStatusInfo(assetsIds);
        if (String.valueOf(result.get("code")).equals("500")) {
            return result;
        }
        return AjaxResult.success(assetsInfoMapper.deleteAssetsInfoByAssetsIds(assetsIds));
    }
    /**
     * 删除资产信息（主要）信息
     *
     * @param assetsId 资产信息（主要）主键
     * @return 结果
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2023-12-27 16:11:08
     */
    @Override
    public int deleteAssetsInfoByAssetsId(Long assetsId) {
        return assetsInfoMapper.deleteAssetsInfoByAssetsId(assetsId);
    }
    /**
     * 导入资产数据
     *
     * @param list:
     * @Description: 导入资产数据
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2023-12-29 13:45:19
     * @return: java.lang.String
     */
    @Override
    @ImportDataCheck
    public AjaxResult importData(List<AssetsInfoVo> list) {
        List<AssetsInfoBo> allNewInfo = new ArrayList<>();
        for (int i = 0; i < list.size(); i++) {
            Integer countNum = list.get(i).getCountNum();
            if (countNum == null) {
                countNum = 1;
            }
            for (int j = 0; j < countNum; j++) {
                AssetsInfoBo tempBo = JSON.parseObject(JSONUtil.toJsonStr(JSONUtil.toJsonStr(list.get(i))), AssetsInfoBo.class);
                allNewInfo.add(tempBo);
            }
        }
        for (int i = 0; i < allNewInfo.size(); i++) {
            insertAssetsInfo(allNewInfo.get(i));
        }
        return AjaxResult.success("导入成功");
    }
    /**
     * 查询流转记录
     *
     * @param assetsId:
     * @Description: 查询流转记录
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2024-01-23 09:12:10
     * @return: com.chenrise.boot.common.core.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @Override
    public AjaxResult selectAssetsFlowInfoByAssetsId(Long assetsId) {
        AssetsFlowInfoBo setBo = new AssetsFlowInfoBo();
        setBo.setAssetsId(assetsId);
        List<AssetsFlowInfoBo> flowInfos = assetsFlowInfoMapper.selectAssetsFlowInfoList(setBo);
        return AjaxResult.success(flowInfos);
    }
    /**
     * 查询当前登录人的所属资产
     *
     * @Description:
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2024-01-24 12:44:38
     * @return: com.chenrise.boot.common.core.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @Override
    public AjaxResult myAssetsInfos() {
        Long userId = SecurityUtils.getUserId();
        if (userId == null) {
            return AjaxResult.error("未获取到登录人信息，请重新登录");
        }
        List<AssetsInfoBo> infos = assetsInfoMapper.selectMyAssetsInfos(userId);
        return AjaxResult.success(infos);
    }
}

package com.chenrise.jufe.service.impl;
import cn.hutool.core.collection.CollectionUtil;
import com.chenrise.common.core.constant.SecurityConstants;
import com.chenrise.common.core.domain.R;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.Bo.WarnQueryBo;
import com.chenrise.jufe.mapper.AssetsStockWarnMapper;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.IAssetsStockWarnService;
import com.chenrise.system.api.RemoteUserService;
import com.chenrise.system.api.RemoteWsService;
import com.chenrise.system.api.domain.AssetsStockWarn;
import com.chenrise.system.api.domain.SysUser;
import com.chenrise.system.api.domain.WsSendMessage;
import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
import org.springframework.scheduling.annotation.Async;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
import javax.annotation.Resource;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.Date;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.stream.Collectors;
import static com.chenrise.common.core.constant.WsConstants.WS_ALERT_TYPE_STOCK;
@RequiredArgsConstructor
@Service
public class AssetsStockWarnServiceImpl implements IAssetsStockWarnService {
    private final AssetsStockWarnMapper assetsStockWarnMapper;
    @Resource
    private RemoteWsService remoteWsService;
    @Resource
    private RemoteUserService remoteUserService;
    @Override
    public void saveStockWarn(List<AssetsStockWarn> assetsStockWarnList) {
        if (CollectionUtil.isEmpty(assetsStockWarnList)) {
            return;
        }
        int MAX_SIZE = 50;
        List<List<AssetsStockWarn>> lists = CollectionUtil.split(assetsStockWarnList, MAX_SIZE);
        for (List<AssetsStockWarn> list : lists) {
            assetsStockWarnMapper.saveBatch(list);
        }
    }
    @Override
    public List<AssetsStockWarn> getStockWarnList() {
        return assetsStockWarnMapper.selectWarnList(new WarnQueryBo());
    }
    @Override
    public List<AssetsStockWarn> getList(AssetsStockWarn assetsStockWarn) {
        return assetsStockWarnMapper.selectList(assetsStockWarn);
    }
    @Override
    public void sendStockWarnToUserId(Long userId) {
        List<AssetsStockWarn> stockWarnList = this.getStockWarnList();
        if (CollectionUtil.isNotEmpty(stockWarnList)) {
            List<Long> userIdList = new ArrayList<>();
            userIdList.add(userId);
            stockWarnList.forEach(it -> {
                WsSendMessage wsSendMessage = new WsSendMessage();
                wsSendMessage.setUserIds(userIdList);
                wsSendMessage.setType(WS_ALERT_TYPE_STOCK);
                wsSendMessage.setData(it);
                remoteWsService.send(wsSendMessage);
            });
        }
    }
    @Override
    public void sendStockWarnToAllUser(Long classId) {
        WarnQueryBo warnQueryBo = new WarnQueryBo();
        warnQueryBo.setClassId(classId);
        List<AssetsStockWarn> assetsStockWarns = assetsStockWarnMapper.selectWarnList(warnQueryBo);
        saveAndSend(assetsStockWarns);
    }
    @Override
    public void sendStockWarnToAllUserByAssetsIds(List<Long> assetsIds) {
        WarnQueryBo warnQueryBo = new WarnQueryBo();
        warnQueryBo.setAssetsIds(assetsIds);
        List<AssetsStockWarn> assetsStockWarns = assetsStockWarnMapper.selectWarnList(warnQueryBo);
        saveAndSend(assetsStockWarns);
    }
    @Async
    protected void saveAndSend(List<AssetsStockWarn> assetsStockWarns) {
        if (CollectionUtil.isEmpty(assetsStockWarns)) {
            return;
        }
        if (CollectionUtil.isEmpty(assetsStockWarns)) {
            return;
        }
        R<List<SysUser>> userListR = remoteUserService.getUserByRoleKey(SecurityConstants.ROLE_ASSETS_WARN_NOTICE_PERMISSION, SecurityConstants.INNER);
        if (!R.isSuccess(userListR)) {
            return;
        }
        List<SysUser> users = userListR.getData();
        if (CollectionUtil.isEmpty(users)) {
            return;
        }
        String userIdsStr = users.stream().map(u -> String.valueOf(u.getUserId())).collect(Collectors.joining(","));
        String nickNamesStr = users.stream().map(SysUser::getNickName).collect(Collectors.joining(","));
        List<Long> userIds = users.stream().map(SysUser::getUserId).collect(Collectors.toList());
        Date now = new Date();
        assetsStockWarns.forEach(it -> {
            it.setReceiveUser(nickNamesStr);
            it.setReceiveUserIds(userIdsStr);
            it.setWarnTime(now);
            WsSendMessage wsSendMessage = new WsSendMessage();
            wsSendMessage.setUserIds(userIds);
            wsSendMessage.setType(WS_ALERT_TYPE_STOCK);
            wsSendMessage.setData(it);
            remoteWsService.send(wsSendMessage);
        });
        if (CollectionUtil.isNotEmpty(assetsStockWarns)) {
            this.saveStockWarn(assetsStockWarns);
        }
    }
}

import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.DateUtils;

package com.chenrise.jufe.service.impl;
import cn.hutool.json.JSONObject;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult;
import com.chenrise.jufe.mapper.CurriculumBoardMapper;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.ICurriculumBoardService;
import com.chenrise.system.api.RemotePatrolService;
import com.chenrise.system.jufeApi.domain.CurrentWeekVo;
import com.chenrise.system.jufeApi.domain.SchoolJxzVo;
import com.fasterxml.jackson.core.JsonProcessingException;
import com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.HashMap;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
/**
 * @ClassName CurriculumBoardServiceImpl
 * @Description 课程看板Service实现类
 * @Author lougang
 * @Date 2024-11-01 15:56
 * @Version 1.0
 */
@Service
public class CurriculumBoardServiceImpl implements ICurriculumBoardService {
    @Autowired
    private CurriculumBoardMapper curriculumBoardMapper;
    @Autowired
    private RemotePatrolService remotePatrolService;
    /**
     * 查询课程数量统计
     * @Description: 查询课程数量统计
     * @Author: lougang
     * @Date: 2024-11-01 16:07
     * @return: java.lang.Integer
     */
    @Override
    public Integer getCourseCount() {
        return curriculumBoardMapper.getCourseCount();
    }
    /**
     * 查询学生数量
     * @Description: 查询学生数量
     * @Author: lougang
     * @Date: 2024-11-01 16:22
     * @return: java.lang.Integer
     */
    @Override
    public Integer getStudentCount() {
        return curriculumBoardMapper.getStudentCount();
    }
    /**
     * 查询教师数量
     * @Description: 查询教师数量
     * @Author: lougang
     * @Date: 2024-11-01 16:25
     * @return: java.lang.Integer
     */
    @Override
    public Integer getTeacherCount() {
        return curriculumBoardMapper.getTeacherCount();
    }
    /**
     * 开课单位数量
     * @Description: 开课单位数量
     * @Author: lougang
     * @Date: 2024-11-01 16:27
     * @return: java.lang.Integer
     */
    @Override
    public Integer getOpenCourseDeptCount() {
        return curriculumBoardMapper.getOpenCourseDeptCount();
    }
    /**
     * 查询课程占比
     * @Description: 查询课程占比
     * @Author: lougang
     * @Date: 2024-11-01 17:00
     * @return: java.util.List<cn.hutool.json.JSONObject>
     */
    @Override
    public List<JSONObject> getCourseProportion() {
        return curriculumBoardMapper.getCourseProportion();
    }
    /**
     * 查询教师课时排行
     * @Description: 查询教师课时排行
     * @Author: lougang
     * @Date: 2024-11-01 17:04
     * @return: java.util.List<cn.hutool.json.JSONObject>
     */
    @Override
    public List<JSONObject> getTeacherCourseProportion() {
        return curriculumBoardMapper.getTeacherCourseProportion();
    }
    /**
     * 查询课程安排
     * @Description: 查询课程安排
     * @Author: lougang
     * @Date: 2024-11-04 8:51
     * @param week:
     * @return: java.util.List<java.util.Map>
     */
    @Override
    public Map getCourseArrangement(Integer week) throws JsonProcessingException {
        Map resMap = new HashMap();
        SchoolJxzVo lastSchoolJxz = remotePatrolService.getLastSchoolJxzWeek();
        if(week - 1 == lastSchoolJxz.getJxz()){
            resMap.put("lastWeek","true");
        }
        if(week - 1 == 0){
            resMap.put("firstWeek","true");
        }
        // 查询教学周信息
        List<SchoolJxzVo> schoolJxzVoList = remotePatrolService.getSchoolJxzByWeek(week - 1);
        List<Map> resultList = new ArrayList<>();
        // 遍历教学周信息
        for (SchoolJxzVo schoolJxzVo:schoolJxzVoList) {
            // 根据日期查询所有课程
            List<JSONObject> jsonObjectList = curriculumBoardMapper.getCourseArrangement(schoolJxzVo.getRq());
            // 查询当天的课程总数
            Integer count = curriculumBoardMapper.getDayCourseTotal(schoolJxzVo.getRq());
            Map map = new HashMap();
            String key = "星期" + schoolJxzVo.getXq();
            if(("星期" + schoolJxzVo.getXq()).equals("星期7")){
                key = "星期日";
            }
            map.put(key,jsonObjectList);
            map.put(schoolJxzVo.getXq(),count);
            resultList.add(map);
        }
        resMap.put("courseArrangement",resultList);
        return resMap;
    }
    /**
     * 查询当前周
     * @Description: 查询当前周
     * @Author: lougang
     * @Date: 2024-11-05 12:35
     * @return: com.chenrise.system.jufeApi.domain.SchoolJxzVo
     */
    @Override
    public CurrentWeekVo getCurrentWeek() {
        CurrentWeekVo schoolJxzVo = remotePatrolService.getCurrentWeek();
        return schoolJxzVo;
    }
    /**
     * 查询教学周开始时间及结束时间
     * @Description: 查询教学周开始时间及结束时间
     * @Author: lougang
     * @Date: 2024-11-05 17:05
     * @return: com.chenrise.system.jufeApi.domain.CurrentWeekVo
     */
    @Override
    public CurrentWeekVo getWeekLastAndEndTime(Integer week) {
        CurrentWeekVo schoolJxzVo = remotePatrolService.getWeekLastAndEndTime(week);
        return schoolJxzVo;
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.service.impl;
import com.chenrise.common.security.utils.SecurityUtils;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.DevAuthorize;
import com.chenrise.jufe.mapper.DevAuthorizeMapper;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.IDevAuthorizeService;
import com.chenrise.system.api.domain.SysUser;
import com.chenrise.system.api.enums.AuthorizeDeviceTypeEnum;
import com.chenrise.system.api.model.LoginUser;
import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
import java.util.Date;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Optional;
@Service
@RequiredArgsConstructor
public class DevAuthorizeServiceImpl implements IDevAuthorizeService {
    private final DevAuthorizeMapper devAuthorizeMapper;
    @Override
    public List<DevAuthorize> getList(DevAuthorize devAuthorize) {
        return devAuthorizeMapper.selectList(devAuthorize);
    }
    @Override
    public boolean editAuthorizeNum(DevAuthorize devAuthorize) {
        LoginUser loginUser = SecurityUtils.getLoginUser();
        devAuthorize.setUpdateById(loginUser.getUserid());
        devAuthorize.setUpdateBy(Optional.of(loginUser.getSysUser()).orElse(new SysUser()).getNickName());
        devAuthorize.setUpdateTime(new Date());
        return devAuthorizeMapper.updateAuthorizeNum(devAuthorize) > 0;
    }
    @Override
    public int getAuthorizeNumByType(String deviceType) {
        return devAuthorizeMapper.selectAuthorizeNumByType(deviceType);
    }
    @Override
    public boolean checkDeviceAuthorizeNum(AuthorizeDeviceTypeEnum deviceType, int currentNum) {
        int authorizeNum = getAuthorizeNumByType(deviceType.getValue());
        return currentNum < authorizeNum;
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.service.impl;
import java.util.Date;
import java.util.HashMap;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import cn.hutool.core.date.DateUtil;
import cn.hutool.core.util.HexUtil;
import com.chenrise.common.core.domain.R;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.StringUtils;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.uuid.IdUtils;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.DevLockCardInfo;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.DevLockInfo;
import com.chenrise.jufe.mapper.DevLockCardInfoMapper;
import com.chenrise.jufe.mapper.DevLockInfoMapper;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.DeviceCommandService;
import com.chenrise.jufe.util.Tools;
import com.chenrise.system.api.RemoteLockService;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
import com.chenrise.jufe.mapper.DevCardInfoMapper;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.DevCardInfo;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.IDevCardInfoService;
import org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;
import javax.annotation.Resource;
/**
 * 门卡Service业务层处理
 * 
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2023-04-06
 */
@Service
public class DevCardInfoServiceImpl implements IDevCardInfoService 
{
    @Autowired
    private DevCardInfoMapper devCardInfoMapper;
    @Autowired
    private DevLockCardInfoMapper devLockCardInfoMapper;
    @Resource
    private DeviceCommandService commandService;
    @Resource
    private RemoteLockService remoteLockService;
    /**
     * 查询门卡
     * 
     * @param id 门卡主键
     * @return 门卡
     */
    @Override
    public DevCardInfo selectDevCardInfoById(Long id)
    {
        DevCardInfo card = devCardInfoMapper.selectDevCardInfoById(id);
        DevLockCardInfo cardLock = new DevLockCardInfo();
        cardLock.setCardId(id);
        List<DevLockCardInfo> lockBefRefs = devLockCardInfoMapper.selectDevLockCardInfoList(cardLock);
        if(card!=null){
            card.setLockRefs(lockBefRefs);
        }
        return card;
    }
    /**
     * 查询门卡列表
     * 
     * @param devCardInfo 门卡
     * @return 门卡
     */
    @Override
    public List<DevCardInfo> selectDevCardInfoList(DevCardInfo devCardInfo)
    {
        return devCardInfoMapper.selectDevCardInfoList(devCardInfo);
    }
    /**
     * 新增门卡
     * 
     * @param devCardInfo 门卡
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Transactional
    @Override
    public int insertDevCardInfo(DevCardInfo devCardInfo)
    {
        DevCardInfo countCode = new DevCardInfo();
        countCode.setCardCode(devCardInfo.getCardCode());
        Integer countC = devCardInfoMapper.selectDevCardInfoCode(countCode);
        if(countC!=null&&countC>0){
            return -2;      //卡号重复
        }
        DevCardInfo countName = new DevCardInfo();
        countName.setCardName(devCardInfo.getCardName());
        Integer count = devCardInfoMapper.selectDevCardInfoCode(countName);
        if(count!=null&&count>0){
            return -1;      //名称重复
        }
        devCardInfoMapper.insertDevCardInfo(devCardInfo);
        String status = devCardInfo.getStatus();
        if(status==null){
            status="0";
        }
        List<DevLockCardInfo> lockRefs = devCardInfo.getLockRefs();
        if(lockRefs!=null&&lockRefs.size()>0){
            for(DevLockCardInfo card:lockRefs){
                card.setCardId(devCardInfo.getId());
                card.setCardCode(devCardInfo.getCardCode());
                Integer cardSort = devLockCardInfoMapper.selectMissSort(card);
                card.setCardSort(cardSort);
                String userSortStr = String.valueOf((cardSort+1));
                String userId =   String.valueOf(cardSort+1); //生成指定用户id
                for(int i=0;i<8-userSortStr.length();i++){
                    userId= "0"+userId;
                }
                card.setAddTime(new Date());
                devLockCardInfoMapper.insertDevLockCardInfo(card);
                if(status.equals("0")){
                    commandService.lockAddPassword(card.getLockId(),card.getCardCode(),"",1,userId);
                }
            }
        }
        return 1;
    }
    /**
     * 修改门卡
     * 
     * @param devCardInfo 门卡
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Transactional
    @Override
    public int updateDevCardInfo(DevCardInfo devCardInfo)
    {
        DevCardInfo countCode = new DevCardInfo();
        countCode.setId(devCardInfo.getId());
        countCode.setCardCode(devCardInfo.getCardCode());
        Integer countC = devCardInfoMapper.selectDevCardInfoCode(countCode);
        if(countC!=null&&countC>0){
            return -2;      //卡号重复
        }
        DevCardInfo countName = new DevCardInfo();
        countName.setId(devCardInfo.getId());
        countName.setCardName(devCardInfo.getCardName());
        Integer count = devCardInfoMapper.selectDevCardInfoCode(countName);
        if(count!=null&&count>0){
            return -1;      //名称重复
        }
        devCardInfoMapper.updateDevCardInfo(devCardInfo);
        String status = devCardInfo.getStatus();
        if(status==null){
            status="0";
        }
        DevLockCardInfo card = new DevLockCardInfo();
        card.setCardId(devCardInfo.getId());
        List<DevLockCardInfo> lockRefs = devCardInfo.getLockRefs();
        //查询之前的门卡用作对比
        List<DevLockCardInfo> lockBefRefs = devLockCardInfoMapper.selectDevLockCardInfoList(card);
        //之前没有则不进行操作
        if(lockBefRefs!=null&&lockBefRefs.size()>0){
            for(DevLockCardInfo refBef :lockBefRefs){
                Boolean flag = false;
                if(lockRefs!=null&&lockRefs.size()>0){
                    for(DevLockCardInfo ref:lockRefs ){
                        if(refBef.getLockId()!=null&&ref.getLockId()!=null&&refBef.getLockId()==ref.getLockId()){
                            if(refBef.getCardCode()!=null&&devCardInfo.getCardCode()!=null&&refBef.getCardCode().equals(devCardInfo.getCardCode())){
                                flag=true;
                                break;
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                //不存在则尽行删除操作，并从门锁中删除
                if(!flag){
                    devLockCardInfoMapper.deleteDevLockCardInfoById(refBef.getId());
                    Integer cardSort = refBef.getCardSort();
                    String userSortStr = String.valueOf((cardSort+1));
                    String userId =   String.valueOf((cardSort+1)); //生成指定用户id
                    for(int i=0;i<8-userSortStr.length();i++){
                        userId= "0"+userId;
                    }
                    commandService.lockAddPassword(refBef.getLockId(),"",refBef.getCardCode(),1,userId);
                }
            }
        }
        if(lockRefs!=null&&lockRefs.size()>0){
            for(DevLockCardInfo ref:lockRefs ){
                Boolean flag = false;
                if(lockBefRefs!=null&&lockBefRefs.size()>0){
                    for(DevLockCardInfo refBef :lockBefRefs){
                        if(refBef.getLockId()!=null&&ref.getLockId()!=null&&refBef.getLockId()==ref.getLockId()){
                            if(refBef.getCardCode()!=null&&devCardInfo.getCardCode()!=null&&refBef.getCardCode().equals(devCardInfo.getCardCode())){
                                flag=true;
                                break;
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                if(!flag){
                    card.setCardId(devCardInfo.getId());
                    card.setCardCode(devCardInfo.getCardCode());
                    card.setLockId(ref.getLockId());
                    Integer cardSort = devLockCardInfoMapper.selectMissSort(card);
                    card.setCardSort(cardSort);
                    String userSortStr = String.valueOf(cardSort+1);
                    String userId =   String.valueOf(cardSort+1); //生成指定用户id
                    for(int i=0;i<8-userSortStr.length();i++){
                        userId= "0"+userId;
                    }
                    card.setAddTime(new Date());
                    devLockCardInfoMapper.insertDevLockCardInfo(card);
                    if(status.equals("0")){
                        commandService.lockAddPassword(card.getLockId(),card.getCardCode(),"",1,userId);
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        return 1;
    }
    /**
     * 批量删除门卡
     * 
     * @param ids 需要删除的门卡主键
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int deleteDevCardInfoByIds(Long[] ids)
    {
//        Map<String ,String> mapLock = new HashMap<>();
//        mapLock.put("cmd","606");
//        mapLock.put("targetType","4");
//        mapLock.put("deviceType","220");//网关
//        mapLock.put("userAuth","1");//用户权限  1   全权限  2   50%权限（仅公寓锁）  3   0%权限
//        mapLock.put("headName","deleteWhiteList");
//        mapLock.put("ipKey","192.168.1.183:31001");
//        mapLock.put("uuid", IdUtils.simpleUUID());
//        R<Object> ass =remoteLockService.lockSendCommand(mapLock);
        for(Long id:ids){
            DevLockCardInfo card = new DevLockCardInfo();
            card.setCardId(id);
            List<DevLockCardInfo> cards = devLockCardInfoMapper.selectDevLockCardInfoList(card);
            if(cards!=null&&cards.size()>0){
                for(DevLockCardInfo cardSel : cards){
                    Integer cardSort = cardSel.getCardSort();
                    String userSortStr = String.valueOf(cardSort+1);
                    String userId =   String.valueOf(cardSort+1); //生成指定用户id
                    for(int i=0;i<8-userSortStr.length();i++){
                        userId= "0"+userId;
                    }
                    //取消门锁上的门卡
                    commandService.lockAddPassword(cardSel.getLockId(),"",cardSel.getCardCode(),1,userId);
                    //删除门卡门锁的关联
                    devLockCardInfoMapper.deleteDevLockCardInfoById(cardSel.getId());
                }
            }
        }
        return devCardInfoMapper.deleteDevCardInfoByIds(ids);
    }
    /**
     * 删除门卡信息
     * 
     * @param id 门卡主键
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int deleteDevCardInfoById(Long id)
    {
        return devCardInfoMapper.deleteDevCardInfoById(id);
    }
    /**
     * @Description:
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date:  16:40:01
     * @param devCardInfo: 
     * @return: int
     */
    @Override
    public int changeStatus(DevCardInfo devCardInfo) {
        changeCardToLock(devCardInfo);
        devCardInfoMapper.updateDevCardInfo(devCardInfo);
        return 1;
    }
    /**
     * @Description:修改门卡下发状态
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-04-06 16:20:26
     * @param devCardInfo:
     * @return: void
     */
    private  void changeCardToLock(DevCardInfo devCardInfo){
        DevLockCardInfo card = new DevLockCardInfo();
        card.setCardId(devCardInfo.getId());
        List<DevLockCardInfo> cards = devLockCardInfoMapper.selectDevLockCardInfoList(card);
        if(cards!=null&&cards.size()>0){
            String status = devCardInfo.getStatus();
            for(DevLockCardInfo nfc:cards){
                Integer cardSort = nfc.getCardSort();
                String userSortStr = String.valueOf(cardSort+1);
                String userId =  String.valueOf(cardSort+1); //生成指定用户id
                for(int i=0;i<8-userSortStr.length();i++){
                    userId= "0"+userId;
                }
                if(status!=null&&status.equals("0")){
                    commandService.lockAddPassword(nfc.getLockId(),nfc.getCardCode(),"",1,userId);
                } else {
                    commandService.lockAddPassword(nfc.getLockId(),"",nfc.getCardCode(),1,userId);
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.service.impl;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.DateUtils;
import com.chenrise.common.security.utils.SecurityUtils;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.DevClassBoard;
import com.chenrise.jufe.mapper.DevClassBoardMapper;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.IDevAuthorizeService;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.IDevClassBoardService;
import com.chenrise.system.api.enums.AuthorizeDeviceTypeEnum;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
import java.util.List;
/**
 * 班牌信息Service业务层处理
 * 
 * @author liyiying
 * @date 2022-11-22
 */
@Service
public class DevClassBoardServiceImpl implements IDevClassBoardService 
{
    @Autowired
    private DevClassBoardMapper devClassBoardMapper;
    @Autowired
    private IDevAuthorizeService devAuthorizeService;
    /**
     * 查询班牌信息
     * @Description: 选择开发类板板id
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 16:28:28
     * @param boardId 班牌信息主键
     * @return {@link DevClassBoard }
     */
    @Override
    public DevClassBoard selectDevClassBoardByBoardId(Long boardId)
    {
        return devClassBoardMapper.selectDevClassBoardByBoardId(boardId);
    }
    /**
     * 查询班牌信息列表
     * @Description: 查询班牌信息列表
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 16:28:23
     * @param devClassBoard 班牌信息
     * @return {@link List }<{@link DevClassBoard }>
     */
    @Override
    public List<DevClassBoard> selectDevClassBoardList(DevClassBoard devClassBoard)
    {
        return devClassBoardMapper.selectDevClassBoardList(devClassBoard);
    }
    /**
     * 新增班牌信息
     * @Description: 新增班牌信息
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 16:28:17
     * @param devClassBoard 班牌信息
     * @return int
     */
    @Override
    public int insertDevClassBoard(DevClassBoard devClassBoard)
    {
        // 授权数量校验
        if (!devAuthorizeService.checkDeviceAuthorizeNum(AuthorizeDeviceTypeEnum.CLASS_BOARD, getCurrentNum())) {
            throw new RuntimeException("已达到设备授权数上限");
        }
        devClassBoard.setDeptId(SecurityUtils.getLoginUser().getSysUser().getDeptId());
        devClassBoard.setCreateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        devClassBoard.setCreateBy(SecurityUtils.getUserId()+"");
        return devClassBoardMapper.insertDevClassBoard(devClassBoard);
    }
    /**
     * 修改班牌信息
     * @Description: 修改班牌信息
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 16:28:09
     * @param devClassBoard 班牌信息
     * @return int
     */
    @Override
    public int updateDevClassBoard(DevClassBoard devClassBoard)
    {
        devClassBoard.setUpdateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        devClassBoard.setUpdateBy(SecurityUtils.getUserId()+"");
        return devClassBoardMapper.updateDevClassBoard(devClassBoard);
    }
    /**
     * 批量删除班牌信息
     * @Description: 批量删除班牌信息
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 16:28:04
     * @param boardIds 需要删除的班牌信息主键
     * @return int
     */
    @Override
    public int deleteDevClassBoardByBoardIds(Long[] boardIds)
    {
        return devClassBoardMapper.deleteDevClassBoardByBoardIds(boardIds);
    }
    /**
     * 删除班牌信息信息
     * @Description: 删除班牌信息信息
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 16:27:53
     * @param boardId 班牌信息主键
     * @return int
     */
    @Override
    public int deleteDevClassBoardByBoardId(Long boardId)
    {
        return devClassBoardMapper.deleteDevClassBoardByBoardId(boardId);
    }
    /**
     * 启用停用班牌信息
     * @Description: 启用停用班牌信息
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 16:27:42
     * @param boardIds 班牌信息主键
     * @return int
     */
    @Override
    public int updateDevClassBoardStatusByBoardIds(Long[] boardIds)
    {
        for (Long boardId:boardIds
        ) {
            DevClassBoard board = devClassBoardMapper.selectDevClassBoardByBoardId(boardId);
            board.setStatus("1".equals(board.getStatus())?"2":"1");
            devClassBoardMapper.updateDevClassBoard(board);
        }
        return 1;
    }
    /**
     * @Description:根据班牌ip查询房间id
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-01-12 16:39:14
     * @param ip:
     * @return: java.lang.Long
     */
    @Override
    public Long selectRoomIdByIp(String ip) {
        Long roomId = devClassBoardMapper.selectRoomIdByIp(ip);
        return roomId;
    }
    @Override
    public int getCurrentNum() {
        return devClassBoardMapper.selectCurrentNum();
    }
}

/**
 * @Description 指令下发实现类
 * @Author sunming
 * @Date 2022-12-08 12:31:00
 */
@Service
public class DeveceCommandServiceImpl implements DeviceCommandService {
    @Resource
    private RemoteLockService remoteLockService;
    @Resource
    private RemotePowerService remotePowerService;
    @Resource
    private DevPowerNodeInfoMapper DevPowerNodeInfoMapper;
    @Resource
    private DevLockInfoMapper devLockInfoMapper;
    @Resource
    private DevGroupingInfoMapper devGroupingInfoMapper;
    @Resource
    private IDevGatewayInfoService gatewayInfoService;
    @Resource
    private DevLockConLogMapper devLockConLogMapper;
    private ExecutorService executor = Executors.newSingleThreadExecutor();
    /**
     * @Description:连接网关
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-12-10 14:10:44
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.domain.R<com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo>
     */
    @Override
    public R<Object> connectGateway() {
        List<Map<String, String>> ipInfos = new ArrayList<>();
        List<DevGatewayInfo> geteways = gatewayInfoService.selectDevGatewayList();
        Map<String, String> ipInfo1 = new HashMap<>();
        ipInfo1.put("ip", "192.168.1.142");
        ipInfo1.put("port", "8899");
        ipInfo1.put("status", "0");
        ipInfos.add(ipInfo1);
        for (int i = 0; i < geteways.size(); i++) {
            if (geteways.get(i) != null && geteways.get(i).getUpPort() != null) {
                Map<String, String> ipInfo = new HashMap<>();
                ipInfo.put("ip", geteways.get(i).getGatewayIp());
                ipInfo.put("port", String.valueOf(geteways.get(i).getUpPort()));
                ipInfo.put("status", String.valueOf(geteways.get(i).getStatus()));
                ipInfos.add(ipInfo);
            }
        }
        R<Object> res = remoteLockService.lockGatewayConnect(ipInfos);
        return res;
    }
    /**
     * @param id:
     * @Description:根据门锁id控制门锁常开长关
     * @Author: sunming 测试后可成功开锁
     * @Date: 2022-12-08 12:43:54
     * @return: void
     */
    @Override
    public void openLockById(Long id, String status, String controlType, String courseName,Long seconds) {
        if (status == null || !status.equals("1")) {
            status = "2";
        }
        DevLockInfo lockInfo = devLockInfoMapper.selectDevLockInfoByDeviceId(id);
        String uuid = IdUtils.simpleUUID();
        SysUser user = SecurityUtils.getLoginUser() == null ? null : SecurityUtils.getLoginUser().getSysUser();
        DevLockConLog devLockConLog = new DevLockConLog();
        devLockConLog.setDeviceId(lockInfo.getDeviceId());
        devLockConLog.setDeviceCode(lockInfo.getDeviceCode());
        devLockConLog.setDeviceName(lockInfo.getDeviceName());
        devLockConLog.setRoomId(lockInfo.getRoomId());
        devLockConLog.setRoomCode(lockInfo.getRoomCode());
        devLockConLog.setRoomName(lockInfo.getRoomName());
        devLockConLog.setOperationOnoff(status);
        devLockConLog.setOperTime(new Date());
        devLockConLog.setControlType(controlType);
        devLockConLog.setCreateTime(new Date());
        devLockConLog.setUpdateTime(new Date());
        devLockConLog.setOperUserId(user == null ? 1 : user.getUserId());
        devLockConLog.setOperUserNum(user == null ? "系统" : user.getUserName());
        devLockConLog.setOperUserName(user == null ? "系统" : user.getNickName());
        devLockConLog.setCreateById(user == null ? 1 : user.getUserId());
        devLockConLog.setUpdateById(user == null ? 1 : user.getUserId());
        devLockConLog.setOperNum(uuid);
        devLockConLog.setCourseName(courseName);
        devLockConLogMapper.insertDevLockConLog(devLockConLog);
        String lockType = lockInfo.getDeviceType();
//        if (lockType != null && lockType.equals("1")) {
            String keyInfo = devLockInfoMapper.selectDevLockKeyInfo(id);
            String dateTime = Tools.getUtcTimeStr();
            Map<String, String> mapLock = new HashMap<>();
            mapLock.put("cmd", "813");
            mapLock.put("targetType", "4");
            mapLock.put("targetId", String.valueOf(id));
            mapLock.put("deviceType", "224");
            mapLock.put("actionCode", "0");
            mapLock.put("param", status);
            mapLock.put("param1", seconds + "");
            mapLock.put("headName", "cmdOpenOrClose");
            mapLock.put("timeStamp", dateTime);
            mapLock.put("ipKey", keyInfo);
            mapLock.put("deviceId", String.valueOf(id));
            mapLock.put("uuid", uuid);
            try {
                R<Object> ass = remoteLockService.lockSendCommand(mapLock);
                System.out.println();
            }catch (Exception e){
                e.printStackTrace();
            }
//        } else if (status != null && status.equals("1")) {
//            openLockOneTimeById(id, controlType, "");
//        }
    }

    /**
     * @param id:
     * @param commandType: 新增、下发 分组信息:  41
     *                     修改分组信息:        42
     *                     新增、下发 门锁信息:  81
     *                     修改门锁  :         82
     * @Description:设备的相关信息下发
     * @Author: sunming 未测试
     * @Date: 2022-12-09 13:07:23
     * @return: void
     */
    @Override
    public void lockDeviceIssuing(Long id, String commandType) {
        String dateTime = Tools.getUtcTimeStr();
        Map<String, String> mapLock = new HashMap<>();
        String keyInfo = "";
        String targetId = "";
        String isUsable = "";
        if (commandType != null) {
            Map<String, String> deviceAll = new HashMap<>();
            if (commandType.equals("41") || commandType.equals("42")) {
                DevGroupingInfo groupInfo = devGroupingInfoMapper.selectDevGroupingInfoByDeviceId(id);
                keyInfo = devGroupingInfoMapper.selectDevGroupKeyInfo(id);
                deviceAll = JSON.parseObject(JSONUtil.toJsonStr(JSONUtil.toJsonStr(groupInfo)), Map.class);
                targetId = String.valueOf(groupInfo.getUpId());
                mapLock.put("upId", String.valueOf(groupInfo.getUpId()));
                deviceAll.put("deviceName", String.valueOf(id));
                isUsable = deviceAll.get("isUsable");
                if (isUsable == null || !isUsable.equals("1")) {
                    isUsable = "0";
                } else {
                    isUsable = "1";
                }
            } else if (commandType.equals("81") || commandType.equals("82")) {
                DevLockInfo lockInfo = devLockInfoMapper.selectDevLockInfoByDeviceId(id);
                keyInfo = devLockInfoMapper.selectDevLockKeyInfo(id);
                lockInfo.setDeviceName(lockInfo.getDeviceCode());
                deviceAll = JSON.parseObject(JSONUtil.toJsonStr(JSONUtil.toJsonStr(lockInfo)), Map.class);
                targetId = String.valueOf(lockInfo.getGatewayId());
                mapLock.put("upId", String.valueOf(lockInfo.getGroupId()));
                isUsable = deviceAll.get("isUsable");
                if (isUsable == null || isUsable.equals("1")) {
                    isUsable = "0";
                } else {
                    isUsable = "1";
                }
            }
            mapLock.put("headName", "deviceInfo");
            mapLock.put("cmd", commandType);
            mapLock.put("targetType", "1");
            mapLock.put("targetId", targetId);
            mapLock.put("deviceType", "1");
            mapLock.put("deviceId", String.valueOf(id));
            mapLock.put("deviceName", deviceAll.get("deviceName"));
            mapLock.put("deviceIP", deviceAll.get(""));
            mapLock.put("devicePort", deviceAll.get(""));
            mapLock.put("deviceMac", deviceAll.get("deviceMac"));
            mapLock.put("isUsable", isUsable);
            mapLock.put("uuid", IdUtils.simpleUUID());
            mapLock.put("timeStamp", dateTime);
            mapLock.put("ipKey", keyInfo);
            R<Object> ass = remoteLockService.lockSendCommand(mapLock);
        }
    }
    /**
     * @param id:       门锁id
     * @param value:    新的值，新的值为空则为清除密码
     * @param valueOld: 旧的值
     * @param passType: 类型， 4 密码    3 nfc3 2 nfc2  1 nfc1
     * @Description: 下发密码 删除密码
     * @Author: sunming  经过测试可以成功用密码开锁  涉及到十六进制小端格式
     * @Date: 2022-12-09 13:07:57
     * @return: void
     */
    @Override
    public void lockAddPassword(Long id, String value, String valueOld, Integer passType, String userId) {
        DevLockInfo lockInfo = devLockInfoMapper.selectDevLockInfoByDeviceId(id);
        String keyInfo = devLockInfoMapper.selectDevLockKeyInfo(id);
        String dateTime = Tools.getUtcTimeStr();
        Map<String, String> mapLock = new HashMap<>();
        if (passType != null && passType == 4) {        //4 密码
            if (value != null && !value.equals("")) {
                value = Tools.passwordFormat(value);
            }
            if (valueOld != null && !valueOld.equals("")) {
                valueOld = Tools.passwordFormat(valueOld);
            }
            userId = "00010001";
        }
        if ((valueOld == null || valueOld.equals("")) && value != null && !value.equals("")) {    //添加密码
            mapLock.put("cmd", "601");
            mapLock.put("PropertyValue", value);
            mapLock.put("headName", "addCardOrPassword");
        } else if (value == null || value.equals("")) { //新密码未空则是清除密码
            mapLock.put("cmd", "602");
            mapLock.put("oldPropertyValue", valueOld);
            if (passType != null && passType == 4) {
                mapLock.put("newPropertyValue", "ffffffffffff");
            } else {
                mapLock.put("newPropertyValue", "00000000");
            }
            mapLock.put("headName", "editCardOrPassWord");
        } else {                  //修改密码
            mapLock.put("cmd", "602");
            mapLock.put("oldPropertyValue", valueOld);
            mapLock.put("newPropertyValue", value);
            mapLock.put("headName", "editCardOrPassWord");
        }
        mapLock.put("targetType", "4");
        mapLock.put("targetId", String.valueOf(lockInfo.getDeviceId()));
        mapLock.put("deviceType", "220");//网关
        mapLock.put("userId", userId);//用户id
        mapLock.put("property", String.valueOf(passType));//用户id
        mapLock.put("userAuth", "1");//用户权限  1   全权限  2   50%权限（仅公寓锁）  3   0%权限
        mapLock.put("verMode", "1");//验证方式  1 任意方式
        Long start = new Date().getTime() - DateUtil.parse("2000-01-01 00:00:00", "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss").getTime();
        Long end = DateUtil.endOfYear(new Date()).getTime() - DateUtil.parse("2000-01-01 00:00:00", "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss").getTime();
        String startStr = HexToLittleEndian.hexToLittleEndian(HexUtil.toHex(start/1000));
        if (startStr.length() < 8) {
            startStr = StringUtils.leftPad(startStr, 8);
        }
        String endStr = HexToLittleEndian.hexToLittleEndian(HexUtil.toHex(end/1000));
        if (endStr.length() < 8) {
            endStr = StringUtils.leftPad(endStr, 8);
        }
        mapLock.put("startValidTime", startStr);//开始时间
        mapLock.put("endValidTime", endStr);//结束时间
        mapLock.put("timeStamp", dateTime);//时间戳
        mapLock.put("ipKey", keyInfo);
        mapLock.put("uuid", IdUtils.simpleUUID());
        R<Object> ass = remoteLockService.lockSendCommand(mapLock);
    }
    /**
     * @param id:     空开id
     * @param status: 开关状态 1开 0关
     * @Description:空开的控制
     * @Author: sunming  测试后可成功控制
     * @Date: 2022-12-09 13:43:42
     * @return: void
     */
    @Transactional(isolation = Isolation.READ_UNCOMMITTED)
    @Override
    public void powerControl(Long id, String status) {
        DevPowerNodeInfo nodeInfo = DevPowerNodeInfoMapper.selectDevPowerNodeInfoByPowerNodeId(id);
        executor.submit(() -> {
            Map<String, String> mapPower = new HashMap<>();
            mapPower.put("powerStatus", status);
            mapPower.put("block", String.valueOf(nodeInfo.getSortNum()));
            mapPower.put("address", nodeInfo.getIpAddress());
            mapPower.put("port", nodeInfo.getPort());
            R<Object> ass1 = remotePowerService.powerSendCommand(mapPower);
        });
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.service.impl;

 * 网关信息Service业务层处理
 *

@Service
public class DevGatewayInfoServiceImpl implements IDevGatewayInfoService {
    @Resource
    private DevGatewayInfoMapper devGatewayInfoMapper;
    @Resource
    private DevGroupingInfoMapper  devGroupingInfoMapper;
    @Resource
    private DevLockInfoMapper devLockInfoMapper;
    @Resource
    private SchoolLocationMapper schoolLocationMapper;
    @Resource
    private DevGroupingInfoMapper groupingInfoMapper;
    /**
     *
     查询网关信息
     * @Description: 查询网关信息
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/02
     * @param deviceId 网关信息主键
     * @return {@link DevGatewayInfo }
     */
    @Override
    public DevGatewayInfo selectDevGatewayInfoByDeviceId(Long deviceId){
        return devGatewayInfoMapper.selectDevGatewayInfoByDeviceId(deviceId);
    }
    /**
     *
     查询网关信息列表
     * @Description: 查询网关信息列表
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/02
     * @param devGatewayInfo 网关信息
     * @return {@link List }<{@link DevGatewayInfo }>
     */
    @Override
    public List<DevGatewayInfo> selectDevGatewayInfoList(DevGatewayInfo devGatewayInfo){
        return devGatewayInfoMapper.selectDevGatewayInfoList(devGatewayInfo);
    }
    /**
     *
     新增网关信息
     * @Description: 新增网关信息
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/02
     * @param devGatewayInfo 网关信息
     * @return int
     */
    @Override
    public int insertDevGatewayInfo(DevGatewayInfo devGatewayInfo){
        DevGatewayInfo dgi = new DevGatewayInfo();
        dgi.setBuildPosId(devGatewayInfo.getBuildPosId());
       /* List<DevGatewayInfo> list = devGatewayInfoMapper.selectDevGatewayInfoList(dgi);
        if(list!=null&&list.size()>0){
            throw new ServiceException("该楼栋已被选择，不可再次绑定！");
        }*/
        Integer check = devGatewayInfoMapper.checkExist(devGatewayInfo.getDeviceName(),null,null);
        if(check!=null){
            throw new ServiceException("网关名称已存在！");
        }
        check = devGatewayInfoMapper.checkExist(null,devGatewayInfo.getGatewayIp(),null);
        if(check!=null){
            throw new ServiceException("网关IP已存在！");
        }
        devGatewayInfo.setCreateById(SecurityUtils.getUserId());
        devGatewayInfo.setCreateBy(SecurityUtils.getUsername());
        devGatewayInfo.setDeptId(SecurityUtils.getLoginUser().getSysUser().getDeptId());
        devGatewayInfo.setCreateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        SchoolLocation sl = schoolLocationMapper.selectSchoolLocationByLocationId(devGatewayInfo.getBuildPosId());
        devGatewayInfo.setBuildPosName(sl.getLocationName());
        return devGatewayInfoMapper.insertDevGatewayInfo(devGatewayInfo);
    }
    /**
     *
     修改网关信息
     * @Description: 修改网关信息
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/02
     * @param devGatewayInfo 网关信息
     * @return int
     */
    @Override
    public int updateDevGatewayInfo(DevGatewayInfo devGatewayInfo){
        devGatewayInfo.setUdpateById(SecurityUtils.getUserId());
        devGatewayInfo.setUpdateBy(SecurityUtils.getUsername());
        SchoolLocation sl = schoolLocationMapper.selectSchoolLocationByLocationId(devGatewayInfo.getBuildPosId());
        if(sl!=null){
            DevGatewayInfo dgi = new DevGatewayInfo();
            dgi.setBuildPosId(devGatewayInfo.getBuildPosId());
            dgi.getParams().put("id",devGatewayInfo.getDeviceId());
            /*List<DevGatewayInfo> list = devGatewayInfoMapper.selectDevGatewayInfoList(dgi);
            if(list!=null&&list.size()>0){
                throw new ServiceException("该楼栋已被选择，不可再次绑定！");
            }*/
            devGatewayInfo.setBuildPosName(sl.getLocationName());
        }
        if(StringUtils.isNotEmpty(devGatewayInfo.getDeviceName())){
            Integer check = devGatewayInfoMapper.checkExist(devGatewayInfo.getDeviceName(),"",devGatewayInfo.getDeviceId());
            if(check!=null){
                throw new ServiceException("网关名称已存在！");
            }
        }
        if(StringUtils.isNotEmpty(devGatewayInfo.getGatewayIp())){
            Integer check = devGatewayInfoMapper.checkExist("",devGatewayInfo.getGatewayIp(),devGatewayInfo.getDeviceId());
            if(check!=null){
                throw new ServiceException("网关IP已存在！");
            }
        }
//      修改网关的时候不进行判断
//        DevGatewayInfo dgi_check = devGatewayInfoMapper.selectDevGatewayInfoByDeviceId(devGatewayInfo.getDeviceId());
//        if(!dgi_check.getBuildPosId().equals(devGatewayInfo.getBuildPosId())){
//            DevGroupingInfo g_query = new DevGroupingInfo();
//            g_query.setUpId(dgi_check.getDeviceId());
//            List<DevGroupingInfo> groupingInfos = groupingInfoMapper.selectDevGroupingInfoList(g_query);
//            if(groupingInfos!=null&&groupingInfos.size()>0){
//                throw new ServiceException("该网关下的网关分组关联了该楼栋信息,暂不可进行修改");
//            }
//        }
        devGatewayInfo.setUpdateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        return devGatewayInfoMapper.updateDevGatewayInfo(devGatewayInfo);
    }
    /**
     *
     批量删除网关信息
     * @Description: 批量删除网关信息
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/02
     * @param deviceIds 需要删除的网关信息主键
     * @return int
     */
    @Override
    public int deleteDevGatewayInfoByDeviceIds(Long[] deviceIds){
        return devGatewayInfoMapper.deleteDevGatewayInfoByDeviceIds(deviceIds);
    }
    /**
     *
     删除网关信息信息

     */
    @Override
    public int deleteDevGatewayInfoByDeviceId(Long deviceId){
        return devGatewayInfoMapper.deleteDevGatewayInfoByDeviceId(deviceId);
    }
    /**
     * 查询全部网关

    @Override

    }
    /**
     * @Description:设置门锁相关设置离线状态
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-04-06 09:51:06
     * @return: int
     */
    @Override

        Date time = new Date();
        devGatewayInfoMapper.setGatewayInfOffLine(time);

//            }
//        } catch (IOException e) {
//            System.err.println("Error pinging host: " + e.getMessage());
//        }
        return 0;
    }

package com.chenrise.jufe.service.impl;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.Date;
import java.util.List;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.DateUtils;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.StringUtils;
import com.chenrise.common.security.utils.SecurityUtils;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.*;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.vo.GropingVO;
import com.chenrise.jufe.mapper.DevGatewayInfoMapper;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.DeviceCommandService;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.ISchoolLocationService;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
import com.chenrise.jufe.mapper.DevGroupingInfoMapper;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.IDevGroupingInfoService;
import javax.annotation.Resource;
/**
 * 分组信息Service业务层处理
 * 
 * @author liyiying
 * @date 2022-11-22
 */
@Service
public class DevGroupingInfoServiceImpl implements IDevGroupingInfoService 
{
    @Autowired
    private DevGroupingInfoMapper devGroupingInfoMapper;
    @Resource
    private DevGatewayInfoMapper devGatewayInfoMapper;
    @Resource
    private DeviceCommandService deviceCommandService;
    @Resource
    private ISchoolLocationService locationService;
    /**
     * 查询分组信息
     * @Description: 查询分组信息
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 16:34:44
     * @param deviceId 分组信息主键
     * @return {@link DevGroupingInfo }
     */
    @Override
    public DevGroupingInfo selectDevGroupingInfoByDeviceId(Long deviceId)
    {
        return devGroupingInfoMapper.selectDevGroupingInfoByDeviceId(deviceId);
    }
    /**
     * 查询分组信息列表
     * @Description: 查询分组信息列表
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 16:34:49
     * @param devGroupingInfo 分组信息
     * @return {@link List }<{@link DevGroupingInfo }>
     */
    @Override
    public List<DevGroupingInfo> selectDevGroupingInfoList(DevGroupingInfo devGroupingInfo)
    {
        return devGroupingInfoMapper.selectDevGroupingInfoList(devGroupingInfo);
    }
    /**
     * 新增分组信息
     * @Description: 新增分组信息
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 16:34:55
     * @param devGroupingInfo 分组信息
     * @return int
     */
    @Override
    public int insertDevGroupingInfo(DevGroupingInfo devGroupingInfo)
    {
        devGroupingInfo.setCreateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        devGroupingInfo.setCreateBy(SecurityUtils.getUserId()+"");
        devGroupingInfo.setUpdateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        devGroupingInfo.setUpdateBy(SecurityUtils.getUserId()+"");
        devGroupingInfo.setDeptId(SecurityUtils.getLoginUser().getSysUser().getDeptId());
        int returnNum = devGroupingInfoMapper.insertDevGroupingInfo(devGroupingInfo);
        //设备命令下发
        deviceCommandService.lockDeviceIssuing(devGroupingInfo.getDeviceId(),"41");
        return returnNum;
    }
    /**
     * 修改分组信息
     * @Description: 修改分组信息
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 16:35:00
     * @param devGroupingInfo 分组信息
     * @return int
     */
    @Override
    public int updateDevGroupingInfo(DevGroupingInfo devGroupingInfo)
    {
        devGroupingInfo.setUpdateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        devGroupingInfo.setUpdateBy(SecurityUtils.getUserId()+"");
        devGroupingInfo.setIssuedStatus(1L);
        devGroupingInfo.setIssuedTime(new Date());
        int returnNum = devGroupingInfoMapper.updateDevGroupingInfo(devGroupingInfo);
        //设备命令下发
        deviceCommandService.lockDeviceIssuing(devGroupingInfo.getDeviceId(),"42");
        return returnNum;
    }
    /**
     * 批量下发
     * @Description: 批量下发
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-12-15 12:49:59
     * @param deviceIds 设备ids
     * @return int
     */
    @Override
    public int issueDevGroupingInfoByDeviceIds(Long[] deviceIds)
    {
        int returnNum = 0;
        for (Long deviceId:deviceIds
             ) {
            DevGroupingInfo groupingInfo =  devGroupingInfoMapper.selectDevGroupingInfoByDeviceId(deviceId);
            groupingInfo.setIssuedStatus(1L);
            groupingInfo.setIssuedTime(new Date());
            returnNum += devGroupingInfoMapper.updateDevGroupingInfo(groupingInfo);
            //设备命令下发
            deviceCommandService.lockDeviceIssuing(deviceId,"41");
        }
        return returnNum;
    }
    /**
     * 批量删除分组信息
     * @Description: 批量删除分组信息
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 16:35:05
     * @param deviceIds 需要删除的分组信息主键
     * @return int
     */
    @Override
    public int deleteDevGroupingInfoByDeviceIds(Long[] deviceIds)
    {
        return devGroupingInfoMapper.deleteDevGroupingInfoByDeviceIds(deviceIds);
    }
    /**
     * 更新分组信息状态设备id
     * @Description: 更新分组信息状态设备id
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 16:35:16
     * @param DeviceIds 设备id
     * @return int
     */
    @Override
    public int updateDevGroupingInfoStatusByDeviceIds(Long[] DeviceIds)
    {
        for (Long deviceId:DeviceIds
        ) {
            DevGroupingInfo grouping = devGroupingInfoMapper.selectDevGroupingInfoByDeviceId(deviceId);
            grouping.setIsUsable("1".equals(grouping.getIsUsable())?"2":"1");
            devGroupingInfoMapper.updateDevGroupingInfo(grouping);
        }
        return 1;
    }
    /**
     * 导入数据
     * @Description: 导入数据
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 11:10:58
     * @param list 列表
     * @return {@link String }
     */
    @Override
    public String importData(List<GropingVO> list){
        StringBuffer promptInformation = new StringBuffer();
        List<Integer> err1 = new ArrayList<>();
        List<Integer> err2 = new ArrayList<>();
        List<Integer> err3 = new ArrayList<>();
        List<Integer> err4 = new ArrayList<>();
        List<Integer> err5 = new ArrayList<>();
        List<Integer> err6 = new ArrayList<>();
        List<Integer> err7 = new ArrayList<>();
        List<Integer> err8 = new ArrayList<>();
        List<Integer> err9 = new ArrayList<>();
        List<Integer> err10 = new ArrayList<>();
        int count = 0;
        if (StringUtils.isBlank(promptInformation)) {
            for (int i = 0; i < list.size(); i++) {
                GropingVO vo = list.get(i);
                if (StringUtils.isBlank(vo.getUpName())){
                    err1.add(i+1);
                    continue;
                }
                if (StringUtils.isBlank(vo.getDeviceName())){
                    err2.add(i+1);
                    continue;
                }
                if (StringUtils.isBlank(vo.getDeviceIp())){
                    err3.add(i+1);
                    continue;
                }
                if (StringUtils.isBlank(vo.getDeviceMac())){
                    err4.add(i+1);
                    continue;
                }
                DevGatewayInfo gatewayInfo = devGatewayInfoMapper.selectDevGatewayInfoByDeviceName(vo.getUpName());
                if (gatewayInfo == null){
                    err5.add(i+1);
                    continue;
                }
                DevGroupingInfo groupingInfoBydeviceName = devGroupingInfoMapper.selectDevGroupingInfoByDeviceName(vo.getDeviceName());
                if (groupingInfoBydeviceName != null){
                    err6.add(i+1);
                    continue;
                }
                DevGroupingInfo groupingInfoByDeviceIp = devGroupingInfoMapper.selectDevGroupingInfoBydeviceIp(vo.getDeviceIp());
                if (groupingInfoByDeviceIp != null){
                    err7.add(i+1);
                    continue;
                }
                if (StringUtils.isBlank(vo.getDevicePort())){
                    err8.add(i+1);
                    continue;
                }
                if (StringUtils.isBlank(vo.getLocationName())){
                    err9.add(i+1);
                    continue;
                }
                SchoolLocation location = locationService.selectSchoolLocationByLocationName(vo.getLocationName());
                if (location==null){
                    err10.add(i+1);
                    continue;
                }
                DevGroupingInfo groupingInfo = new DevGroupingInfo();
                groupingInfo.setUpId(gatewayInfo.getDeviceId());
                groupingInfo.setDeviceName(vo.getDeviceName());
                groupingInfo.setDeviceIp(vo.getDeviceIp());
                groupingInfo.setDeviceMac(vo.getDeviceMac());
                groupingInfo.setIsUsable("1");
                groupingInfo.setDevicePort(vo.getDevicePort());
                groupingInfo.setBuildPos(location.getParentId()+"");
                groupingInfo.setBuildStorey(location.getLocationId()+"");
                insertDevGroupingInfo(groupingInfo);
                count++;
            }
            if (count == list.size()) {
                promptInformation.append("全部导入成功！");
                promptInformation.append("共导入{"+list.size()+"}条，导入成功{"+count+"}条，导入失败{"+(list.size()-count)+"}条" + "</br>");
            }else{
                promptInformation.append("共导入{"+list.size()+"}条，导入成功{"+count+"}条，导入失败{"+(list.size()-count)+"}条" + "</br>");
                promptInformation.append("失败原因如下：" + "</br>");
                if (err1.size() >0){
                    promptInformation.append("第"+err1.toString()+"条,网关名称不能为空,导入失败。" + "</br>");
                }
                if (err2.size() >0){
                    promptInformation.append("第"+err2.toString()+"条,分组名称不能为空,导入失败。" + "</br>");
                }
                if (err3.size() >0){
                    promptInformation.append("第"+err3.toString()+"条,分组IP不能为空,导入失败。" + "</br>");
                }
                if (err4.size() >0){
                    promptInformation.append("第"+err4.toString()+"条,分组MAC不能为空,导入失败。" + "</br>");
                }
                if (err5.size() >0){
                    promptInformation.append("第"+err5.toString()+"条,该网关名称系统不存在,导入失败。" + "</br>");
                }
                if (err6.size() >0){
                    promptInformation.append("第"+err6.toString()+"条,分组名称重复,导入失败。" + "</br>");
                }
                if (err7.size() >0){
                    promptInformation.append("第"+err7.toString()+"条,分组IP已存在,导入失败。" + "</br>");
                }
                if (err8.size() >0){
                    promptInformation.append("第"+err8.toString()+"条,分组端口不能为空,导入失败。" + "</br>");
                }
                if (err9.size() >0){
                    promptInformation.append("第"+err9.toString()+"条,分组楼栋不能为空,导入失败。" + "</br>");
                }
                if (err10.size() >0){
                    promptInformation.append("第"+err10.toString()+"条,分组楼栋不存在,导入失败。" + "</br>");
                }
            }
        }
        return promptInformation.toString();
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.service.impl;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.DateUtils;

     * 获取门锁数量

    }

     */
