package com.chenrise.jufe.service.impl;
import java.text.SimpleDateFormat;
import java.util.Date;
import java.util.List;
import cn.hutool.json.JSONObject;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.DateUtils;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.DevLockConLog;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.DevLockInfo;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.enums.LockControllerTypeEnum;
import com.chenrise.jufe.mapper.DevLockCardInfoMapper;
import com.chenrise.jufe.mapper.DevLockConLogMapper;
import com.chenrise.jufe.mapper.DevLockInfoMapper;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.IDevLockConLogService;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
import javax.annotation.Resource;
/**
 * 门锁控制日志Service业务层处理
 *
 * @author sunming
 * @date 2022-11-28
 */
@Service
public class DevLockConLogServiceImpl implements IDevLockConLogService
{
    @Resource
    private DevLockInfoMapper devLockInfoMapper;
    @Autowired
    private DevLockConLogMapper devLockConLogMapper;
    @Autowired
    private DevLockCardInfoMapper devLockCardInfoMapper;
    /**
     * @Description:查询门锁控制日志
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-11-28 15:01:08
     * @param deviceId: 门锁控制日志主键
     * @return: 门锁控制日志
     */
    @Override
    public DevLockConLog selectDevLockConLogByDeviceId(Long deviceId)
    {
        return devLockConLogMapper.selectDevLockConLogByDeviceId(deviceId);
    }
    @Override
    public DevLockConLog selectDevLockConLogByOperNum(String operNum)
    {
        return devLockConLogMapper.selectDevLockConLogByOperNum(operNum);
    }
    /**
     * @Description:查询门锁控制日志列表
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-11-28 15:01:13
     * @param devLockConLog: 门锁控制日志
     * @return: java.util.List<com.chenrise.jufe.domain.DevLockConLog>门锁控制日志
     */
    @Override
    public List<DevLockConLog> selectDevLockConLogList(DevLockConLog devLockConLog)
    {
        return devLockConLogMapper.selectDevLockConLogList(devLockConLog);
    }
    /**
     * @Description:新增门锁控制日志
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-11-28 15:01:17
     * @param devLockConLog:  门锁控制日志
     * @return: 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int insertDevLockConLog(DevLockConLog devLockConLog)
    {
        devLockConLog.setCreateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        return devLockConLogMapper.insertDevLockConLog(devLockConLog);
    }
    /**
     * @Description:修改门锁控制日志
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-11-28 15:01:21
     * @param devLockConLog: 门锁控制日志
     * @return: 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int updateDevLockConLog(DevLockConLog devLockConLog)
    {
        devLockConLog.setUpdateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        return devLockConLogMapper.updateDevLockConLog(devLockConLog);
    }
    /**
     * @Description:批量删除门锁控制日志
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-11-28 15:01:24
     * @param deviceIds: 需要删除的门锁控制日志主键
     * @return: 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int deleteDevLockConLogByDeviceIds(Long[] deviceIds)
    {
        return devLockConLogMapper.deleteDevLockConLogByDeviceIds(deviceIds);
    }
    /**
     * @Description:删除门锁控制日志信息
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-11-28 15:01:27
     * @param deviceId: 门锁控制日志主键
     * @return: 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int deleteDevLockConLogByDeviceId(Long deviceId)
    {
        return devLockConLogMapper.deleteDevLockConLogByDeviceId(deviceId);
    }
	/**
     * @Description:更新日志状态
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-11-28 15:01:27
     * @param: logMap  需要变更的设备
     * @return: 结果
     */
    @Override
    public Integer updateLogStatue(JSONObject obj) {
        if(obj!=null){
            String operNum = obj.getStr("operNum");
            String status =  obj.getStr("status");
            Date resTime = obj.get("resTime")!=null? obj.getDate("resTime"):null;
            devLockConLogMapper.updateDevLockConLogResult(operNum,status,resTime);
        }
        return 1;
    }
    /**
     * @Description:密码开锁添加日志
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-02-20 18:56:23
     * @param deviceId:
     * @return: java.lang.Integer
     */
    @Override
    public Integer addPasswordLog(String deviceId,String numInfo,String verNum,String lockStatus) {
        DevLockInfo lockInfo = devLockInfoMapper.selectDevLockInfoByDeviceId(Long.parseLong(deviceId));
        if(lockInfo!=null){
            Integer countInfo = devLockConLogMapper.selectCountInfoByNumInfo(numInfo);
            if(countInfo==null||countInfo==0){
                DevLockConLog devLockConLog = new DevLockConLog();
                devLockConLog.setDeviceId(Long.valueOf(lockInfo.getDeviceId()));
                devLockConLog.setDeviceCode(lockInfo.getDeviceCode());
                devLockConLog.setDeviceName( lockInfo.getDeviceName() );
                devLockConLog.setRoomId(lockInfo.getRoomId());
                devLockConLog.setRoomCode(lockInfo.getRoomCode());
                devLockConLog.setRoomName(lockInfo.getRoomName());
                devLockConLog.setOperationOnoff("1");
                devLockConLog.setOperTime(new Date());
                devLockConLog.setVerNum(verNum);
                if(verNum!=null&&verNum.length()>0){
                    devLockConLog.setControlType(String.valueOf(LockControllerTypeEnum.nfc.ordinal())); // nfc
                    if(lockStatus!=null&&lockStatus.equals("1")){
                        Integer verNumInt = Integer.parseInt(verNum);
                        String verNumIntStr =  String.valueOf(verNumInt);
                        String verNumSel = devLockCardInfoMapper.getVerNumByDeviceIdAndVerNum(deviceId,verNumIntStr);
                        devLockConLog.setVerNum(verNumSel);
                    }
                }else{
                    devLockConLog.setControlType("3"); // 密码
                }
                devLockConLog.setCreateTime(new Date());
                devLockConLog.setUpdateTime(new Date());
                devLockConLog.setOperUserName("系统");
                devLockConLog.setOperResult(lockStatus);
                devLockConLog.setOperNum(numInfo);
                //0-3064-20230220200932240
                try{
                    String timeInfo = numInfo.split("-")[2];
                    timeInfo = timeInfo.substring(0,14);
                    SimpleDateFormat dr= new SimpleDateFormat("yyyyMMddHHmmss");
                    Date d = dr.parse(timeInfo);
                    devLockConLog.setOperTime(d);
                }catch (Exception e){
                    e.printStackTrace();
                }
                devLockConLogMapper.insertDevLockConLog(devLockConLog);
            }
        }
        return null;
    }
    @Override
    public void updateDevLockConLogFailed() {
        devLockConLogMapper.updateDevLockConLogFailed();
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.service.impl;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.DateUtils;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.StringUtils;
import com.chenrise.common.security.utils.DictUtils;
import com.chenrise.common.security.utils.SecurityUtils;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.Bo.DevPowerNodeInfoBo;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.Bo.FirstPageCountInfoBo;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.*;
import com.chenrise.jufe.mapper.*;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.*;
import com.chenrise.system.api.enums.AuthorizeDeviceTypeEnum;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
import org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;
import javax.annotation.Resource;
import java.text.SimpleDateFormat;
import java.util.*;
import java.util.stream.Collectors;
/**
 * 门锁信息Service业务层处理
 *
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2022-11-24
 */
@Service
public class DevLockInfoServiceImpl implements IDevLockInfoService
{
    @Resource
    private DevLockInfoMapper devLockInfoMapper;
    @Resource
    private IDevGatewayInfoService gatewayInfoService;
    @Autowired
    private ISchoolRoomService schoolRoomService;
    @Autowired
    private DevClassBoardMapper devClassBoardMapper;
    @Resource
    private DevGroupingInfoMapper groupingInfoMapper;
    @Resource
    private DeviceCommandService commandService;
    @Resource
    private DeviceCommandService deviceCommandService;
    @Resource
    private DevPowerNodeInfoMapper devPowerNodeInfoMapper;
    @Autowired
    private DevLockConLogMapper devLockConLogMapper;
    @Autowired
    private DevLockCardInfoMapper devLockCardInfoMapper;
    @Autowired
    private IDevAuthorizeService devAuthorizeService;
    /**
     *
     查询门锁信息
     * @Description: 查询门锁信息
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/02
     * @param deviceId 门锁信息主键
     * @return {@link DevLockInfo }
     */
    @Override
    public DevLockInfo selectDevLockInfoByDeviceId(Long deviceId)
    {
        return devLockInfoMapper.selectDevLockInfoByDeviceId(deviceId);
    }
    /**
     *
     查询门锁信息列表
     * @Description: 查询门锁信息列表
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/02
     * @param devLockInfo 门锁信息
     * @return {@link List }<{@link DevLockInfo }>
     */
    @Override
    public List<DevLockInfo> selectDevLockInfoList(DevLockInfo devLockInfo)
    {
        return devLockInfoMapper.selectDevLockInfoList(devLockInfo);
    }
    /**
     *
     新增门锁信息
     * @Description: 新增门锁信息
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/02
     * @param devLockInfo 门锁信息
     * @return int
     */
    @Override
    public int insertDevLockInfo(DevLockInfo devLockInfo)
    {
        // 授权数量校验
        if (!devAuthorizeService.checkDeviceAuthorizeNum(AuthorizeDeviceTypeEnum.LOCK, getCurrentNum())) {
            throw new RuntimeException("已达到设备授权数上限");
        }
        SimpleDateFormat format = new SimpleDateFormat("yyyyMMdd");
        if(StringUtils.isEmpty(devLockInfo.getDeviceCode())){
            String checkCode = "MS"+format.format(new Date());
            String deviceCode = devLockInfoMapper.getMaxCode(checkCode);
            if(StringUtils.isNotEmpty(deviceCode)){
                deviceCode = "MS"+(Long.parseLong(deviceCode.substring(2))+1);
            }else{
                deviceCode = checkCode+"0001";
            }
            devLockInfo.setDeviceCode(deviceCode);
        }
        DevGatewayInfo gatewayInfo = gatewayInfoService.selectDevGatewayInfoByDeviceId(devLockInfo.getGatewayId());
        if(devLockInfo!=null){
            devLockInfo.setDeviceIp(gatewayInfo.getGatewayIp());
            devLockInfo.setDevicePort(gatewayInfo.getUpPort());
        }
        devLockInfo.setCreateById(SecurityUtils.getUserId());
        devLockInfo.setCreateBy(SecurityUtils.getUsername());
        devLockInfo.setDeptId(SecurityUtils.getLoginUser().getSysUser().getDeptId());
        devLockInfo.setCreateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        devLockInfo.setCreateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        // 20260204 工商门锁新增时默认接受任务控制，且不可修改
        devLockInfo.setStatus("Y");
        int index = devLockInfoMapper.insertDevLockInfo(devLockInfo);
//        commandService.lockDeviceIssuing(devLockInfo.getDeviceId(),"81");
        return index;
    }
    /**
     *
     修改门锁信息
     * @Description: 修改门锁信息
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/02
     * @param devLockInfo 门锁信息
     * @return int
     */
    @Override
    public int updateDevLockInfo(DevLockInfo devLockInfo)
    {
        DevGatewayInfo gatewayInfo = gatewayInfoService.selectDevGatewayInfoByDeviceId(devLockInfo.getGatewayId());
        if(gatewayInfo!=null){
            devLockInfo.setDeviceIp(gatewayInfo.getGatewayIp());
            devLockInfo.setDevicePort(gatewayInfo.getUpPort());
        }
        // 20260204 工商门锁新增时默认接受任务控制，且不可修改
        devLockInfo.setStatus("Y");
        devLockInfo.setUpdateById(SecurityUtils.getUserId());
        devLockInfo.setUpdateBy(SecurityUtils.getUsername());
        devLockInfo.setUpdateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
//        commandService.lockDeviceIssuing(devLockInfo.getDeviceId(),"82");
        return devLockInfoMapper.updateDevLockInfo(devLockInfo);
    }
    /**
     *
     批量删除门锁信息
     * @Description: 批量删除门锁信息
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/02
     * @param deviceIds 需要删除的门锁信息主键
     * @return int
     */
    @Override
    public int deleteDevLockInfoByDeviceIds(Long[] deviceIds)
    {
        return devLockInfoMapper.deleteDevLockInfoByDeviceIds(deviceIds);
    }
    /**
     *
     删除门锁信息信息
     * @Description: 删除门锁信息信息
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/02
     * @param deviceId 门锁信息主键
     * @return int
     */
    @Override
    public int deleteDevLockInfoByDeviceId(Long deviceId)
    {
        return devLockInfoMapper.deleteDevLockInfoByDeviceId(deviceId);
    }
    /**
     *
     查询门锁最大编码
     * @Description: 查询门锁最大编码
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/02
     * @param deviceCode
     * @return {@link String }
     */
    @Override
    public String getMaxCode(String deviceCode)
    {
        return devLockInfoMapper.getMaxCode(deviceCode);
    }
    /**
     * 设置密码
     * @Description: 设置密码
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/02
     * @param ids id
     * @param password 密码
     *
     */
    @Override
    public void setPassword(List<Long> ids,String password)
    {
        DevLockInfo dli = new DevLockInfo();
        if(ids!=null&&ids.size()>0){
            dli.getParams().put("ids",ids);
        }
        List<DevLockInfo> list  = devLockInfoMapper.selectDevLockInfoList(dli);
        list.stream().forEach(item->{
            String oldPassword = item.getPassWord();
            item.setPassWord(password);
            item.setSetPassStatus(password==null?"0":"1");
            devLockInfoMapper.updatePassword(item);
            commandService.lockAddPassword(item.getDeviceId(),password,oldPassword,4,"");
        });
    }
    /**
     * 下发
     * @Description: 下发
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/02
     * @param ids id
     *
     */
    @Override
    public void issue(Long[]ids)
    {
        for(Long id:ids){
            DevLockInfo dli = devLockInfoMapper.selectDevLockInfoByDeviceId(id);
            dli.setDeviceId(id);
            dli.setIssuedStatus("1");
            dli.setIssuedTime(new Date());
            devLockInfoMapper.updateDevLockInfo(dli);
            commandService.lockDeviceIssuing(dli.getDeviceId(),"81");
        }
    }
    /**
     * 查询所有可用门锁
     * @Description: 查询所有可用门锁
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 16:37:58
     * @param devLockInfo 门锁信息
     * @return {@link List }<{@link DevLockInfo }>
     */
    @Override
    public List<DevLockInfo> getUsableList(DevLockInfo devLockInfo)
    {
        return devLockInfoMapper.getUsableList(devLockInfo);
    }
    /**
     * @Description:班牌获取设备信息
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-12-07 08:15:33
     * @param ip:ip地址
     * @return: java.util.Map<java.lang.String,java.lang.Object>
     */
    @Override
    public Map<String, Object> getBoardDevideInfo(String ip,Long userId) {
        Map<String,Object> map =new HashMap();
        map.put("code","200");
        DevClassBoard board = devClassBoardMapper.selectDevClassBoardByBoardIp(ip);
        if(board==null){
            map.put("msg","当前班牌已经停用！");
            map.put("code","500");
            return map;
        }else if(board.getRoomId()==null||board.getRoomId().equals("")){
            if(board.getStatus().equals("2")){
                map.put("msg","当前班牌已停用！");
                map.put("code","500");
                return map;
            }else{
                map.put("msg","当前班牌未设置房间！");
                map.put("code","500");
                return map;
            }
        }
        //根据ip地址查询房间信息
        SchoolRoom schoolRoom = schoolRoomService.selectSchoolRoomByRoomId(board.getRoomId());
        if(schoolRoom==null||schoolRoom.getRoomId()==null||schoolRoom.getRoomId().equals("")){
            map.put("msg","班牌与房间信息不匹配，请重试！");
            map.put("code","500");
            return map;
        }else{
            map.put("roomName",schoolRoom.getRoomName());
        }
        List<String> amdinFlagList = SecurityUtils.getLoginUser().getRoles().stream().filter(roole->"admin".equals(roole)||"mastercontrol".equals(roole)).collect(Collectors.toList());
        userId = amdinFlagList.size() == 0?SecurityUtils.getUserId():0L;
        //设备开关信息
        List<DevLockInfo> lockInfos = devLockInfoMapper.selectDevLockInfoListForBoard(schoolRoom.getRoomId());
        map.put("lockInfos",lockInfos);
        List<DevPowerNodeInfoBo>  powerInfos = devPowerNodeInfoMapper.selectDevPowerInfoListForBoard(schoolRoom.getRoomId(),userId);
        if(powerInfos!=null&&powerInfos.size()>0){
            for(int i=0;i<powerInfos.size();i++){
                Long powerNodeId = powerInfos.get(i).getPowerNodeId();
                List<DevPowerNodeInfo>  nodeInfos = devPowerNodeInfoMapper.selectDevNodeInfoListForBoard(powerNodeId,schoolRoom.getRoomId(),userId);
                powerInfos.get(i).setNodeInfos(nodeInfos);
            }
        }
        map.put("powerNodes",powerInfos);
        return map;
    }
    /**
     * @Description:班牌控制门锁开关  设备控制暂时未连接
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-12-07 10:12:56
     * @param deviceId:
     * @param openStatus:
     * @return: java.lang.Integer
     */
    @Override
    public Integer boardControlLock(Long deviceId, Integer openStatus,Long userId) {
        DevLockInfo dli = new DevLockInfo();
        dli.setDeviceId(deviceId);
        if(openStatus!=null&&openStatus==1){
            dli.setOpenStatus("1");
        }else{
            dli.setOpenStatus("2");
        }
        dli.setUpdateTime(new Date());
        DevLockInfo lockInfo = devLockInfoMapper.selectDevLockInfoByDeviceId(deviceId);
        String deviceType = lockInfo.getDeviceType();
        Integer count =0;
        if(deviceType!=null){
            String type = ""; //1开 2 关 3常开
            if(deviceType.equals("1")){
//                deviceCommandService.openLockById(Long.valueOf(deviceId),dli.getOpenStatus(),"6","");
                count =  devLockInfoMapper.updateDevLockInfo(dli);
                if(deviceId!=null&&deviceId.equals("1")){
                    type = "3";
                }else{
                    type = "2";
                }
            }else{
                type = "1";
//                deviceCommandService.openLockOneTimeById(Long.valueOf(deviceId),"6","");
            }
        }
        return count;
    }
    /**
     * 导入数据
     * @Description: 导入数据
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/02
     * @param locks
     * @return {@link String }
     */
    @Override
    @Transactional(rollbackFor = Exception.class)
    public String importData(List<DevLockInfo> locks){
        StringBuilder promptInformation = new StringBuilder();
        List<Integer> err0 = new ArrayList<>();
        List<Integer> err1 = new ArrayList<>();
        List<Integer> err2 = new ArrayList<>();
        List<Integer> err3 = new ArrayList<>();
        List<Integer> err4 = new ArrayList<>();
        List<Integer> err5 = new ArrayList<>();
        List<Integer> err6 = new ArrayList<>();
        List<Integer> err7 = new ArrayList<>();
        int count = 0;
        for(int i=0;i<locks.size();i++){
            DevLockInfo dli = locks.get(i);
            if(StringUtils.isEmpty(dli.getDeviceMac())){
                err7.add(i+2);
                continue;
            }
            Integer checkNum = devLockInfoMapper.checkMac(dli.getDeviceMac());
            if(checkNum!=null){
                err0.add(i+2);
                continue;
            }
            if(StringUtils.isEmpty(dli.getRoomCode())){
                err1.add(i+2);
                continue;
            }else{
                SchoolRoom query = new SchoolRoom();
                query.setRoomCode(dli.getRoomCode());
                List<SchoolRoom> datas = schoolRoomService.selectRoomList(query);
                if(datas==null||datas.size()==0){
                    err1.add(i+2);
                    continue;
                }
                dli.setRoomId(datas.get(0).getRoomId());
            }
            DevGatewayInfo gatewayInfo = null;
            if(StringUtils.isEmpty(dli.getGatewayName())){
                err2.add(i+2);
                continue;
            }else{
                DevGatewayInfo query = new DevGatewayInfo();
                query.getParams().put("deviceName",dli.getGatewayName());
                List<DevGatewayInfo> datas = gatewayInfoService.selectDevGatewayInfoList(query);
                if(datas==null||datas.size()==0){
                    err2.add(i+2);
                    continue;
                }
                dli.setGatewayId(datas.get(0).getDeviceId());
                dli.setDeviceIp(datas.get(0).getGatewayIp());
                dli.setDevicePort(datas.get(0).getUpPort());
                gatewayInfo = datas.get(0);
            }
            if(StringUtils.isEmpty(dli.getGroupName())){
                err3.add(i+2);
                continue;
            }else{
                DevGroupingInfo query = new DevGroupingInfo();
                query.getParams().put("deviceName",dli.getGroupName());
                List<DevGroupingInfo> datas = groupingInfoMapper.selectDevGroupingInfoList(query);
                if(datas==null||datas.size()==0){
                    err3.add(i+2);
                    continue;
                }
                if(gatewayInfo==null||!datas.get(0).getUpId().equals(gatewayInfo.getDeviceId())){
                    err4.add(i+2);
                    continue;
                }
                dli.setGroupId(datas.get(0).getDeviceId());
            }
            if(StringUtils.isEmpty(dli.getDeviceType())){
                err5.add(i+2);
                continue;
            }else{
                String dictValue = DictUtils.getDictValue("door_lock_type",dli.getDeviceType());
                if(StringUtils.isEmpty(dictValue)){
                    err5.add(i+2);
                    continue;
                }
                dli.setDeviceType(dictValue);
            }
//            if(!StringUtils.isEmpty(dli.getLatitude())){
//                String arr [] = dli.getLatitude().split(",");
//                if(arr==null||arr.length!=2){
//                    err6.add(i+2);
//                    continue;
//                }
//                if(!NumberUtil.isDouble(arr[0])){
//                    err6.add(i+2);
//                    continue;
//                }
//                if(!NumberUtil.isDouble(arr[1])){
//                    err6.add(i+2);
//                    continue;
//                }
//            }
            dli.setIsUsable("0");
            dli.setOpenStatus("2");
            dli.setIssuedStatus("0");
            dli.setSetPassStatus("0");
            String typeCon = dli.getStatus();
            if(typeCon!=null&&(typeCon.equals("是")||typeCon.equals("Y"))){
                dli.setStatus("Y");
            }else{
                dli.setStatus("N");
            }
            insertDevLockInfo(dli);
            count++;
        }
        if (count == locks.size()) {
            promptInformation.append("全部导入成功！！！");
        }else{
            promptInformation.append("共导入{"+locks.size()+"}条，导入成功{"+count+"}条，导入失败{"+(locks.size()-count)+"}条" + "</br>");
            promptInformation.append("失败原因如下：" + "</br>");
            if (err0.size() >0){
                promptInformation.append("第"+err0.toString()+"条,MAC已存在,导入失败。" + "</br>");
            }
            if (err1.size() >0){
                promptInformation.append("第"+err1.toString()+"条,教室不存在,导入失败。" + "</br>");
            }
            if (err2.size() >0){
                promptInformation.append("第"+err2.toString()+"条,网关不存在,导入失败。" + "</br>");
            }
            if (err3.size() >0){
                promptInformation.append("第"+err3.toString()+"条,分组不存在,导入失败。" + "</br>");
            }
            if (err4.size() >0){
                promptInformation.append("第"+err4.toString()+"条,分组名称不在该网关下,导入失败。" + "</br>");
            }
            if (err5.size() >0){
                promptInformation.append("第"+err5.toString()+"条,门锁类型不存在,导入失败。" + "</br>");
            }
            if (err6.size() >0){
                promptInformation.append("第"+err6.toString()+"条,经纬度格式错误,导入失败。" + "</br>");
            }
            if (err7.size() >0){
                promptInformation.append("第"+err7.toString()+"条,门锁MAC不存在,导入失败。" + "</br>");
            }
        }
        return promptInformation.toString();
    }
    /**
     * @Description:首页信息统计
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-12-29 13:33:42
     * @return: com.chenrise.jufe.domain.Bo.FirstPageCountInfoBo
     */
    @Override
    public FirstPageCountInfoBo getFirstPageCountInfo() {
        FirstPageCountInfoBo countInfo = devLockInfoMapper.getFirstPageCountInfo();
        return countInfo;
    }
    @Override
    public int updateDevLockInfoIsUsable(Long[] deviceIds) {
        for (Long deviceId:deviceIds
        ) {
            DevLockInfo lock = devLockInfoMapper.selectDevLockInfoByDeviceId(deviceId);
            lock.setIsUsable("0".equals(lock.getIsUsable())?"1":"0");
            devLockInfoMapper.updateDevLockInfo(lock);
        }
        return 1;
    }
    /**
     * @Description:批量设置门锁卡
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-04-03 17:27:36
     * @param ids:
     * @param cardCode:
     * @return: void
     */
    @Override
    public void setCardInfos(List<Long> ids, String cardCode) {
        DevLockInfo dli = new DevLockInfo();
        if(ids!=null&&ids.size()>0){
            dli.getParams().put("ids",ids);
        }
        if(cardCode!=null&&!cardCode.equals("")){
            String[] codes = cardCode.split(";");
            List<DevLockInfo> list  = devLockInfoMapper.selectDevLockInfoList(dli);
            if(list!=null&&list.size()>0){
                for(DevLockInfo temp:list){
                    DevLockCardInfo card = new DevLockCardInfo();
                    card.setLockId(temp.getDeviceId());
                    for(String code:codes){
                        card.setCardCode(code);
                        Integer count = devLockCardInfoMapper.selectDevLockCardInfoCount(card);
                        if(count==null||count==0){ //不存在则添加
                            Integer cardSort = devLockCardInfoMapper.selectMissSort(card);
                            if(cardSort==null){
                                cardSort=0;
                            }
                            if(cardSort<30){
                                Integer userSort = cardSort+1;
                                String userId =   "0001000"+ userSort; //生成指定用户id
                                DevLockCardInfo insertInfo = new DevLockCardInfo();
                                insertInfo.setLockId(temp.getDeviceId());
                                insertInfo.setCardCode(code);
                                insertInfo.setCreateTime(new Date());
                                insertInfo.setCardSort(cardSort);
                                insertInfo.setAddTime(new Date());
                                devLockCardInfoMapper.insertDevLockCardInfo(insertInfo);
                                //下发卡号到网关
                                commandService.lockAddPassword(temp.getDeviceId(),cardCode,"",1,userId);
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }else{ //传回来的值为空则是清空nfc卡
            List<DevLockInfo> list  = devLockInfoMapper.selectDevLockInfoList(dli);
            if(list!=null&&list.size()>0){
                for(DevLockInfo lock: list){
                    DevLockCardInfo card = new DevLockCardInfo();
                    card.setLockId(lock.getDeviceId());
                    List<DevLockCardInfo> cards = devLockCardInfoMapper.selectDevLockCardInfoList(card);
                    if(cards!=null&&cards.size()>0){
                        for(DevLockCardInfo nfc:cards){
                            Integer cardSort = nfc.getCardSort();
                            Integer userSort = cardSort+1;
                            String userId =   "0001000"+userSort; //生成指定用户id
                            commandService.lockAddPassword(nfc.getLockId(),"",nfc.getCardCode(),1,userId);
                            devLockCardInfoMapper.deleteDevLockCardInfoById(nfc.getId());
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
    /**
     * @Description:获取门卡信息
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-04-04 09:17:25
     * @param deviceId:
     * @return: java.util.List<com.chenrise.jufe.domain.DevLockCardInfo>
     */
    @Override
    public List<DevLockCardInfo> selectCardInfos(Long deviceId) {
        DevLockCardInfo cardInfo =new DevLockCardInfo();
        cardInfo.setLockId(deviceId);
        return devLockCardInfoMapper.selectDevLockCardInfoList(cardInfo);
    }
    /**
     * @Description:更新门卡信息
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-04-04 13:13:52
     * @param devLockInfo:
     * @return: int
     */
    @Transactional
    @Override
    public int updateCardInfos(DevLockInfo devLockInfo) {
        String[] cardCodes = devLockInfo.getCardCodes();
        DevLockCardInfo selInfo = new DevLockCardInfo();
        selInfo.setLockId(devLockInfo.getDeviceId());
        List<DevLockCardInfo> list = devLockCardInfoMapper.selectDevLockCardInfoList(selInfo);
        //1首先循环list不在cards 则进行删除操作
        for(DevLockCardInfo card:list){
            Boolean flag = false;
            for(String cardStr:cardCodes){
                if(card.getCardCode()!=null&&card.getCardCode().equals(cardStr)){
                    flag =true;
                    break;
                }
            }
            if(!flag){
                Integer cardSort = card.getCardSort();
                Integer userSort = cardSort+1;
                String userId =   "0001000"+userSort; //生成指定用户id
                //进行删除操作
                commandService.lockAddPassword(card.getLockId(),"",card.getCardCode(),1,userId);
                devLockCardInfoMapper.deleteDevLockCardInfoById(card.getId());
            }
        }
        //2 查看是否在原来的卡中，如果存在则不操作，如果没有则是新增的，进行添加操作
        for(String cardStr:cardCodes){
            Boolean flag = false;
            for(DevLockCardInfo card:list){
                if(card.getCardCode()!=null&&card.getCardCode().equals(cardStr)){
                    flag =true;
                    break;
                }
            }
            //没有则进行添加
            if(!flag){
                DevLockCardInfo selCard = new DevLockCardInfo();
                selCard.setLockId(devLockInfo.getDeviceId());
                Integer cardSort = devLockCardInfoMapper.selectMissSort(selCard);
                if(cardSort==null){
                    cardSort=0;
                }
                if(cardSort<30){
                    Integer userSort = cardSort+1;
                    String userId =   "0001000"+ userSort; //生成指定用户id
                    DevLockCardInfo insertInfo = new DevLockCardInfo();
                    insertInfo.setLockId(devLockInfo.getDeviceId());
                    insertInfo.setCardCode(cardStr);
                    insertInfo.setCreateTime(new Date());
                    insertInfo.setCardSort(cardSort);
                    insertInfo.setAddTime(new Date());
                    devLockCardInfoMapper.insertDevLockCardInfo(insertInfo);
                    //下发卡号到网关
                    commandService.lockAddPassword(devLockInfo.getDeviceId(),cardStr,"",1,userId);
                }
            }
        }
        return 0;
    }
    /**
     * @Description:门卡添加页面
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-04-07 08:41:23
     * @param devLockInfo:
     * @return: java.util.List<com.chenrise.jufe.domain.DevLockInfo>
     */
    @Override
    public List<DevLockInfo> selectLocksForCards(DevLockInfo devLockInfo) {
        return devLockInfoMapper.selectDevLockInfoList(devLockInfo);
    }
    @Override
    public int getCurrentNum() {
        return devLockInfoMapper.selectCurrentNum();
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.service.impl;
import com.chenrise.common.core.constant.UserConstants;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.DateUtils;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.StringUtils;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.DevMonitorInfo;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.SchoolRoom;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.vo.DevMonitorInfoVo;
import com.chenrise.jufe.mapper.DevMonitorInfoMapper;
import com.chenrise.jufe.mapper.SchoolRoomMapper;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.IDevAuthorizeService;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.IDevMonitorInfoService;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.ISchoolRoomService;
import com.chenrise.system.api.enums.AuthorizeDeviceTypeEnum;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
import org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;
import java.text.SimpleDateFormat;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.Date;
import java.util.List;
/**
 * 监控设备Service业务层处理
 *
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2023-04-17
 */
@Service
public class DevMonitorInfoServiceImpl implements IDevMonitorInfoService
{
    @Autowired
    private DevMonitorInfoMapper devMonitorInfoMapper;
    @Autowired
    private ISchoolRoomService schoolRoomService;
    @Autowired
    private SchoolRoomMapper schoolRoomMapper;
    @Autowired
    private IDevAuthorizeService devAuthorizeService;
    /**
     * 查询监控设备
     *
     * @param deviceId 监控设备主键
     * @return 监控设备
     */
    @Override
    public DevMonitorInfo selectDevMonitorInfoByDeviceId(Long deviceId)
    {
        return devMonitorInfoMapper.selectDevMonitorInfoByDeviceId(deviceId);
    }
    /**
     * 查询监控设备列表
     *
     * @param devMonitorInfo 监控设备
     * @return 监控设备
     */
    @Override
    public List<DevMonitorInfo> selectDevMonitorInfoList(DevMonitorInfo devMonitorInfo)
    {
        return devMonitorInfoMapper.selectDevMonitorInfoList(devMonitorInfo);
    }
    @Override
    public List<DevMonitorInfoVo> selectDevMonitorInfoList1(DevMonitorInfoVo devMonitorInfo)
    {
        return devMonitorInfoMapper.selectDevMonitorInfoList1(devMonitorInfo);
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 校验监控编号是否唯一
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022/12/14 08:56:07
     * @param devMonitorInfo 监控信息
     * @return {@link String }
     */
    @Override
    public String checkDeviceNo(DevMonitorInfo devMonitorInfo) {
        String deviceNo = StringUtils.isNull(devMonitorInfo.getDeviceNo()) ? "" : devMonitorInfo.getDeviceNo();
        DevMonitorInfo devMonitorInfo1 = devMonitorInfoMapper.checkDeviceNo(devMonitorInfo);
        if (StringUtils.isNotNull(devMonitorInfo1) && !devMonitorInfo1.getDeviceNo().equals(deviceNo)) {
            if(StringUtils.isNotEmpty(devMonitorInfo1.getDeviceNo())){
                return UserConstants.NOT_UNIQUE;
            }
        }
        return UserConstants.UNIQUE;
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 校验监控IP是否唯一
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022/12/14 08:56:07
     * @param devMonitorInfo 监控信息
     * @return {@link String }
     */
    @Override
    public String checkCameraIp(DevMonitorInfo devMonitorInfo) {
        String cameraIp = StringUtils.isNull(devMonitorInfo.getCameraIp()) ? "" : devMonitorInfo.getCameraIp();
        DevMonitorInfo devMonitorInfo1 = devMonitorInfoMapper.checkCameraIp(devMonitorInfo);
        if (StringUtils.isNotNull(devMonitorInfo1) && !devMonitorInfo1.getCameraIp().equals(cameraIp)) {
            if(StringUtils.isNotEmpty(devMonitorInfo1.getCameraIp())){
                return UserConstants.NOT_UNIQUE;
            }
        }
        return UserConstants.UNIQUE;
    }
    /**
     * 新增监控设备
     *
     * @param devMonitorInfo 监控设备
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int insertDevMonitorInfo(DevMonitorInfo devMonitorInfo) {
        // 授权数量校验
        if (!devAuthorizeService.checkDeviceAuthorizeNum(AuthorizeDeviceTypeEnum.MONITOR, getCurrentNum())) {
            throw new RuntimeException("已达到设备授权数上限");
        }
        //废弃的根据规则创建的设备编号
        SimpleDateFormat format = new SimpleDateFormat("yyyyMMdd");
        if(StringUtils.isEmpty(devMonitorInfo.getDeviceNo())){
            String deviceNo = "JK"+format.format(new Date());
            String maxDeviceNo = devMonitorInfoMapper.getMaxDeviceNo();
            if(StringUtils.isNotEmpty(maxDeviceNo)){
                int length = maxDeviceNo.length();
                String substring = maxDeviceNo.substring(length - 4, length);
                long l = Long.parseLong(substring) + 1;
                int length1 = Long.toString(l).length();
                String substring1 = maxDeviceNo.substring(0, length - length1);
                deviceNo = substring1 + l;
            }else{
                deviceNo = deviceNo+"0001";
            }
            devMonitorInfo.setDeviceNo(deviceNo);
        }
        devMonitorInfo.setCreateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        SchoolRoom schoolRoom = schoolRoomService.selectSchoolRoomByRoomId(devMonitorInfo.getRoomId());
        devMonitorInfo.setRoomNo(schoolRoom.getRoomCode());
        return devMonitorInfoMapper.insertDevMonitorInfo(devMonitorInfo);
    }
    /**
     * 修改监控设备
     *
     * @param devMonitorInfo 监控设备
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int updateDevMonitorInfo(DevMonitorInfo devMonitorInfo)
    {
        devMonitorInfo.setUpdateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        SchoolRoom schoolRoom = schoolRoomService.selectSchoolRoomByRoomId(devMonitorInfo.getRoomId());
        devMonitorInfo.setRoomNo(schoolRoom.getRoomCode());
        return devMonitorInfoMapper.updateDevMonitorInfo(devMonitorInfo);
    }
    /**
     * 批量删除监控设备
     *
     * @param deviceIds 需要删除的监控设备主键
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int deleteDevMonitorInfoByDeviceIds(Long[] deviceIds)
    {
        return devMonitorInfoMapper.deleteDevMonitorInfoByDeviceIds(deviceIds);
    }
    /**
     * 删除监控设备信息
     *
     * @param deviceId 监控设备主键
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int deleteDevMonitorInfoByDeviceId(Long deviceId)
    {
        return devMonitorInfoMapper.deleteDevMonitorInfoByDeviceId(deviceId);
    }
    /**
     * 导入数据
     * @Description: 导入数据
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/02
     * @param devMonitorInfos
     * @return {@link String }
     */
    @Override
    @Transactional(rollbackFor = Exception.class)
    public String importData(List<DevMonitorInfo> devMonitorInfos){
        StringBuilder promptInformation = new StringBuilder();
        List<Integer> err0 = new ArrayList<>();
        List<Integer> err1 = new ArrayList<>();
        List<Integer> err2 = new ArrayList<>();
        List<Integer> err3 = new ArrayList<>();
        List<Integer> err4 = new ArrayList<>();
        List<Integer> err5 = new ArrayList<>();
        int count = 0;
        if (StringUtils.isBlank(promptInformation)) {
            for (int i = 0; i < devMonitorInfos.size(); i++) {
                DevMonitorInfo devMonitorInfo = devMonitorInfos.get(i);
                DevMonitorInfo devMonitorInfo1 = devMonitorInfoMapper.checkCameraIp(devMonitorInfo);
                SchoolRoom schoolRoom = schoolRoomMapper.selectSchoolRoomByRoomNo(devMonitorInfo.getRoomNo());
                if (schoolRoom == null) {
                    err0.add(i + 1);
                    continue;
                }
                if (StringUtils.isEmpty(devMonitorInfo.getDeviceName())) {
                    err1.add(i + 1);
                    continue;
                }
                if (StringUtils.isEmpty(devMonitorInfo.getCameraUser())) {
                    err2.add(i + 1);
                    continue;
                }
                if (StringUtils.isEmpty(devMonitorInfo.getCameraPassword())) {
                    err3.add(i + 1);
                    continue;
                }
                if (StringUtils.isEmpty(devMonitorInfo.getCameraIp())) {
                    err4.add(i + 1);
                    continue;
                }
                if (devMonitorInfo1!=null&&devMonitorInfo1.getCameraIp() != null) {
                    err5.add(i + 1);
                    continue;
                }
                devMonitorInfo.setRoomId(schoolRoom.getRoomId());
                devMonitorInfo.setRoomName(schoolRoom.getRoomName());
                insertDevMonitorInfo(devMonitorInfo);
            count++;
        }
        if (count == devMonitorInfos.size()) {
            promptInformation.append("全部导入成功！！！");
        }else{
            promptInformation.append("共导入{"+devMonitorInfos.size()+"}条，导入成功{"+count+"}条，导入失败{"+(devMonitorInfos.size()-count)+"}条" + "</br>");
            promptInformation.append("失败原因如下：" + "</br>");
            if (err0.size() >0){
                promptInformation.append("第"+err0.toString()+"条,教室编号不存在,导入失败。" + "</br>");
            }
            if (err1.size() >0){
                promptInformation.append("第"+err1.toString()+"条,设备名称未填写,导入失败。" + "</br>");
            }
            if (err2.size() >0){
                promptInformation.append("第"+err2.toString()+"条,监控登录用户名未填写,导入失败。" + "</br>");
            }
            if (err3.size() >0){
                promptInformation.append("第"+err3.toString()+"条,监控登录密码未填写,导入失败。" + "</br>");
            }
            if (err4.size() >0){
                promptInformation.append("第"+err4.toString()+"条,监控IP未填写,导入失败。" + "</br>");
            }
            if (err5.size() >0){
                promptInformation.append("第"+err5.toString()+"条,监控IP已存在,导入失败。" + "</br>");
            }
        }
          }
        return promptInformation.toString();
    }
    @Override
    public int getCurrentNum() {
        return devMonitorInfoMapper.selectCurrentNum();
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.service.impl;
import java.util.List;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.DateUtils;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
import com.chenrise.jufe.mapper.DevPowerConLogMapper;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.DevPowerConLog;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.IDevPowerConLogService;
/**
 * 电源控制日志Service业务层处理
 * 
 * @author sunming
 * @date 2022-11-28
 */
@Service
public class DevPowerConLogServiceImpl implements IDevPowerConLogService 
{
    @Autowired
    private DevPowerConLogMapper devPowerConLogMapper;
    /**
     * @Description:查询电源控制日志
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-11-28 15:03:28
     * @param logId:电源控制日志主键
     * @return: 电源控制日志
     */
    @Override
    public DevPowerConLog selectDevPowerConLogByLogId(Long logId)
    {
        return devPowerConLogMapper.selectDevPowerConLogByLogId(logId);
    }
    /**
     * @Description:查询电源控制日志列表
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-11-28 15:03:31
     * @param devPowerConLog: 电源控制日志
     * @return: java.util.List<com.chenrise.jufe.domain.DevPowerConLog>电源控制日志
     */
    @Override
    public List<DevPowerConLog> selectDevPowerConLogList(DevPowerConLog devPowerConLog)
    {
        return devPowerConLogMapper.selectDevPowerConLogList(devPowerConLog);
    }
    /**
     * @Description:新增电源控制日志
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-11-28 15:03:35
     * @param devPowerConLog: 电源控制日志
     * @return:  结果
     */
    @Override
    public int insertDevPowerConLog(DevPowerConLog devPowerConLog)
    {
        devPowerConLog.setCreateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        return devPowerConLogMapper.insertDevPowerConLog(devPowerConLog);
    }
    /**
     * @Description:修改电源控制日志
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-11-28 15:03:39
     * @param devPowerConLog: 电源控制日志
     * @return: 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int updateDevPowerConLog(DevPowerConLog devPowerConLog)
    {
        devPowerConLog.setUpdateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        if(devPowerConLog.getOperation()==null||!devPowerConLog.getOperation().equals("1")){
            devPowerConLog.setOperation("0");
        }
        return devPowerConLogMapper.updateDevPowerConLog(devPowerConLog);
    }
    /**
     * @Description:批量删除电源控制日志
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-11-28 15:03:43
     * @param logIds: 需要删除的电源控制日志主键
     * @return: 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int deleteDevPowerConLogByLogIds(Long[] logIds)
    {
        return devPowerConLogMapper.deleteDevPowerConLogByLogIds(logIds);
    }
    /**
     * @Description:删除电源控制日志信息
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-11-28 15:03:48
     * @param logId: 电源控制日志主键
     * @return: 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int deleteDevPowerConLogByLogId(Long logId)
    {
        return devPowerConLogMapper.deleteDevPowerConLogByLogId(logId);
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.service.impl;
import com.chenrise.common.core.domain.R;
import com.chenrise.common.core.exception.ServiceException;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.DateUtils;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.StringUtils;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult;
import com.chenrise.common.security.utils.SecurityUtils;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.*;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.vo.PowerNodeVo;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.vo.PowerVo;
import com.chenrise.jufe.mapper.DevClassBoardMapper;
import com.chenrise.jufe.mapper.DevPowerConLogMapper;
import com.chenrise.jufe.mapper.DevPowerNodeInfoMapper;
