/**
 * 空开信息Service业务层处理
 *
 * @author liyiying
 * @date 2022-11-25
 */
@Service
public class DevPowerNodeInfoServiceImpl implements IDevPowerNodeInfoService
{
    @Resource
    private DevPowerNodeInfoMapper devPowerNodeInfoMapper;
    @Resource
    private SchoolRoomMapper roomMapper;
    @Resource
    private ISchoolLocationService locationService;
    @Resource
    private DeviceCommandService deviceCommandService;
    @Resource
    private RemotePowerService remotePowerService;
    @Resource
    private DevClassBoardMapper devClassBoardMapper;
    @Resource
    private DevPowerConLogMapper devPowerConLogMapper;
    @Resource
    private IDevAuthorizeService devAuthorizeService;
    /**
     *
     查询空开信息
     * @Description: 查询空开信息
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/02
     * @param powerNodeId 空开信息主键
     * @return {@link DevPowerNodeInfo }
     */
    @Override
    public DevPowerNodeInfo selectDevPowerNodeInfoByPowerNodeId(Long powerNodeId)
    {
        return devPowerNodeInfoMapper.selectDevPowerNodeInfoByPowerNodeId(powerNodeId);
    }
    /**
     *
     查询空开信息
     * @Description: 查询空开信息
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/02
     * @param powerNodeIds 空开信息主键
     * @return {@link DevPowerNodeInfo }
     */
    @Override
    public List<DevPowerNodeInfo> selectDevPowerNodeInfoByPowerNodeIds(Long[] powerNodeIds)
    {
        return devPowerNodeInfoMapper.selectDevPowerNodeInfoByPowerNodeIds(powerNodeIds);
    }
    /**
     *
     查询空开信息列表
     * @Description: 查询空开信息列表
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/02
     * @param devPowerNodeInfo 空开信息
     * @return {@link List }<{@link DevPowerNodeInfo }>
     */
    @Override
    public List<DevPowerNodeInfo> selectDevPowerNodeInfoList(DevPowerNodeInfo devPowerNodeInfo)
    {
        List<String> amdinFlagList = SecurityUtils.getLoginUser().getRoles().stream().filter(roole->"admin".equals(roole)||"mastercontrol".equals(roole)).collect(Collectors.toList());
        devPowerNodeInfo.setUserId(amdinFlagList.size()>0?0L:SecurityUtils.getUserId());
        return devPowerNodeInfoMapper.selectDevPowerNodeInfoList(devPowerNodeInfo);
    }
    /**
     *
     新增空开信息
     * @Description: 新增空开信息
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/02
     * @param devPowerNodeInfo 空开信息
     * @return {@link DevPowerNodeInfo }
     */
    @Override
    public DevPowerNodeInfo insertDevPowerNodeInfo(DevPowerNodeInfo devPowerNodeInfo) {
        // 授权数量校验
        if ("1".equals(devPowerNodeInfo.getDeviceNodeType())
                && !devAuthorizeService.checkDeviceAuthorizeNum(AuthorizeDeviceTypeEnum.POWER, getCurrentNum())) {
            throw new RuntimeException("已达到设备授权数上限");
        }
        if(devPowerNodeInfo.getRoomId()!=null){
            SchoolRoom room = roomMapper.selectSchoolRoomByRoomId(devPowerNodeInfo.getRoomId());
            devPowerNodeInfo.setRoomName(room.getRoomName());
        }
        Integer check = devPowerNodeInfoMapper.checkIp(devPowerNodeInfo.getIpAddress(),null);
        if(check!=null){
            throw new ServiceException("此IP已占用请确认！");
        }
        DevPowerNodeInfo info = devPowerNodeInfoMapper.selectDevPowerNodeInfoByPowerNodeId(devPowerNodeInfo.getParentId());
        String prefix = "";
        if(info!=null){
            devPowerNodeInfo.setAncestors(info.getAncestors() + "," + devPowerNodeInfo.getParentId());
            prefix = info.getPowerNodeNum();
            if("1".equals(devPowerNodeInfo.getDeviceNodeType())||"3".equals(devPowerNodeInfo.getDeviceNodeType())){
                prefix = "DY"+prefix.substring(2);
            }else{
                prefix = "KK"+prefix.substring(2);
            }
        }else{
            devPowerNodeInfo.setAncestors("0");
            if("1".equals(devPowerNodeInfo.getDeviceNodeType())||"3".equals(devPowerNodeInfo.getDeviceNodeType())){
                prefix = "DY";
            }else{
                prefix = "KK";
            }
        }
        String maxCode = devPowerNodeInfoMapper.getMaxCode(devPowerNodeInfo.getDeviceLevel(),prefix);
        if(StringUtils.isEmpty(maxCode)){
            devPowerNodeInfo.setPowerNodeNum(prefix+"01");
        }else{
            String code = StringUtils.leftPad((Long.parseLong(maxCode.substring(2))+1)+"", (int) (devPowerNodeInfo.getDeviceLevel()*2),"0");
            devPowerNodeInfo.setPowerNodeNum(maxCode.substring(0,2)+code);
        }
        if(SecurityUtils.getLoginUser()!=null){
            devPowerNodeInfo.setDeptId(SecurityUtils.getLoginUser().getSysUser().getDeptId());
            devPowerNodeInfo.setCreateById(SecurityUtils.getUserId());
            devPowerNodeInfo.setCreateBy(SecurityUtils.getUsername());
        }
        devPowerNodeInfo.setCreateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        if((devPowerNodeInfo.getDeviceNodeType().equals("2")|| devPowerNodeInfo.getDeviceNodeType().equals("4"))&& info!=null){
            devPowerNodeInfo.setIpAddress(info.getIpAddress());
            devPowerNodeInfo.setPort(info.getPort());
        }
        devPowerNodeInfo.setNewPw("admin");
        devPowerNodeInfoMapper.insertDevPowerNodeInfo(devPowerNodeInfo);
        return devPowerNodeInfo;
    }
    /**
     *
     修改空开信息
     * @Description: 修改空开信息
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/02
     * @param devPowerNodeInfo 空开信息
     * @return int
     */
    @Override
    public int updateDevPowerNodeInfo(DevPowerNodeInfo devPowerNodeInfo)
    {
        if(devPowerNodeInfo.getRoomId()!=null){
            SchoolRoom room = roomMapper.selectSchoolRoomByRoomId(devPowerNodeInfo.getRoomId());
            devPowerNodeInfo.setRoomName(room.getRoomName());
        }
        DevPowerNodeInfo dpni_check = devPowerNodeInfoMapper.selectDevPowerNodeInfoByPowerNodeId(devPowerNodeInfo.getPowerNodeId());
        DevPowerNodeInfo dpni_query = new DevPowerNodeInfo();
        dpni_query.setParentId(devPowerNodeInfo.getPowerNodeId());
        List<DevPowerNodeInfo> subList = devPowerNodeInfoMapper.selectDevPowerNodeInfoList(dpni_query);
        if(subList!=null&&subList.size()>0){
            if(!dpni_check.getDeviceNodeType().equals(devPowerNodeInfo.getDeviceNodeType())){
                throw new ServiceException("该节点下有子节点，不允许改变类型！");
            }
            if(devPowerNodeInfo.getParentId()!=null&&!dpni_check.getParentId().equals(devPowerNodeInfo.getParentId())){
                throw new ServiceException("该节点下有子节点，不允许改变父节点！");
            }
        }
        Integer check = devPowerNodeInfoMapper.checkIp(devPowerNodeInfo.getIpAddress(),devPowerNodeInfo.getPowerNodeId());
        if(check!=null && (devPowerNodeInfo.getDeviceNodeType().equals("3")||devPowerNodeInfo.getDeviceNodeType().equals("1"))){
            throw new ServiceException("此IP已占用请确认！");
        }
        DevPowerNodeInfo info = devPowerNodeInfoMapper.selectDevPowerNodeInfoByPowerNodeId(devPowerNodeInfo.getParentId());
        String prefix = "";
        if(devPowerNodeInfo.getParentId() !=null &&!dpni_check.getParentId().equals(devPowerNodeInfo.getParentId())){
            if(info!=null){
                devPowerNodeInfo.setAncestors(info.getAncestors() + "," + devPowerNodeInfo.getParentId());
                prefix = info.getPowerNodeNum();
                if("1".equals(devPowerNodeInfo.getDeviceNodeType())||"3".equals(devPowerNodeInfo.getDeviceNodeType())){
                    prefix = "DY"+prefix.substring(2);
                }else{
                    prefix = "KK"+prefix.substring(2);
                }
            }else{
                devPowerNodeInfo.setAncestors("0");
                if("1".equals(devPowerNodeInfo.getDeviceNodeType())||"3".equals(devPowerNodeInfo.getDeviceNodeType())){
                    prefix = "DY";
                }else{
                    prefix = "KK";
                }
            }
            String maxCode = devPowerNodeInfoMapper.getMaxCode(devPowerNodeInfo.getDeviceLevel(),prefix);
            if(StringUtils.isEmpty(maxCode)){
                devPowerNodeInfo.setPowerNodeNum(prefix+"01");
            }else{
                String code = StringUtils.leftPad((Long.parseLong(maxCode.substring(2))+1)+"", (int) (devPowerNodeInfo.getDeviceLevel()*2),"0");
                devPowerNodeInfo.setPowerNodeNum(maxCode.substring(0,2)+code);
            }
        }
        devPowerNodeInfo.setUpdateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        if("1".equals(devPowerNodeInfo.getDeviceNodeType())||"3".equals(devPowerNodeInfo.getDeviceNodeType())){
            if (!(dpni_check.getIpAddress().equals(devPowerNodeInfo.getIpAddress()) && dpni_check.getPort().equals(devPowerNodeInfo.getPort()))){
                devPowerNodeInfoMapper.updateSonPowerNodeInfoByParentId(devPowerNodeInfo.getIpAddress(),devPowerNodeInfo.getPort(),devPowerNodeInfo.getPowerNodeId(),devPowerNodeInfo.getMac());
            }
        }
//        System.out.println("StringUtils.isNotEmpty(dpni_check.getNewPw())"+StringUtils.isNotEmpty(dpni_check.getNewPw()));
//        System.out.println("StringUtils.isNotEmpty(devPowerNodeInfo.getNewPw())"+StringUtils.isNotEmpty(devPowerNodeInfo.getNewPw()));
//        System.out.println("devPowerNodeInfo.getNewPw().equals(dpni_check.getNewPw())"+devPowerNodeInfo.getNewPw().equals(dpni_check.getNewPw()));
        //旧密码不为空  新密码不为空 且 新旧密码不一致
        if(StringUtils.isNotEmpty(dpni_check.getNewPw())&&StringUtils.isNotEmpty(devPowerNodeInfo.getNewPw())&&!devPowerNodeInfo.getNewPw().equals(dpni_check.getNewPw())){
            devPowerNodeInfo.setOldPw(dpni_check.getNewPw());
            Map<String, String> mapPower = new HashMap<>();
            mapPower.put("address", devPowerNodeInfo.getIpAddress());
            mapPower.put("powerNo",devPowerNodeInfo.getPowerNodeNum());
            mapPower.put("powerName",devPowerNodeInfo.getPowerNodeNode());
            mapPower.put("oldPw",devPowerNodeInfo.getOldPw());
            mapPower.put("newPw",devPowerNodeInfo.getNewPw());
            mapPower.put("roomId",devPowerNodeInfo.getRoomId()+"");
            String roomName = devPowerNodeInfo.getRoomName();
            SchoolRoom room = roomMapper.selectSchoolRoomByRoomId(devPowerNodeInfo.getRoomId());
            if(room!=null){
                SchoolLocation location = locationService.selectSchoolLocationByLocationId(room.getLocationId());
                if(location!=null){
                    String fullName = locationService.fullName(location);
                    roomName = fullName + roomName;
                }
            }
            mapPower.put("roomName",roomName);
            mapPower.put("ip",devPowerNodeInfo.getIpAddress());
            mapPower.put("port",devPowerNodeInfo.getPort());
            mapPower.put("createBy",SecurityUtils.getLoginUser().getSysUser().getNickName());
            CompletableFuture.runAsync(() -> {
                System.out.println("进入修改密码---------------");
                R<Object> ass1 = remotePowerService.updatePw(mapPower);
            });
        }
        return devPowerNodeInfoMapper.updateDevPowerNodeInfo(devPowerNodeInfo);
    }
    /**
     *
     修改空开信息
     * @Description: 修改空开信息
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/02
     * @param devPowerNodeInfo 空开信息
     * @return int
     */
    @Override
    public int updateDevPowerNodeInfoInWhiteList(DevPowerNodeInfo devPowerNodeInfo){
        devPowerNodeInfo.setInWhiteList(1L);
        return devPowerNodeInfoMapper.updateDevPowerNodeInfoInWhiteList(devPowerNodeInfo);
    }
    /**
     *
     批量删除空开信息
     * @Description: 批量删除空开信息
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/02
     * @param powerNodeIds 需要删除的空开信息主键
     * @return int
     */
    @Override
    public int deleteDevPowerNodeInfoByPowerNodeIds(Long[] powerNodeIds)
    {
        return devPowerNodeInfoMapper.deleteDevPowerNodeInfoByPowerNodeIds(powerNodeIds);
    }
    /**
     *
     删除空开信息信息
     * @Description: 删除空开信息信息
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/02
     * @param powerNodeId 空开信息主键
     * @return int
     */
    @Override
    public int deleteDevPowerNodeInfoByPowerNodeId(Long powerNodeId) throws ServerException {
        List<DevPowerNodeInfo> list = devPowerNodeInfoMapper.getByParent(powerNodeId);
        if(list!=null&&list.size()>0){
            throw new ServerException("数据项下有子节点，不允许删除！");
        }
        return devPowerNodeInfoMapper.deleteDevPowerNodeInfoByPowerNodeId(powerNodeId);
    }
    /**
     *
     获取完整的树型结构
     * @Description: 获取完整的树型结构
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/02
     * @return {@link List }<{@link Map }<{@link String },{@link Object }>>
     */
    @Override
    public List<Map<String,Object>> tree()
    {
        List<DevPowerNodeInfo> list = devPowerNodeInfoMapper.getByParent(0L);
        List<Map<String, Object>> maps = new ArrayList<>();
        for(DevPowerNodeInfo s:list){
            Map<String, Object> result = this.getChildren(s);
            maps.add(result);
        }
        return maps;
    }
    /**
     *
     获取并处理子集
     * @Description: 获取并处理子集
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/02
     * @param devPowerNodeInfo
     * @return {@link Map }<{@link String },{@link Object }>
     */
    public Map<String,Object> getChildren(DevPowerNodeInfo devPowerNodeInfo) {
        // 重新组装树形结构
        Map<String,Object> treeDto = new HashMap<>();
        treeDto.put("id",devPowerNodeInfo.getPowerNodeId());
        treeDto.put("label",devPowerNodeInfo.getPowerNodeNode());
        treeDto.put("level",devPowerNodeInfo.getDeviceLevel());
        treeDto.put("deviceNodeType",devPowerNodeInfo.getDeviceNodeType());
        treeDto.put("roomId",devPowerNodeInfo.getRoomId());
        if("4".equals(devPowerNodeInfo.getDeviceNodeType())){
            treeDto.put("isDisabled",true);
        }
        // 查询区域对应单位
        List<Map<String,Object>> childres = new ArrayList<>();
        // 获取子节点
        List<DevPowerNodeInfo> children = devPowerNodeInfoMapper.getByParent(devPowerNodeInfo.getPowerNodeId());
        // 判断并且循环
        if (children != null && children.size() > 0) {
            for (DevPowerNodeInfo sl : children) {
                childres.add(this.getChildren(sl));
            }
        }
        if(childres!=null&&childres.size()>0) {
            treeDto.put("children",childres);
        }
        return treeDto;
    }
    /**
     * 导入数据
     * @Description: 导入数据
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/02
     * @param powerVos
     * @return {@link String }
     */
    @Override
    @Transactional(rollbackFor = Exception.class)
    public String importData(List<PowerVo> powerVos){
        if (StringUtils.isNull(powerVos) || powerVos.size() == 0){
            throw new ServiceException("导入电源数据不能为空！");
        }
//        int index = 2;
//        for(PowerVo p:powerVos){
//            p.setRowIndex(index);
//            index++;
//        }
        int successNum = 0;
        int failureNum = 0;
        StringBuilder successMsg = new StringBuilder();
        StringBuilder failureMsg = new StringBuilder();
//        List<PowerVo> parentList = powerVos.stream().filter(item->"".equals(item.getParentCode())).collect(Collectors.toList());
        for (PowerVo pv : powerVos) {
//            List<PowerVo> subList = powerVos.stream().filter(subItem -> pv.getCode().equals(subItem.getParentCode())).collect(Collectors.toList());
            /**
             * 添加一级电源箱
             */
            boolean flag = this.validPowerVo(pv,failureMsg);
            if(!flag){
                failureNum++;
//                failureNum+=subList.size();
//                for(PowerVo pvSub:subList){
//                    failureMsg.append("<br/>第" + pvSub.getRowIndex() + "行，IP: " + pv.getIp() + " 总电源箱导入失败，无法导入子电源箱！");
//                }
                continue;
            }
            SchoolRoom sr = roomMapper.selectSchoolRoomByRoomId(pv.getRoomId());
            if(sr==null){
                failureMsg.append("<br/>第" + pv.getRowIndex() + "行，IP: " + pv.getIp() + " 教室不存在！");
                failureNum++;
//                failureNum+=subList.size();
//                for(PowerVo pvSub:subList){
//                    failureMsg.append("<br/>第" + pvSub.getRowIndex() + "行，IP: " + pv.getIp() + " 总电源箱导入失败，无法导入子电源箱！");
//                }
                continue;
            }
            Integer check = devPowerNodeInfoMapper.checkIp(pv.getIp(), null);
            if (check != null) {
                failureNum++;
//                failureNum+=subList.size();
                failureMsg.append("<br/>第" + pv.getRowIndex() + "行，IP: " + pv.getIp() + " 已存在");
//                for(PowerVo pvSub:subList){
//                    failureMsg.append("<br/>第" + pvSub.getRowIndex() + "行，IP: " + pv.getIp() + " 总电源箱导入失败，无法导入子电源箱！");
//                }
                continue;
            }
            DevPowerNodeInfo power_one = new DevPowerNodeInfo();
            power_one.setDeviceLevel(1L);
            power_one.setPowerNodeNode(pv.getName());
            power_one.setIpAddress(pv.getIp());
            power_one.setRoomId(pv.getRoomId());
            power_one.setRoomCode(sr.getRoomCode());
            power_one.setRoomName(sr.getRoomName());
            power_one.setDeviceNodeType("1");
            power_one.setPort("5919");
            power_one = this.insertDevPowerNodeInfo(power_one);
            successNum++;
//            if(pv.getSubNums()!=0L){
//
//                /**
//                 * 添加二级空开
//                 */
//
//                for(int i=1;i<=pv.getSubNums();i++){
//                    DevPowerNodeInfo power_two = new DevPowerNodeInfo();
//                    power_two.setParentId(power_one.getPowerNodeId());
//                    power_two.setRoomCode(sr.getRoomCode());
//                    power_two.setRoomName(sr.getRoomName());
//                    power_two.setDeviceLevel(2L);
//                    power_two.setRoomId(pv.getRoomId());
//                    power_two.setSortNum((long)i);
//                    /**
//                     * 第一个空开为总空开
//                     */
//                    if(i==1&&"1".equals(pv.getType())){
//                        /**
//                         * 总空开下添加子电源
//                         */
//                        power_two.setPowerNodeNode("总空开");
//                        power_two.setDeviceNodeType("2");
//                        power_two = this.insertDevPowerNodeInfo(power_two);
//
//                        for(PowerVo pvSub:subList){
//                            flag = this.validPowerVo(pvSub,failureMsg);
//                            if(!flag){
//                                failureNum++;
//                                continue;
//                            }
//
//                            check = devPowerNodeInfoMapper.checkIp(pvSub.getIp(), null);
//                            if (check != null) {
//                                failureNum++;
//                                failureMsg.append("<br/>第" + pvSub.getRowIndex() + "行，IP: " + pvSub.getIp() + " 已存在");
//                                continue;
//                            }
//
//                            DevPowerNodeInfo power_three = new DevPowerNodeInfo();
//                            power_three.setParentId(power_two.getPowerNodeId());
//                            power_three.setRoomCode(sr.getRoomCode());
//                            power_three.setRoomName(sr.getRoomName());
//                            power_three.setDeviceLevel(3L);
//                            power_three.setPowerNodeNode(pvSub.getName());
//                            power_three.setIpAddress(pvSub.getIp());
//                            power_three.setRoomId(pv.getRoomId());
//                            power_three.setDeviceNodeType("3");
//                            power_three = this.insertDevPowerNodeInfo(power_three);
//                            successNum++;
//
//                            if(pvSub.getSubNums()!=0L) {
//                                /**
//                                 * 子电源下添加子空开
//                                 */
//                                for (int k = 1; k <= pvSub.getSubNums(); k++) {
//                                    DevPowerNodeInfo power_four = new DevPowerNodeInfo();
//                                    power_four.setRoomCode(sr.getRoomCode());
//                                    power_four.setRoomName(sr.getRoomName());
//                                    power_four.setParentId(power_three.getPowerNodeId());
//                                    power_four.setDeviceLevel(4L);
//                                    power_four.setRoomId(pv.getRoomId());
//                                    power_four.setSortNum((long) k);
//                                    power_four.setPowerNodeNode("第" + k + "子空开");
//                                    power_four.setDeviceNodeType("4");
//                                    this.insertDevPowerNodeInfo(power_four);
//                                }
//                            }
//                        }
//
//                    }else{
//                        power_two.setPowerNodeNode("第"+i+"子空开");
//                        power_two.setDeviceNodeType("4");
//                        this.insertDevPowerNodeInfo(power_two);
//                    }
//                }
//            }
        }
        successMsg.insert(0, "导入成功,共"+ successNum + " 条");
        if (failureNum > 0) {
            failureMsg.insert(0, "导入失败,，失败原因如下：");
            throw new ServiceException(failureMsg.toString());
        }
        return successMsg.toString();
    }
    /**
     * @Description:班牌控制空开
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-12-07 10:38:04
     * @param deviceId: 设备id
     * @param openStatus:
     * @return: java.lang.Integer
     */
    @Override
    public Integer boardControlPowerNode(Long deviceId, Integer openStatus,Long userId) {
        DevPowerNodeInfo nodeInfo = new DevPowerNodeInfo();
        nodeInfo.setPowerNodeId(deviceId);
        if(openStatus!=null && openStatus==1){
            nodeInfo.setOnoffStatus("1");
        }else {
            nodeInfo.setOnoffStatus("0");
        }
        deviceCommandService.powerControl(deviceId,String.valueOf(openStatus));
        Integer count = devPowerNodeInfoMapper.updateDevPowerNodeInfo(nodeInfo);
        nodeInfo = devPowerNodeInfoMapper.selectDevPowerNodeInfoByPowerNodeId(deviceId);
        DevPowerNodeInfo parentInfo = devPowerNodeInfoMapper.selectDevPowerNodeInfoByPowerNodeId(nodeInfo.getParentId());
        DevPowerConLog powerConLog = new DevPowerConLog();
        powerConLog.setPowerId(parentInfo.getPowerNodeId());
        powerConLog.setPowerCode(parentInfo.getPowerNodeNum());
        powerConLog.setPowerName(parentInfo.getPowerNodeNode());
        powerConLog.setDeviceId(nodeInfo.getPowerNodeId());
        powerConLog.setDeviceCode(nodeInfo.getPowerNodeNum());
        powerConLog.setDeviceName(nodeInfo.getPowerNodeNode());
        powerConLog.setRoomId(nodeInfo.getRoomId());
        powerConLog.setRoomCode(nodeInfo.getRoomCode());
        powerConLog.setRoomName(nodeInfo.getRoomName());
        powerConLog.setOperation((String.valueOf(openStatus)));
        powerConLog.setOperTime(new Date());
        powerConLog.setControlType("6");
        powerConLog.setCreateTime(new Date());
        powerConLog.setUpdateTime(new Date());
        powerConLog.setNodeType(nodeInfo.getDeviceNodeType());
        powerConLog.setOperUserId(SecurityUtils.getUserId());
        powerConLog.setOperUserNum(SecurityUtils.getUsername());
        powerConLog.setOperUserName(SecurityUtils.getLoginUser().getSysUser().getNickName());
        powerConLog.setCreateById(SecurityUtils.getUserId());
        powerConLog.setUpdateById(SecurityUtils.getUserId());
        devPowerConLogMapper.insertDevPowerConLog(powerConLog);
        return count;
    }
    /**
     * 验证传入
     * @Description: 验证传入
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/02
     * @param pv
     * @param msg
     * @return boolean
     */
    private boolean validPowerVo(PowerVo pv,StringBuilder msg){
        if(StringUtils.isEmpty(pv.getName())){
            msg.append("<br/>第" + pv.getRowIndex() + "行，IP: " + pv.getIp() + " 导入失败，名称为空！");
            return false;
        }
        if(StringUtils.isEmpty(pv.getIp())){
            msg.append("<br/>第" + pv.getRowIndex() + "行，IP: " + pv.getIp() + " 导入失败，IP为空！");
            return false;
        }
//        if(StringUtils.isEmpty(pv.getType())){
//            msg.append("<br/>第" + pv.getRowIndex() + "行，IP: " + pv.getIp() + " 导入失败，类型为空！");
//            return false;
//        }
        if(pv.getRoomId()==null){
            msg.append("<br/>第" + pv.getRowIndex() + "行，IP: " + pv.getIp() + " 导入失败，教室编号为空！");
            return false;
        }
//        if(pv.getSubNums()==null){
//            msg.append("<br/>第" + pv.getRowIndex() + "行，IP: " + pv.getIp() + " 导入失败，空开数量为空！");
//            return false;
//        }
        return true;
    }
    /**
     * 根据最后心跳设置设备离线-空开电源
     * @Description: 根据最后心跳设置设备离线-空开电源
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-12-09 17:18:23
     * @param time 时间
     * @return int
     */
    @Override
    public int setPowerNodeInfOffLine(Date time) {
        return devPowerNodeInfoMapper.setPowerNodeInfOffLine(time);
    }
    /**
     * 查询电源信息列表app
     * @Description: 查询电源信息列表app
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-12-12 15:44:49
     * @param roomId 房间id
     * @param nodeType 节点类型
     * @return {@link List }<{@link PowerNodeVo }>
     */
    @Override
    public List<PowerNodeVo> selectDevPowerNodeInfoListToApp(Long roomId, Long nodeType) {
        List<String> amdinFlagList = SecurityUtils.getLoginUser().getRoles().stream().filter(roole->"admin".equals(roole)||"mastercontrol".equals(roole)).collect(Collectors.toList());
        Long isWhite = amdinFlagList.size() == 0?SecurityUtils.getUserId():0L;
        List<PowerNodeVo> list = devPowerNodeInfoMapper.selectDevPowerNodeInfoListToApp(roomId);
        for (PowerNodeVo vo:list) {
            vo.setChildren(devPowerNodeInfoMapper.selectDevPowerNodeInfoListToAppById(vo.getPowerNodeId(),isWhite,nodeType));
        }
        List<PowerNodeVo> result = list.stream().filter(item->(item.getChildren()!=null&&item.getChildren().size()>0)).collect(Collectors.toList());
        return result;
    }
    /**
     * @Description:班牌批量控制不在白名单里的子空开
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-01-12 16:52:47
     * @param ip:
     * @param openStatus:
     * @param userId:
     * @return: java.lang.Integer
     */
    @Override
    public Integer boardControlAllPowerNode(String ip, Integer openStatus, Long userId) {
        DevClassBoard board = devClassBoardMapper.selectDevClassBoardByBoardIp(ip);
        List<PowerNodeVo> list = devPowerNodeInfoMapper.selectDevPowerNodeNotInfoWhite(board.getRoomId());
        Integer count=0;
        if(list!=null&&list.size()>0){
            for(int i=0;i<list.size();i++){
                DevPowerNodeInfo nodeInfo = new DevPowerNodeInfo();
                nodeInfo.setPowerNodeId(list.get(i).getPowerNodeId());
                if(openStatus!=null && openStatus==1){
                    nodeInfo.setOnoffStatus("1");
                }else {
                    nodeInfo.setOnoffStatus("0");
                }
                deviceCommandService.powerControl(list.get(i).getPowerNodeId(),String.valueOf(openStatus));
                devPowerNodeInfoMapper.updateDevPowerNodeInfo(nodeInfo);
                nodeInfo = devPowerNodeInfoMapper.selectDevPowerNodeInfoByPowerNodeId(list.get(i).getPowerNodeId());
                DevPowerNodeInfo parentInfo = devPowerNodeInfoMapper.selectDevPowerNodeInfoByPowerNodeId(nodeInfo.getParentId());
                DevPowerConLog powerConLog = new DevPowerConLog();
                powerConLog.setPowerId(parentInfo.getPowerNodeId());
                powerConLog.setPowerCode(parentInfo.getPowerNodeNum());
                powerConLog.setPowerName(parentInfo.getPowerNodeNode());
                powerConLog.setDeviceId(nodeInfo.getPowerNodeId());
                powerConLog.setDeviceCode(nodeInfo.getPowerNodeNum());
                powerConLog.setDeviceName(nodeInfo.getPowerNodeNode());
                powerConLog.setRoomId(nodeInfo.getRoomId());
                powerConLog.setRoomCode(nodeInfo.getRoomCode());
                powerConLog.setRoomName(nodeInfo.getRoomName());
                powerConLog.setOperation((String.valueOf(openStatus)));
                powerConLog.setOperTime(new Date());
                powerConLog.setControlType("6");
                powerConLog.setCreateTime(new Date());
                powerConLog.setUpdateTime(new Date());
                powerConLog.setNodeType(nodeInfo.getDeviceNodeType());
                powerConLog.setOperUserId(SecurityUtils.getUserId());
                powerConLog.setOperUserNum(SecurityUtils.getUsername());
                powerConLog.setOperUserName(SecurityUtils.getLoginUser().getSysUser().getNickName());
                powerConLog.setCreateById(SecurityUtils.getUserId());
                powerConLog.setUpdateById(SecurityUtils.getUserId());
                devPowerConLogMapper.insertDevPowerConLog(powerConLog);
                count++;
            }
        }
        return count;
    }
    /**
     * @Description:根据IP地址更新端口
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-02-14 14:26:23
     * @param ip:
     * @param port:
     * @return: java.lang.Object
     */
    @Override
    public Integer updatePowerPort(String ip, String port) {
        return devPowerNodeInfoMapper.updatePowerPort(ip,port);
    }
    /**
     * @Description:添加空开信息
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-02-14 16:08:45
     * @param ipInfos:
     * @return: java.lang.Integer
     */
    @Override
    public Integer addPowerNodeInfoByList(List<Map<String, String>> ipInfos) {
        if(ipInfos!=null&&ipInfos.size()>0){
            String ipInfo = ipInfos.get(0).get("address");
            DevPowerNodeInfo parentNode = devPowerNodeInfoMapper.selectParentNodeByAddress(ipInfo);
            for(int i=0;i<ipInfos.size();i++){
                Map<String, String> nodeInfo= ipInfos.get(i);
                String nodeType = nodeInfo.get("nodeType");
                String addressInfo  = nodeInfo.get("addressInfo");
                String sortNum  = nodeInfo.get("sortNum");
                String onoffStatus = nodeInfo.get("onoffStatus");
                DevPowerNodeInfo kkNode =  new DevPowerNodeInfo();
                kkNode.setRoomId(parentNode.getRoomId());
                String infoText= "第"+sortNum+"";
                if(nodeType!=null&&nodeType.equals("2")){
                    infoText= infoText+"总空开";
                }else{
                    infoText= infoText+"子空开";
                }
                kkNode.setMac(parentNode.getMac());
                kkNode.setPowerNodeNode(infoText);
                kkNode.setParentId(parentNode.getPowerNodeId());
                kkNode.setDeviceNodeType(nodeType);
                kkNode.setSortNum(Long.parseLong(sortNum));
                kkNode.setOnlineStatus("1");
                kkNode.setOnoffStatus(onoffStatus);
                kkNode.setLastBitTime(new Date());
                kkNode.setDeviceLevel(parentNode.getDeviceLevel()+1);
                kkNode.setRoomCode(parentNode.getRoomCode());
                this.insertDevPowerNodeInfo(kkNode);
            }
        }
        return ipInfos.size();
    }
    /**
     * @Description:更新操作日志
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-02-15 11:23:00
     * @param nodes:
     * @return: java.lang.Integer
     */
    @Override
    public Integer updateNodeLongsResult(List<Map<String, String>> nodes) {
        if(nodes!=null&&nodes.size()>0){
            for(int i=0;i<nodes.size();i++){
                Map<String, String> node = nodes.get(i);
                String address = node.get("address");
                String sortNum = node.get("sortNum");
                String onoffStatus = node.get("onoffStatus");
                devPowerConLogMapper.updateDevPowerConLogByAddrss(address,sortNum,onoffStatus);
            }
        }
        devPowerConLogMapper.updateDevPowerConLogByAddrssFiled();
        return 1;
    }
    /**
     * @Description:重新发送指令到设备
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-05-16 16:16:38
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @Override
    public AjaxResult resendMsgToDevice() {
        List<Map> deviceInfos = devPowerConLogMapper.selectUnSuccessInfo();
        if(deviceInfos!=null&&deviceInfos.size()>0){
            for(int i=0;i<deviceInfos.size();i++){
                Long deviceId = Long.valueOf(String.valueOf(deviceInfos.get(i).get("deviceId")));
                String status =  String.valueOf(deviceInfos.get(i).get("status"));
                deviceCommandService.powerControl(deviceId,status);
            }
        }
        return null;
    }
    @Override
    public int count(DevPowerNodeInfo devPowerNodeInfo){
        return devPowerNodeInfoMapper.count(devPowerNodeInfo);
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 班牌控制单个空开
     * @Author: lougang
     * @Date: 2024-12-23 13:29
     * @param deviceId:
     * @param openStatus:
     * @return: int
     */
    @Override
    public int controlOnePowerNode(Long deviceId, Integer openStatus) {
        DevPowerNodeInfo nodeInfo = new DevPowerNodeInfo();
        nodeInfo.setPowerNodeId(deviceId);
        if(openStatus!=null && openStatus==1){
            nodeInfo.setOnoffStatus("1");
        }else {
            nodeInfo.setOnoffStatus("0");
        }
        deviceCommandService.powerControl(deviceId,String.valueOf(openStatus));
        Integer count = devPowerNodeInfoMapper.updateDevPowerNodeInfo(nodeInfo);
        nodeInfo = devPowerNodeInfoMapper.selectDevPowerNodeInfoByPowerNodeId(deviceId);
        DevPowerNodeInfo parentInfo = devPowerNodeInfoMapper.selectDevPowerNodeInfoByPowerNodeId(nodeInfo.getParentId());
        DevPowerConLog powerConLog = new DevPowerConLog();
        powerConLog.setPowerId(parentInfo.getPowerNodeId());
        powerConLog.setPowerCode(parentInfo.getPowerNodeNum());
        powerConLog.setPowerName(parentInfo.getPowerNodeNode());
        powerConLog.setDeviceId(nodeInfo.getPowerNodeId());
        powerConLog.setDeviceCode(nodeInfo.getPowerNodeNum());
        powerConLog.setDeviceName(nodeInfo.getPowerNodeNode());
        powerConLog.setRoomId(nodeInfo.getRoomId());
        powerConLog.setRoomCode(nodeInfo.getRoomCode());
        powerConLog.setRoomName(nodeInfo.getRoomName());
        powerConLog.setOperation((String.valueOf(openStatus)));
        powerConLog.setOperTime(new Date());
        powerConLog.setControlType("6");
        powerConLog.setCreateTime(new Date());
        powerConLog.setUpdateTime(new Date());
        powerConLog.setNodeType(nodeInfo.getDeviceNodeType());
//        powerConLog.setOperUserId(SecurityUtils.getUserId());
//        powerConLog.setOperUserNum(SecurityUtils.getUsername());
        powerConLog.setOperUserName("班牌");
//        powerConLog.setCreateById(SecurityUtils.getUserId());
//        powerConLog.setUpdateById(SecurityUtils.getUserId());
        devPowerConLogMapper.insertDevPowerConLog(powerConLog);
        return count;
    }
    @Override
    public int controlAllPowerNode(Long deviceId, Integer openStatus) {
        List<PowerNodeVo> list = devPowerNodeInfoMapper.selectDevPowerNodeByParentId(deviceId);
        Integer count=0;
        if(list!=null&&list.size()>0){
            for(int i=0;i<list.size();i++){
                DevPowerNodeInfo nodeInfo = new DevPowerNodeInfo();
                nodeInfo.setPowerNodeId(list.get(i).getPowerNodeId());
                if(openStatus!=null && openStatus==1){
                    nodeInfo.setOnoffStatus("1");
                }else {
                    nodeInfo.setOnoffStatus("0");
                }
                deviceCommandService.powerControl(list.get(i).getPowerNodeId(),String.valueOf(openStatus));
                devPowerNodeInfoMapper.updateDevPowerNodeInfo(nodeInfo);
                nodeInfo = devPowerNodeInfoMapper.selectDevPowerNodeInfoByPowerNodeId(list.get(i).getPowerNodeId());
                DevPowerNodeInfo parentInfo = devPowerNodeInfoMapper.selectDevPowerNodeInfoByPowerNodeId(nodeInfo.getParentId());
                DevPowerConLog powerConLog = new DevPowerConLog();
                powerConLog.setPowerId(parentInfo.getPowerNodeId());
                powerConLog.setPowerCode(parentInfo.getPowerNodeNum());
                powerConLog.setPowerName(parentInfo.getPowerNodeNode());
                powerConLog.setDeviceId(nodeInfo.getPowerNodeId());
                powerConLog.setDeviceCode(nodeInfo.getPowerNodeNum());
                powerConLog.setDeviceName(nodeInfo.getPowerNodeNode());
                powerConLog.setRoomId(nodeInfo.getRoomId());
                powerConLog.setRoomCode(nodeInfo.getRoomCode());
                powerConLog.setRoomName(nodeInfo.getRoomName());
                powerConLog.setOperation((String.valueOf(openStatus)));
                powerConLog.setOperTime(new Date());
                powerConLog.setControlType("6");
                powerConLog.setCreateTime(new Date());
                powerConLog.setUpdateTime(new Date());
                powerConLog.setNodeType(nodeInfo.getDeviceNodeType());
//                powerConLog.setOperUserId(SecurityUtils.getUserId());
//                powerConLog.setOperUserNum(SecurityUtils.getUsername());
                powerConLog.setOperUserName("班牌");
//                powerConLog.setCreateById(SecurityUtils.getUserId());
//                powerConLog.setUpdateById(SecurityUtils.getUserId());
                devPowerConLogMapper.insertDevPowerConLog(powerConLog);
                count++;
            }
        }
        return count;
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 查询电源信息列表app
     * @Author: lougang
     * @Date: 2024-12-23 15:23
     * @param roomId:
     * @param nodeType:
     * @return: java.util.List<com.chenrise.jufe.domain.vo.PowerNodeVo>
     */
    @Override
    public List<PowerNodeVo> getPowerNodeListByRoomId(Long roomId, Long nodeType) {
        Long isWhite = 1L;
        List<PowerNodeVo> list = devPowerNodeInfoMapper.selectDevPowerNodeInfoListToApp(roomId);
        for (PowerNodeVo vo:list) {
            vo.setChildren(devPowerNodeInfoMapper.selectDevPowerNodeInfoListToAppById(vo.getPowerNodeId(),isWhite,nodeType));
        }
        List<PowerNodeVo> result = list.stream().filter(item->(item.getChildren()!=null&&item.getChildren().size()>0)).collect(Collectors.toList());
        return result;
    }
    @Override
    public int getCurrentNum() {
        return devPowerNodeInfoMapper.selectCurrentNum();
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.service.impl;
import java.util.List;
import com.chenrise.common.core.constant.UserConstants;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.DateUtils;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.StringUtils;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
import com.chenrise.jufe.mapper.DevServiceCenterMapper;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.DevServiceCenter;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.IDevServiceCenterService;
/**
 * 中心服务信息Service业务层处理
 * 
 * @author chenfang
 * @date 2022-11-23
 */
@Service
public class DevServiceCenterServiceImpl implements IDevServiceCenterService {
    @Autowired
    private DevServiceCenterMapper devServiceCenterMapper;
    /**
     * @Description: 查询中心服务信息
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-11-23 18:02:40
     * @param centerId: 中心服务信息主键
     * @return: com.chenrise.jufe.domain.DevServiceCenter
     */
    @Override
    public DevServiceCenter selectDevServiceCenterByCenterId(Long centerId) {
        return devServiceCenterMapper.selectDevServiceCenterByCenterId(centerId);
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 查询中心服务信息列表
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-11-23 18:03:24
     * @param devServiceCenter: 中心服务信息
     * @return: java.util.List<com.chenrise.jufe.domain.DevServiceCenter>
     */
    @Override
    public List<DevServiceCenter> selectDevServiceCenterList(DevServiceCenter devServiceCenter) {
        return devServiceCenterMapper.selectDevServiceCenterList(devServiceCenter);
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 新增中心服务信息
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-11-23 18:03:37
     * @param devServiceCenter: 中心服务信息
     * @return: int
     */
    @Override
    public int insertDevServiceCenter(DevServiceCenter devServiceCenter) {
        devServiceCenter.setCreateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        return devServiceCenterMapper.insertDevServiceCenter(devServiceCenter);
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 修改中心服务信息
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-11-23 18:03:49
     * @param devServiceCenter: 中心服务信息
     * @return: int
     */
    @Override
    public int updateDevServiceCenter(DevServiceCenter devServiceCenter) {
        devServiceCenter.setUpdateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        return devServiceCenterMapper.updateDevServiceCenter(devServiceCenter);
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 批量删除中心服务信息
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-11-23 18:04:00
     * @param centerIds: 需要删除的中心服务信息主键
     * @return: int
     */
    @Override
    public int deleteDevServiceCenterByCenterIds(Long[] centerIds) {
        return devServiceCenterMapper.deleteDevServiceCenterByCenterIds(centerIds);
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 删除中心服务信息信息
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-11-23 18:04:12
     * @param centerId: 中心服务信息主键
     * @return: int
     */
    @Override
    public int deleteDevServiceCenterByCenterId(Long centerId) {
        return devServiceCenterMapper.deleteDevServiceCenterByCenterId(centerId);
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 校验中心服务器IP是否唯一
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-11-23 18:01:14
     * @param devServiceCenter: 中心服务信息
     * @return: java.lang.String
     */
    @Override
    public String checkCenterIPUnique(DevServiceCenter devServiceCenter) {
        Long centerId = StringUtils.isNull(devServiceCenter.getCenterId()) ? -1L : devServiceCenter.getCenterId();
        DevServiceCenter info = devServiceCenterMapper.checkCerterIPUnique(devServiceCenter);
        if (StringUtils.isNotNull(info) && info.getCenterId().longValue() != centerId.longValue())
        {
            return UserConstants.NOT_UNIQUE;
        }
        return UserConstants.UNIQUE;
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.service.impl;
import com.chenrise.common.core.exception.ServiceException;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.DevSpeaker;
import com.chenrise.jufe.mapper.DevSpeakerMapper;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.IDevSpeakerService;
import com.chenrise.system.api.RemoteDeviceService;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Value;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
import javax.annotation.Resource;
import java.util.HashMap;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture;
/**
 * 网络采集器数据Service业务层处理
 *
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2023-06-01
 */
@Service
public class DevSpeakerServiceImpl implements IDevSpeakerService
{
    @Resource
    private DevSpeakerMapper speakerMapper;
    @Resource
    private RemoteDeviceService deviceService;
    @Value("${device.text}")
    private String testText;
    /**
     * 查询网络采集器数据
     *
     * @param id 网络采集器数据主键
     * @return 网络采集器数据
     */
    @Override
    public DevSpeaker get(Long id)
    {
        return speakerMapper.get(id);
    }
    /**
     * 查询网络采集器数据列表
     *
     * @param speaker 网络采集器数据
     * @return 网络采集器数据
     */
    @Override
    public List<DevSpeaker> list(DevSpeaker speaker)
    {
        return speakerMapper.list(speaker);
    }
    /**
     * 新增
     * @param speaker
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int insert(DevSpeaker speaker)
    {
        DevSpeaker dnc = speakerMapper.selectByCode(speaker.getCode(),null);
        if(dnc!=null){
            throw new ServiceException("编码被占用！");
        }
        return speakerMapper.insert(speaker);
    }
    /**
     * 修改
     * @param speaker
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int update(DevSpeaker speaker)
    {
        DevSpeaker dnc = speakerMapper.selectByCode(speaker.getCode(),speaker.getId()+"");
        if(dnc!=null){
            throw new ServiceException("编码被占用！");
        }
        return speakerMapper.update(speaker);
    }
    /**
     * 批量删除
     * @param ids 需要删除的数据主键
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int deleteByIds(Long[] ids)
    {
        return speakerMapper.deleteByIds(ids);
    }
    /**
     * 删除
     *
     * @param id 数据主键
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int deleteById(Long id)
    {
        return speakerMapper.deleteById(id);
    }
    @Override
    public void playAudio(DevSpeaker speaker)
    {
        Map<String,Object> info = new HashMap<>();
        info.put("codes",new Integer[]{speaker.getCode()});
        info.put("type","2");
        info.put("text",testText);
        CompletableFuture.runAsync(() -> {
            deviceService.playAudio(info);
        });
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.service.impl;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.FlowSetDetail;
import com.chenrise.jufe.mapper.FlowSetDetailMapper;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.IFlowSetDetailService;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
import java.util.List;
/**
 * 工作流步骤信息Service业务层处理
 *
 * @author sunMing
 * @date 2023-12-27
 */
@Service
public class FlowSetDetailServiceImpl implements IFlowSetDetailService {
    @Autowired
    private FlowSetDetailMapper flowSetDetailMapper;
    /**
     * 查询工作流步骤信息
     *
     * @param id 工作流步骤信息主键
     * @return 工作流步骤信息
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2023-12-27 16:11:08
     */
    @Override
    public FlowSetDetail selectFlowSetDetailById(Long id) {
        return flowSetDetailMapper.selectFlowSetDetailById(id);
    }
    /**
     * 查询工作流步骤信息列表
     *
     * @param flowSetDetail 工作流步骤信息
     * @return 工作流步骤信息
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2023-12-27 16:11:08
     */
    @Override
    public List<FlowSetDetail> selectFlowSetDetailList(FlowSetDetail flowSetDetail) {
        return flowSetDetailMapper.selectFlowSetDetailList(flowSetDetail);
    }
    /**
     * 新增工作流步骤信息
     *
     * @param flowSetDetail 工作流步骤信息
     * @return 结果
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2023-12-27 16:11:08
     */
    @Override
    public int insertFlowSetDetail(FlowSetDetail flowSetDetail) {
        return flowSetDetailMapper.insertFlowSetDetail(flowSetDetail);
    }
    /**
     * 修改工作流步骤信息
     *
     * @param flowSetDetail 工作流步骤信息
     * @return 结果
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2023-12-27 16:11:08
     */
    @Override
    public int updateFlowSetDetail(FlowSetDetail flowSetDetail) {
        return flowSetDetailMapper.updateFlowSetDetail(flowSetDetail);
    }
    /**
     * 批量删除工作流步骤信息
     *
     * @param ids 需要删除的工作流步骤信息主键
     * @return 结果
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2023-12-27 16:11:08
     */
    @Override
    public int deleteFlowSetDetailByIds(Long[] ids) {
        return flowSetDetailMapper.deleteFlowSetDetailByIds(ids);
    }
    /**
     * 删除工作流步骤信息信息
     *
     * @param id 工作流步骤信息主键
     * @return 结果
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2023-12-27 16:11:08
     */
    @Override
    public int deleteFlowSetDetailById(Long id) {
        return flowSetDetailMapper.deleteFlowSetDetailById(id);
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.service.impl;

package com.chenrise.jufe.service.impl;
import java.util.List;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.DateUtils;
import com.chenrise.common.security.utils.SecurityUtils;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.DevPowerNodeInfo;
import com.chenrise.jufe.mapper.DevPowerNodeInfoMapper;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
import com.chenrise.jufe.mapper.PowerNodeWhiteListMapper;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.PowerNodeWhiteList;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.IPowerNodeWhiteListService;
import javax.annotation.Resource;
/**
 * 电源白名单Service业务层处理
 * 
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2022-12-02
 */
@Service
public class PowerNodeWhiteListServiceImpl implements IPowerNodeWhiteListService {
    @Autowired
    private PowerNodeWhiteListMapper powerNodeWhiteListMapper;
    @Resource
    private DevPowerNodeInfoMapper devPowerNodeInfoMapper;
    /**
     查询电源白名单
     * @Description: 查询电源白名单
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022/12/14 09:13:19
     * @param powerNodeWhiteId 电源白名单主键
     * @return {@link PowerNodeWhiteList }
     */
    @Override
    public PowerNodeWhiteList selectPowerNodeWhiteListByPowerNodeWhiteId(Long powerNodeWhiteId) {
        return powerNodeWhiteListMapper.selectPowerNodeWhiteListByPowerNodeWhiteId(powerNodeWhiteId);
    }
    /**
     查询电源白名单列表
     * @Description: 查询电源白名单列表
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022/12/14 09:13:33
     * @param powerNodeWhiteList 电源白名单
     * @return {@link List }<{@link PowerNodeWhiteList }>
     */
    @Override
    public List<PowerNodeWhiteList> selectPowerNodeWhiteListList(PowerNodeWhiteList powerNodeWhiteList) {
        return powerNodeWhiteListMapper.selectPowerNodeWhiteListList(powerNodeWhiteList);
    }
    /**
     查询电源白名单列表
     * @Description: 查询电源白名单列表
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022/12/14 09:13:43
     * @param powerNoderNum 设备编号
     * @return {@link PowerNodeWhiteList }
     */
    @Override
    public PowerNodeWhiteList selectPowerNodeNum(String powerNoderNum) {
        return powerNodeWhiteListMapper.selectPowerNodeNum(powerNoderNum);
    }
    /**
     新增电源白名单
     * @Description: 新增电源白名单
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022/12/14 09:13:52
     * @param powerNodeIds 电源白名单
     * @return int
     */
    @Override
    public int insertPowerNodeWhiteList(Long[] powerNodeIds) {
        PowerNodeWhiteList powerNodeWhiteList = new PowerNodeWhiteList();
        for (Long powerNodeId : powerNodeIds) {
            DevPowerNodeInfo devPowerNodeInfo = devPowerNodeInfoMapper.selectDevPowerNodeInfoByPowerNodeId(powerNodeId);
            powerNodeWhiteListMapper.selectPowerNodeNum(devPowerNodeInfo.getPowerNodeNum());
            powerNodeWhiteList.setPowerNodeId(devPowerNodeInfo.getPowerNodeId());
            powerNodeWhiteList.setPowerNodeNum(devPowerNodeInfo.getPowerNodeNum());
            powerNodeWhiteList.setPowerNodeName(devPowerNodeInfo.getPowerNodeNode());
            powerNodeWhiteList.setRoomId(devPowerNodeInfo.getRoomId());
            powerNodeWhiteList.setRoomCode(devPowerNodeInfo.getRoomCode());
            powerNodeWhiteList.setRoomName(devPowerNodeInfo.getRoomName());
            powerNodeWhiteList.setInWhiteList(1L);
            powerNodeWhiteList.setDeviceNodeType(devPowerNodeInfo.getDeviceNodeType());
            powerNodeWhiteList.setCreateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
            powerNodeWhiteList.setInWhiteTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
            powerNodeWhiteList.setPowerNodeParentId(devPowerNodeInfo.getParentId());
            powerNodeWhiteList.setPowerNodeParentName(devPowerNodeInfoMapper.selectDevPowerNodeInfoByPowerNodeId(devPowerNodeInfo.getParentId()).getPowerNodeNode());
            powerNodeWhiteList.setPowerNodeParentNum(devPowerNodeInfoMapper.selectDevPowerNodeInfoByPowerNodeId(devPowerNodeInfo.getParentId()).getPowerNodeNum());
            powerNodeWhiteList.setAddWhiteUserId(SecurityUtils.getUserId());
            powerNodeWhiteList.setAddWhiteUserName(SecurityUtils.getUsername());
            devPowerNodeInfo.setInWhiteList(1L);
            devPowerNodeInfoMapper.updateDevPowerNodeInfo(devPowerNodeInfo);
            powerNodeWhiteListMapper.insertPowerNodeWhiteList(powerNodeWhiteList);
        }
        return 1;
    }
    /**
     修改电源白名单
     * @Description: 修改电源白名单
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022/12/14 09:14:14
     * @param powerNodeWhiteList 电源白名单
     * @return int
     */
    @Override
    public int updatePowerNodeWhiteList(PowerNodeWhiteList powerNodeWhiteList) {
        powerNodeWhiteList.setUpdateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        return powerNodeWhiteListMapper.updatePowerNodeWhiteList(powerNodeWhiteList);
    }
    /**
     批量删除电源白名单
     * @Description: 批量删除电源白名单
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022/12/14 09:14:23
     * @param powerNodeWhiteIds 需要删除的电源白名单主键
     * @return int
     */
    @Override
    public int deletePowerNodeWhiteListByPowerNodeWhiteIds(Long[] powerNodeWhiteIds) {
        for (Long powerNodeWhiteId : powerNodeWhiteIds) {
            PowerNodeWhiteList powerNodeWhiteList = powerNodeWhiteListMapper.selectPowerNodeWhiteListByPowerNodeWhiteId(powerNodeWhiteId);
            Long powerNodeId = powerNodeWhiteList.getPowerNodeId();
            DevPowerNodeInfo devPowerNodeInfo = devPowerNodeInfoMapper.selectDevPowerNodeInfoByPowerNodeId(powerNodeId);
            devPowerNodeInfo.setInWhiteList(0L);
            devPowerNodeInfoMapper.updateDevPowerNodeInfo(devPowerNodeInfo);
        }
            return powerNodeWhiteListMapper.deletePowerNodeWhiteListByPowerNodeWhiteIds(powerNodeWhiteIds);
    }
    /**
     删除电源白名单信息
     * @Description: 删除电源白名单信息
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022/12/14 09:14:31
     * @param powerNodeWhiteId 电源白名单主键
     * @return int
     */
    @Override
    public int deletePowerNodeWhiteListByPowerNodeWhiteId(Long powerNodeWhiteId) {
        PowerNodeWhiteList powerNodeWhiteList = powerNodeWhiteListMapper.selectPowerNodeWhiteListByPowerNodeWhiteId(powerNodeWhiteId);
        Long powerNodeId = powerNodeWhiteList.getPowerNodeId();
        DevPowerNodeInfo devPowerNodeInfo = devPowerNodeInfoMapper.selectDevPowerNodeInfoByPowerNodeId(powerNodeId);
        devPowerNodeInfo.setInWhiteList(0L);
        devPowerNodeInfoMapper.updateDevPowerNodeInfo(devPowerNodeInfo);
        return powerNodeWhiteListMapper.deletePowerNodeWhiteListByPowerNodeWhiteId(powerNodeWhiteId);
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 查询位置下的设备
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022/12/14 09:12:27
     * @param locationId 位置标识
     * @param roomIds 房间id
     * @param ids id
     * @return {@link List }<{@link DevPowerNodeInfo }>
     */
    @Override
    public List<DevPowerNodeInfo> selectLocationUnderDevice(Long locationId, Long[] roomIds,Long[] ids) {
        return powerNodeWhiteListMapper.selectLocationUnderDevice(locationId,roomIds,ids);
    }
}

package com.chenrise.jufe.service.impl;
import cn.hutool.core.date.DateField;
import cn.hutool.core.date.DateUtil;
import cn.hutool.json.JSONArray;
import cn.hutool.json.JSONObject;
import cn.hutool.json.JSONUtil;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.DateUtils;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult;
import com.chenrise.common.security.utils.SecurityUtils;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.SchoolBaseSetInfo;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.SchoolBlackInfo;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.SchoolReservationInfo;
import com.chenrise.jufe.mapper.SchoolBaseSetInfoMapper;
import com.chenrise.jufe.mapper.SchoolBlackInfoMapper;
import com.chenrise.jufe.mapper.SchoolReservationInfoMapper;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.ISchoolBlackInfoService;
import com.chenrise.system.api.RemoteUserService;
import com.chenrise.system.api.domain.SysRole;
import com.chenrise.system.api.domain.SysUser;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
import org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;
import javax.annotation.Resource;
import java.rmi.ServerException;
import java.util.*;
import java.util.stream.Collectors;
/**
 * 预约黑名单Service业务层处理
 *
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2022-12-03
 */
@Service
public class SchoolBlackInfoServiceImpl implements ISchoolBlackInfoService
{
    @Resource
    private SchoolBlackInfoMapper schoolBlackInfoMapper;
    @Resource
    private SchoolReservationInfoMapper reservationInfoMapper;
    @Resource
    private RemoteUserService userService;
    @Resource
    private SchoolBaseSetInfoMapper baseSetInfoMapper;
    /**
     *
     查询预约黑名单
     * @Description: 查询预约黑名单
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/03
     * @param blackInfoId 预约黑名单主键
     * @return {@link SchoolBlackInfo }
     */
    @Override
    public SchoolBlackInfo selectSchoolBlackInfoByBlackInfoId(Long blackInfoId)
    {
        return schoolBlackInfoMapper.selectSchoolBlackInfoByBlackInfoId(blackInfoId);
    }
    /**
     *
     查询预约黑名单列表
     * @Description: 查询预约黑名单列表
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/03
     * @param schoolBlackInfo 预约黑名单
     * @return {@link List }<{@link SchoolBlackInfo }>
     */
    @Override
    public List<SchoolBlackInfo> selectSchoolBlackInfoList(SchoolBlackInfo schoolBlackInfo)
    {
        return schoolBlackInfoMapper.selectSchoolBlackInfoList(schoolBlackInfo);
    }
    /**
     *
     新增预约黑名单
     * @Description: 新增预约黑名单
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/03
     * @param schoolBlackInfo 预约黑名单
     * @return int
     */
    @Override
    @Transactional(rollbackFor = Exception.class)
    public int insertSchoolBlackInfo(SchoolBlackInfo schoolBlackInfo) throws ServerException {
        SchoolReservationInfo check = reservationInfoMapper.selectSchoolReservationInfoByReservationId(schoolBlackInfo.getReservationId());
//        check.setApprovalStatus("5");
//        reservationInfoMapper.updateSchoolReservationInfo(check);
        SchoolBlackInfo query = new SchoolBlackInfo();
        query.setUserId(check.getUserId());
        query.setUserType(check.getUserType());
        List<SchoolBlackInfo> list = schoolBlackInfoMapper.selectSchoolBlackInfoList(query);
        if(list!=null&&list.size()>0){
            throw new ServerException("已加入黑名单！");
        }
        schoolBlackInfo.setUserId(check.getUserId());
        schoolBlackInfo.setUserType(check.getUserType());
        schoolBlackInfo.setUserCode(check.getUserCode());
        schoolBlackInfo.setUserName(check.getUserName());
        schoolBlackInfo.setDeptId(check.getDeptId());
        schoolBlackInfo.setDeptName(check.getDeptName());
        schoolBlackInfo.setStatus("1");
        schoolBlackInfo.setAddTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        schoolBlackInfo.setCreateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        schoolBlackInfo.setCreateById(schoolBlackInfo.getCreateById()==null? SecurityUtils.getUserId():schoolBlackInfo.getCreateById());
        schoolBlackInfo.setCreateBy(schoolBlackInfo.getCreateBy()==null? SecurityUtils.getUsername():schoolBlackInfo.getCreateBy());
        return schoolBlackInfoMapper.insertSchoolBlackInfo(schoolBlackInfo);
    }
    /**
     *
     修改预约黑名单
     * @Description: 修改预约黑名单
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/03
     * @param schoolBlackInfo 预约黑名单
     * @return int
     */
    @Override
    public int updateSchoolBlackInfo(SchoolBlackInfo schoolBlackInfo)
    {
        schoolBlackInfo.setUpdateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        return schoolBlackInfoMapper.updateSchoolBlackInfo(schoolBlackInfo);
    }
    /**
     *
     批量删除预约黑名单
     * @Description: 批量删除预约黑名单
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/03
     * @return int
     */
//    @Override
//    public int deleteSchoolBlackInfoByBlackInfoIds(JSONObject jsonObject)
//    {
//        for(Long id:blackInfoIds){
//            SchoolBlackInfo blackInfo = schoolBlackInfoMapper.selectSchoolBlackInfoByBlackInfoId(id);
//            //更新user 的爽约次数
//            SysUser editUser = new SysUser();
//            editUser.setUserId(blackInfo.getUserId());
//            editUser.setBreakNum(0);
//            userService.editUser(editUser);
//        }
//        return schoolBlackInfoMapper.deleteSchoolBlackInfoByBlackInfoIds(blackInfoIds);
//    }
    /**
     *
     删除预约黑名单信息
     * @Description: 删除预约黑名单信息
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/03
     * @param jsonObject
     * @return int
     */
    @Override
    public int deleteSchoolBlackInfoByBlackInfoId(JSONObject jsonObject)
    {
        SchoolBlackInfo blackInfo = schoolBlackInfoMapper.selectSchoolBlackInfoByBlackInfoId(jsonObject.getLong("blackInfoId"));
        Integer breakNum = jsonObject.getInt("breakNum");
        AjaxResult result = userService.getUser(blackInfo.getUserId());
        JSONObject userObj = JSONUtil.parseObj(result);
        SysUser user = JSONUtil.toBean(JSONUtil.toJsonStr(userObj.get("data")), SysUser.class);
        //更新user 的爽约次数
        SysUser editUser = new SysUser();
        editUser.setUserId(blackInfo.getUserId());
        editUser.setBreakNum(user.getBreakNum()-breakNum);
        userService.editUser(editUser);
        return schoolBlackInfoMapper.deleteSchoolBlackInfoByBlackInfoId(blackInfo.getBlackInfoId());
    }
    /**
     * @Description:移除黑名单
     * @param 
     * @return: void
     * @Author: CJH 
     * @Updator: CJH 
     * @Date 2024/1/15 14:02
     */
    @Override
    public void removeBlack() {
        SchoolBaseSetInfo baseSetInfo = baseSetInfoMapper.selectSchoolBaseSetInfoById(1L);
        Long offset = DateUtil.betweenDay(new Date(),DateUtil.offset(baseSetInfo.getLastRemoveTime(), DateField.DAY_OF_YEAR,baseSetInfo.getAutoRemoveBlack()),true);
        if(offset==0L){
            SchoolBlackInfo query_sbi = new SchoolBlackInfo();
            List<SchoolBlackInfo> list = schoolBlackInfoMapper.selectSchoolBlackInfoList(query_sbi);
            //处理黑名单内非自动拉入
            for(SchoolBlackInfo sbi:list){
                if("HAND".equals(sbi.getType())){
                    continue;
                }
                schoolBlackInfoMapper.deleteSchoolBlackInfoByBlackInfoId(sbi.getBlackInfoId());
            }
            //处理用户
            List<Long> user_ids_hand = list.stream().filter(e->"HAND".equals(e.getType())).map(SchoolBlackInfo::getUserId).collect(Collectors.toList());
            AjaxResult result = userService.userlist();
            if(result.get("data")!=null){
                try {
                    JSONArray arr = JSONUtil.parseArray(result.get("data"));
                    System.out.println("获取到"+arr.size()+"名用户！！！");
                    for(int i=0;i<arr.size();i++){
                        JSONObject obj = arr.getJSONObject(i);
                        if(user_ids_hand.contains(obj.getLong("userId"))){
                            continue;
                        }
                        SysUser editUser = new SysUser();
                        editUser.setUserId(obj.getLong("userId"));
                        editUser.setBreakNum(0);
                        userService.editUser(editUser);
                    }
                }catch (Exception e){
                    e.printStackTrace();
                }
            }
            //更新移除时间
            baseSetInfo.setLastRemoveTime(new Date());
            baseSetInfoMapper.updateSchoolBaseSetInfo(baseSetInfo);
        }
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.service.impl;
import cn.hutool.core.util.StrUtil;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.SchoolCourseSection;
import com.chenrise.jufe.mapper.SchoolCourseSectionMapper;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.ISchoolCourseSectionService;
import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
import java.util.HashMap;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
@RequiredArgsConstructor
@Service
public class SchoolCourseSectionServiceImpl implements ISchoolCourseSectionService {
    private final SchoolCourseSectionMapper schoolCourseSectionMapper;
    @Override
    public Map<Integer, SchoolCourseSection> getCourseSectionMap() {
        Map<Integer, SchoolCourseSection> map = new HashMap<>();
        List<SchoolCourseSection> list = schoolCourseSectionMapper.selectAll();
        for (SchoolCourseSection schoolCourseSection : list) {
            map.put(schoolCourseSection.getClassSection(), schoolCourseSection);
        }
        return map;
    }
    @Override
    public void updateCourseTimeBySemester(String semester) {
        if (StrUtil.isEmpty(semester)) {
            throw new RuntimeException("学期不能为空");
        }
        schoolCourseSectionMapper.updateCourseTimeBySemester(semester);
    }
}

/**
 * @Description:学校课程Service业务层处理

 */
@Service
public class SchoolCourseServiceImpl implements ISchoolCourseService

    @Resource
    private RemotePowerService remotePowerService;
    @Resource private SchoolBaseSetInfoMapper baseSetInfoMapper;
    @Resource private RemotePatrolService patrolService;
    @Resource private ISchoolMeetingInfoService schoolMeetingInfoService;
    @Value("${cjdx.apis[0].apiKey}")
    private String kc_api_key;
    @Value("${cjdx.apis[0].urls[3].url}")
    private String kc_kc;
    /**

    /**
     * @Description:根据ip地址查询班牌课程相关信息
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-12-05 13:11:34
     * @param ip:
     * @return: java.lang.String
     */
    @Override
    public Map<String,Object> getBoardAllInfo(String ip) {
        SchoolBaseSetInfo baseSetInfo = baseSetInfoMapper.selectSchoolBaseSetInfoById(1L);
        Map<String,Object> map =new HashMap();
        map.put("code","200");
        DevClassBoard board = devClassBoardMapper.selectDevClassBoardByBoardIp(ip);
        if(board==null){
            map.put("msg","当前班牌已经停用！");
            map.put("code","500");
            return map;
        }else if(board.getRoomId()==null||board.getRoomId().equals("")){
            if(board.getStatus().equals("2")){
                map.put("msg","当前班牌已停用！");
                map.put("code","500");
                return map;
            }else{
                map.put("msg","当前班牌未设置房间！");
                map.put("code","500");
                return map;
            }
        }
        //根据ip地址查询房间信息
        SchoolRoom schoolRoom = schoolRoomService.selectSchoolRoomByRoomId(board.getRoomId());
        if(schoolRoom==null||schoolRoom.getRoomId()==null||schoolRoom.getRoomId().equals("")){
            map.put("msg","班牌与房间信息不匹配，请重试！");
            map.put("code","500");
            return map;
        }else{
            map.put("roomId",schoolRoom.getRoomId());
            map.put("roomCode", schoolRoom.getRoomCode());
            map.put("roomName",schoolRoom.getRoomName());
            map.put("isReservation",schoolRoom.getIsReservation());
        }
        SchoolTimeScheduling nowScheduling = null;
                //根据房间编号查询今日课程信息
        List<SchoolTimeScheduling> schoolTimeSchedulings = schoolTimeSchedulingMapper.selectInfoByRoomcodeToday(String.valueOf(board.getRoomId()));
        if(schoolTimeSchedulings==null||schoolTimeSchedulings.size()==0){
            map.put("msg","今日无课程安排");
        }else{
            //课程安排信息
            for(SchoolTimeScheduling sts:schoolTimeSchedulings){
                SchoolCourse course = schoolCourseMapper.selectCourseByCourseNo(sts.getCourseNo());
                sts.getParams().put("bj", course.getJxbzc());
            }
            map.put("courseInfos",schoolTimeSchedulings);
            //当前课程
            nowScheduling = schoolTimeSchedulingMapper.selectInfoByRoomcodeNow(String.valueOf(board.getRoomId()));
            if(nowScheduling==null){
                Date now = new Date();
                for(SchoolTimeScheduling sts:schoolTimeSchedulings){
                    Date start = DateUtil.parse(DateUtil.format(sts.getCourseDate(),"yyyy-MM-dd")+" "+sts.getStartTime(),"yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm");
                    if(now.before(start)){
                        nowScheduling = sts;
                        break;
                    }
                }
            }
            map.put("courseNowInfo",nowScheduling);
        }
        //当前教学周 、 当前课节
        Map<String,Object> weekAndClassNo = schoolTimeSchedulingMapper.selectWeekAndClassNo();
        if(weekAndClassNo!=null){
            map.put("techingWeek", StringUtils.leftPad(String.valueOf(weekAndClassNo.get("teaching_week")),2,"0"));
            map.put("classSection",StringUtils.leftPad(String.valueOf(weekAndClassNo.get("class_section")),2,"0"));
        }else if(nowScheduling!=null){
            map.put("techingWeek", StringUtils.leftPad(nowScheduling.getTeachingWeek()+"",2,"0"));
            map.put("classSection",StringUtils.leftPad(nowScheduling.getClassSection()+"",2,"0"));
        }
        List<SchoolNoticeInfo> noticeInfo = schoolNoticeInfoMapper.selectNoticeInfoForBoard(schoolRoom.getRoomId());
        List<Map<String, Object>> maps = schoolMeetingInfoService.boredGetMeetingMsg(ip);
        maps.forEach(item->{
            SchoolNoticeInfo meetingInfo = new SchoolNoticeInfo();
            meetingInfo.setNoticeName(Objects.toString(item.get("name")));
            meetingInfo.setNoticeInfo(Objects.toString(item.get("details")));
            meetingInfo.setReleaseUserName(Objects.toString(item.get("initiator")));
            String state = Objects.toString(item.get("state")).equals("1") ? "未开始" : Objects.toString(item.get("state")).equals("2") ? "已开始" : "已结束";
            meetingInfo.setReleaseStatus(state);
            meetingInfo.setTopping(Objects.toString(item.get("startTime")));
            meetingInfo.setReleaseTime((Date) item.get("updateTime"));
            noticeInfo.add(meetingInfo);
        });
        map.put("noticeInfos",noticeInfo);
        //今日预约信息
        //预约信息
        List<Map> reservationInfos = schoolReservationTimeInfoMapper.selectInfoListForBoard(schoolRoom.getRoomId());
        map.put("reservationInfos",reservationInfos);
        //当前教室 总电源电压 电流 功率
        DevPowerNodeInfo pni_query = new DevPowerNodeInfo();
        pni_query.setRoomId(schoolRoom.getRoomId());
        pni_query.setDeviceNodeType("2");
        List<DevPowerNodeInfo> devPowerNodeInfos = devPowerNodeInfoMapper.selectDevPowerNodeInfoList(pni_query);
        pni_query.setDeviceNodeType("4");
        devPowerNodeInfos.addAll(devPowerNodeInfoMapper.selectDevPowerNodeInfoList(pni_query));
        if (!devPowerNodeInfos.isEmpty()) {
            map.put("powerVol",devPowerNodeInfos.get(0).getVol());
            map.put("powerCur",devPowerNodeInfos.get(0).getCur());
            map.put("powerPwr",devPowerNodeInfos.get(0).getPwr());
        }else{
            map.put("powerVol",0);
            map.put("powerCur",0);
            map.put("powerPwr",0);
        }
        Map<String,Object> map1 = new HashMap<>();
        if(!"-".equals(schoolRoom.getSfsj())&&schoolRoom.getSfsj()!=null){
            map1.put("sj","是".equals(schoolRoom.getSfsj())?true:false);
        }
        if(!"-".equals(schoolRoom.getSfyg())&&schoolRoom.getSfyg()!=null){
            map1.put("yg","是".equals(schoolRoom.getSfyg())?true:false);
        }
        if(!"-".equals(schoolRoom.getSfkc())&&schoolRoom.getSfkc()!=null){
            map1.put("cc","关".equals(schoolRoom.getSfkc())?true:false);
        }
        if(!"-".equals(schoolRoom.getWdNum())){
            map1.put("wd",Float.parseFloat(schoolRoom.getWdNum()));
        }
        if(!"-".equals(schoolRoom.getSdNum())){
            map1.put("sd",Float.parseFloat(schoolRoom.getSdNum()));
        }
        if(!"-".equals(schoolRoom.getGzNum())){
            map1.put("gz",Float.parseFloat(schoolRoom.getGzNum()));
        }
        if(!"-".equals(schoolRoom.getPm25Num())){
            //pm2.5
            map1.put("kqzl_pm1",Float.parseFloat(schoolRoom.getPm25Num()));
        }
        if(!"-".equals(schoolRoom.getPm10Num())){
            //pm10
            map1.put("kqzl_pm2",Float.parseFloat(schoolRoom.getPm10Num()));
        }
        map.put("roomDevData",map1);
        map.put("minWd",baseSetInfo.getMinWd());
        map.put("maxWd",baseSetInfo.getMaxWd());
        map.put("minSd",baseSetInfo.getMinSd());
        map.put("maxSd",baseSetInfo.getMaxSd());
        map.put("minGz",baseSetInfo.getMinGz());
        map.put("maxGz",baseSetInfo.getMaxGz());
        map.put("minPm1",baseSetInfo.getMinPm1());
        map.put("maxPm1",baseSetInfo.getMaxPm1());
        map.put("minPm2",baseSetInfo.getMinPm2());
        map.put("maxPm2",baseSetInfo.getMaxPm2());
        map.put("bpLogo",baseSetInfo.getBpLogo());
        //获取电源信息  有一个开始就算开
        boolean flag = false;
        for(DevPowerNodeInfo pni:devPowerNodeInfos){
            if("1".equals(pni.getOnoffStatus())){
                flag = true;
            }
        }
        map.put("powerStatus",flag);
        //获取门锁信息  有一个开着就算开
        DevLockInfo dli_query = new DevLockInfo();
        dli_query.setRoomId(schoolRoom.getRoomId());
        List<DevLockInfo> locks = devLockInfoMapper.selectDevLockInfoList(dli_query);
        flag = false;
        boolean doorStatus = false;
        for(DevLockInfo lock:locks){
            if("1".equals(lock.getOpenStatus())){
                flag = true;
            }
            if("1".equals(lock.getDoorStatus())){
                doorStatus = true;
            }
        }
        map.put("doorStatus",doorStatus);
        map.put("lockStatus",flag);
        AjaxResult result = patrolService.getPointByName(schoolRoom.getRoomCode());
        if(result.get("data")!=null){
            JSONObject obj = JSONUtil.parseObj(JSONUtil.toJsonStr(result.get("data")));
            map.put("qrCodeUrl",obj.get("qrCodeUrl"));
        }
        //返回系统时间
        map.put("nowTime",new Date().getTime());
        List<SysDictData> dictDatas = DictUtils.getDictCache("school_report_type");
        map.put("dictDatas",dictDatas);
        return map;
    }
    @Override
    public void sync() {
        SimpleDateFormat format = new SimpleDateFormat("yyyy-MM-dd");
        JSONObject object = new JSONObject();
        String res = HttpRequest.post(this.kc_kc)
                .header("Authorization-Type","Apikey")
                .header("Authorization",this.kc_api_key)
                .header("Content-Type","application/x-www-form-urlencoded")
                .body(String.valueOf(object))
                .execute().body();
        Map<String, Map<String,Object>> result = JSONUtil.toBean(res, Map.class);
        List<JSONObject> list = JSONUtil.toList(result.get("data").get("list").toString(), JSONObject.class);
        if(list!=null&&list.size()>0){
            System.out.println("开始重新插入课表开始-----------------");
            int i = 0;
            for(JSONObject json:list){
                SchoolCourse sc = schoolCourseMapper.selectCourseByCourseNo(json.getStr("kkh"));
                if(sc==null){
                    sc = new SchoolCourse();
                    sc.setCourseNo(json.getStr("kkh"));
                    sc.setDelFlag(0L);
                }
                sc.setCourseName(json.getStr("kcmc"));
                sc.setStuWorkNum(json.getStr("gh"));
                sc.setStuWorkName(json.getStr("xm"));
                sc.setPeopleNum(json.getLong("rs"));
                sc.setClassroomDistribution(json.getStr("bj_s"));
                if(sc.getCourseId()!=null){
                    schoolCourseMapper.updateSchoolCourse(sc);
                }else{
                    schoolCourseMapper.insertSchoolCourse(sc);
                }
                System.out.println("第"+(i+1)+"条记录插入==================");
                i++;
            }
            System.out.println("开始重新插入课表结束-----------------");
        }
    }
    @Override
    public void syncCourseForJlgs(List<SchoolCourseSync> syncList) {
        List<SchoolCourse> schoolCourseList = new ArrayList<>();
        syncList.forEach(it -> {
            SchoolCourse schoolCourse = new SchoolCourse();
            schoolCourse.setCourseId(it.getId());
            schoolCourse.setCourseNo(it.getCourseNo() + it.getJxbid());
            schoolCourse.setOriginCourseNo(it.getCourseNo());
            schoolCourse.setCourseName(it.getCourseName());
            schoolCourse.setStuWorkNum(it.getStuWorkNum());
            schoolCourse.setStuWorkName(it.getStuWorkName());
            schoolCourse.setPeopleNum(Long.valueOf(it.getPeopleNum()));
            schoolCourse.setCreateBy("系统同步");
            schoolCourse.setUpdateTime(it.getUpdateTime());
            schoolCourse.setJxbid(it.getJxbid());
            schoolCourse.setJxbmc(it.getJxbmc());
            schoolCourse.setJxbzc(it.getJxbzc());
            schoolCourseList.add(schoolCourse);
        });
        //分批插入
        int batchSize = 1000;
        for (int i = 0; i < schoolCourseList.size(); i += batchSize) {
            int end = Math.min(i + batchSize, schoolCourseList.size());
            List<SchoolCourse> subList = schoolCourseList.subList(i, end);
            schoolCourseMapper.syncBatchInsertOrUpdate(subList);
        }
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.service.impl;
import com.baomidou.dynamic.datasource.annotation.DS;
import com.chenrise.common.redis.service.RedisService;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.SchedulingSetting;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.SchoolCourseSync;
import com.chenrise.jufe.mapper.SchoolCourseSyncMapper;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.ISchoolCourseSyncService;
import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
import java.util.List;
import static com.chenrise.common.core.constant.CacheConstants.SCHEDULING_CONFIG_KEY;
@Slf4j
@RequiredArgsConstructor
@DS("courseSchedule")
@Service
public class SchoolCourseSyncServiceImpl implements ISchoolCourseSyncService {
    private final SchoolCourseSyncMapper schoolCourseSyncMapper;
    private final RedisService redisService;
    @Override
    public List<SchoolCourseSync> semesterListByRoomCode(List<String> romeCodeList) {
        SchedulingSetting schedulingSetting = redisService.getCacheObject(SCHEDULING_CONFIG_KEY);
        if (schedulingSetting == null) {
            log.error("课表设置未配置，请检查redis key:{}", SCHEDULING_CONFIG_KEY);
            throw new RuntimeException("请先配置课表设置");
        }
        log.info("同步课程，教学周第一天：{}，学年：{},学期类型：{}", schedulingSetting.getSchoolWeekStartDay(), schedulingSetting.getSchoolYear(), schedulingSetting.getSemesterType());
        return schoolCourseSyncMapper.selectSemesterListByRoomCodes(romeCodeList, schedulingSetting.getSemesterType(), schedulingSetting.getSchoolYear());
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.service.impl;
