/**
 * 楼栋Service业务层处理
 *
 * @author chenfang
 * @date 2022-11-21
 */
@Service
public class SchoolLocationServiceImpl implements ISchoolLocationService {
    @Autowired
    private SchoolLocationMapper schoolLocationMapper;
    @Autowired
    private DevClassBoardMapper devClassBoardMapper;
    @Autowired
    private SchoolRoomMapper roomMapper;
    @Value("${cjdx.apis[1].urls[0].url}")
    private String sys_lq;
    @Value("${cjdx.apis[1].apiKey}")
    private String sys_api_Key;
    /**
     * @Description: 查询楼栋
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-11-23 17:36:57
     * @param locationId: 楼栋主键
     * @return: com.chenrise.jufe.domain.SchoolLocation
     */
    @Override
    public SchoolLocation selectSchoolLocationByLocationId(Long locationId) {
        SchoolLocation location = schoolLocationMapper.selectSchoolLocationByLocationId(locationId);
        if(null != location){
            Map<String,String> map = schoolLocationMapper.selectUsernameByLocationId(location.getLocationId());
            if (map != null){
                location.setPrincipal(Arrays.stream(map.get("ids").split(",")).map(s -> Long.parseLong(s.trim())).collect(Collectors.toList()).toArray(new Long[]{}));
                location.setUserName(map.get("names"));
            }
        }
        return location;
    }
    @Override
    public SchoolLocation selectSchoolLocationByLocationName(String locationName) {
        return schoolLocationMapper.selectSchoolLocationByLocationName(locationName);
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 查询楼栋列表
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-11-23 17:37:14
     * @param schoolLocation: 楼栋实体类
     * @return: java.util.List<com.chenrise.jufe.domain.SchoolLocation>
     */
    @Override
    public List<SchoolLocation> selectSchoolLocationList(SchoolLocation schoolLocation) {
        return schoolLocationMapper.selectSchoolLocationList(schoolLocation);
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 新增楼栋
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-11-23 17:37:47
     * @param schoolLocation: 楼栋实体类
     * @return: int
     */
    @Override
    public int insertSchoolLocation(SchoolLocation schoolLocation) {
        schoolLocation.setLocaltionNum(schoolLocationMapper.selectLocaltionNumMax());
        int i = schoolLocationMapper.insertSchoolLocation(schoolLocation);
//        SchoolLocation location = schoolLocationMapper.selectSchoolLocationByLocationId(schoolLocation.getParentId());
//        schoolLocation.setParentName(location.getLocationName());
//        schoolLocationMapper.updateSchoolLocation(schoolLocation);
        //负责人
        if (schoolLocation.getPrincipal() != null && schoolLocation.getPrincipal().length >0){
            for (Long principal:schoolLocation.getPrincipal()
            ) {
                SchoolLocationChargeRef schoolLocationChargeRef = new SchoolLocationChargeRef();
                schoolLocationChargeRef.setChargeUserId(principal);
                schoolLocationChargeRef.setLocationId(schoolLocation.getLocationId());
                schoolLocationMapper.insertSchoolLocationChargeRef(schoolLocationChargeRef);
            }
        }
        return i;
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 修改楼栋
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-11-23 17:38:02
     * @param schoolLocation: 楼栋实体类
     * @return: int
     */
    @Override
    public int updateSchoolLocation(SchoolLocation schoolLocation) {
        //删除负责人房间关联
        Map<String, String> stringStringMap = schoolLocationMapper.selectUsernameByLocationId(schoolLocation.getLocationId());
        if(stringStringMap != null){
            schoolLocationMapper.deleteLocationChargeRefByLocationId(schoolLocation.getLocationId());
        }
        //负责人
        if (schoolLocation.getPrincipal() != null && schoolLocation.getPrincipal().length >0){
            for (Long principal:schoolLocation.getPrincipal()
            ) {
                SchoolLocationChargeRef schoolLocationChargeRef = new SchoolLocationChargeRef();
                schoolLocationChargeRef.setChargeUserId(principal);
                schoolLocationChargeRef.setLocationId(schoolLocation.getLocationId());
                schoolLocationMapper.insertSchoolLocationChargeRef(schoolLocationChargeRef);
            }
        }
        return schoolLocationMapper.updateSchoolLocation(schoolLocation);
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 批量修改楼栋负责人
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-11-23 17:38:02
     * @param schoolLocation: 楼栋实体类
     * @return: int
     */
    @Override
    public int updateSchoolLocationPrincipal(SchoolLocation schoolLocation) {
        //删除负责人房间关联
        Long[] ids = schoolLocation.getIds();
        for (Long id : ids) {
            schoolLocationMapper.deleteLocationChargeRefByLocationId(id);
            //负责人
            if (schoolLocation.getPrincipal() != null && schoolLocation.getPrincipal().length >0){
                for (Long principal:schoolLocation.getPrincipal()
                ) {
                    SchoolLocationChargeRef schoolLocationChargeRef = new SchoolLocationChargeRef();
                    schoolLocationChargeRef.setChargeUserId(principal);
                    schoolLocationChargeRef.setLocationId(id);
                    schoolLocationMapper.insertSchoolLocationChargeRef(schoolLocationChargeRef);
                }
            }
        }
        return 1;
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 批量删除楼栋
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-11-23 17:38:19
     * @param locationIds: 需要删除的楼栋主键
     * @return: int
     */
    @Override
    public int deleteSchoolLocationByLocationIds(Long[] locationIds) {
        return schoolLocationMapper.deleteSchoolLocationByLocationIds(locationIds);
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 删除楼栋信息
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-11-23 17:38:34
     * @param locationId: 删除楼栋信息
     * @return: int
     */
    @Override
    public int deleteSchoolLocationByLocationId(Long locationId) {
        return schoolLocationMapper.deleteSchoolLocationByLocationId(locationId);
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 查询楼栋管理数据
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-11-23 17:38:49
     * @param schoolLocation: 楼栋实体类
     * @return: java.util.List<com.chenrise.jufe.domain.SchoolLocation>
     */
    @Override
    @DataScope(deptAlias = "d")
    public List<SchoolLocation> selectLocationList(SchoolLocation schoolLocation) {
        return schoolLocationMapper.selectLocationList(schoolLocation);
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 查询楼栋树结构信息
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-11-23 17:20:34
     * @param schoolLocation: 楼栋实体类
     * @return: java.util.List<com.chenrise.jufe.domain.vo.SchoolLocationTreeSelect>
     */
    @Override
    public List<SchoolLocationTreeSelect> selectLocationTreeList(SchoolLocation schoolLocation) {
        List<SchoolLocation> schoolLocations = SpringUtils.getAopProxy(this).selectLocationList(schoolLocation);
        return buildLocationTreeSelect(schoolLocations);
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 构建前端所需要下拉树结构
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-11-23 17:39:40
     * @param schoolLocations: 楼栋实体类
     * @return: java.util.List<com.chenrise.jufe.domain.vo.SchoolLocationTreeSelect>
     */
    @Override
    public List<SchoolLocationTreeSelect> buildLocationTreeSelect(List<SchoolLocation> schoolLocations) {
        List<SchoolLocation> locationTrees = buildLocationTree(schoolLocations);
        return locationTrees.stream().map(SchoolLocationTreeSelect::new).collect(Collectors.toList());
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 构建前端所需要树结构
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-11-23 17:39:57
     * @param schoolLocations: 楼栋实体类列表
     * @return: java.util.List<com.chenrise.jufe.domain.SchoolLocation>
     */
    @Override
    public List<SchoolLocation> buildLocationTree(List<SchoolLocation> schoolLocations) {
        List<SchoolLocation> returnList = new ArrayList<SchoolLocation>();
        List<Long> tempList = new ArrayList<Long>();
        for (SchoolLocation schoolLocation : schoolLocations) {
            tempList.add(schoolLocation.getLocationId());
        }
        for (SchoolLocation schoolLocation : schoolLocations) {
            // 如果是顶级节点, 遍历该父节点的所有子节点
            if (!tempList.contains(schoolLocation.getParentId())) {
                recursionFn(schoolLocations, schoolLocation);
                returnList.add(schoolLocation);
            }
        }
        if (returnList.isEmpty()) {
            returnList = schoolLocations;
        }
        return returnList;
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 校验楼栋名称是否唯一
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-11-23 17:21:59
     * @param schoolLocation: 楼栋实体类
     * @return: java.lang.String
     */
    @Override
    public String checklocationNameUnique(SchoolLocation schoolLocation) {
        Long locationId = StringUtils.isNull(schoolLocation.getLocationId()) ? -1L : schoolLocation.getLocationId();
        SchoolLocation info = schoolLocationMapper.checkLocationNameUnique(schoolLocation);
        if (StringUtils.isNotNull(info) && info.getLocationId().longValue() != locationId.longValue()) {
            return UserConstants.NOT_UNIQUE;
        }
        return UserConstants.UNIQUE;
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 是否存在楼栋子节点
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-11-23 17:22:38
     * @param locationId: 楼栋id
     * @return: boolean
     */
    @Override
    public boolean hasChildByLocationId(Long locationId) {
        int result = schoolLocationMapper.hasChildByLocationId(locationId);
        return result > 0;
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 递归列表
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-11-23 17:40:50
     * @param list: 楼栋实体类列表
     * @param t: 楼栋实体类
     * @return: void
     */
    private void recursionFn(List<SchoolLocation> list, SchoolLocation t) {
        // 得到子节点列表
        List<SchoolLocation> childList = getChildList(list, t);
        t.setChildren(childList);
        for (SchoolLocation tChild : childList) {
            if (hasChild(list, tChild)) {
                recursionFn(list, tChild);
            }
        }
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 得到子节点列表
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-11-23 17:41:28
     * @param list: 楼栋实体类列表
     * @param t: 楼栋实体类
     * @return: java.util.List<com.chenrise.jufe.domain.SchoolLocation>
     */
    private List<SchoolLocation> getChildList(List<SchoolLocation> list, SchoolLocation t) {
        List<SchoolLocation> tlist = new ArrayList<SchoolLocation>();
        Iterator<SchoolLocation> it = list.iterator();
        while (it.hasNext()) {
            SchoolLocation n = (SchoolLocation) it.next();
            if (StringUtils.isNotNull(n.getParentId()) && n.getParentId().longValue() == t.getLocationId().longValue()) {
                tlist.add(n);
            }
        }
        // 排序
        tlist.sort(Comparator.comparing(SchoolLocation::getLocaltionNum));
        return tlist;
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 判断是否有子节点
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-11-23 17:41:45
     * @param list: 楼栋实体类列表
     * @param t: 楼栋实体类
     * @return: boolean
     */
    private boolean hasChild(List<SchoolLocation> list, SchoolLocation t) {
        return getChildList(list, t).size() > 0 ? true : false;
    }
    /**
     * 得到所有网关通过id列表
     * @Description: 得到所有网关通过id列表
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-11-23 13:44:26
     * @param id id
     * @return {@link List }<{@link SchoolLocation }>
     */
    @Override
    public List<SchoolLocation> getAllLocationListById(Long id) {
        return schoolLocationMapper.getAllLocationListById(id);
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 获取完整的 location和room树型结构
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022/12/14 10:11:02
     * @param isReservation 是预订
     * @return {@link List }<{@link Map }<{@link String }, {@link Object }>>
     */
    @Override
    public List<Map<String, Object>> tree(String isReservation) {
        List<SchoolLocation> list = schoolLocationMapper.getByParent(0L);
        List<Map<String, Object>> maps = new ArrayList<>();
        for (SchoolLocation s : list) {
            Map<String, Object> result = this.getChildren(s, isReservation);
            maps.add(result);
        }
        return maps;
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 获取完整的 location和room树型结构
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022/12/14 10:11:02
     * @param
     * @return {@link List }<{@link Map }<{@link String }, {@link Object }>>
     */
    @Override
    public List<Map<String, Object>> treeTwo() {
        List<SchoolLocation> list = schoolLocationMapper.getByParent(0L);
        List<Map<String, Object>> maps = new ArrayList<>();
        for (SchoolLocation s : list) {
            Map<String, Object> result = this.getChildren(s);
            maps.add(result);
        }
        return maps;
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 获取并处理子集
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022/12/14 10:10:57
     * @param location
     * @param
     * @return {@link Map }<{@link String }, {@link Object }>
     */
    public Map<String, Object> getChildren(SchoolLocation location) {
        // 重新组装树形结构
        Map<String, Object> treeDto = new HashMap<>();
        treeDto.put("id", location.getLocationId());
        treeDto.put("label", location.getLocationName());
        treeDto.put("type", "location");
        // 查询区域对应单位
        List<Map<String, Object>> childres = new ArrayList<>();
        // 获取子节点
        List<SchoolLocation> children = schoolLocationMapper.getByParent(location.getLocationId());
        // 判断并且循环
        if (children != null && children.size() > 0) {
            for (SchoolLocation sl : children) {
                if(sl.getParentId()!=1L){
                    continue;
                }
                childres.add(this.getChildren(sl));
            }
        }
        if (childres != null && childres.size() > 0) {
            treeDto.put("children", childres);
        }
        return treeDto;
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 获取并处理子集
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022/12/14 10:10:57
     * @param location
     * @param isReservation 是预订
     * @return {@link Map }<{@link String }, {@link Object }>
     */
    public Map<String, Object> getChildren(SchoolLocation location, String isReservation) {
        // 重新组装树形结构
        Map<String, Object> treeDto = new HashMap<>();
        treeDto.put("id", location.getLocationId());
        treeDto.put("label", location.getLocationName());
        treeDto.put("type", "location");
        // 查询区域对应单位
        List<Map<String, Object>> childres = new ArrayList<>();
        // 获取子节点
        List<SchoolLocation> children = schoolLocationMapper.getByParent(location.getLocationId());
        // 判断并且循环
        if (children != null && children.size() > 0) {
            for (SchoolLocation sl : children) {
                childres.add(this.getChildren(sl, isReservation));
            }
        } else {
            SchoolRoom sr = new SchoolRoom();
            sr.setLocationId(location.getLocationId());
            if (StringUtils.isNotNull(isReservation)) {
                sr.setIsReservation(isReservation);
            }
            List<SchoolRoom> rooms = roomMapper.selectSchoolRoomList(sr);
            if (rooms != null && rooms.size() > 0) {
                for (SchoolRoom sr2 : rooms) {
                    Map<String, Object> roomMap = new HashMap<>();
                    roomMap.put("id", sr2.getRoomId());
                    roomMap.put("code", sr2.getRoomCode());
                    roomMap.put("label", sr2.getRoomCode() + "-" + sr2.getRoomName());
                    roomMap.put("type", "room");
//                    roomMap.put("days",sr2.getReservationDaysInfo());
                    roomMap.put("seatNum",sr2.getSeatNum());
                    childres.add(roomMap);
                }
            } else {
                treeDto.put("isDisabled", true);
            }
        }
        if (childres != null && childres.size() > 0) {
            treeDto.put("children", childres);
        }
        return treeDto;
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 获取完整的 location和room树型结构及班牌
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022/12/14 10:10:50
     * @return {@link List }<{@link Map }<{@link String }, {@link Object }>>
     */
    @Override
    public List<Map<String, Object>> treeAndBoard() {
        List<SchoolLocation> list = schoolLocationMapper.getByParent(0L);
        List<Map<String, Object>> maps = new ArrayList<>();
        for (SchoolLocation s : list) {
            Map<String, Object> result = this.getChildrenAndBoard(s);
            maps.add(result);
        }
        return maps;
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 获取并处理子集
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022/12/14 10:10:46
     * @param location
     * @return {@link Map }<{@link String }, {@link Object }>
     */
    public Map<String, Object> getChildrenAndBoard(SchoolLocation location) {
        // 重新组装树形结构
        Map<String, Object> treeDto = new HashMap<>();
        treeDto.put("id", location.getLocationId());
        treeDto.put("label", location.getLocationName());
        treeDto.put("type", "location");
        // 查询区域对应单位
        List<Map<String, Object>> childres = new ArrayList<>();
        // 获取子节点
        List<SchoolLocation> children = schoolLocationMapper.getByParent(location.getLocationId());
        // 判断并且循环
        if (children != null && children.size() > 0) {
            for (SchoolLocation sl : children) {
                childres.add(this.getChildrenAndBoard(sl));
            }
        } else {
            SchoolRoom sr = new SchoolRoom();
            sr.setLocationId(location.getLocationId());
            List<SchoolRoom> rooms = roomMapper.selectSchoolRoomList(sr);
            if (rooms != null && rooms.size() > 0) {
                for (SchoolRoom sr2 : rooms) {
                    Map<String, Object> roomMap = new HashMap<>();
                    roomMap.put("id", sr2.getRoomId());
                    roomMap.put("label", sr2.getRoomName());
                    roomMap.put("type", "room");
                    childres.add(roomMap);
                    DevClassBoard query = new DevClassBoard();
                    query.setRoomId(sr2.getRoomId());
                    List<DevClassBoard> devClassBoards = devClassBoardMapper.selectDevClassBoardList(query);
                    if (null == devClassBoards || devClassBoards.size()==0) {
                        roomMap.put("disabled", true);
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        if (childres != null && childres.size() > 0) {
            treeDto.put("children", childres);
        }
        return treeDto;
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 获取完整的位置名称 父级--》子集
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/13
     * @param schoolLocation
     * @return {@link String }
     */
    @Override
    public String fullName(SchoolLocation schoolLocation) {
        String name = schoolLocation.getLocationName();
        SchoolLocation parent = schoolLocationMapper.selectSchoolLocationByLocationId(schoolLocation.getParentId());
        if(parent!=null&&parent.getParentId()!=0L){
            name = this.fullName(parent)+"-"+name;
        }
        return name;
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 是否存在room子节点
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-11-23 17:22:38
     * @param locationId: 楼栋id
     * @return: boolean
     */
    @Override
    public boolean hasChildByRoomId(Long locationId) {
        int result = schoolLocationMapper.hasChildByRoomId(locationId);
        return result > 0;
    }
    @Override
    public Long getLocationFloor(String locationName,Long locationFloor) {
        SchoolLocation schoolLocation = new SchoolLocation();
        if(StringUtils.isEmpty(locationName)){
            return -1L;
        }
        //查下楼栋名称
        SchoolLocation location = schoolLocationMapper.selectSchoolLocationByLocationName(locationName);
        if(location == null){
            schoolLocation.setLocationName(locationName);
            schoolLocation.setDataSources("1");
            schoolLocation.setParentId(1L);
            schoolLocation.setLocaltionNum(schoolLocationMapper.selectLocaltionNumMax());
            schoolLocation.setCreateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
            schoolLocation.setAncestors("0" + "," + schoolLocation.getParentId().toString());
            schoolLocation.setCreateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
            schoolLocationMapper.insertSchoolLocation(schoolLocation);
            SchoolLocation insertThreeLever = new SchoolLocation();
            insertThreeLever.setLocationName(locationName + "-" +locationFloor + "楼");
            insertThreeLever.setLocationFloor(locationFloor);
            insertThreeLever.setParentId(schoolLocation.getLocationId());
            insertThreeLever.setDataSources("1");
            insertThreeLever.setLocaltionNum(schoolLocationMapper.selectLocaltionNumMax());
            insertThreeLever.setAncestors(schoolLocation.getAncestors() +  "," + schoolLocation.getLocationId());
            schoolLocationMapper.insertSchoolLocation(insertThreeLever);
            return insertThreeLever.getLocationId();
        }else {
            SchoolLocation floorLocation = schoolLocationMapper.selectSchoolLocationByLocationName(location.getLocationName() + "-" + locationFloor + "楼");
            if(1L == location.getParentId() && floorLocation == null){
                schoolLocation.setLocationName(locationName + "-" +locationFloor + "楼");
                schoolLocation.setLocationFloor(locationFloor);
                schoolLocation.setParentId(location.getLocationId());
                schoolLocation.setDataSources("1");
                schoolLocation.setCreateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
                schoolLocation.setLocaltionNum(schoolLocationMapper.selectLocaltionNumMax());
                schoolLocationMapper.insertSchoolLocation(schoolLocation);
                SchoolLocation location1 = selectSchoolLocationByLocationName(schoolLocation.getLocationName());
                schoolLocation.setAncestors(location.getAncestors() + "," + location1.getLocationId());
                schoolLocationMapper.updateSchoolLocation(schoolLocation);
                return location1.getLocationId();
            }else if(floorLocation != null && floorLocation.getLocationFloor() == locationFloor){
                return floorLocation.getLocationId();
            }else{
                return -1L;
            }
        }
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 获取学校楼栋数据-调用财大api
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2023-01-06 10:11:56
     */
    public int jufeApiGetSysLq() throws IOException {
        JSONObject object = new JSONObject();
        String res = HttpRequest.post(sys_lq)
                .header("Authorization-Type","Apikey")
                .header("Authorization",this.sys_api_Key)
                .header("Content-Type","application/x-www-form-urlencoded")
                .body(String.valueOf(object))
                .execute().body();
        Map<String, Map<String,Object>> result = JSONUtil.toBean(res, Map.class);
        List<JSONObject> list = JSONUtil.toList(result.get("data").get("list").toString(), JSONObject.class);
        if(list!=null&&list.size()>0){
            for (JSONObject jsonObject : list) {
                SchoolLocation location = new SchoolLocation();
                String lq = jsonObject.getString("lq");
                SchoolLocation location1 = schoolLocationMapper.selectSchoolLocationByLocationName(lq);
                if(location1 == null && StringUtils.isNotEmpty(lq)){
                    location.setLocationName(lq);
                    location.setDataSources("1");
                    location.setParentId(1L);
                    location.setCreateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
                    location.setAncestors("0" + "," +location.getParentId());
                    insertSchoolLocation(location);
                }
            }
        }
        return 1;
    }
    @Override
    public List<SchoolLocation> getByRoom(Long locationId) {
        return schoolLocationMapper.getByRoom(locationId);
    }
}

/**
 * 会议信息Service业务层处理
 * 
 * @author zzy
 * @date 2025-05-06
 */
@Service
public class SchoolMeetingInfoServiceImpl implements ISchoolMeetingInfoService
{
    @Resource
    private SchoolMeetingInfoMapper schoolMeetingInfoMapper;
    @Resource
    private ISchoolMeetingItemService schoolMeetingItemService;
    @Resource
    private SchoolTeaInfoMapper schoolTeaInfoMapper;
    @Autowired
    private RemoteUserService remoteUserService;
    @Autowired
    private ISchoolLocationService schoolLocationService;
    @Resource
    private DevClassBoardMapper devClassBoardMapper;
    @Resource
    private ISchoolRoomService schoolRoomService;
    /**
     * 查询会议信息
     *
     * @param id 会议信息主键
     * @return 会议信息
     */
    @Override
    public Map<String, Object> selectSchoolMeetingInfoById(Long id)
    {
        // 获取会议信息
        SchoolMeetingInfo schoolMeetingInfo = schoolMeetingInfoMapper.selectSchoolMeetingInfoById(id);
        Map<String, Object> map = BeanUtil.beanToMap(schoolMeetingInfo);
        // 获取会议项列表
        SchoolMeetingItem schoolMeetingItem = new SchoolMeetingItem();
        schoolMeetingItem.setMeetingId(id);
        // 获取参会人员名单
        List<SchoolMeetingItem> schoolMeetingItems = schoolMeetingItemService.selectSchoolMeetingItemList(schoolMeetingItem);
        // 提取所有教师用户ID
        List<String> ids = schoolMeetingItems.stream().map(SchoolMeetingItem::getTeaUserId).collect(Collectors.toList());
        // 获取参会人员用户信息
        List<SysUser> userInfos = new ArrayList<>();
        ids.forEach(item->{
            userInfos.add(remoteUserService.getUserInfo(Objects.toString(item), SecurityConstants.INNER).getData().getSysUser());
        });
        // 将SysUsers对象列表转换为Map列表
        List<Map<String, Object>> userData = userInfos.stream()
                                                      .map(BeanUtil::beanToMap)
                                                      .collect(Collectors.toList());
        // 创建一个映射，以便快速查找用户数据
        Map<String, Map<String, Object>> userIdToDataMap = new HashMap<>();
        for (Map<String, Object> userDatum : userData) {
            String userId =  Objects.toString(userDatum.get("userName"));
            userIdToDataMap.put(userId, userDatum);
        }
        List<Map<String,Object>> resultMap = new ArrayList<>() ;
        // 遍历schoolMeetingItems并将signInStatus和signInTime添加到对应的userData中
        for (SchoolMeetingItem item : schoolMeetingItems) {
            String teaUserId = item.getTeaUserId();
            if (userIdToDataMap.containsKey(teaUserId)) {
                Map<String, Object> userDatum = userIdToDataMap.get(teaUserId);
                userDatum.put("signInStatus", item.getState());
                userDatum.put("signInTime", item.getSignin());
                resultMap.add(userDatum);
            }
        }
        // 将更新后的userData放回map中
        map.put("userData", resultMap);
        try {
            R<LoginUser> userInfo = remoteUserService.getUserInfo(Objects.toString(map.get("initiator")), SecurityConstants.INNER);
            Map<String, Object> userMap = BeanUtil.beanToMap(userInfo.getData().getSysUser());
            SysUser sysUser = BeanUtil.mapToBean(userMap, SysUser.class, false);
            map.put("initiator", sysUser);
        }catch (Exception e){
            e.printStackTrace();
        }
        return map;
    }
    /**
     * 获取详情参会人员信息
     */
    @Override
    public Page<Map<String, Object>> selectSchoolMeetingitemsById(Long meetingId){
        SchoolMeetingItem schoolMeetingItem = new SchoolMeetingItem();
        schoolMeetingItem.setMeetingId(meetingId);
        Page<SchoolMeetingItem> schoolMeetingItems = schoolMeetingItemService.selectSchoolMeetingItemList(schoolMeetingItem);
        // 提取所有教师用户ID
        List<String> ids = schoolMeetingItems.stream().map(SchoolMeetingItem::getTeaUserId).collect(Collectors.toList());
        // 获取用户信息
        R<List<SysUser>> userInfos = remoteUserService.getUserInfos(ids, SecurityConstants.INNER);
        // 获取用户数据（List<SysUser>）
        List<SysUser> userList = userInfos.getData();
        // 转换为 List<Map<String, Object>>
        List<Map<String, Object>> mapList = userList.stream()
                                                    .map(user -> BeanUtil.beanToMap(user))
                                                    .collect(Collectors.toList());
        Page<Map<String, Object>> userData = new Page<>();
        userData.addAll(mapList);
        userData.setPageSize(schoolMeetingItems.getPageSize());
        userData.setPageNum(schoolMeetingItems.getPageNum());
        userData.setTotal(schoolMeetingItems.getTotal());
        userData.setPages(schoolMeetingItems.getPages());
        userData.setCount(schoolMeetingItems.isCount());
        // 创建一个映射，以便快速查找用户数据
        Map<String, Map<String, Object>> userIdToDataMap = new HashMap<>();
        for (Map<String, Object> userDatum : userData) {
            String userId =  Objects.toString(userDatum.get("userId")); // 假设userId是Long类型
            userIdToDataMap.put(userId, userDatum);
        }
        // 遍历schoolMeetingItems并将signInStatus和signInTime添加到对应的userData中
        for (SchoolMeetingItem item : schoolMeetingItems) {
            String teaUserId = item.getTeaUserId();
            if (userIdToDataMap.containsKey(teaUserId)) {
                Map<String, Object> userDatum = userIdToDataMap.get(teaUserId);
                userDatum.put("signInStatus", item.getState());
                userDatum.put("signInTime", item.getSignin());
            }
        }
        userData.setTotal(schoolMeetingItems.getTotal());
        userData.setPages(schoolMeetingItems.getPages());
        userData.setPageNum(schoolMeetingItems.getPageNum());
        return userData;
    };
    /**
     * 查询会议信息列表
     * 
     * @param schoolMeetingInfo 会议信息
     * @return 会议信息
     */
    @Override
    public List<SchoolMeetingInfo> selectSchoolMeetingInfoList(SchoolMeetingInfo schoolMeetingInfo)
    {
        List<SchoolMeetingInfo> schoolMeetingInfos = schoolMeetingInfoMapper.selectSchoolMeetingInfoList(schoolMeetingInfo);
        if (schoolMeetingInfos.size() == 0){
            return schoolMeetingInfos;
        }
//        List<Long> userIds = schoolMeetingInfos.stream().map(item->Long.parseLong(item.getInitiator())).collect(Collectors.toList());
//        List<SysUser> data = remoteUserService.getUserInfos(userIds, SecurityConstants.INNER).getData();
//        schoolMeetingInfos.forEach(MeetingInfo -> {
//            for (SysUser user : data) {
//                if (Long.parseLong(schoolMeetingInfo.getInitiator())==(user.getUserId())) {
//                    schoolMeetingInfo.setInitiator(user.getNickName().isEmpty()?user.getUserName():user.getNickName());
//                }
//            }
//        });
        return schoolMeetingInfos;
    }
    /**
     * 新增会议信息
     * 
     * @param map<String, Object> map 会议信息
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Transactional
    @Override
    public AjaxResult insertSchoolMeetingInfo(Map<String, Object> map)
    {
        try {
            map.put("state", "0");
            System.out.println("...-----...."+map);
            R<LoginUser> resp = remoteUserService.getUserInfo(Objects.toString(map.get("initiator")), SecurityConstants.INNER);
            if (resp.getCode()!=200||resp.getData()==null){
                AjaxResult.error("获取用户信息失败,请刷新页面重试");
            }
            LoginUser userInfo = resp.getData();
            map.put("initiator", userInfo.getSysUser().getUserName());
            Date meetDay =  DateUtils.parseDate(map.get("meetDay").toString(), DateUtils.YYYY_MM_DD);
            if (DateUtils.truncate(new Date(), Calendar.DAY_OF_MONTH).after(meetDay)){
                return AjaxResult.error("会议日期不能早于当前日期");
            }
            Date startTime;
            Date endTime;
           try {
               startTime = DateUtils.parseDate(map.get("meetDay") + " " +map.get("startTime"), DateUtils.YYYY_MM_DD_HH_MM);
               endTime = DateUtils.parseDate(map.get("meetDay") + " " +map.get("endTime"), DateUtils.YYYY_MM_DD_HH_MM);
           }catch (Exception e){
               ZoneId zone = ZoneId.of("Asia/Shanghai");
               LocalDate meetLocalDate = LocalDate.parse(Objects.toString(map.get("meetDay")));
               ZonedDateTime startTimeZoned = ZonedDateTime.parse(Objects.toString(map.get("startTime"))); // 原始带时区时间
               ZonedDateTime endTimeZoned = ZonedDateTime.parse(Objects.toString(map.get("endTime")));
               ZonedDateTime startTimeInZone = startTimeZoned.withZoneSameInstant(zone);
               ZonedDateTime endTimeInZone = endTimeZoned.withZoneSameInstant(zone);
               ZonedDateTime newStartTimeInZone = startTimeInZone.toLocalTime().atDate(meetLocalDate).atZone(zone);
               ZonedDateTime newEndTimeInZone = endTimeInZone.toLocalTime().atDate(meetLocalDate).atZone(zone);
               startTime = Date.from(newStartTimeInZone.toInstant());
               endTime = Date.from(newEndTimeInZone.toInstant());
           }
            if (new Date().after(endTime)){
                return AjaxResult.error("会议结束时间不能早于当前时间");
            }
            map.put("startTime", startTime);
            map.put("endTime",  endTime);
            SchoolMeetingInfo schoolMeetingInfo = BeanUtil.toBean(map, SchoolMeetingInfo.class);
            System.err.println("sssssssssssssssss"+schoolMeetingInfo);
            if (checkMeeting(schoolMeetingInfo)){
                return AjaxResult.error("该时间段,房间已有会议");
            }
            schoolMeetingInfoMapper.insertSchoolMeetingInfo(schoolMeetingInfo);
            //先增主表,再增关联信息表
            Object userDataObj = map.remove("userData");
            List<SchoolMeetingItem> schoolMeetingItems = new ArrayList<>();
            if (userDataObj == null) {
                throw new IllegalArgumentException("参数 'userData' 不能为空");
            }
            if (userDataObj instanceof List<?>) {
                for (Object obj : (List<?>) userDataObj) {
                    if (obj instanceof Map) {
                        SysUser sysUser = BeanUtil.mapToBean((Map<String, Object>) obj, SysUser.class, false);
                        schoolMeetingItems.add(new SchoolMeetingItem()
                                .setMeetingId(schoolMeetingInfo.getId())
                                .setTeaUserId(sysUser.getUserName())
                                .setState("0"));
                    }
                }
            } else if (userDataObj instanceof String) {
                // 如果是字符串，尝试用 FastJSON 解析
                JSON.parseArray((String) userDataObj, SchoolMeetingItem.class);
            } else {
                throw new IllegalArgumentException("不支持的 userData 类型：" + userDataObj.getClass());
            }
            schoolMeetingItemService.insertSchoolMeetingItems(schoolMeetingItems);
            return AjaxResult.success("true");
        }  catch (Exception e) {
            e.printStackTrace();
            return AjaxResult.error("操作失败:"+e.getMessage());
        }
    }
    /**
     * 修改会议信息
     *
     * @param map<String, Object> map 会议信息
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    @Transactional(rollbackFor = Exception.class)
    public AjaxResult updateSchoolMeetingInfo(Map<String, Object> map)
    {
        Date startTime = null;
        Date endTime = null;
        try {
            String meetDay = Objects.toString(map.get("meetDay"));
            startTime = DateUtils.parseDate(meetDay + " " +map.get("startTime").toString(), DateUtils.YYYY_MM_DD_HH_MM);
            endTime = DateUtils.parseDate(meetDay + " " +map.get("endTime").toString(), DateUtils.YYYY_MM_DD_HH_MM);
//            startTime = combineDateAndTime(map.get("meetDay").toString());
//            endTime = combineDateAndTime(meetDay,Objects.toString(map.get("endTime")));
        } catch (Exception e) {
            e.printStackTrace();
        }
        try {
            ZonedDateTime now = ZonedDateTime.now();
            ZonedDateTime combinedZoned = endTime.toInstant().atZone(ZoneId.systemDefault());
            if (combinedZoned.isBefore(now)){
                return AjaxResult.error("结束时间不能早于当前时间,请修改会议时间");
            }
        }catch (Exception e){
            return AjaxResult.error("请检查时间输入是否完整"+e);
        }
        map.put("startTime", startTime);
        map.put("endTime",  endTime);
        String initiator = Objects.toString(map.get("initiator"));
        SysUser sysUser = new SysUser();
        if (initiator != null) {
            sysUser.setUserName(initiator);
        }
        TableDataInfo resp = remoteUserService.getItems(sysUser);
        if (resp.getCode()!=200||resp.getRows()==null){
            return AjaxResult.error("code:"+resp.getCode()+"获取用户信息失败,请刷新页面重试:"+resp.getMsg());
        }else{
            Map<String, Object> userInfo = BeanUtil.beanToMap(resp.getRows().get(0));
            map.put("initiator", userInfo.get("userName"));
        }
        SchoolMeetingInfo schoolMeetingInfo = BeanUtil.toBean(map, SchoolMeetingInfo.class);
        if (checkMeeting(schoolMeetingInfo)){
            AjaxResult.error("该时间段该房间已被占用");
        }
        //先删除会议关联参会人员信息表
        int i = schoolMeetingItemService.deleteSchoolMeetingItemById(schoolMeetingInfo.getId());
        Object userDataObj = map.remove("userData");
        List<SchoolMeetingItem> schoolMeetingItems = new ArrayList<>();
        if (userDataObj == null) {
            return AjaxResult.error("参数 'userData' 不能为空");
        }
        if (userDataObj instanceof List<?>) {
            for (Object obj : (List<?>) userDataObj) {
                if (obj instanceof Map) {
                    SysUser user = BeanUtil.mapToBean((Map<String, Object>) obj, SysUser.class, false);
                    schoolMeetingItems.add(new SchoolMeetingItem()
                            .setMeetingId(schoolMeetingInfo.getId())
                            .setTeaUserId(user.getUserName())
                            .setState("0"));
                }
            }
        } else if (userDataObj instanceof String) {
            // 如果是字符串，尝试用 FastJSON 解析
            schoolMeetingItems = JSON.parseArray((String) userDataObj, SchoolMeetingItem.class);
        } else {
            return AjaxResult.error("不支持的 userData 类型：" + userDataObj.getClass());
        }
        //先增关联信息表
        schoolMeetingItemService.insertSchoolMeetingItems(schoolMeetingItems);
        schoolMeetingInfoMapper.updateSchoolMeetingInfo(schoolMeetingInfo);
        return AjaxResult.success();
    }
    @Override
    public Integer editDetails(Map<String, Object> map) {
        SchoolMeetingInfo schoolMeetingInfo = new SchoolMeetingInfo()
                .setDetails(Objects.toString(map.get("details")))
                .setName(Objects.toString(map.get("name")))
                .setId(Long.parseLong(Objects.toString(map.get("id"))));
        return schoolMeetingInfoMapper.updateSchoolMeetingInfo(schoolMeetingInfo);
    }
    /**
 * 处理前端时间拼接
 * */
    public static Date combineDateAndTime(String dateStr) {
        DateTimeFormatter formatter = DateTimeFormatter.ISO_DATE_TIME;
        LocalDateTime date = LocalDateTime.parse(dateStr, formatter);
        return Date.from(date.atZone(ZoneId.systemDefault()).toInstant());
    }
    /**
     * 批量删除会议信息
     * 
     * @param ids 需要删除的会议信息主键
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Transactional
    @Override
    public int deleteSchoolMeetingInfoByIds(Long[] ids)
    {
        try {
            schoolMeetingItemService.deleteSchoolMeetingItemByIds(ids);
            schoolMeetingInfoMapper.deleteSchoolMeetingInfoByIds(ids);
            return 1;
        }catch (Exception e){
            e.printStackTrace();
        }
        return 0;
    }
    /**
     * 删除会议信息信息
     * 
     * @param id 会议信息主键
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Transactional
    @Override
    public int deleteSchoolMeetingInfoById(Long id)
    {
        try {
            schoolMeetingItemService.deleteSchoolMeetingItemById(id);
            schoolMeetingInfoMapper.deleteSchoolMeetingInfoById(id);
            return 1;
        }catch (Exception e){
            e.printStackTrace();
        }
        return 0;
    }
    /**
     * 查询会议人员列表
     *
     * */
    public TableDataInfo getItems(Map<String, Object> map){
        PageDomain pageDomain = TableSupport.buildPageRequest();
        Integer pageNum = pageDomain.getPageNum();
        Integer pageSize = pageDomain.getPageSize();
        SysUser sysUser = new SysUser();
        sysUser.setUserType("01");
        if(map.get("nickName")!=null){
            sysUser.setNickName(Objects.toString(map.get("nickName")));
        }
        if(map.get("userName")!=null){
            sysUser.setUserName(Objects.toString(map.get("userName")));
        }
        if (map.get("teaUserNum") != null) {
            sysUser.setUserName(Objects.toString(map.get("teaUserNum")));
        }
        if (map.get("deptId")!=null){
            sysUser.setDeptId(Long.parseLong(Objects.toString(map.get("deptId"))));
        }
        sysUser.setPageNum(pageNum);
        sysUser.setPageSize(pageSize);
        TableDataInfo items = remoteUserService.getItems(sysUser);
        List<SysUser> sysUsers = BeanUtil.copyToList(items.getRows(), SysUser.class);
        List<SysUser> updatedList = sysUsers.stream()
                                            .map(user -> {
                                                if (user.getDept() != null) {
                                                    user.setDeptName(user.getDept().getDeptName());
                                                }
                                                return user;
                                            })
                                            .collect(Collectors.toList());
        items.setRows(updatedList);
        return items;
    }
    /**
     * 会议发布/撤销
     * */
    @Override
    @Transactional
    public Integer publishMeeting(Long meetingId, String state, String startTime) {
        // 1. 根据 meetingId 获取会议信息
        SchoolMeetingInfo meetingInfo = schoolMeetingInfoMapper.selectSchoolMeetingInfoById(meetingId);
        if (meetingInfo == null) {
            throw new IllegalArgumentException("会议不存在");
        }
        // 2. 获取会议结束时间（endTime）
        LocalDateTime endTime = meetingInfo.getEndTime().toInstant()
                                           .atZone(ZoneId.systemDefault())
                                           .toLocalDateTime();
        if (endTime == null) {
            throw new IllegalArgumentException("会议结束时间未设置");
        }
        // 3. 获取当前时间
        LocalDateTime now = LocalDateTime.now();
        // 4. 如果会议已过期，直接返回，不更新状态
        if (endTime.isBefore(now)&& state.equals("1")) {
            // 可选：记录日志或抛出自定义异常
            return 0; // 表示未做任何更新
        }
        // 5. 继续更新会议状态等信息
        return schoolMeetingInfoMapper.updateSchoolMeetingInfo(
                new SchoolMeetingInfo().setState(state).setId(meetingId)
        );
    }
    /**
     * 查询校验会议时间,位置冲突
     * */
    public Boolean checkMeeting(SchoolMeetingInfo schoolMeetingInfo){
        return schoolMeetingInfoMapper.checkMeeting(schoolMeetingInfo);
    }
    /**
     * 每4分钟查询一下接下来五分钟内是否有要开始或者要结束的会议,并更新状态.
     * */
    @Transactional
    public void updatePublishedToStarted(){
        schoolMeetingInfoMapper.updatePublishedToStarted();
        schoolMeetingInfoMapper.updateStartedToEnded();
        //结束前一天所有会议
        schoolMeetingInfoMapper.updatePastMeetingsToFinished();
    }
    /**
     * 签到接口
     * */
    @Override
    public AjaxResult signIn(Long meetingId, String teaUserId, String state ,Date signIn) {
        // 参数校验
        if (meetingId == null || teaUserId == null) {
            return AjaxResult.error("参数缺失");
        }
        // 查询会议信息
        SchoolMeetingInfo schoolMeetingInfo = schoolMeetingInfoMapper.selectSchoolMeetingInfoById(meetingId);
        if (schoolMeetingInfo == null) {
            return AjaxResult.error("会议不存在");
        }
        // 如果未传入 state，则根据会议状态赋值
        if (state == null || state.isEmpty()) {
            switch (schoolMeetingInfo.getState()) {
                case "1":
                    state = "1";
                    break;
                case "2":
                    state = "2";
                    break;
                default:
                    state = "0";
                    break;
            }
        }
        // 更新签到信息
        // 更新签到信息
        int i = schoolMeetingItemService.signIn(
                new SchoolMeetingItem()
                        .setMeetingId(meetingId)
                        .setTeaUserId(teaUserId)
                        .setState(state)
                        .setSignin(signIn!=null?signIn:new Date()));
        if (i>0){
            R<LoginUser> userInfo = remoteUserService.getUserInfo(Objects.toString(teaUserId), SecurityConstants.INNER);
            return AjaxResult.success( userInfo.getData().getSysUser()!=null?userInfo.getData().getSysUser().getNickName():teaUserId);
        }
        else return AjaxResult.error("签到失败");
    }
    /**
     * 导出
     * */
    @Override
    public void output(HttpServletResponse response, SchoolMeetingInfo schoolMeetingInfo) {
        try {
            // 获取会议信息和地点信息
            Map<String, Object> meetingInfoMap = this.selectSchoolMeetingInfoById(schoolMeetingInfo.getId());
            SchoolRoom schoolRoom = schoolRoomService.selectSchoolRoomByRoomId(Long.valueOf(Objects.toString(meetingInfoMap.get("locationId"))));
            SchoolLocation schoolLocation = schoolLocationService.selectSchoolLocationByLocationId(schoolRoom.getLocationId());
            //todo...NUll
            meetingInfoMap.put("locationName", schoolLocation.getLocationName()+"/"+schoolRoom.getRoomName());
            // 获取会议项列表
            SchoolMeetingItem schoolMeetingItem = new SchoolMeetingItem();
            schoolMeetingItem.setMeetingId(schoolMeetingInfo.getId());
            // 获取参会人员名单
            List<SchoolMeetingItem> schoolMeetingItems = schoolMeetingItemService.selectSchoolMeetingItemList(schoolMeetingItem);
            // 提取所有教师用户ID
            List<String> ids = schoolMeetingItems.stream().map(SchoolMeetingItem::getTeaUserId).collect(Collectors.toList());
            // 获取参会人员用户信息
            R<List<SysUser>> userListR = remoteUserService.infosByUsernames(ids, SecurityConstants.INNER);
            List<SysUser> userInfos = userListR.getData();
            // 将SysUsers对象列表转换为Map列表
            List<Map<String, Object>> userData = userInfos.stream()
                    .map(BeanUtil::beanToMap)
                    .collect(Collectors.toList());
            // 创建一个映射，以便快速查找用户数据
            Map<String, Map<String, Object>> userIdToDataMap = new HashMap<>();
            for (Map<String, Object> userDatum : userData) {
                String userId = Objects.toString(userDatum.get("userName"));
                userIdToDataMap.put(userId, userDatum);
            }
            List<Map<String, Object>> resultMap = new ArrayList<>();
            // 遍历schoolMeetingItems并将signInStatus和signInTime添加到对应的userData中
            for (SchoolMeetingItem item : schoolMeetingItems) {
                String teaUserId = item.getTeaUserId();
                if (userIdToDataMap.containsKey(teaUserId)) {
                    Map<String, Object> userDatum = userIdToDataMap.get(teaUserId);
                    userDatum.put("signInStatus", item.getState());
                    userDatum.put("signInTime", item.getSignin());
                    resultMap.add(userDatum);
                }
            }
            // 创建Excel导出器实例并设置响应头
            MeetingExporter meetingExporter = new MeetingExporter();
            // 设置响应内容类型和头部信息
            String fileName = "meetingInfo_" + System.currentTimeMillis() + ".xlsx";
            response.setContentType("application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet");
            response.setHeader("Content-Disposition", "attachment; filename=" + URLEncoder.encode(fileName, "UTF-8"));
            // 导出到response输出流
            try (OutputStream out = response.getOutputStream()) {
                meetingExporter.export(meetingInfoMap, resultMap, out);
                out.flush();
            }
        } catch (IOException e) {
            throw new RuntimeException("导出会议信息失败", e);
        }
    }
    @Override
    public List<Map<String, Object>> boredGetMeeting(String ip) {
        // 根据IP地址获取班牌设备信息
        DevClassBoard board = devClassBoardMapper.selectDevClassBoardByBoardIp(ip);
        if (board == null || board.getRoomId() == null) {
            return Collections.emptyList(); // 没有找到对应教室
        }
        // 查询当天会议
        Date todayStart = Date.from(
                LocalDate.now().atStartOfDay(ZoneId.systemDefault()).toInstant()
        );
        List<SchoolMeetingInfo> result = schoolMeetingInfoMapper.selectSchoolMeetingInfoList(
                new SchoolMeetingInfo().setStartTime(todayStart).setLocationId(board.getRoomId())
        );
        result.removeIf(meetingInfo -> "0".equals(meetingInfo.getState()) || "4".equals(meetingInfo.getState()));
        return getMeetingMsg(result);
    }
    @Override
    public List<Map<String, Object>> boredGetMeetingMsg(String ip) {
        // 根据IP地址获取班牌设备信息
        DevClassBoard board = devClassBoardMapper.selectDevClassBoardByBoardIp(ip);
        if (board == null || board.getRoomId() == null) {
            return Collections.emptyList(); // 没有找到对应教室
        }
        List<SchoolMeetingInfo> result = schoolMeetingInfoMapper.selectSchoolMeetingInfoList(
                new SchoolMeetingInfo().setPublish("1").setLocationId(board.getRoomId()));
        // 安全删除状态不为 1 或 2 的会议
        result.removeIf(meetingInfo -> !"1".equals(meetingInfo.getState()) && !"2".equals(meetingInfo.getState()));
        return getMeetingMsg(result);
    }
    public List<Map<String, Object>> getMeetingMsg(List<SchoolMeetingInfo> result) {
        List<Long> collect = result.stream().map(SchoolMeetingInfo::getId).collect(Collectors.toList());
        // 将 SchoolMeetingInfo 转换为 Map 并格式化时间
        List<Map<String, Object>> mapList = result.stream().map(meeting -> {
            Map<String, Object> meetingMap = BeanUtil.beanToMap(meeting);
            LocalDateTime startLocalDateTime = meeting.getStartTime().toInstant().atZone(ZoneId.of("Asia/Shanghai")).toLocalDateTime();
            LocalDateTime endLocalDateTime = meeting.getEndTime().toInstant().atZone(ZoneId.of("Asia/Shanghai")).toLocalDateTime();
            DateTimeFormatter dateFormatter = DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("yyyy年M月d日");
            DateTimeFormatter timeFormatter = DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("HH:mm");
            String formattedDate = startLocalDateTime.format(dateFormatter);
            String formattedTime = startLocalDateTime.format(timeFormatter) + "-" + endLocalDateTime.format(timeFormatter);
            meetingMap.put("startTime", formattedDate + " " + formattedTime);
            return meetingMap;
        }).collect(Collectors.toList());
        // 添加 MeetingItems 到每个会议
        mapList.forEach(map -> {
            List<SchoolMeetingItem> schoolMeetingItems = schoolMeetingItemService.selectSchoolMeetingItemList(new SchoolMeetingItem().setMeetingId(Long.valueOf(Objects.toString(map.get("id")))));
            map.put("MeetingItems", schoolMeetingItems);
            try {
                R<LoginUser> userInfo = remoteUserService.getUserInfo(Objects.toString(map.get("initiator")), SecurityConstants.INNER);
                SysUser sysUser = userInfo.getData().getSysUser();
                map.put("initiator", sysUser.getNickName());
                System.err.println("initiator---------"+map.get("initiator"));
            }catch (Exception e){
                System.err.println("Error processing remaining message: " + e.getMessage());
            }
        });
//        List<String> ids = mapList.stream().map(item -> Objects.toString(item.get("id"))).collect(Collectors.toList());
        return mapList;
    }
    @Override
    public Page<PhotoDTO> boredGetPhoto() {
        List<PhotoDTO> photoDTOS = schoolTeaInfoMapper.selectTeaPhoto();
        return (Page<PhotoDTO>) photoDTOS;
    }
    @Override
    public List<SchoolMeetingInfo> getFotStatistics(List<String> dataList) {
        if (CollectionUtil.isEmpty(dataList)) {
            return new ArrayList<>();
        }
        return schoolMeetingInfoMapper.selectForStatistics(dataList);
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.service.impl;

/**
 * 会议信息参会人员关联Service业务层处理
 * 
 * @author zzy
 * @date 2025-05-06
 */
@Service
public class SchoolMeetingItemServiceImpl implements ISchoolMeetingItemService
{
    @Autowired
    private SchoolMeetingItemMapper schoolMeetingItemMapper;
    /**
     * 查询会议信息参会人员关联
     * 
     * @param id 会议信息参会人员关联主键
     * @return 会议信息参会人员关联
     */
    @Override
    public SchoolMeetingItem selectSchoolMeetingItemById(Long id)
    {
        return schoolMeetingItemMapper.selectSchoolMeetingItemById(id);
    }
    /**
     * 查询会议信息参会人员关联列表
     *
     * @param schoolMeetingItem 会议信息参会人员关联
     * @return 会议信息参会人员关联
     */
