    {
        return schoolMeetingItemMapper.selectSchoolMeetingItemList(schoolMeetingItem);
    }
    /**
     * 新增会议信息参会人员关联
     * 
     * @param schoolMeetingItem 会议信息参会人员关联
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int insertSchoolMeetingItem(SchoolMeetingItem schoolMeetingItem)
    {
        schoolMeetingItem.setCreateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        return schoolMeetingItemMapper.insertSchoolMeetingItem(schoolMeetingItem);
    }
    /**
     * 新增会议信息参会人员关联
     *
     * @param schoolMeetingItems 会议信息参会人员关联
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int insertSchoolMeetingItems(List<SchoolMeetingItem> schoolMeetingItems)
    {
        return schoolMeetingItemMapper.insertSchoolMeetingItems(schoolMeetingItems);
    }
    /**
     * 修改会议信息参会人员关联
     * 
     * @param schoolMeetingItem 会议信息参会人员关联
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int updateSchoolMeetingItem(SchoolMeetingItem schoolMeetingItem)
    {
        schoolMeetingItem.setUpdateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        return schoolMeetingItemMapper.updateSchoolMeetingItem(schoolMeetingItem);
    }
    /**
     * 批量删除会议信息参会人员关联
     * 
     * @param ids 需要删除的会议信息参会人员关联主键
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int deleteSchoolMeetingItemByIds(Long[] ids)
    {
        return schoolMeetingItemMapper.deleteSchoolMeetingItemByIds(ids);
    }
    /**
     * 删除会议信息参会人员关联信息
     * 
     * @param id 会议信息参会人员关联主键
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int deleteSchoolMeetingItemById(Long id)
    {
        return schoolMeetingItemMapper.deleteSchoolMeetingItemById(id);
    }
    @Override
    public int signIn(SchoolMeetingItem schoolMeetingItem){
        return schoolMeetingItemMapper.signIn(schoolMeetingItem);
    }
    @Override
    public List<SchoolMeetingItem> getByMeetingIds(List<Long> meetingIds) {
        if (CollectionUtil.isEmpty(meetingIds)) {
            return new ArrayList<>();
        }
        return schoolMeetingItemMapper.selectByMeetingIds(meetingIds);
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.service.impl;
import cn.hutool.core.collection.CollectionUtil;
import cn.hutool.core.date.DateField;
import cn.hutool.core.date.DateUtil;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.Bo.SchoolMeetingStatisticsBo;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.SchoolMeetingInfo;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.SchoolMeetingItem;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.ISchoolMeetingInfoService;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.ISchoolMeetingItemService;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.ISchoolMeetingStatisticsService;
import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
import java.math.BigDecimal;
import java.math.RoundingMode;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.Date;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.stream.Collectors;
@RequiredArgsConstructor
@Service
public class SchoolMeetingStatisticsServiceImpl implements ISchoolMeetingStatisticsService {
    private final ISchoolMeetingInfoService schoolMeetingInfoService;
    private final ISchoolMeetingItemService schoolMeetingItemService;
    @Override
    public SchoolMeetingStatisticsBo getSchoolMeetingStatistics(SchoolMeetingStatisticsBo query) {
        if (query == null || query.getQueryDate().size() != 2) {
            throw new RuntimeException("参数错误！");
        }
        Date startDate = query.getQueryDate().get(0);
        Date endDate = query.getQueryDate().get(1);
        if (startDate.after(endDate)) {
            throw new RuntimeException("参数错误！");
        }
        List<String> dateList = new ArrayList<>();
        // 获取从开始日期到结束日期中间的所有日期
        DateUtil.rangeToList(startDate, endDate, DateField.DAY_OF_WEEK).forEach(date -> {
            dateList.add(DateUtil.format(date, "yyyy-MM-dd"));
        });
        SchoolMeetingStatisticsBo bo = new SchoolMeetingStatisticsBo();
        List<SchoolMeetingInfo> mettingList = schoolMeetingInfoService.getFotStatistics(dateList);
        if (CollectionUtil.isEmpty(mettingList)) {
            return bo;
        }
        // 会议数量
        bo.setMeetingTotal(mettingList.size());
        // 折线图数据
        Map<String, List<SchoolMeetingInfo>> mettingMap = mettingList.stream()
                .collect(Collectors.groupingBy(
                        meeting -> DateUtil.format(meeting.getStartTime(), "yyyy-MM-dd")));
        List<Integer> meetingTotalList = new ArrayList<>();
        dateList.forEach(date -> {
            int total = mettingMap.getOrDefault(date, new ArrayList<>()).size();
            meetingTotalList.add(total);
        });
        bo.setMeetingTotalList(meetingTotalList);
        List<Long> meetingIdList = mettingList.stream().map(SchoolMeetingInfo::getId).collect(Collectors.toList());
        List<SchoolMeetingItem> meetingItemList = schoolMeetingItemService.getByMeetingIds(meetingIdList);
        if (CollectionUtil.isEmpty(meetingItemList)) {
            return bo;
        }
        bo.setActualAttendeeTotal(meetingItemList.stream().filter(meetingItem -> "1".equals(meetingItem.getState()) || "2".equals(meetingItem.getState())).count());
        Map<Long, List<SchoolMeetingItem>> meetingItemMap = meetingItemList.stream()
                .collect(Collectors.groupingBy(SchoolMeetingItem::getMeetingId));
        final BigDecimal[] attendanceRateTotal = {BigDecimal.ZERO};
        meetingItemMap.forEach((meetingId, meetingItems) -> {
            long actualAttendeeTotal = meetingItems.stream()
                    .filter(meetingItem -> "1".equals(meetingItem.getState()) || "2".equals(meetingItem.getState()))
                    .count();
            BigDecimal attendanceRate = BigDecimal.valueOf(actualAttendeeTotal)
                    .multiply(BigDecimal.valueOf(100))
                    .divide(BigDecimal.valueOf(meetingItems.size()), 2, RoundingMode.HALF_UP);
            attendanceRateTotal[0] = attendanceRateTotal[0].add(attendanceRate);
        });
        BigDecimal averageAttendanceRate = attendanceRateTotal[0].divide(BigDecimal.valueOf(meetingItemMap.size()), 2, RoundingMode.HALF_UP);
        bo.setAverageAttendanceRate(averageAttendanceRate);
        return bo;
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.service.impl;
import cn.hutool.core.collection.CollectionUtil;
import cn.hutool.core.date.DateUtil;
import cn.hutool.core.util.StrUtil;
import com.chenrise.common.core.constant.SecurityConstants;
import com.chenrise.common.core.domain.R;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.SchoolMeetingItem;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.SchoolMeetingWarn;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.SchoolMeetingWarnItem;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.vo.SchoolMeetingWarnItemVo;
import com.chenrise.jufe.mapper.SchoolMeetingWarnMapper;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.ISchoolMeetingItemService;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.ISchoolMeetingWarnService;
import com.chenrise.system.api.RemoteUserService;
import com.chenrise.system.api.RemoteWsService;
import com.chenrise.system.api.domain.SysUser;
import com.chenrise.system.api.domain.WsSendMessage;
import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.springframework.scheduling.annotation.Async;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
import org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;
import javax.annotation.Resource;
import java.util.*;
import java.util.stream.Collectors;
import static com.chenrise.common.core.constant.WsConstants.WS_ALERT_TYPE_MEETING;
@Slf4j
@RequiredArgsConstructor
@Service
public class SchoolMeetingWarnServiceImpl implements ISchoolMeetingWarnService {
    private final SchoolMeetingWarnMapper schoolMeetingWarnMapper;
    private final ISchoolMeetingItemService schoolMeetingItemService;
    @Resource
    private RemoteWsService remoteWsService;
    @Resource
    private RemoteUserService remoteUserService;
    @Transactional(rollbackFor = Exception.class)
    @Override
    public void sendMeetingWarn() {
        Date now = new Date();
        int MAX_SIZE = 50;
        List<SchoolMeetingWarn> warnList = schoolMeetingWarnMapper.selectWarnList(now);
        if (CollectionUtil.isEmpty(warnList)) {
            return;
        }
        List<Long> meetingIds = warnList.stream().map(SchoolMeetingWarn::getMeetingId).collect(Collectors.toList());
        if (CollectionUtil.isEmpty(meetingIds)) {
            return;
        }
        List<SchoolMeetingItem> meetingItemList = schoolMeetingItemService.getByMeetingIds(meetingIds);
        if (CollectionUtil.isEmpty(meetingItemList)) {
            return;
        }
        Map<Long, List<SchoolMeetingItem>> meetingItemMap = meetingItemList.stream().collect(Collectors.groupingBy(SchoolMeetingItem::getMeetingId));
        // 告警列表
        List<SchoolMeetingWarn> sendWarnList = new ArrayList<>();
        // 未签到人员map
        Map<Long, List<SchoolMeetingItem>> unSignMeetingItemMap = new HashMap<>();
        warnList.forEach(warn -> {
            List<SchoolMeetingItem> itemList = meetingItemMap.get(warn.getMeetingId());
            if (CollectionUtil.isEmpty(itemList)) {
                return;
            }
            List<SchoolMeetingItem> unSignItemList = itemList.stream()
                    .filter(meetingItem -> "0".equals(meetingItem.getState()) || "3".equals(meetingItem.getState()))
                    .collect(Collectors.toList());
            if (CollectionUtil.isEmpty(unSignItemList)) {
                return;
            }
            unSignMeetingItemMap.put(warn.getMeetingId(), unSignItemList);
            warn.setUnSignNum(unSignItemList.size());
            warn.setSignNum(itemList.size() - unSignItemList.size());
            warn.setCreateTime(now);
            warn.setMeetingDate(DateUtil.beginOfDay(warn.getMeetingStartTime()));
            sendWarnList.add(warn);
            // 发送推送
            sendWarn(warn);
        });
        if (CollectionUtil.isEmpty(sendWarnList)) {
            return;
        }
        // 批量插入通知记录
        schoolMeetingWarnMapper.batchInsert(sendWarnList);
        List<SchoolMeetingWarnItem> warnItemList = new ArrayList<>();
        sendWarnList.forEach(warn -> {
            List<SchoolMeetingItem> schoolMeetingItems = unSignMeetingItemMap.get(warn.getMeetingId());
            if (CollectionUtil.isEmpty(schoolMeetingItems)) {
                return;
            }
            schoolMeetingItems.forEach(item -> {
                SchoolMeetingWarnItem warnItem = new SchoolMeetingWarnItem();
                warnItem.setWarnId(warn.getId());
                warnItem.setMeetingId(warn.getMeetingId());
                warnItem.setUserName(item.getTeaUserId());
                warnItem.setState(item.getState());
                warnItemList.add(warnItem);
            });
        });
        List<List<SchoolMeetingWarnItem>> lists = CollectionUtil.split(warnItemList, MAX_SIZE);
        for (List<SchoolMeetingWarnItem> list : lists) {
            schoolMeetingWarnMapper.batchInsertItem(list);
        }
    }
    @Override
    public List<SchoolMeetingWarn> list(SchoolMeetingWarn schoolMeetingWarn) {
        return schoolMeetingWarnMapper.selectList(schoolMeetingWarn);
    }
    @Override
    public List<SchoolMeetingWarnItemVo> unSignList(SchoolMeetingWarnItem schoolMeetingWarnItem) {
        List<SchoolMeetingWarnItemVo> resultList = schoolMeetingWarnMapper.selectWarnItemList(schoolMeetingWarnItem);
        if (CollectionUtil.isEmpty(resultList)) {
            return resultList;
        }
        List<String> userNameList = resultList.stream().map(SchoolMeetingWarnItemVo::getUserName).collect(Collectors.toList());
        R<List<SysUser>> listR = remoteUserService.infosByUsernames(userNameList, SecurityConstants.INNER);
        if (R.isError(listR)) {
            log.error("获取用户信息失败：{}", listR.getMsg());
            return resultList;
        }
        List<SysUser> userList = listR.getData();
        Map<String, SysUser> userMap = userList.stream().collect(Collectors.toMap(SysUser::getUserName, user -> user, (k1, k2) -> k1));
        resultList.forEach(item -> {
            SysUser user = userMap.get(item.getUserName());
            if (user != null) {
                item.setNickName(user.getNickName());
            }
            if (user != null && user.getDept() != null) {
                item.setDeptName(user.getDept().getDeptName());
            }
        });
        return resultList;
    }
    @Async
    protected void sendWarn(SchoolMeetingWarn warn) {
        if (warn == null || StrUtil.isEmpty(warn.getInitiator())) {
            return;
        }
        List<String> userNames = Arrays.asList(warn.getInitiator().split(","));
        R<List<SysUser>> listR = remoteUserService.infosByUsernames(userNames, SecurityConstants.INNER);
        if (R.isError(listR)) {
            log.error("获取用户信息失败：{}", listR.getMsg());
        }
        List<SysUser> userList = listR.getData();
        if (CollectionUtil.isEmpty(userList)) {
            return;
        }
        List<Long> userIds = userList.stream().map(SysUser::getUserId).collect(Collectors.toList());
        WsSendMessage wsSendMessage = new WsSendMessage();
        wsSendMessage.setUserIds(userIds);
        wsSendMessage.setType(WS_ALERT_TYPE_MEETING);
        wsSendMessage.setData(warn);
        remoteWsService.send(wsSendMessage);
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.service.impl;
import cn.hutool.core.util.StrUtil;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.DateUtils;
import com.chenrise.common.security.utils.SecurityUtils;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.DevClassBoard;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.SchoolNoticeInfo;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.SchoolNoticeRoomRef;
import com.chenrise.jufe.mapper.SchoolNoticeInfoMapper;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.ISchoolNoticeInfoService;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
/**
 * 通知信息Service业务层处理
 *
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2022-12-05
 */
@Service
public class SchoolNoticeInfoServiceImpl implements ISchoolNoticeInfoService {
    @Autowired
    private SchoolNoticeInfoMapper schoolNoticeInfoMapper;
    /**
     查询通知信息
     * @Description: 查询通知信息
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022/12/14 09:39:40
     * @param noticeId 通知信息主键
     * @return {@link SchoolNoticeInfo }
     */
    @Override
    public SchoolNoticeInfo selectSchoolNoticeInfoByNoticeId(Long noticeId) {
        return schoolNoticeInfoMapper.selectSchoolNoticeInfoByNoticeId(noticeId);
    }
    /**
     查询通知信息列表
     * @Description: 查询通知信息列表
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022/12/14 09:39:46
     * @param schoolNoticeInfo 通知信息
     * @return {@link List }<{@link SchoolNoticeInfo }>
     */
    @Override
    public List<SchoolNoticeInfo> selectSchoolNoticeInfoList(SchoolNoticeInfo schoolNoticeInfo) {
        List<SchoolNoticeInfo> schoolNoticeInfos = schoolNoticeInfoMapper.selectSchoolNoticeInfoList(schoolNoticeInfo);
        //所有通知
        for (SchoolNoticeInfo noticeInfo : schoolNoticeInfos) {
            //所有班牌
            List<DevClassBoard> DevClassBoardList = schoolNoticeInfoMapper.selectSchoolNoticeRoomRefList(noticeInfo.getNoticeId());
            //获取班牌名称  拼接
            StringBuilder stringBuilder = new StringBuilder();
            List<String> strings = new ArrayList();
            for (DevClassBoard devClassBoard : DevClassBoardList) {
                if (null != devClassBoard && StrUtil.isNotEmpty(devClassBoard.getBoardName())) {
                    stringBuilder.append(devClassBoard.getBoardName()+ "、");
                    if(null!=devClassBoard.getRoomId()){
                        if(!strings.contains(devClassBoard.getRoomId().toString())){
                            strings.add(devClassBoard.getRoomId().toString());
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            if(stringBuilder.length() != 0){
                String substring = stringBuilder.substring(0, stringBuilder.length() - 1);
                stringBuilder = new StringBuilder(substring);
                noticeInfo.setBoardName(stringBuilder.toString());
                noticeInfo.setRoomIds(strings);
            }
        }
        return schoolNoticeInfos;
    }
    /**
     新增通知信息
     * @Description: 新增通知信息
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022/12/14 09:39:52
     * @param schoolNoticeInfo 通知信息
     * @return int
     */
    @Override
    public int insertSchoolNoticeInfo(SchoolNoticeInfo schoolNoticeInfo) {
        schoolNoticeInfo.setCreateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        schoolNoticeInfo.setReleaseUserId(SecurityUtils.getUserId().toString());
        schoolNoticeInfo.setReleaseUserName(SecurityUtils.getUsername());
        schoolNoticeInfoMapper.insertSchoolNoticeInfo(schoolNoticeInfo);
        for (String roomId : schoolNoticeInfo.getRoomIds()) {
            SchoolNoticeRoomRef schoolNoticeRoomRef = new SchoolNoticeRoomRef();
            schoolNoticeRoomRef.setRoomId(Long.valueOf(roomId));
            schoolNoticeRoomRef.setNoticeId(schoolNoticeInfo.getNoticeId());
            schoolNoticeRoomRef.setSortNum(schoolNoticeInfo.getNoticeLevel());
            schoolNoticeRoomRef.setCreateById(SecurityUtils.getUserId());
            schoolNoticeRoomRef.setCreateBy(SecurityUtils.getUsername());
            schoolNoticeRoomRef.setCreateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
            schoolNoticeInfoMapper.addSchoolNoticeRoomRef(schoolNoticeRoomRef);
        }
        return 1;
    }
    /**
     修改通知信息
     * @Description: 修改通知信息
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022/12/14 09:39:55
     * @param schoolNoticeInfo 通知信息
     * @return int
     */
    @Override
    public int updateSchoolNoticeInfo(SchoolNoticeInfo schoolNoticeInfo) {
        schoolNoticeInfo.setUpdateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        schoolNoticeInfo.setUpdateById(SecurityUtils.getUserId());
        schoolNoticeInfo.setUpdateBy(SecurityUtils.getUsername());
        if("3".equals(schoolNoticeInfo.getReleaseStatus())){
            schoolNoticeInfo.setReleaseStatus("1");
        }
        schoolNoticeInfoMapper.deleteSchoolNoticeRoomRef(schoolNoticeInfo.getNoticeId());
        for (String roomId : schoolNoticeInfo.getRoomIds()) {
            SchoolNoticeRoomRef schoolNoticeRoomRef = new SchoolNoticeRoomRef();
            schoolNoticeRoomRef.setNoticeId(schoolNoticeInfo.getNoticeId());
            schoolNoticeRoomRef.setRoomId(Long.valueOf(roomId));
            schoolNoticeRoomRef.setSortNum(schoolNoticeInfo.getNoticeLevel());
            schoolNoticeRoomRef.setCreateById(SecurityUtils.getUserId());
            schoolNoticeRoomRef.setCreateBy(SecurityUtils.getUsername());
            schoolNoticeRoomRef.setCreateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
            schoolNoticeInfoMapper.addSchoolNoticeRoomRef(schoolNoticeRoomRef);
        }
        return schoolNoticeInfoMapper.updateSchoolNoticeInfo(schoolNoticeInfo);
    }/**
     修改通知信息
     * @Description: 修改通知信息   远程调用
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022/12/14 09:39:55
     * @return int
     */
    @Override
    public int editStatus() {
        SchoolNoticeInfo schoolNoticeInfo = new SchoolNoticeInfo();
        schoolNoticeInfo.setUpdateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        schoolNoticeInfo.setReleaseStatus("2");
        schoolNoticeInfoMapper.editStatus(schoolNoticeInfo);
        SchoolNoticeInfo schoolNoticeInfoEnd = new SchoolNoticeInfo();
        schoolNoticeInfoEnd.setUpdateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        schoolNoticeInfoEnd.setReleaseStatus("3");
        schoolNoticeInfoMapper.planEndStatus(schoolNoticeInfoEnd);
       return 1;
    }
    /**
     下架通知信息
     * @Description: 下架通知信息
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022/12/14 09:39:59
     * @param schoolNoticeInfo 通知信息
     * @return int
     */
    @Override
    public int updateSchoolNoticeInfoTime(SchoolNoticeInfo schoolNoticeInfo) {
        schoolNoticeInfo.setReleaseTime(null);
        schoolNoticeInfo.setEndTime(null);
        schoolNoticeInfo.setReleaseStatus("3");
        schoolNoticeInfo.setUpdateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        return schoolNoticeInfoMapper.updateSchoolNoticeInfoTime(schoolNoticeInfo);
    }
    /**
     批量删除通知信息
     * @Description: 批量删除通知信息
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022/12/14 09:40:04
     * @param noticeIds 需要删除的通知信息主键
     * @return int
     */
    @Override
    public int deleteSchoolNoticeInfoByNoticeIds(Long[] noticeIds) {
        return schoolNoticeInfoMapper.deleteSchoolNoticeInfoByNoticeIds(noticeIds);
    }
    /**
     删除通知信息信息
     * @Description: 删除通知信息信息
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022/12/14 09:40:09
     * @param noticeId 通知信息主键
     * @return int
     */
    @Override
    public int deleteSchoolNoticeInfoByNoticeId(Long noticeId) {
        return schoolNoticeInfoMapper.deleteSchoolNoticeInfoByNoticeId(noticeId);
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.service.impl;
import java.security.Security;
import java.util.*;
import cn.hutool.core.date.DateUtil;
import cn.hutool.json.JSONUtil;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.DateUtils;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.StringUtils;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult;
import com.chenrise.common.security.utils.DictUtils;
import com.chenrise.common.security.utils.SecurityUtils;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.WxSendService;
import com.chenrise.system.api.RemoteUserService;
import com.chenrise.system.api.domain.SysUser;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Value;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
import com.chenrise.jufe.mapper.SchoolReportMapper;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.SchoolReport;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.ISchoolReportService;
import javax.annotation.Resource;
/**
 * 问题上报Service业务层处理
 *
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2024-01-16
 */
@Service
public class SchoolReportServiceImpl implements ISchoolReportService
{
    @Resource
    private SchoolReportMapper schoolReportMapper;
    @Resource
    private WxSendService wxSendService;
    @Resource
    private RemoteUserService remoteUserService;
    @Value("${wx.miniapp.configs[0].templateId.reportTemplateId}")
    private String reportTemplateId;
    /**
     * 查询问题上报
     *
     * @param id 问题上报主键
     * @return 问题上报
     */
    @Override
    public SchoolReport selectSchoolReportById(Long id)
    {
        return schoolReportMapper.selectSchoolReportById(id);
    }
    /**
     * 查询问题上报列表
     *
     * @param schoolReport 问题上报
     * @return 问题上报
     */
    @Override
    public List<SchoolReport> selectSchoolReportList(SchoolReport schoolReport)
    {
        return schoolReportMapper.selectSchoolReportList(schoolReport);
    }
    /**
     * 新增问题上报
     *
     * @param schoolReport 问题上报
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int insertSchoolReport(SchoolReport schoolReport)
    {
        schoolReport.setCreateById(SecurityUtils.getUserId());
        if(SecurityUtils.getLoginUser()!=null&&SecurityUtils.getLoginUser().getSysUser()!=null){
            schoolReport.setCreateBy(SecurityUtils.getLoginUser().getSysUser().getNickName());
        }
        schoolReport.setCreateTime(DateUtil.beginOfMinute(DateUtils.getNowDate()));
        return schoolReportMapper.insertSchoolReport(schoolReport);
    }
    /**
     * 修改问题上报
     *
     * @param schoolReport 问题上报
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int updateSchoolReport(SchoolReport schoolReport)
    {
        return schoolReportMapper.updateSchoolReport(schoolReport);
    }
    /**
     * 批量删除问题上报
     *
     * @param ids 需要删除的问题上报主键
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int deleteSchoolReportByIds(Long[] ids)
    {
        return schoolReportMapper.deleteSchoolReportByIds(ids);
    }
    /**
     * 删除问题上报信息
     *
     * @param id 问题上报主键
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int deleteSchoolReportById(Long id)
    {
        return schoolReportMapper.deleteSchoolReportById(id);
    }
    /**
     * @Description:处理问题
     * @param schoolReport
     * @return: int
     * @Author: CJH
     * @Updator: CJH
     * @Date 2024/1/17 12:52
     */
    @Override
    public void auditReport(SchoolReport schoolReport)
    {
        for(Long id: schoolReport.getIds()){
            SchoolReport sr_update = new SchoolReport();
            sr_update.setId(id);
            sr_update.setDealBy(SecurityUtils.getLoginUser().getSysUser().getNickName());
            sr_update.setDealTime(new Date());
            sr_update.setDealRemark(schoolReport.getDealRemark());
            sr_update.setStatus(schoolReport.getStatus());
            schoolReportMapper.updateSchoolReport(sr_update);
            // 小程序推送消息
            SchoolReport sr = schoolReportMapper.selectSchoolReportById(id);
            DictUtils.getDictName(sr);
            if(sr.getCreateById()!=null){
                AjaxResult result = remoteUserService.getUser(sr.getCreateById());
                SysUser user = JSONUtil.toBean(JSONUtil.toJsonStr(result.get("data")),SysUser.class);
                if(StringUtils.isNotEmpty(user.getOpenId())){
                    Map<String,Object> map = new HashMap<>();
                    map.put("openId",user.getOpenId());
                    List<Map<String,String>> subs = new ArrayList<>();
                    Map<String,String> sub = new HashMap<>();
                    sub.put("name","time4");
                    sub.put("value",DateUtil.format(sr.getDealTime(),"yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm"));
                    subs.add(sub);
                    sub = new HashMap<>();
                    sub.put("name","thing5");
                    sub.put("value", String.valueOf(sr.getParams().get("statusName")));
                    subs.add(sub);
                    sub = new HashMap<>();
                    sub.put("name","thing6");
                    sub.put("value", sr.getDealRemark());
                    subs.add(sub);
                    map.put("data",subs);
                    wxSendService.sendWxInfor(map,reportTemplateId);
                }
            }
        }
    }
    /**
     * 查询首页问题上报列表
     * @Description: 查询首页问题上报列表
     * @Author: lougang
     * @Date: 2024-11-05 13:56
     * @param schoolReport:
     * @return: java.util.List<com.chenrise.jufe.domain.SchoolReport>
     */
    @Override
    public List<SchoolReport> getSchoolReportList(SchoolReport schoolReport) {
        return schoolReportMapper.getSchoolReportList(schoolReport);
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.service.impl;
import java.text.ParseException;
import java.text.SimpleDateFormat;
import java.util.*;
import java.util.stream.Collectors;
import cn.hutool.core.date.DateUtil;
import cn.hutool.json.JSONObject;
import cn.hutool.json.JSONUtil;
import com.chenrise.common.core.exception.ServiceException;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.DateUtils;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.StringUtils;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult;
import com.chenrise.common.security.utils.SecurityUtils;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.*;
import com.chenrise.jufe.mapper.*;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.WxSendService;
import com.chenrise.system.api.RemoteAppService;
import com.chenrise.system.api.RemoteConfigService;
import com.chenrise.system.api.RemoteUserService;
import com.chenrise.system.api.domain.SysRole;
import com.chenrise.system.api.domain.SysUser;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Value;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.ISchoolReservationInfoService;
import org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;
import javax.annotation.Resource;
/**
 * 预约信息Service业务层处理
 *
 * @author liyiying
 * @date 2022-12-03
 */
@Service
public class SchoolReservationInfoServiceImpl implements ISchoolReservationInfoService
{
    @Resource
    private SchoolReservationInfoMapper schoolReservationInfoMapper;
    @Resource
    private SchoolReservationTimeInfoMapper timeInfoMapper;
    @Resource
    private SchoolRoomMapper roomMapper;
    @Resource
    private DevLockInfoMapper devLockInfoMapper;
    @Resource
    private SchoolBaseSetInfoMapper baseSetInfoMapper;
    @Resource
    private SchoolBlackInfoMapper blackInfoMapper;
    @Resource
    private RemoteUserService userService;
    @Resource
    private SchoolLocationServiceImpl locationService;
    @Resource
    private RemoteAppService remoteAppService;
    @Resource
    private DevClassBoardMapper classBoardMapper;
    @Resource
    private SchoolTimeSchedulingMapper schedulingMapper;
    @Resource
    private WxSendService wxSendService;
    @Value("${wx.miniapp.configs[0].templateId.applyTemplateId}")
    private String applyTemplateId;
    @Value("${wx.miniapp.configs[0].templateId.auditResultTemplateId}")
    private String auditResultTemplateId;
    @Value("${wx.miniapp.configs[0].templateId.timeoutTemplateId}")
    private String timeoutTemplateId;
    /**
     *
     查询预约信息
     * @Description: 查询预约信息
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/03
     * @param reservationId 预约信息主键
     * @return {@link SchoolReservationInfo }
     */
    @Override
    public SchoolReservationInfo selectSchoolReservationInfoByReservationId(Long reservationId)
    {
        SchoolReservationInfo schoolReservationInfo = schoolReservationInfoMapper.selectSchoolReservationInfoByReservationId(reservationId);
        DevLockInfo devLockInfo = new DevLockInfo();
        devLockInfo.setRoomId(schoolReservationInfo.getRoomId());
        devLockInfo.setIsUsable("0");
        List<DevLockInfo> locks = devLockInfoMapper.selectDevLockInfoList(devLockInfo);
        schoolReservationInfo.getParams().put("locks",locks);
        /**
         * 处理预约教室下所有没锁，以开锁距离最小的为基准
         * */
        Integer openRange = null;
        //获取所有门锁的mac
        for(int i=0;i<locks.size();i++){
            if(openRange!=null){
                if(openRange>locks.get(i).getOpenRange()){
                    openRange = locks.get(i).getOpenRange();
                }
            }else{
                openRange = locks.get(i).getOpenRange();
            }
        }
        schoolReservationInfo.setOpenRange(openRange);
        SchoolReservationTimeInfo srt_query = new SchoolReservationTimeInfo();
        srt_query.setReservationId(schoolReservationInfo.getReservationId());
        List<SchoolReservationTimeInfo> srtList = timeInfoMapper.selectSchoolReservationTimeInfoList(srt_query);
        if(srtList!=null&&srtList.size()>0){
            String [] timeRanges = new String[srtList.size()];
            for(int i=0;i<srtList.size();i++){
                timeRanges[i] = DateUtil.format(schoolReservationInfo.getReservationDate(),"yyyy-MM-dd") + " "+ srtList.get(i).getReservationStartTime() + "~" + srtList.get(i).getReservationEndTime();
            }
            schoolReservationInfo.setTimeRanges(timeRanges);
        }
        SchoolRoom room = roomMapper.selectSchoolRoomByRoomId(schoolReservationInfo.getRoomId());
        if(room!=null){
            SchoolLocation location = locationService.selectSchoolLocationByLocationId(room.getLocationId());
            if(location!=null){
                String fullName = locationService.fullName(location);
                schoolReservationInfo.setLocationName(fullName);
            }
        }
        return schoolReservationInfo;
    }
    /**
     *
     查询预约信息列表
     * @Description: 查询预约信息列表
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/03
     * @param schoolReservationInfo 预约信息
     * @return {@link List }<{@link SchoolReservationInfo }>
     */
    @Override
    public List<SchoolReservationInfo> selectSchoolReservationInfoList(SchoolReservationInfo schoolReservationInfo)
    {
        List<String> amdinFlagList = SecurityUtils.getLoginUser().getRoles().stream().filter(roole->"admin".equals(roole)||
                "approval_all".equals(roole)).collect(Collectors.toList());
        if(amdinFlagList.size()==0&&!"admin".equals(SecurityUtils.getLoginUser().getUsername())){
            schoolReservationInfo.setDeptId(SecurityUtils.getLoginUser().getSysUser().getDeptId());
        }
        return schoolReservationInfoMapper.selectSchoolReservationInfoList(schoolReservationInfo);
    }
    /**
     *
     新增预约信息
     * @Description: 新增预约信息
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/03
     * @param schoolReservationInfo 预约信息
     * @return int
     */
    @Override
    @Transactional(rollbackFor = Exception.class)
    public int insertSchoolReservationInfo(SchoolReservationInfo schoolReservationInfo)
    {
        SimpleDateFormat format = new SimpleDateFormat("yyyy-MM-dd");
        SchoolBlackInfo blackInfo = new SchoolBlackInfo();
        blackInfo.setUserId(schoolReservationInfo.getUserId());
        blackInfo.setUserType(schoolReservationInfo.getUserType());
        List<SchoolBlackInfo> blackInfos = blackInfoMapper.selectSchoolBlackInfoList(blackInfo);
        if(blackInfos!=null&&blackInfos.size()>0){
            throw new ServiceException("您已被拉入黑名单，不可再预约");
        }
        SchoolReservationInfo query = new SchoolReservationInfo();
        query.setReservationDate(schoolReservationInfo.getReservationDate());
        query.setUserId(schoolReservationInfo.getUserId());
        query.setApprovalStatus("4");
        List<SchoolReservationInfo> list = schoolReservationInfoMapper.selectSchoolReservationInfoList(query);
        if(list!=null&&list.size()>0){
            throw new ServiceException("取消预约后当天不可再次提交预约");
        }
        SchoolRoom room = roomMapper.selectSchoolRoomByRoomId(schoolReservationInfo.getRoomId());
        schoolReservationInfo.setRoomName(room.getRoomName());
        //审批类型为 自动审批
        if("2".equals(room.getApprovalType())){
            schoolReservationInfo.setApprovalStatus("2");
            schoolReservationInfo.setApprovalTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
            schoolReservationInfo.setApprovalUserId(1L);
            schoolReservationInfo.setApprovalUserName("系统自动审批");
            schoolReservationInfo.setApprovalType("2");
            schoolReservationInfo.setApprovalComments("系统同意");
            Map<String,Object> map = new HashMap<>();
            map.put("openId",schoolReservationInfo.getUserOpenId());
            map.put("page","myappointment/pages/appointmentdetailwait/index?data="+schoolReservationInfo.getReservationId());
            List<Map<String,String>> subs = new ArrayList<>();
            Map<String,String> sub = new HashMap<>();
            sub.put("name","name1");
            sub.put("value",schoolReservationInfo.getUserName());
            subs.add(sub);
            sub = new HashMap<>();
            sub.put("name","thing2");
            sub.put("value",schoolReservationInfo.getRoomName());
            subs.add(sub);
            String str = "";
            for(int i=0;i<list.size();i++){
                str += format.format(schoolReservationInfo.getReservationDate());
            }
            sub = new HashMap<>();
            sub.put("name","date3");
            sub.put("value",str);
            subs.add(sub);
            sub = new HashMap<>();
            sub.put("name","phrase9");
            sub.put("value","已通过");
            subs.add(sub);
            map.put("data",subs);
            wxSendService.sendWxInfor(map,auditResultTemplateId);
        }
        else{
            schoolReservationInfo.setApprovalStatus("1");
            schoolReservationInfo.setApprovalType("1");
            AjaxResult result = userService.userlist();
            if(result.get("data")!=null){
                List<Map> users = (List<Map>) result.get("data");
                for(Map su:users){
                    String jsonStr =JSONUtil.toJsonStr(su.get("roles"));
                    List<SysRole> roles = JSONUtil.toList(jsonStr,SysRole.class);
                    Boolean approval = false;
                    Boolean approval_all = false;
                    for(SysRole sr:roles){
                        if("approval".equals(sr.getRoleKey())){
                            approval = true;
                        }
                        if("approval_all".equals(sr.getRoleKey())){
                            approval_all = true;
                        }
                    }
                    if((room.getDeptId()!=null&&room.getDeptId().equals(Long.parseLong(String.valueOf(su.get("deptId"))))&&approval)||approval_all){
                        Map<String,Object> map = new HashMap<>();
                        map.put("openId",String.valueOf(su.get("openId")));
                        map.put("page","classroomapproval/pages/approval/index");
                        List<Map<String,String>> subs = new ArrayList<>();
                        Map<String,String> sub = new HashMap<>();
                        String str = "";
                        for(String timeRange:schoolReservationInfo.getTimeRanges()){
                            str += format.format(schoolReservationInfo.getReservationDate())+" "+timeRange;
                        }
                        sub = new HashMap<>();
                        sub.put("name","time11");
                        sub.put("value",str);
                        subs.add(sub);
                        sub = new HashMap<>();
                        sub.put("name","thing5");
                        sub.put("value","您有待审批事项，请及时处理");
                        subs.add(sub);
                        map.put("data",subs);
                        wxSendService.sendWxInfor(map,applyTemplateId);
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        schoolReservationInfo.setDeptId(schoolReservationInfo.getDeptId()==null?SecurityUtils.getLoginUser().getSysUser().getDeptId():schoolReservationInfo.getDeptId());
        schoolReservationInfo.setReservationTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        schoolReservationInfo.setCreateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        int count = schoolReservationInfoMapper.insertSchoolReservationInfo(schoolReservationInfo);
        if(schoolReservationInfo.getTimeRanges()!=null&&schoolReservationInfo.getTimeRanges().length>0){
            for(String timeRange:schoolReservationInfo.getTimeRanges()){
                SchoolReservationTimeInfo srti = new SchoolReservationTimeInfo();
                srti.setReservationId(schoolReservationInfo.getReservationId());
                srti.setRoomId(schoolReservationInfo.getRoomId());
                String [] times = timeRange.split("~");
                srti.setReservationStartTime(times[0]);
                srti.setReservationEndTime(times[1]);
                int count1 = timeInfoMapper.getCount(DateUtil.format(schoolReservationInfo.getReservationDate(),"yyyy-MM-dd"),times[0],times[1],schoolReservationInfo.getUserId()+"");
                if(count1>0){
                    throw new ServiceException(DateUtil.format(schoolReservationInfo.getReservationDate(),"yyyy-MM-dd")+" "+times[0]+"~"+times[1]+"不可再预约，此时段有尚在进行中的预约！");
                }
                srti.setCreateById(schoolReservationInfo.getUserId()==null?SecurityUtils.getUserId():schoolReservationInfo.getUserId());
                srti.setCreateBy(schoolReservationInfo.getUserName()==null?SecurityUtils.getUsername():schoolReservationInfo.getUserName());
                srti.setCreateTime(new Date());
                srti.setDelFlag(0L);
                srti.setDeptId(schoolReservationInfo.getDeptId()==null?SecurityUtils.getLoginUser().getSysUser().getDeptId():schoolReservationInfo.getDeptId());
                timeInfoMapper.insertSchoolReservationTimeInfo(srti);
            }
        }
        return count;
    }
    /**
     *
     修改预约信息
     * @Description: 修改预约信息
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/03
     * @param schoolReservationInfo 预约信息
     * @return int
     */
    @Override
    public int updateSchoolReservationInfo(SchoolReservationInfo schoolReservationInfo)
    {
        schoolReservationInfo.setUpdateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        return schoolReservationInfoMapper.updateSchoolReservationInfo(schoolReservationInfo);
    }
    /**

     */
    @Override
    public int deleteSchoolReservationInfoByReservationIds(Integer[] reservationIds)
    {
        return schoolReservationInfoMapper.deleteSchoolReservationInfoByReservationIds(reservationIds);
    }
    /**
     *
     删除预约信息信息

     * @param reservationId 预约信息主键
     * @return int
     */
    @Override

    {
        return schoolReservationInfoMapper.deleteSchoolReservationInfoByReservationId(reservationId);
    }
    /**
     * 审批
     *
     * @param schoolReservationInfo 预约信息
     * @Description: 审批
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/03
     */
    @Override
    public void audit(SchoolReservationInfo schoolReservationInfo)
    {
        SimpleDateFormat format = new SimpleDateFormat("yyyy-MM-dd");
        for(Long id:schoolReservationInfo.getIds()){
            SchoolReservationInfo check = schoolReservationInfoMapper.selectSchoolReservationInfoByReservationId(id);
            SchoolReservationTimeInfo srti_query = new SchoolReservationTimeInfo();
            srti_query.setReservationId(check.getReservationId());
            List<SchoolReservationTimeInfo> list = timeInfoMapper.selectSchoolReservationTimeInfoList(srti_query);
            Map<String,Object> map = new HashMap<>();
            map.put("openId",check.getUserOpenId());
            map.put("page","myappointment/pages/appointmentdetailwait/index?data="+id);
            List<Map<String,String>> subs = new ArrayList<>();
            Map<String,String> sub = new HashMap<>();
            sub.put("name","name1");
            sub.put("value",check.getUserName());
            subs.add(sub);
            sub = new HashMap<>();
            sub.put("name","thing2");
            sub.put("value",check.getRoomName());
            subs.add(sub);
            String str = "";
            for(int i=0;i<list.size();i++){
                str += format.format(check.getReservationDate()) + " "+list.get(i).getReservationStartTime()+"~"+list.get(i).getReservationEndTime();
            }
            sub = new HashMap<>();
            sub.put("name","date3");
            sub.put("value",str);
            subs.add(sub);
            sub = new HashMap<>();
            sub.put("name","phrase9");
            sub.put("value",schoolReservationInfo.getApprovalStatus().equals("2")?"已通过":"已拒绝");
            subs.add(sub);
            sub = new HashMap<>();
            sub.put("name","thing7");
            sub.put("value",schoolReservationInfo.getApprovalStatus().equals("2")?"同意申请":schoolReservationInfo.getApprovalComments());
            subs.add(sub);
            map.put("data",subs);
            wxSendService.sendWxInfor(map,auditResultTemplateId);
        }
        schoolReservationInfo.setApprovalUserId(schoolReservationInfo.getApprovalUserId()==null?SecurityUtils.getUserId():schoolReservationInfo.getApprovalUserId());
        schoolReservationInfo.setApprovalUserName(schoolReservationInfo.getApprovalUserName()==null?SecurityUtils.getLoginUser().getSysUser().getNickName():schoolReservationInfo.getApprovalUserName());
        schoolReservationInfoMapper.audit(schoolReservationInfo);
    }
    /**
     *
     * @Description: 取消预约
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/06
     * @param schoolReservationInfo
     * @return int
     */
    @Override
    public int cancel(SchoolReservationInfo schoolReservationInfo) throws ParseException {
        SimpleDateFormat format = new SimpleDateFormat("yyyy-MM-dd");
        SimpleDateFormat format1 = new SimpleDateFormat("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm");
        SchoolBaseSetInfo setInfo = baseSetInfoMapper.selectSchoolBaseSetInfoById(1L);
        SchoolReservationInfo check = schoolReservationInfoMapper.selectSchoolReservationInfoByReservationId(schoolReservationInfo.getReservationId());
        SchoolReservationTimeInfo srti_query = new SchoolReservationTimeInfo();
        srti_query.setReservationId(check.getReservationId());
        List<SchoolReservationTimeInfo> list = timeInfoMapper.selectSchoolReservationTimeInfoList(srti_query);
        boolean flag = false;
        Date now = new Date();
        for(SchoolReservationTimeInfo srti:list){
            Date start = format1.parse(format.format(check.getReservationDate())+" "+srti.getReservationStartTime());
            if((now.getTime()+setInfo.getCancelTime()*60*1000)>start.getTime()){
                flag = true;
            }
        }
        if(flag){
            throw new ServiceException("已超过可撤销预约时间！");
        }
        if("1".equals(check.getApprovalStatus())){
            schoolReservationInfo.setReservationCancelType("1");
        }else{
            schoolReservationInfo.setReservationCancelType("2");
        }
        return schoolReservationInfoMapper.cancel(schoolReservationInfo);
    }
    /**
     *
     * @Description: 按审核状态分组
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/30
     * @param schoolReservationInfo
     * @return {@link List }<{@link Map }<{@link String },{@link Object }>>
     */
    @Override
    public List<Map<String,Object>> selectCountGroupByStatus(SchoolReservationInfo schoolReservationInfo) {
        List<String> amdinFlagList = SecurityUtils.getLoginUser().getRoles().stream().filter(roole->"admin".equals(roole)||"approval_all".equals(roole)).collect(Collectors.toList());
        if(amdinFlagList.size()==0&&!"admin".equals(SecurityUtils.getLoginUser().getUsername())){
            schoolReservationInfo.setDeptId(SecurityUtils.getLoginUser().getSysUser().getDeptId());
        }
        return schoolReservationInfoMapper.selectCountGroupByStatus(schoolReservationInfo);
    }
    /**
     *
     * @Description: 定时处理未审核数据
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2023/01/18
     *
     *
     */
    @Override
    public void dealReservation(){
        SchoolReservationInfo sri_query = new SchoolReservationInfo();
        sri_query.setApprovalStatus("1");
        List<SchoolReservationInfo> reservationInfos = schoolReservationInfoMapper.selectSchoolReservationInfoList(sri_query);
        for(SchoolReservationInfo sri:reservationInfos){
            SchoolReservationTimeInfo srt_query = new SchoolReservationTimeInfo();
            srt_query.setReservationId(sri.getReservationId());
            List<SchoolReservationTimeInfo> srtList = timeInfoMapper.selectSchoolReservationTimeInfoList(srt_query);
            Boolean flag = false;
            for(SchoolReservationTimeInfo srti: srtList){
                if(new Date().after(DateUtil.parse(DateUtil.format(sri.getReservationDate(),"yyyy-MM-dd")+" "+srti.getReservationStartTime(),"yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm"))){
                    flag = true;
                }
            }
            if(flag){
                sri.setApprovalStatus("5");
                schoolReservationInfoMapper.updateSchoolReservationInfo(sri);
            }
        }
    }
    @Override
    public void reservationTips(){
        SchoolBaseSetInfo baseSetInfo = baseSetInfoMapper.selectSchoolBaseSetInfoById(1L);
        SchoolReservationInfo sri_query = new SchoolReservationInfo();
        sri_query.setApprovalStatus("2");
        sri_query.setReservationDate(DateUtil.beginOfDay(new Date()));
        List<SchoolReservationInfo> reservationInfos = schoolReservationInfoMapper.selectSchoolReservationInfoList(sri_query);
        List<String> ips = new ArrayList<>();
        for(SchoolReservationInfo sri:reservationInfos){
            SchoolReservationTimeInfo srt_query = new SchoolReservationTimeInfo();
            srt_query.setReservationId(sri.getReservationId());
            List<SchoolReservationTimeInfo> srtList = timeInfoMapper.selectSchoolReservationTimeInfoList(srt_query);
            Boolean flag = false;
            for(SchoolReservationTimeInfo srti: srtList){
                if(System.currentTimeMillis()+baseSetInfo.getRoomOrderEndTime()*60*1000>=DateUtil.parse(DateUtil.format(sri.getReservationDate(),"yyyy-MM-dd")+" "+srti.getReservationEndTime(),"yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm").getTime()
                        &&(System.currentTimeMillis()+(baseSetInfo.getRoomOrderEndTime()-1)*60*1000)<DateUtil.parse(DateUtil.format(sri.getReservationDate(),"yyyy-MM-dd")+" "+srti.getReservationEndTime(),"yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm").getTime()){
                    flag = true;
                }
            }
            if(flag){
                //发送小程序推送
                Map<String,Object> map = new HashMap<>();
                map.put("openId",sri.getUserOpenId());
                map.put("page","myappointment/pages/appointmentdetailwait/index?data="+sri.getReservationId());
                List<Map<String,String>> subs = new ArrayList<>();
                Map<String,String> sub = new HashMap<>();
                sub.put("name","time10");
                sub.put("value",DateUtil.format(new Date(),"yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"));
                subs.add(sub);
                sub = new HashMap<>();
                sub.put("name","thing11");
                sub.put("value","5min内将断电，请做好准备！");
                subs.add(sub);
                map.put("data",subs);
                wxSendService.sendWxInfor(map,timeoutTemplateId);
                //发送班牌语音推送
                DevClassBoard query = new DevClassBoard();
                query.setRoomId(sri.getRoomId());
                List<DevClassBoard> classBoards = classBoardMapper.selectDevClassBoardList(query);
                for(DevClassBoard d:classBoards){
                    ips.add(d.getIpAddress());
                }
            }
        }
        String ipsStr = "";
        if(ips!=null&&ips.size()>0){
            ipsStr = StringUtils.join(ips,",");
            Map<String,String> info = new HashMap<>();
            info.put("ips",ipsStr);
            info.put("url",StringUtils.isNotEmpty(baseSetInfo.getRoomOrderVoiceUrl())?baseSetInfo.getRoomOrderVoiceUrl():"");
            info.put("playStatus","1");
            remoteAppService.playAudio(info);
        }
    }
    @Override
    public void courseTips(){
        System.out.println("课表结束提醒开始------------");
        SchoolBaseSetInfo baseSetInfo = baseSetInfoMapper.selectSchoolBaseSetInfoById(1L);
        List<SchoolTimeScheduling> list = schedulingMapper.getAllByNow();
        List<String> ips = new ArrayList<>();
        for(SchoolTimeScheduling sts:list){
            if(System.currentTimeMillis()+baseSetInfo.getClassScheduleEndTime()*60*1000>=DateUtil.parse(DateUtil.format(sts.getCourseDate(),"yyyy-MM-dd")+" "+sts.getEndTime(),"yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm").getTime()
                    &&(System.currentTimeMillis()+(baseSetInfo.getClassScheduleEndTime()-1)*60*1000)<DateUtil.parse(DateUtil.format(sts.getCourseDate(),"yyyy-MM-dd")+" "+sts.getEndTime(),"yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm").getTime()){
                //发送班牌语音推送
                DevClassBoard classBoard = classBoardMapper.selectDevClassBoardByRoomId(sts.getRoomId());
                ips.add(classBoard.getIpAddress());
            }
        }
        String ipsStr = "";
        if(ips!=null&&ips.size()>0){
            ipsStr = StringUtils.join(ips,",");
            Map<String,String> info = new HashMap<>();
            info.put("ips",ipsStr);
            info.put("url",StringUtils.isNotEmpty(baseSetInfo.getClassScheduleVoiceUrl())?baseSetInfo.getClassScheduleVoiceUrl():"");
            info.put("playStatus","1");
            System.out.println("ipStr------------------"+ipsStr);
            System.out.println("url-----------------------"+info.get("url"));
            remoteAppService.playAudio(info);
        }
        System.out.println("课表结束提醒结束------------");
    }
    @Override
    public void breakReservation() {
        Integer max = baseSetInfoMapper.selectSchoolBaseSetInfoById(1L).getMaxBreakNum();
        max = (max==0||max==null)?3:max;
        SchoolReservationInfo sri_query = new SchoolReservationInfo();
        sri_query.setApprovalStatus("2");
        sri_query.setSignFlag("0");
        sri_query.setReservationDate(DateUtil.beginOfDay(new Date()));
        List<SchoolReservationInfo> reservationInfos = schoolReservationInfoMapper.selectSchoolReservationInfoList(sri_query);
        for (SchoolReservationInfo sri : reservationInfos) {
            SchoolReservationTimeInfo srt_query = new SchoolReservationTimeInfo();
            srt_query.setReservationId(sri.getReservationId());
            List<SchoolReservationTimeInfo> srtList = timeInfoMapper.selectSchoolReservationTimeInfoList(srt_query);
            for (SchoolReservationTimeInfo srti : srtList) {
                //判断 当前 非一分钟以内的申请
                Long now = System.currentTimeMillis();
                if (now >= DateUtil.parse(DateUtil.format(sri.getReservationDate(), "yyyy-MM-dd") + " " + srti.getReservationEndTime(), "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm").getTime()
                        && (now - 60 * 1000) <= DateUtil.parse(DateUtil.format(sri.getReservationDate(), "yyyy-MM-dd") + " " + srti.getReservationEndTime(), "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm").getTime()) {
                    AjaxResult result = userService.getUser(sri.getUserId());
                    JSONObject jsonObject = JSONUtil.parseObj(result);
                    SysUser user = JSONUtil.toBean(JSONUtil.toJsonStr(jsonObject.get("data")), SysUser.class);
                    //更新user 的爽约次数
                    SysUser editUser = new SysUser();
                    editUser.setUserId(user.getUserId());
                    editUser.setBreakNum((user.getBreakNum() + 1)>max?max:(user.getBreakNum() + 1));
                    userService.editUser(editUser);
                    if (editUser.getBreakNum() >= max) {
//                        sri.setApprovalStatus("5");
//                        schoolReservationInfoMapper.updateSchoolReservationInfo(sri);
                        SchoolBlackInfo query = new SchoolBlackInfo();
                        query.setUserId(user.getUserId());
                        query.setUserType(user.getUserType());
                        List<SchoolBlackInfo> list = blackInfoMapper.selectSchoolBlackInfoList(query);
                        if(list==null||list.size()==0){
                            SchoolBlackInfo schoolBlackInfo = new SchoolBlackInfo();
                            schoolBlackInfo.setType("AUTO");
                            schoolBlackInfo.setUserId(user.getUserId());
                            schoolBlackInfo.setUserType(user.getUserType());
                            schoolBlackInfo.setUserCode(user.getUserName());
                            schoolBlackInfo.setUserName(user.getNickName());
                            schoolBlackInfo.setDeptId(user.getDept()!=null?user.getDept().getDeptId():null);
                            schoolBlackInfo.setDeptName(user.getDept()!=null?user.getDept().getDeptName():null);
                            schoolBlackInfo.setStatus("1");
                            schoolBlackInfo.setAddTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
                            schoolBlackInfo.setCreateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
                            schoolBlackInfo.setReason("超过最大可爽约次数");
                            blackInfoMapper.insertSchoolBlackInfo(schoolBlackInfo);
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.service.impl;
import java.util.List;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.DateUtils;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.SchoolReservationTimeInfo;

/**

}
package com.chenrise.jufe.service.impl;
import java.util.*;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.DateUtils;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.StringUtils;
import com.chenrise.common.security.utils.SecurityUtils;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.Bo.SchoolRoomAudioInfoBo;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.SchoolRoom;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.SchoolRoomAudioRef;
import com.chenrise.jufe.mapper.SchoolRoomAudioRefMapper;
import com.chenrise.jufe.mapper.SchoolRoomMapper;
import com.chenrise.system.api.RemoteAppService;
import com.chenrise.system.api.RemoteDeviceService;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Value;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
import com.chenrise.jufe.mapper.SchoolRoomAudioInfoMapper;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.SchoolRoomAudioInfo;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.ISchoolRoomAudioInfoService;
import org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;
import javax.annotation.Resource;
/**
 * 教室音频设置Service业务层处理
 *
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2023-05-04
 */
@Service
public class SchoolRoomAudioInfoServiceImpl implements ISchoolRoomAudioInfoService
{
    @Autowired
    private SchoolRoomAudioInfoMapper schoolRoomAudioInfoMapper;
    @Autowired
    private SchoolRoomAudioRefMapper schoolRoomAudioRefMapper;
    @Autowired
    private SchoolRoomMapper schoolRoomMapper;
    @Autowired
    private RemoteAppService remoteAppService;
    @Resource
    private RemoteDeviceService remoteDeviceService;
    @Value("${file.path}")
    private String baseUrl;
    @Value("${file.prefix}")
    private String prefix;
    /**
     * 查询教室音频设置
     *
     * @param id 教室音频设置主键
     * @return 教室音频设置
     */
    @Override
    public SchoolRoomAudioInfoBo selectSchoolRoomAudioInfoById(Long id)
    {
        SchoolRoomAudioInfoBo info = schoolRoomAudioInfoMapper.selectSchoolRoomAudioInfoById(id);
        /** 教室信息 */
        List<SchoolRoom> roomRefs = schoolRoomMapper.selRefRoomInfosByAudioId(id) ;
        info.setRoomRefs(roomRefs);
        return info;
    }
    /**
     * 查询教室音频设置列表
     *
     * @param schoolRoomAudioInfo 教室音频设置
     * @return 教室音频设置
     */
    @Override
    public List<SchoolRoomAudioInfoBo> selectSchoolRoomAudioInfoList(SchoolRoomAudioInfo schoolRoomAudioInfo)
    {
        return schoolRoomAudioInfoMapper.selectSchoolRoomAudioInfoList(schoolRoomAudioInfo);
    }
    /**
     * 新增教室音频设置
     *
     * @param schoolRoomAudioInfoBo 教室音频设置
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    @Transactional
    public int insertSchoolRoomAudioInfo(SchoolRoomAudioInfoBo schoolRoomAudioInfoBo)
    {
        schoolRoomAudioInfoBo.setCreateById(SecurityUtils.getUserId());
        schoolRoomAudioInfoBo.setCreateBy(SecurityUtils.getUsername());
        schoolRoomAudioInfoBo.setCreateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        schoolRoomAudioInfoBo.setUpdateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        schoolRoomAudioInfoBo.setUploadUserId(SecurityUtils.getUserId());
        schoolRoomAudioInfoBo.setUploadUserName(SecurityUtils.getLoginUser().getSysUser().getNickName());
        schoolRoomAudioInfoMapper.insertSchoolRoomAudioInfo(schoolRoomAudioInfoBo);
        List<SchoolRoom> rooms = schoolRoomAudioInfoBo.getRoomRefs();
        if(rooms!=null&&rooms.size()>0){
            for(int i=0;i<rooms.size();i++){
                SchoolRoomAudioRef ref =new SchoolRoomAudioRef();
                ref.setRoomId(rooms.get(i).getRoomId());
                ref.setAudioId(schoolRoomAudioInfoBo.getId());
                ref.setAddTime(new Date());
                schoolRoomAudioRefMapper.insertSchoolRoomAudioRef(ref);
            }
        }
        return 1;
    }
    /**
     * 修改教室音频设置
     *
     * @param schoolRoomAudioInfoBo 教室音频设置
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    @Transactional
    public int updateSchoolRoomAudioInfo(SchoolRoomAudioInfoBo schoolRoomAudioInfoBo)
    {
        schoolRoomAudioInfoBo.setUpdateById(SecurityUtils.getUserId());
        schoolRoomAudioInfoBo.setUpdateBy(SecurityUtils.getUsername());
        schoolRoomAudioInfoBo.setCreateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        schoolRoomAudioInfoBo.setUpdateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        schoolRoomAudioInfoBo.setUploadUserId(SecurityUtils.getUserId());
        schoolRoomAudioInfoBo.setUploadUserName(SecurityUtils.getLoginUser().getSysUser().getNickName());
        schoolRoomAudioInfoMapper.updateSchoolRoomAudioInfo(schoolRoomAudioInfoBo);
        schoolRoomAudioRefMapper.deleteByAudioId(schoolRoomAudioInfoBo.getId());
        List<SchoolRoom> rooms = schoolRoomAudioInfoBo.getRoomRefs();
        if(rooms!=null&&rooms.size()>0){
            for(int i=0;i<rooms.size();i++){
                SchoolRoomAudioRef ref =new SchoolRoomAudioRef();
                ref.setRoomId(rooms.get(i).getRoomId());
                ref.setAudioId(schoolRoomAudioInfoBo.getId());
                ref.setAddTime(new Date());
                schoolRoomAudioRefMapper.insertSchoolRoomAudioRef(ref);
            }
        }
        return 1;
    }
    /**
     * 批量删除教室音频设置
     *
     * @param ids 需要删除的教室音频设置主键
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int deleteSchoolRoomAudioInfoByIds(Long[] ids)
    {
        return schoolRoomAudioInfoMapper.deleteSchoolRoomAudioInfoByIds(ids);
    }
    /**
     * 删除教室音频设置信息
     *
     * @param id 教室音频设置主键
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int deleteSchoolRoomAudioInfoById(Long id)
    {
        return schoolRoomAudioInfoMapper.deleteSchoolRoomAudioInfoById(id);
    }
    /**
     * @Description:播放或者停止播放音频
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-05-06 08:56:28
     * @param schoolRoomAudioInfoBo:
     * @return: int
     */
    @Override
    public int playSchoolRoomAudioInfo(SchoolRoomAudioInfoBo schoolRoomAudioInfoBo) {
        Integer resInt = 0;
        Integer playStatus = schoolRoomAudioInfoBo.getPlayStatus();
        List<String> ips = new ArrayList<>();
        if(playStatus!=null&&playStatus==0){
            ips = schoolRoomAudioInfoMapper.selectBoardIpsAll();
        }else{
            ips = schoolRoomAudioInfoMapper.selectBoardIpsByAudioId(schoolRoomAudioInfoBo.getId());
        }
        String ipsStr = "";
        if(ips!=null&&ips.size()>0){
            for(int i=0;i<ips.size();i++){
                ipsStr=ipsStr+ips.get(i);
                if(i!=ips.size()-1){
                    ipsStr=ipsStr+",";
                }
            }
            resInt = 1;
            schoolRoomAudioInfoBo.setIps(ips);
            Map<String,String> info = new HashMap<>();
            info.put("ips",ipsStr);
            String url ="";
            if(schoolRoomAudioInfoBo.getAudioUrl()!=null){
                url = schoolRoomAudioInfoBo.getAudioUrl();
//                        .split("/statics")[1];
            }
            schoolRoomAudioInfoBo.setAudioUrl(url);
            info.put("url",url);
            info.put("playStatus",String.valueOf(schoolRoomAudioInfoBo.getPlayStatus()));
            remoteAppService.playAudio(info);
        }
        return resInt;
    }
    /**
     * 扬声器播放
     * @param schoolRoomAudioInfoBo
     */
    @Override
    public void playAudioInfoOnSpeaker(SchoolRoomAudioInfoBo schoolRoomAudioInfoBo) {
        Map<String,Object> info = new HashMap<>();
        List<Integer> codes = schoolRoomAudioInfoMapper.selectSpeakerByAudioId(schoolRoomAudioInfoBo.getId());
        info.put("type",schoolRoomAudioInfoBo.getType());
        info.put("codes",codes);
        if(StringUtils.isNotEmpty(schoolRoomAudioInfoBo.getAudioUrl())){
            System.out.println("prefix--------------------->"+prefix);
            String url = baseUrl + StringUtils.substring(schoolRoomAudioInfoBo.getAudioUrl(),schoolRoomAudioInfoBo.getAudioUrl().indexOf(prefix)+prefix.length());
            System.out.println("----------------------------"+url);
            info.put("url",url);
        }
        info.put("text",schoolRoomAudioInfoBo.getText());
        info.put("volume",schoolRoomAudioInfoBo.getVolume());
        remoteDeviceService.playAudio(info);
    }
    @Override
    public void stopPlayInfoOnSpeaker(String type) {
        remoteDeviceService.stopPlay(type);
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.service.impl;
import cn.hutool.core.collection.CollectionUtil;
import cn.hutool.core.date.DateUtil;
import cn.hutool.core.util.StrUtil;
import cn.hutool.http.HttpRequest;
import cn.hutool.json.JSONUtil;
import com.alibaba.fastjson.JSONObject;
import com.chenrise.common.core.exception.ServiceException;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.DateUtils;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.StringUtils;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult;
import com.chenrise.common.security.utils.SecurityUtils;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.*;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.vo.DeviceInfoVO;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.vo.RoomInVO;
import com.chenrise.jufe.mapper.*;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.DeviceCommandService;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.ISchoolLocationService;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.ISchoolRoomService;
import com.chenrise.jufe.util.Tools;

import java.util.*;
