/**
 * 房间Service业务层处理
 *
 * @author liyiying
 * @date 2022-11-24
 */
@Service
public class SchoolRoomServiceImpl implements ISchoolRoomService
{
    @Resource
    private SchoolRoomMapper schoolRoomMapper;
    @Resource
    private SchoolRoomChargeRefMapper schoolRoomChargeRefMapper;
    @Resource
    private SchoolRoomRefMapper schoolRoomRefMapper;
    @Resource
    private DevClassBoardMapper devClassBoardMapper;
    @Resource
    private SchoolLocationMapper schoolLocationMapper;
    @Resource
    private DevLockInfoMapper devLockInfoMapper;
    @Resource
    private SchoolReservationInfoMapper schoolReservationInfoMapper;
    @Resource
    private DevLockConLogMapper devLockConLogMapper;
    @Resource
    private SchoolRoomUseTimeMapper schoolRoomUseTimeMapper;
    @Resource
    private DevPowerConLogMapper devPowerConLogMapper;
    @Resource
    private SchoolReservationInfoMapper reservationInfoMapper;
    @Resource
    private SchoolReservationTimeInfoMapper reservationTimeInfoMapper;
    @Resource
    private SchoolTimeSchedulingMapper timeSchedulingMapper;
    @Resource
    private DeviceCommandService deviceCommandService;
    @Resource
    private ISchoolLocationService iSchoolLocationService;
    @Resource
    private SchoolBaseSetInfoMapper baseSetInfoMapper;
    @Value("${cjdx.apis[0].apiKey}")
    private String kc_api_Key;
    @Value("${cjdx.apis[0].urls[2].url}")
    private String kc_labdetail;
    /**
     * 查询房间
     * @Description: 查询房间
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 16:45:53
     * @param roomId 房间主键
     * @return {@link SchoolRoom }
     */
    @Override
    public SchoolRoom selectSchoolRoomByRoomId(Long roomId)
    {
        return schoolRoomMapper.selectSchoolRoomByRoomId(roomId);
    }
    /**
     * 查询房间列表
     * @Description: 查询房间列表
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 16:45:49
     * @param schoolRoom 房间
     * @return {@link List }<{@link SchoolRoom }>
     */
    @Override
    public List<SchoolRoom> selectSchoolRoomList(SchoolRoom schoolRoom)
    {
        return schoolRoomMapper.selectSchoolRoomList(schoolRoom);
    }
    /**
     * 查询列表
     * @param schoolRoom 房间
     * @return
     */
    @Override
    public List<SchoolRoom> selectRoomList(SchoolRoom schoolRoom)
    {
        return schoolRoomMapper.selectRoomList(schoolRoom);
    }
    /**
     * 新增房间
     * @Description: 新增房间
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 16:45:44
     * @param schoolRoom 房间
     * @return int
     */
    @Override
    public int insertSchoolRoom(SchoolRoom schoolRoom) {
        schoolRoom.setCreateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        if (StringUtils.isBlank(schoolRoom.getRoomCode())){
            throw new ServiceException("教室编号不能为空！");
        }else{
            SchoolRoom ar_query = new SchoolRoom();
            ar_query.setRoomCode(schoolRoom.getRoomCode());
            List<SchoolRoom> coutnList = schoolRoomMapper.selectRoomList(ar_query);
            if(coutnList!=null&& coutnList.size()>0){
                throw new ServiceException("教室编号已占用！");
            }
        }
        if (StrUtil.isNotEmpty(schoolRoom.getSyncRoomCode())) {
            List<SchoolRoom> roomList = schoolRoomMapper.selectForCheckSyncRoomCode(schoolRoom.getSyncRoomCode(), null);
            if (CollectionUtil.isNotEmpty(roomList)) {
                throw new ServiceException("课表教室编号已占用！");
            }
        }
        int i = schoolRoomMapper.insertSchoolRoom(schoolRoom);
        //班牌
        if(schoolRoom.getBoardIds() != null){
            for(Long id:schoolRoom.getBoardIds()){
                DevClassBoard classBoard=devClassBoardMapper.selectDevClassBoardByBoardId(id);
                classBoard.setRoomId(schoolRoom.getRoomId());
                devClassBoardMapper.updateDevClassBoard(classBoard);
            }
        }
        //负责人
        if (schoolRoom.getPrincipal() != null && schoolRoom.getPrincipal().length >0){
            for (Long principal:schoolRoom.getPrincipal()
            ) {
                SchoolRoomChargeRef schoolRoomChargeRef = new SchoolRoomChargeRef();
                schoolRoomChargeRef.setChargeUserId(principal);
                schoolRoomChargeRef.setRoomId(schoolRoom.getRoomId());
                schoolRoomChargeRefMapper.insertSchoolRoomChargeRef(schoolRoomChargeRef);
            }
        }
        //电源
        if (schoolRoom.getRoomPowers() != null && schoolRoom.getRoomPowers().length >0){
            for (Long roomPowerId:schoolRoom.getRoomPowers()
            ) {
                SchoolRoomRef schoolRoomRef = new SchoolRoomRef();
                schoolRoomRef.setDeviceId(roomPowerId);
                schoolRoomRef.setDeviceType("2");
                schoolRoomRef.setRoomId(schoolRoom.getRoomId());
                schoolRoomRefMapper.insertSchoolRoomRef(schoolRoomRef);
            }
        }
        //门锁
        if (schoolRoom.getDoorLocks() != null && schoolRoom.getDoorLocks().length >0){
            for (Long lockId:schoolRoom.getDoorLocks()
            ) {
                SchoolRoomRef schoolRoomRef = new SchoolRoomRef();
                schoolRoomRef.setDeviceId(lockId);
                schoolRoomRef.setDeviceType("1");
                schoolRoomRef.setRoomId(schoolRoom.getRoomId());
                schoolRoomRefMapper.insertSchoolRoomRef(schoolRoomRef);
                DevLockInfo lockInfo = devLockInfoMapper.selectDevLockInfoByDeviceId(lockId);
                lockInfo.setRoomId(schoolRoom.getRoomId());
                devLockInfoMapper.updateDevLockInfo(lockInfo);
            }
        }
        return i;
    }
    /**
     * 修改房间
     * @Description: 修改房间
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 16:45:37
     * @param schoolRoom 房间
     * @return int
     */
    @Override
    public int updateSchoolRoom(SchoolRoom schoolRoom)
    {
        if (StrUtil.isNotEmpty(schoolRoom.getSyncRoomCode())) {
            List<SchoolRoom> roomList = schoolRoomMapper.selectForCheckSyncRoomCode(schoolRoom.getSyncRoomCode(), schoolRoom.getRoomId());
            if (CollectionUtil.isNotEmpty(roomList)) {
                throw new ServiceException("课表教室编号已占用！");
            }
        }
        schoolRoom.setUpdateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        if(StringUtils.isNotEmpty(schoolRoom.getIsReservation())&&"1".equals(schoolRoom.getIsReservation())){
            if(schoolRoom.getWeekDays()!=null&&schoolRoom.getWeekDays().length>0
            &&schoolRoom.getTimeRanges()!=null&&schoolRoom.getTimeRanges().length>0){
                schoolRoomUseTimeMapper.deleteByRoomId(schoolRoom.getRoomId());
                List<SchoolRoomUseTime> list = new ArrayList<>();
                for(String weekDay:schoolRoom.getWeekDays()){
                    for(String timeRange:schoolRoom.getTimeRanges()){
                        SchoolRoomUseTime sru = new SchoolRoomUseTime();
                        sru.setRoomId(schoolRoom.getRoomId());
                        sru.setWeekDay(weekDay);
                        String [] times = timeRange.split("~");
                        sru.setStartTimeInfo(times[0]);
                        sru.setEndTimeInfo(times[1]);
                        sru.setCreateById(SecurityUtils.getUserId());
                        sru.setCreateBy(SecurityUtils.getUsername());
                        sru.setCreateTime(new Date());
                        sru.setDelFlag(0L);
                        sru.setDeptId(SecurityUtils.getLoginUser().getSysUser().getDeptId());
                        list.add(sru);
                    }
                }
                schoolRoomUseTimeMapper.batchInsertSchoolRoomUseTime(list);
            }
        }
        else if(StringUtils.isNotEmpty(schoolRoom.getIsReservation())&&"2".equals(schoolRoom.getIsReservation())){
            schoolRoomUseTimeMapper.deleteByRoomId(schoolRoom.getRoomId());
        }
        else{
            /**
             * 非教室预约更新
             * */
            //更新班牌通过房间id
            devClassBoardMapper.updateDevClassBoardByRoomId(schoolRoom.getRoomId());
            //班牌
            if(schoolRoom.getBoardIds() != null){
                for(Long id:schoolRoom.getBoardIds()){
                    DevClassBoard classBoard=devClassBoardMapper.selectDevClassBoardByBoardId(id);
                    classBoard.setRoomId(schoolRoom.getRoomId());
                    devClassBoardMapper.updateDevClassBoard(classBoard);
                }
            }
            //删除负责人房间关联
            schoolRoomChargeRefMapper.deleteSchoolRoomChargeRefByRoomId(schoolRoom.getRoomId());
            //负责人
            if (schoolRoom.getPrincipal() != null && schoolRoom.getPrincipal().length >0){
                for (Long principal:schoolRoom.getPrincipal()
                ) {
                    SchoolRoomChargeRef schoolRoomChargeRef = new SchoolRoomChargeRef();
                    schoolRoomChargeRef.setChargeUserId(principal);
                    schoolRoomChargeRef.setRoomId(schoolRoom.getRoomId());
                    schoolRoomChargeRefMapper.insertSchoolRoomChargeRef(schoolRoomChargeRef);
                }
            }
            //删除学校房间refid
            schoolRoomRefMapper.deleteSchoolRoomRefByRoomId(schoolRoom.getRoomId());
            //电源
            if (schoolRoom.getRoomPowers() != null && schoolRoom.getRoomPowers().length >0){
                for (Long roomPowerId:schoolRoom.getRoomPowers()
                ) {
                    SchoolRoomRef schoolRoomRef = new SchoolRoomRef();
                    schoolRoomRef.setDeviceId(roomPowerId);
                    schoolRoomRef.setDeviceType("2");
                    schoolRoomRef.setRoomId(schoolRoom.getRoomId());
                    schoolRoomRefMapper.insertSchoolRoomRef(schoolRoomRef);
                }
            }
            //更新开发锁房间id信息
            devLockInfoMapper.updateDevLockInfoByRoomId(schoolRoom.getRoomId());
            //门锁
            if (schoolRoom.getDoorLocks() != null && schoolRoom.getDoorLocks().length >0){
                for (Long lockId:schoolRoom.getDoorLocks()
                ) {
                    SchoolRoomRef schoolRoomRef = new SchoolRoomRef();
                    schoolRoomRef.setDeviceId(lockId);
                    schoolRoomRef.setDeviceType("1");
                    schoolRoomRef.setRoomId(schoolRoom.getRoomId());
                    schoolRoomRefMapper.insertSchoolRoomRef(schoolRoomRef);
                    DevLockInfo lockInfo = devLockInfoMapper.selectDevLockInfoByDeviceId(lockId);
                    lockInfo.setRoomId(schoolRoom.getRoomId());
                    devLockInfoMapper.updateDevLockInfo(lockInfo);
                }
            }
        }
        return schoolRoomMapper.updateSchoolRoom(schoolRoom);
    }
    /**
     * 批量删除房间
     * @Description: 批量删除房间
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 16:45:32
     * @param roomIds 需要删除的房间主键
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @Override
    public AjaxResult deleteSchoolRoomByRoomIds(Long[] roomIds)
    {
        for (Long roomId:roomIds
             ) {
            if (schoolReservationInfoMapper.selectRoomReservationFlag(roomId) > 0){
                return AjaxResult.error("该教室被占用，暂不可删除");
            }else{
                devClassBoardMapper.updateDevClassBoardByRoomId(roomId);
                schoolRoomChargeRefMapper.deleteSchoolRoomChargeRefByRoomId(roomId);
                schoolRoomRefMapper.deleteSchoolRoomRefByRoomId(roomId);
                devLockInfoMapper.updateDevLockInfoByRoomId(roomId);
            }
        }
        return AjaxResult.success(schoolRoomMapper.deleteSchoolRoomByRoomIds(roomIds));
    }
    /**
     * 导入数据
     * @Description: 导入数据
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 11:10:58
     * @param list 列表
     * @param locationId 位置标识
     * @return {@link String }
     */
    @Override
    public String importData(List<RoomInVO> list, Long locationId){
        StringBuffer promptInformation = new StringBuffer();
//        promptInformation = this.checkData(list);
        List<Integer> err1 = new ArrayList<>();
//        List<Integer> err2 = new ArrayList<>();
        List<Integer> err3 = new ArrayList<>();
        List<Integer> err4 = new ArrayList<>();
        List<Integer> err5 = new ArrayList<>();
        List<Integer> err6 = new ArrayList<>();
        List<Integer> err7 = new ArrayList<>();
        List<Integer> err8 = new ArrayList<>();
        List<Integer> err9 = new ArrayList<>();
        List<Integer> err11 = new ArrayList<>();
        int count = 0;
        if (StringUtils.isBlank(promptInformation)) {
            for (int i = 0; i < list.size(); i++) {
                RoomInVO vo = list.get(i);
                SchoolRoom schoolRoom = new SchoolRoom();
                if (StringUtils.isBlank(vo.getRoomName())){
                    err1.add(i+1);
                    continue;
                }
//                if (vo.getSeatNum() == null){
//                    err2.add(i+1);
//                    continue;
//                }
                if (StringUtils.isBlank(vo.getChargeDeptName())){
                    err3.add(i+1);
                    continue;
                }
                if (StringUtils.isBlank(vo.getRoomCode())){
                    err8.add(i+1);
                    continue;
                }
                if (StringUtils.isNotBlank(vo.getRoomCode())){
                    if(vo.getRoomCode().length()>8){
                        err11.add(i+1);
                        continue;
                    }
                    SchoolRoom ar_query = new SchoolRoom();
                    ar_query.setRoomCode(vo.getRoomCode());
                    List<SchoolRoom> coutnList = schoolRoomMapper.selectRoomList(ar_query);
                    if(coutnList!=null&& coutnList.size()>0){
                        err9.add(i+1);
                        continue;
                    }
                }
                schoolRoom.setRoomCode(vo.getRoomCode());
                schoolRoom.setLocationId(locationId);
                schoolRoom.setRoomName(vo.getRoomName());
                schoolRoom.setSeatNum(vo.getSeatNum());
                //验证部门名称存在与否
                Long deptId = schoolRoomMapper.selectDeptIdByDeptName(vo.getChargeDeptName());
                if(deptId == null){
                    err4.add(i+1);
                    continue;
                }
                schoolRoom.setChargeDeptId(deptId);
                //班牌
                if (StringUtils.isNotBlank(vo.getBoardCodes())){
                    DevClassBoard classBoard = devClassBoardMapper.selectDevClassBoardByBoardCode(vo.getBoardCodes());
                    if(classBoard == null){
                        err5.add(i+1);
                        continue;
                    }
                    if("2".equals(classBoard.getStatus())){
                        err6.add(i+1);
                        continue;
                    }
                    if(classBoard.getRoomId() != null){
                        err7.add(i+1);
                        continue;
                    }
                    schoolRoom.setBoardIds(new Long[]{classBoard.getBoardId()});
                }
                schoolRoom.setSourceType("2");
                insertSchoolRoom(schoolRoom);
                if(schoolRoom.getBoardIds() != null){
                    for(Long id:schoolRoom.getBoardIds()){
                        DevClassBoard classBoard=devClassBoardMapper.selectDevClassBoardByBoardId(id);
                        classBoard.setRoomId(schoolRoom.getRoomId());
                        devClassBoardMapper.updateDevClassBoard(classBoard);
                    }
                }
                count++;
            }
            if (count == list.size()) {
                promptInformation.append("全部导入成功！");
                promptInformation.append("共导入{"+list.size()+"}条，导入成功{"+count+"}条，导入失败{"+(list.size()-count)+"}条" + "</br>");
            }else{
                promptInformation.append("共导入{"+list.size()+"}条，导入成功{"+count+"}条，导入失败{"+(list.size()-count)+"}条" + "</br>");
                promptInformation.append("失败原因如下：" + "</br>");
                if (err1.size() >0){
                    promptInformation.append("第"+err1.toString()+"条,教室名称不能为空,导入失败。" + "</br>");
                }
//                if (err2.size() >0){
//                    promptInformation.append("第"+err2.toString()+"条,可容纳人数为空或格式错误,导入失败。" + "</br>");
//                }
                if (err3.size() >0){
                    promptInformation.append("第"+err3.toString()+"条,所属部门不能为空,导入失败。" + "</br>");
                }
                if (err4.size() >0){
                    promptInformation.append("第"+err4.toString()+"条,所属部门不存在,导入失败。" + "</br>");
                }
                if (err5.size() >0){
                    promptInformation.append("第"+err5.toString()+"条,班牌不存在,导入失败。" + "</br>");
                }
                if (err6.size() >0){
                    promptInformation.append("第"+err6.toString()+"条,班牌已停用,导入失败。" + "</br>");
                }
                if (err7.size() >0){
                    promptInformation.append("第"+err7.toString()+"条,班牌已使用,导入失败。" + "</br>");
                }
                if (err8.size() >0){
                    promptInformation.append("第"+err8.toString()+"条,教室编号不能为空,导入失败。" + "</br>");
                }
                if (err11.size() >0){
                    promptInformation.append("第"+err11.toString()+"条,教室编号最大为8位,导入失败。" + "</br>");
                }
                if (err9.size() >0){
                    promptInformation.append("第"+err9.toString()+"条,教室编号已使用,导入失败。" + "</br>");
                }
            }
        }
        return promptInformation.toString();
    }
    /**
     * 批处理设置
     * @Description: 批处理设置
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 15:42:49
     * @param schoolRoom 学校房间
     * @return int
     */
    @Override
    public int batchSet(SchoolRoom schoolRoom){
        //负责人
        if (schoolRoom.getPrincipal() != null && schoolRoom.getPrincipal().length >0){
            for (Long roomId:schoolRoom.getIds()){
                //删除负责人房间关联
                schoolRoomChargeRefMapper.deleteSchoolRoomChargeRefByRoomId(roomId);
                for (Long principal:schoolRoom.getPrincipal()
                ) {
                    SchoolRoomChargeRef schoolRoomChargeRef = new SchoolRoomChargeRef();
                    schoolRoomChargeRef.setChargeUserId(principal);
                    schoolRoomChargeRef.setRoomId(roomId);
                    schoolRoomChargeRefMapper.insertSchoolRoomChargeRef(schoolRoomChargeRef);
                }
            }
        }
        //部门
        if (schoolRoom.getChargeDeptId() != null){
            schoolRoomMapper.batchSet(schoolRoom);
        }
        return 1;
    }
    /**
     * 查询教室控制
     * @Description: 查询教室控制
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-11-30 11:08:58
     * @param schoolRoom 学校房间
     * @return {@link List }<{@link Map }<{@link String }, {@link Object }>>
     */
    @Override
    public List<Map<String,Object>> selectDeviceStatisticsList(SchoolRoom schoolRoom){
        List<String> amdinFlagList = SecurityUtils.getLoginUser().getRoles().stream().filter(roole -> "admin".equals(roole) || "mastercontrol".equals(roole)).collect(Collectors.toList());
        schoolRoom.setUserId(amdinFlagList.size() == 0 ? SecurityUtils.getUserId() : 0L);
        return schoolRoomMapper.selectDeviceStatisticsList(schoolRoom);
    }
    /**
     * 查询教室控制计数
     * @Description: 查询教室控制计数
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-11-30 13:10:00
     * @param schoolRoom 学校房间
     * @return {@link Map }<{@link String }, {@link Object }>
     */
    @Override
    public Map<String,Object> selectDeviceStatisticsCount(SchoolRoom schoolRoom){
        // 去掉权限，与列表保持一致
        List<String> amdinFlagList = SecurityUtils.getLoginUser().getRoles().stream().filter(roole -> "admin".equals(roole) || "mastercontrol".equals(roole)).collect(Collectors.toList());
        schoolRoom.setUserId(amdinFlagList.size() == 0 ? SecurityUtils.getUserId() : 0L);
        return schoolRoomMapper.selectDeviceStatisticsCount(schoolRoom);
    }
    /**
     * @Description:课程控制门锁设备
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-02-20 08:11:52
     * @param type:
     * @param roomIds:
     * @param courseName:
     * @return: void
     */
    @Override
    public void updateLockForCourse(Long type, Long[] roomIds, String courseName) {
        Long userId = 0L;
        List<Map<String,Object>> list = schoolRoomMapper.selectUpdateLock(null, roomIds,null,userId,"2","1");
        if(list==null||list.size()==0){
            return;
        }
        int returnNum = schoolRoomMapper.updateLock(null,type==2L?2L:1L, roomIds,null,userId,"2","1");
        for (Map<String,Object> map:list) {
            System.out.println("开课打开"+map.get("roomId")+"的门锁，门锁名称为："+map.get("device_name"));
            String device_id = map.get("device_id")+"";
            String deviceType = map.get("device_type")+"";
            if (type == 1L){
                //开
                deviceCommandService.openLockById(Long.valueOf(device_id), "1","4",courseName,5*60L);
            }else if (type == 2L){
                //关
                if(deviceType!=null&&!deviceType.equals("2")){
                    deviceCommandService.openLockById(Long.valueOf(device_id),"2","4",courseName,0L);
                }
            }else {
                //常开
                if(deviceType!=null&&!deviceType.equals("2")) {
                    deviceCommandService.openLockById(Long.valueOf(device_id), "1","4",courseName,24*60*60L);
                }
            }
            System.out.println("开课打开"+map.get("roomId")+"的门锁，门锁名称为："+map.get("device_name")+",打开完毕！");
        }
    }
    /**
     * 门锁总控-修改门锁状态
     * @Description: 门锁总控-修改门锁状态
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-11-30 14:31:03
     * @param locationId 位置标识
     * @param type 类型 1:开2:关 3:常开
     * @param roomIds ids
     * @param operateType 操作来源
     * @return int
     */
    @Override
    public int updateLock(Long locationId, Long type, Long[] roomIds,Long[] ids, String operateType){
        Long userId = 0L;
        if(!"2".equals(operateType)){
            List<String> amdinFlagList = SecurityUtils.getLoginUser().getRoles().stream().filter(roole->"admin".equals(roole)||"mastercontrol".equals(roole)).collect(Collectors.toList());
            userId = amdinFlagList.size() == 0?SecurityUtils.getUserId():0L;
        }
        String deviceLockType = null;
        if(type==3L||type==1L){
            deviceLockType="2";
        }
        List<Map<String,Object>> list = schoolRoomMapper.selectUpdateLock(locationId, roomIds,ids,userId,operateType,deviceLockType);
        if(list==null||list.size()==0){
            throw new ServiceException("教室内无可操作门锁！");
        }
        int returnNum = schoolRoomMapper.updateLock(locationId,type==2L?2L:1L, roomIds,ids,userId,operateType,deviceLockType);
        for (Map<String,Object> map:list
        ) {
            String device_id = map.get("device_id")+"";
            String deviceType = map.get("device_type")+"";
            //设备命令下发
            if (type == 1L){
                //开
                deviceCommandService.openLockById(Long.valueOf(device_id), "1",operateType,"",5*60L);
//                deviceCommandService.openLockOneTimeById(Long.valueOf(device_id),operateType,"");
            }else if (type == 2L){
                //关
                if(deviceType!=null&&!deviceType.equals("2")){
                    deviceCommandService.openLockById(Long.valueOf(device_id),"2",operateType,"",0L);
                }
            }else {
                //常开
                if(deviceType!=null&&!deviceType.equals("2")) {
                    deviceCommandService.openLockById(Long.valueOf(device_id), "1",operateType,"",24*60*60L);
                }
            }
        }
        return 1;
    }
    /**
     * @Description:定时任务控制空开
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-03-09 09:37:17
     * @param type:
     * @param roomIds:
     * @return: void
     */
    @Override
    public void updatePowerNodeForTask(Long type, Long[] roomIds) {
        Long userId = 0L;
        Long deviceNodeType = null;
        Long isWhite  = 2L;
        List<Map<String,Object>> list = schoolRoomMapper.selectUpdatePowerNode(null, roomIds,null,deviceNodeType,isWhite,userId,null);
        if(list==null||list.size()==0){
            throw new ServiceException("教室内无可操作的空开！");
        }
        schoolRoomMapper.updatePowerNode(null,type,roomIds,null,userId,deviceNodeType,isWhite);
        for (Map<String,Object> map:list
        ) {
            String power_id = map.get("power_id")+"";
            String device_id = map.get("device_id")+"";
            String room_id = map.get("room_id")+"";
            String node_type = map.get("node_type")+"";
            String onoff_status = map.get("onoff_status")+"";
            DevPowerConLog powerConLog = new DevPowerConLog();
            powerConLog.setPowerId(Long.valueOf(power_id));
            powerConLog.setPowerCode(map.get("power_code")+"");
            powerConLog.setPowerName(map.get("power_name")+"");
            powerConLog.setDeviceId(Long.valueOf(device_id));
            powerConLog.setDeviceCode(map.get("device_code")+"");
            powerConLog.setDeviceName(map.get("device_name")+"");
            powerConLog.setRoomId(Long.valueOf(room_id));
            powerConLog.setRoomCode(map.get("room_code")+"");
            powerConLog.setRoomName(map.get("room_name")+"");
            powerConLog.setOperation((type.toString().equals("2") | type.toString().equals("4") | type.toString().equals("6")) ? "1" : "0");
            if(onoff_status.equals(powerConLog.getOperation())){
                continue;
            }
            powerConLog.setOperTime(new Date());
            powerConLog.setControlType("7");
            powerConLog.setCreateTime(new Date());
            powerConLog.setUpdateTime(new Date());
            powerConLog.setNodeType((String) map.getOrDefault("node_type", ""));
            powerConLog.setOperUserName("系统");
            devPowerConLogMapper.insertDevPowerConLog(powerConLog);
            //设备命令下发
            String status = "0";
            if (type == 2L || type == 6L) {
                status = "1";
            }
            deviceCommandService.powerControl(Long.valueOf(device_id),status);
        }
    }
    /**
     * @Description:课程控制设备电源开关
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-02-20 07:37:10
     * @param type:
     * @param roomIds:
     * @param courseName:
     * @return: void
     */
    @Override
    public void updatePowerNodeForCourse(Long type, Long[] roomIds, String courseName) {
        Long userId = 0L;
        Long deviceNodeType = null;
        Long isWhite  = 2L;
        List<Map<String,Object>> list = schoolRoomMapper.selectUpdatePowerNode(null, roomIds,null,deviceNodeType,isWhite,userId,null);
        if(list==null||list.size()==0){
            return ;
        }
        // 20260211 注释掉开关电即刻修改空开状态
        //schoolRoomMapper.updatePowerNode(null,type,roomIds,null,userId,deviceNodeType,isWhite);
        for (Map<String,Object> map:list
        ) {
            String power_id = map.get("power_id")+"";
            String device_id = map.get("device_id")+"";
            String room_id = map.get("room_id")+"";
            String node_type = map.get("node_type")+"";
            String onoff_status = map.get("onoff_status")+"";
            DevPowerConLog powerConLog = new DevPowerConLog();
            powerConLog.setPowerId(Long.valueOf(power_id));
            powerConLog.setPowerCode(map.get("power_code")+"");
            powerConLog.setPowerName(map.get("power_name")+"");
            powerConLog.setDeviceId(Long.valueOf(device_id));
            powerConLog.setDeviceCode(map.get("device_code")+"");
            powerConLog.setDeviceName(map.get("device_name")+"");
            powerConLog.setRoomId(Long.valueOf(room_id));
            powerConLog.setRoomCode(map.get("room_code")+"");
            powerConLog.setRoomName(map.get("room_name")+"");
            powerConLog.setOperation((type.toString().equals("2") | type.toString().equals("4") | type.toString().equals("6")) ? "1" : "0");
//            if(onoff_status.equals(powerConLog.getOperation())){
//                continue;
//            }
            powerConLog.setOperTime(new Date());
            powerConLog.setControlType("4");
            powerConLog.setCreateTime(new Date());
            powerConLog.setUpdateTime(new Date());
            powerConLog.setNodeType((String) map.getOrDefault("node_type", ""));
            powerConLog.setOperUserName("系统");
            powerConLog.setCourseName(courseName);
            devPowerConLogMapper.insertDevPowerConLog(powerConLog);
            //设备命令下发
            String status = "0";
            if (type == 2L || type == 6L) {
                status = "1";
            }
            deviceCommandService.powerControl(Long.valueOf(device_id),status);
        }
    }
    /**
     * 电源总控-修改电源状态
     * @Description: 电源总控-修改电源状态
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-11-30 14:17:18
     * @param locationId 位置标识
     * @param type 类型 1:全闭子空开2:打开子空开3:全闭总空开4:打开总空开
     * @param roomIds 房间ids
     * @param ids ids
     * @param operateType 操作类型 2 定时任务 只修改子空开
     * @return int
     */
    @Override
    public AjaxResult updatePowerNode(Long locationId, Long type, Long[] roomIds, Long[] ids, String operateType,Long isBatch){
        Long userId = 0L;
        String resultMsg = "修改成功";
        Long deviceNodeType = null;
        if("2".equals(operateType)){
            deviceNodeType = 4L;
        }else{
            List<String> amdinFlagList = SecurityUtils.getLoginUser().getRoles().stream().filter(roole->"admin".equals(roole)||"mastercontrol".equals(roole)).collect(Collectors.toList());
            userId = amdinFlagList.size() == 0?SecurityUtils.getUserId():0L;
        }
        Long isWhite = (userId == 0L && deviceNodeType == null)?0L:2L;
        if(type!=null&&(type==1L||type==2L)){
            isWhite = 2L;
        }
        if(isBatch!=null&&isBatch==0L&&userId == 0L ){
            isWhite = 0L;
        }
        List<Map<String,Object>> list = schoolRoomMapper.selectUpdatePowerNode(locationId, roomIds,ids,deviceNodeType,isWhite,userId,type);
        if(list==null||list.size()==0){
            throw new ServiceException("教室内无可操作的空开！");
        }
        int isWhiteSize = (userId == 0L)?0:schoolRoomMapper.selectUpdatePowerNode(locationId, roomIds,ids,deviceNodeType,1L,userId,type).size();
        for (Map<String,Object> map:list
        ) {
            String power_id = map.get("power_id")+"";
            String device_id = map.get("device_id")+"";
            String room_id = map.get("room_id")+"";
            String node_type = map.get("node_type")+"";
            String onoff_status = map.get("onoff_status")+"";
            DevPowerConLog powerConLog = new DevPowerConLog();
            powerConLog.setPowerId(Long.valueOf(power_id));
            powerConLog.setPowerCode(map.get("power_code")+"");
            powerConLog.setPowerName(map.get("power_name")+"");
            powerConLog.setDeviceId(Long.valueOf(device_id));
            powerConLog.setDeviceCode(map.get("device_code")+"");
            powerConLog.setDeviceName(map.get("device_name")+"");
            powerConLog.setRoomId(Long.valueOf(room_id));
            powerConLog.setRoomCode(map.get("room_code")+"");
            powerConLog.setRoomName(map.get("room_name")+"");
            powerConLog.setOperation((type.toString().equals("2")|type.toString().equals("4"))?"1":"0");
            if(onoff_status.equals(powerConLog.getOperation())){
                continue;
            }
            powerConLog.setOperTime(new Date());
            powerConLog.setControlType(operateType);
            powerConLog.setCreateTime(new Date());
            powerConLog.setUpdateTime(new Date());
            powerConLog.setNodeType(node_type);
            if(!"2".equals(operateType)){
                powerConLog.setOperUserId(SecurityUtils.getUserId());
                powerConLog.setOperUserNum(SecurityUtils.getUsername());
                powerConLog.setOperUserName(SecurityUtils.getLoginUser().getSysUser().getNickName());
                powerConLog.setCreateById(SecurityUtils.getUserId());
                powerConLog.setUpdateById(SecurityUtils.getUserId());
            }else{
                powerConLog.setOperUserName("系统");
            }
            devPowerConLogMapper.insertDevPowerConLog(powerConLog);
        }
        int i = schoolRoomMapper.updatePowerNode(locationId,type,roomIds,ids,userId,deviceNodeType,isWhite);
        for (Map<String,Object> map:list
        ) {
            String device_id = map.get("device_id")+"";
            //设备命令下发
            String status = "0";
            if (type == 2L || type == 4L){
                status = "1";
            }
            deviceCommandService.powerControl(Long.valueOf(device_id),status);
        }
        if (i == 0){
            if (isWhiteSize >0){
                resultMsg = "已存在于电源白名单，无法修改。";
            }else{
                resultMsg = "无效操作，无可修改设备。";
            }
        }else{
            if (isWhiteSize >0){
                resultMsg = "修改成功";
            }else{
                resultMsg = "修改成功";
            }
        }
        return new AjaxResult(200,resultMsg);
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 根据房间获取可预约时间段
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/05
     * @param roomId
     * @return {@link List }<{@link Map }<{@link String },{@link Object }>>
     */
    public List<Map<String,Object>> detail(Long roomId,String applyDate) throws ParseException {
        SchoolBaseSetInfo setInfo = baseSetInfoMapper.selectSchoolBaseSetInfoById(1L);
        List<Map<String,Object>> result = new ArrayList<>();
        SchoolRoom schoolRoom = schoolRoomMapper.selectSchoolRoomByRoomId(roomId);
        if(DateUtil.parse(applyDate,"yyyy-MM-dd").getTime()> (DateUtil.beginOfDay(new Date()).getTime()+setInfo.getReservationTime()*24*60*60*1000)){
            throw new ServiceException("仅可提前"+setInfo.getReservationTime()+"天预约该教室!");
        }
        Date applyDate1 = DateUtils.parseDate(applyDate,"yyyy-MM-dd");
        Calendar cal = Calendar.getInstance();
        cal.set(Calendar.HOUR,0);
        cal.set(Calendar.MINUTE,0);
        cal.set(Calendar.SECOND,0);
        int day = cal.get(Calendar.DATE);
        cal.set(Calendar.DATE,day+setInfo.getReservationTime().intValue());
        /** 查询 教室可预约时间段 */
        Calendar now = Calendar.getInstance();
        now.setTime(applyDate1);
        SchoolRoomUseTime sru_query = new SchoolRoomUseTime();
        sru_query.setRoomId(roomId);
        //一周第一天是否为星期天
        boolean isFirstSunday = (now.getFirstDayOfWeek() == Calendar.SUNDAY);
        //获取周几
        int weekDay = now.get(Calendar.DAY_OF_WEEK);
        //若一周第一天为星期天，则-1
        if(isFirstSunday){
            weekDay = weekDay - 1;
//            if(weekDay == 0){
//                weekDay = 7;
//            }
        }
        sru_query.setWeekDay(weekDay+"");
        List<SchoolRoomUseTime> roomUseTimes = schoolRoomUseTimeMapper.selectSchoolRoomUseTimeList(sru_query);
        /** 查询预约日期 课表 */
        SchoolTimeScheduling sts_query = new SchoolTimeScheduling();
        sts_query.setRoomId(roomId);
        sts_query.setCourseDate(applyDate1);
        List<SchoolTimeScheduling> timeSchedulings = timeSchedulingMapper.selectSchoolTimeSchedulingList(sts_query);
        /** 查询预约日期 所有预约*/
        SchoolReservationInfo sri_query = new SchoolReservationInfo();
        sri_query.setRoomId(roomId);
        sri_query.setReservationDate(applyDate1);
        sri_query.getParams().put("unrefuse",true);
        List<SchoolReservationInfo> reservationInfos = reservationInfoMapper.selectSchoolReservationInfoList(sri_query);
        if(roomUseTimes==null||roomUseTimes.size()==0){
            throw new ServiceException("无可预约时间段！");
        }
        useTime:for(SchoolRoomUseTime st:roomUseTimes){
            Map<String,Object> map = new HashMap<>();
            map.put("time",st.getStartTimeInfo()+"~"+st.getEndTimeInfo());
            map.put("occupyStatus",1);
            if(applyDate1.after(cal.getTime())){
                map.put("occupyStatus",4);
                map.put("personNum",schoolRoom.getSeatNum());
                result.add(map);
                continue ;
            }
            //判断预约时间段 和当前时间的大小 小于当前时间的预约时间段不可用
            Date use_start = DateUtils.parseDate(applyDate+" "+st.getStartTimeInfo(),"yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm");
            Date use_end = DateUtils.parseDate(applyDate+" "+st.getEndTimeInfo(),"yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm");
            if(new Date().after(use_start)||new Date().after(use_end)){
                map.put("occupyStatus",4);
                map.put("personNum",schoolRoom.getSeatNum());
                result.add(map);
                continue ;
            }
            //判断是否被课表占用
            for(SchoolTimeScheduling ts:timeSchedulings){
                if((ts.getStartTime().compareTo(st.getStartTimeInfo())>=0&&ts.getStartTime().compareTo(st.getEndTimeInfo())<=0)||
                        (ts.getEndTime().compareTo(st.getStartTimeInfo())>=0&&ts.getEndTime().compareTo(st.getEndTimeInfo())<=0)||
                        (ts.getStartTime().compareTo(st.getStartTimeInfo())<=0&&ts.getEndTime().compareTo(st.getEndTimeInfo())>=0)){
                    map.put("occupyStatus",3);
                    map.put("personNum",schoolRoom.getSeatNum());
                    result.add(map);
                    continue useTime;
                }
            }
            long personNum = 0;
            for(SchoolReservationInfo sri:reservationInfos){
                SchoolReservationTimeInfo srt_query = new SchoolReservationTimeInfo();
                srt_query.setReservationId(sri.getReservationId());
                srt_query.setReservationStartTime(st.getStartTimeInfo());
                srt_query.setReservationEndTime(st.getEndTimeInfo());
                List<SchoolReservationTimeInfo> srtList = reservationTimeInfoMapper.selectSchoolReservationTimeInfoList(srt_query);
                if(srtList!=null&&srtList.size()>0){
                    if("2".equals(schoolRoom.getRoomType())){
                        map.put("occupyStatus",2);
                    }
                    personNum += sri.getUserCount();
                }
            }
            if("1".equals(schoolRoom.getRoomType())){
                if(personNum>=schoolRoom.getSeatNum()){
                    map.put("occupyStatus",2);
                }
            }
            map.put("personNum",schoolRoom.getSeatNum()-personNum);
            result.add(map);
        }
        return result;
    }
    /**

     * 查询教室列表 对外接口

    {
        List<String> amdinFlagList = SecurityUtils.getLoginUser().getRoles().stream().filter(roole->"admin".equals(roole)||"mastercontrol".equals(roole)).collect(Collectors.toList());
        schoolRoom.setUserId(amdinFlagList.size() == 0?SecurityUtils.getUserId():0L);
        return schoolRoomMapper.selectSchoolRoomListToApp(schoolRoom);
    }
    /**
     * @Description:导入教室设置信息
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-01-11 15:21:33
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @Override
    public AjaxResult importApiRoomInfo() {
        List<Map> roomList = new ArrayList<>();
        try{
            JSONObject object = new JSONObject();
            String res = HttpRequest.post(kc_labdetail)
                    .header("Authorization-Type","Apikey")
                    .header("Authorization",kc_api_Key)
                    .header("Content-Type","application/x-www-form-urlencoded")
                    .body(String.valueOf(object))
                    .execute().body();
            Map<String,Map<String,List<Map>>> data = JSONUtil.toBean(res, Map.class, false);
            Map dataMap = data.get("data");
            roomList = (List<Map>) dataMap.get("list");
        }catch (Exception e){
            e.printStackTrace();
        }
        if(roomList!=null && roomList.size()>0){
            for(int i=0;i<roomList.size();i++){
                try{
                    Map roomMap = roomList.get(i);
                    SchoolRoom room = new SchoolRoom();
                    Long roomId = Long.parseLong(String.valueOf(roomMap.get("room_id")).replace("_",""));
                    Integer count = schoolRoomMapper.selectCountInfoByRoomId(roomId);
                    room.setRoomId(roomId);
                    room.setRoomCode(String.valueOf(roomId));
//                    room.setSeatNum(Long.parseLong(String.valueOf(roomMap.get("zws"))));
                    room.setSquare(Long.parseLong(String.valueOf(roomMap.get("mj"))));
                    room.setRoomName((String) roomMap.get("mc"));
                    String lq = (String) roomMap.get("lq");
                    Long lc = Long.parseLong(  String.valueOf(roomMap.get("lc")));
                    Long locationId = this.getLocationFloorId(lq,lc);
                    room.setLocationId(locationId);
                    room.setCategory((String) roomMap.get("lb"));
                    room.setCategorySub((String) roomMap.get("lb_sub"));
                    room.setUnitCode((String) roomMap.get("dwdm"));
                    room.setRoomBm((String) roomMap.get("bm"));
                    room.setComputersNum(Long.parseLong(String.valueOf( roomMap.get("dns"))));
                    String ifDmt = (String) roomMap.get("if_dmt");
                    room.setIsMultimedia(Tools.getIsOrNot((String) roomMap.get("if_dmt")));
                    String isMultiplex = Tools.getIsOrNot((String) roomMap.get("if_fy"));
                    room.setIsMultiplex(isMultiplex);
                    room.setIsSchedule(Tools.getIsOrNot((String) roomMap.get("if_pk")));
                    room.setChargeDeptId(Long.parseLong("100"+(String) roomMap.get("dwdm")));
                    if(isMultiplex!=null&&isMultiplex.equals("1")){
                        room.setRoomType("1");
                    }else{
                        room.setRoomType("2");
                    }
                    room.setSourceType("1");
                    if(count!=null&&count>0){
                        schoolRoomMapper.updateSchoolRoom(room);
                    }else{
                        schoolRoomMapper.insertSchoolRoom(room);
                    }
                }catch (Exception e){
                    e.printStackTrace();
                }
            }
        }
        return AjaxResult.success("");
    }
    private Long getLocationFloorId(String locationName,Long locationFloor){
        if(StringUtils.isEmpty(locationName)){
            locationName="未命名楼栋";
        }
        //查下楼栋名称
        SchoolLocation location = schoolLocationMapper.selectSchoolLocationByLocationName(locationName);
        if(location == null){
            SchoolLocation schoolLocation = new SchoolLocation();
            schoolLocation.setLocationName(locationName);
            schoolLocation.setDataSources("1");
            schoolLocation.setParentId(1L);
            schoolLocation.setLocaltionNum(schoolLocationMapper.selectLocaltionNumMax());
            schoolLocation.setCreateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
            schoolLocation.setAncestors("0," + schoolLocation.getParentId().toString());
            schoolLocation.setCreateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
            schoolLocationMapper.insertSchoolLocation(schoolLocation);
            SchoolLocation insertThreeLever = new SchoolLocation();
            insertThreeLever.setLocationName(locationName + "-" +locationFloor + "楼");
            insertThreeLever.setLocationFloor(locationFloor);
            insertThreeLever.setParentId(schoolLocation.getLocationId());
            insertThreeLever.setDataSources("1");
            insertThreeLever.setLocaltionNum(schoolLocationMapper.selectLocaltionNumMax());
            insertThreeLever.setAncestors(schoolLocation.getAncestors() +  "," + schoolLocation.getLocationId());
            schoolLocationMapper.insertSchoolLocation(insertThreeLever);
            return insertThreeLever.getLocationId();
        }else {
            SchoolLocation schoolLocation = new SchoolLocation();
            SchoolLocation floorLocation = schoolLocationMapper.selectSchoolLocationByLocationLc(location.getLocationId(),locationFloor);
            if(1L == location.getParentId() && floorLocation == null){
                schoolLocation.setLocationName(locationName + "-" +locationFloor + "楼");
                schoolLocation.setLocationFloor(locationFloor);
                schoolLocation.setParentId(location.getLocationId());
                schoolLocation.setDataSources("1");
                schoolLocation.setCreateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
                schoolLocation.setLocaltionNum(schoolLocationMapper.selectLocaltionNumMax());
                schoolLocationMapper.insertSchoolLocation(schoolLocation);
                schoolLocation.setAncestors(location.getAncestors() + "," + schoolLocation.getLocationId());
                schoolLocationMapper.updateSchoolLocation(schoolLocation);
                return schoolLocation.getLocationId();
            }else if(floorLocation != null){
                return floorLocation.getLocationId();
            }else{
                return 0L;
            }
        }
    }
    /**
     * @Description:查询当前人是否未当前教室负责人
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-01-13 12:44:19
     * @param userId:
     * @param ip:

    @Override
    public Integer selectRoomChargeByUserId(Long userId, String ip) {
        DevClassBoard board = devClassBoardMapper.selectDevClassBoardByBoardIp(ip);
        Integer countInfo = 0;
        if(board!=null && board.getRoomId()!=null){
            Long roomId = board.getRoomId();
            countInfo = schoolRoomMapper.selectRoomChargeByUserId(roomId,userId);
        }
        return countInfo;
    }

    /**
     * @Description:选择部分空开进行控制
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-01-19 13:06:39
     * @param locationId:
     * @param type:
     * @param roomIds:
     * @param ids:
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @Override
    public AjaxResult updatePowerNodeSelect(Long locationId, Long type, Long[] roomIds, Long[] ids, String operateType) {
        if(ids ==null || ids.length==0){
            return new AjaxResult(200,"当前没有选择空开");
        }
        String resultMsg = "修改成功";
        List<Map<String,Object>> list = schoolRoomMapper.selectUpdatePowerNode(null, null,ids,null,null,null,null);
        for (Map<String,Object> map:list
        ) {
            String power_id = map.get("power_id")+"";
            String device_id = map.get("device_id")+"";
            String room_id = map.get("room_id")+"";
            String node_type = map.get("node_type")+"";
            DevPowerConLog powerConLog = new DevPowerConLog();
            powerConLog.setPowerId(Long.valueOf(power_id));
            powerConLog.setPowerCode(map.get("power_code")+"");
            powerConLog.setPowerName(map.get("power_name")+"");
            powerConLog.setDeviceId(Long.valueOf(device_id));
            powerConLog.setDeviceCode(map.get("device_code")+"");
            powerConLog.setDeviceName(map.get("device_name")+"");
            powerConLog.setRoomId(Long.valueOf(room_id));
            powerConLog.setRoomCode(map.get("room_code")+"");
            powerConLog.setRoomName(map.get("room_name")+"");
            powerConLog.setOperation((type.toString().equals("2")|type.toString().equals("4"))?"1":"0");
            powerConLog.setOperTime(new Date());
            powerConLog.setControlType(operateType);
            powerConLog.setCreateTime(new Date());
            powerConLog.setUpdateTime(new Date());
            powerConLog.setNodeType(node_type);
            if(!"2".equals(operateType)){
                powerConLog.setOperUserId(SecurityUtils.getUserId());
                powerConLog.setOperUserNum(SecurityUtils.getUsername());
                powerConLog.setOperUserName(SecurityUtils.getLoginUser().getSysUser().getNickName());
                powerConLog.setCreateById(SecurityUtils.getUserId());
                powerConLog.setUpdateById(SecurityUtils.getUserId());
            }else{
                powerConLog.setOperUserName("系统");
            }
            devPowerConLogMapper.insertDevPowerConLog(powerConLog);
        }
        schoolRoomMapper.updatePowerNodeSelected( ids,Long.parseLong(String.valueOf(type)));
        for (Map<String,Object> map:list
        ) {
            String device_id = map.get("device_id")+"";
            String status = String.valueOf(type);
            deviceCommandService.powerControl(Long.valueOf(device_id),status);
        }
        return new AjaxResult(200,resultMsg);
    }
    @Override
    public void updateLockForGoToClass(Long type, Long[] roomIds, String courseName) {
        Long userId = 0L;
        List<Map<String, Object>> list = schoolRoomMapper.selectUpdateLock(null, roomIds, null, userId, "2", "1");
        if (list == null || list.size() == 0) {
            return;
        }
        for (Map<String, Object> map : list) {
            DevLockInfo devLockInfo = devLockInfoMapper.selectDevLockInfoByDeviceId(Long.parseLong(String.valueOf(map.get("device_id"))));
            if ("1".equals(devLockInfo.getOpenStatus())) {
                continue;
            }
            System.out.println("开课打开" + map.get("roomId") + "的门锁，门锁名称为：" + map.get("device_name"));
            String device_id = map.get("device_id") + "";
            String deviceType = map.get("device_type") + "";
            if (type == 1L) {
                //开
                deviceCommandService.openLockById(Long.valueOf(device_id), "1", "4", courseName, 5 * 60L);
            } else if (type == 2L) {
                //关
                if (deviceType != null && !deviceType.equals("2")) {
                    deviceCommandService.openLockById(Long.valueOf(device_id), "2", "4", courseName, 0L);
                }
            } else {
                //常开
                if (deviceType != null && !deviceType.equals("2")) {
                    deviceCommandService.openLockById(Long.valueOf(device_id), "1", "4", courseName, 24 * 60 * 60L);
                }
            }
            System.out.println("开课打开" + map.get("roomId") + "的门锁，门锁名称为：" + map.get("device_name") + ",打开完毕！");
        }
        int returnNum = schoolRoomMapper.updateLock(null, type == 2L ? 2L : 1L, roomIds, null, userId, "2", "1");
    }
    @Override
    public List<String> getAllRoomCodeList() {
        return schoolRoomMapper.selectRoomCodeList();
    }
    @Override
    public Map<String, SchoolRoom> getSyncRoomCodeMap() {
        Map<String, SchoolRoom> map = new HashMap<>();
        List<SchoolRoom> schoolRoomList = schoolRoomMapper.selectAll();
        for (SchoolRoom schoolRoom : schoolRoomList) {
            map.put(schoolRoom.getSyncRoomCode(), schoolRoom);
        }
        return map;
    }
}

/**
 * 房间可用时间段设置Service业务层处理
 *
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2022-11-30
 */
@Service
public class SchoolRoomUseTimeServiceImpl implements ISchoolRoomUseTimeService
{
    @Autowired
    private SchoolRoomUseTimeMapper schoolRoomUseTimeMapper;
    /**
     * 查询房间可用时间段设置
     *
     * @param userTimeId 房间可用时间段设置主键
     * @return 房间可用时间段设置
     */
    @Override
    public SchoolRoomUseTime selectSchoolRoomUseTimeByUserTimeId(Long userTimeId)
    {
        return schoolRoomUseTimeMapper.selectSchoolRoomUseTimeByUserTimeId(userTimeId);
    }
    /**
     * 查询房间可用时间段设置列表
     *
     * @param schoolRoomUseTime 房间可用时间段设置
     * @return 房间可用时间段设置
     */
    @Override
    public List<SchoolRoomUseTime> selectSchoolRoomUseTimeList(SchoolRoomUseTime schoolRoomUseTime)
    {
        return schoolRoomUseTimeMapper.selectSchoolRoomUseTimeList(schoolRoomUseTime);
    }
    /**
     * 新增房间可用时间段设置
     *
     * @param schoolRoomUseTime 房间可用时间段设置
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int insertSchoolRoomUseTime(SchoolRoomUseTime schoolRoomUseTime)
    {
        schoolRoomUseTime.setCreateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        return schoolRoomUseTimeMapper.insertSchoolRoomUseTime(schoolRoomUseTime);
    }
    /**
     * 修改房间可用时间段设置
     *
     * @param schoolRoomUseTime 房间可用时间段设置
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int updateSchoolRoomUseTime(SchoolRoomUseTime schoolRoomUseTime)
    {
        schoolRoomUseTime.setUpdateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        return schoolRoomUseTimeMapper.updateSchoolRoomUseTime(schoolRoomUseTime);
    }
    /**
     * 批量删除房间可用时间段设置
     *
     * @param userTimeIds 需要删除的房间可用时间段设置主键
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int deleteSchoolRoomUseTimeByUserTimeIds(Long[] userTimeIds)
    {
        return schoolRoomUseTimeMapper.deleteSchoolRoomUseTimeByUserTimeIds(userTimeIds);
    }
    /**
     * 删除房间可用时间段设置信息
     *
     * @param userTimeId 房间可用时间段设置主键
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int deleteSchoolRoomUseTimeByUserTimeId(Long userTimeId)
    {
        return schoolRoomUseTimeMapper.deleteSchoolRoomUseTimeByUserTimeId(userTimeId);
    }
    /**
     * 按roomId删除可预约配置
     * @param roomId
     * @return
     */
    @Override
    public int deleteByRoomId(Long roomId)
    {
        return schoolRoomUseTimeMapper.deleteByRoomId(roomId);
    }
    /**
     * 按roomId 查询 可预约 星期 集合
     * @param roomId
     * @return
     */
    @Override
    public List<String> getWeekDaysByRoomId(Long roomId)
    {
        return schoolRoomUseTimeMapper.getWeekDaysByRoomId(roomId);
    }
    /**
     * 按roomId 查询可预约时间段集合
     * @param roomId
     * @return
     */
    @Override
    public List<String> getTimeRangesRoomId(Long roomId)
    {
        return schoolRoomUseTimeMapper.getTimeRangesRoomId(roomId);
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.service.impl;
