/**
 * 学生信息Service业务层处理
 *
 * @author chenfang
 * @date 2022-11-29
 */
@Service
public class SchoolStuInfoServiceImpl implements ISchoolStuInfoService {
    @Autowired
    private SchoolStuInfoMapper schoolStuInfoMapper;
    @Autowired
    private ISchoolTeaInfoService schoolTeaInfoService;
    @Autowired
    protected Validator validator;
    @Autowired
    private RemoteDeptService remoteDeptService;
    @Autowired
    private RemoteUserService remoteUserService;
    @Autowired
    private SchoolTeaInfoMapper schoolTeaInfoMapper;
    @Value("${cjdx.apis[1].urls[2].url}")
    private String sys_xs;
    @Value("${cjdx.apis[1].apiKey}")
    private String sys_api_Key;
    /**
     * @Description: 查询学生信息列表
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-12-1 17:13:00
     * @param stuId: 学生信息主键
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo
     */
    @Override
    public SchoolStuInfo selectSchoolStuInfoByStuId(Long stuId) {
        return schoolStuInfoMapper.selectSchoolStuInfoByStuId(stuId);
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 查询学生信息列表
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-12-1 17:13:00
     * @param stuId: 学生信息主键
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo
     */
    @Override
    public SchoolStuInfo selectSchoolStuInfoBystuNum(String stuNum) {
        return schoolStuInfoMapper.selectSchoolStuInfoByStuNum(stuNum);
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 查询学生信息列表
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-12-1 17:13:00
     * @param schoolStuInfo: 学生信息
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo
     */
    @Override
    public List<SchoolStuInfo> selectSchoolStuInfoList(SchoolStuInfo schoolStuInfo) {
        return schoolStuInfoMapper.selectSchoolStuInfoList(schoolStuInfo);
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 新增学生信息
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-12-1 17:13:00
     * @param schoolStuInfo: 学生实体类
     * @return: int
     */
    @Override
    public int insertSchoolStuInfo(SchoolStuInfo schoolStuInfo) {
        String password = "";
        schoolStuInfo.setCreateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        String stuNum = schoolStuInfo.getStuNum();
        //如果导入/新增没有密码
        if(StringUtils.isEmpty(schoolStuInfo.getPassword())){
            //创建默认密码
            password = "Jlgs@" + (stuNum).substring(stuNum.length() - 6);
            schoolStuInfo.setPassword(SecurityUtils.encryptPassword(password));
        }else{
            //获取导入表格里的密码
            schoolStuInfo.setPassword(SecurityUtils.encryptPassword(schoolStuInfo.getPassword()));
        }
        if (StrUtil.isEmpty(schoolStuInfo.getDataSources())) {
            schoolStuInfo.setDataSources("2");
        }
        int i = schoolStuInfoMapper.insertSchoolStuInfo(schoolStuInfo);
        // 创建用户至SysUser表
        SysUser sysUser = new SysUser();
        int j = remoteUserService.selsectMaxUserId();
        sysUser.setUserId(Long.valueOf(j+1));
        sysUser.setUserName(schoolStuInfo.getStuNum());
        sysUser.setUserType("02");
        sysUser.setDeptId(schoolStuInfo.getStuDeptId());
        sysUser.setPhonenumber(schoolStuInfo.getPhoneNum());
        sysUser.setNickName(schoolStuInfo.getStuName());
        SysUser sysUser1 = schoolTeaInfoService.updateUserSex(schoolStuInfo.getSex());
        sysUser.setSex(sysUser1.getSex());
        //经上步操作已经有密码了 保存即可
        sysUser.setPassword(schoolStuInfo.getPassword());
        Long roleIds[] = {102L};
        sysUser.setRoleIds(roleIds);
        remoteUserService.addUser(sysUser);
        return i;
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 修改学生信息
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-12-1 17:13:00
     * @param schoolStuInfo: 学生实体类
     * @return: int
     */
    @Override
    public int updateSchoolStuInfo(SchoolStuInfo schoolStuInfo) {
        schoolStuInfo.setUpdateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        SchoolStuInfo schoolStuInfoSelf = schoolStuInfoMapper.selectSchoolStuInfoByStuId(schoolStuInfo.getStuId());
        R<SysDept> sysDeptR = remoteDeptService.selectDeptById(schoolStuInfo.getStuDeptId());
        schoolStuInfo.setStuDeptName(sysDeptR.getData().getDeptName());
        schoolStuInfo.setStuDeptName(schoolStuInfo.getStuDeptName());
        if("2".equals(schoolStuInfo.getUpdateFlag()) || StringUtils.isNotNull(schoolStuInfo.getUpdateFlag())){
            return schoolStuInfoMapper.updateSchoolStuInfo(schoolStuInfo);
        }
        R<LoginUser> userInfo = remoteUserService.getUserInfo(schoolStuInfoSelf.getStuNum(),SecurityConstants.INNER);
        SysUser sysUser = new SysUser();
        userInfo.getData().getSysUser().setNickName(schoolStuInfo.getStuName());
        userInfo.getData().getSysUser().setPhonenumber(schoolStuInfo.getPhoneNum());
        userInfo.getData().getSysUser().setSex(schoolStuInfo.getSex());
        userInfo.getData().getSysUser().setDeptId(schoolStuInfo.getStuDeptId());
        userInfo.getData().getSysUser().setDelFlag(schoolStuInfo.getDelFlag().toString());
        userInfo.getData().getSysUser().setUserName(schoolStuInfo.getStuNum());
        if(userInfo.getData().getSysUser().getRoles()!=null){
            Long []roleIds = new Long[userInfo.getData().getSysUser().getRoles().size()];
            for(int i=0;i<userInfo.getData().getSysUser().getRoles().size();i++){
                roleIds[i] = userInfo.getData().getSysUser().getRoles().get(i).getRoleId();
            }
            sysUser.setRoleIds(roleIds);
        }
        sysUser.setUpdateFlag("1");
        sysUser.setUserId(userInfo.getData().getSysUser().getUserId());
        sysUser.setNickName(userInfo.getData().getSysUser().getNickName());
        sysUser.setPhonenumber(userInfo.getData().getSysUser().getPhonenumber());
        SysUser sysUser1 = schoolTeaInfoService.updateUserSex(userInfo.getData().getSysUser().getSex());
        sysUser.setSex(sysUser1.getSex());
        sysUser.setDeptId(userInfo.getData().getSysUser().getDeptId());
        sysUser.setDelFlag(userInfo.getData().getSysUser().getDelFlag());
        sysUser.setUserName(userInfo.getData().getSysUser().getUserName());
        remoteUserService.editUser(sysUser);
        return schoolStuInfoMapper.updateSchoolStuInfo(schoolStuInfo);
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 修改学生信息
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-12-1 17:13:00
     * @param schoolStuInfo: 学生实体类
     * @return: int
     */
    @Override
    public int updateSchoolStuInfoByStuNum(SchoolStuInfo schoolStuInfo) {
        schoolStuInfo.setUpdateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        return schoolStuInfoMapper.updateSchoolStuInfoByStuNum(schoolStuInfo);
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 批量删除学生信息
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-12-1 17:13:00
     * @param stuIds: 需要删除的学生信息主键
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo
     */
    @Override
    public int deleteSchoolStuInfoByStuIds(Long[] stuIds) {
        for (Long stuId : stuIds) {
            SchoolStuInfo schoolStuInfo = schoolStuInfoMapper.selectSchoolStuInfoByStuId(stuId);
            R<LoginUser> userInfo = remoteUserService.getUserInfo(schoolStuInfo.getStuNum(), SecurityConstants.INNER);
            remoteUserService.removeUser(userInfo.getData().getSysUser().getUserId());
        }
        return schoolStuInfoMapper.deleteSchoolStuInfoByStuIds(stuIds);
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 删除学生信息信息
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-12-1 17:13:00
     * @param stuId: 学生信息主键
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo
     */
    @Override
    public int deleteSchoolStuInfoByStuId(Long stuId) {
        return schoolStuInfoMapper.deleteSchoolStuInfoByStuId(stuId);
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 删除学生信息信息
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-12-1 17:13:00
     * @param stuNum: 学生信息主键
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo
     */
    @Override
    public int deleteSchoolStuInfoByStuNum(String stuNum) {
        return schoolStuInfoMapper.deleteSchoolStuInfoByStuNum(stuNum);
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 判断电话号唯一
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-12-1 17:13:00
     * @param schoolStuInfo: 学生实体类
     * @return: string
     */
    @Override
    public String checkPhoneNum(SchoolStuInfo schoolStuInfo) {
        Long locationId = StringUtils.isNull(schoolStuInfo.getStuId()) ? -1L : schoolStuInfo.getStuId();
        SchoolStuInfo schoolStuInfo1 = schoolStuInfoMapper.checkPhoneNum(schoolStuInfo);
        if (StringUtils.isNotNull(schoolStuInfo1) && schoolStuInfo1.getStuId().longValue() != locationId.longValue()) {
            if(StringUtils.isNotEmpty(schoolStuInfo1.getPhoneNum())){
                return UserConstants.NOT_UNIQUE;
            }
        }
        return UserConstants.UNIQUE;
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 判断身份证唯一
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-12-1 17:13:00
     * @param schoolStuInfo: 学生实体类
     * @return: string
     */
    @Override
    public String checkIdCard(SchoolStuInfo schoolStuInfo) {
        Long stuId = StringUtils.isNull(schoolStuInfo.getStuId()) ? -1L : schoolStuInfo.getStuId();
        SchoolStuInfo schoolStuInfo1 = schoolStuInfoMapper.checkIdCard(schoolStuInfo);
        if (StringUtils.isNotNull(schoolStuInfo1) && schoolStuInfo1.getStuId().longValue() != stuId.longValue()) {
            if(StringUtils.isNotEmpty(schoolStuInfo1.getIdCard())){
                return UserConstants.NOT_UNIQUE;
            }
        }
        return UserConstants.UNIQUE;
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 导入
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-12-1 17:13:00
     * @param schoolStuInfoList: 学生实体类
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo
     */
    @Override
    public String importSchoolStuInfo(List<SchoolStuInfo> schoolStuInfoList) {
        StringBuffer promptInformation = new StringBuffer();
        List<Integer> err1 = new ArrayList<>();
        List<Integer> err2 = new ArrayList<>();
        List<Integer> err3 = new ArrayList<>();
        List<Integer> err4 = new ArrayList<>();
        List<Integer> err5 = new ArrayList<>();
        List<Integer> err6 = new ArrayList<>();
        List<Integer> err7 = new ArrayList<>();
        List<Integer> err8 = new ArrayList<>();
        List<Integer> err9 = new ArrayList<>();
        List<Integer> err10 = new ArrayList<>();
        List<Integer> err11 = new ArrayList<>();
        List<Integer> err12 = new ArrayList<>();
        List<Integer> err13 = new ArrayList<>();
        List<Integer> err14 = new ArrayList<>();
        int count = 0;
        if (StringUtils.isBlank(promptInformation)) {
            for (int i = 0; i < schoolStuInfoList.size(); i++) {
                SchoolStuInfo schoolStuInfo = schoolStuInfoList.get(i);
                if (StringUtils.isBlank(schoolStuInfo.getStuNum()) && null == schoolStuInfoMapper.checkStuNum(schoolStuInfo)){
                    err1.add(i+1);
                    continue;
                }
                if (StringUtils.isBlank(schoolStuInfo.getStuName())){
                    err2.add(i+1);
                    continue;
                }
                if(StringUtils.isNotEmpty(schoolStuInfo.getStuNum())){
                    if (!Pattern.matches("[0-9]\\d*",schoolStuInfo.getStuNum())){
                        err13.add(i+1);
                        continue;
                    }
                    if(schoolStuInfo.getStuNum().length()<6){
                        err14.add(i+1);
                        continue;
                    }
                }
                if (StringUtils.isBlank(schoolStuInfo.getStuDeptName())){
                    err3.add(i+1);
                    continue;
                }
                if (StringUtils.isEmpty(schoolStuInfo.getStuType())){
                    err4.add(i+1);
                    continue;
                }
                int config = remoteDeptService.selectDeptByName(schoolStuInfo.getStuDeptName());
                if (config == 0){
                    err5.add(i+1);
                    continue;
                }
                SchoolStuInfo schoolStuInfo2 = schoolStuInfoMapper.checkPhoneNum(schoolStuInfo);
                if(StringUtils.isNotEmpty(schoolStuInfo.getPhoneNum())){
                    if(schoolStuInfo2 != null) {
                        err6.add(i + 1);
                        continue;
                    }
                    if(!PhoneUtil.isMobile(schoolStuInfo.getPhoneNum())){
                        err9.add(i+1);
                        continue;
                    }
                }
                SchoolStuInfo schoolStuInfo3 = schoolStuInfoMapper.checkIdCard(schoolStuInfo);
                if(StringUtils.isNotEmpty(schoolStuInfo.getIdCard())){
                    if(schoolStuInfo3 != null){
                        err7.add(i+1);
                        continue;
                    }
                    if(!IdcardUtil.isValidCard18(schoolStuInfo.getIdCard())){
                        err10.add(i+1);
                        continue;
                    }
                }
                SchoolStuInfo schoolStuInfo4 = schoolStuInfoMapper.checkStuNum(schoolStuInfo);
                if(schoolStuInfo4 != null){
                    err8.add(i+1);
                    continue;
                }
                SchoolTeaInfo schoolTeaInfoTemp = new SchoolTeaInfo();
                schoolTeaInfoTemp.setTeaUserNum(schoolStuInfo.getStuNum());
                SchoolTeaInfo schoolTeaInfo3 = schoolTeaInfoMapper.checkUserNum(schoolTeaInfoTemp);
                if(schoolTeaInfo3 != null){
                    err8.add(i+1);
                    continue;
                }
                if(schoolStuInfo.getSex() != null){
                    if("男".equals(schoolStuInfo.getSex()) || "女".equals(schoolStuInfo.getSex())){
                        err11.add(i+1);
                        continue;
                    }
                }
                String intoYear = "\\d{4}";
                if(StringUtils.isNotEmpty(schoolStuInfo.getIntoYear())){
                    if(!Pattern.matches(intoYear,schoolStuInfo.getIntoYear())){
                        err12.add(i+1);
                        continue;
                    }
                }
                R<SysDept> sysDeptR = remoteDeptService.selectDeptByDeptName(schoolStuInfo.getStuDeptName());
                SchoolStuInfo schoolStuInfo1 = new SchoolStuInfo();
                SysDept data = sysDeptR.getData();
                if(data != null){
                    if(StringUtils.isNotEmpty(sysDeptR.getData().getDeptId().toString())){
                        schoolStuInfo1.setStuDeptId(sysDeptR.getData().getDeptId());
                    }
                }
                schoolStuInfo1.setSex(schoolStuInfo.getSex());
                schoolStuInfo1.setClassName(schoolStuInfo.getClassName());
                schoolStuInfo1.setStuId(schoolStuInfo1.getStuId());
                schoolStuInfo1.setIdCard(schoolStuInfo.getIdCard());
                schoolStuInfo1.setStuNum(schoolStuInfo.getStuNum());
                schoolStuInfo1.setStuName(schoolStuInfo.getStuName());
                schoolStuInfo1.setStuType(schoolStuInfo.getStuType());
                schoolStuInfo1.setStuDeptName(schoolStuInfo.getStuDeptName());
                schoolStuInfo1.setPhoneNum(schoolStuInfo.getPhoneNum());
                schoolStuInfo1.setClassName(schoolStuInfo.getClassName());
                schoolStuInfo1.setIntoYear(schoolStuInfo.getIntoYear());
                schoolStuInfo1.setPassword(schoolStuInfo.getPassword());
                schoolStuInfo1.setDelFlag(0L);
                insertSchoolStuInfo(schoolStuInfo1);
                count++;
            }
            if (count == schoolStuInfoList.size()) {
                promptInformation.append("全部导入成功！！！");
            }else{
                promptInformation.append("共导入{"+schoolStuInfoList.size()+"}条，导入成功{"+count+"}条，导入失败{"+(schoolStuInfoList.size()-count)+"}条" + "</br>");
                promptInformation.append("失败原因如下：" + "</br>");
                if (err1.size() >0){
                    promptInformation.append("第"+err1.toString()+"条数据,学号不能为空或已存在,导入失败。" + "</br>");
                }
                if (err2.size() >0){
                    promptInformation.append("第"+err2.toString()+"条数据,姓名不能为空,导入失败。" + "</br>");
                }
                if (err3.size() >0){
                    promptInformation.append("第"+err3.toString()+"条数据,所在院系/部门不能为空,导入失败。" + "</br>");
                }
                if (err4.size() >0){
                    promptInformation.append("第"+err4.toString()+"条数据,学生类型不能为空或填写错误,导入失败。" + "</br>");
                }
                if (err5.size() >0){
                    promptInformation.append("第"+err5.toString()+"条数据,所在院系/部门不存在,导入失败。" + "</br>");
                }
                if (err6.size() >0){
                    promptInformation.append("第"+err6.toString()+"条数据,联系电话已重复,导入失败。" + "</br>");
                }
                if (err7.size() >0){
                    promptInformation.append("第"+err7.toString()+"条数据,身份证号已重复,导入失败。" + "</br>");
                }
                if (err8.size() >0){
                    promptInformation.append("第"+err8.toString()+"条数据,学号重复或与教师工号重复,导入失败。" + "</br>");
                }
                if (err9.size() >0){
                    promptInformation.append("第"+err9.toString()+"条数据,联系电话填写不正确,导入失败。" + "</br>");
                }
                if (err10.size() >0){
                    promptInformation.append("第"+err10.toString()+"条数据,身份证号填写不正确,导入失败。" + "</br>");
                }
                if (err11.size() >0){
                    promptInformation.append("第"+err11.toString()+"条数据,性别只能填写(男，女字样),导入失败。" + "</br>");
                }
                if (err12.size() >0){
                    promptInformation.append("第"+err12.toString()+"条数据,入学年份输入错误,导入失败。" + "</br>");
                }
                if (err13.size() >0){
                    promptInformation.append("第"+err13.toString()+"条数据,学号只能由数字组成,导入失败。" + "</br>");
                }
                if (err14.size() >0){
                    promptInformation.append("第"+err14.toString()+"条数据,学号不可少于6位,导入失败。" + "</br>");
                }
            }
        }
        return promptInformation.toString();
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 校验学号是否唯一
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 15:11:52
     * @param schoolStuInfo: 学生实体类
     * @return: com.chenrise.jufe.domain.SchoolTempUserInfo
     */
    @Override
    public String checkStuNum(SchoolStuInfo schoolStuInfo) {
        Long stuId = StringUtils.isNull(schoolStuInfo.getStuId()) ? -1L : schoolStuInfo.getStuId();
        SchoolStuInfo schoolStuInfo1 = schoolStuInfoMapper.checkStuNum(schoolStuInfo);
        if (StringUtils.isNotNull(schoolStuInfo1) && schoolStuInfo1.getStuId().longValue() != stuId.longValue())
        {
            return UserConstants.NOT_UNIQUE;
        }
        return UserConstants.UNIQUE;
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 校api得到学生数据
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2023/01/12 12:38:37
     * @return {@link int }
     */
    @Override
    public int jufeApiGetSysXs() {
        JSONObject object = new JSONObject();
        String res = HttpRequest.post(sys_xs)
                .header("Authorization-Type","Apikey")
                .header("Authorization",this.sys_api_Key)
                .header("Content-Type","application/x-www-form-urlencoded")
                .body(String.valueOf(object))
                .execute().body();
        Map<String, Map<String,Object>> result = JSONUtil.toBean(res, Map.class);
        List<JSONObject> list = JSONUtil.toList(result.get("data").get("list").toString(), JSONObject.class);
        if(list!=null&&list.size()>0){
            //变更学生的在校状态均为离校
            schoolStuInfoMapper.updateStuInSchoolStatus();
            for (JSONObject jsonObject : list) {
                SchoolStuInfo schoolStuInfo = new SchoolStuInfo();
                String xh = jsonObject.getString("xh");
                SchoolStuInfo schoolStuInfo1 = schoolStuInfoMapper.selectSchoolStuInfoByStuNum(xh);
                if(schoolStuInfo1 == null){
                    schoolStuInfo.setPassword(SecurityUtils.encryptPassword(jsonObject.getString("password")));
                    schoolStuInfo.setClassName(jsonObject.getString("bjmc"));
                    schoolStuInfo.setClassCode(jsonObject.getString("bjbh"));
                    schoolStuInfo.setIntoYear(jsonObject.getString("rxnf"));
                    schoolStuInfo.setPhoneNum(jsonObject.getString("lldh"));
                    schoolStuInfo.setStuNum(xh);
                    schoolStuInfo.setStuName(jsonObject.getString("xm"));
                    R<SysDept> xymc = remoteDeptService.selectDeptByDeptName(jsonObject.getString("xymc"));
                    if(xymc != null&&xymc.getData()!=null){
                        schoolStuInfo.setStuDeptId(xymc.getData().getDeptId());
                    }
                    schoolStuInfo.setStuDeptName(jsonObject.getString("xymc"));
                    schoolStuInfo.setDeptId(Long.valueOf(jsonObject.getString("xybh")));
                    String lx = jsonObject.getString("lx");
                    if(lx.equals("本科生")){
                        schoolStuInfo.setStuType("1");
                    }else if(lx.equals("研究生")){
                        schoolStuInfo.setStuType("2");
                    }
                    String xb = jsonObject.getString("xb");
                    xb = "男".equals(xb)?"1":"2";
                    schoolStuInfo.setSex(xb);
                    schoolStuInfo.setCreateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
                    schoolStuInfo.setDataSources("1");
                    schoolStuInfo.setInSchoolStatus("1");
                    schoolStuInfoMapper.insertSchoolStuInfo(schoolStuInfo);
                    SysUser sysUser = new SysUser();
                    int j = remoteUserService.selsectMaxUserId();
                    sysUser.setUserId(Long.valueOf(j+1));
                    sysUser.setUserName(schoolStuInfo.getStuNum());
                    sysUser.setUserType("02");
                    sysUser.setPhonenumber(schoolStuInfo.getPhoneNum());
                    sysUser.setNickName(schoolStuInfo.getStuName());
                    SysUser sysUser1 = schoolTeaInfoService.updateUserSex(schoolStuInfo.getSex());
                    sysUser.setSex(sysUser1.getSex());
                    sysUser.setPassword(schoolStuInfo.getPassword());
                    Long roleIds[] = {102L};
                    sysUser.setRoleIds(roleIds);
                    remoteUserService.addUser(sysUser);
                }else{
                    schoolStuInfo.setStuId(schoolStuInfo1.getStuId());
                    schoolStuInfo.setPassword(SecurityUtils.encryptPassword(jsonObject.getString("password")));
                    schoolStuInfo.setClassName(jsonObject.getString("bjmc"));
                    schoolStuInfo.setClassCode(jsonObject.getString("bjbh"));
                    schoolStuInfo.setIntoYear(jsonObject.getString("rxnf"));
                    schoolStuInfo.setPhoneNum(jsonObject.getString("lldh"));
                    schoolStuInfo.setStuNum(xh);
                    schoolStuInfo.setStuName(jsonObject.getString("xm"));
                    R<SysDept> xymc = remoteDeptService.selectDeptByDeptName(jsonObject.getString("xymc"));
                    if(xymc != null&&xymc.getData()!=null){
                        schoolStuInfo.setStuDeptId(xymc.getData().getDeptId());
                    }
                    schoolStuInfo.setStuDeptName(jsonObject.getString("xymc"));
                    String lx = jsonObject.getString("lx");
                    if(lx.equals("本科生")){
                        schoolStuInfo.setStuType("1");
                    }else if(lx.equals("研究生")){
                        schoolStuInfo.setStuType("2");
                    }
                    String xb = jsonObject.getString("xb");
                    xb = "男".equals(xb)?"1":"2";
                    schoolStuInfo.setSex(xb);
                    schoolStuInfo.setCreateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
                    schoolStuInfo.setDataSources("1");
                    schoolStuInfo.setInSchoolStatus("1");
                    schoolStuInfoMapper.updateSchoolStuInfo(schoolStuInfo);
                    SysUser sysUser = new SysUser();
                    R<LoginUser> userInfo = remoteUserService.getUserInfo(schoolStuInfo.getStuNum(), SecurityConstants.INNER);
                    sysUser.setUserId(userInfo.getData().getSysUser().getUserId());
                    sysUser.setUserName(schoolStuInfo.getStuNum());
                    sysUser.setDeptId(schoolStuInfo.getStuDeptId());
                    sysUser.setPhonenumber(schoolStuInfo.getPhoneNum());
                    sysUser.setNickName(schoolStuInfo.getStuName());
                    SysUser sysUser1 = schoolTeaInfoService.updateUserSex(schoolStuInfo.getSex());
                    sysUser.setSex(sysUser1.getSex());
                    sysUser.setPassword(schoolStuInfo.getPassword());
                    sysUser.setInSchoolStatus("1");
                    remoteUserService.editUser(sysUser);
                }
            }
        }
        return 1;
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.service.impl;
import cn.hutool.core.date.DateUtil;
import cn.hutool.json.JSONUtil;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.DateUtils;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.Bo.SchoolTaskInfoBo;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.*;
import com.chenrise.jufe.mapper.*;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.ISchoolRoomService;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.ISchoolTaskInfoService;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
import java.util.Date;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.stream.Collectors;
/**
 * 任务信息主Service业务层处理
 *
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2022-11-29
 */
@Slf4j
@Service
public class SchoolTaskInfoServiceImpl implements ISchoolTaskInfoService
{
    @Autowired
    private SchoolTaskInfoMapper schoolTaskInfoMapper;
    //任务周期信息
    @Autowired
    private SchoolTaskCycleInfoMapper schoolTaskCycleInfoMapper;
    //任务房间关联
    @Autowired
    private SchoolTaskRoomRefMapper schoolTaskRoomRefMapper;
    //任务开关设备时间
    @Autowired
    private SchoolTaskTimeInfoMapper schoolTaskTimeInfoMapper;
    @Autowired
    private ISchoolRoomService schoolRoomService;
    @Autowired
    private SchoolBaseSetInfoMapper schoolBaseSetInfoMapper;
    /**
     * @Description:根据主键id查询任务信息
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 16:07:50
     * @param taskId:
     * @return: com.chenrise.jufe.domain.SchoolTaskInfo
     */
    @Override
    public SchoolTaskInfoBo selectSchoolTaskInfoByTaskId(Long taskId)
    {
        SchoolTaskInfoBo bo = schoolTaskInfoMapper.selectSchoolTaskInfoByTaskId(taskId);
        List<SchoolTaskRoomRef> roomRefs =schoolTaskRoomRefMapper.selectSchoolTaskRoomRefByTaskId(taskId);
        List<SchoolTaskCycleInfo> cycleInfos = schoolTaskCycleInfoMapper.selectSchoolTaskCycleInfoByTaskId(taskId);
        /** 任务开关设备时间 */
        List<SchoolTaskTimeInfo> timeInfos = schoolTaskTimeInfoMapper.selectSchoolTaskTimeInfoByTaskId(taskId);
        bo.setRoomRefs(roomRefs);
        bo.setCycleInfos(cycleInfos);
        bo.setTimeInfos(timeInfos);
        return bo;
    }
    /**
     * @Description:查询任务信息list
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 16:08:06
     * @param schoolTaskInfoBo: 查询实体
     * @return: java.util.List<com.chenrise.jufe.domain.SchoolTaskInfo>
     */
    @Override
    public List<SchoolTaskInfo> selectSchoolTaskInfoList(SchoolTaskInfoBo schoolTaskInfoBo)
    {
        return schoolTaskInfoMapper.selectSchoolTaskInfoList(schoolTaskInfoBo);
    }
    /**
     * @Description:新增任务信息
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 16:08:39
     * @param schoolTaskInfoBo:
     * @return: int
     */
    @Override
    public int insertSchoolTaskInfo(SchoolTaskInfoBo schoolTaskInfoBo)
    {
        schoolTaskInfoBo.setCreateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        int count = schoolTaskInfoMapper.insertSchoolTaskInfo(schoolTaskInfoBo);
        Long taskId = schoolTaskInfoBo.getTaskId();
        //任务房间信息关联
        List<SchoolTaskRoomRef> roomRefs = schoolTaskInfoBo.getRoomRefs();
        if(roomRefs!=null&&roomRefs.size()>0){
            for(int i=0;i<roomRefs.size();i++){
                roomRefs.get(i).setTaskId(taskId);
                schoolTaskRoomRefMapper.insertSchoolTaskRoomRef(roomRefs.get(i));
            }
        }
        // 任务周期信息
        List<SchoolTaskCycleInfo> cycleInfos = schoolTaskInfoBo.getCycleInfos();
        if(cycleInfos!=null&&cycleInfos.size()>0){
            for(int i=0;i<cycleInfos.size();i++){
                cycleInfos.get(i).setTaskId(taskId);
                schoolTaskCycleInfoMapper.insertSchoolTaskCycleInfo(cycleInfos.get(i));
            }
        }
        // 任务开关设备时间
        List<SchoolTaskTimeInfo> timeInfos  = schoolTaskInfoBo.getTimeInfos();
        if(timeInfos!=null&&timeInfos.size()>0){
            for(int i=0;i<timeInfos.size();i++){
                timeInfos.get(i).setTaskId(taskId);
                schoolTaskTimeInfoMapper.insertSchoolTaskTimeInfo(timeInfos.get(i));
            }
        }
        return count;
    }
    /**
     * @Description:修改任务信息
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 16:08:50
     * @param schoolTaskInfoBo:包含周期信息，设备开关时间，关联房间信息
     * @return: int
     */
    @Override
    public int updateSchoolTaskInfo(SchoolTaskInfoBo schoolTaskInfoBo)
    {
        schoolTaskInfoBo.setUpdateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        int count = schoolTaskInfoMapper.updateSchoolTaskInfo(schoolTaskInfoBo);
        Long taskId = schoolTaskInfoBo.getTaskId();
        List<SchoolTaskRoomRef> roomRefs = schoolTaskInfoBo.getRoomRefs();
        schoolTaskRoomRefMapper.deleteSchoolTaskRoomRefByTaskId(taskId);
        if(roomRefs!=null&&roomRefs.size()>0){
            for(int i=0;i<roomRefs.size();i++){
                roomRefs.get(i).setTaskId(taskId);
                schoolTaskRoomRefMapper.insertSchoolTaskRoomRef(roomRefs.get(i));
            }
        }
        // 任务周期信息
        List<SchoolTaskCycleInfo> cycleInfos = schoolTaskInfoBo.getCycleInfos();
        schoolTaskCycleInfoMapper.deleteSchoolTaskCycleInfoByTaskId(taskId);
        if(cycleInfos!=null&&cycleInfos.size()>0){
            for(int i=0;i<cycleInfos.size();i++){
                cycleInfos.get(i).setTaskId(schoolTaskInfoBo.getTaskId());
                schoolTaskCycleInfoMapper.insertSchoolTaskCycleInfo(cycleInfos.get(i));
            }
        }
        // 任务开关设备时间
        List<SchoolTaskTimeInfo> timeInfos  = schoolTaskInfoBo.getTimeInfos();
        schoolTaskTimeInfoMapper.deleteSchoolTaskTimeInfoByTaskId(taskId);
        if(timeInfos!=null&&timeInfos.size()>0){
            for(int i=0;i<timeInfos.size();i++){
                timeInfos.get(i).setTaskId(schoolTaskInfoBo.getTaskId());
                schoolTaskTimeInfoMapper.insertSchoolTaskTimeInfo(timeInfos.get(i));
            }
        }
        return count;
    }
    /**
     * @Description:批量删除任务信息
     * @Author: sunming

     * @return: int
     */

    }
    /**
     * 执行学校任务
     * @Description: 执行学校任务
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-12-08 09:33:22
     * @param sTime 开始时间
     * @param eTime 结束时间
     * @return int
     */
    @Override
    public int carrySchoolTask(Date sTime, Date eTime){
        //修改任务状态
        //1未执行-->2执行中
        schoolTaskInfoMapper.updateSchoolTaskInitiate(eTime);
        //2执行中-->3执行结束
        schoolTaskInfoMapper.updateSchoolTaskOver(eTime);
        //查询时间内可执行任务
        List<Map<String,Object>> list = schoolTaskInfoMapper.selectCarrySchoolTaskByTime(sTime,eTime);
        log.info("执行学校定时任务，开始时间：{}，结束时间：{}，查询数据：{}", sTime, eTime, list);
        //查询任务详细
        for (Map<String,Object> map:list) {
            log.info("学校定时任务循环中的map数据：{}", JSONUtil.toJsonStr(map));
            String taskId = map.get("task_id").toString()+"";
            String openNumber = map.get("open_number").toString()+"";
            String closeNumber = map.get("close_number").toString()+"";
            SchoolTaskRoomRef schoolTaskRoomRef = new SchoolTaskRoomRef();
            schoolTaskRoomRef.setTaskId(Long.valueOf(taskId));
            List<SchoolTaskRoomRef> roomRefs = schoolTaskRoomRefMapper.selectSchoolTaskRoomRefList(schoolTaskRoomRef);
            Long[] roomIds =roomRefs.stream().map(e -> e.getRoomId()).collect(Collectors.toList()).toArray(new Long[]{});
            if (Long.valueOf(openNumber) >0){
                try {
                    schoolRoomService.updateLock(null,3L,roomIds,null,"2");
                }catch (Exception e){
                    System.out.println(e);
                }
                schoolRoomService.updatePowerNode(null,2L,roomIds,null,"2",null);
            }
            if (Long.valueOf(closeNumber) >0){
                /** 最小不断电时间（分钟） */
                SchoolBaseSetInfo baseSetInfo = schoolBaseSetInfoMapper.selectSchoolBaseSetInfoById(1L);
                Long keepOnTime = baseSetInfo.getKeepOnTime();
                for (Long roomId:roomIds
                     ) {
                    int count = schoolTaskInfoMapper.selectKeepOntimeCount(eTime,roomId,keepOnTime);
                    if (count == 0){
                        Long[] roomIdsNew = new Long[]{roomId};
                        try {
                            schoolRoomService.updateLock(null,2L,roomIdsNew,null,"2");
                        }catch (Exception e){
                            System.out.println(e);
                        }
                        schoolRoomService.updatePowerNode(null,1L,roomIdsNew,null,"2",null);
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        return 1;
    }
    /**
     * 执行学校课程定时任务
     * @Description: 执行学校课程定时任务
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-12-14 15:11:21
     * @param sTime 开始时间
     * @param eTime 结束时间
     * @return int
     */
    @Override
    public void carrySchoolCourse(Date sTime, Date eTime) throws InterruptedException {
//        System.out.println("开始处理------------"+ DateUtil.format(sTime,"yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")+"至"+DateUtil.format(eTime,"yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"));
        //查询时间内要生效课程
        List<Map<String,Object>> list = schoolTaskInfoMapper.selectCarrySchoolCourseByTime(sTime,eTime);
        log.info("课程定时任务查询开始时间：{}，结束时间：{}，查询数据：{}", sTime, eTime, JSONUtil.toJsonStr(list));
        if(list!=null&&list.size()>0){
            //详细
//            ExecutorService executor = Executors.newFixedThreadPool(list.size());
            for (Map<String,Object> map:list) {
                log.info("课程定时任务循环中的map数据：{}", JSONUtil.toJsonStr(map));
//                executor.submit(() -> {
                    // 线程要执行的代码
                    String roomId = map.get("room_id").toString()+"";
                    String openNumber = map.get("open_number").toString()+"";
                    String closeNumber = map.get("close_number").toString()+"";
                    String courseName = map.get("course_name").toString()+"";
                    String closeLockNumber =  map.get("close_lock_number").toString()+"";
                    Long[] roomIds = new Long[]{Long.valueOf(roomId)};
                    //开始门锁和空开
                    if (Long.valueOf(openNumber) > 0) {
                        schoolRoomService.updateLockForCourse(3L,roomIds,courseName);
                        schoolRoomService.updatePowerNodeForCourse(6L, roomIds, courseName);
                    }
                    //关闭空开
                    if (Long.valueOf(closeNumber) > 0) {
                        /** 最小不断电时间（分钟） */
                        schoolRoomService.updatePowerNodeForCourse(5L, roomIds, courseName);
                    }
                    if (Long.valueOf(closeLockNumber) > 0) {
                        schoolRoomService.updateLockForCourse(2L,roomIds,courseName);
                    }
//                });
            }
//            executor.shutdown();
        }
    }
    /**
     * 执行学校预约定时任务
     * @Description: 执行学校预约定时任务
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-12-14 15:12:11
     * @param sTime 开始时间
     * @param eTime 结束时间
     * @return int
     */
    @Override
    public int carrySchoolToMakeAnAppointment(Date sTime, Date eTime){
        //查询时间内要生效预约
        List<Map<String,Object>> list = schoolTaskInfoMapper.selectCarrySchoolToMakeAnAppointmentByTime(sTime,eTime);
        log.info("预约定时任务查询开始时间：{}，结束时间：{}，查询数据：{}", sTime, eTime, JSONUtil.toJsonStr(list));
        //详细
        for (Map<String,Object> map:list
        ) {
            log.info("预约定时任务循环中的map数据：{}", JSONUtil.toJsonStr(map));
            String roomId = map.get("room_id").toString()+"";
            String openNumber = map.get("open_number").toString()+"";
            String closeNumber = map.get("close_number").toString()+"";
            Long[] roomIds = new Long[]{Long.valueOf(roomId)};
            if (openNumber!=null&&Long.valueOf(openNumber) >0){
                schoolRoomService.updatePowerNodeForTask(6L, roomIds);
            }
            if (closeNumber!=null&&Long.valueOf(closeNumber) >0){
                /** 最小不断电时间（分钟） */
                SchoolBaseSetInfo baseSetInfo = schoolBaseSetInfoMapper.selectSchoolBaseSetInfoById(1L);
                Long keepOnTime = baseSetInfo.getKeepOnTime();
                int count = schoolTaskInfoMapper.selectKeepOntimeCount(eTime,Long.valueOf(roomId),keepOnTime);
                if (count == 0){
                    schoolRoomService.updatePowerNodeForTask(5L, roomIds);
                }
            }
        }
        return 1;
    }
    /**
     * @Description:查询bolist
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-01-07 15:01:13
     * @param schoolTaskInfoBo:
     * @return: java.util.List<com.chenrise.jufe.domain.Bo.SchoolTaskInfoBo>
     */
    @Override
    public List<SchoolTaskInfoBo> selectSchoolTaskInfoBoList(SchoolTaskInfoBo schoolTaskInfoBo) {
        return schoolTaskInfoMapper.selectSchoolTaskInfoBoList(schoolTaskInfoBo);
    }
    @Override
    public void dealGoToClassOpenDoor(Date sTime, Date eTime) {
        System.out.println("开始处理------------" + DateUtil.format(sTime, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss") + "至" + DateUtil.format(eTime, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"));
        //查询时间内要生效课程
        List<Map<String, Object>> list = schoolTaskInfoMapper.selectGoToClassByTime();
        if (list != null && list.size() > 0) {
            //详细
//            ExecutorService executor = Executors.newFixedThreadPool(list.size());
            for (Map<String, Object> map : list) {
//                executor.submit(() -> {
                // 线程要执行的代码
                String roomId = map.get("room_id").toString() + "";
                String openNumber = map.get("open_number").toString() + "";
                String courseName = map.get("course_name").toString() + "";
                Long[] roomIds = new Long[]{Long.valueOf(roomId)};
                //开始门锁和空开
                if (Long.valueOf(openNumber) > 0) {
                    schoolRoomService.updateLockForGoToClass(3L, roomIds, courseName);
//                    schoolRoomService.updatePowerNodeForCourse(2L,roomIds,courseName);
                }
                //关闭空开
//                if (Long.valueOf(closeNumber) > 0) {
//                    /** 最小不断电时间（分钟） */
//                    schoolRoomService.updatePowerNodeForCourse(1L,roomIds,courseName);
//                }
//                if (Long.valueOf(closeLockNumber) > 0) {
//                    schoolRoomService.updateLockForCourse(2L,roomIds,courseName);
//                }
//                });
            }
//            executor.shutdown();
        }
    }
}

/**
 * 教师信息Service业务层处理
 *
 * @author chenfang
 * @date 2022-11-30
 */
@Service
public class SchoolTeaInfoServiceImpl implements ISchoolTeaInfoService {
    @Autowired
    private SchoolTeaInfoMapper schoolTeaInfoMapper;
    @Autowired
    protected Validator validator;
    @Autowired
    private RemoteDeptService remoteDeptService;
    @Autowired
    private RemoteUserService remoteUserService;
    @Autowired
    private SchoolStuInfoMapper schoolStuInfoMapper;
    @Value("${cjdx.apis[1].urls[1].url}")
    private String sys_jzg;
    @Value("${cjdx.apis[1].apiKey}")
    private String sys_api_Key;
    /**
     * @Description: 根据主键查询教师信息
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 16:51:49
     * @param teaUserId 教师主键
     * @return {@link TableDataInfo }
     */
    @Override
    public SchoolTeaInfo selectSchoolTeaInfoByTeaUserId(Long teaUserId) {
        return schoolTeaInfoMapper.selectSchoolTeaInfoByTeaUserId(teaUserId);
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 查询教师信息列表
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 16:51:49
     * @param schoolTeaInfo 教师信息
     * @return {@link TableDataInfo }
     */
    @Override
    public List<SchoolTeaInfo> selectSchoolTeaInfoList(SchoolTeaInfo schoolTeaInfo) {
        return schoolTeaInfoMapper.selectSchoolTeaInfoList(schoolTeaInfo);
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 新增教师信息
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 16:51:49
     * @param schoolTeaInfo: 教师实体类
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo
     */
    @Override
    public int insertSchoolTeaInfo(SchoolTeaInfo schoolTeaInfo) {
        schoolTeaInfo.setCreateBy(SecurityUtils.getUsername());
        String password = "";
        R<SysDept> sysDeptR = remoteDeptService.selectDeptById(schoolTeaInfo.getUserDeptId());
        if(sysDeptR != null){
            schoolTeaInfo.setUserDeptName(sysDeptR.getData().getDeptName());
        }
        String teaUserNum = schoolTeaInfo.getTeaUserNum();
        if(StringUtils.isEmpty(schoolTeaInfo.getPassword())){
            password = "Jlgs@" + (teaUserNum).substring(teaUserNum.length() - 6);
            schoolTeaInfo.setPassword(SecurityUtils.encryptPassword(password));
        }else{
            schoolTeaInfo.setPassword(SecurityUtils.encryptPassword(schoolTeaInfo.getPassword()));
        }
        schoolTeaInfo.setCreateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        schoolTeaInfo.setDataSources("2");
        int i = schoolTeaInfoMapper.insertSchoolTeaInfo(schoolTeaInfo);
        // 创建用户至SysUser表
        SysUser sysUser = new SysUser();
        int j = remoteUserService.selsectMaxUserId();
        sysUser.setUserId(Long.valueOf(j+1));
        sysUser.setUserName(schoolTeaInfo.getTeaUserNum());
        sysUser.setUserType("01");
        sysUser.setDeptId(schoolTeaInfo.getUserDeptId());
        sysUser.setPhonenumber(schoolTeaInfo.getPhoneNum());
        sysUser.setNickName(schoolTeaInfo.getTeaUserName());
        SysUser sysUser1 = updateUserSex(schoolTeaInfo.getSex());
        sysUser.setSex(sysUser1.getSex());
        sysUser.setPassword(schoolTeaInfo.getPassword());
        Long roleIds[] = {101L};
        sysUser.setRoleIds(roleIds);
        AjaxResult ajaxResult = remoteUserService.addUser(sysUser);
        System.out.println(ajaxResult.get("msg"));
        return i;
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 修改教师信息
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 16:51:49
     * @param schoolTeaInfo: 教师实体类
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo
     */
    @Override
    public int updateSchoolTeaInfo(SchoolTeaInfo schoolTeaInfo) {
        schoolTeaInfo.setUpdateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        SchoolTeaInfo schoolTeaInfoSelf = schoolTeaInfoMapper.selectSchoolTeaInfoByTeaUserId(schoolTeaInfo.getTeaUserId());
        R<SysDept> sysDeptR = remoteDeptService.selectDeptById(schoolTeaInfo.getUserDeptId());
        schoolTeaInfo.setUserDeptName(sysDeptR.getData().getDeptName());
        schoolTeaInfo.setUserDeptName(schoolTeaInfo.getUserDeptName());
        if("2".equals(schoolTeaInfo.getUpdateFlag()) || StringUtils.isNotNull(schoolTeaInfo.getUpdateFlag())){
            return schoolTeaInfoMapper.updateSchoolTeaInfo(schoolTeaInfo);
        }
        R<LoginUser> userInfo = remoteUserService.getUserInfo(schoolTeaInfoSelf.getTeaUserNum(),SecurityConstants.INNER);
        System.err.println("-------------------"+userInfo);
        SysUser sysUser = new SysUser();
        userInfo.getData().getSysUser().setNickName(schoolTeaInfo.getTeaUserName());
        userInfo.getData().getSysUser().setPhonenumber(schoolTeaInfo.getPhoneNum());
        userInfo.getData().getSysUser().setSex(schoolTeaInfo.getSex());
        userInfo.getData().getSysUser().setDeptId(schoolTeaInfo.getUserDeptId());
        userInfo.getData().getSysUser().setDelFlag(schoolTeaInfo.getDelFlag().toString());
        userInfo.getData().getSysUser().setUserName(schoolTeaInfo.getTeaUserNum());
        if(userInfo.getData().getSysUser().getRoles()!=null){
            Long []roleIds = new Long[userInfo.getData().getSysUser().getRoles().size()];
            for(int i=0;i<userInfo.getData().getSysUser().getRoles().size();i++){
                roleIds[i] = userInfo.getData().getSysUser().getRoles().get(i).getRoleId();
            }
            sysUser.setRoleIds(roleIds);
        }
        sysUser.setUpdateFlag("1");
        sysUser.setUserId(userInfo.getData().getSysUser().getUserId());
        sysUser.setNickName(userInfo.getData().getSysUser().getNickName());
        sysUser.setPhonenumber(userInfo.getData().getSysUser().getPhonenumber());
        SysUser sysUser1 = updateUserSex(userInfo.getData().getSysUser().getSex());
        sysUser.setSex(sysUser1.getSex());
        sysUser.setDeptId(userInfo.getData().getSysUser().getDeptId());
        sysUser.setDelFlag(userInfo.getData().getSysUser().getDelFlag());
        sysUser.setUserName(userInfo.getData().getSysUser().getUserName());
        remoteUserService.editUser(sysUser);
        return schoolTeaInfoMapper.updateSchoolTeaInfo(schoolTeaInfo);
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 修改学生信息
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-12-1 17:13:00
     * @param schoolTeaInfo: 老师实体类
     * @return: int
     */
    @Override
    public int updateSchoolTeaInfoByTeaUserNum(SchoolTeaInfo schoolTeaInfo) {
        schoolTeaInfo.setUpdateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        return schoolTeaInfoMapper.updateSchoolTeaInfoByTeaUserNum(schoolTeaInfo);
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 校验电话号是否唯一
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 16:51:49
     * @param schoolTeaInfo: 教师实体类
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo
     */
    @Override
    public String checkPhoneNum(SchoolTeaInfo schoolTeaInfo) {
        Long teaUserId = StringUtils.isNull(schoolTeaInfo.getTeaUserId()) ? -1L : schoolTeaInfo.getTeaUserId();
        SchoolTeaInfo schoolTeaInfo1 = schoolTeaInfoMapper.checkPhoneNum(schoolTeaInfo);
        if (StringUtils.isNotNull(schoolTeaInfo1) && schoolTeaInfo1.getTeaUserId().longValue() != teaUserId.longValue())
        {
            if(StringUtils.isNotEmpty(schoolTeaInfo1.getPhoneNum())){
                return UserConstants.NOT_UNIQUE;
            }
        }
        return UserConstants.UNIQUE;
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 校验身份证号是否唯一
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 16:51:49
     * @param schoolTeaInfo: 教师实体类
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo
     */
    @Override
    public String checkIdCard(SchoolTeaInfo schoolTeaInfo) {
        Long taeUserId = StringUtils.isNull(schoolTeaInfo.getTeaUserId()) ? -1L : schoolTeaInfo.getTeaUserId();
        SchoolTeaInfo schoolTeaInfo1 = schoolTeaInfoMapper.checkIdCard(schoolTeaInfo);
        if (StringUtils.isNotNull(schoolTeaInfo1) && schoolTeaInfo1.getTeaUserId().longValue() != taeUserId.longValue()) {
            if(StringUtils.isNotEmpty(schoolTeaInfo1.getIdCard())){
                return UserConstants.NOT_UNIQUE;
            }
        }
        return UserConstants.UNIQUE;
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 批量删除教师信息
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-11-29 16:51:49
     * @param teaUserIds: 教师实体类
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo
     */
    @Override
    public int deleteSchoolTeaInfoByTeaUserIds(Long[] teaUserIds) {
        for (Long teaUserId : teaUserIds) {
            SchoolTeaInfo schoolTeaInfo = schoolTeaInfoMapper.selectSchoolTeaInfoByTeaUserId(teaUserId);
            R<LoginUser> userInfo = remoteUserService.getUserInfo(schoolTeaInfo.getTeaUserNum(), SecurityConstants.INNER);
            remoteUserService.removeUser(userInfo.getData().getSysUser().getUserId());
        }
        return schoolTeaInfoMapper.deleteSchoolTeaInfoByTeaUserIds(teaUserIds);
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 删除教师信息

     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo
     */
    @Override
    public int deleteSchoolTeaInfoByTeaUserId(Long teaUserId) {
        return schoolTeaInfoMapper.deleteSchoolTeaInfoByTeaUserId(teaUserId);
    }

    @Override
    public int deleteSchoolTeaInfoByTeaUserNum(String teaUserNum) {

    }
    /**
     * @Description: 导入
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-11-25 13:30:07
     * @param schoolTeaInfoList:
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @Override
    public String importSchoolTeaInfo(List<SchoolTeaInfo> schoolTeaInfoList) {
        StringBuffer promptInformation = new StringBuffer();
        List<Integer> err1 = new ArrayList<>();
        List<Integer> err2 = new ArrayList<>();
        List<Integer> err3 = new ArrayList<>();
        List<Integer> err4 = new ArrayList<>();
        List<Integer> err5 = new ArrayList<>();
        List<Integer> err6 = new ArrayList<>();
        List<Integer> err7 = new ArrayList<>();
        List<Integer> err8 = new ArrayList<>();
        List<Integer> err9 = new ArrayList<>();
        List<Integer> err10 = new ArrayList<>();
        int count = 0;
        if (StringUtils.isBlank(promptInformation)) {
            for (int i = 0; i < schoolTeaInfoList.size(); i++) {
                SchoolTeaInfo schoolTeaInfo = schoolTeaInfoList.get(i);
                if (StringUtils.isBlank(schoolTeaInfo.getTeaUserNum())){
                    err1.add(i+1);
                    continue;
                }
                if (StringUtils.isBlank(schoolTeaInfo.getTeaUserName())){
                    err2.add(i+1);
                    continue;
                }
                if (StringUtils.isBlank(schoolTeaInfo.getUserDeptName())){
                    err3.add(i+1);
                    continue;
                }
                int config = remoteDeptService.selectDeptByName(schoolTeaInfo.getUserDeptName());
                if (config == 0){
                    err4.add(i+1);
                    continue;
                }
                SchoolTeaInfo schoolTeaInfo2 = schoolTeaInfoMapper.checkPhoneNum(schoolTeaInfo);
                if(StringUtils.isNotEmpty(schoolTeaInfo.getPhoneNum())){
                    if(schoolTeaInfo2 != null){
                        err5.add(i+1);
                        continue;
                    }
                    if(!PhoneUtil.isMobile(schoolTeaInfo.getPhoneNum())){
                        err7.add(i+1);
                        continue;
                    }
                }
                SchoolTeaInfo schoolTeaInfo3 = schoolTeaInfoMapper.checkUserNum(schoolTeaInfo);
                if(schoolTeaInfo3 != null){
                    err6.add(i+1);
                    continue;
                }
                SchoolStuInfo schoolStuInfoTemp = new SchoolStuInfo();
                schoolStuInfoTemp.setStuNum(schoolTeaInfo.getTeaUserNum());
                SchoolStuInfo schoolStuInfo4 = schoolStuInfoMapper.checkStuNum(schoolStuInfoTemp);
                if(schoolStuInfo4 != null){
                    err6.add(i+1);
                    continue;
                }
                R<SysDept> sysDeptR = remoteDeptService.selectDeptByDeptName(schoolTeaInfo.getUserDeptName());
                SchoolTeaInfo schoolTeaInfo1 = new SchoolTeaInfo();
                SysDept data = sysDeptR.getData();
                if(data != null){
                    if(StringUtils.isNotEmpty(sysDeptR.getData().getDeptId().toString())){
                        schoolTeaInfo1.setUserDeptId(sysDeptR.getData().getDeptId());
                    }
                }
                if(schoolTeaInfo.getSex() != null){
                    if("男".equals(schoolTeaInfo.getSex()) || "女".equals(schoolTeaInfo.getSex())){
                        err8.add(i+1);
                        continue;
                    }
                }
                if(StringUtils.isNotEmpty(schoolTeaInfo.getTeaUserNum())){
                    if (!Pattern.matches("[0-9]\\d*",schoolTeaInfo.getTeaUserNum())){
                        err9.add(i+1);
                        continue;
                    }
                    if (schoolTeaInfo.getTeaUserNum().length()<6){
                        err10.add(i+1);
                        continue;
                    }
                }
                schoolTeaInfo1.setSex(schoolTeaInfo.getSex());
                schoolTeaInfo1.setTeaUserId(schoolTeaInfo1.getTeaUserId());
                schoolTeaInfo1.setTeaUserNum(schoolTeaInfo.getTeaUserNum());
                schoolTeaInfo1.setTeaUserName(schoolTeaInfo.getTeaUserName());
                schoolTeaInfo1.setUserDeptName(schoolTeaInfo.getUserDeptName());
                schoolTeaInfo1.setPhoneNum(schoolTeaInfo.getPhoneNum());
                schoolTeaInfo1.setPassword(schoolTeaInfo.getPassword());
                schoolTeaInfo1.setDelFlag(0L);
                insertSchoolTeaInfo(schoolTeaInfo1);
                count++;
            }
            if (count == schoolTeaInfoList.size()) {
                promptInformation.append("全部导入成功！！！");
            }else{
                promptInformation.append("共导入{"+schoolTeaInfoList.size()+"}条，导入成功{"+count+"}条，导入失败{"+(schoolTeaInfoList.size()-count)+"}条" + "</br>");
                promptInformation.append("失败原因如下：" + "</br>");
                if (err1.size() >0){
                    promptInformation.append("第"+err1.toString()+"条,学号不能为空,导入失败。" + "</br>");
                }
                if (err2.size() >0){
                    promptInformation.append("第"+err2.toString()+"条,姓名不能为空,导入失败。" + "</br>");
                }
                if (err3.size() >0){
                    promptInformation.append("第"+err3.toString()+"条,所在院系/部门不能为空,导入失败。" + "</br>");
                }
                if (err4.size() >0){
                    promptInformation.append("第"+err4.toString()+"条,所在院系/部门不存在,导入失败。" + "</br>");
                }
                if (err5.size() >0){
                    promptInformation.append("第"+err5.toString()+"条,联系电话已重复,导入失败。" + "</br>");
                }
                if (err6.size() >0){
                    promptInformation.append("第"+err6.toString()+"条,学工号重复或与学生学号重复,导入失败。" + "</br>");
                }
                if (err7.size() >0){
                    promptInformation.append("第"+err7.toString()+"条,联系电话填写不正确,导入失败。" + "</br>");
                }
                if (err8.size() >0){
                    promptInformation.append("第"+err8.toString()+"条,性别只能填写(男，女字样),导入失败。" + "</br>");
                }
                if (err9.size() >0){
                    promptInformation.append("第"+err9.toString()+"条,工号只能由数字组成,导入失败。" + "</br>");
                }
                if (err10.size() >0){
                    promptInformation.append("第"+err10.toString()+"条,工号长度不可少于6位,导入失败。" + "</br>");
                }
            }
        }
        return promptInformation.toString();
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 校验工号唯一
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022/12/09 10:17:59
     * @param schoolTeaInfo 教师实体类
     * @return {@link SchoolTeaInfo }
     */
    @Override
    public String checkUserNum(SchoolTeaInfo schoolTeaInfo) {
        Long teaUserId = StringUtils.isNull(schoolTeaInfo.getTeaUserId()) ? -1L : schoolTeaInfo.getTeaUserId();
        SchoolTeaInfo schoolTeaInfo1 = schoolTeaInfoMapper.checkUserNum(schoolTeaInfo);
        if (StringUtils.isNotNull(schoolTeaInfo1) && schoolTeaInfo1.getTeaUserId().longValue() != teaUserId.longValue()) {
            if(StringUtils.isNotEmpty(schoolTeaInfo1.getTeaUserNum())){
                return UserConstants.NOT_UNIQUE;
            }
        }
        return UserConstants.UNIQUE;
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 校api得到教职工数据
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2023/01/12 12:38:37
     * @return {@link int }
     */
    @Override
    public int jufeApiGetSysJzg() {
        JSONObject object = new JSONObject();
        String res = HttpRequest.post(sys_jzg)
                .header("Authorization-Type","Apikey")
                .header("Authorization",this.sys_api_Key)
                .header("Content-Type","application/x-www-form-urlencoded")
                .body(String.valueOf(object))
                .execute().body();
        Map<String, Map<String,Object>> result = JSONUtil.toBean(res, Map.class);
        List<JSONObject> list = JSONUtil.toList(result.get("data").get("list").toString(), JSONObject.class);
        if(list!=null&&list.size()>0){
            //首先变更状态为离校
            schoolTeaInfoMapper.updateTeaInSchoolStatus();
            for (JSONObject jsonObject : list) {
                SchoolTeaInfo schoolTeaInfo = new SchoolTeaInfo();
                String gh = jsonObject.getString("gh");
                SchoolTeaInfo schoolTeaInfo1 = schoolTeaInfoMapper.selectSchoolTeaInfoByTeaUserNum(gh);
                if(schoolTeaInfo1 == null){
                    schoolTeaInfo.setPassword(SecurityUtils.encryptPassword(jsonObject.getString("password")));
                    R<SysDept> bmmc = remoteDeptService.selectDeptByDeptName(jsonObject.getString("bmmc"));
                    if(bmmc != null&&bmmc.getData()!=null){
                        schoolTeaInfo.setUserDeptId(bmmc.getData().getDeptId());
                    }
                    schoolTeaInfo.setUserDeptName(jsonObject.getString("bmmc"));
                    schoolTeaInfo.setTeaUserNum(jsonObject.getString("gh"));
                    schoolTeaInfo.setPhoneNum(jsonObject.getString("lldh"));
                    String xb = jsonObject.getString("xb");
                    xb = "男".equals(xb)?"1":"2";
                    schoolTeaInfo.setSex(xb);
                    schoolTeaInfo.setTeaUserName(jsonObject.getString("xm"));
                    schoolTeaInfo.setCreateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
                    schoolTeaInfo.setDataSources("1");
                    schoolTeaInfo.setInSchoolStatus("1");
                    schoolTeaInfoMapper.insertSchoolTeaInfo(schoolTeaInfo);
                    SysUser sysUser = new SysUser();
                    int j = remoteUserService.selsectMaxUserId();
                    sysUser.setUserId(Long.valueOf(j+1));
                    sysUser.setUserName(schoolTeaInfo.getTeaUserNum());
                    sysUser.setUserType("01");
                    sysUser.setDeptId(schoolTeaInfo.getUserDeptId());
                    sysUser.setPhonenumber(schoolTeaInfo.getPhoneNum());
                    sysUser.setNickName(schoolTeaInfo.getTeaUserName());
                    SysUser sysUser1 = updateUserSex(schoolTeaInfo.getSex());
                    sysUser.setSex(sysUser1.getSex());
                    sysUser.setPassword(schoolTeaInfo.getPassword());
                    Long roleIds[] = {101L};
                    sysUser.setRoleIds(roleIds);
                    remoteUserService.addUser(sysUser);
//                }else if("1".equals(schoolTeaInfo1.getDelFlag())){
//                    schoolTeaInfo1.setDelFlag(0L);
//                    schoolTeaInfoMapper.updateSchoolTeaInfo(schoolTeaInfo1);
//                    SysUser sysUser = new SysUser();
//                    R<LoginUser> userInfo = remoteUserService.getUserInfo(schoolTeaInfo.getTeaUserNum(), SecurityConstants.INNER);
//                    sysUser.setUserId(userInfo.getData().getSysUser().getUserId());
//                    sysUser.setUserName(schoolTeaInfo.getTeaUserNum());
//                    sysUser.setDeptId(schoolTeaInfo.getUserDeptId());
//                    sysUser.setPhonenumber(schoolTeaInfo.getPhoneNum());
//                    sysUser.setNickName(schoolTeaInfo.getTeaUserName());
//                    sysUser.setUserType("01");
//                    SysUser sysUser1 = updateUserSex(schoolTeaInfo.getSex());
//                    sysUser.setSex(sysUser1.getSex());
//                    sysUser.setPassword(schoolTeaInfo.getPassword());
//                    sysUser.setDelFlag("0");
//                    remoteUserService.editUser(sysUser);
                }else{
                    schoolTeaInfo.setTeaUserId(schoolTeaInfo1.getTeaUserId());
                    schoolTeaInfo.setTeaUserName(jsonObject.getString("xm"));
                    schoolTeaInfo.setPassword(SecurityUtils.encryptPassword(jsonObject.getString("password")));
                    R<SysDept> bmmc = remoteDeptService.selectDeptByDeptName(jsonObject.getString("bmmc"));
                    if(bmmc != null && bmmc.getData()!=null){
                        schoolTeaInfo.setUserDeptId(bmmc.getData().getDeptId());
                    }
                    schoolTeaInfo.setUserDeptName(jsonObject.getString("bmmc"));
                    schoolTeaInfo.setTeaUserNum(jsonObject.getString("gh"));
                    schoolTeaInfo.setPhoneNum(jsonObject.getString("lldh"));
                    String xb = jsonObject.getString("xb");
                    xb = "男".equals(xb)?"1":"2";
                    schoolTeaInfo.setSex(xb);
                    schoolTeaInfo.setDelFlag(0L);
                    schoolTeaInfo.setUpdateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
                    schoolTeaInfo.setDataSources("1");
                    schoolTeaInfo.setInSchoolStatus("1");
                    schoolTeaInfoMapper.updateSchoolTeaInfo(schoolTeaInfo);
                    SysUser sysUser = new SysUser();
                    R<LoginUser> userInfo = remoteUserService.getUserInfo(schoolTeaInfo.getTeaUserNum(), SecurityConstants.INNER);
                    sysUser.setUserId(userInfo.getData().getSysUser().getUserId());
                    sysUser.setUserName(schoolTeaInfo.getTeaUserNum());
                    sysUser.setDeptId(schoolTeaInfo.getUserDeptId());
                    sysUser.setPhonenumber(schoolTeaInfo.getPhoneNum());
                    sysUser.setNickName(schoolTeaInfo.getTeaUserName());
                    SysUser sysUser1 = updateUserSex(schoolTeaInfo.getSex());
                    sysUser.setRoles(userInfo.getData().getSysUser().getRoles());
                    sysUser.setSex(sysUser1.getSex());
                    sysUser.setDelFlag("0");
                    sysUser.setPassword(schoolTeaInfo.getPassword());
                    remoteUserService.editUser(sysUser);
                }
            }
        }
        return 1;
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 更新sysUser性别
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2023/01/12 12:39:36
     * @param sex 性
     * @return {@link SysUser }
     */
    @Override
    public SysUser updateUserSex(String sex){
        SysUser sysUser = new SysUser();
        if("1".equals(sex)){
            sysUser.setSex("0");
        }else if("2".equals(sex)){
            sysUser.setSex("1");
        }
        return sysUser;
    }
    @Override
    public SchoolTeaInfo selectSchoolTeaInfoByTeaUserNum(String teaUserNum) {
        return schoolTeaInfoMapper.selectSchoolTeaInfoByTeaUserNum(teaUserNum);
    }

        return schoolTeaInfoMapper.selectSchoolTeaInfoByTeaUserNums(teaUserNums);
    }
    /**
     * 上传并压缩图片
     *
     * @param file       MultipartFile
     * @param originalName 原始文件名（可选）
     * @return 完整访问地址
     */
    @Value("${file.domain}")
    private String fileDomain;
    @Value("${file.path}")
    private String localFilePath;
    @Value("${file.prefix}")
    private String prefix;
    public String uploadAndCompressImage(MultipartFile file, String originalName) {
        // 检查是否是图片
        if (file.isEmpty()) {
            throw new IllegalArgumentException("空图片文件");
        }
        if (!isImage(file)) {
            throw new IllegalArgumentException("不是图片文件");
        }
        String relativePath = "";
        try {
            // 先复制文件内容到字节数组，以便可以多次读取
            byte[] fileBytes = file.getBytes();
            // 第一次检查图片是否有效
            ByteArrayInputStream checkStream = new ByteArrayInputStream(fileBytes);
            if (ImageIO.read(checkStream) == null) {
                throw new IllegalArgumentException("无效的图片文件");
            }
            // 压缩图片
            ByteArrayInputStream compressStream = new ByteArrayInputStream(fileBytes);
            byte[] compressedData = ImageCompressionUtils.compress(compressStream, 400 * 1024);
            // 保存图片
            ByteArrayInputStream inputStream = new ByteArrayInputStream(compressedData);
            relativePath = saveImage(inputStream, originalName);
        } catch (IOException e) {
            e.printStackTrace();
            return null;
        }
        return fileDomain + prefix + relativePath;
    }
    /**
     * 判断是否为图片
     */
    private boolean isImage(MultipartFile file) {
        String contentType = file.getContentType();
        return contentType != null && contentType.startsWith("image/");
    }
    /**
     * 获取文件扩展名（后缀）
     */
    private String getExtension(String filename) {
        int dotIndex = filename.lastIndexOf('.');
        return (dotIndex == -1) ? "jpg" : filename.substring(dotIndex + 1);
    }
    /**
     * 保存图片到服务器
     */
    private String saveImage(InputStream inputStream, String fileName) throws IOException {
        String facePath = "/faceImg/";
        Path storageDir = Paths.get(localFilePath + facePath);
        System.err.println("localFilePath------"+storageDir);
        if (!Files.exists(storageDir)) {
            Files.createDirectories(storageDir);
        }
        Path filePath = storageDir.resolve(fileName);
        try (OutputStream outputStream = Files.newOutputStream(filePath)) {
            byte[] buffer = new byte[1024];
            int bytesRead;
            while ((bytesRead = inputStream.read(buffer)) != -1) {
                outputStream.write(buffer, 0, bytesRead);
            }
        }
        return facePath + fileName;
    }
}

/**
 * 临时工Service业务层处理
 *
 * @author chenrise

 */
@Service
public class SchoolTempUserInfoServiceImpl implements ISchoolTempUserInfoService {
    @Autowired
    private SchoolTempUserInfoMapper schoolTempUserInfoMapper;
    @Autowired
    protected Validator validator;
    @Autowired
    private RemoteDeptService remoteDeptService;
    @Autowired
    private RemoteUserService remoteUserService;
    @Autowired
    private ISchoolTeaInfoService schoolTeaInfoService;
    @Autowired
    private SchoolTeaInfoMapper schoolTeaInfoMapper;
    @Autowired
    private SchoolStuInfoMapper schoolStuInfoMapper;
    /**
     * @Description: 获取临时工详细信息
     * @Author: chenfang

    /**
     * @Description: 获取临时工详细信息

    }
    /**
     * @Description: 查询临时工列表
     * @Author: chenfang

     * @param schoolTempUserInfo: 临时工实体类

     */

    public List<SchoolTempUserInfo> selectSchoolTempUserInfoList(SchoolTempUserInfo schoolTempUserInfo) {
        return schoolTempUserInfoMapper.selectSchoolTempUserInfoList(schoolTempUserInfo);
    }
    @Override
    public List<SchoolTempUserInfoVo> selectSchoolTempUserInfoList1(SchoolTempUserInfoVo schoolTempUserInfo) {
        return schoolTempUserInfoMapper.selectSchoolTempUserInfoList1(schoolTempUserInfo);
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 新增临时工
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-12-1 17:13:00
     * @param schoolTempUserInfo: 临时工实体类
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo
     */
    @Override
    public int insertSchoolTempUserInfo(SchoolTempUserInfo schoolTempUserInfo) {
        String password = "";
        schoolTempUserInfo.setCreateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        R<SysDept> sysDeptR = remoteDeptService.selectDeptById(schoolTempUserInfo.getUnitId());
        if(sysDeptR != null){
            schoolTempUserInfo.setUnitName(sysDeptR.getData().getDeptName());
        }
        String phoneNum = schoolTempUserInfo.getPhoneNum();
        if(StringUtils.isEmpty(schoolTempUserInfo.getPassword())){
            password = "Jlgs@" + (phoneNum).substring(phoneNum.length() - 6);
            schoolTempUserInfo.setPassword(SecurityUtils.encryptPassword(password));
        }else{
            schoolTempUserInfo.setPassword(SecurityUtils.encryptPassword(schoolTempUserInfo.getPassword()));
        }
        schoolTempUserInfo.setCreateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        if(schoolTempUserInfo.getStatusStartDate()==null){
            schoolTempUserInfo.setStatusStartDate(DateUtil.beginOfDay(new Date()));
        }
        if(schoolTempUserInfo.getStatusEndDate()==null){
            schoolTempUserInfo.setStatusEndDate(DateUtil.parse("2099-01-01","yyyy-MM-dd"));
        }
        if(schoolTempUserInfo.getStatusStartDate().getTime()<=new Date().getTime()&&schoolTempUserInfo.getStatusEndDate().getTime()>=new Date().getTime()){
            schoolTempUserInfo.setInSchoolStatus("1");
        }else{
            schoolTempUserInfo.setInSchoolStatus("2");
        }
        int i = schoolTempUserInfoMapper.insertSchoolTempUserInfo(schoolTempUserInfo);
        // 创建用户至SysUser表
        SysUser sysUser = new SysUser();
        int j = remoteUserService.selsectMaxUserId();
        sysUser.setUserId(Long.valueOf(j+1));
        sysUser.setUserName(schoolTempUserInfo.getIdCard());
        sysUser.setDeptId(schoolTempUserInfo.getUnitId());
        sysUser.setPhonenumber(schoolTempUserInfo.getPhoneNum());
        sysUser.setNickName(schoolTempUserInfo.getTempUserName());
        SysUser sysUser1 = schoolTeaInfoService.updateUserSex(schoolTempUserInfo.getSex());
        sysUser.setSex(sysUser1.getSex());
        sysUser.setUserType("03");
        sysUser.setPassword(schoolTempUserInfo.getPassword());
        sysUser.setInSchoolStatus(schoolTempUserInfo.getInSchoolStatus());
        sysUser.setStatusStartDate(schoolTempUserInfo.getStatusStartDate());
        sysUser.setStatusEndDate(schoolTempUserInfo.getStatusEndDate());
        Long roleIds[] = {103L};
        sysUser.setRoleIds(roleIds);
        remoteUserService.addUser(sysUser);
        return i;
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 修改临时工
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-12-1 17:13:00
     * @param schoolTempUserInfo: 临时工实体类
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo
     */
    @Override
    public int updateSchoolTempUserInfo(SchoolTempUserInfo schoolTempUserInfo) {
        schoolTempUserInfo.setUpdateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        SchoolTempUserInfo schoolTempUserInfoSelf = schoolTempUserInfoMapper.selectSchoolTempUserInfoByTempUserId(schoolTempUserInfo.getTempUserId());
        R<SysDept> sysDeptR = remoteDeptService.selectDeptById(schoolTempUserInfo.getUnitId());
        schoolTempUserInfo.setUnitName(sysDeptR.getData().getDeptName());
        if("2".equals(schoolTempUserInfo.getUpdateFlag()) || StringUtils.isNotNull(schoolTempUserInfo.getUpdateFlag())){
            return schoolTempUserInfoMapper.updateSchoolTempUserInfo(schoolTempUserInfo);
        }
        R<LoginUser> userInfo = remoteUserService.getUserInfo(schoolTempUserInfoSelf.getIdCard(),SecurityConstants.INNER);
        SysUser sysUser = new SysUser();
        userInfo.getData().getSysUser().setNickName(schoolTempUserInfo.getTempUserName());
        userInfo.getData().getSysUser().setPhonenumber(schoolTempUserInfo.getPhoneNum());
        userInfo.getData().getSysUser().setSex(schoolTempUserInfo.getSex());
        userInfo.getData().getSysUser().setDeptId(schoolTempUserInfo.getUnitId());
        userInfo.getData().getSysUser().setDelFlag(schoolTempUserInfo.getDelFlag());
        userInfo.getData().getSysUser().setUserName(schoolTempUserInfo.getIdCard());
        if(userInfo.getData().getSysUser().getRoles()!=null){
            Long []roleIds = new Long[userInfo.getData().getSysUser().getRoles().size()];
            for(int i=0;i<userInfo.getData().getSysUser().getRoles().size();i++){
                roleIds[i] = userInfo.getData().getSysUser().getRoles().get(i).getRoleId();
            }
            sysUser.setRoleIds(roleIds);
        }
        sysUser.setUpdateFlag("1");
        sysUser.setUserId(userInfo.getData().getSysUser().getUserId());
        sysUser.setNickName(userInfo.getData().getSysUser().getNickName());
        sysUser.setPhonenumber(userInfo.getData().getSysUser().getPhonenumber());
        SysUser sysUser1 = schoolTeaInfoService.updateUserSex(userInfo.getData().getSysUser().getSex());
        sysUser.setSex(sysUser1.getSex());
        sysUser.setSex(userInfo.getData().getSysUser().getSex());
        sysUser.setDeptId(userInfo.getData().getSysUser().getDeptId());
        sysUser.setDelFlag(userInfo.getData().getSysUser().getDelFlag());
        sysUser.setUserName(userInfo.getData().getSysUser().getUserName());
        sysUser.setStatusStartDate(schoolTempUserInfo.getStatusStartDate());
        sysUser.setStatusEndDate(schoolTempUserInfo.getStatusEndDate());
        sysUser.setInSchoolStatus(schoolTempUserInfo.getInSchoolStatus());
        remoteUserService.editUser(sysUser);
        return schoolTempUserInfoMapper.updateSchoolTempUserInfo(schoolTempUserInfo);
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 修改学生信息
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-12-1 17:13:00
     * @return: int
     */
    @Override
    public int updateSchoolTempUserInfoByPhoneNum(SchoolTempUserInfo schoolTempUserInfo) {
        schoolTempUserInfo.setUpdateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        return schoolTempUserInfoMapper.updateSchoolTempUserInfoByPhoneNum(schoolTempUserInfo);
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 批量删除临时工
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-12-1 17:13:00
     * @param tempUserIds: 临时工主键数组
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo
     */
    @Override
    public int deleteSchoolTempUserInfoByTempUserIds(Long[] tempUserIds) {
        for (Long teaUserId : tempUserIds) {
            SchoolTempUserInfo schoolTempUserInfo = schoolTempUserInfoMapper.selectSchoolTempUserInfoByTempUserId(teaUserId);
            R<LoginUser> userInfo = remoteUserService.getUserInfo(schoolTempUserInfo.getIdCard(), SecurityConstants.INNER);
            remoteUserService.removeUser(userInfo.getData().getSysUser().getUserId());
        }
        return schoolTempUserInfoMapper.deleteSchoolTempUserInfoByTempUserIds(tempUserIds);
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 删除临时工
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-12-1 17:13:00
     * @param tempUserId: 临时工主键
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo
     */
    @Override
    public int deleteSchoolTempUserInfoByTempUserId(Long tempUserId) {
        return schoolTempUserInfoMapper.deleteSchoolTempUserInfoByTempUserId(tempUserId);
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 判断电话号唯一
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-12-1 17:13:00
     * @param schoolTempUserInfo: 学生实体类
     * @return: string
     */
    @Override
    public String checkExistByPhoneNum(SchoolTempUserInfo schoolTempUserInfo) {
        Long tempUserId = StringUtils.isNull(schoolTempUserInfo.getTempUserId()) ? -1L : schoolTempUserInfo.getTempUserId();
        SchoolTempUserInfo schoolTempUserInfo1 = schoolTempUserInfoMapper.checkExistByPhoneNum(schoolTempUserInfo);
        if (StringUtils.isNotNull(schoolTempUserInfo1) && schoolTempUserInfo1.getTempUserId().longValue() != tempUserId.longValue())
        {
            if(StringUtils.isNotEmpty(schoolTempUserInfo1.getPhoneNum())){
                return UserConstants.NOT_UNIQUE;
            }
        }
        return UserConstants.UNIQUE;
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 判断身份证号唯一
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-12-1 17:13:00
     * @param schoolTempUserInfo: 学生实体类
     * @return: string
     */
    @Override
    public String checkExistByIdCard(SchoolTempUserInfo schoolTempUserInfo) {
        Long tempUserId = StringUtils.isNull(schoolTempUserInfo.getTempUserId()) ? -1L : schoolTempUserInfo.getTempUserId();
        SchoolTempUserInfo schoolTempUserInfo1 = schoolTempUserInfoMapper.checkExistByIdCard(schoolTempUserInfo);
        if (StringUtils.isNotNull(schoolTempUserInfo1) && schoolTempUserInfo1.getTempUserId().longValue() != tempUserId.longValue())
        {
            if(StringUtils.isNotEmpty(schoolTempUserInfo1.getIdCard())){
                return UserConstants.NOT_UNIQUE;
            }
        }
        return UserConstants.UNIQUE;
    }
    @Override
    public int deleteSchoolTempUserInfoByPhoneNum(String phoneNum) {
        return schoolTempUserInfoMapper.deleteSchoolTempUserInfoByPhoneNum(phoneNum);
    }
    /**
     * @Description:批量设置有效期

     * @return: void
     */
    @Override
