    }
    /**
     * @Description:变更临时人员有效状态
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-04-14 13:49:13
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     */
    @Override
    public AjaxResult updateTempUserStatus() {
        schoolTempUserInfoMapper.updateTempUserStatus();
        schoolTeaInfoMapper.updateTeaUserStatus();
        schoolStuInfoMapper.updateStuUserStatus();
        return AjaxResult.success("1");
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 导入
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-11-25 15:54:41
     * @param schoolTempUserInfoList:
     * @return: java.lang.String
     */
    @Override
    public String importSchoolTempUserInfo(List<SchoolTempUserInfo> schoolTempUserInfoList){
        StringBuffer promptInformation = new StringBuffer();
        List<Integer> err1 = new ArrayList<>();
        List<Integer> err2 = new ArrayList<>();
        List<Integer> err3 = new ArrayList<>();
        List<Integer> err4 = new ArrayList<>();
        List<Integer> err5 = new ArrayList<>();
        List<Integer> err6 = new ArrayList<>();
        List<Integer> err7 = new ArrayList<>();
        List<Integer> err8 = new ArrayList<>();
        List<Integer> err9 = new ArrayList<>();
        List<Integer> err10 = new ArrayList<>();
        List<Integer> err11 = new ArrayList<>();
        List<Integer> err12 = new ArrayList<>();
        List<Integer> err13 = new ArrayList<>();
        int count = 0;
        if (StringUtils.isBlank(promptInformation)) {
            Set<String> excelIdCards = new HashSet<>();
            for (int i = 0; i < schoolTempUserInfoList.size(); i++) {
                SchoolTempUserInfo schoolTempUserInfo = schoolTempUserInfoList.get(i);
                if (StringUtils.isBlank(schoolTempUserInfo.getTempUserName())){
                    err1.add(i+1);
                    continue;
                }
                if (StringUtils.isBlank(schoolTempUserInfo.getPhoneNum())){
                    err2.add(i+1);
                    continue;
                }
                if (StringUtils.isBlank(schoolTempUserInfo.getUnitName())){
                    err3.add(i+1);
                    continue;
                }
                int config = remoteDeptService.selectDeptByName(schoolTempUserInfo.getUnitName());
                if (config == 0){
                    err4.add(i+1);
                    continue;
                }
                SchoolTempUserInfo schoolTempUserInfo2 = schoolTempUserInfoMapper.checkExistByPhoneNum(schoolTempUserInfo);
                if(StringUtils.isNotEmpty(schoolTempUserInfo.getPhoneNum())){
                    if(schoolTempUserInfo2 != null){
                        err5.add(i+1);
                        continue;
                    }
                    if(!PhoneUtil.isMobile(schoolTempUserInfo.getPhoneNum())){
                        err6.add(i+1);
                        continue;
                    }
                }
                if(StringUtils.isBlank(schoolTempUserInfo.getIdCard())){
                    err7.add(i+1);
                    continue;
                }else {
                    if (excelIdCards.contains(schoolTempUserInfo.getIdCard())) {
                        err12.add(i + 1);
                        continue;
                    }
                    if (!IdcardUtil.isValidCard18(schoolTempUserInfo.getIdCard())) {
                        err13.add(i + 1);
                        continue;
                    }
                    excelIdCards.add(schoolTempUserInfo.getIdCard());
                    SchoolTempUserInfo schoolTempUserInfo1 = schoolTempUserInfoMapper.checkExistByIdCard(schoolTempUserInfo);
                    if(schoolTempUserInfo1!=null){
                        err10.add(i+1);
                        continue;
                    }
                }
                R<SysDept> sysDeptR = remoteDeptService.selectDeptByDeptName(schoolTempUserInfo.getUnitName());
                SchoolTempUserInfo schoolTempUserInfo1 = new SchoolTempUserInfo();
                SysDept data = sysDeptR.getData();
                if(data != null){
                    if(StringUtils.isNotEmpty(sysDeptR.getData().getDeptId().toString())){
                        schoolTempUserInfo1.setUnitId(sysDeptR.getData().getDeptId());
                    }
                }
                if(StringUtils.isEmpty(schoolTempUserInfo.getJob())){
                    err8.add(i+1);
                    continue;
                }else{
                   String job =  DictUtils.getDictValue("temp_user_type",schoolTempUserInfo.getJob());
                   if(StringUtils.isEmpty(job)){
                       err9.add(i+1);
                       continue;
                   }else{
                       schoolTempUserInfo1.setJob(job);
                   }
                }
                if(schoolTempUserInfo.getStatusStartDate()!=null&&schoolTempUserInfo.getStatusEndDate()!=null){
                    if(schoolTempUserInfo.getStatusStartDate().after(schoolTempUserInfo.getStatusEndDate())){
                        err11.add(i+1);
                        continue;
                    }
                }
                schoolTempUserInfo1.setTempUserId(schoolTempUserInfo1.getTempUserId());
                schoolTempUserInfo1.setTempUserCode(schoolTempUserInfo.getTempUserCode());
                schoolTempUserInfo1.setTempUserName(schoolTempUserInfo.getTempUserName());
                schoolTempUserInfo1.setPhoneNum(schoolTempUserInfo.getPhoneNum());
                schoolTempUserInfo1.setUnitName(schoolTempUserInfo.getUnitName());
                schoolTempUserInfo1.setInSchoolStatus(schoolTempUserInfo.getInSchoolStatus());
                schoolTempUserInfo1.setUnitName(schoolTempUserInfo.getUnitName());
                schoolTempUserInfo1.setStatusStartDate(schoolTempUserInfo.getStatusStartDate());
                schoolTempUserInfo1.setStatusEndDate(schoolTempUserInfo.getStatusEndDate());
                schoolTempUserInfo1.setIdCard(schoolTempUserInfo.getIdCard());
                schoolTempUserInfo1.setSex(schoolTempUserInfo.getSex());
                schoolTempUserInfo1.setTempUnit(schoolTempUserInfo.getTempUnit());
                SchoolTempUserInfo schoolTempUserInfo3 = new SchoolTempUserInfo();
                List<SchoolTempUserInfo> schoolTempUserInfos = schoolTempUserInfoMapper.selectSchoolTempUserInfoList(schoolTempUserInfo3);
                Format f1=new DecimalFormat("000000");
                if(0 == schoolTempUserInfos.size()){
                    schoolTempUserInfo1.setTempUserCode("qtry"+f1.format(1));
                }else {
                    schoolTempUserInfo1.setTempUserCode("qtry"+f1.format(schoolTempUserInfos.size()+1));
                }
                insertSchoolTempUserInfo(schoolTempUserInfo1);
                count++;
            }
            if (count == schoolTempUserInfoList.size()) {
                promptInformation.append("全部导入成功！！！");
            }else{
                promptInformation.append("共导入{"+schoolTempUserInfoList.size()+"}条，导入成功{"+count+"}条，导入失败{"+(schoolTempUserInfoList.size()-count)+"}条" + "</br>");
                promptInformation.append("失败原因如下：" + "</br>");
                if (err1.size() >0){
                    promptInformation.append("第"+err1.toString()+"条,姓名不能为空,导入失败。" + "</br>");
                }
                if (err2.size() >0){
                    promptInformation.append("第"+err2.toString()+"条,联系电话不能为空,导入失败。" + "</br>");
                }
                if (err3.size() >0){
                    promptInformation.append("第"+err3.toString()+"条,所在院系/部门不能为空,导入失败。" + "</br>");
                }
                if (err4.size() >0){
                    promptInformation.append("第"+err4.toString()+"条,所在院系/部门不存在,导入失败。" + "</br>");
                }
                if (err5.size() >0){
                    promptInformation.append("第"+err5.toString()+"条,联系电话已存在,导入失败。" + "</br>");
                }
                if (err6.size() >0){
                    promptInformation.append("第"+err6.toString()+"条,联系电话填写不正确,导入失败。" + "</br>");
                }
                if (err7.size() >0){
                    promptInformation.append("第"+err7.toString()+"条,身份证号不能为空,导入失败。" + "</br>");
                }
                if (err8.size() >0){
                    promptInformation.append("第"+err8.toString()+"条,岗位不能为空,导入失败。" + "</br>");
                }
                if (err9.size() >0){
                    promptInformation.append("第"+err9.toString()+"条,未查到相关岗位,导入失败。" + "</br>");
                }
                if (err10.size() >0){
                    promptInformation.append("第"+err10.toString()+"条,身份证号已存在,导入失败。" + "</br>");
                }
                if (err11.size() >0){
                    promptInformation.append("第"+err11.toString()+"条,有效开始时间不可大于有效结束时间,导入失败。" + "</br>");
                }
                if (err12.size() > 0) {
                    promptInformation.append("第" + err12.toString() + "条,身份证号重复,导入失败。" + "</br>");
                }
                if (err13.size() > 0) {
                    promptInformation.append("第" + err13.toString() + "条,身份证号格式不正确,导入失败。" + "</br>");
                }
            }
        }
        return promptInformation.toString();
    }
    /**
     * @Description: 查询临时工工号总数
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022/12/14 09:05:37
     * @param schoolTempUserInfo 学校临时用户信息
     * @return {@link List }<{@link SchoolTempUserInfo }>
     */
    @Override
    public List<SchoolTempUserInfo> selectTempUserCodeCount(SchoolTempUserInfo schoolTempUserInfo) {
        return schoolTempUserInfoMapper.selectTempUserCodeCount(schoolTempUserInfo);
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.service.impl;
import java.util.List;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.DateUtils;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.SchoolTimeSchedulingExchange;
import com.chenrise.jufe.mapper.SchoolTimeSchedulingExchangeMapper;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.ISchoolTimeSchedulingExchangeService;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
/**
 * 课表调课Service业务层处理
 *
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2023-08-16
 */
@Service
public class SchoolTimeSchedulingExchangeServiceImpl implements ISchoolTimeSchedulingExchangeService
{
    @Autowired
    private SchoolTimeSchedulingExchangeMapper schoolTimeSchedulingExchangeMapper;
    /**
     * 查询课表调课
     *
     * @param id 课表调课主键
     * @return 课表调课
     */
    @Override
    public SchoolTimeSchedulingExchange selectSchoolTimeSchedulingExchangeById(Long id)
    {
        return schoolTimeSchedulingExchangeMapper.selectSchoolTimeSchedulingExchangeById(id);
    }
    /**
     * 查询课表调课列表
     *
     * @param schoolTimeSchedulingExchange 课表调课
     * @return 课表调课
     */
    @Override
    public List<SchoolTimeSchedulingExchange> selectSchoolTimeSchedulingExchangeList(SchoolTimeSchedulingExchange schoolTimeSchedulingExchange)
    {
        return schoolTimeSchedulingExchangeMapper.selectSchoolTimeSchedulingExchangeList(schoolTimeSchedulingExchange);
    }
    /**
     * 新增课表调课
     *
     * @param schoolTimeSchedulingExchange 课表调课
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int insertSchoolTimeSchedulingExchange(SchoolTimeSchedulingExchange schoolTimeSchedulingExchange)
    {
        schoolTimeSchedulingExchange.setCreateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        return schoolTimeSchedulingExchangeMapper.insertSchoolTimeSchedulingExchange(schoolTimeSchedulingExchange);
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.service.impl;
import cn.hutool.core.date.DateUtil;
import cn.hutool.http.HttpRequest;
import cn.hutool.json.JSONObject;
import cn.hutool.json.JSONUtil;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.DateUtils;
import com.chenrise.common.redis.service.RedisService;
import com.chenrise.common.security.utils.SecurityUtils;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.Bo.SchoolTimeSchedulingBo;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.*;
import com.chenrise.jufe.mapper.*;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.ISchoolCourseSectionService;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.ISchoolReservationTimeInfoService;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.ISchoolTimeSchedulingService;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Value;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
import org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;
import javax.annotation.Resource;
import java.text.SimpleDateFormat;
import java.util.*;
import java.util.stream.Collectors;
import static com.chenrise.common.core.constant.CacheConstants.SCHEDULING_CONFIG_KEY;
/**
 * @Description:课程时间调度Service业务层处理
 * @Author: sunming
 * @Date: 2022-12-05 10:56:55
 */
@Slf4j
@Service
public class SchoolTimeSchedulingServiceImpl implements ISchoolTimeSchedulingService {
    @Resource
    private SchoolTimeSchedulingMapper schoolTimeSchedulingMapper;
    @Resource
    private SchoolReservationInfoServiceImpl reservationInfoService;
    @Resource
    private ISchoolReservationTimeInfoService timeInfoService;
    @Value("${cjdx.apis[0].apiKey}")
    private String kc_api_key;
    @Value("${cjdx.apis[0].urls[0].url}")
    private String kc_sjdd;
    @Value("${cjdx.apis[0].urls[1].url}")
    private String kc_sjddDay;
    @Value("${wx.miniapp.configs[0].templateId.auditResultTemplateId}")
    private String auditResultTemplateId;
    @Resource
    private SchoolReservationInfoMapper schoolReservationInfoMapper;
    @Resource
    private SchoolBaseSetInfoMapper schoolBaseSetInfoMapper;
    @Resource
    private SchoolTimeSchedulingExchangeMapper schoolTimeSchedulingExchangeMapper;
    @Resource
    private SchoolCourseMapper courseMapper;
    @Resource
    private SchoolRoomMapper roomMapper;
    @Resource
    private RedisService redisService;
    @Resource
    private ISchoolCourseSectionService schoolCourseSectionService;
    /**
     * @param schedulingId: 课程时间调度主键
     * @Description:查询课程时间调度
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-12-05 10:57:09
     * @return: com.chenrise.jufe.domain.SchoolTimeScheduling课程时间调度
     */
    @Override
    public SchoolTimeScheduling selectSchoolTimeSchedulingBySchedulingId(String schedulingId) {
        return schoolTimeSchedulingMapper.selectSchoolTimeSchedulingBySchedulingId(schedulingId);
    }
    /**
     * @param schoolTimeScheduling: 课程时间调度
     * @Description:查询课程时间调度列表
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-12-05 10:57:30
     * @return: java.util.List<com.chenrise.jufe.domain.SchoolTimeScheduling>
     */
    @Override
    public List<SchoolTimeScheduling> selectSchoolTimeSchedulingList(SchoolTimeScheduling schoolTimeScheduling) {
        return schoolTimeSchedulingMapper.selectSchoolTimeSchedulingList(schoolTimeScheduling);
    }
    /**
     * @param schoolTimeScheduling: 课程时间调度
     * @Description:新增课程时间调度
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-12-05 10:57:35
     * @return: int
     */
    @Override
    public int insertSchoolTimeScheduling(SchoolTimeScheduling schoolTimeScheduling) {
        schoolTimeScheduling.setCreateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        return schoolTimeSchedulingMapper.insertSchoolTimeScheduling(schoolTimeScheduling);
    }
    /**
     * @param schoolTimeScheduling: 课程时间调度
     * @Description:修改课程时间调度
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-12-05 10:57:40
     * @return: int
     */
    @Override
    public int updateSchoolTimeScheduling(SchoolTimeScheduling schoolTimeScheduling) {
        SchoolTimeScheduling check = schoolTimeSchedulingMapper.selectSchoolTimeSchedulingBySchedulingId(schoolTimeScheduling.getSchedulingId());
        SchoolCourse course = courseMapper.selectCourseByCourseNo(check.getCourseNo());
        SchoolRoom room = roomMapper.selectSchoolRoomByRoomId(check.getRoomId());
        SchoolTimeSchedulingExchange sse = new SchoolTimeSchedulingExchange();
        sse.setRoomId(check.getRoomId() + "");
        sse.setRoomName(room.getRoomName());
        sse.setCourseName(course.getCourseName());
        sse.setClassSection(check.getClassSection() + "");
        sse.setCourseDate(check.getCourseDate());
        sse.setStartTime(check.getStartTime());
        sse.setEndTime(check.getEndTime());
        sse.setTeachingWeek(check.getTeachingWeek());
        sse.setCreateBy(SecurityUtils.getLoginUser().getSysUser().getNickName());
        sse.setCreateTime(new Date());
        sse.setType("5");
        sse.setDelayNum(schoolTimeScheduling.getDelayNum());
        schoolTimeSchedulingExchangeMapper.insertSchoolTimeSchedulingExchange(sse);
        schoolTimeScheduling.setUpdateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        return schoolTimeSchedulingMapper.updateSchoolTimeScheduling(schoolTimeScheduling);
    }
    /**
     * @param schedulingIds: 需要删除的课程时间调度主键
     * @Description:批量删除课程时间调度
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-12-05 10:57:45
     * @return: int
     */
    @Override
    public int deleteSchoolTimeSchedulingBySchedulingIds(Long[] schedulingIds) {
        return schoolTimeSchedulingMapper.deleteSchoolTimeSchedulingBySchedulingIds(schedulingIds);
    }
    /**
     * @param schedulingId: 课程时间调度主键
     * @Description:删除课程时间调度信息
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-12-05 10:57:48
     * @return: int
     */
    @Override
    public int deleteSchoolTimeSchedulingBySchedulingId(Long schedulingId) {
        return schoolTimeSchedulingMapper.deleteSchoolTimeSchedulingBySchedulingId(schedulingId);
    }
    @Override
    public void sync() {
        SimpleDateFormat format = new SimpleDateFormat("yyyy-MM-dd");
        JSONObject object = new JSONObject();
        String res = HttpRequest.post(this.kc_sjdd)
                .header("Authorization-Type", "Apikey")
                .header("Authorization", this.kc_api_key)
                .header("Content-Type", "application/x-www-form-urlencoded")
                .body(String.valueOf(object))
                .execute().body();
        Map<String, Map<String, Object>> result = JSONUtil.toBean(res, Map.class);
        List<JSONObject> list = JSONUtil.toList(result.get("data").get("list").toString(), JSONObject.class);
        if (list != null && list.size() > 0) {
            schoolTimeSchedulingMapper.delAll();
            System.out.println("开始重新插入课表开始-----------------");
            int i = 0;
            for (JSONObject json : list) {
                SchoolTimeScheduling sts = new SchoolTimeScheduling();
                sts.setCourseNo(json.getStr("kkh"));
                sts.setSchoolyearSemester(json.getStr("xnxq"));
                sts.setRoomId(json.getLong("room_id"));
                sts.setRoomCode(json.getStr("room_id"));
                sts.setTeachingWeek(json.getLong("jxz"));
                sts.setWeekDay(json.getLong("xq"));
                sts.setCourseDate(json.getDate("rq"));
                sts.setStartTime(json.getStr("startTime"));
                sts.setEndTime(json.getStr("endTime"));
                sts.setClassSection(json.getLong("jc"));
                sts.setDelFlag(0L);
                schoolTimeSchedulingMapper.insertSchoolTimeScheduling(sts);
                System.out.println("第" + (i + 1) + "条记录插入==================");
                i++;
            }
            System.out.println("开始重新插入课表结束-----------------");
        }
    }
    /**
     * @Description:更新当天的课程信息
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-02-01 09:12:52
     * @return: void
     */
    @Override
    @Transactional
    public void syncCourseSchDay() {
        this.updateCourseToday(0);
    }
    /**
     * @Description:更新一周内的课程信息
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-02-01 09:13:18
     * @return: void
     */
    @Override
    public void syncCourseSchWeek() {
        for (int i = 0; i < 7; i++) {
            this.updateCourseDay(i + 1);
        }
    }
    /**
     * @param schoolTimeScheduling:
     * @Description:查询教室今日课程
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-04-24 13:44:51
     * @return: java.util.List<com.chenrise.jufe.domain.SchoolTimeScheduling>
     */
    @Override
    public List<SchoolTimeSchedulingBo> selectListRoomClass(SchoolTimeSchedulingBo schoolTimeScheduling) {
        List<SchoolTimeSchedulingBo> list = schoolTimeSchedulingMapper.selectListRoomClass(schoolTimeScheduling);
        return list;
    }
    /**
     * @param schoolTimeScheduling:
     * @Description:添加移除课程黑名单
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-04-24 16:59:28
     * @return: java.lang.Integer
     */
    @Override
    @Transactional(rollbackFor = Exception.class)
    public Integer updateRoomClassStatus(SchoolTimeSchedulingBo schoolTimeScheduling) {
        Integer inBlack = schoolTimeScheduling.getInBlack();
        //当前课程在黑名单中，则进行移除操作
        if (inBlack != null && inBlack == 1) {
            schoolTimeSchedulingMapper.removeBlackListInfo(schoolTimeScheduling);
        } else {
            schoolTimeSchedulingMapper.addBlackListInfo(schoolTimeScheduling);
        }
        SchoolTimeSchedulingExchange sse = new SchoolTimeSchedulingExchange();
        sse.setRoomId(schoolTimeScheduling.getRoomId() + "");
        sse.setRoomName(schoolTimeScheduling.getRoomName());
        sse.setCourseName(schoolTimeScheduling.getCourseName());
        sse.setClassSection(schoolTimeScheduling.getSectionName());
        sse.setCourseDate(schoolTimeScheduling.getCourseDate());
        sse.setStartTime(schoolTimeScheduling.getStartTime());
        sse.setEndTime(schoolTimeScheduling.getEndTime());
        sse.setTeachingWeek(schoolTimeScheduling.getTeachingWeek());
        sse.setCreateBy(SecurityUtils.getLoginUser().getSysUser().getNickName());
        sse.setCreateTime(new Date());
        if (schoolTimeScheduling.getOneMore() == 1) {
            if (schoolTimeScheduling.getInBlack() == 1) {
                sse.setType("1");
            } else {
                sse.setType("2");
            }
        } else {
            if (schoolTimeScheduling.getInBlack() == 1) {
                sse.setType("4");
            } else {
                sse.setType("3");
            }
        }
        schoolTimeSchedulingExchangeMapper.insertSchoolTimeSchedulingExchange(sse);
        return 1;
    }
    @Override
    public List<SchoolTimeScheduling> buildSchedulingForJlgs(List<SchoolTimeSchedulingSync> syncList,
                                                             Map<String, SchoolRoom> roomCodeMap,
                                                             SchedulingSetting schedulingSetting,
                                                             Map<String, SysJcxx> jcxxMap) {
        if (syncList == null || syncList.isEmpty()) {
            return new ArrayList<>();
        }
        Date schoolWeekStartDay = schedulingSetting.getSchoolWeekStartDay();
        List<SchoolTimeScheduling> schoolTimeSchedulingList = new ArrayList<>(syncList.size() * 16);
        for (SchoolTimeSchedulingSync sync : syncList) {
            // 过滤掉没有教学周、没有课节的数据
            if (sync.getTeachingWeek() == null || sync.getClassSection() == null) {
                continue;
            }
            // 教学周
            List<Long> teacherWeeks = Arrays.stream(sync.getTeachingWeek().split(","))
                    .map(Long::valueOf)
                    .collect(Collectors.toList());
            // 课节
            String[] sections = sync.getClassSection().split("-");
            Set<Long> classSections = new HashSet<>();
            if (sections.length > 0) {
                long start = Long.parseLong(sections[0]);
                long end = sections.length > 1 ? Long.parseLong(sections[1]) : start;
                for (long i = start; i <= end; i++) {
                    classSections.add(i);
                }
            }
            // 提取公共变量
            String schoolYearSemester = sync.getSchoolYaer() + "-" + sync.getSemester();
            SchoolRoom schoolRoom = roomCodeMap.get(sync.getRoomCode());
            Long roomId = schoolRoom.getRoomId();
            long weekDay = (long) Double.parseDouble(sync.getWeekDay());
            for (Long teacherWeek : teacherWeeks) {
                // 计算上课日期日期
                Date courseDate = DateUtil.offsetDay(DateUtil.offsetWeek(schoolWeekStartDay, (int) (teacherWeek - 1)), (int) (weekDay - 1));
                for (Long classSection : classSections) {
                    SysJcxx jcxx = jcxxMap.get(classSection.toString());
                    if (jcxx == null) {
                        continue;
                    }
                    SchoolTimeScheduling item = new SchoolTimeScheduling();
                    item.setSchedulingId(sync.getId() + "_" + teacherWeek + "_" + classSection);
                    // 中间表的数据的id为课程号+班级id
                    item.setCourseNo(sync.getCourseNo() + sync.getJxbid());
                    item.setSchoolyearSemester(schoolYearSemester);
                    item.setRoomId(roomId);
                    item.setRoomCode(schoolRoom.getRoomCode());
                    item.setSyncRoomCode(sync.getRoomCode());
                    item.setTeachingWeek(teacherWeek);
                    item.setWeekDay(weekDay);
                    item.setCourseDate(courseDate);
                    item.setStartTime(jcxx.getKSSJ());
                    item.setEndTime(jcxx.getJSSJ());
                    item.setClassSection(classSection);
                    schoolTimeSchedulingList.add(item);
                }
            }
        }
        return schoolTimeSchedulingList;
    }
    @Transactional(rollbackFor = Exception.class)
    @Override
    public void updateForSync(List<SchoolTimeScheduling> schedulingList) {
        SchedulingSetting schedulingSetting = redisService.getCacheObject(SCHEDULING_CONFIG_KEY);
        if (schedulingSetting == null) {
            log.error("课表设置未配置，请检查redis key:{}", SCHEDULING_CONFIG_KEY);
            throw new RuntimeException("请先配置课表设置");
        }
        String schoolYearSemester = schedulingSetting.getSchoolYear() + "-" + schedulingSetting.getSemesterType();
        //先根据学年学期删除数据
        schoolTimeSchedulingMapper.deleteBySchoolyearSemester(schoolYearSemester);
        //批量插入数据 分批量插入
        int batchSize = 1000;
        for (int i = 0; i < schedulingList.size(); i += batchSize) {
            int end = Math.min(i + batchSize, schedulingList.size());
            List<SchoolTimeScheduling> subList = schedulingList.subList(i, end);
            schoolTimeSchedulingMapper.batchInsert(subList);
        }
    }
    /**
     * @param daySize:
     * @Description:更新新今日课程信息
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-05-15 09:37:40
     * @return: void
     */
    private void updateCourseToday(Integer daySize) {
        SimpleDateFormat format = new SimpleDateFormat("yyyy-MM-dd");
        //获取当前日期
        Date date = new Date();
        Calendar cal = Calendar.getInstance();
        cal.setTime(date);
        cal.add(Calendar.DATE, daySize);
        String dateInfo = format.format(cal.getTime());
        JSONObject object = new JSONObject();
        String res = HttpRequest.post(this.kc_sjddDay + "?rq=" + dateInfo)
                .header("Authorization-Type", "Apikey")
                .header("Authorization", this.kc_api_key)
                .header("Content-Type", "application/x-www-form-urlencoded")
                .body(String.valueOf(object))
                .execute().body();
        Map<String, Map<String, Object>> result = JSONUtil.toBean(res, Map.class);
        List<JSONObject> list = JSONUtil.toList(result.get("data").get("list").toString(), JSONObject.class);
        schoolTimeSchedulingMapper.deleteSchoolTimeSchoolTemp();
        if (list != null && list.size() > 0) {
            schoolTimeSchedulingMapper.insertSchoolTimeSchedulingTemp(list);
            schoolTimeSchedulingMapper.insertNewInfoToCouseInfo();
        }
        schoolTimeSchedulingMapper.deleteNotInNowList();
    }
    /**
     * @Description:按天更新课程安排信息
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-02-01 09:16:01
     * @return: void
     */
    private void updateCourseDay(Integer daySize) {
        SimpleDateFormat format = new SimpleDateFormat("yyyy-MM-dd");
        //获取当前日期
        Date date = new Date();
        Calendar cal = Calendar.getInstance();
        cal.setTime(date);
        cal.add(Calendar.DATE, daySize);
        String dateInfo = format.format(cal.getTime());
        JSONObject object = new JSONObject();
        String res = HttpRequest.post(this.kc_sjddDay + "?rq=" + dateInfo)
                .header("Authorization-Type", "Apikey")
                .header("Authorization", this.kc_api_key)
                .header("Content-Type", "application/x-www-form-urlencoded")
                .body(String.valueOf(object))
                .execute().body();
        Map<String, Map<String, Object>> result = JSONUtil.toBean(res, Map.class);
        List<JSONObject> list = JSONUtil.toList(result.get("data").get("list").toString(), JSONObject.class);
        if (list != null && list.size() > 0) {
            schoolTimeSchedulingMapper.delAllByDay(dateInfo);
            System.out.println("开始更新今日课程安排信息-----------------");
            int i = 0;
            for (JSONObject json : list) {
                SchoolTimeScheduling sts = new SchoolTimeScheduling();
                sts.setCourseNo(json.getStr("kkh"));
                sts.setSchoolyearSemester(json.getStr("xnxq"));
                sts.setRoomId(json.getLong("room_id"));
                sts.setRoomCode(json.getStr("room_id"));
                sts.setTeachingWeek(json.getLong("jxz"));
                sts.setWeekDay(json.getLong("xq"));
                sts.setCourseDate(json.getDate("rq"));
                sts.setStartTime(json.getStr("startTime"));
                sts.setEndTime(json.getStr("endTime"));
                sts.setClassSection(json.getLong("jc"));
                sts.setDelFlag(0L);
                schoolTimeSchedulingMapper.insertSchoolTimeScheduling(sts);
                if (!sts.getCourseDate().before(DateUtil.beginOfDay(new Date()))) {
                    System.out.println("课表日期---：" + format.format(sts.getCourseDate()) + "-----当前日期：------" + format.format(DateUtil.beginOfDay(new Date())));
                    /** 查询预约日期 所有预约*/
                    SchoolReservationInfo sri_query = new SchoolReservationInfo();
                    sri_query.setRoomId(sts.getRoomId());
                    sri_query.setReservationDate(sts.getCourseDate());
                    sri_query.getParams().put("unrefuse", true);
                    List<SchoolReservationInfo> reservationInfos = schoolReservationInfoMapper.selectSchoolReservationInfoList(sri_query);
                    for (SchoolReservationInfo sr : reservationInfos) {
                        SchoolReservationTimeInfo srt_query = new SchoolReservationTimeInfo();
                        srt_query.setReservationId(sr.getReservationId());
                        List<SchoolReservationTimeInfo> srtList = timeInfoService.selectSchoolReservationTimeInfoList(srt_query);
                        Boolean flag = false;
                        for (SchoolReservationTimeInfo srt : srtList) {
                            if ((sts.getStartTime().compareTo(srt.getReservationStartTime()) >= 0 && sts.getStartTime().compareTo(srt.getReservationEndTime()) <= 0) ||
                                    (sts.getEndTime().compareTo(srt.getReservationStartTime()) >= 0 && sts.getEndTime().compareTo(srt.getReservationEndTime()) <= 0)) {
                                flag = true;
                            }
                        }
                        if (flag) {
                            SchoolReservationInfo audit_sr = new SchoolReservationInfo();
                            audit_sr.setIds(new Long[]{sr.getReservationId()});
                            audit_sr.setCourseUse("1");
                            audit_sr.setApprovalStatus("3");
                            audit_sr.setApprovalUserId(1L);
                            audit_sr.setApprovalUserName("系统用户");
                            audit_sr.setApprovalComments("课表占用");
                            reservationInfoService.audit(audit_sr);
                        }
                    }
                }
                System.out.println("第" + (i + 1) + "条记录插入==================");
                i++;
            }
        }
    }
    public static void main(String[] args) {
        String time1 = "11:20";
        String time2 = "11:30";
        System.out.println(time1.compareTo(time2));
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.service.impl;
import com.baomidou.dynamic.datasource.annotation.DS;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.SchedulingSetting;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.SchoolTimeSchedulingSync;
import com.chenrise.jufe.domain.SysJcxx;
import com.chenrise.jufe.mapper.SchoolTimeSchedulingSyncMapper;
import com.chenrise.jufe.service.ISchoolTimeSchedulingSyncService;
import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.stream.Collectors;
@Slf4j
@RequiredArgsConstructor
@DS("courseSchedule")
@Service
public class SchoolTimeSchedulingSyncServiceImpl implements ISchoolTimeSchedulingSyncService {
    private final SchoolTimeSchedulingSyncMapper schoolTimeSchedulingSyncMapper;
    @Override
    public List<SchoolTimeSchedulingSync> listByRoomCodesAndTerm(List<String> romeCodeList, SchedulingSetting schedulingSetting) {
        return schoolTimeSchedulingSyncMapper.selectByRoomCodesAndTerm(romeCodeList, schedulingSetting.getSemesterType(), schedulingSetting.getSchoolYear());
    }
    @Override
    public Map<String, SysJcxx> getJcxxMap(SchedulingSetting schedulingSetting) {
        int startYear = Integer.parseInt(schedulingSetting.getSchoolYear());
        int endYear = startYear + 1;
        String XNXQ = startYear + "-" + endYear + "-" + schedulingSetting.getSemesterType();
        List<SysJcxx> sysJcxxList = schoolTimeSchedulingSyncMapper.selectJcxxListByXNXQ(XNXQ);
        return sysJcxxList.stream().collect(
                Collectors.toMap(SysJcxx::getJC, sysJcxx -> sysJcxx, (key1, key2) -> key1));
    }
}

}

import java.util.*;
/**
 * Service业务层处理
 *
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2022-12-10
 */
@Service
public class WarningInfoServiceImpl implements IWarningInfoService {
    @Resource
    private WarningInfoMapper mapper;
    @Resource
    private DevPowerNodeInfoMapper powerNodeInfoMapper;
    @Resource
    private ISchoolRoomService schoolRoomService;
    @Resource
    private ISchoolLocationService schoolLocationService;
    @Resource
    private IndexMapper indexMapper;
    @Resource
    private RemoteUserService remoteUserService;
    @Resource
    private WxSendService wxSendService;
    //    电源控制异常订阅：
    @Value("${wx.miniapp.configs[0].templateId.dykz}")
    private String dykz;
    //              # 门锁控制异常订阅：
    @Value("${wx.miniapp.configs[0].templateId.mskz}")
    private String mskz;
    //              # 电源短路订阅：
    @Value("${wx.miniapp.configs[0].templateId.dygj}")
    private String dygj;
    //              # 水浸异常订阅：
    @Value("${wx.miniapp.configs[0].templateId.sjyc}")
    private String sjyc;
    //              # 烟感异常订阅：
    @Value("${wx.miniapp.configs[0].templateId.ygyc}")
    private String ygyc;
    //              # 窗磁异常订阅：
    @Value("${wx.miniapp.configs[0].templateId.ccyc}")
    private String ccyc;
    //              # 窗磁恢复正常：
    @Value("${wx.miniapp.configs[0].templateId.cczc}")
    private String cczc;
    //              # 温度异常订阅：
    @Value("${wx.miniapp.configs[0].templateId.wdyc}")
    private String wdyc;
    //              # 温度恢复正常订阅：
    @Value("${wx.miniapp.configs[0].templateId.wdzc}")
    private String wdzc;
    //              # 湿度异常订阅：
    @Value("${wx.miniapp.configs[0].templateId.sdyc}")
    private String sdyc;
    //              # 湿度恢复正常订阅：
    @Value("${wx.miniapp.configs[0].templateId.sdzc}")
    private String sdzc;
    //              # 光照异常订阅：
    @Value("${wx.miniapp.configs[0].templateId.gzyc}")
    private String gzyc;
    //              # 光照恢复正常订阅：
    @Value("${wx.miniapp.configs[0].templateId.gzzc}")
    private String gzzc;
    //              # pm2.5异常订阅：
    @Value("${wx.miniapp.configs[0].templateId.pm25yc}")
    private String pm25yc;
    //              # pm2.5恢复正常订阅：
    @Value("${wx.miniapp.configs[0].templateId.pm25zc}")
    private String pm25zc;
    //              # pm10异常订阅：
    @Value("${wx.miniapp.configs[0].templateId.pm10yc}")
    private String pm10yc;
    //              # pm10恢复正常订阅：
    @Value("${wx.miniapp.configs[0].templateId.pm10zc}")
    private String pm10zc;
    /**
     * 查询列表
     *
     * @param warningInfo
     * @return
     */
    @Override
    public List<WarningInfo> list(WarningInfo warningInfo) {
        return mapper.list(warningInfo);
    }
    /**
     * 新增
     *
     * @param obj
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int insert(JSONObject obj) {
        WarningInfo warningInfo = new WarningInfo();
        warningInfo.setType(obj.getStr("warningType"));
        warningInfo.setStatus("N");
        if ("1".equals(obj.getStr("warningType"))) {
            DevPowerNodeInfo powerNodeInfo = powerNodeInfoMapper.selectByMac(obj.getStr("mac"), obj.getStr("channel"));
            SchoolRoom sr = schoolRoomService.selectSchoolRoomByRoomId(powerNodeInfo.getRoomId());
            SchoolLocation location = schoolLocationService.selectSchoolLocationByLocationId(sr.getLocationId());
            if (location != null) {
                String fullName = schoolLocationService.fullName(location);
                warningInfo.setPosition(fullName + "-" + sr.getRoomCode());
            }
            warningInfo.setDeviceName(powerNodeInfo.getPowerNodeNode());
            warningInfo.setRoomId(powerNodeInfo.getRoomId());
            warningInfo.setSubType(obj.getStr("typeNumber"));
        } else if ("3".equals(obj.getStr("warningType"))) {
            SchoolRoom sr = schoolRoomService.selectSchoolRoomByRoomId(obj.getLong("roomId"));
            SchoolLocation location = schoolLocationService.selectSchoolLocationByLocationId(sr.getLocationId());
            if (location != null) {
                String fullName = schoolLocationService.fullName(location);
                warningInfo.setPosition(fullName + "-" + sr.getRoomCode());
            }
            String subType = obj.getStr("subType");
            warningInfo.setSubType(subType);
            warningInfo.setRoomId(sr.getRoomId());
            switch (subType) {
                case "3001":
                    warningInfo.setDeviceName("水浸采集器");
                    warningInfo.setNum("报警");
                    break;
                case "3002":
                    warningInfo.setDeviceName("烟感采集器");
                    warningInfo.setNum("报警");
                    break;
                case "3003":
                    warningInfo.setDeviceName("温度采集器");
                    warningInfo.setNum(obj.getStr("wdNum"));
                    warningInfo.setUnit("℃");
                    break;
                case "3004":
                    warningInfo.setDeviceName("湿度采集器");
                    warningInfo.setNum(obj.getStr("sdNum"));
                    warningInfo.setUnit("%rh");
                    break;
                case "3005":
                    warningInfo.setDeviceName("光照采集器");
                    warningInfo.setNum(obj.getStr("gzNum"));
                    warningInfo.setUnit("lx");
                    break;
                case "3006":
                    warningInfo.setDeviceName("PM2.5采集器");
                    warningInfo.setNum(obj.getStr("pm25Num"));
                    warningInfo.setUnit("ug/m³");
                    break;
                case "3007":
                    warningInfo.setDeviceName("PM10采集器");
                    warningInfo.setNum(obj.getStr("pm10Num"));
                    warningInfo.setUnit("ug/m³");
                    break;
                case "3008":
                    warningInfo.setDeviceName("窗磁采集器");
                    warningInfo.setNum("报警");
                    break;
                case "3010":
                    warningInfo.setDeviceName("温度采集器");
                    warningInfo.setNum(obj.getStr("wdNum"));
                    warningInfo.setUnit("℃");
                    break;
                case "3011":
                    warningInfo.setDeviceName("湿度采集器");
                    warningInfo.setNum(obj.getStr("sdNum"));
                    warningInfo.setUnit("%rh");
                    break;
                case "3012":
                    warningInfo.setDeviceName("光照采集器");
                    warningInfo.setNum(obj.getStr("gzNum"));
                    warningInfo.setUnit("lx");
                    break;
                case "3013":
                    warningInfo.setDeviceName("PM2.5采集器");
                    warningInfo.setNum(obj.getStr("pm25Num"));
                    warningInfo.setUnit("ug/m³");
                    break;
                case "3014":
                    warningInfo.setDeviceName("PM10采集器");
                    warningInfo.setNum(obj.getStr("pm10Num"));
                    warningInfo.setUnit("ug/m³");
                    break;
                default:
            }
            if (obj.get("duration") != null) {
                String str = "持续时间：";
                Long duration = Long.parseLong(obj.getStr("duration"));
                long hour = duration / (60 * 60 * 1000);
                long minutes = (duration % (60 * 60 * 1000)) / (60 * 1000);
                long seconds = (duration % (60 * 1000)) / 1000;
                if (hour > 0) {
                    str += hour + "小时";
                }
                if (minutes > 0) {
                    str += minutes + "分钟";
                }
                if (seconds > 0) {
                    str += seconds + "秒";
                }
                warningInfo.setDuration(str);
            }
        }
        return mapper.insert(warningInfo);
    }
    @Override
    public int update(WarningInfo warningInfo) {
        return mapper.update(warningInfo);
    }
    @Override
    public void sendMessage() {
        WarningInfo query_wi = new WarningInfo();
        query_wi.setStatus("N");
        List<WarningInfo> list = mapper.list(query_wi);
        DictUtils.getDictName(list);
        TableDataInfo result_power = remoteUserService.normallist(null, null, null, null, "Y", null, null);
        TableDataInfo result_lock = remoteUserService.normallist(null, null, null, null, null, "Y", null);
        TableDataInfo result_room = remoteUserService.normallist(null, null, null, null, null, null, "Y");
        List<SysUser> users_power = JSONUtil.toList(JSONUtil.toJsonStr(result_power.getRows()), SysUser.class);
        List<SysUser> users_lock = JSONUtil.toList(JSONUtil.toJsonStr(result_lock.getRows()), SysUser.class);
        List<SysUser> users_room = JSONUtil.toList(JSONUtil.toJsonStr(result_room.getRows()), SysUser.class);
        for (WarningInfo wi : list) {
            // 注释掉发送微信消息
            /*if ("1".equals(wi.getType())) {
                for (SysUser su : users_power) {
                    if (StringUtils.isNotEmpty(su.getOpenId())) {
                        Map<String, Object> map = buildMap(wi, su.getOpenId());
                        wxSendService.sendWxInfor(map, String.valueOf(map.get("tmpId")));
                    }
                }
            } else if ("2".equals(wi.getType())) {
                for (SysUser su : users_lock) {
                    if (StringUtils.isNotEmpty(su.getOpenId())) {
                        Map<String, Object> map = buildMap(wi, su.getOpenId());
                        wxSendService.sendWxInfor(map, String.valueOf(map.get("tmpId")));
                    }
                }
            } else if ("3".equals(wi.getType())) {
                for (SysUser su : users_room) {
                    if (StringUtils.isNotEmpty(su.getOpenId())) {
                        Map<String, Object> map = buildMap(wi, su.getOpenId());
                        wxSendService.sendWxInfor(map, String.valueOf(map.get("tmpId")));
                    }
                }
            }*/
            wi.setStatus("Y");
            mapper.update(wi);
        }
    }
    @Override
    public void findRoomWarning() {
        List<Map<String, Object>> powers = indexMapper.getRoomPower();
        List<Map<String, Object>> locks = indexMapper.getRoomLock();
        for (Map<String, Object> map : powers) {
            JSONObject obj = new JSONObject(map);
            SchoolRoom sr = schoolRoomService.selectSchoolRoomByRoomId(obj.getLong("room_id"));
            SchoolLocation location = schoolLocationService.selectSchoolLocationByLocationId(sr.getLocationId());
            String fullName = "";
            if (location != null) {
                fullName = schoolLocationService.fullName(location);
            }
            if (obj.get("scheduling_id") != null && "0".equals(obj.getStr("onoff_status"))) {
                WarningInfo info = new WarningInfo();
                info.setType("1");
                info.setSubType("64");
                info.setDeviceName(obj.getStr("power_node_node"));
                info.setRoomId(obj.getLong("room_id"));
                info.setPosition(fullName + "-" + sr.getRoomId());
                info.setStatus("N");
                info.setRemark("有课未开电");
                mapper.insert(info);
            }
        }
        for (Map<String, Object> map : locks) {
            JSONObject obj = new JSONObject(map);
            SchoolRoom sr = schoolRoomService.selectSchoolRoomByRoomId(obj.getLong("room_id"));
            SchoolLocation location = schoolLocationService.selectSchoolLocationByLocationId(sr.getLocationId());
            String fullName = "";
            if (location != null) {
                fullName = schoolLocationService.fullName(location);
            }
//            if(obj.get("device_id")!=null&&obj.get("ele_quantity")!=null&&obj.getInt("ele_quantity")<20){
//                WarningInfo info = new WarningInfo();
//                info.setType("2");
//                info.setSubType("2003");
//                info.setDeviceName(obj.getStr("device_name"));
//                info.setRoomId(obj.getLong("room_id"));
//                info.setPosition(fullName+"-"+sr.getRoomId());
//                info.setStatus("N");
//                info.setRemark("门锁亏电");
//                mapper.insert(info);
//            }
            if (obj.get("scheduling_id") != null) {
                //有课未开锁
                if (obj.get("device_id") != null && !"1".equals(obj.getStr("open_status"))) {
                    WarningInfo info = new WarningInfo();
                    info.setType("2");
                    info.setSubType("2001");
                    info.setDeviceName(obj.getStr("device_name"));
                    info.setRoomId(obj.getLong("room_id"));
                    info.setPosition(fullName + "-" + sr.getRoomId());
                    info.setStatus("N");
                    info.setRemark("有课未开锁");
                    mapper.insert(info);
                }
                //有课未开门
//                if(obj.get("device_id")!=null&&!"1".equals(obj.getStr("door_status"))){
//                    WarningInfo info = new WarningInfo();
//                    info.setType("2");
//                    info.setSubType("2004");
//                    info.setDeviceName(obj.getStr("device_name"));
//                    info.setRoomId(obj.getLong("room_id"));
//                    info.setPosition(fullName+"-"+sr.getRoomId());
//                    info.setStatus("N");
//                    info.setRemark("有课未开门");
//                    mapper.insert(info);
//                }
                if ("Y".equals(sr.getKcgj())) {
                    WarningInfo info = new WarningInfo();
                    info.setType("3");
                    info.setSubType("3015");
                    info.setDeviceName("窗磁采集器");
                    info.setRoomId(obj.getLong("room_id"));
                    info.setPosition(fullName + "-" + sr.getRoomId());
                    info.setStatus("N");
                    info.setNum(obj.getStr("sfkc"));
                    Long miseconds = new Date().getTime() - sr.getKcTime().getTime();
                    long hour = miseconds / (60 * 60 * 1000);
                    long minutes = (miseconds % (60 * 60 * 1000)) / (60 * 1000);
                    long seconds = (miseconds % (60 * 1000)) / 1000;
                    String duration = "持续时间：";
                    if (hour > 0) {
                        duration += hour + "小时";
                    }
                    if (minutes > 0) {
                        duration += minutes + "分钟";
                    }
                    if (seconds > 0) {
                        duration += seconds + "秒";
                    }
                    info.setDuration(duration);
                    mapper.insert(info);
                    sr.setKcgj("N");
                    schoolRoomService.updateSchoolRoom(sr);
                }
            } else {
                // 无课开窗
                if ("开".equals(obj.getStr("sfkc"))) {
                    if (!"Y".equals(sr.getKcgj())) {
                        WarningInfo info = new WarningInfo();
                        info.setType("3");
                        info.setSubType("3008");
                        info.setDeviceName("窗磁采集器");
                        info.setRoomId(obj.getLong("room_id"));
                        info.setPosition(fullName + "-" + sr.getRoomId());
                        info.setStatus("N");
                        info.setNum(obj.getStr("sfkc"));
                        mapper.insert(info);
                        sr.setKcgj("Y");
                        sr.setKcTime(new Date());
                        schoolRoomService.updateSchoolRoom(sr);
                    }
                    if ("关".equals(obj.getStr("sfkc")) && "Y".equals(sr.getKcgj())) {
                        WarningInfo info = new WarningInfo();
                        info.setType("3");
                        info.setSubType("3015");
                        info.setDeviceName("窗磁采集器");
                        info.setRoomId(obj.getLong("room_id"));
                        info.setPosition(fullName + "-" + sr.getRoomId());
                        info.setStatus("N");
                        info.setNum(obj.getStr("sfkc"));
                        Long miseconds = new Date().getTime() - sr.getKcTime().getTime();
                        long hour = miseconds / (60 * 60 * 1000);
                        long minutes = (miseconds % (60 * 60 * 1000)) / (60 * 1000);
                        long seconds = (miseconds % (60 * 1000)) / 1000;
                        String duration = "持续时间：";
                        if (hour > 0) {
                            duration += hour + "小时";
                        }
                        if (minutes > 0) {
                            duration += minutes + "分钟";
                        }
                        if (seconds > 0) {
                            duration += seconds + "秒";
                        }
                        info.setDuration(duration);
                        mapper.insert(info);
                        sr.setKcgj("N");
                        schoolRoomService.updateSchoolRoom(sr);
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
    private Map<String, Object> buildMap(WarningInfo wi, String openId) {
        Map<String, Object> map = new HashMap<>();
        map.put("openId", openId);
        List<Map<String, String>> subs = new ArrayList<>();
        if ("64".equals(wi.getSubType()) || "65".equals(wi.getSubType())) {
            map.put("tmpId", dykz);
            //开电、关电
            Map<String, String> sub = new HashMap<>();
            sub.put("name", "time6");
            sub.put("value", DateUtil.format(wi.getCreateTime(), "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"));
            subs.add(sub);
            sub = new HashMap<>();
            sub.put("name", "thing7");
            sub.put("value", wi.getPosition());
            subs.add(sub);
            sub = new HashMap<>();
            sub.put("name", "thing2");
            sub.put("value", wi.getDeviceName());
            subs.add(sub);
            sub = new HashMap<>();
            sub.put("name", "thing10");
            sub.put("value", String.valueOf(wi.getParams().get("subTypeName")));
            subs.add(sub);
            map.put("data", subs);
        }
        else if ("1".equals(wi.getType()) && !"64".equals(wi.getSubType()) && !"65".equals(wi.getSubType())) {
            //空开告警
            map.put("tmpId", dygj);
            Map<String, String> sub = new HashMap<>();
            sub.put("name", "time3");
            sub.put("value", DateUtil.format(wi.getCreateTime(), "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"));
            subs.add(sub);
            sub = new HashMap<>();
            sub.put("name", "thing19");
            sub.put("value", wi.getPosition());
            subs.add(sub);
            sub = new HashMap<>();
            sub.put("name", "thing2");
            sub.put("value", wi.getDeviceName());
            subs.add(sub);
            sub = new HashMap<>();
            sub.put("name", "thing10");
            sub.put("value", String.valueOf(wi.getParams().get("subTypeName")));
            subs.add(sub);
            map.put("data", subs);
        }
        else if ("2".equals(wi.getType())) {
            //开关锁
            map.put("tmpId", mskz);
            Map<String, String> sub = new HashMap<>();
            sub.put("name", "time3");
            sub.put("value", DateUtil.format(wi.getCreateTime(), "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"));
            subs.add(sub);
            sub = new HashMap<>();
            sub.put("name", "thing19");
            sub.put("value", wi.getPosition());
            subs.add(sub);
            sub = new HashMap<>();
            sub.put("name", "thing2");
            sub.put("value", wi.getDeviceName());
            subs.add(sub);
            sub = new HashMap<>();
            sub.put("name", "thing10");
            sub.put("value", String.valueOf(wi.getParams().get("subTypeName")));
            subs.add(sub);
            map.put("data", subs);
        }
        else if ("3001".equals(wi.getSubType())) {
            //水浸告警
            map.put("tmpId", sjyc);
            Map<String, String> sub = new HashMap<>();
            sub.put("name", "time3");
            sub.put("value", DateUtil.format(wi.getCreateTime(), "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"));
            subs.add(sub);
            sub = new HashMap<>();
            sub.put("name", "thing19");
            sub.put("value", wi.getPosition());
            subs.add(sub);
            sub = new HashMap<>();
            sub.put("name", "thing2");
            sub.put("value", wi.getDeviceName());
            subs.add(sub);
            sub = new HashMap<>();
            sub.put("name", "thing10");
            sub.put("value", String.valueOf(wi.getParams().get("subTypeName")));
            subs.add(sub);
            map.put("data", subs);
        }
        else if ("3002".equals(wi.getSubType())) {
            //烟感告警
            map.put("tmpId", ygyc);
            Map<String, String> sub = new HashMap<>();
            sub.put("name", "time6");
            sub.put("value", DateUtil.format(wi.getCreateTime(), "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"));
            subs.add(sub);
            sub = new HashMap<>();
            sub.put("name", "thing7");
            sub.put("value", wi.getPosition());
            subs.add(sub);
            sub = new HashMap<>();
            sub.put("name", "thing2");
            sub.put("value", wi.getDeviceName());
            subs.add(sub);
            sub = new HashMap<>();
            sub.put("name", "thing10");
            sub.put("value", wi.getParams().get("subTypeName")+",值为："+wi.getNum());
            subs.add(sub);
            map.put("data", subs);
        }
        else if ("3008".equals(wi.getSubType())) {
            //窗磁告警
            map.put("tmpId", ccyc);
            Map<String, String> sub = new HashMap<>();
            sub.put("name", "time6");
            sub.put("value", DateUtil.format(wi.getCreateTime(), "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"));
            subs.add(sub);
            sub = new HashMap<>();
            sub.put("name", "thing7");
            sub.put("value", wi.getPosition());
            subs.add(sub);
            sub = new HashMap<>();
            sub.put("name", "thing2");
            sub.put("value", wi.getDeviceName());
            subs.add(sub);
            sub = new HashMap<>();
            sub.put("name", "thing10");
            sub.put("value", wi.getParams().get("subTypeName")+",值为："+wi.getNum());
            subs.add(sub);
            map.put("data", subs);
        }
        else if ("3015".equals(wi.getSubType())) {
            //窗磁恢复告警
            map.put("tmpId", cczc);
            Map<String, String> sub = new HashMap<>();
            sub.put("name", "time3");
            sub.put("value", DateUtil.format(wi.getCreateTime(), "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"));
            subs.add(sub);
            sub = new HashMap<>();
            sub.put("name", "thing5");
            sub.put("value", wi.getPosition());
            subs.add(sub);
            sub = new HashMap<>();
            sub.put("name", "thing25");
            sub.put("value", String.valueOf(wi.getParams().get("subTypeName")));
            subs.add(sub);
            sub = new HashMap<>();
            sub.put("name", "thing18");
            sub.put("value", wi.getNum());
            subs.add(sub);
            sub = new HashMap<>();
            sub.put("name", "thing17");
            sub.put("value", wi.getDuration());
            subs.add(sub);
            map.put("data", subs);
        }
        else if ("3003".equals(wi.getSubType())) {
            //温度告警
            map.put("tmpId", wdyc);
            Map<String, String> sub = new HashMap<>();
            sub.put("name", "time3");
            sub.put("value", DateUtil.format(wi.getCreateTime(), "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"));
            subs.add(sub);
            sub = new HashMap<>();
            sub.put("name", "thing19");
            sub.put("value", wi.getPosition());
            subs.add(sub);
            sub = new HashMap<>();
            sub.put("name", "thing2");
            sub.put("value", wi.getDeviceName());
            subs.add(sub);
            sub = new HashMap<>();
            sub.put("name", "thing10");
            sub.put("value", wi.getParams().get("subTypeName")+",值为："+wi.getNum()+wi.getUnit());
            subs.add(sub);
            map.put("data", subs);
        }
        else if ("3010".equals(wi.getSubType())) {
            //温度恢复告警
            map.put("tmpId", wdzc);
            Map<String, String> sub = new HashMap<>();
            sub.put("name", "time3");
            sub.put("value", DateUtil.format(wi.getCreateTime(), "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"));
            subs.add(sub);
            sub = new HashMap<>();
            sub.put("name", "thing5");
            sub.put("value", wi.getPosition());
            subs.add(sub);
            sub = new HashMap<>();
            sub.put("name", "thing18");
            sub.put("value", wi.getNum() + wi.getUnit());
            subs.add(sub);
            sub = new HashMap<>();
            sub.put("name", "thing1");
            sub.put("value", String.valueOf(wi.getParams().get("subTypeName")));
            subs.add(sub);
            sub = new HashMap<>();
            sub.put("name", "thing17");
            sub.put("value", "持续时间："+wi.getDuration());
            subs.add(sub);
            map.put("data", subs);
        }
        else if ("3004".equals(wi.getSubType())) {
            //湿度告警
            map.put("tmpId", sdyc);
            Map<String, String> sub = new HashMap<>();
            sub.put("name", "time6");
            sub.put("value", DateUtil.format(wi.getCreateTime(), "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"));
            subs.add(sub);
            sub = new HashMap<>();
            sub.put("name", "thing7");
            sub.put("value", wi.getPosition());
            subs.add(sub);
            sub = new HashMap<>();
            sub.put("name", "thing2");
            sub.put("value", wi.getDeviceName());
            subs.add(sub);
            sub = new HashMap<>();
            sub.put("name", "thing10");
            sub.put("value", wi.getParams().get("subTypeName")+",值为："+wi.getNum()+wi.getUnit());
            subs.add(sub);
            map.put("data", subs);
        }
        else if ("3011".equals(wi.getSubType())) {
            //湿度恢复告警
            map.put("tmpId", sdzc);
            Map<String, String> sub = new HashMap<>();

            subs.add(sub);
            sub = new HashMap<>();
            sub.put("name", "thing18");
            sub.put("value", wi.getNum()+wi.getUnit());
            subs.add(sub);
            sub = new HashMap<>();

            subs.add(sub);
            map.put("data", subs);

    @Override
    public List<JSONObject> countByRoomId(Map obj) {
        return mapper.countByRoomId(obj);
    }

        return mapper.nowList(obj);
    }

    }

    }

    }

     * @param isReservation 是预订
     * @return {@link List }<{@link Map }<{@link String },{@link Object }>>
     */
    public List<Map<String,Object>> tree(String isReservation);
    /**
     *
     * @Description: 获取location到楼栋
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/02
     * @param
     * @return {@link List }<{@link Map }<{@link String },{@link Object }>>
     */
    public List<Map<String,Object>> treeTwo();
    /**
     * @Description: 获取完整的 location和room树型结构及班牌
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/02
     * @return {@link List }<{@link Map }<{@link String },{@link Object }>>
     */
    public List<Map<String,Object>> treeAndBoard();
    /**
     *
     * @Description:获取完整的位置名称 父级--》子集
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/13
     * @param location
     * @return {@link String }
     */
    public String fullName(SchoolLocation location);
    /**
     * @Description: 是否存在room子节点
     * @Author: chenfang
     * @Date: 2022-11-23 17:22:38
     * @param locationId: 楼栋id
     * @return: boolean
     */
    boolean hasChildByRoomId(Long locationId);
    /**
     * @Description:楼栋层数
        * @param locationName
 * @param locationFloor
     * @return: java.lang.Long
     * @Author: CJH 
     * @Updator: CJH 
     * @Date 2023/12/7 17:16
     */
    Long getLocationFloor(String locationName,Long locationFloor);
    /**
     * @Description:同步楼群
        * @param 
     * @return: int
     * @Author: CJH 
     * @Updator: CJH 
     * @Date 2023/12/7 17:18
     */
    int jufeApiGetSysLq() throws IOException;
    /**
     *
     * @Description: 按可预约教室获取楼栋信息

     * @Date: 2023/01/16
     * @param locationId
     * @return {@link List }<{@link SchoolLocation }>

    List<SchoolLocation> getByRoom(Long locationId);
}
