package com.chenrise.jufe.util;
import com.lowagie.text.*;
import com.lowagie.text.rtf.RtfWriter2;
import javax.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse;
import java.io.*;
import java.util.List;
/**
 * @Description 创建word文件
 * @Author sunMing
 * @Date 2023-12-29 09:12:00
 */
public class CreateWord {
    /**
     * 生成文件
     *
     * @param imageList: 图片字节流集合
     * @param response:  返回word
     * @Description:
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2023-12-29 12:33:44
     * @return: void
     */
    public static void createDocContext(List<Image> imageList, HttpServletResponse response) throws DocumentException, IOException {
        File file1 = new File("TwoCodeImage.doc");
        Document document = new Document();
        // 建立一个书写器(Writer)与document对象关联，通过书写器(Writer)可以将文档写入到磁盘中
        RtfWriter2.getInstance(document, new FileOutputStream(file1));
        document.open();
        Paragraph title = new Paragraph("资产二维码");
        //设置标题格式对齐方式
        title.setAlignment(Element.ALIGN_CENTER);
        document.add(title);
        // 设置 Table 表格
        //设置表格，将图片加到表格中进行方便定位
        Table aTable = new Table(4);
        // 设置每列所占比例
        // 占页面宽度 90%
        aTable.setWidth(100);
        // 自动填满
        for (int i = 0; i < imageList.size(); i++) {
            //设置图片等比例缩小
            imageList.get(i).scalePercent(55);
            aTable.addCell(new Cell(imageList.get(i)));
        }
        document.add(aTable);
        document.add(new Paragraph("\n"));
        document.close();
        //响应浏览器 返回下载
        response.setContentType("applicaiton/x-download");
        response.addHeader("Content-Disposition", "attachment;filename=" + "TwoCodeImage.doc");
        InputStream is = null;
        OutputStream os = null;
        BufferedInputStream bis = null;
        BufferedOutputStream bos = null;
        is = new FileInputStream(new File("TwoCodeImage.doc"));
        bis = new BufferedInputStream(is);
        os = response.getOutputStream();
        bos = new BufferedOutputStream(os);
        byte[] b = new byte[1024];
        int len = 0;
        while ((len = bis.read(b)) != -1) {
            bos.write(b, 0, len);
        }
        bis.close();
        is.close();
        bos.close();
        os.close();
        //删除本地临时文件
        file1.delete();
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.util;
import java.math.BigInteger;
import java.nio.ByteBuffer;
import java.nio.ByteOrder;
/**
 * @Description:16进制数转小端格式
 * @Author: sunming
 * @Date: 2023-02-17 13:56:02
 */
public class HexToLittleEndian {
    /**
     * @Description:16进制转小端格式
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-02-20 08:13:14
     * @param hexString:
     * @return: java.lang.String
     */
    public static String hexToLittleEndian(String hexString) {
        byte[] hexBytes = hexStringToBytes(hexString);
        ByteBuffer buffer = ByteBuffer.wrap(hexBytes);
        buffer.order(ByteOrder.LITTLE_ENDIAN);
        byte[] littleEndianBytes = new byte[hexBytes.length];
        buffer.get(littleEndianBytes);
        String littleEndianHex = bytesToHexString(littleEndianBytes);
        return littleEndianHex;
    }
    /**
     * @Description:16进制转字节数组
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-02-20 08:13:33
     * @param hexString:
     * @return: byte[]
     */
    private static byte[] hexStringToBytes(String hexString) {
        int len = hexString.length();
        byte[] hexBytes = new byte[len / 2];
        for (int i = 0; i < len; i += 2) {
            hexBytes[i / 2] = (byte) ((Character.digit(hexString.charAt(i), 16) << 4)
                    + Character.digit(hexString.charAt(i+1), 16));
        }
        return hexBytes;
    }
    /**
     * @Description:字节数组转16 进制
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-02-20 08:13:50
     * @param bytes:
     * @return: java.lang.String
     */
    private static String bytesToHexString(byte[] bytes) {
        StringBuilder sb = new StringBuilder();
        for (int i = bytes.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
            String hex = Integer.toHexString(bytes[i] & 0xFF);
            if (hex.length() == 1) {
                sb.append('0');
            }
            sb.append(hex);
        }
        return sb.toString();
    }
    /**
     * @Description:使用一个方法实现
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2023-02-22 16:12:33
     * @param hex:
     * @return: java.lang.String
     */
    public static String hexToLittleEndianMedth(String hex) {
        // 将16进制字符串转换为byte数组
        byte[] bytes = new BigInteger(hex, 16).toByteArray();
        // 创建一个字节数组，将byte数组的元素倒序拷贝到其中
        byte[] littleEndianBytes = new byte[bytes.length];
        for (int i = 0; i < bytes.length; i++) {
            littleEndianBytes[i] = bytes[bytes.length - i - 1];
        }
        // 将字节数组转换为16进制字符串
        String littleEndianHex = new BigInteger(1, littleEndianBytes).toString(16);
        if (littleEndianHex.length() % 2 != 0) {
            littleEndianHex = "0" + littleEndianHex;
        }
        return littleEndianHex;
    }
    public static String convertToMacAddress(String hex) {
        // 检查hex字符串长度是否为16位
        if (hex.length() != 16) {
            throw new IllegalArgumentException("Hex string must be 16 characters long.");
        }
        // 反转字符串以实现小端格式
        String reversedHex = new StringBuilder(hex).reverse().toString();
        // 格式化为MAC地址格式
        StringBuilder mac = new StringBuilder();
        for (int i = 0; i < reversedHex.length(); i++) {
            // 对每两个字符插入一个冒号
            if (i > 0 && (i % 2) == 0) {
                mac.append(":");
            }
            mac.append(reversedHex.charAt(i));
        }
        return mac.toString();
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.util;
import javax.imageio.ImageIO;
import java.awt.image.BufferedImage;
import java.io.ByteArrayOutputStream;
import java.io.IOException;
import java.io.InputStream;
import net.coobird.thumbnailator.Thumbnails;
/**
 * 图片压缩工具类
 * @Author zzy
 * @data 2025/5/26
 */
public class ImageCompressionUtils {
    /**
     * 压缩图片直到大小小于等于目标大小
     *
     * @param inputStream 图片输入流
     * @param targetSizeInBytes 目标大小（字节）
     * @return 压缩后的图片字节数组
     * @throws IOException IO异常
     */
    public static byte[] compress(InputStream inputStream, long targetSizeInBytes) throws IOException {
        BufferedImage originalImage = ImageIO.read(inputStream);
        ByteArrayOutputStream outputStream = new ByteArrayOutputStream();
        float quality = 0.9f;
        do {
            outputStream.reset();
            Thumbnails.of(originalImage)
                      .scale(1)
                      .outputQuality(quality)
                      .outputFormat("jpg")
                      .toOutputStream(outputStream);
            quality -= 0.01f;
        } while (outputStream.size() > targetSizeInBytes && quality > 0.1f);
        if (quality <= 0.1f) {
            throw new IOException("无法将图片压缩到指定大小");
        }
        return outputStream.toByteArray();
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.util;
import java.lang.annotation.*;
/**
 * @Description:
 * @Author: sunMing
 * @Date: 2024-03-04 15:28:57
 */
@Target(ElementType.METHOD)
@Retention(RetentionPolicy.RUNTIME)
@Documented
public @interface ImportDataCheck {
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.util;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.StringUtils;
import com.chenrise.common.security.utils.DictUtils;
import org.aspectj.lang.JoinPoint;
import org.aspectj.lang.annotation.Aspect;
import org.aspectj.lang.annotation.Before;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Component;
import java.lang.reflect.Field;
import java.math.BigDecimal;
import java.util.Date;
import java.util.List;
/**
 * @Description 导入时数据验证
 * @Author sunMing
 * @Date 2024-03-04 15:29:00
 */
@Aspect
@Component
public class ImportDataCheckAspect {
    @Before("@annotation(controllerImportData)")
    public void doBefore(JoinPoint point, ImportDataCheck controllerImportData) {
        handleDataCheck(point, controllerImportData);
    }
    /**
     * 数据验证处理
     *
     * @param joinPoint:
     * @param controllerDataScope:
     * @Description: 数据验证处理
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2024-03-06 16:26:57
     * @return: void
     */
    protected void handleDataCheck(final JoinPoint joinPoint, ImportDataCheck controllerDataScope) {
        Object params = joinPoint.getArgs()[0];
        List<Object> list = (List) params;
        if (list == null || list.size() == 0) {
            throw new RuntimeException("请添加需要导入的数据");
        }
        Boolean testFlag = true;
        String remindText = "";
        for (int i = 0; i < list.size(); i++) {
            String rowMsgInfo = "第" + (i + 1) + "行数据：";
            Boolean rowTest = true;
            Class<?> clazz = list.get(i).getClass();
            Field[] fields = clazz.getDeclaredFields();
            for (Field field : fields) {
                String fieldName = field.getName();
                try {
                    String value = "";
                    Field declaredField = list.get(i).getClass().getDeclaredField(fieldName);
                    declaredField.setAccessible(Boolean.TRUE);
                    String fieldType = field.getType().getName();
                    Boolean isMust = false;
                    if (field.isAnnotationPresent(ImportRules.class)) {
                        ImportRules annotation = field.getAnnotation(ImportRules.class);
                        String colNameText = annotation.colName();
                        if (annotation.notNull()) {
                            isMust = true;
                        }
                        if (isMust) {
                            if (fieldType.indexOf("Date") != -1) {
                                Date timeInfo = (Date) declaredField.get(list.get(i));
                                if (timeInfo == null) {
                                    rowTest = false;
                                    rowMsgInfo += colNameText + "系统要求不能为空且需填写正确的时间格式；";
                                    continue;
                                } else {
                                    value = "Date";
                                }
                            } else if (fieldType.indexOf("Long") != -1) {
                                Long dataId = (Long) declaredField.get(list.get(i));
                                if (dataId == null) {
                                    rowTest = false;
                                    rowMsgInfo += colNameText + "无法在系统内查询到；";
                                    continue;
                                } else {
                                    value = "Long";
                                }
                            } else if (fieldType.indexOf("BigDecimal") != -1) {
                                BigDecimal bigDecimalValue = (BigDecimal) declaredField.get(list.get(i));
                                annotation.intLength();
                                annotation.fraLength();
                                if (bigDecimalValue == null) {
                                    rowTest = false;
                                    rowMsgInfo += colNameText + "系统要求不能为空，且需要输入数字，最多2位小数；";
                                    continue;
                                }
                                bigDecimalValue = bigDecimalValue.stripTrailingZeros();
                                String result = bigDecimalValue.toPlainString();
                                Boolean bigDecimalCheck = true;
                                if (result.indexOf(".") != -1) {
                                    String moneyInt = result.split("\\.")[0];
                                    String frac = result.split("\\.")[1];
                                    if (moneyInt.length() > annotation.intLength() || frac.length() > annotation.fraLength()) {
                                        bigDecimalCheck = false;
                                    }
                                } else if (result.length() > annotation.intLength()) {
                                    bigDecimalCheck = false;
                                }
                                if (!bigDecimalCheck) {
                                    rowTest = false;
                                    rowMsgInfo += colNameText + "数字不符合整数：整数" + annotation.intLength() + "位，小数" + annotation.fraLength() + "位;";
                                    continue;
                                }
                                value = "BigDecimal";
                            } else {
                                value = (String) declaredField.get(list.get(i));
                            }
                            if (StringUtils.isEmpty(value)) {
                                rowTest = false;
                                rowMsgInfo += colNameText + "系统要求不能为空，";
                            }
                            if (!StringUtils.isEmpty(value) && fieldType.indexOf("String") != -1) {
                                if (value.length() > annotation.stringLength()) {
                                    rowMsgInfo += colNameText + "超过字数限制（" + annotation.stringLength() + "）；";
                                }
                            }
                        }
                        if (!StringUtils.isEmpty(value) && !StringUtils.isEmpty(annotation.dictName())) {
                            String dictValue = DictUtils.getDictValue(annotation.dictName(), value);
                            if (StringUtils.isEmpty(dictValue)) {
                                rowTest = false;
                                rowMsgInfo += colNameText + "未找到对应的字典值；";
                            }
                            declaredField.set(list.get(i), dictValue);
                        }
                    }
                } catch (NoSuchFieldException e) {
                    throw new RuntimeException(e);
                } catch (IllegalAccessException e) {
                    throw new RuntimeException(e);
                }
            }
            if (!rowTest) {
                remindText += rowMsgInfo;
                testFlag = false;
            }
        }
        if (!testFlag) {
            throw new RuntimeException(remindText);
        }
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.util;
import java.lang.annotation.ElementType;
import java.lang.annotation.Retention;
import java.lang.annotation.RetentionPolicy;
import java.lang.annotation.Target;
/**
 * @author sunming
 */
@Target({ ElementType.FIELD })
@Retention(RetentionPolicy.RUNTIME)
public @interface ImportRules {
    Class enumType() default Object.class;
    /** 长度 */
    int stringLength() default 99999;
    /** 字典名称 */
    String dictName() default "";
    /** 是否为空 */
    boolean notNull() default false;
    /** 字段名称 */
    String colName() default "";
    /** 整数为长度 */
    int intLength() default 10;
    /** 小数位长度 */
    int fraLength() default 2;
    /** 是否可重复 */
    boolean isRepeat() default true;
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.util;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.StringUtils;
import com.jacob.activeX.ActiveXComponent;
import com.jacob.com.Dispatch;
import com.jacob.com.Variant;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
/**
 * 海康平台工具类
 *
 * @author cjh
 */
@Slf4j
public final class TextToMp3Utils {
    /**
     * 文本转音频
     *
     * @param path   音频生成路径
     * @param text   文本内容
     * @param volume 音量大小 0 - 100
     * @param speed  语音朗读速度 -10 到 +10
     * @return 是否成功
     */
    public static boolean text(String path, String text, int volume, int speed) {
        try {
            // 调用dll朗读方法
            ActiveXComponent ax = new ActiveXComponent("Sapi.SpVoice");
            // 音量 0 - 100
            ax.setProperty("Volume", new Variant(volume));
            // 语音朗读速度 -10 到 +10
            ax.setProperty("Rate", new Variant(speed));
            // 输入的语言内容
            Dispatch dispatch = ax.getObject();
            // 本地执行朗读
            Dispatch.call(dispatch, "Speak", new Variant(text));
            //开始生成语音文件，构建文件流
            ax = new ActiveXComponent("Sapi.SpFileStream");
            Dispatch sfFileStream = ax.getObject();
            //设置文件生成格式
            ax = new ActiveXComponent("Sapi.SpAudioFormat");
            Dispatch fileFormat = ax.getObject();
            // 设置音频流格式
            Dispatch.put(fileFormat, "Type", new Variant(22));
            // 设置文件输出流格式
            Dispatch.putRef(sfFileStream, "Format", fileFormat);
            // 调用输出文件流打开方法，创建一个音频文件
            Dispatch.call(sfFileStream, "Open", new Variant(path), new Variant(3), new Variant(true));
            // 设置声音对应输出流为输出文件对象
            Dispatch.putRef(dispatch, "AudioOutputStream", sfFileStream);
            // 设置音量
            Dispatch.put(dispatch, "Volume", new Variant(volume));
            // 设置速度
            Dispatch.put(dispatch, "Rate", new Variant(speed));
            // 执行朗读
            Dispatch.call(dispatch, "Speak", new Variant(text));
            // 关闭输出文件
            Dispatch.call(sfFileStream, "Close");
            Dispatch.putRef(dispatch, "AudioOutputStream", null);
            // 关闭资源
            sfFileStream.safeRelease();
            fileFormat.safeRelease();
            // 关闭朗读的操作
            dispatch.safeRelease();
            ax.safeRelease();
            return true;
        } catch (Exception e) {
            e.printStackTrace();
        }
        return false;
    }
    public static void main(String[] args) {
        String str = "http://192.168.1.19:9300/statics/2024/07/05/20240705152212A001.mp3";
        String str2 = StringUtils.substring(str,str.indexOf("/statics")+8);
        System.out.println(str2);
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.util;
import cn.hutool.core.util.ByteUtil;
import cn.hutool.http.HttpUtil;
import java.text.ParseException;
import java.text.SimpleDateFormat;
import java.util.Calendar;
import java.util.Date;
import java.util.TimeZone;
import static ch.qos.logback.core.encoder.ByteArrayUtil.hexStringToByteArray;
public class Tools {
    //tcp指令消息序号，递增到1000后归零
    private static int tcpNo = 1;
    /**
     * 获取16进制的UTC TIME时间戳
     */
    public static String getUtcTime() {
        Calendar cal = Calendar.getInstance();
        TimeZone tz = TimeZone.getTimeZone("GMT");
        cal.setTimeZone(tz);
        String timec = "";
        SimpleDateFormat sdf = new SimpleDateFormat("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss");//设置日期格式
        // new Date()为获取当前时间
        String s = sdf.format(new Date());// format() 作用是将获取的时间转换为我们自定义的日期格式字符串
        try {
            timec = Long.toHexString(sdf.parse(s).getTime() / 1000); //将时间转换为的格式化字符串转换为时间戳，“/1000”是将时间戳精度精确为秒级
        } catch (ParseException e) {
            e.printStackTrace();
        }
        return timec;
    }
    /**
     * 获取之间戳，格式：YYYYMMddHHmmssSSS
     *
     * @return
     */
    public static String getUtcTimeStr() {
        Calendar cal = Calendar.getInstance();
        TimeZone tz = TimeZone.getTimeZone("GMT");
        cal.setTimeZone(tz);
        //设置格式
        SimpleDateFormat sdf = new SimpleDateFormat("yyyyMMddHHmmssSSS");//设置日期格式
        // new Date()为获取当前时间
        String timeFormat = sdf.format(new Date());// format() 作用是将获取的时间转换为我们自定义的日期格式字符串
        return timeFormat;
    }
    public static String getTimeNow(Integer later) {
        Date date = new Date();//获取当前时间
        Calendar calendar = Calendar.getInstance();
        TimeZone tz = TimeZone.getTimeZone("GMT+8");
        calendar.setTimeZone(tz);
        calendar.setTime(date);
        calendar.add(Calendar.MINUTE, later);// 20分钟前
        //获取到完整的时间
        String  minute =  new SimpleDateFormat( "yyyyMMddHHmm").format(calendar.getTime());
        return minute;
    }
    /**
     * 获取16进制的UTC TIME时间戳
     */
    public static String getUtcTimeHex(Integer year) {
        Calendar cal = Calendar.getInstance();
        Date date = new Date();//获取当前时间
        cal.setTime(date);
        if(year!=null){
            cal.add(Calendar.YEAR,year);
        }
        TimeZone tz = TimeZone.getTimeZone("GMT");
        cal.setTimeZone(tz);
        String timec = "";
        SimpleDateFormat sdf = new SimpleDateFormat("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss");//设置日期格式
        String s = sdf.format(cal.getTime());// format() 作用是将获取的时间转换为我们自定义的日期格式字符串
        try {
            timec = Long.toHexString(sdf.parse(s).getTime() / 1000); //将时间转换为的格式化字符串转换为时间戳，“/1000”是将时间戳精度精确为秒级
        } catch (ParseException e) {
            e.printStackTrace();
        }
        return timec;
    }
    /**
     * @Description:门锁密码补零
     * @Author: sunming
     * @Date: 2022-12-10 11:16:04
     * @param password:
     * @return: java.lang.String
     */
    public static String passwordFormat(String password){
      String[]  newPassword = password.split("");
      String res="";
      for(int i=0;i<newPassword.length;i++){
          res+="0"+newPassword[i];
      }
      return res;
    }
    //消息序号，递增到1000后归零
    public static String getNumCode() {
        String code = "";
        code = String.valueOf(tcpNo);
        tcpNo++;
        if (tcpNo == 1000) {
            tcpNo = 1;
        }
        return code;
    }
    public static Integer byteToInteger(Byte b) {
        return 0xff & b;
    }
    public static String getIsOrNot(String type){
        if(type!=null && type.equals("是")){
            return "1";
        }else {
            return "0";
        }
    }
    public static void main(String[] args) {
        byte [] arr = HttpUtil.downloadBytes("http://192.168.1.176:9300/statics/2024/07/12/111_20240712085154A003.mp3");
        System.out.println();
    }
}
package com.chenrise.jufe.util;
import com.google.zxing.BarcodeFormat;
import com.google.zxing.EncodeHintType;
import com.google.zxing.MultiFormatWriter;
import com.google.zxing.WriterException;
import com.google.zxing.common.BitMatrix;
import com.google.zxing.qrcode.decoder.ErrorCorrectionLevel;
import com.lowagie.text.Image;
import javax.imageio.ImageIO;
import java.awt.*;
import java.awt.image.BufferedImage;
import java.io.ByteArrayOutputStream;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.Base64;
import java.util.HashMap;
import java.util.Map;
/**
 * @Description 二维码生成工具
 * @Author sunMing
 * @Date 2023-12-29 09:11:00
 */
public class ZngCode {
    /**
     * 颜色
     */
    private static final int QRCOLOR = 0xFF000000;
    /**
     * 背景颜色
     */
    private static final int BGWHITE = 0xFFFFFFFF;
    /**
     * 生成二维码方法
     *
     * @param data:
     * @param belowText:
     * @Description: 生成二维码方法
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2023-12-29 12:35:35
     * @return: com.lowagie.text.Image
     */
    public static Image getQrCode(String data, String belowText) {
        Image imageByte = null;
        try {
            ZngCode zp = new ZngCode();
            BufferedImage bim = zp.generateQrCodeBufferedImage(data, BarcodeFormat.QR_CODE, 180, 180, zp.getDecodeHintType());
            //字节数组
            imageByte = zp.addTextForQrCode(bim, data, belowText);
        } catch (Exception e) {
            e.printStackTrace();
        }
        return imageByte;
    }
    public static String getQrCodeBase64(String data, String belowText) {
        String retInfo = "";
        Image imageByte = null;
        try {
            ZngCode zp = new ZngCode();
            BufferedImage bim = zp.generateQrCodeBufferedImage(data, BarcodeFormat.QR_CODE, 180, 180, zp.getDecodeHintType());
            //字节数组
            imageByte = zp.addTextForQrCode(bim, data, belowText);
            Base64.Encoder encoder = Base64.getEncoder();
            //转换成base64串
            String jpgBase64 = encoder.encodeToString(imageByte.getOriginalData());
            jpgBase64 = jpgBase64.replaceAll("\n", "").replaceAll("\r", "");
            return "data:image/jpg;base64," + jpgBase64;
        } catch (Exception e) {
            retInfo = "";
            e.printStackTrace();
        }
        return retInfo;
    }
    /**
     * 放在内存中图片
     *
     * @param bim:
     * @param codeInfo:
     * @param nameInfo:
     * @Description: 放在内存中图片
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2023-12-29 12:35:59
     * @return: com.lowagie.text.Image
     */
    public Image addTextForQrCode(BufferedImage bim, String codeInfo, String nameInfo) {
        try {
            BufferedImage image = bim;
            codeInfo = "编号：" + codeInfo;
            int countSize = nameInfo.length() / 8;
            int expCount = nameInfo.length() % 8;
            if (expCount > 0) {
                countSize = countSize + 1;
            }
            int allNameCount = nameInfo.length();
            String[] nameStrarr = nameInfo.split("");
            java.util.List<String> infoSplit = new ArrayList<>();
            int enterCount = 0;
            int lastIndex = 0;
            for (int k = 0; k < allNameCount; k++) {
                Boolean isChinese = isChinese(nameStrarr[k]);
                if (isChinese) {
                    enterCount += 2;
                } else {
                    enterCount += 1;
                }
                if (enterCount >= 16) {
                    String nameArrInfo = nameInfo.substring(lastIndex, k + 1);
                    infoSplit.add(nameArrInfo);
                    enterCount = 0;
                    lastIndex = k + 1;
                } else if (k == allNameCount - 1) {
                    String nameArrInfo = nameInfo.substring(lastIndex, k + 1);
                    infoSplit.add(nameArrInfo);
                }
            }
            if (codeInfo != null && !"".equals(codeInfo)) {
                BufferedImage outImage = new BufferedImage(230, 300, BufferedImage.TYPE_4BYTE_ABGR);
                Graphics2D outg = outImage.createGraphics();
                outg.drawImage(image, 27, 5, image.getWidth(), image.getHeight(), null);
                outg.setColor(Color.BLACK);
                outg.setFont(new Font("SansSerif", Font.PLAIN, 16));
                int strWidth = outg.getFontMetrics().stringWidth(codeInfo);
                int strWidthName = outg.getFontMetrics().stringWidth(nameInfo);
                outg.drawString(codeInfo, 100 - strWidth / 2 + 8, image.getHeight() + (outImage.getHeight() - image.getHeight()) / 2 - 44);
                if (infoSplit != null && infoSplit.size() > 0) {
                    for (int ii = 0; ii < infoSplit.size(); ii++) {
                        String startTest = "";
                        if (ii == 0) {
                            startTest = "名称：";
                        }
                        int startNameSize = 0;
                        if (ii > 0) {
                            startNameSize = 48;
                        }
                        outg.drawString(startTest + infoSplit.get(ii), 36 + startNameSize, image.getHeight() + (outImage.getHeight() - image.getHeight()) / 2 - 28 + (ii * 18));
                    }
                } else {
                    outg.drawString("名称：" + nameInfo, 36, image.getHeight() + (outImage.getHeight() - image.getHeight()) / 2 - 28);
                }
                outg.dispose();
                outImage.flush();
                image = outImage;
            }
            ByteArrayOutputStream baos = new ByteArrayOutputStream();
            baos.flush();
            ImageIO.write(image, "png", baos);
            BufferedImage newBufferedImage = new BufferedImage(
                    image.getWidth(), image.getHeight(),
                    BufferedImage.TYPE_INT_RGB);
            newBufferedImage.createGraphics().drawImage(image, 0, 0,
                    Color.WHITE, null);
//            存放本地
            /** ImageIO.write(newBufferedImage, "png", new File(CODEPATH + "SZ-" + System.currentTimeMillis() + "code.png")); */
            Image imageByte = Image.getInstance(baos.toByteArray());
            baos.close();
            image.flush();
            return imageByte;
        } catch (Exception e) {
            e.printStackTrace();
        }
        return null;
    }
    /**
     * 判断字符是汉字还是字母或数字
     *
     * @param str:
     * @Description:
     * @Author: sunMing
     * @Date: 2024-02-28 18:26:20
     * @return: boolean
     */
    public boolean isChinese(String str) {
        String regex = "[\\u4e00-\\u9fa5]";
        return str.matches("[" + regex + "]+");
    }
    /**
     * 绘制二维码，不带文字
     *
     * @param content       扫描内容
     * @param barcodeFormat 格式
     * @param width
     * @param height
     * @param hints         二维码属性设置
     * @return 放到内存中，后续再二维码下方添加文字
     */
    public BufferedImage generateQrCodeBufferedImage(String content, BarcodeFormat barcodeFormat, int width, int height, Map<EncodeHintType, ?> hints) {
        MultiFormatWriter multiFormatWriter = null;
        BitMatrix bm = null;
        BufferedImage image = null;
        try {
            multiFormatWriter = new MultiFormatWriter();
            bm = multiFormatWriter.encode(content, barcodeFormat, width, height, hints);
            int w = bm.getWidth();
            int h = bm.getHeight();
            image = new BufferedImage(w, h, BufferedImage.TYPE_INT_RGB);
            for (int x = 0; x < w; x++) {
                for (int y = 0; y < h; y++) {
                    image.setRGB(x, y, bm.get(x, y) ? QRCOLOR : BGWHITE);
                }
            }
        } catch (WriterException e) {
            e.printStackTrace();
        }
        return image;
    }
    /**
     * 设置二维码属性
     *
     * @return
     */
    public Map<EncodeHintType, Object> getDecodeHintType() {
        Map<EncodeHintType, Object> hints = new HashMap<EncodeHintType, Object>(5);
        hints.put(EncodeHintType.ERROR_CORRECTION, ErrorCorrectionLevel.H);
        hints.put(EncodeHintType.CHARACTER_SET, "utf-8");
        hints.put(EncodeHintType.MARGIN, 0);
        hints.put(EncodeHintType.MAX_SIZE, 350);
        hints.put(EncodeHintType.MIN_SIZE, 100);
        return hints;
    }
    /**
     * 获得本地字体列表
     *
     * @return 字体数组
     */
    public String[] getFontName() {
        GraphicsEnvironment e = GraphicsEnvironment.getLocalGraphicsEnvironment();
        String[] fontName = e.getAvailableFontFamilyNames();
        return fontName;
    }
}

package com.chenrise.miniapp.controller;

/**
 * 设备控制Controller
 *
 * @author liyiying
 * @date 2022-12-01
 */
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/deviceControl")
public class DeviceControlController extends BaseController
{
    @Resource private RemoteJufeService jufeService;
    @Resource private RemoteCourseService remoteCourseService;
    /**
     * 得到位置树
     * @Description: 得到位置树
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-12-01 16:47:53
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @GetMapping("/getLocation")
    public AjaxResult getLocation()
    {
        R<List<Map<String,Object>>> data = jufeService.getLocation();
        if (R.FAIL == data.getCode()) {
            throw new BaseException(data.getMsg());
        }
        return AjaxResult.success(data.getData());
    }
    /**
     * 查询教室列表
     * @Description: 查询教室列表
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-11-30 11:12:25
     * @param locationIds 位置id
     * @param roomCode 教室名称
     * @return {@link TableDataInfo }
     */
    @GetMapping("/list")
    public TableDataInfo list(@RequestParam("pageNum")String pageNum,@RequestParam("pageSize")String pageSize,Long[] locationIds,String roomCode)
    {
        R<TableDataInfo> data = jufeService.getRoomList(pageNum,pageSize,locationIds,roomCode);
        if (R.FAIL == data.getCode()) {
            throw new BaseException(data.getMsg());
        }
        return data.getData();
    }
    /**
     * 获取门锁列表
     * @Description: 获取门锁列表
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-12-02 09:11:24
     * @param roomId 房间id
     * @return {@link TableDataInfo }
     */
    @GetMapping("/lockList")
    public TableDataInfo getLockList(Long roomId)
    {
        R<TableDataInfo> data = jufeService.getLockList(roomId);
        if (R.FAIL == data.getCode()) {
            throw new BaseException(data.getMsg());
        }
        return data.getData();
    }
    /**
     * 获取电源列表
     * @Description: 获取电源列表
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-12-02 09:11:24
     * @param roomId 房间id
     * @param nodeType 类型 1 总空开 2 子空开
     * @return {@link TableDataInfo }
     */
    @GetMapping("/powerNodeList")
    public AjaxResult getPowerNodeList(Long roomId,Long nodeType)
    {
        R<AjaxResult> data = jufeService.getPowerNodeList(roomId,nodeType);
        if (R.FAIL == data.getCode()) {
            throw new BaseException(data.getMsg());
        }
        return data.getData();
    }
    /**
     * 修改门锁状态-位置
     * @Description: 修改门锁状态-位置
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-11-30 14:02:12
     * @param vo 设备控制vo对象
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @Log(title = "修改门锁", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PutMapping("/updateLockHead")
    public AjaxResult updateLockHead(@RequestBody DeviceControlVO vo)
    {
        R<AjaxResult> data = jufeService.updateLock(vo.getLocationId(),vo.getType(),vo.getRoomIds(),null);
        if (R.FAIL == data.getCode()) {
            return AjaxResult.error(data.getMsg());
        }
        return data.getData();
    }
    /**
     * 修改门锁状态-教室
     * @Description: 修改门锁状态-教室
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-11-30 14:02:12
     * @param vo 设备控制vo对象
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @Log(title = "修改门锁", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PutMapping("/updateLockRoom")
    public AjaxResult updateLockRoom(@RequestBody DeviceControlVO vo)
    {
        R<AjaxResult> data = jufeService.updateLock(null,vo.getType(),vo.getRoomIds(),null);
        if (R.FAIL == data.getCode()) {
            throw new BaseException(data.getMsg());
        }
        return data.getData();
    }
    /**
     * 修改门锁状态-门锁
     * @Description: 修改门锁状态-门锁
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-11-30 14:02:12
     * @param vo 设备控制vo对象
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }

    @Log(title = "修改门锁", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)

    {
        R<AjaxResult> data = jufeService.updateLock(null,vo.getType(),null,vo.getIds());
        if (R.FAIL == data.getCode()) {
            throw new BaseException(data.getMsg());
        }
        return data.getData();
    }
    /**
     * 修改电源状态-位置
     * @Description: 修改电源状态-位置
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-11-30 14:02:12
     * @param vo 设备控制vo对象
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @Log(title = "修改电源", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PutMapping("/updatePowerNodeHead")
    public AjaxResult updatePowerNodeHead(@RequestBody DeviceControlVO vo)
    {
        R<AjaxResult> data = jufeService.updatePowerNode(vo.getLocationId(),vo.getType(),vo.getRoomIds(),null,vo.getIsBatch());
        if (R.FAIL == data.getCode()) {
            return AjaxResult.error(data.getMsg());
        }
        return data.getData();
    }
    /**
     * 修改电源状态-教室
     * @Description: 修改电源状态-教室
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-11-30 14:02:12
     * @param vo 设备控制vo对象
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @Log(title = "修改电源", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PutMapping("/updatePowerNodeRoom")
    public AjaxResult updatePowerNodeRoom(@RequestBody DeviceControlVO vo)
    {
        List<String> amdinFlagList = SecurityUtils.getLoginUser().getRoles().stream().filter(roole->"admin".equals(roole)||"mastercontrol".equals(roole)).collect(Collectors.toList());
        Boolean flag = amdinFlagList.size()>0;
        R<AjaxResult> data = new R<AjaxResult>();
        //5:全关 6全开
        //1:全闭子空开2:打开子空开3:全闭总空开4:打开总空开
        if (5L == vo.getType()){
            data = jufeService.updatePowerNode(null,1L,vo.getRoomIds(),null,vo.getIsBatch());
            if (flag){
                jufeService.updatePowerNode(null,3L,vo.getRoomIds(),null,vo.getIsBatch());
            }
        }else if (6L == vo.getType()){
            data = jufeService.updatePowerNode(null,2L,vo.getRoomIds(),null,vo.getIsBatch());
            if (flag){
                jufeService.updatePowerNode(null,4L,vo.getRoomIds(),null,vo.getIsBatch());
            }
        }else{
            data = jufeService.updatePowerNode(null,vo.getType(),vo.getRoomIds(),null,vo.getIsBatch());
        }
        if (R.FAIL == data.getCode()) {
            throw new BaseException(data.getMsg());
        }
        return data.getData();
    }
    /**
     * 修改电源状态-电源
     * @Description: 修改电源状态-电源
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-11-30 14:02:12
     * @param vo 设备控制vo对象
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @Log(title = "修改电源", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PutMapping("/updatePowerNode")
    public AjaxResult updatePowerNode(@RequestBody DeviceControlVO vo)
    {
        R<AjaxResult> data = new R<AjaxResult>();
        //5:全关 6全开
        //1:全闭子空开2:打开子空开3:全闭总空开4:打开总空开
        if (5L == vo.getType()){
            data = jufeService.updatePowerNode(null,1L,null,vo.getIds(),vo.getIsBatch());
            jufeService.updatePowerNode(null,3L,null,vo.getIds(),vo.getIsBatch());
        }else if (6L == vo.getType()){
            data = jufeService.updatePowerNode(null,2L,null,vo.getIds(),vo.getIsBatch());
            jufeService.updatePowerNode(null,4L,null,vo.getIds(),vo.getIsBatch());
        }else{
            data = jufeService.updatePowerNode(null,vo.getType(),null,vo.getIds(),vo.getIsBatch());
        }
        if (R.FAIL == data.getCode()) {
            throw new BaseException(data.getMsg());
        }
        return data.getData();
    }
    /**
     * 是否管理员
     * @Description: 是否管理员
     * @Author: liyiying
     * @Date: 2022-12-15 08:39:31
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @GetMapping("/getIsAdmin")
    public AjaxResult getIsAdmin()
    {
        List<String> amdinFlagList = SecurityUtils.getLoginUser().getRoles().stream().filter(roole->"admin".equals(roole)||"mastercontrol".equals(roole)).collect(Collectors.toList());
        return AjaxResult.success(amdinFlagList.size()>0);
    }
/**
 * @Description:获取课程
    * @param roomId
 * @param classDay
 * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult

 * @Date 2023/12/7 17:00

    public AjaxResult listRoomClass(@RequestParam("roomId")  Long roomId,@RequestParam("classDay")  Long classDay)
    {
        AjaxResult result = jufeService.listRoomClass(roomId,classDay);
        return result;
    }

 * @Description:更改课程
    * @param schoolTimeScheduling

 * @Date 2023/12/7 17:00

    @PostMapping("/updateRoomClassStatus")
    public AjaxResult updateRoomClassStatus(@RequestBody SchoolTimeSchedulingBo schoolTimeScheduling)
    {
        AjaxResult result = jufeService.updateRoomClassStatus(schoolTimeScheduling);
        return result;
    }
/**
 * @Description:教室情况
    * @param roomId
 * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
 * @Author: CJH 
 * @Updator: CJH 
 * @Date 2023/12/7 17:00
 */
    @GetMapping("/roomInfo/{roomId}")
    public AjaxResult roomInfo(@PathVariable("roomId") Long roomId) {
        return remoteCourseService.roomInfo(roomId);
    }
/**
 * @Description:基础设置
    * @param 
 * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
 * @Author: CJH 
 * @Updator: CJH 
 * @Date 2023/12/7 17:00

    @GetMapping("/baseSetInfo")
    public AjaxResult baseSetInfo() {

        return result;
    }
/**
 * @Description: 课程延时
    * @param schoolTimeScheduling
 * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult

 * @Updator: CJH 
 * @Date 2023/12/7 17:04
 */
    @PostMapping("/delayNum")
    public AjaxResult delayNum(@RequestBody SchoolTimeScheduling schoolTimeScheduling)
    {
        AjaxResult result = jufeService.delayNum(schoolTimeScheduling);
        return result;
    }

/**

    * @param versionNum
 * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
 * @Author: CJH 
 * @Updator: CJH 
 * @Date 2023/12/7 17:04
 */
    @GetMapping("/checkApk/{versionNum}")
    public AjaxResult checkApk(@PathVariable("versionNum") Integer versionNum)
    {
        AjaxResult result = patrolService.checkApk(versionNum);
        return result;
    }
    /**
     * @Description:获取巡检检查项 
     * @param 
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     * @Author: CJH 
     * @Updator: CJH 
     * @Date 2024/1/18 15:37
     */
    @GetMapping("/inspectionItemList/{pointId}/{jobId}")
    public AjaxResult inspectionItemList(@PathVariable("pointId")Long pointId,@PathVariable("jobId")Long jobId)
    {
        AjaxResult result = patrolService.inspectionItemList(pointId,jobId);
        return result;
    }
}
package com.chenrise.miniapp.controller;
import cn.hutool.json.JSONUtil;
import com.chenrise.common.core.domain.R;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.JwtUtils;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.StringUtils;
import com.chenrise.common.security.auth.AuthUtil;
import com.chenrise.common.security.service.TokenService;
import com.chenrise.common.security.utils.SecurityUtils;
import com.chenrise.miniapp.domain.LoginBody;
import com.chenrise.miniapp.service.MiniLoginService;
import com.chenrise.system.api.RemoteUserService;
import com.chenrise.system.api.model.LoginUser;
import com.chenrise.system.api.model.MiniLoginUser;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.DeleteMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PostMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestBody;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RestController;
import javax.annotation.Resource;
import javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest;
/**
 * @Description 小程序登录
 * @Author chengjihong
 * @Date 2022-12-08 16:18:00
 */
@RestController
public class MiniLoginControl {
    @Resource
    private MiniLoginService miniLoginService;
    @Resource
    private TokenService tokenService;
    @Resource
    private RemoteUserService userService;
/**
 * @Description:登录
    * @param form
 * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.domain.R<?>
 * @Author: CJH
 * @Updator: CJH
 * @Date 2023/12/7 17:03
 */
    @PostMapping("login")
    public R<?> login(@RequestBody LoginBody form)
    {
        // 用户登录
        LoginUser userInfo = miniLoginService.login(form.getUsername(), form.getPassword(),form.getCode());
        // 获取登录token
        tokenService.createToken(userInfo);
        return R.ok(userInfo);
    }
/**
 * @Description:免密登录
    * @param form
 * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.domain.R<?>
 * @Author: CJH
 * @Updator: CJH
 * @Date 2023/12/7 17:03
 */
    @PostMapping("loginopenid")
    public R<?> loginopenid(@RequestBody LoginBody form)
    {
        // 用户登录
        LoginUser userInfo = miniLoginService.loginByOpenId(form.getCode());
        // 获取登录token
        tokenService.createToken(userInfo);
        return R.ok(userInfo);
    }
/**
 * @Description:登出
    * @param request
 * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.domain.R<?>
 * @Author: CJH
 * @Updator: CJH
 * @Date 2023/12/7 17:04
 */
    @DeleteMapping("logout")
    public R<?> logout(HttpServletRequest request)
    {
        String token = SecurityUtils.getToken(request);
        if (StringUtils.isNotEmpty(token))
        {
            String username = JwtUtils.getUserName(token);
            // 删除用户缓存记录
            AuthUtil.logoutByToken(token);
            userService.clearOpenId(username);
        }
        return R.ok();
    }
}

     * @param pageSize

                              @RequestParam("pageNum")String pageNum,@RequestParam("pageSize")String pageSize)

package com.chenrise.miniapp.domain;
/**
 * 用户登录对象
 *
 * @author chenrise
 */
public class LoginBody
{
    /**
     * 用户名
     */
    private String username;
    /**
     * 用户密码
     */
    private String password;
    private String code;
    private String openId;
    public String getCode() {
        return code;
    }
    public void setCode(String code) {
        this.code = code;
    }
    public String getUsername()
    {
        return username;
    }
    public void setUsername(String username)
    {
        this.username = username;
    }
    public String getPassword()
    {
        return password;
    }
    public void setPassword(String password)
    {
        this.password = password;
    }
    public String getOpenId() {
        return openId;
    }
    public void setOpenId(String openId) {
        this.openId = openId;
    }
}
package com.chenrise.miniapp.service;
import com.alibaba.fastjson.JSONObject;
import com.chenrise.common.core.constant.SecurityConstants;
import com.chenrise.common.core.constant.UserConstants;
import com.chenrise.common.core.domain.R;
import com.chenrise.common.core.enums.UserStatus;
import com.chenrise.common.core.exception.ServiceException;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.StringUtils;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult;
import com.chenrise.common.security.utils.SecurityUtils;
import com.chenrise.miniapp.util.WeChatUtil;
import com.chenrise.system.api.RemoteJufeService;
import com.chenrise.system.api.RemoteUserService;
import com.chenrise.system.api.domain.SchoolTempUserInfo;
import com.chenrise.system.api.domain.SysRole;
import com.chenrise.system.api.domain.SysUser;
import com.chenrise.system.api.model.LoginUser;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Value;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Component;
import javax.annotation.Resource;
import java.util.Date;
import java.util.stream.Collectors;
/**
 * 登录校验方法
 *
 * @author chenrise
 */
@Component
public class MiniLoginService
{
    @Resource
    private RemoteUserService remoteUserService;
    @Resource
    private MiniPasswordService passwordService;
    @Resource
    private RemoteJufeService jufeService;
    @Value("${wx.miniapp.configs[0].appid}")
    private String appId;
    @Value("${wx.miniapp.configs[0].secret}")
    private String secret;
    /**
     * 登录
     */
    public LoginUser login(String username, String password,String code)
    {
        // 用户名或密码为空 错误
        if (StringUtils.isAnyBlank(username, password))
        {
            throw new ServiceException("用户/密码必须填写");
        }
        // 密码如果不在指定范围内 错误
        if (password.length() < UserConstants.PASSWORD_MIN_LENGTH
                || password.length() > UserConstants.PASSWORD_MAX_LENGTH)
        {
            throw new ServiceException("用户密码不在指定范围");
        }
        // 用户名不在指定范围内 错误
        if (username.length() < UserConstants.USERNAME_MIN_LENGTH
                || username.length() > UserConstants.USERNAME_MAX_LENGTH)
        {
            throw new ServiceException("用户名不在指定范围");
        }
        // 查询用户信息
        R<LoginUser> userResult = remoteUserService.getUserInfo(username, SecurityConstants.INNER);
        LoginUser loginUser = new LoginUser();
        if (StringUtils.isNull(userResult) || StringUtils.isNull(userResult.getData()))
        {
            throw new ServiceException("登录用户不存在");
        }
        if (R.FAIL == userResult.getCode())
        {
            throw new ServiceException(userResult.getMsg());
        }
        SysUser user = userResult.getData().getSysUser();
        loginUser.setMaxBreakNum(userResult.getData().getMaxBreakNum());
        loginUser.setUserid(user.getUserId());
        loginUser.setUsername(user.getUserName());
        loginUser.setRoles(user.getRoles().stream().map(SysRole::getRoleKey).collect(Collectors.toSet()));
        Boolean opproval = false;
        Boolean control = false;
        boolean assets = false;
        for(SysRole sr:user.getRoles()){
            if("approval".equals(sr.getRoleKey())||"approval_all".equals(sr.getRoleKey())){
                opproval = true;
            }
            if("mastercontrol".equals(sr.getRoleKey())){
                control = true;
            }
            if ("app_assets".equals(sr.getRoleKey())) {
                assets = true;
            }
        }
        loginUser.setApproval(opproval);
        loginUser.setAssets(assets);
        loginUser.setSysUser(user);
        if (UserStatus.DELETED.getCode().equals(user.getDelFlag()))
        {
            throw new ServiceException("您的账号已被删除");
        }
        if (UserStatus.DISABLE.getCode().equals(user.getStatus()))
        {
            throw new ServiceException("您的账号已停用");
        }
        if("03".equals(user.getUserType())){
            SchoolTempUserInfo schoolTempUserInfo = jufeService.getTempUserInfo(user.getPhonenumber());
            Date now = new Date();
            if (schoolTempUserInfo.getStatusStartDate().after(now)||schoolTempUserInfo.getStatusEndDate().before(now)){
                throw new ServiceException("您的账号已过有效期");
            }
        }
        if (UserStatus.ISINSCHOOL.getCode().equals(user.getInSchoolStatus()))
        {
//            if(user.getUserType().equals("01")){
//                throw new ServiceException("您的账号已离职，无法登录");
//            }else if(user.getUserType().equals("02")){
//                throw new ServiceException("您的账号已非在籍，无法登录");
//            }else
                if(user.getUserType().equals("03")){
                throw new ServiceException("您的账号已过有效期");
            }
        }
        passwordService.validate(user, password);
        /*// 根据小程序穿过来的code想这个url发送请求
        String url = "https://api.weixin.qq.com/sns/jscode2session?appid=" + appId + "&secret=" + secret + "&js_code=" + code + "&grant_type=authorization_code";
        // 发送请求，返回Json字符串
        String str = WeChatUtil.httpRequest(url, "GET", null);
        System.out.println("账号登录str--------------->"+str);
        // 转成Json对象 获取openid
        JSONObject jsonObject = JSONObject.parseObject(str);
        // 我们需要的openid，在一个小程序中，openid是唯一的
        if(jsonObject.get("openid")!=null){
            String openid = jsonObject.get("openid").toString();
            SysUser editUser = new SysUser();
            if(user.getRoles()!=null){
                Long []roleIds = new Long[user.getRoles().size()];
                for(int i=0;i<user.getRoles().size();i++){
                    roleIds[i] = user.getRoles().get(i).getRoleId();
                }
                editUser.setRoleIds(roleIds);
            }
            editUser.setUserId(user.getUserId());
            editUser.setOpenId(openid);
            remoteUserService.editUser(editUser);
        }*/
        /**
         * 验证是否教室负责人
         * */
        AjaxResult result = jufeService.checkPrincipal(loginUser.getUserid());
         if("true".equals(String.valueOf(result.get("data")))||control){
            loginUser.setControl(true);
        }else{
            loginUser.setControl(false);
        }
        /**
         * 验证用户是否在黑名单内
         * */
        result = jufeService.checkBlack(loginUser.getUserid());
        if("true".equals(String.valueOf(result.get("msg")))){
            loginUser.setInBlack(true);
        }else{
            loginUser.setInBlack(false);
        }
        return loginUser;
    }
    public LoginUser loginByOpenId(String code)
    {
        // 根据小程序穿过来的code想这个url发送请求
        String url = "https://api.weixin.qq.com/sns/jscode2session?appid=" + appId + "&secret=" + secret + "&js_code=" + code + "&grant_type=authorization_code";
        // 发送请求，返回Json字符串
        String str = WeChatUtil.httpRequest(url, "GET", null);
        // 转成Json对象 获取openid
        JSONObject jsonObject = JSONObject.parseObject(str);
        if(jsonObject.get("openid") ==null){
            throw new ServiceException("微信未绑定用户！");
        }
        String openid = jsonObject.get("openid").toString();
        // 查询用户信息
        R<LoginUser> userResult = remoteUserService.getUserByOpenId(openid, SecurityConstants.INNER);
        LoginUser loginUser = new LoginUser();
        if (StringUtils.isNull(userResult) || StringUtils.isNull(userResult.getData()))
        {
            throw new ServiceException("请登录！");
        }
        if (R.FAIL == userResult.getCode())
        {
            throw new ServiceException(userResult.getMsg());
        }
        SysUser user = userResult.getData().getSysUser();
        loginUser.setMaxBreakNum(userResult.getData().getMaxBreakNum());
        loginUser.setUserid(user.getUserId());
        loginUser.setUsername(user.getUserName());
        loginUser.setRoles(user.getRoles().stream().map(SysRole::getRoleKey).collect(Collectors.toSet()));
        Boolean opproval = false;
        Boolean control = false;
        for(SysRole sr:user.getRoles()){
            if("approval".equals(sr.getRoleKey())||"approval_all".equals(sr.getRoleKey())){
                opproval = true;
            }
            if("mastercontrol".equals(sr.getRoleKey())){
                control = true;
            }
        }
        loginUser.setApproval(opproval);
        loginUser.setSysUser(user);
        if (UserStatus.DELETED.getCode().equals(user.getDelFlag()))
        {
            throw new ServiceException("您的账号已被删除！");
        }
        if (UserStatus.DISABLE.getCode().equals(user.getStatus()))
        {
            throw new ServiceException("您的账号已停用！");
        }
        if("03".equals(user.getUserType())){
            SchoolTempUserInfo schoolTempUserInfo = jufeService.getTempUserInfo(user.getPhonenumber());
            Date now = new Date();
            if (schoolTempUserInfo.getStatusStartDate().after(now)||schoolTempUserInfo.getStatusEndDate().before(now)){
                throw new ServiceException("您的账号已过有效期！");
            }
        }
        if("03".equals(user.getUserType())){
            if(user.getStatusStartDate().getTime()>System.currentTimeMillis()||user.getStatusEndDate().getTime()<System.currentTimeMillis()){
                throw new ServiceException("您的账号未在有效期！");
            }
        }
        /**
         * 验证是否教室负责人
         * */
        AjaxResult result = jufeService.checkPrincipal(loginUser.getUserid());
        if("true".equals(String.valueOf(result.get("data")))||control){
            loginUser.setControl(true);
        }else{
            loginUser.setControl(false);
        }
        /**
         * 验证用户是否在黑名单内
         * */
        result = jufeService.checkBlack(loginUser.getUserid());
        if("true".equals(String.valueOf(result.get("msg")))){
            loginUser.setInBlack(true);
        }else{
            loginUser.setInBlack(false);
        }
        return loginUser;
    }
    public void logout(String loginName)
    {
    }
    /**
     * 注册
     */
    public void register(String username, String password)
    {
        // 用户名或密码为空 错误
        if (StringUtils.isAnyBlank(username, password))
        {
            throw new ServiceException("用户/密码必须填写");
        }
        if (username.length() < UserConstants.USERNAME_MIN_LENGTH
                || username.length() > UserConstants.USERNAME_MAX_LENGTH)
        {
            throw new ServiceException("账户长度必须在2到20个字符之间");
        }
        if (password.length() < UserConstants.PASSWORD_MIN_LENGTH
                || password.length() > UserConstants.PASSWORD_MAX_LENGTH)
        {
            throw new ServiceException("密码长度必须在5到20个字符之间");
        }
        // 注册用户信息
        SysUser sysUser = new SysUser();
        sysUser.setUserName(username);
        sysUser.setNickName(username);
        sysUser.setPassword(SecurityUtils.encryptPassword(password));
        R<?> registerResult = remoteUserService.registerUserInfo(sysUser, SecurityConstants.INNER);
        if (R.FAIL == registerResult.getCode())
        {
            throw new ServiceException(registerResult.getMsg());
        }
    }
}
package com.chenrise.miniapp.service;
import com.chenrise.common.core.constant.CacheConstants;
import com.chenrise.common.core.constant.Constants;
import com.chenrise.common.core.exception.ServiceException;
import com.chenrise.common.redis.service.RedisService;
import com.chenrise.common.security.utils.SecurityUtils;
import com.chenrise.system.api.domain.SysUser;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Component;
import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit;
/**
 * 登录密码方法
 *
 * @author chenrise
 */
@Component
public class MiniPasswordService
{
    @Autowired
    private RedisService redisService;
    private int maxRetryCount = CacheConstants.PASSWORD_MAX_RETRY_COUNT;
    private Long lockTime = CacheConstants.PASSWORD_LOCK_TIME;
    /**
     * 登录账户密码错误次数缓存键名
     *
     * @param username 用户名
     * @return 缓存键key
     */
    private String getCacheKey(String username)
    {
        return CacheConstants.PWD_ERR_CNT_KEY + username;
    }
    public void validate(SysUser user, String password)
    {
        String username = user.getUserName();
        Integer retryCount = redisService.getCacheObject(getCacheKey(username));
        if (retryCount == null)
        {
            retryCount = 0;
        }
        if (retryCount >= Integer.valueOf(maxRetryCount).intValue())
        {
            String errMsg = String.format("密码输入错误%s次，帐户锁定%s分钟", maxRetryCount, lockTime);
            throw new ServiceException(errMsg);
        }
        if (!matches(user, password))
        {
            retryCount = retryCount + 1;
            redisService.setCacheObject(getCacheKey(username), retryCount, lockTime, TimeUnit.MINUTES);
            throw new ServiceException("用户不存在/密码错误");
        }
        else
        {
            clearLoginRecordCache(username);
        }
    }
    public boolean matches(SysUser user, String rawPassword)
    {
        return SecurityUtils.matchesPassword(rawPassword, user.getPassword());
    }
    public void clearLoginRecordCache(String loginName)
    {
        if (redisService.hasKey(getCacheKey(loginName)))
        {
            redisService.deleteObject(getCacheKey(loginName));
        }
    }
}
package com.chenrise.miniapp.util;
import javax.net.ssl.HttpsURLConnection;
import java.io.BufferedReader;
import java.io.InputStream;
import java.io.InputStreamReader;
import java.io.OutputStream;
import java.net.URL;
/**
 * @Description TODO
 * @Author chengjihong
 * @Date 2023-01-31 13:21:00
 */
public class WeChatUtil {
    public static String httpRequest(String requestUrl,String requestMethod,String output){
        try{
            URL url = new URL(requestUrl);
            HttpsURLConnection connection = (HttpsURLConnection) url.openConnection();
            connection.setDoOutput(true);
            connection.setDoInput(true);
            connection.setUseCaches(false);
            if(null != output){
                OutputStream outputStream = connection.getOutputStream();
                outputStream.write(output.getBytes("utf-8"));
                outputStream.close();
            }
            // 从输入流读取返回内容
            InputStream inputStream = connection.getInputStream();
            InputStreamReader inputStreamReader = new InputStreamReader(inputStream, "utf-8");
            BufferedReader bufferedReader = new BufferedReader(inputStreamReader);
            String str = null;
            StringBuffer buffer = new StringBuffer();
            while ((str = bufferedReader.readLine()) != null){
                buffer.append(str);
            }
            bufferedReader.close();
            inputStreamReader.close();
            inputStream.close();
            inputStream = null;
            connection.disconnect();
            return buffer.toString();
        }catch(Exception e){
            e.printStackTrace();
        }
        return "";
    }
}

/**
 * 巡更异常，用于记录巡更点的异常情况Controller
 *
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2023-03-03
 */
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/abnormal")
public class AbnormalController extends BaseController
{
    @Resource
    private IPatrolJobItemService itemService;
    @Resource
    private IPatrolJobItemInspectService itemInspectService;
    /**
     * 查询巡更异常，用于记录巡更点的异常情况列表
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("patrol:abnormal:list")
    @GetMapping("/list")
    public TableDataInfo list(PatrolJobItem abnormal)
    {
        abnormal.setResult("2");
        abnormal.getParams().put("orderBy","order by arrive_time desc ");
        startPage();
        List<PatrolJobItem> list = itemService.selectPatrolJobItemList(abnormal);
        for(PatrolJobItem pji:list){
            PatrolJobItemInspect pjii_query = new PatrolJobItemInspect();
            pjii_query.setJobId(pji.getJobId());
            pjii_query.setPointId(pji.getPointId());
            List<PatrolJobItemInspect> itemInspects = itemInspectService.selectPatrolJobItemInspectList(pjii_query);
            pji.setItemInspects(itemInspects);
        }
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     * 导出巡更异常，用于记录巡更点的异常情况列表
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("patrol:abnormal:export")
    @Log(title = "巡更异常，用于记录巡更点的异常情况", businessType = BusinessType.EXPORT)
    @PostMapping("/export")
    public void export(HttpServletResponse response, PatrolJobItem abnormal)
    {
        abnormal.setResult("2");
        if(abnormal.getParams().get("ids")!=null){
            abnormal.getParams().put("ids",String.valueOf(abnormal.getParams().get("ids")).split(","));
        }
        List<PatrolJobItem> list = itemService.selectPatrolJobItemList(abnormal);
        for(PatrolJobItem pji:list){
            PatrolJobItemInspect pjii_query = new PatrolJobItemInspect();
            pjii_query.setJobId(pji.getJobId());
            pjii_query.setPointId(pji.getPointId());
            List<PatrolJobItemInspect> itemInspects = itemInspectService.selectPatrolJobItemInspectList(pjii_query);
            String inspectStr = "";
            for(PatrolJobItemInspect pjii:itemInspects){
                inspectStr+=pjii.getInspectName()+":"+("1".equals(pjii.getResult())?"正常":"异常")+"\n";
            }
            pji.setInspectStr(inspectStr);
        }
        ExcelUtil<PatrolJobItem> util = new ExcelUtil<PatrolJobItem>(PatrolJobItem.class);
        util.exportExcel(response, list, "巡更异常，用于记录巡更点的异常情况数据");
    }
    /**
     * 获取巡更异常，用于记录巡更点的异常情况详细信息
     */
    @GetMapping(value = "/{id}")
    public AjaxResult getInfo(@PathVariable("id") Long id)
    {
        PatrolJobItem normal = itemService.selectPatrolJobItemById(id);
        PatrolJobItemInspect pjii_query = new PatrolJobItemInspect();
        pjii_query.setJobId(normal.getJobId());
        pjii_query.setPointId(normal.getPointId());
        List<PatrolJobItemInspect> itemInspects = itemInspectService.selectPatrolJobItemInspectList(pjii_query);
        DictUtils.getDictName(itemInspects);
        normal.setItemInspects(itemInspects);
        DictUtils.getDictName(normal);
        return success(normal);
    }
    /**
     * 修改巡更异常，用于记录巡更点的异常情况
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("patrol:abnormal:edit")
    @Log(title = "巡更异常，用于记录巡更点的异常情况", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PutMapping
    public AjaxResult edit(@RequestBody PatrolJobItem abnormal)
    {
        abnormal.setDealBy(SecurityUtils.getLoginUser().getSysUser().getNickName());
        abnormal.setDealTime(new Date());
        return toAjax(itemService.updatePatrolJobItem(abnormal));
    }
    /**
     * 删除巡更异常，用于记录巡更点的异常情况
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("patrol:abnormal:remove")
    @Log(title = "巡更异常，用于记录巡更点的异常情况", businessType = BusinessType.DELETE)
	@DeleteMapping("/{ids}")
    public AjaxResult remove(@PathVariable Long[] ids)
    {
        return toAjax(itemService.deletePatrolJobItemByIds(ids));
    }
    public static void main(String[] args) throws InterruptedException {
        System.out.println("----------------");
        Thread.sleep(60*1000);
    }
}
package com.chenrise.patrol.controller;
import cn.hutool.core.date.DateUtil;
import cn.hutool.http.HttpUtil;
import cn.hutool.json.JSONArray;

import com.chenrise.common.core.exception.ServiceException;
