import com.chenrise.patrol.mapper.PatrolPlanMapper;
import com.chenrise.patrol.service.*;
import com.chenrise.system.api.RemoteConfigService;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.*;
import javax.annotation.Resource;
import java.util.*;
import java.util.stream.Collectors;
/**
 * 巡更计划Controller
 *
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2023-03-03
 */
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/api/job")
public class ApiJobController extends BaseController {
    @Resource
    private IPatrolJobService jobService;
    @Resource
    private IPatrolJobItemService itemService;
    @Resource
    private IPatrolPointsService pointsService;
    @Resource
    private IPatrolPlanService planService;
    @Resource
    private RemoteConfigService configService;
    @Resource
    private IAbnormalService abnormalService;
    @Resource
    private IHolidaySetService holidaySetService;
    @Resource
    private PatrolJobMapper jobMapper;
    @Resource
    private IPatrolPlanItemService planItemService;
    @Resource
    private PatrolPlanMapper planMapper;
    @Resource
    private IApkSourceService apkSourceService;
    @Resource
    private ISchoolJxzService jxzService;
    @Resource
    private IPatrolInspectionItemService inspectionItemService;
    @Resource
    private IPatrolJobItemInspectService jobItemInspectService;
    @Resource
    private IPatrolJobItemInspectService itemInspectService;
    /**
     * 查询巡更计划列表
     */
    @GetMapping("/list")
    public TableDataInfo list(Long userId, String dealStatus) {
        startPage();
        PatrolJob query = new PatrolJob();
        query.getParams().put("userId", userId);
        if ("1".equals(dealStatus)) {
            query.getParams().put("statusList", new String[]{"1", "2"});
        } else {
            query.getParams().put("statusList", new String[]{"3", "4", "5"});
        }
        List<PatrolJob> list = jobService.selectPatrolJobList(query);
        for (PatrolJob pj : list) {
            PatrolJobItem query_pji = new PatrolJobItem();
            query_pji.setJobId(pj.getId());
            List<PatrolJobItem> items = itemService.selectPatrolJobItemList(query_pji);
            pj.getParams().put("pointNum", items.size());
            List<PatrolJobItem> checkedList = items.stream().filter(item -> item.getResult() != null).collect(Collectors.toList());
            pj.getParams().put("checkedPointNum", checkedList.size());
        }
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     * @param object
     * @Description:去巡更接取巡更任务
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     * @Author: CJH
     * @Updator: CJH
     * @Date 2023/12/7 16:54
     */
    @PostMapping("/goPatrol")
    public AjaxResult goPatrol(@RequestBody JSONObject object) {
        Long jobId = object.getLong("jobId");
        Long userId = object.getLong("userId");
        String userName = object.getStr("userName");
        PatrolJob job = jobService.selectPatrolJobById(jobId);
        if (!"1".equals(job.getStatus())) {
            throw new ServiceException("当前任务已被执行，不可重复巡更！");
        }
        Date now = new Date();
        if (!now.after(job.getStartTime()) || now.after(job.getEndTime())) {
            throw new ServiceException("未到任务开始时间，请稍后执行");
        }
        job.setUserId(userId);
        job.setUserName(userName);
        job.setStatus("2");
        job.setRealStartTime(new Date());
        jobService.updatePatrolJob(job);
        DictUtils.getDictName(job);
        return AjaxResult.success(job);
    }
    /**
     * @param id
     * @Description:巡更详情
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     * @Author: CJH
     * @Updator: CJH
     * @Date 2023/12/7 16:54
     */
    @GetMapping("/getPatrolDetail/{id}")
    public AjaxResult getPatrolDetail(@PathVariable("id") Long id) {
        PatrolJob job = jobService.selectPatrolJobById(id);
        DictUtils.getDictName(job);
        PatrolPlan plan = planService.selectPatrolPlanById(job.getPlanId());
        DictUtils.getDictName(plan);
        job.setPlan(plan);
        job.getParams().put("totalNum", 0);
        job.getParams().put("checkedNum", 0);
        PatrolJobItem query = new PatrolJobItem();
        query.setJobId(id);
        //App端不存在组件问题 按排序号查询
        query.getParams().put("orderBy", " order by sort_num asc, id asc");
        //小程序端由于组件问题只能将自由路线和固定路线分开查询
//        if("1".equals(job.getMode())){
//            query.getParams().put("orderBy"," order by result desc");
//        }else{
//            query.getParams().put("orderBy"," order by sort_num asc");
//        }
        List<PatrolJobItem> list = itemService.selectPatrolJobItemList(query);
        if (list != null && list.size() > 0) {
            DictUtils.getDictName(list);
            job.getParams().put("totalNum", list.size());
            List<PatrolJobItem> checkedList = list.stream().filter(item -> item.getResult() != null).collect(Collectors.toList());
            job.getParams().put("checkedNum", checkedList.size());
//            for(PatrolJobItem pji:list){
//                PatrolPoints pp = pointsService.selectPatrolPointsById(pji.getPointId());
//                pji.getParams().put("pointName",pp.getName());
//                pji.getParams().put("location",pp.getLocation());
//                if("2".equals(pji.getResult())){
//                    Abnormal query_ab = new Abnormal();
//                    query_ab.setJobId(pji.getJobId());
//                    query_ab.setPointId(pji.getPointId());
//                    List<Abnormal> ab_list = abnormalService.selectAbnormalList(query_ab);
//                    if(ab_list!=null&&ab_list.size()>0){
//                        pji.getParams().put("abId",ab_list.get(0).getId());
//                    }
//                }
//            }
            job.setItems(list);
        }
        return AjaxResult.success(job);
    }
    /**
     * @param jobId
     * @Description:获取下一个巡更点
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     * @Author: CJH
     * @Updator: CJH
     * @Date 2023/12/7 16:54
     */
    @GetMapping("/getNextJobItem/{jobId}")
    public AjaxResult getNextJobItem(@PathVariable("jobId") Long jobId) {
        PatrolJobItem query = new PatrolJobItem();
        query.setJobId(jobId);
        query.getParams().put("orderBy", " order by sort_num asc");
        List<PatrolJobItem> list = itemService.selectPatrolJobItemList(query);
        PatrolJobItem returnItem = null;
        for (PatrolJobItem pji : list) {
            if (pji.getResult() == null) {
                returnItem = pji;
                break;
            }
        }
        if (returnItem != null) {
            PatrolPoints pp = pointsService.selectPatrolPointsById(returnItem.getPointId());
            returnItem.getParams().put("pointName", pp.getName());
            returnItem.getParams().put("location", pp.getLocation());
        }
        return AjaxResult.success(returnItem);
    }
    /**
     * @param jobId
     * @Description:完成巡更
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     * @Author: CJH
     * @Updator: CJH
     * @Date 2023/12/7 16:54
     */
    @PostMapping("/finishPatrol/{jobId}")
    public AjaxResult finishPatrol(@PathVariable("jobId") Long jobId) {
        PatrolJob job = jobService.selectPatrolJobById(jobId);
        Date now = new Date();
        job.setRealEndTime(now);
        if (now.after(job.getEndTime())) {
            job.setStatus("5");
        } else {
            job.setStatus("4");
        }
        jobService.updatePatrolJob(job);
        return AjaxResult.success();
    }
    /**
     * @param jobId
     * @param searchKey
     * @Description:获取任务中的点位
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo
     * @Author: CJH
     * @Updator: CJH
     * @Date 2023/12/7 16:55
     */
    @GetMapping("/points")
    public TableDataInfo getPoints(Long jobId, String searchKey) {
        List<Map<String, Object>> results = new ArrayList<>();
        PatrolPoints query = new PatrolPoints();
        PatrolJob job = jobService.selectPatrolJobById(jobId);
        PatrolJobItem query_item = new PatrolJobItem();
        query_item.setJobId(jobId);
        query_item.getParams().put("result", true);
        List<PatrolJobItem> items = itemService.selectPatrolJobItemList(query_item);
        List<Long> ids = items.stream().map(e -> e.getPointId()).collect(Collectors.toList());
        if (ids.size() > 0) {
            query.getParams().put("notInIds", ids);
        }
        PatrolPlan plan = planService.selectPatrolPlanById(job.getPlanId());
        String[] pointIds = plan.getPointIds().split(",");
        query.getParams().put("inIds", pointIds);
        query.getParams().put("searchKey", searchKey);
        List<PatrolPoints> points = pointsService.selectPatrolPointsList(query);
        points.stream().forEach(e -> {
            Map<String, Object> map = new HashMap<>();
            map.put("text", e.getName());
            map.put("value", e.getId());
            map.put("location", e.getLocation());
            results.add(map);
        });
        return getDataTable(results);
    }
    /**
     * @param nfcId
     * @param jobId
     * @Description:按nfc获取点位
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     * @Author: CJH
     * @Updator: CJH
     * @Date 2023/12/7 16:55
     */
    @GetMapping("/getPointByNFCId/{nfcId}/{jobId}")
    public AjaxResult getPointByNFCId(@PathVariable("nfcId") String nfcId, @PathVariable("jobId") Long jobId) {
        PatrolPoints point = pointsService.selectPointsByNFCId(nfcId);
        if (point == null) {
            throw new ServiceException("NFC卡未绑定巡更点，请确认！");
        }
        if (jobId != 0L) {
            PatrolJobItem query = new PatrolJobItem();
            query.setPointId(point.getId());
            query.setJobId(jobId);
            List<PatrolJobItem> list = itemService.selectPatrolJobItemList(query);
            if (list == null || list.size() == 0) {
                throw new ServiceException("非当前任务中点位，无法打卡！");
            }
            PatrolJobItem item = list.get(0);
            if (item != null && item.getResult() != null) {
                throw new ServiceException("当前点位已上报巡更结果，无法重复上报");
            }
        }
        return AjaxResult.success(point);
    }
    /**
     * @param id
     * @param jobId
     * @Description:按ID 获取点位
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     * @Author: CJH
     * @Updator: CJH
     * @Date 2023/12/7 16:55
     */
    @GetMapping("/getPointById/{id}/{jobId}")
    public AjaxResult getPointById(@PathVariable("id") Long id, @PathVariable("jobId") Long jobId) {
        PatrolPoints point = pointsService.selectPatrolPointsById(id);
        if (jobId != 0L) {
            PatrolJobItem query = new PatrolJobItem();
            query.setPointId(point.getId());
            query.setJobId(jobId);
            List<PatrolJobItem> list = itemService.selectPatrolJobItemList(query);
            if (list == null || list.size() == 0) {
                throw new ServiceException("非当前任务中点位，无法打卡！");
            }
            PatrolJobItem item = list.get(0);
            if (item != null && item.getResult() != null) {
                throw new ServiceException("当前点位已上报巡更结果，无法重复上报");
            }
        }
        return AjaxResult.success(point);
    }
    /**
     * @param name
     * @Description:按名称
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     * @Author: CJH
     * @Updator: CJH
     * @Date 2023/12/13 17:18
     */
    @GetMapping("/getPointByName/{name}")
    public AjaxResult getPointById(@PathVariable("name") String name) {
        PatrolPoints point = pointsService.selectPatrolPointsByName(name);
        return AjaxResult.success(point);
    }
    /**
     * @param object
     * @Description:巡更上报
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     * @Author: CJH
     * @Updator: CJH
     * @Date 2023/12/7 16:55
     */
    @PostMapping("/patrolPoint")
    public AjaxResult patrolPoint(@RequestBody JSONObject object) {
        AjaxResult res = configService.getConfigKey("patrol.point.radius");
        String radius = (String) res.get("msg");
        Long jobItemId = object.getLong("jobItemId");
        Long jobId = object.getLong("jobId");
        Long pointId = object.getLong("pointId");
        Long userId = object.getLong("userId");
        String userName = object.getStr("nickName");
        String result = object.getStr("result");
        Double latitude = object.getDouble("latitude");
        Double longitude = object.getDouble("longitude");
        PatrolJobItem item = null;
        if (jobItemId != null && jobItemId != 0L) {
            item = itemService.selectPatrolJobItemById(jobItemId);
        } else {
            if (pointId == null) {
                throw new ServiceException("错误的二维码！");
            }
            PatrolJobItem query = new PatrolJobItem();
            query.setPointId(pointId);
            query.setJobId(jobId);
            List<PatrolJobItem> list = itemService.selectPatrolJobItemList(query);
            if (list == null || list.size() == 0) {
                throw new ServiceException("非当前任务中点位，无法扫码！");
            }
            item = list.get(0);
        }
        if (item != null && item.getResult() != null) {
            throw new ServiceException("当前点位已上报巡更结果，无法重复上报");
        }
        //巡更方式  1扫码  2刷NFC卡
        String patrolType = object.getStr("patrolType");
        if ("1".equals(patrolType)) {
            PatrolPoints point = pointsService.selectPatrolPointsById(item.getPointId());
            if ("Y".equals(point.getGetLocation())) {
                String coordinate = point.getCoordinate();
                String[] arr = coordinate.split(",");
                boolean coordinateToDistance = coordinateToDistance(radius, Double.parseDouble(arr[1]), Double.parseDouble(arr[0]), latitude, longitude);
                if (coordinateToDistance) {
                    return AjaxResult.error("不在扫码范围内，无法上报！");
                }
            }
        }
        item.setUserId(userId);
        item.setUserName(userName);
        item.setResult(result);
        item.setArriveTime(new Date());
        itemService.updatePatrolJobItem(item);
        return AjaxResult.success();
    }
    /**
     * @Description:异常上报
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     * @Author: CJH
     * @Updator: CJH
     * @Date 2023/12/7 16:55
     */
    @PostMapping("/addAbnormal")
    public AjaxResult addAbnormal(@RequestBody JSONObject object){
        AjaxResult res = configService.getConfigKey("patrol.point.radius");
        String radius = (String) res.get("msg");
        Long jobItemId = object.getLong("jobItemId");
        Long jobId = object.getLong("jobId");
        Long pointId = object.getLong("pointId");
        Long userId = object.getLong("userId");
        String userName = object.getStr("createBy");
        Double latitude = object.getDouble("latitude");
        Double longitude = object.getDouble("longitude");
        String faultType = object.getStr("faultType");
        String type = object.getStr("type");
        JSONArray itemInspects = object.getJSONArray("itemInspects");
        String description = object.getStr("description");
        List<String> pics = object.getJSONArray("pictureList").toList(String.class);
        String picUrl = String.join(",",pics);
        PatrolJobItem item = null;
        if (jobItemId != null && jobItemId != 0L) {
            item = itemService.selectPatrolJobItemById(jobItemId);
        } else {
            PatrolJobItem query = new PatrolJobItem();
            query.setPointId(pointId);
            query.setJobId(jobId);
            List<PatrolJobItem> list = itemService.selectPatrolJobItemList(query);
            item = list.get(0);
        }
        //巡更方式  1扫码  2刷NFC卡
        String patrolType = object.getStr("patrolType");
        PatrolPoints point = pointsService.selectPatrolPointsById(item.getPointId());
        if ("1".equals(patrolType) && (faultType == null || "".equals(faultType))) {
            if ("Y".equals(point.getGetLocation())) {
                String coordinate = point.getCoordinate();
                String[] arr = coordinate.split(",");
                boolean coordinateToDistance = coordinateToDistance(radius, Double.parseDouble(arr[1]), Double.parseDouble(arr[0]), latitude, longitude);
                if (coordinateToDistance) {
                    return AjaxResult.error("不在扫码范围内，无法上报！");
                }
            }
        }
        item.setUserId(userId);
        item.setUserName(userName);
        item.setType(type);
        item.setFaultType(faultType);
        item.setDescription(description);
        item.setPictureUrl(picUrl);
        String result = "1";
        for (int i = 0; i < itemInspects.size(); i++) {
            JSONObject jsonObject = itemInspects.getJSONObject(i);
            Long inspectId = jsonObject.getLong("inspectId");
            String inspectResult = jsonObject.getStr("result");
            if ("2".equals(inspectResult)) {
                result = "2";
            }
            PatrolJobItemInspect query = new PatrolJobItemInspect();
            query.setJobId(jobId);
            query.setPointId(pointId);
            query.setInspectId(inspectId);
            List<PatrolJobItemInspect> items = itemInspectService.selectPatrolJobItemInspectList(query);
            if (items != null && items.size() > 0) {
                PatrolJobItemInspect update = items.get(0);
                update.setResult(inspectResult);
                itemInspectService.updatePatrolJobItemInspect(update);
            }
        }
//        item.setResult(result);
        if ("2".equals(result) || (faultType != null && !"".equals(faultType))) {
            item.setResult("2");
            item.setProcessStatus("1");
        } else {
            item.setResult("1");
        }
        item.setArriveTime(new Date());
        itemService.updatePatrolJobItem(item);
//        Abnormal abnormal = JSONUtil.toBean(object,Abnormal.class) ;
//        if("2".equals(abnormal.getResult())||StringUtils.isNotEmpty(abnormal.getFaultType())){
//            abnormal.setLocation(point.getLocation());
//            abnormal.setPointName(point.getName());
//            abnormalService.insertAbnormal(abnormal);
//        }
        return AjaxResult.success();
    }
    /**
     * @param jobId
     * @param pointName
     * @Description:异常列表
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo
     * @Author: CJH
     * @Updator: CJH
     * @Date 2023/12/7 16:40
     */
    @GetMapping("/abnormalList")
    public TableDataInfo abnormalList(Long jobId, String pointName) {
        PatrolJobItem query = new PatrolJobItem();
        query.setPointName(pointName);
        query.setJobId(jobId);
        query.setResult("2");
        query.getParams().put("orderBy", " order by id desc");
        List<PatrolJobItem> list = itemService.selectPatrolJobItemList(query);
        for (PatrolJobItem ab : list) {
            if (StringUtils.isNotEmpty(ab.getPictureUrl())) {
                String[] arr = ab.getPictureUrl().split(",");
                byte[] bytes = HttpUtil.downloadBytes(arr[0]);
                ab.getParams().put("firstPic", bytes);
            }
        }
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     * @param id
     * @Description:异常详情
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     * @Author: CJH
     * @Updator: CJH
     * @Date 2023/12/7 16:41
     */
    @GetMapping("/getAbnormal/{id}")
    public AjaxResult getAbnormal(@PathVariable("id") Long id) {
        PatrolJobItem abnormal = itemService.selectPatrolJobItemById(id);
        PatrolJobItemInspect pjii_query = new PatrolJobItemInspect();
        pjii_query.setJobId(abnormal.getJobId());
        pjii_query.setPointId(abnormal.getPointId());
        List<PatrolJobItemInspect> itemInspects = itemInspectService.selectPatrolJobItemInspectList(pjii_query);
        DictUtils.getDictName(itemInspects);
        abnormal.setItemInspects(itemInspects);
        List<byte[]> picList = new ArrayList<>();
        if (StringUtils.isNotEmpty(abnormal.getPictureUrl())) {
            String[] arr = abnormal.getPictureUrl().split(",");
            for (String s : arr) {
                byte[] bytes = HttpUtil.downloadBytes(s);
                picList.add(bytes);
            }
        }
        abnormal.setPicList(picList);
        DictUtils.getDictName(abnormal);
        return AjaxResult.success(abnormal);
    }
    @GetMapping("/inspectionItemList/{pointId}/{jobId}")
    public TableDataInfo inspectionItemList(@PathVariable("pointId") Long pointId, @PathVariable("jobId") Long jobId) {
        PatrolJobItemInspect pjii_query = new PatrolJobItemInspect();
        pjii_query.setJobId(jobId);
        pjii_query.setPointId(pointId);
        List<PatrolJobItemInspect> list = jobItemInspectService.selectPatrolJobItemInspectList(pjii_query);
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    public static boolean coordinateToDistance(String radius, double latitude1, double longitude1, double latitude2, double longitude2) {
        double a = latitude1 * Math.PI / 180.0 - latitude2 * Math.PI / 180.0;
        double b = longitude1 * Math.PI / 180.0 - longitude2 * Math.PI / 180.0;
        double s = 2 * Math.asin(Math.sqrt(Math.pow(Math.sin(a / 2), 2)
                + Math.cos(latitude1 * Math.PI / 180.0)
                * Math.cos(latitude2 * Math.PI / 180.0)
                * Math.pow(Math.sin(b / 2), 2)));
        s = s * 6378.137 * 1000;
        s = Math.round(s);
        if (s > Integer.parseInt(radius)) {
            return true;
        }
        return false;
    }
//    @Scheduled(cron = "0 07 13 * * ?")
    /**
     * @param
     * @Description:定时创建任务
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     * @Author: CJH
     * @Updator: CJH
     * @Date 2023/12/7 16:41
     */
    @PostMapping("/createJob")
    public AjaxResult createJob() {
        Date now = DateUtil.beginOfDay(new Date());
        PatrolPlan query = new PatrolPlan();
        query.setStatus("2");
        query.getParams().put("now", now);
        List<PatrolPlan> list = planService.selectPatrolPlanList(query);
        for (PatrolPlan patrolPlan : list) {
            PatrolJob job = null;
            if ("1".equals(patrolPlan.getPeriodType())) {
                boolean flag = DateUtil.isSameDay(now, patrolPlan.getStartDate());
                if (flag) {
                    job = new PatrolJob();
                    job.setName(patrolPlan.getName() + "(" + DateUtil.format(patrolPlan.getStartDate(), "yyyy-MM-dd") + ")");
                    job.setStartTime(DateUtil.parse(DateUtil.format(patrolPlan.getStartDate(), "yyyy-MM-dd") + " " + patrolPlan.getStartTime(), "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm"));
                    job.setEndTime(DateUtil.parse(DateUtil.format(patrolPlan.getEndDate(), "yyyy-MM-dd") + " " + patrolPlan.getEndTime(), "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm"));
                }
            } else if ("2".equals(patrolPlan.getPeriodType())) {
                job = new PatrolJob();
                job.setName(patrolPlan.getName() + "(" + DateUtil.format(now, "yyyy-MM-dd") + ")");
                job.setStartTime(DateUtil.parse(DateUtil.format(now, "yyyy-MM-dd") + " " + patrolPlan.getStartTime(), "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm"));
                job.setEndTime(DateUtil.parse(DateUtil.format(now, "yyyy-MM-dd") + " " + patrolPlan.getEndTime(), "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm"));
            } else if ("3".equals(patrolPlan.getPeriodType())) {
                List<HolidaySet> sets = holidaySetService.selectHolidaySetList(new HolidaySet());
                //周日为1  周六为7
                int weekDay = DateUtil.dayOfWeek(now);
                if (weekDay == 1 || weekDay == 7) {
                    for (HolidaySet hs : sets) {
                        if ("1".equals(hs.getType())) {
                            continue;
                        }
                        if (hs.getDate().equals(DateUtil.format(now, "yyyy-MM-dd"))) {
                            job = new PatrolJob();
                            job.setName(patrolPlan.getName() + "(" + DateUtil.format(now, "yyyy-MM-dd") + ")");
                            job.setStartTime(DateUtil.parse(DateUtil.format(now, "yyyy-MM-dd") + " " + patrolPlan.getStartTime(), "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm"));
                            job.setEndTime(DateUtil.parse(DateUtil.format(now, "yyyy-MM-dd") + " " + patrolPlan.getEndTime(), "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm"));
                        }
                    }
                } else {
                    boolean flag = false;
                    for (HolidaySet hs : sets) {
                        if ("2".equals(hs.getType())) {
                            continue;
                        }
                        if (hs.getDate().equals(DateUtil.format(now, "yyyy-MM-dd"))) {
                            flag = true;
                        }
                    }
                    if (!flag) {
                        job = new PatrolJob();
                        job.setName(patrolPlan.getName() + "(" + DateUtil.format(now, "yyyy-MM-dd") + ")");
                        job.setStartTime(DateUtil.parse(DateUtil.format(now, "yyyy-MM-dd") + " " + patrolPlan.getStartTime(), "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm"));
                        job.setEndTime(DateUtil.parse(DateUtil.format(now, "yyyy-MM-dd") + " " + patrolPlan.getEndTime(), "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm"));
                    }
                }
            } else if ("4".equals(patrolPlan.getPeriodType())) {
                int dayOfWeek = DateUtil.dayOfWeek(now);
                if (dayOfWeek == 1) {
                    dayOfWeek = 7;
                } else {
                    dayOfWeek = dayOfWeek - 1;
                }
                if (patrolPlan.getStartWeek().equals("" + dayOfWeek)) {
                    Date startWeekDate = now;
                    Date endWeekDate = DateUtil.offsetDay(now, (Integer.parseInt(patrolPlan.getEndWeek()) - Integer.parseInt(patrolPlan.getStartWeek())));
                    ;
                    if (!endWeekDate.after(patrolPlan.getEndDate())) {
                        job = new PatrolJob();
                        job.setName(patrolPlan.getName() + "(" + DateUtil.format(startWeekDate, "yyyy-MM-dd") + ")");
                        job.setStartTime(DateUtil.parse(DateUtil.format(startWeekDate, "yyyy-MM-dd") + " " + patrolPlan.getStartTime(), "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm"));
                        job.setEndTime(DateUtil.parse(DateUtil.format(endWeekDate, "yyyy-MM-dd") + " " + patrolPlan.getEndTime(), "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm"));
                    }
                }
            } else if ("5".equals(patrolPlan.getPeriodType())) {
                Date startMonthDate = null;
                Date endMonthDate = null;
                int dayOfMonth = DateUtil.dayOfMonth(now);
                if (patrolPlan.getStartDay().equals(dayOfMonth + "")) {
                    startMonthDate = now;
                    endMonthDate = DateUtil.offsetDay(now, (Integer.parseInt(patrolPlan.getEndDay()) - Integer.parseInt(patrolPlan.getStartDay())));
                    if (endMonthDate.after(DateUtil.endOfMonth(startMonthDate))) {
                        endMonthDate = DateUtil.endOfMonth(startMonthDate);
                    }
                    if (!endMonthDate.after(patrolPlan.getEndDate())) {
                        job = new PatrolJob();
                        job.setName(patrolPlan.getName() + "(" + DateUtil.format(startMonthDate, "yyyy-MM-dd") + ")");
                        job.setStartTime(DateUtil.parse(DateUtil.format(startMonthDate, "yyyy-MM-dd") + " " + patrolPlan.getStartTime(), "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm"));
                        job.setEndTime(DateUtil.parse(DateUtil.format(endMonthDate, "yyyy-MM-dd") + " " + patrolPlan.getEndTime(), "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm"));
                    }
                }
            } else if ("6".equals(patrolPlan.getPeriodType())) {
                List<SchoolJxz> jxzList = jxzService.selectSchoolJxzList(new SchoolJxz());
                boolean flag = false;
                holi:
                for (SchoolJxz sj : jxzList) {
                    if (sj.getStatus() == 0) {
                        continue holi;
                    }
                    if (DateUtil.format(sj.getRq(), "yyyy-MM-dd").equals(DateUtil.format(now, "yyyy-MM-dd"))) {
                        flag = true;
                    }
                }
                if (flag) {
                    job = new PatrolJob();
                    job.setName(patrolPlan.getName() + "(" + DateUtil.format(now, "yyyy-MM-dd") + ")");
                    job.setStartTime(DateUtil.parse(DateUtil.format(now, "yyyy-MM-dd") + " " + patrolPlan.getStartTime(), "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm"));
                    job.setEndTime(DateUtil.parse(DateUtil.format(now, "yyyy-MM-dd") + " " + patrolPlan.getEndTime(), "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm"));
                }
            }
            if (job != null) {
                job.setMode(patrolPlan.getMode());
                job.setPlanId(patrolPlan.getId());
                job.setStatus("1");
                job.setUserIds(patrolPlan.getUserIds());
                jobService.insertPatrolJob(job);
                PatrolPlanItem query_ppi = new PatrolPlanItem();
                query_ppi.setPlanId(patrolPlan.getId());
                List<PatrolPlanItem> items = planItemService.selectPatrolPlanItemList(query_ppi);
                for (PatrolPlanItem ppi : items) {
                    PatrolPoints point = pointsService.selectPatrolPointsById(ppi.getPointId());
                    PatrolJobItem ji = new PatrolJobItem();
                    ji.setPointId(point.getId());
                    ji.setPointName(point.getName());
                    ji.setLocation(point.getLocation());
                    ji.setSortNum(ppi.getSortNum());
                    ji.setJobId(job.getId());
                    itemService.insertPatrolJobItem(ji);
                    if (StringUtils.isNotEmpty(patrolPlan.getInspectItemids())) {
                        String[] arr = patrolPlan.getInspectItemids().split(",");
                        for (String s : arr) {
                            PatrolInspectionItem item = inspectionItemService.selectPatrolInspectionItemById(Long.valueOf(s));
                            if (item == null || item.getDelFlag().equals("Y")) {
                                continue;
                            }
                            PatrolJobItemInspect pjii = new PatrolJobItemInspect();
                            pjii.setJobId(job.getId());
                            pjii.setInspectId(item.getId());
                            pjii.setInspectName(item.getName());
                            pjii.setInspectType(item.getType());
                            pjii.setPointId(ppi.getPointId());
                            pjii.setInspectTypeName(item.getTypeName());
                            jobItemInspectService.insertPatrolJobItemInspect(pjii);
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        return AjaxResult.success();
    }
//    @Scheduled(cron = "0 45 9 * * ?")
    /**
     * @param
     * @Description:定时处理巡更任务
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     * @Author: CJH
     * @Updator: CJH
     * @Date 2023/12/7 16:56
     */
    @PostMapping("/dealJob")
    public AjaxResult dealJob() {
        Date now = new Date();
        PatrolJob query = new PatrolJob();
        query.setStatus("1");
        List<PatrolJob> list = jobService.selectPatrolJobList(query);
        for (PatrolJob pj : list) {
            if (now.after(pj.getEndTime())) {
                PatrolJob pj_update = new PatrolJob();
                pj_update.setId(pj.getId());
                pj_update.setStatus("3");
                jobMapper.updatePatrolJob(pj_update);
            }
        }
        return AjaxResult.success();
    }
    /**
     * @param
     * @Description:定时开启巡更计划
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     * @Author: CJH
     * @Updator: CJH
     * @Date 2023/12/7 16:56
     */
    @PostMapping("/startPlan")
    public AjaxResult startPlan() {
        Date now = new Date();
        PatrolPlan query = new PatrolPlan();
        query.setStatus("1");
        List<PatrolPlan> list = planService.selectPatrolPlanList(query);
        for (PatrolPlan pp : list) {
            //未开始
            if (now.after(pp.getStartDate())) {
                PatrolPlan update = new PatrolPlan();
                update.setId(pp.getId());
                update.setStatus("2");
                planMapper.updatePatrolPlan(update);
            }
        }
        return AjaxResult.success();
    }
    /**
     * @param
     * @Description:定时结束巡更计划
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     * @Author: CJH
     * @Updator: CJH
     * @Date 2023/12/7 16:58
     */
    @PostMapping("/endPlan")
    public AjaxResult endPlan() {
        Date now = new Date();
        PatrolPlan query = new PatrolPlan();
        query.setStatus("2");
        List<PatrolPlan> list = planService.selectPatrolPlanList(query);
        for (PatrolPlan pp : list) {
            if (now.after(DateUtil.endOfDay(pp.getEndDate()))) {
                PatrolPlan update = new PatrolPlan();
                update.setId(pp.getId());
                update.setStatus("3");
                planMapper.updatePatrolPlan(update);
            }
        }
        query = new PatrolPlan();
        query.setStatus("4");
        list = planService.selectPatrolPlanList(query);
        for (PatrolPlan pp : list) {
            if (now.after(DateUtil.endOfDay(pp.getEndDate()))) {
                PatrolPlan update = new PatrolPlan();
                update.setId(pp.getId());
                update.setStatus("3");
                planMapper.updatePatrolPlan(update);
            }
        }
        return AjaxResult.success();
    }
    /**
     * @param versionNum
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     * @Description: 按版本号检测APK  若有新版本返回路径
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/10
     */
    @GetMapping("/checkApk/{versionNum}")
    public AjaxResult checkApk(@PathVariable("versionNum") Integer versionNum) {
        ApkSource as_query = new ApkSource();
        as_query.getParams().put("versionNum", versionNum);
        List<ApkSource> list = apkSourceService.selectApkSourceList(as_query);
        ApkSource result = null;
        if (list != null && list.size() > 0) {
            result = list.get(0);
            return success(result);
        }
        return error();
    }
}
package com.chenrise.patrol.controller;
import com.chenrise.common.core.domain.R;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.controller.BaseController;

import com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo;
import com.chenrise.common.log.annotation.Log;
import com.chenrise.common.log.enums.BusinessType;

import com.chenrise.patrol.domain.ApkSource;

import com.chenrise.system.api.RemoteFileService;
import com.chenrise.system.api.domain.SysFile;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.*;
import org.springframework.web.multipart.MultipartFile;
import javax.annotation.Resource;
import java.util.List;
/**
 * apk版本Controller
 *
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2022-12-10
 */
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/apksource")
public class ApkSourceController extends BaseController
{
    @Resource
    private IApkSourceService apkSourceService;
    @Resource
    private RemoteFileService fileService;
    /**
     * 查询apk版本列表
     */
    @GetMapping("/list")
    public TableDataInfo list(ApkSource apkSource)
    {
        startPage();
        List<ApkSource> list = apkSourceService.selectApkSourceList(apkSource);
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     * 获取apk版本详细信息
     */
    @GetMapping(value = "/{id}")
    public AjaxResult getInfo(@PathVariable("id") Long id)
    {
        return success(apkSourceService.selectApkSourceById(id));
    }
    /**
     * 新增apk版本
     */
    @Log(title = "apk版本", businessType = BusinessType.INSERT)
    @PostMapping
    public AjaxResult add(@RequestBody ApkSource apkSource)
    {
        return toAjax(apkSourceService.insertApkSource(apkSource));
    }
    /**
     * 修改apk版本
     */
    @Log(title = "apk版本", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PutMapping
    public AjaxResult edit(@RequestBody ApkSource apkSource)
    {
        return toAjax(apkSourceService.updateApkSource(apkSource));
    }
    /**
     * 删除apk版本
     */
    @Log(title = "apk版本", businessType = BusinessType.DELETE)
	@DeleteMapping("/{ids}")
    public AjaxResult remove(@PathVariable Long[] ids)
    {
        return toAjax(apkSourceService.deleteApkSourceByIds(ids));
    }
    /**
     *
     * @Description: 上传APK
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/10
     * @param file
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @PostMapping("/upload")
    public AjaxResult upload(@RequestPart(value = "file") MultipartFile file){
        R<SysFile> upload = fileService.upload(file);
        return AjaxResult.success(upload.getData());
    }
    /**
     *
     * @Description: 按版本号检测APK  若有新版本返回路径
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2022/12/10
     * @param versionNum
     * @return {@link AjaxResult }
     */
    @GetMapping("/checkApk")
    public AjaxResult checkApk(Integer versionNum){
        ApkSource as_query = new ApkSource();
        as_query.getParams().put("versionNum",versionNum);
        List<ApkSource> list = apkSourceService.selectApkSourceList(as_query);
        ApkSource result = null;
        if(list!=null&&list.size()>0){
            result = list.get(0);
        }
        return AjaxResult.success(result);
    }
}
package com.chenrise.patrol.controller;
import com.chenrise.common.core.constant.HttpStatus;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.BaseEntity;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo;
import com.chenrise.common.security.utils.DictUtils;
import com.github.pagehelper.PageInfo;
import org.slf4j.Logger;
import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;
import java.util.List;
/**
 * web层通用数据处理
 *
 * @author chenrise
 */
public class BaseController extends com.chenrise.common.core.web.controller.BaseController
{
    protected final Logger logger = LoggerFactory.getLogger(this.getClass());
    /**
     * 响应请求分页数据
     */
    @SuppressWarnings({ "rawtypes", "unchecked" })
    protected TableDataInfo getDataTable(List<?> list)
    {
        TableDataInfo rspData = new TableDataInfo();
        rspData.setCode(HttpStatus.SUCCESS);
        rspData.setRows(list);
        rspData.setMsg("查询成功");
        rspData.setTotal(new PageInfo(list).getTotal());
        if(list != null && list.size()>0 && list.get(0) instanceof BaseEntity){
            List<? extends  BaseEntity> eList = (List<? extends BaseEntity>) list;
            DictUtils.getDictName(eList);
        }
        return rspData;
    }
}
package com.chenrise.patrol.controller;
import cn.hutool.http.HttpUtil;
import cn.hutool.json.JSONArray;
import cn.hutool.json.JSONObject;
import cn.hutool.json.JSONUtil;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.DateUtils;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.controller.BaseController;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo;
import com.chenrise.patrol.domain.Abnormal;
import com.chenrise.patrol.domain.HolidaySet;
import com.chenrise.patrol.domain.SchoolJxz;
import com.chenrise.patrol.service.IHolidaySetService;
import com.chenrise.patrol.service.ISchoolJxzService;
import org.springframework.scheduling.annotation.Scheduled;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.GetMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RestController;
import javax.annotation.Resource;
import java.text.ParseException;
import java.util.*;
/**
 * 节假日Controller
 *
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2023-03-07
 */
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/set")
public class HolidaySetController extends BaseController
{
    @Resource
    private IHolidaySetService holidaySetService;
    @Resource
    private ISchoolJxzService jxzService;
//    @Scheduled(cron = "0 07 16 * * ?")
    public void syncHoliday() throws ParseException {
        String appId = "1353017";
        String secret = "be9ec21cf63e485199e29c1fcbaec452";
        //假日列表
        String url1 = "https://route.showapi.com/894-4?showapi_appid="+appId+"&showapi_sign="+secret;
        Map<String, Object> params = new HashMap<>();
        params.put("year",new Date().getYear());
        String result = HttpUtil.post(url1,params);
        JSONObject jsonObject = JSONUtil.parseObj(result);
        String listStr = JSONUtil.parseObj(jsonObject.getStr("showapi_res_body")).getStr("data");
        List<JSONObject> list = JSONUtil.toList(listStr,JSONObject.class);
        for(JSONObject json:list){
            Date start = json.getDate("begin");
            Date end = json.getDate("end");
            String name = json.getStr("holiday");
            while(end.after(start)){
                HolidaySet set = new HolidaySet();
                set.setDate(DateUtils.parseDateToStr("yyyy-MM-dd",start));
                set.setType("1");
                set.setName(name);
                holidaySetService.insertHolidaySet(set);
                start = DateUtils.addDays(start,1);
            }
            JSONArray jsonArray = new JSONArray(json.get("inverse_days"));
            Object[] objArray = jsonArray.toArray();
            String[] strArray = Arrays.copyOf(objArray, objArray.length, String[].class);
            if(strArray!=null&&strArray.length>0){
                for(String date:strArray){
                    HolidaySet set = new HolidaySet();
                    set.setDate(DateUtils.parseDateToStr("yyyy-MM-dd",DateUtils.parseDate(date,"yyyyMMdd")));
                    set.setType("2");
                    set.setName(name);
                    holidaySetService.insertHolidaySet(set);
                }
            }
            System.out.println(json.toString());
        }
    }
}

/**
 * 巡更组，用于记录巡更组的基本信息Controller
 *
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2023-03-03
 */
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/groups")
public class PatrolGroupsController extends BaseController
{
    @Resource
    private IPatrolGroupsService patrolGroupsService;
    @Resource
    private RemoteUserService remoteUserService;
    @Resource
    private IGroupUserService groupUserService;
    /**
     * 查询巡更组，用于记录巡更组的基本信息列表
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("patrol:groups:list")
    @GetMapping("/list")
    public TableDataInfo list(PatrolGroups patrolGroups)
    {
        startPage();
        List<PatrolGroups> list = patrolGroupsService.selectPatrolGroupsList(patrolGroups);
        for(PatrolGroups pg:list){
            GroupUser query =  new GroupUser();
            query.setGroupId(pg.getId());
            List<GroupUser> groupUsers = groupUserService.selectGroupUserList(query);
            List<Long> userIds = groupUsers.stream().map(item->item.getUserId()).collect(Collectors.toList());
            Long[] inIds = userIds.toArray(new Long[userIds.size()]);
            TableDataInfo rows = remoteUserService.normallist(new String[]{"01","02"},"Y",null,inIds,null,null,null);
            pg.setUsers((List<SysUser>) rows.getRows());
        }
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    @GetMapping("/alllist")
    public TableDataInfo alllist(PatrolGroups patrolGroups)
    {
        List<PatrolGroups> list = patrolGroupsService.selectPatrolGroupsList(patrolGroups);
        for(PatrolGroups pg:list){
            GroupUser query =  new GroupUser();
            query.setGroupId(pg.getId());
            List<GroupUser> groupUsers = groupUserService.selectGroupUserList(query);
            List<Long> userIds = groupUsers.stream().map(item->item.getUserId()).collect(Collectors.toList());
            Long[] inIds = userIds.toArray(new Long[userIds.size()]);
            TableDataInfo rows = remoteUserService.normallist(new String[]{"01","02"},"Y",null,inIds,null,null,null);
            pg.setUsers((List<SysUser>) rows.getRows());
        }
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    @GetMapping("/user/list")
    public TableDataInfo userlist(String userType,String isPatrol,String notInIds,String inIds)
    {
        Long []nots = null;
        Long []ins = null;
        String [] types = null;
        if(StringUtils.isNotEmpty(userType)){
            types = userType.split(",");
        }
        if(StringUtils.isNotEmpty(notInIds)){
            String[] arr = notInIds.split(",");
            nots = new Long[arr.length];
            for(int i= 0;i<arr.length;i++){
                nots[i] = Long.parseLong(arr[i]);
            }
        }
        if(StringUtils.isNotEmpty(inIds)){
            String[] arr = inIds.split(",");
            ins = new Long[arr.length];
            for(int i= 0;i<arr.length;i++){
                ins[i] = Long.parseLong(arr[i]);
            }
        }
        TableDataInfo result = remoteUserService.normallist(types,isPatrol,nots,ins,null,null,null);
        return result;
    }
    /**
     * 导出巡更组，用于记录巡更组的基本信息列表
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("patrol:groups:export")
    @Log(title = "巡更组，用于记录巡更组的基本信息", businessType = BusinessType.EXPORT)
    @PostMapping("/export")
    public void export(HttpServletResponse response, PatrolGroups patrolGroups)
    {
        List<PatrolGroups> list = patrolGroupsService.selectPatrolGroupsList(patrolGroups);
        ExcelUtil<PatrolGroups> util = new ExcelUtil<PatrolGroups>(PatrolGroups.class);
        util.exportExcel(response, list, "巡更组，用于记录巡更组的基本信息数据");
    }
    /**
     * 获取巡更组，用于记录巡更组的基本信息详细信息
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("patrol:groups:query")
    @GetMapping(value = "/{id}")
    public AjaxResult getInfo(@PathVariable("id") Long id)
    {
        return success(patrolGroupsService.selectPatrolGroupsById(id));
    }
    /**
     * 新增巡更组，用于记录巡更组的基本信息
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("patrol:groups:add")
    @Log(title = "巡更组，用于记录巡更组的基本信息", businessType = BusinessType.INSERT)
    @PostMapping
    public AjaxResult add(@RequestBody PatrolGroups patrolGroups)
    {
        return toAjax(patrolGroupsService.insertPatrolGroups(patrolGroups));
    }
    /**
     * 修改巡更组，用于记录巡更组的基本信息
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("patrol:groups:edit")
    @Log(title = "巡更组，用于记录巡更组的基本信息", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PutMapping
    public AjaxResult edit(@RequestBody PatrolGroups patrolGroups)
    {
        return toAjax(patrolGroupsService.updatePatrolGroups(patrolGroups));
    }
    /**
     * 删除巡更组，用于记录巡更组的基本信息
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("patrol:groups:remove")
    @Log(title = "巡更组，用于记录巡更组的基本信息", businessType = BusinessType.DELETE)
	@DeleteMapping("/{ids}")
    public AjaxResult remove(@PathVariable Long[] ids)
    {
        return toAjax(patrolGroupsService.deletePatrolGroupsByIds(ids));
    }
}
package com.chenrise.patrol.controller;
import java.util.List;

/**

@RestController
@RequestMapping("/inspectionItem")
public class PatrolInspectionItemController extends BaseController
{

     */

    @GetMapping("/list")

    {
        startPage();

        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     * 导出巡检项管理列表
     */

    @Log(title = "巡检项管理", businessType = BusinessType.EXPORT)
    @PostMapping("/export")

        ExcelUtil<PatrolInspectionItem> util = new ExcelUtil<PatrolInspectionItem>(PatrolInspectionItem.class);
        util.exportExcel(response, list, "巡检项管理数据");
    }
    /**

     */

    @GetMapping(value = "/{id}")
    public AjaxResult getInfo(@PathVariable("id") Long id)
    {
        return success(patrolInspectionItemService.selectPatrolInspectionItemById(id));
    }
    /**
     * 新增巡检项管理
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("patrol:inspectionItem:add")
    @Log(title = "巡检项管理", businessType = BusinessType.INSERT)
    @PostMapping
    public AjaxResult add(@RequestBody PatrolInspectionItem patrolInspectionItem)
    {
        String typeName = DictUtils.getDictLabel("patrol_check_type",patrolInspectionItem.getType());
        patrolInspectionItem.setTypeName(typeName);
        return toAjax(patrolInspectionItemService.insertPatrolInspectionItem(patrolInspectionItem));
    }
    /**
     * 修改巡检项管理
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("patrol:inspectionItem:edit")
    @Log(title = "巡检项管理", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PutMapping
    public AjaxResult edit(@RequestBody PatrolInspectionItem patrolInspectionItem)
    {
        String typeName = DictUtils.getDictLabel("patrol_check_type",patrolInspectionItem.getType());
        patrolInspectionItem.setTypeName(typeName);
        return toAjax(patrolInspectionItemService.updatePatrolInspectionItem(patrolInspectionItem));
    }
    /**
     * 删除巡检项管理
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("patrol:inspectionItem:remove")
    @Log(title = "巡检项管理", businessType = BusinessType.DELETE)
	@DeleteMapping("/{ids}")
    public AjaxResult remove(@PathVariable Long[] ids)
    {
        return toAjax(patrolInspectionItemService.deletePatrolInspectionItemByIds(ids));
    }
}
package com.chenrise.patrol.controller;
import cn.hutool.core.date.DateUtil;
import com.alibaba.nacos.common.utils.CollectionUtils;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.StringUtils;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.poi.ExcelUtil;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo;
import com.chenrise.common.log.annotation.Log;
import com.chenrise.common.log.enums.BusinessType;
import com.chenrise.common.security.annotation.RequiresPermissions;
import com.chenrise.common.security.utils.DictUtils;
import com.chenrise.patrol.domain.PatrolJob;
import com.chenrise.patrol.domain.PatrolJobItem;
import com.chenrise.patrol.domain.PatrolJobItemInspect;
import com.chenrise.patrol.service.IPatrolJobItemInspectService;
import com.chenrise.patrol.service.IPatrolJobItemService;
import com.chenrise.patrol.service.IPatrolJobService;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.*;
import javax.annotation.Resource;
import javax.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse;
import java.util.Date;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.stream.Collectors;
/**
 * 巡更任务Controller
 *
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2023-03-03
 */
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/job")
public class PatrolJobController extends BaseController
{
    @Resource
    private IPatrolJobService patrolJobService;
    @Resource
    private IPatrolJobItemService itemService;
    @Resource
    private  IPatrolJobItemInspectService  itemInspectService;
    /**
     * 查询巡更任务列表
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("patrol:job:list")
    @GetMapping("/list")
    public TableDataInfo list(PatrolJob patrolJob)
    {
        if(patrolJob.getParams().get("end")!=null){
            Date d = DateUtil.endOfDay(DateUtil.parseDate(String.valueOf(patrolJob.getParams().get("end"))));
            patrolJob.getParams().put("end",DateUtil.format(d,"yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"));
        }
        startPage();
        List<PatrolJob> list = patrolJobService.selectPatrolJobList(patrolJob);
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     * 导出巡更任务列表
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("patrol:job:export")
    @Log(title = "巡更任务", businessType = BusinessType.EXPORT)
    @PostMapping("/export")
    public void export(HttpServletResponse response, PatrolJob patrolJob)
    {
        List<PatrolJob> list = patrolJobService.selectPatrolJobList(patrolJob);
        initModelAndStatus(list);
        ExcelUtil<PatrolJob> util = new ExcelUtil<PatrolJob>(PatrolJob.class);
        util.exportExcel(response, list, "巡更任务数据");
    }
    /**
     * @description: 巡更任务列表页面导出按钮丢失，并执行导出程序以后，PatrolJob类中字段上的@Dict自定义标签实效，临时解决方案
     * @author: DongYu
     * @date: 2023/5/11 12:47
     * @param: [list]
     * @return: void
     */
    private void initModelAndStatus(List<PatrolJob> list) {
        if (CollectionUtils.isNotEmpty(list)) {
            list.stream().forEach(item -> {
                // 格式化巡更模式
                if (StringUtils.equals(item.getMode(), "1")) {
                    item.setMode("自由路线");
                } else if (StringUtils.equals(item.getMode(), "2")){
                    item.setMode("固定线路");
                } else {
                    item.setMode("--");
                }
                // 格式化巡更状态
                if (StringUtils.equals(item.getStatus(), "1")) {
                    item.setStatus("待执行");
                } else if (StringUtils.equals(item.getStatus(), "2")){
                    item.setStatus("执行中");
                } else if (StringUtils.equals(item.getStatus(), "3")){
                    item.setStatus("未完成");
                } else if (StringUtils.equals(item.getStatus(), "4")){
                    item.setStatus("已完成");
                } else if (StringUtils.equals(item.getStatus(), "5")){
                    item.setStatus("超期完成");
                } else {
                    item.setStatus("--");
                }
            });
        }
    }
    /**
     * 获取巡更任务详细信息
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("patrol:job:query")
    @GetMapping(value = "/{id}")
    public AjaxResult getInfo(@PathVariable("id") Long id)
    {
        PatrolJob job = patrolJobService.selectPatrolJobById(id);
        DictUtils.getDictName(job);
        PatrolJobItem query = new PatrolJobItem();
        query.setJobId(job.getId());
        List<PatrolJobItem> items = itemService.selectPatrolJobItemList(query);
        List<PatrolJobItem> items1 = items.stream().filter(item->"1".equals(item.getResult())).collect(Collectors.toList());
        List<PatrolJobItem> items2 = items.stream().filter(item->"2".equals(item.getResult())).collect(Collectors.toList());
        job.getParams().put("normalNum",items1.size());
        job.getParams().put("abnormalNum",items2.size());
        DictUtils.getDictName(items);
        job.setItems(items);
        return success(job);
    }
    /**
     * 新增巡更任务
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("patrol:job:add")
    @Log(title = "巡更任务", businessType = BusinessType.INSERT)
    @PostMapping
    public AjaxResult add(@RequestBody PatrolJob patrolJob)
    {
        return toAjax(patrolJobService.insertPatrolJob(patrolJob));
    }
    /**
     * 修改巡更任务
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("patrol:job:edit")
    @Log(title = "巡更任务", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PutMapping
    public AjaxResult edit(@RequestBody PatrolJob patrolJob)
    {
        return toAjax(patrolJobService.updatePatrolJob(patrolJob));
    }
    /**
     * 删除巡更任务
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("patrol:job:remove")
    @Log(title = "巡更任务", businessType = BusinessType.DELETE)
	@DeleteMapping("/{ids}")
    public AjaxResult remove(@PathVariable Long[] ids)
    {
        return toAjax(patrolJobService.deletePatrolJobByIds(ids));
    }
/**
 * @Description:按任务和点位获取异常
    * @param jobId
 * @param pointId
 * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
 * @Author: CJH
 * @Updator: CJH
 * @Date 2023/12/7 16:58
 */
    @GetMapping(value = "/getAbnormal/{jobId}/{pointId}")
    public AjaxResult getAbnormal(@PathVariable("jobId") Long jobId,@PathVariable("pointId")Long pointId)
    {
        PatrolJobItem query = new PatrolJobItem();
        query.setPointId(pointId);
        query.setJobId(jobId);
        List<PatrolJobItem> list= itemService.selectPatrolJobItemList(query);
        DictUtils.getDictName(list);
        if(list!=null&&list.size()>0){
            PatrolJobItem normal = list.get(0);
            PatrolJobItemInspect pjii_query = new PatrolJobItemInspect();
            pjii_query.setJobId(normal.getJobId());
            pjii_query.setPointId(normal.getPointId());
            List<PatrolJobItemInspect> itemInspects = itemInspectService.selectPatrolJobItemInspectList(pjii_query);
            DictUtils.getDictName(itemInspects);
            normal.setItemInspects(itemInspects);
            DictUtils.getDictName(normal);
        }
        return success(list.get(0));
    }
}
package com.chenrise.patrol.controller;
import cn.hutool.core.date.DateField;
import cn.hutool.core.date.DateUtil;
import cn.hutool.json.JSONObject;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo;
import com.chenrise.patrol.service.IPatrolJobItemService;
import com.chenrise.patrol.service.IPatrolJobService;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.*;
import javax.annotation.Resource;
import java.util.*;
/**
 * 巡更任务Controller
 *
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2023-03-03
 */
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/jobitem")
public class PatrolJobItemController extends BaseController
{
    @Resource
    private IPatrolJobService patrolJobService;
    @Resource
    private IPatrolJobItemService jobItemService;
    /**
     * 查询巡更任务列表
     */
    @GetMapping("/count/{type}")
    public AjaxResult count(@PathVariable("type") String type)
    {
        Map<String,Object> result = new HashMap<>();
        Date start = null;
        Date end = new Date();
        JSONObject obj = null;
        Integer count = 0;
        if("YESTERDAY".equals(type)){
            end = DateUtil.endOfDay(DateUtil.offset(end, DateField.DAY_OF_YEAR,-1));
            start = DateUtil.beginOfDay(end);
        }else if("DAY".equals(type)){
            start = DateUtil.beginOfDay(end);
        }else if("MONTH".equals(type)){
            start = DateUtil.beginOfMonth(end);
        }else if("YEAR".equals(type)){
            start = DateUtil.beginOfYear(end);
        }
        //巡检异常
        obj = new JSONObject();
        obj.putOnce("result","2");
        obj.putOnce("start",start);
        obj.putOnce("end",end);
        count = jobItemService.count(obj);
         result.put("xjyc",count);
        //巡检点异常
        obj = new JSONObject();
        List<String> faultTypeList = new ArrayList<>();
        faultTypeList.add("1");
        faultTypeList.add("2");
        obj.putOnce("faultTypeList", faultTypeList);
        obj.putOnce("start",start);
        obj.putOnce("end",end);
        count = jobItemService.count(obj);
        result.put("xjdyc",count);
        //未巡检数
        obj = new JSONObject();
        obj.putOnce("result","0");
        obj.putOnce("start",start);
        obj.putOnce("end",end);
        count = jobItemService.count(obj);
        result.put("wxjs",count);
        return AjaxResult.success(result);
    }
    /**
     * @Description:按巡检点列表
     * @param obj
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo
     * @Author: CJH
     * @Updator: CJH
     * @Date 2024/4/23 15:54
     */
    @GetMapping("/listByPointName")
    public TableDataInfo listByPointName(@RequestParam Map obj)
    {
        startPage();
        List<JSONObject> list = jobItemService.countByPointName(obj);
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     * @Description:获取图标top10
     * @param
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult
     * @Author: CJH
     * @Updator: CJH
     * @Date 2024/4/25 13:01
     */
    @GetMapping("/getTops")
    public AjaxResult getTops(@RequestParam Map obj)
    {
        JSONObject result = new JSONObject();
        List<JSONObject> types = new ArrayList<>();
        types.add(new JSONObject().putOnce("xjyc_num","巡检异常"));
        types.add(new JSONObject().putOnce("xjdyc_num","巡检点异常"));
        types.add(new JSONObject().putOnce("wxj_num","未巡检"));
        String[] legends = types.stream().map(e->{
            StringBuffer buffer = new StringBuffer();
            e.keySet().forEach(i->{
                buffer.append(e.getStr(i));
            });
            return buffer.toString();
        }).toArray(String[]::new);
        result.putOnce("legends",legends);
        if(obj.get("end")==null){
            obj.put("end",new Date());
        }
        obj.put("limit"," limit 10 ");
        List<JSONObject> list = jobItemService.countByPointName(obj);
        if(list!=null&&list.size()>0){
            String[] xDatas = list.stream().map(map->map.getStr("point_name")).toArray(String[]::new);
            result.putOnce("xDatas",xDatas);
            List<JSONObject> yDatas = new ArrayList<>();
            types.stream().forEach(e->{
                e.keySet().forEach(s -> {
                    JSONObject jsonObject = new JSONObject();
                    jsonObject.putOnce("name",e.getStr(s));
                    jsonObject.putOnce("type","bar");
                    jsonObject.putOnce("stack","Total");
                    Integer[] arr = list.stream().map(map->map.getInt(s)).toArray(Integer[]::new);
                    jsonObject.putOnce("data",arr);
                    yDatas.add(jsonObject);
                });
            });
            result.putOnce("yDatas",yDatas);
        }
        return AjaxResult.success(result);
    }
}

/**

@RestController
@RequestMapping("/jobItemInspect")
public class PatrolJobItemInspectController extends BaseController
{
    @Autowired
    private IPatrolJobItemInspectService patrolJobItemInspectService;
    /**
     * 查询任务-点位-巡检项关联表列表
     */

    @GetMapping("/list")
    public TableDataInfo list(PatrolJobItemInspect patrolJobItemInspect)
    {
        startPage();
        List<PatrolJobItemInspect> list = patrolJobItemInspectService.selectPatrolJobItemInspectList(patrolJobItemInspect);
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     * 导出任务-点位-巡检项关联表列表
     */

    @Log(title = "任务-点位-巡检项关联表", businessType = BusinessType.EXPORT)
    @PostMapping("/export")
    public void export(HttpServletResponse response, PatrolJobItemInspect patrolJobItemInspect)
    {

        ExcelUtil<PatrolJobItemInspect> util = new ExcelUtil<PatrolJobItemInspect>(PatrolJobItemInspect.class);
        util.exportExcel(response, list, "任务-点位-巡检项关联表数据");
    }
    /**
     * 获取任务-点位-巡检项关联表详细信息
     */
