    @GetMapping(value = "/{id}")
    public AjaxResult getInfo(@PathVariable("id") Long id)
    {
        return success(patrolJobItemInspectService.selectPatrolJobItemInspectById(id));
    }
    /**
     * 新增任务-点位-巡检项关联表
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jobItemInspect:jobItemInspect:add")
    @Log(title = "任务-点位-巡检项关联表", businessType = BusinessType.INSERT)
    @PostMapping
    public AjaxResult add(@RequestBody PatrolJobItemInspect patrolJobItemInspect)
    {
        return toAjax(patrolJobItemInspectService.insertPatrolJobItemInspect(patrolJobItemInspect));
    }
    /**
     * 修改任务-点位-巡检项关联表
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jobItemInspect:jobItemInspect:edit")
    @Log(title = "任务-点位-巡检项关联表", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PutMapping
    public AjaxResult edit(@RequestBody PatrolJobItemInspect patrolJobItemInspect)
    {
        return toAjax(patrolJobItemInspectService.updatePatrolJobItemInspect(patrolJobItemInspect));
    }
    /**
     * 删除任务-点位-巡检项关联表
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("jobItemInspect:jobItemInspect:remove")
    @Log(title = "任务-点位-巡检项关联表", businessType = BusinessType.DELETE)
	@DeleteMapping("/{ids}")
    public AjaxResult remove(@PathVariable Long[] ids)
    {
        return toAjax(patrolJobItemInspectService.deletePatrolJobItemInspectByIds(ids));
    }
}
package com.chenrise.patrol.controller;
import cn.hutool.core.date.DateUtil;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.poi.ExcelUtil;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo;
import com.chenrise.common.log.annotation.Log;
import com.chenrise.common.log.enums.BusinessType;
import com.chenrise.common.security.annotation.RequiresPermissions;
import com.chenrise.patrol.domain.*;
import com.chenrise.patrol.mapper.PatrolPlanMapper;
import com.chenrise.patrol.service.*;
import com.chenrise.system.api.RemoteUserService;
import com.chenrise.system.api.domain.SysUser;
import org.apache.commons.lang3.time.DateUtils;
import org.springframework.scheduling.annotation.Scheduled;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.*;
import javax.annotation.Resource;
import javax.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse;
import java.util.*;
import java.util.stream.Collectors;
/**
 * 巡更计划Controller
 *
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2023-03-03
 */
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/plan")
public class PatrolPlanController extends BaseController
{
    @Resource
    private IPatrolPlanService patrolPlanService;
    @Resource
    private IHolidaySetService holidaySetService;
    @Resource
    private IPatrolGroupsService groupsService;
    @Resource
    private IRoutesService routesService;
    @Resource
    private RemoteUserService userService;
    @Resource
    private IPatrolPointsService pointsService;
    @Resource
    private IGroupUserService groupUserService;
    @Resource
    private IRoutePointsService routePointsService;
    @Resource
    private IPatrolPlanItemService planItemService;
    @Resource
    private PatrolPlanMapper patrolPlanMapper;
    @Resource
    private ISchoolJxzService jxzService;
    @Resource
    private IPatrolInspectionItemService inspectionItemService;
    /**
     * 查询巡更计划列表
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("patrol:plan:list")
    @GetMapping("/list")
    public TableDataInfo list(PatrolPlan patrolPlan)
    {
        if(patrolPlan.getParams().get("end_startDate")!=null){
            patrolPlan.getParams().put("end_startDate",DateUtil.endOfDay(DateUtil.parseDate(String.valueOf(patrolPlan.getParams().get("end_startDate")))));
        }
        if(patrolPlan.getParams().get("end_endDate")!=null){
            patrolPlan.getParams().put("end_endDate",DateUtil.endOfDay(DateUtil.parseDate(String.valueOf(patrolPlan.getParams().get("end_endDate")))));
        }
        startPage();
        List<PatrolPlan> list = patrolPlanService.selectPatrolPlanList(patrolPlan);
        for(PatrolPlan pp:list){
            if(pp.getGroupIds()!=null){
                String [] arr = pp.getGroupIds().split(",");
                Long[] ids = Arrays.stream(arr).map(Long::valueOf).toArray(Long[]::new);
                PatrolGroups query = new PatrolGroups();
                query.getParams().put("inIds",ids);
                List<PatrolGroups> groups = groupsService.selectPatrolGroupsList(query);
                groups.stream().forEach(item->{
                    GroupUser query_gu =  new GroupUser();
                    query_gu.setGroupId(item.getId());
                    List<GroupUser> groupUsers = groupUserService.selectGroupUserList(query_gu);
                    List<Long> userIds = groupUsers.stream().map(item1->item1.getUserId()).collect(Collectors.toList());
                    Long[] inIds = userIds.toArray(new Long[userIds.size()]);
                    TableDataInfo rows = userService.normallist(new String[]{"01","02"},"Y",null,inIds,null,null,null);
                    item.setUsers((List<SysUser>) rows.getRows());
                });
                pp.setGroups(groups);
            }
            if(pp.getUserIds()!=null){
                String [] arr = pp.getUserIds().split(",");
                Long[] ids = Arrays.stream(arr).map(Long::valueOf).toArray(Long[]::new);
                TableDataInfo rows = userService.normallist(new String[]{"01","02"},"Y",null,ids,null,null,null);
                pp.setUsers((List<SysUser>) rows.getRows());
            }
            if(pp.getRoutesIds()!=null){
                String [] arr = pp.getRoutesIds().split(",");
                Long[] ids = Arrays.stream(arr).map(Long::valueOf).toArray(Long[]::new);
                Routes query = new Routes();
                query.getParams().put("inIds",ids);
                List<Routes> routes = routesService.selectRoutesList(query);
                routes.stream().forEach(item->{
                    List<PatrolPoints> points = new ArrayList<>();
                    RoutePoints query_rp = new RoutePoints();
                    query_rp.setRouteId(item.getId());
                    List<RoutePoints> rpList = routePointsService.selectRoutePointsList(query_rp);
                    for(RoutePoints rp:rpList){
                        PatrolPoints ppo = pointsService.selectPatrolPointsById(rp.getPointId());
                        ppo.setSortNum(rp.getSortNum());
                        points.add(ppo);
                    }
                    item.setItems(points);
                });
                pp.setRoutes(routes);
            }
            if(pp.getPointIds()!=null){
                String [] arr = pp.getPointIds().split(",");
                Long[] ids = Arrays.stream(arr).map(Long::valueOf).toArray(Long[]::new);
                PatrolPoints query = new PatrolPoints();
                query.getParams().put("inIds",ids);
                List<PatrolPoints> patrolPoints = pointsService.selectPatrolPointsList(query);
                PatrolPlanItem query_pi = new PatrolPlanItem();
                query_pi.setPlanId(pp.getId());
                List<PatrolPlanItem> items = planItemService.selectPatrolPlanItemList(query_pi);
                patrolPoints.stream().forEach(e->{
                    items.stream().forEach(item->{
                        if(e.getId().equals(item.getPointId())){
                            e.setSortNum(item.getSortNum());
                        }
                    });
                });
                pp.setPoints(patrolPoints);
            }
            if(pp.getInspectItemids()!=null){
                String [] arr = pp.getInspectItemids().split(",");
                Long[] ids = Arrays.stream(arr).map(Long::valueOf).toArray(Long[]::new);
                PatrolInspectionItem query = new PatrolInspectionItem();
                query.getParams().put("inIds",ids);
                List<PatrolInspectionItem> items = inspectionItemService.selectPatrolInspectionItemList(query);
                pp.setInspectionItems(items);
            }
        }
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     * 导出巡更计划列表
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("patrol:plan:export")
    @Log(title = "巡更计划", businessType = BusinessType.EXPORT)
    @PostMapping("/export")
    public void export(HttpServletResponse response, PatrolPlan patrolPlan)
    {
        List<PatrolPlan> list = patrolPlanService.selectPatrolPlanList(patrolPlan);
        ExcelUtil<PatrolPlan> util = new ExcelUtil<PatrolPlan>(PatrolPlan.class);
        util.exportExcel(response, list, "巡更计划数据");
    }
    /**
     * 获取巡更计划详细信息
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("patrol:plan:query")
    @GetMapping(value = "/{id}")
    public AjaxResult getInfo(@PathVariable("id") Long id)
    {
        return success(patrolPlanService.selectPatrolPlanById(id));
    }
    /**
     * 新增巡更计划
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("patrol:plan:add")
    @Log(title = "巡更计划", businessType = BusinessType.INSERT)
    @PostMapping
    public AjaxResult add(@RequestBody PatrolPlan patrolPlan)
    {
        return toAjax(patrolPlanService.insertPatrolPlan(patrolPlan));
    }
    /**
     * 修改巡更计划
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("patrol:plan:edit")
    @Log(title = "巡更计划", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PutMapping
    public AjaxResult edit(@RequestBody PatrolPlan patrolPlan)
    {
        return toAjax(patrolPlanService.updatePatrolPlan(patrolPlan));
    }
    /**
     * 删除巡更计划
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("patrol:plan:remove")
    @Log(title = "巡更计划", businessType = BusinessType.DELETE)
	@DeleteMapping("/{ids}")
    public AjaxResult remove(@PathVariable Long[] ids)
    {
        return toAjax(patrolPlanService.deletePatrolPlanByIds(ids));
    }
    /**
     * 删除巡更计划
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("patrol:plan:updateStatus")
    @Log(title = "巡更计划", businessType = BusinessType.DELETE)
    @PostMapping("/updateStatus")
    public AjaxResult updateStatus(@RequestBody PatrolPlan patrolPlan)
    {
        if ("2".equals(patrolPlan.getStatus())) {
            PatrolPlan check = patrolPlanMapper.selectPatrolPlanById(patrolPlan.getId());
            Date now = new Date();
            //如果任务超时 直接变成 已结束
            if(now.after(check.getEndDate())){
                patrolPlan.setStatus("3");
                patrolPlanMapper.updatePatrolPlan(patrolPlan);
                return AjaxResult.success("计划已超期，直接结束！");
            }
        }
        return toAjax(patrolPlanMapper.updatePatrolPlan(patrolPlan));
    }
    /**
     * @Description:获取巡检项
     * @param
     * @return: com.chenrise.common.core.web.page.TableDataInfo
     * @Author: CJH
     * @Updator: CJH
     * @Date 2024/1/23 12:37
     */
    @GetMapping("/inspectionItemList")
    public TableDataInfo inspectionItemList()
    {
        List<Map<String,Object>> mapList = new ArrayList<>();
        List<PatrolInspectionItem> list = inspectionItemService.selectPatrolInspectionItemList(new PatrolInspectionItem());
        List<String> groups = list.stream().map(PatrolInspectionItem::getTypeName).distinct().collect(Collectors.toList());
        for(String s:groups){
            Map<String,Object> map = new HashMap<>();
            map.put("name",s);
            List<PatrolInspectionItem> subs = list.stream().filter(e->e.getTypeName().equals(s)).collect(Collectors.toList());
            map.put("children",subs);
            mapList.add(map);
        }
        return getDataTable(mapList);
    }
    @PostMapping("/jobReview")
    public AjaxResult jobReview(@RequestBody PatrolPlan patrolPlan)
    {
        List<Map<String,String>> list = new ArrayList<>();
        Map<String,String> map = null;
        if("1".equals(patrolPlan.getPeriodType())){
            String str = "第1次计划任务:"+ DateUtil.format(patrolPlan.getStartDate(),"yyyy-MM-dd")+" "+patrolPlan.getStartTime()+ " 至 " +
                    DateUtil.format(patrolPlan.getEndDate(),"yyyy-MM-dd")+" "+ patrolPlan.getEndTime();
            map = new HashMap<>();
            map.put("title",str);
            list.add(map);
        }else if("2".equals(patrolPlan.getPeriodType())){
            Date start = patrolPlan.getStartDate();
            Date end = patrolPlan.getEndDate();
            int i=1;
            while(!start.after(end)){
                String str = "第"+i+"次计划任务:"+ DateUtil.format(start,"yyyy-MM-dd")+" "+patrolPlan.getStartTime()+ " 至 " +
                        DateUtil.format(start,"yyyy-MM-dd")+" "+ patrolPlan.getEndTime();
                map = new HashMap<>();
                map.put("title",str);
                list.add(map);
                start = DateUtils.addDays(start,1);
                i++;
            }
        }else if("3".equals(patrolPlan.getPeriodType())){
            List<HolidaySet> sets = holidaySetService.selectHolidaySetList(new HolidaySet());
            Date start = patrolPlan.getStartDate();
            Date end = patrolPlan.getEndDate();
            int i=1;
            while(!start.after(end)){
                //周日为1  周六为7
                int weekDay = DateUtil.dayOfWeek(start);
                if(weekDay==1||weekDay==7){
                    boolean flag = false;
                    holi:for(HolidaySet hs:sets){
                        if("1".equals(hs.getType())){
                            continue holi;
                        }
                        if(hs.getDate().equals(DateUtil.format(start,"yyyy-MM-dd"))){
                            flag = true;
                        }
                    }
                    if(flag){
                        String str = "第"+i+"次计划任务:"+ DateUtil.format(start,"yyyy-MM-dd")+" "+patrolPlan.getStartTime()+ " 至 " +
                                DateUtil.format(start,"yyyy-MM-dd")+" "+ patrolPlan.getEndTime();
                        map = new HashMap<>();
                        map.put("title",str);
                        list.add(map);
                        i++;
                    }
                }else{
                    boolean flag = false;
                    holi:for(HolidaySet hs:sets){
                        if("2".equals(hs.getType())){
                            continue holi;
                        }
                        if(hs.getDate().equals(DateUtil.format(start,"yyyy-MM-dd"))){
                            flag = true;
                        }
                    }
                    if(!flag){
                        String str = "第"+i+"次计划任务:"+ DateUtil.format(start,"yyyy-MM-dd")+" "+patrolPlan.getStartTime()+ " 至 " +
                                DateUtil.format(start,"yyyy-MM-dd")+" "+ patrolPlan.getEndTime();
                        map = new HashMap<>();
                        map.put("title",str);
                        list.add(map);
                        i++;
                    }
                }
                start = DateUtils.addDays(start,1);
            }
        }else if("4".equals(patrolPlan.getPeriodType())){
            Date start = patrolPlan.getStartDate();
            Date end = patrolPlan.getEndDate();
            Date startWeekDate = null;
            Date endWeekDate = null;
            int i=1;
            while(!start.after(end)){
                int dayOfWeek = DateUtil.dayOfWeek(start);
                if(dayOfWeek==1){
                    dayOfWeek = 7;
                }else{
                    dayOfWeek = dayOfWeek-1;
                }
                if(patrolPlan.getStartWeek().equals(""+dayOfWeek)){
                    startWeekDate = start;
                    endWeekDate = DateUtil.offsetDay(start,(Integer.parseInt(patrolPlan.getEndWeek())-Integer.parseInt(patrolPlan.getStartWeek())));
                    if(endWeekDate.after(end)){
                        break;
                    }
                    String str = "第"+i+"次计划任务:"+ DateUtil.format(startWeekDate,"yyyy-MM-dd")+" "+patrolPlan.getStartTime()+ " 至 " +
                            DateUtil.format(endWeekDate,"yyyy-MM-dd")+" "+ patrolPlan.getEndTime();
                    map = new HashMap<>();
                    map.put("title",str);
                    list.add(map);
                    i++;
                }
                start = DateUtils.addDays(start,1);
            }
        }else if("5".equals(patrolPlan.getPeriodType())){
            Date start = patrolPlan.getStartDate();
            Date end = patrolPlan.getEndDate();
            Date startMonthDate = null;
            Date endMonthDate = null;
            int i=1;
            while(!start.after(end)){
                int dayOfMonth = DateUtil.dayOfMonth(start);
                if(patrolPlan.getStartDay().equals(dayOfMonth+"")){
                    startMonthDate = start;
                    endMonthDate = DateUtil.offsetDay(start,(Integer.parseInt(patrolPlan.getEndDay())-Integer.parseInt(patrolPlan.getStartDay())));
                    if(endMonthDate.after(DateUtil.endOfMonth(startMonthDate))){
                        endMonthDate = DateUtil.endOfMonth(startMonthDate);
                    }
                    if(endMonthDate.after(end)){
                        break;
                    }
                    String str = "第"+i+"次计划任务:"+ DateUtil.format(startMonthDate,"yyyy-MM-dd")+" "+patrolPlan.getStartTime()+ " 至 " +
                            DateUtil.format(endMonthDate,"yyyy-MM-dd")+" "+ patrolPlan.getEndTime();
                    map = new HashMap<>();
                    map.put("title",str);
                    list.add(map);
                    i++;
                    start = DateUtil.offsetMonth(start,1);
                    continue;
                }
                start = DateUtils.addDays(start,1);
            }
        } else if ("6".equals(patrolPlan.getPeriodType())) {
            List<SchoolJxz> jxzList = jxzService.selectSchoolJxzList(new SchoolJxz());
            Date start = patrolPlan.getStartDate();
            Date end = patrolPlan.getEndDate();
            int i=1;
            while(!start.after(end)){
                boolean flag = false;
                holi:for(SchoolJxz sj:jxzList){
                    if(sj.getStatus()==0){
                        continue holi;
                    }
                    if(DateUtil.format(sj.getRq(),"yyyy-MM-dd").equals(DateUtil.format(start,"yyyy-MM-dd"))){
                        flag = true;
                    }
                }
                if(flag){
                    String str = "第"+i+"次计划任务:"+ DateUtil.format(start,"yyyy-MM-dd")+" "+patrolPlan.getStartTime()+ " 至 " +
                            DateUtil.format(start,"yyyy-MM-dd")+" "+ patrolPlan.getEndTime();
                    map = new HashMap<>();
                    map.put("title",str);
                    list.add(map);
                    i++;
                }
                start = DateUtils.addDays(start,1);
            }
        }
        return AjaxResult.success(list);
    }
//    @Scheduled(cron = "0 45 9 * * ?")
    public void dealPlanStatus(){
        Date now = DateUtil.beginOfDay(new Date());
        //查询进行中的处理
        PatrolPlan query = new PatrolPlan();
        query.setStatus("2");
        List<PatrolPlan> list = patrolPlanService.selectPatrolPlanList(query);
        for(PatrolPlan patrolPlan:list){
            if(now.after(patrolPlan.getEndDate())){
                PatrolPlan pp = new PatrolPlan();
                pp.setId(patrolPlan.getId());
                pp.setStatus("3");
                patrolPlanMapper.updatePatrolPlan(pp);
            }
        }
        //查询未开始的处理
        query = new PatrolPlan();
        query.setStatus("1");
        list = patrolPlanService.selectPatrolPlanList(query);
        for(PatrolPlan patrolPlan:list){
            boolean flag = DateUtil.isSameDay(now,patrolPlan.getStartDate());
            if(flag){
                PatrolPlan pp = new PatrolPlan();
                pp.setId(patrolPlan.getId());
                pp.setStatus("2");
                patrolPlanMapper.updatePatrolPlan(pp);
            }
        }
    }
}
package com.chenrise.patrol.controller;
import cn.hutool.core.util.ZipUtil;
import cn.hutool.http.HttpUtil;
import cn.hutool.json.JSONObject;
import cn.hutool.json.JSONUtil;
import com.alibaba.nacos.shaded.com.google.common.net.HttpHeaders;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.StringUtils;

/**
 * 巡更点，用于记录巡更点相关信息Controller
 *
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2023-03-03
 */
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/points")
public class PatrolPointsController extends BaseController
{
    @Resource
    private IPatrolPointsService patrolPointsService;
    @Resource
    private RemoteJufeService jufeService;
    /**
     * 查询巡更点，用于记录巡更点相关信息列表
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("patrol:points:list")
    @GetMapping("/list")
    public TableDataInfo list(PatrolPoints patrolPoints)
    {
        startPage();
        List<PatrolPoints> list = patrolPointsService.selectPatrolPointsList(patrolPoints);
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    @GetMapping("/alllist")
    public TableDataInfo alllist(PatrolPoints patrolPoints)
    {
        if(patrolPoints.getParams().get("notInIds")!=null){
            patrolPoints.getParams().put("notInIds",String.valueOf(patrolPoints.getParams().get("notInIds")).split(","));
        }
        List<PatrolPoints> list = patrolPointsService.selectPatrolPointsList(patrolPoints);
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     * 导出巡更点，用于记录巡更点相关信息列表
     */
    @Log(title = "巡更点，用于记录巡更点相关信息", businessType = BusinessType.EXPORT)
    @PostMapping("/export")
    public void export(HttpServletResponse response, PatrolPoints patrolPoints)
    {
        List<PatrolPoints> list = patrolPointsService.selectPatrolPointsList(patrolPoints);
        ExcelUtil<PatrolPoints> util = new ExcelUtil<PatrolPoints>(PatrolPoints.class);
        util.exportExcel(response, list, "巡更点，用于记录巡更点相关信息数据");
    }
    /**
     * 获取巡更点，用于记录巡更点相关信息详细信息
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("patrol:points:query")
    @GetMapping(value = "/{id}")
    public AjaxResult getInfo(@PathVariable("id") Long id)
    {
        return success(patrolPointsService.selectPatrolPointsById(id));
    }
    /**
     * 新增巡更点，用于记录巡更点相关信息
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("patrol:points:add")
    @Log(title = "巡更点，用于记录巡更点相关信息", businessType = BusinessType.INSERT)
    @PostMapping
    public AjaxResult add(@RequestBody PatrolPoints patrolPoints) throws IOException {
        // 20251205 关闭获取定位功能
        patrolPoints.setGetLocation("N");
        return toAjax(patrolPointsService.insertPatrolPoints(patrolPoints));
    }
    /**
     * 修改巡更点，用于记录巡更点相关信息
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("patrol:points:edit")
    @Log(title = "巡更点，用于记录巡更点相关信息", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PutMapping
    public AjaxResult edit(@RequestBody PatrolPoints patrolPoints) throws IOException {
        // 20251205 关闭获取定位功能
        patrolPoints.setGetLocation("N");
        return toAjax(patrolPointsService.updatePatrolPoints(patrolPoints));
    }
    /**
     * 删除巡更点，用于记录巡更点相关信息
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("patrol:points:remove")
    @Log(title = "巡更点，用于记录巡更点相关信息", businessType = BusinessType.DELETE)
	@DeleteMapping("/{ids}")
    public AjaxResult remove(@PathVariable Long[] ids)
    {
        return toAjax(patrolPointsService.deletePatrolPointsByIds(ids));
    }
    /**
     * 下载点位二维码
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("patrol:points:export")
    @PostMapping(value = "/downloadImages")
    public void downloadImages(@RequestBody PatrolPoints patrolPoints,HttpServletResponse response) throws Exception {
        if(patrolPoints.getIds()!=null){
            patrolPoints.getParams().put("inIds",patrolPoints.getIds());
        }
        List<PatrolPoints> list = patrolPointsService.selectPatrolPointsList(patrolPoints);
        //设置返回响应头
        response.reset();
        response.setHeader("content-type", "application/octet-stream");
        response.setHeader("Access-Control-Expose-Headers", "Content-Disposition");
        response.setContentType("application/octet-stream");
        response.setHeader(HttpHeaders.CONTENT_DISPOSITION, "attachment; filename=download.zip");
        //调用单个文件的下载接口  拿到所有文件的流数组
        InputStream[] inputStreams = list.stream().filter(info -> StringUtils.isNotEmpty(info.getQrCodeUrl())&&info.getType().contains("1")).map(info -> new ByteArrayInputStream(ImageUtils.getImage(info.getQrCodeUrl()))).toArray(InputStream[]::new);
        //拿到所有文件名字的数组  因为名字可能重复我拼接了一个时间戳
        String[] strings = list.stream().filter(info -> StringUtils.isNotEmpty(info.getQrCodeUrl())).map(info ->info.getName()+".png").toArray(String[]::new);
        //调用Hutool 工具的压缩方法
        ZipUtil.zip(response.getOutputStream(), strings, inputStreams);
    }
    @GetMapping(value = "/getMapPoints/{searchKey}")
    public AjaxResult getInfo(@PathVariable("searchKey") String searchKey)
    {
        String url = "https://apis.map.qq.com/ws/place/v1/suggestion";
        Map<String,Object> params = new HashMap<>();
        params.put("region","吉林省");
        params.put("region_fix","1");
        params.put("keyword",searchKey);
        params.put("key","JOMBZ-EQUE3-HMO3L-3KQUS-EOGHS-TPFA4");
        String result = HttpUtil.get(url,params);
        JSONObject json = JSONUtil.parseObj(result);
        return success(json.get("data"));
    }
    @PostMapping(value = "/syncSchoolRoom")
    public AjaxResult syncSchoolRoom() throws IOException {
        patrolPointsService.syncSchoolRoom();
        return AjaxResult.success();
    }
}

/**
 * 巡更路线，用于记录巡更路线相关信息Controller
 *
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2023-03-03
 */
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/routes")
public class RoutesController extends BaseController
{
    @Resource
    private IRoutesService routesService;
    @Resource
    private IRoutePointsService routePointsService;
    @Resource
    private IPatrolPointsService pointsService;
    @Resource
    private PatrolPlanMapper planMapper;
    /**
     * 查询巡更路线，用于记录巡更路线相关信息列表
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("patrol:routes:list")
    @GetMapping("/list")
    public TableDataInfo list(Routes routes)
    {
        startPage();
        List<Routes> list = routesService.selectRoutesList(routes);
        list.stream().forEach(item->{
            List<PatrolPoints> points = new ArrayList<>();
            RoutePoints query = new RoutePoints();
            query.setRouteId(item.getId());
            List<RoutePoints> rpList = routePointsService.selectRoutePointsList(query);
            for(RoutePoints rp:rpList){
                PatrolPoints pp = pointsService.selectPatrolPointsById(rp.getPointId());
                pp.setSortNum(rp.getSortNum());
                points.add(pp);
            }
            item.setItems(points);
            Map map = new HashMap();
            map.put("routeId",item.getId());
           int num =  planMapper.checkInUse(map);
           if(num>0){
               item.getParams().put("inUse",true);
           }else{
               item.getParams().put("inUse",false);
           }
        });
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    @GetMapping("/alllist")
    public TableDataInfo alllist(Routes routes)
    {
        List<Routes> list = routesService.selectRoutesList(routes);
        list.stream().forEach(item->{
            List<PatrolPoints> points = new ArrayList<>();
            RoutePoints query = new RoutePoints();
            query.setRouteId(item.getId());
            List<RoutePoints> rpList = routePointsService.selectRoutePointsList(query);
            for(RoutePoints rp:rpList){
                PatrolPoints pp = pointsService.selectPatrolPointsById(rp.getPointId());
                pp.setSortNum(rp.getSortNum());
                points.add(pp);
            }
            item.setItems(points);
        });
        return getDataTable(list);
    }
    /**
     * 导出巡更路线，用于记录巡更路线相关信息列表
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("patrol:routes:export")
    @Log(title = "巡更路线，用于记录巡更路线相关信息", businessType = BusinessType.EXPORT)
    @PostMapping("/export")
    public void export(HttpServletResponse response, Routes routes)
    {
        List<Routes> list = routesService.selectRoutesList(routes);
        ExcelUtil<Routes> util = new ExcelUtil<Routes>(Routes.class);
        util.exportExcel(response, list, "巡更路线，用于记录巡更路线相关信息数据");
    }
    /**
     * 获取巡更路线，用于记录巡更路线相关信息详细信息
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("patrol:routes:query")
    @GetMapping(value = "/{id}")
    public AjaxResult getInfo(@PathVariable("id") Long id)
    {
        return success(routesService.selectRoutesById(id));
    }
    /**
     * 新增巡更路线，用于记录巡更路线相关信息
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("patrol:routes:add")
    @Log(title = "巡更路线，用于记录巡更路线相关信息", businessType = BusinessType.INSERT)
    @PostMapping
    public AjaxResult add(@RequestBody Routes routes)
    {
        return toAjax(routesService.insertRoutes(routes));
    }
    /**
     * 修改巡更路线，用于记录巡更路线相关信息
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("patrol:routes:edit")
    @Log(title = "巡更路线，用于记录巡更路线相关信息", businessType = BusinessType.UPDATE)
    @PutMapping
    public AjaxResult edit(@RequestBody Routes routes)
    {
        return toAjax(routesService.updateRoutes(routes));
    }
    /**
     * 删除巡更路线，用于记录巡更路线相关信息
     */
    @RequiresPermissions("patrol:routes:remove")
    @Log(title = "巡更路线，用于记录巡更路线相关信息", businessType = BusinessType.DELETE)
	@DeleteMapping("/{ids}")
    public AjaxResult remove(@PathVariable Long[] ids)
    {
        return toAjax(routesService.deleteRoutesByIds(ids));
    }
}

package com.chenrise.patrol.domain;
import com.chenrise.common.core.annotation.Dict;

/**
 * 巡检异常，用于记录巡检点的异常情况对象 patrol_abnormal
 *
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2023-03-03
 */
@Data
@ToString
public class Abnormal extends BaseEntity
{
    private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;
    /** 主键ID */
    private Long id;
    //1  点位异常（二维码和巡检卡丢失等）   2附近环境异常
    private String type;
    private Long jobId;
    /** 巡检点ID */
    private Long pointId;
    /** 巡检点名称 */
    @Excel(name = "巡检点名称")
    private String pointName;
    /** 位置描述 */
    @Excel(name = "位置描述")
    private String location;
    @Dict("patrol_fault_type")
    @Excel(name = "故障类型",readConverterExp = "1=巡更点丢失,2=巡更点无法识别")
    private String faultType;
    /** 异常类型 */
    @Excel(name = "异常类型",readConverterExp = "1=打架斗殴,2=电路异常,3=灵异事件")
    @Dict("patrol_abnormal_type")
    private String abnormalType;
    /** 情况说明 */
    @Excel(name = "情况说明")
    private String description;
    /** 现场图片 */
    private String pictureUrl;
    /** 处理状态 */
    @Excel(name = "处理状态",readConverterExp = "1=未处理,2=已处理")
    @Dict("patrol_process_status")
    private String processStatus;
    /** 删除标记，字典 sys_yes_no */
    private String delFlag;
    @Dict("patrol_result")
    private String result;
    @Excel(name = "巡检人员")
    private String createBy;
    @Excel(name = "上报时间",dateFormat = "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")
    @JsonFormat(pattern = "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")
    private Date createTime;
    private List<String> pictureList;
    private List<byte[]> picList;
    private Long userId;
    private String jobName;
    private Long [] ids;
}

package com.chenrise.patrol.domain;

 * @date 2023-03-03
 */

@ToString
public class PatrolGroups extends BaseEntity
{
    private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;
    /** 主键ID */
    private Long id;

    @Excel(name = "巡检组名称")
    private String groupName;
    /** 巡检组描述 */
    @Excel(name = "巡检组描述")
    private String description;
    /**
     * 巡检组成员
     * */
    private String groupMembers;
    /** 删除标记，字典 sys_yes_no */
    private String delFlag;
    List<SysUser> users;
}

package com.chenrise.patrol.domain;
import java.util.Date;
import java.util.List;
import com.chenrise.common.core.annotation.Dict;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.BaseEntity;
import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonFormat;
import com.chenrise.common.core.annotation.Excel;
import lombok.Data;
import lombok.ToString;
/**
 * 巡检任务对象 patrol_job
 *
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2023-03-03
 */
@Data
@ToString
public class PatrolJob extends BaseEntity
{
    private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;
    /** id */
    private Long id;
    /** 任务名称 */
    @Excel(name = "任务名称")
    private String name;
    /** 任务开始时间 */
    @JsonFormat(pattern = "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm")
    @Excel(name = "任务开始时间", width = 30, dateFormat = "yyyy-MM-dd  HH:mm" )
    private Date startTime;
    /** 任务结束时间 */
    @JsonFormat(pattern = "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm")
    @Excel(name = "任务结束时间", width = 30, dateFormat = "yyyy-MM-dd  HH:mm")
    private Date endTime;
    /** 实际开始时间 */
    @JsonFormat(pattern = "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm")
    @Excel(name = "实际开始时间", width = 30, dateFormat = "yyyy-MM-dd  HH:mm")
    private Date realStartTime;
    /** 实际结束时间 */
    @JsonFormat(pattern = "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm")
    @Excel(name = "实际结束时间", width = 30, dateFormat = "yyyy-MM-dd  HH:mm")
    private Date realEndTime;
    /** 巡检人员 */
//    @Excel(name = "巡检人员")
    private Long userId;
    /** 巡检人员姓名 */
    @Excel(name = "巡检人员姓名")
    private String userName;
    /** 巡检模式 字典patrol_mode */
    @Excel(name = "巡检模式")
    @Dict("patrol_mode")
    private String mode;
    /** 任务状态 字典patrol_job_status */
    @Excel(name = "任务状态")
    @Dict("patrol_job_status")
    private String status;
    /** 计划ID */
//    @Excel(name = "计划ID")
    private Long planId;
    private PatrolPlan plan;
    /**
     * 可接任务人员Ids
     * */
    private String userIds;
    private List<PatrolJobItem> items;
}
package com.chenrise.patrol.domain;
import java.util.Date;
import java.util.List;
import com.chenrise.common.core.annotation.Dict;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.BaseEntity;
import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonFormat;
import com.chenrise.common.core.annotation.Excel;
import lombok.Data;
import lombok.ToString;
/**
 * 巡检任务子表对象 patrol_job_item
 *
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2023-03-03
 */
@Data
@ToString
public class PatrolJobItem extends BaseEntity
{
    private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;
    /** ID */
    private Long id;
    /** 任务ID */
    private Long jobId;
    /** 点位ID */
    private Long pointId;
    /** 巡检点名称 */
    @Excel(name = "巡检点名称")
    private String pointName;
    /** 位置描述 */
    @Excel(name = "位置描述")
    private String location;
    /** 排序号 */
    private Long sortNum;
    /** 巡检结果 字典patrol_result */
    @Excel(name = "巡检结果",readConverterExp = "1=正常,2=异常")
    @Dict("patrol_result")
    private String result;
    /** 巡检时间 */
    @JsonFormat(pattern = "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm")
    @Excel(name = "巡检时间", width = 30, dateFormat = "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm")
    private Date arriveTime;
    /** 巡检人员 */
    private Long userId;
    /** 巡检人员 */
    @Excel(name = "巡检人员")
    private String userName;
    //1  点位异常（二维码和巡检卡丢失等）   2附近环境异常
    private String type;
    @Dict("patrol_fault_type")
    @Excel(name = "故障类型",readConverterExp = "1=巡更点丢失,2=巡更点无法识别")
    private String faultType;
    /** 情况说明 */
    @Excel(name = "情况说明")
    private String description;
    /** 现场图片 */
    private String pictureUrl;
    /** 处理状态 */
    @Excel(name = "处理状态",readConverterExp = "1=未处理,2=已处理")
    @Dict("patrol_process_status")
    private String processStatus;
    /** 处理人 */
    private String dealBy;
    /** 处理时间 */
    @JsonFormat(pattern = "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm")
    private Date dealTime;
    /** 处理备注 */
    private String dealRemark;
    //冗余字段
    private List<byte[]> picList;
    private List<PatrolJobItemInspect> itemInspects;
    //导出用
    @Excel(name="巡检项")
    private String inspectStr;
}

package com.chenrise.patrol.domain;
import java.util.Date;
import java.util.List;

/**
 * 巡检计划对象 patrol_plan
 *
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2023-03-03
 */
@Data
@ToString
public class PatrolPlan extends BaseEntity
{
    private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;
    /** 主键 */
    private Long id;
    /** 计划名称 */
    @Excel(name = "计划名称")
    private String name;
    /** 周期类型 字典patrol_period_type */
    @Excel(name = "周期类型 字典patrol_period_type")
    @Dict("patrol_period_type")
    private String periodType;
    /** 开始时间 */
    @Excel(name = "开始时间")
    private String startTime;
    /** 结束时间 */
    @Excel(name = "结束时间")
    private String endTime;
    /** 周开始时间（周期为每周用） */
    @Excel(name = "周开始时间", readConverterExp = "周=期为每周用")
    private String startWeek;
    /** 周结束时间（周期为每周用） */
    @Excel(name = "周结束时间", readConverterExp = "周=期为每周用")
    private String endWeek;
    /** 月开始（周期为月用） */
    @Excel(name = "月开始", readConverterExp = "周=期为月用")
    private String startDay;
    /** 月结束（周期为月用） */
    @Excel(name = "月结束", readConverterExp = "周=期为月用")
    private String endDay;
    /** 计划开始日期 */
    @JsonFormat(pattern = "yyyy-MM-dd")
    @Excel(name = "计划开始日期", width = 30, dateFormat = "yyyy-MM-dd")
    private Date startDate;
    /** 计划结束日期 */
    @JsonFormat(pattern = "yyyy-MM-dd")
    @Excel(name = "计划结束日期", width = 30, dateFormat = "yyyy-MM-dd")
    private Date endDate;
    /** 巡检组ID数组 */
    private String groupIds;
    /** 巡检人员ID数组 */
    private String userIds;
    /** -巡检路线ID数组 */
    private String routesIds;
    /** 巡检点ID数组 */
    private String pointIds;
    /** 巡检项 ids */
    private String inspectItemids;
    /** 巡检模式 字典patrol_mode */
    @Excel(name = "巡检模式 字典patrol_mode")
    @Dict("patrol_mode")
    private String mode;
    /** 计划状态 */
    @Excel(name = "计划状态")
    @Dict("patrol_plan_status")
    private String status;
    /** 删除标识 字典 sys_yes_no */
    private String delFlag;
    List<PatrolGroups> groups;
    List<SysUser> users;
    List<Routes> routes;
    List<PatrolPoints> points;
    List<PatrolPlanItem> items;
    List<PatrolInspectionItem> inspectionItems;
}

    private String status;

    private String routeName;

    private Long[] ids;
}

package com.chenrise.patrol.mapper;
import java.util.List;
import com.chenrise.patrol.domain.Abnormal;
/**
 * 巡更异常，用于记录巡更点的异常情况Mapper接口
 *
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2023-03-03
 */
public interface AbnormalMapper
{
    /**
     * 查询巡更异常，用于记录巡更点的异常情况
     *
     * @param id 巡更异常，用于记录巡更点的异常情况主键
     * @return 巡更异常，用于记录巡更点的异常情况
     */
    public Abnormal selectAbnormalById(Long id);
    /**
     * 查询巡更异常，用于记录巡更点的异常情况列表
     *
     * @param abnormal 巡更异常，用于记录巡更点的异常情况
     * @return 巡更异常，用于记录巡更点的异常情况集合
     */
    public List<Abnormal> list(Abnormal abnormal);
    /**
     * 新增巡更异常，用于记录巡更点的异常情况
     *
     * @param abnormal 巡更异常，用于记录巡更点的异常情况
     * @return 结果
     */
    public int insertAbnormal(Abnormal abnormal);
    /**
     * 修改巡更异常，用于记录巡更点的异常情况
     *
     * @param abnormal 巡更异常，用于记录巡更点的异常情况
     * @return 结果
     */
    public int updateAbnormal(Abnormal abnormal);
    /**
     * 删除巡更异常，用于记录巡更点的异常情况
     *
     * @param id 巡更异常，用于记录巡更点的异常情况主键
     * @return 结果
     */
    public int deleteAbnormalById(Long id);
    /**
     * 批量删除巡更异常，用于记录巡更点的异常情况
     *
     * @param ids 需要删除的数据主键集合
     * @return 结果
     */
    public int deleteAbnormalByIds(Long[] ids);
}
package com.chenrise.patrol.mapper;
import com.chenrise.patrol.domain.ApkSource;
import java.util.List;
/**
 * apk版本Mapper接口
 *
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2022-12-10
 */
public interface ApkSourceMapper
{
    /**
     * 查询apk版本
     *
     * @param id apk版本主键
     * @return apk版本
     */
    public ApkSource selectApkSourceById(Long id);
    /**
     * 查询apk版本列表
     *
     * @param apkSource apk版本
     * @return apk版本集合
     */
    public List<ApkSource> selectApkSourceList(ApkSource apkSource);
    /**
     * 新增apk版本
     *
     * @param apkSource apk版本
     * @return 结果
     */
    public int insertApkSource(ApkSource apkSource);
    /**
     * 修改apk版本
     *
     * @param apkSource apk版本
     * @return 结果
     */
    public int updateApkSource(ApkSource apkSource);
    /**
     * 删除apk版本
     *
     * @param id apk版本主键
     * @return 结果
     */
    public int deleteApkSourceById(Long id);
    /**
     * 批量删除apk版本
     *
     * @param ids 需要删除的数据主键集合
     * @return 结果
     */
    public int deleteApkSourceByIds(Long[] ids);
}
package com.chenrise.patrol.mapper;
import java.util.List;
import com.chenrise.patrol.domain.GroupUser;
/**
 * 巡检组和用户关联，用于记录巡检组和用户之间的关联关系Mapper接口
 *
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2023-03-03
 */
public interface GroupUserMapper
{
    /**
     * 查询巡检组和用户关联，用于记录巡检组和用户之间的关联关系
     *
     * @param id 巡检组和用户关联，用于记录巡检组和用户之间的关联关系主键
     * @return 巡检组和用户关联，用于记录巡检组和用户之间的关联关系
     */
    public GroupUser selectGroupUserById(Long id);
    /**
     * 查询巡检组和用户关联，用于记录巡检组和用户之间的关联关系列表
     *
     * @param groupUser 巡检组和用户关联，用于记录巡检组和用户之间的关联关系
     * @return 巡检组和用户关联，用于记录巡检组和用户之间的关联关系集合
     */
    public List<GroupUser> selectGroupUserList(GroupUser groupUser);
    /**
     * 新增巡检组和用户关联，用于记录巡检组和用户之间的关联关系
     *
     * @param groupUser 巡检组和用户关联，用于记录巡检组和用户之间的关联关系
     * @return 结果
     */
    public int insertGroupUser(GroupUser groupUser);
    /**
     * 修改巡更组和用户关联，用于记录巡更组和用户之间的关联关系
     *
     * @param groupUser 巡更组和用户关联，用于记录巡更组和用户之间的关联关系
     * @return 结果
     */
    public int updateGroupUser(GroupUser groupUser);
    /**
     * 删除巡更组和用户关联，用于记录巡更组和用户之间的关联关系
     *
     * @param id 巡更组和用户关联，用于记录巡更组和用户之间的关联关系主键
     * @return 结果
     */
    public int deleteGroupUserById(Long id);
    /**
     * 批量删除巡更组和用户关联，用于记录巡更组和用户之间的关联关系
     *
     * @param ids 需要删除的数据主键集合
     * @return 结果
     */
    public int deleteGroupUserByIds(Long[] ids);
    /**
     *
     * @Description:按巡更组删除
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2023/03/06
     * @param id
     * @return int
     */
    public int deleteGroupUserByGroupId(Long id);
}
package com.chenrise.patrol.mapper;
import java.util.List;
import com.chenrise.patrol.domain.HolidaySet;
/**
 * 节假日Mapper接口
 *
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2023-03-07
 */
public interface HolidaySetMapper
{
    /**

     * @return 结果
     */

     * @param pointId
     * @return int
     */
    public int checkPointInUse(Long pointId);
    /**
     *
     * @Description: 按名称查询是否存在
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2023/03/06
     * @param name
     * @return int
     */
    public int checkExist(@Param("name")String name,@Param("id")Long id);
}

package com.chenrise.patrol.service.impl;
import java.util.Date;
import java.util.List;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.DateUtils;
import com.chenrise.common.security.utils.SecurityUtils;
import com.chenrise.patrol.domain.PatrolJobItem;
import com.chenrise.patrol.domain.PatrolPoints;
import com.chenrise.patrol.mapper.PatrolJobItemMapper;
import com.chenrise.patrol.mapper.PatrolPointsMapper;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
import com.chenrise.patrol.mapper.AbnormalMapper;
import com.chenrise.patrol.domain.Abnormal;
import com.chenrise.patrol.service.IAbnormalService;
import javax.annotation.Resource;
/**
 * 巡检异常，用于记录巡检点的异常情况Service业务层处理
 *
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2023-03-03
 */
@Service
public class AbnormalServiceImpl implements IAbnormalService
{
    @Resource
    private AbnormalMapper abnormalMapper;
    @Resource
    private PatrolPointsMapper pointsMapper;
    @Resource
    private PatrolJobItemMapper jobItemMapper;
    /**
     * 查询巡检异常，用于记录巡检点的异常情况
     *
     * @param id 巡检异常，用于记录巡检点的异常情况主键
     * @return 巡检异常，用于记录巡检点的异常情况
     */
    @Override
    public Abnormal selectAbnormalById(Long id)
    {
        return abnormalMapper.selectAbnormalById(id);
    }
    /**
     * 查询巡检异常，用于记录巡检点的异常情况列表
     *
     * @param abnormal 巡检异常，用于记录巡检点的异常情况
     * @return 巡检异常，用于记录巡检点的异常情况
     */
    @Override
    public List<Abnormal> selectAbnormalList(Abnormal abnormal)
    {
        return abnormalMapper.list(abnormal);
    }
    /**
     * 新增巡检异常，用于记录巡检点的异常情况
     *
     * @param abnormal 巡检异常，用于记录巡检点的异常情况
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int insertAbnormal(Abnormal abnormal)
    {
        if(abnormal.getFaultType()!=null){
            PatrolPoints point = pointsMapper.selectPatrolPointsById(abnormal.getPointId());
            point.setStatus("2");
            pointsMapper.updatePatrolPoints(point);
        }
        abnormal.setCreateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        abnormal.setCreateBy(SecurityUtils.getLoginUser().getSysUser().getNickName());
        return abnormalMapper.insertAbnormal(abnormal);
    }
    /**
     * 修改巡更异常，用于记录巡更点的异常情况
     *
     * @param abnormal 巡更异常，用于记录巡更点的异常情况
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int updateAbnormal(Abnormal abnormal)
    {
        if(abnormal.getPointId()!=null&&abnormal.getProcessStatus()!=null){
            PatrolPoints point = pointsMapper.selectPatrolPointsById(abnormal.getPointId());
            point.setStatus("1");
            pointsMapper.updatePatrolPoints(point);
        }
        abnormal.setUpdateBy(SecurityUtils.getLoginUser().getSysUser().getNickName());
        abnormal.setUpdateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        return abnormalMapper.updateAbnormal(abnormal);
    }
    /**
     * 批量删除巡更异常，用于记录巡更点的异常情况
     *
     * @param ids 需要删除的巡更异常，用于记录巡更点的异常情况主键
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int deleteAbnormalByIds(Long[] ids)
    {
        return abnormalMapper.deleteAbnormalByIds(ids);
    }
    /**
     * 删除巡更异常，用于记录巡更点的异常情况信息
     *
     * @param id 巡更异常，用于记录巡更点的异常情况主键
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int deleteAbnormalById(Long id)
    {
        return abnormalMapper.deleteAbnormalById(id);
    }
}
package com.chenrise.patrol.service.impl;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.DateUtils;
import com.chenrise.patrol.domain.ApkSource;
import com.chenrise.patrol.mapper.ApkSourceMapper;
import com.chenrise.patrol.service.IApkSourceService;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
import javax.annotation.Resource;
import java.util.List;
/**
 * apk版本Service业务层处理
 *
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2022-12-10
 */
@Service
public class ApkSourceServiceImpl implements IApkSourceService
{
    @Resource
    private ApkSourceMapper apkSourceMapper;
    /**
     * 查询apk版本
     *
     * @param id apk版本主键
     * @return apk版本
     */
    @Override
    public ApkSource selectApkSourceById(Long id)
    {
        return apkSourceMapper.selectApkSourceById(id);
    }
    /**
     * 查询apk版本列表
     *
     * @param apkSource apk版本
     * @return apk版本
     */
    @Override
    public List<ApkSource> selectApkSourceList(ApkSource apkSource)
    {
        return apkSourceMapper.selectApkSourceList(apkSource);
    }
    /**
     * 新增apk版本
     *
     * @param apkSource apk版本
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int insertApkSource(ApkSource apkSource)
    {
        apkSource.setCreateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        return apkSourceMapper.insertApkSource(apkSource);
    }
    /**
     * 修改apk版本
     *
     * @param apkSource apk版本
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int updateApkSource(ApkSource apkSource)
    {
        return apkSourceMapper.updateApkSource(apkSource);
    }
    /**
     * 批量删除apk版本
     *
     * @param ids 需要删除的apk版本主键
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int deleteApkSourceByIds(Long[] ids)
    {
        return apkSourceMapper.deleteApkSourceByIds(ids);
    }
    /**
     * 删除apk版本信息
     *
     * @param id apk版本主键
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int deleteApkSourceById(Long id)
    {
        return apkSourceMapper.deleteApkSourceById(id);
    }
}

import com.chenrise.patrol.domain.*;
import com.chenrise.patrol.mapper.GroupUserMapper;
import com.chenrise.patrol.mapper.PatrolPlanMapper;
import com.chenrise.system.api.RemoteUserService;
import com.chenrise.system.api.domain.SysUser;
import com.chenrise.system.api.model.LoginUser;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
import com.chenrise.patrol.mapper.PatrolGroupsMapper;
import com.chenrise.patrol.service.IPatrolGroupsService;
import org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;
import javax.annotation.Resource;
/**
 * 巡更组，用于记录巡更组的基本信息Service业务层处理
 *
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2023-03-03
 */
@Service
public class PatrolGroupsServiceImpl implements IPatrolGroupsService
{
    @Resource
    private PatrolGroupsMapper patrolGroupsMapper;
    @Resource
    private GroupUserMapper groupUserMapper;
    @Resource
    private PatrolPlanServiceImpl planService;
    @Resource
    private RemoteUserService remoteUserService;
    @Resource
    private PatrolPlanMapper patrolPlanMapper;
    /**
     * 查询巡更组，用于记录巡更组的基本信息
     *
     * @param id 巡更组，用于记录巡更组的基本信息主键
     * @return 巡更组，用于记录巡更组的基本信息
     */
    @Override
    public PatrolGroups selectPatrolGroupsById(Long id)
    {
        return patrolGroupsMapper.selectPatrolGroupsById(id);
    }
    /**
     * 查询巡更组，用于记录巡更组的基本信息列表
     *
     * @param patrolGroups 巡更组，用于记录巡更组的基本信息
     * @return 巡更组，用于记录巡更组的基本信息
     */
    @Override
    public List<PatrolGroups> selectPatrolGroupsList(PatrolGroups patrolGroups)
    {
        return patrolGroupsMapper.selectPatrolGroupsList(patrolGroups);
    }
    /**
     * 新增巡更组，用于记录巡更组的基本信息
     *
     * @param patrolGroups 巡更组，用于记录巡更组的基本信息
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int insertPatrolGroups(PatrolGroups patrolGroups)
    {
        int check = patrolGroupsMapper.checkExist(patrolGroups.getGroupName(),null);
        if(check>0){
            throw new ServiceException("该巡更组名称已存在！");
        }
        if(patrolGroups.getUsers()!=null&&patrolGroups.getUsers().size()>0){
            List<String> names = patrolGroups.getUsers().stream().map(item->item.getNickName()).collect(Collectors.toList());
            String name = String.join(",",names);
            patrolGroups.setGroupMembers(name);
        }
        patrolGroups.setCreateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        patrolGroups.setCreateBy(SecurityUtils.getLoginUser().getSysUser().getNickName());
        int result = patrolGroupsMapper.insertPatrolGroups(patrolGroups);
        if(patrolGroups.getUsers()!=null&&patrolGroups.getUsers().size()>0){
            for(SysUser su:patrolGroups.getUsers()){
                GroupUser gu = new GroupUser();
                gu.setGroupId(patrolGroups.getId());
                gu.setUserId(su.getUserId());
                groupUserMapper.insertGroupUser(gu);
            }
        }
        return result;
    }
    /**
     * 修改巡更组，用于记录巡更组的基本信息
     *
     * @param patrolGroups 巡更组，用于记录巡更组的基本信息
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    @Transactional(rollbackFor = Exception.class)
    public int updatePatrolGroups(PatrolGroups patrolGroups)
    {
        int check = patrolGroupsMapper.checkExist(patrolGroups.getGroupName(),patrolGroups.getId());
        if(check>0){
            throw new ServiceException("巡更组名称已存在！");
        }
        if(patrolGroups.getUsers()!=null&&patrolGroups.getUsers().size()>0){
            List<String> names = patrolGroups.getUsers().stream().map(item->item.getNickName()).collect(Collectors.toList());
            String name = String.join(",",names);
            patrolGroups.setGroupMembers(name);
            GroupUser gu_query = new GroupUser();
            gu_query.setGroupId(patrolGroups.getId());
            List<GroupUser> rpList = groupUserMapper.selectGroupUserList(gu_query);
            //更改路线前 包含的点位
            List<String> groupUserIds = rpList.stream().map(item->item.getUserId().toString()).collect(Collectors.toList());
            PatrolPlan pp_query = new PatrolPlan();
            pp_query.getParams().put("groupId",patrolGroups.getId());
            List<PatrolPlan> plans = planService.selectPatrolPlanList(pp_query);
            if(CollUtil.isNotEmpty(plans)){
                for(PatrolPlan plan:plans){
                    //计划中包含的人员
                    List<String> userIds = Arrays.asList(plan.getUserIds().split(","));
                    //剔除 计划中路线更改前的点位 剩余的点
                    List<String> leftUserIds = userIds.stream().filter(item->!groupUserIds.contains(item)).collect(Collectors.toList());
                    //路线更新后的点位
                    List<String> newGroupUserIds = patrolGroups.getUsers().stream().map(item->item.getUserId().toString()).collect(Collectors.toList());
                    //计划中存入更新完路线点位
                    leftUserIds.addAll(newGroupUserIds);
                    List<SysUser> allUsers = new ArrayList<>();
                    leftUserIds.stream().forEach(id->{
                        AjaxResult res = remoteUserService.getUser(Long.parseLong(id));
                        allUsers.add(JSON.parseObject(JSONUtil.toJsonStr(res.get("data")), SysUser.class));
                    });
                    plan.setUsers(allUsers);
                    planService.updatePatrolPlan(plan);
                }
            }
        }
        patrolGroups.setCreateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        patrolGroups.setCreateBy(SecurityUtils.getLoginUser().getSysUser().getNickName());
        int result = patrolGroupsMapper.updatePatrolGroups(patrolGroups);
        if(patrolGroups.getUsers()!=null&&patrolGroups.getUsers().size()>0){
            groupUserMapper.deleteGroupUserByGroupId(patrolGroups.getId());
            for(SysUser su:patrolGroups.getUsers()){
                GroupUser gu = new GroupUser();
                gu.setGroupId(patrolGroups.getId());
                gu.setUserId(su.getUserId());
                groupUserMapper.insertGroupUser(gu);
            }
        }
        patrolGroups.setUpdateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        return result;
    }
    /**
     * 批量删除巡更组，用于记录巡更组的基本信息
     *
     * @param ids 需要删除的巡更组，用于记录巡更组的基本信息主键
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int deletePatrolGroupsByIds(Long[] ids)
    {
        for(Long id:ids){
            Map<String,Object> map = new HashMap<>();
            map.put("groupId",id);
            int  count = patrolPlanMapper.checkInUse(map);
            if(count>0){
                throw new ServiceException("该巡更组已被巡更计划占用，无法删除！");
            }
            groupUserMapper.deleteGroupUserByGroupId(id);
        }
        return patrolGroupsMapper.deletePatrolGroupsByIds(ids);
    }
    /**
     * 删除巡更组，用于记录巡更组的基本信息信息
     *
     * @param id 巡更组，用于记录巡更组的基本信息主键
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int deletePatrolGroupsById(Long id)
    {
        Map<String,Object> map = new HashMap<>();
        map.put("pointId",id);
        int  count = patrolPlanMapper.checkInUse(map);
        if(count>0){
            throw new ServiceException("该巡更组已被巡更计划占用，无法删除！");
        }
        groupUserMapper.deleteGroupUserByGroupId(id);
        return patrolGroupsMapper.deletePatrolGroupsById(id);
    }
}

package com.chenrise.patrol.service.impl;
import java.util.List;

package com.chenrise.patrol.service.impl;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.stream.Collectors;
import cn.hutool.core.date.DateField;
import cn.hutool.core.date.DateUtil;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.DateUtils;
import com.chenrise.common.security.utils.SecurityUtils;
import com.chenrise.patrol.domain.PatrolGroups;
import com.chenrise.patrol.domain.PatrolPlanItem;
import com.chenrise.patrol.domain.PatrolPoints;
import com.chenrise.patrol.mapper.PatrolPlanItemMapper;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
import com.chenrise.patrol.mapper.PatrolPlanMapper;
import com.chenrise.patrol.domain.PatrolPlan;
import com.chenrise.patrol.service.IPatrolPlanService;
import javax.annotation.Resource;
/**
 * 巡更计划Service业务层处理
 *
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2023-03-03
 */
@Service
public class PatrolPlanServiceImpl implements IPatrolPlanService
{
    @Resource
    private PatrolPlanMapper patrolPlanMapper;
    @Resource
    private PatrolPlanItemMapper planItemMapper;
    /**
     * 查询巡更计划
     *
     * @param id 巡更计划主键
     * @return 巡更计划
     */
    @Override
    public PatrolPlan selectPatrolPlanById(Long id)
    {
        return patrolPlanMapper.selectPatrolPlanById(id);
    }
    /**
     * 查询巡更计划列表
     *
     * @param patrolPlan 巡更计划
     * @return 巡更计划
     */
    @Override
    public List<PatrolPlan> selectPatrolPlanList(PatrolPlan patrolPlan)
    {
        return patrolPlanMapper.selectPatrolPlanList(patrolPlan);
    }
    /**
     * 新增巡更计划
     *
     * @param patrolPlan 巡更计划
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int insertPatrolPlan(PatrolPlan patrolPlan)
    {
        if(patrolPlan.getGroups()!=null&&patrolPlan.getGroups().size()>0){
            List<String> ids = patrolPlan.getGroups().stream().map(item->String.valueOf(item.getId())).collect(Collectors.toList());
            String groupIds = String.join(",",ids);
            patrolPlan.setGroupIds(groupIds);
        }
        if(patrolPlan.getUsers()!=null&&patrolPlan.getUsers().size()>0){
            List<String> ids = patrolPlan.getUsers().stream().map(item->String.valueOf(item.getUserId())).collect(Collectors.toList());
            String userIds = String.join(",",ids);
            patrolPlan.setUserIds(userIds);
        }
        if(patrolPlan.getRoutes()!=null&&patrolPlan.getRoutes().size()>0){
            List<String> ids = patrolPlan.getRoutes().stream().map(item->String.valueOf(item.getId())).collect(Collectors.toList());
            String routeIds = String.join(",",ids);
            patrolPlan.setRoutesIds(routeIds);
        }
        if(patrolPlan.getPoints()!=null&&patrolPlan.getPoints().size()>0){
            List<String> ids = patrolPlan.getPoints().stream().map(item->String.valueOf(item.getId())).collect(Collectors.toList());
            String pointIds = String.join(",",ids);
            patrolPlan.setPointIds(pointIds);
        }
        if(patrolPlan.getStartDate()!=null){
            patrolPlan.setStartDate(DateUtil.beginOfDay(patrolPlan.getStartDate()));
        }
        if(patrolPlan.getEndDate()!=null){
            patrolPlan.setEndDate(DateUtil.endOfDay(patrolPlan.getEndDate()).offset(DateField.MILLISECOND,-999));
        }
        patrolPlan.setStatus("1");
        patrolPlan.setCreateBy(SecurityUtils.getLoginUser().getSysUser().getNickName());
        patrolPlan.setCreateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        int index = patrolPlanMapper.insertPatrolPlan(patrolPlan);
        if(patrolPlan.getPoints()!=null&&patrolPlan.getPoints().size()>0){
            for(PatrolPoints pp : patrolPlan.getPoints()){
                PatrolPlanItem ppi = new PatrolPlanItem();
                ppi.setPointId(pp.getId());
                ppi.setPlanId(patrolPlan.getId());
                ppi.setSortNum(pp.getSortNum());
                planItemMapper.insertPatrolPlanItem(ppi);
            }
        }
        return index;
    }
    /**
     * 修改巡更计划
     *
     * @param patrolPlan 巡更计划
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int updatePatrolPlan(PatrolPlan patrolPlan)
    {
        patrolPlan.setUpdateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        patrolPlan.setUpdateBy(SecurityUtils.getLoginUser().getSysUser().getNickName());
        if(patrolPlan.getGroups()!=null&&patrolPlan.getGroups().size()>0){
            List<String> ids = patrolPlan.getGroups().stream().map(item->String.valueOf(item.getId())).collect(Collectors.toList());
            String groupIds = String.join(",",ids);
            patrolPlan.setGroupIds(groupIds);
        }
        if(patrolPlan.getUsers()!=null&&patrolPlan.getUsers().size()>0){
            List<String> ids = patrolPlan.getUsers().stream().map(item->String.valueOf(item.getUserId())).collect(Collectors.toList());
            String userIds = String.join(",",ids);
            patrolPlan.setUserIds(userIds);
        }
        if(patrolPlan.getRoutes()!=null&&patrolPlan.getRoutes().size()>0){
            List<String> ids = patrolPlan.getRoutes().stream().map(item->String.valueOf(item.getId())).collect(Collectors.toList());
            String routeIds = String.join(",",ids);
            patrolPlan.setRoutesIds(routeIds);
        }
        if(patrolPlan.getPoints()!=null&&patrolPlan.getPoints().size()>0){
            List<String> ids = patrolPlan.getPoints().stream().map(item->String.valueOf(item.getId())).collect(Collectors.toList());
            String pointIds = String.join(",",ids);
            patrolPlan.setPointIds(pointIds);
        }
        if(patrolPlan.getStartDate()!=null){
            patrolPlan.setStartDate(DateUtil.beginOfDay(patrolPlan.getStartDate()));
        }
        if(patrolPlan.getEndDate()!=null){
            patrolPlan.setEndDate(DateUtil.endOfDay(patrolPlan.getEndDate()).offset(DateField.MILLISECOND,-999));
        }
        int index = patrolPlanMapper.updatePatrolPlan(patrolPlan);
        if(patrolPlan.getPoints()!=null&&patrolPlan.getPoints().size()>0){
            planItemMapper.deleteItemByPlanId(patrolPlan.getId());
            for(PatrolPoints pp : patrolPlan.getPoints()){
                PatrolPlanItem ppi = new PatrolPlanItem();
                ppi.setPointId(pp.getId());
                ppi.setPlanId(patrolPlan.getId());
                ppi.setSortNum(pp.getSortNum());
                planItemMapper.insertPatrolPlanItem(ppi);
            }
        }
        return index;
    }
    /**
     * 批量删除巡更计划
     *
     * @param ids 需要删除的巡更计划主键
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int deletePatrolPlanByIds(Long[] ids)
    {
        return patrolPlanMapper.deletePatrolPlanByIds(ids);
    }
    /**
     * 删除巡更计划信息
     *
     * @param id 巡更计划主键
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int deletePatrolPlanById(Long id)
    {
        return patrolPlanMapper.deletePatrolPlanById(id);
    }
}
package com.chenrise.patrol.service.impl;
import cn.hutool.json.JSONObject;
import cn.hutool.json.JSONUtil;
import com.chenrise.common.core.domain.R;
import com.chenrise.common.core.exception.ServiceException;
import com.chenrise.common.core.utils.DateUtils;
import com.chenrise.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult;
import com.chenrise.common.security.utils.SecurityUtils;
import com.chenrise.patrol.domain.PatrolPoints;
import com.chenrise.patrol.mapper.PatrolPlanMapper;
import com.chenrise.patrol.mapper.PatrolPointsMapper;
import com.chenrise.patrol.mapper.RoutesMapper;
import com.chenrise.patrol.service.IPatrolPointsService;
import com.chenrise.patrol.util.QrCoder;
import com.chenrise.system.api.RemoteFileService;
import com.chenrise.system.api.RemoteJufeService;
import com.chenrise.system.api.domain.SchoolRoom;
import com.chenrise.system.api.domain.SysFile;
import org.springframework.mock.web.MockMultipartFile;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
import org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;
import org.springframework.web.multipart.MultipartFile;
import javax.annotation.Resource;
import javax.imageio.ImageIO;
import java.awt.image.BufferedImage;
import java.io.ByteArrayInputStream;
import java.io.ByteArrayOutputStream;
import java.io.IOException;
import java.io.InputStream;
import java.rmi.ServerException;
import java.util.HashMap;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
/**
 * 巡更点，用于记录巡更点相关信息Service业务层处理
 *
 * @author chenrise
 * @date 2023-03-03
 */
@Service
public class PatrolPointsServiceImpl implements IPatrolPointsService
{
    @Resource
    private PatrolPointsMapper patrolPointsMapper;
    @Resource
    private RoutesMapper routesMapper;
    @Resource
    private PatrolPlanMapper patrolPlanMapper;
    @Resource
    private RemoteFileService fileService;
    @Resource
    private RemoteJufeService jufeService;
    /**
     * 查询巡更点，用于记录巡更点相关信息
     *
     * @param id 巡更点，用于记录巡更点相关信息主键
     * @return 巡更点，用于记录巡更点相关信息
     */
    @Override
    public PatrolPoints selectPatrolPointsById(Long id)
    {
        return patrolPointsMapper.selectPatrolPointsById(id);
    }
    /**
     * @Description:按名称获取
        * @param name
     * @return: com.chenrise.patrol.domain.PatrolPoints
     * @Author: CJH
     * @Updator: CJH
     * @Date 2023/12/13 17:11
     */
    @Override
    public PatrolPoints selectPatrolPointsByName(String name)
    {
        return patrolPointsMapper.selectPatrolPointsByName(name);
    }
    /**
     * 查询巡更点，用于记录巡更点相关信息列表
     *
     * @param patrolPoints 巡更点，用于记录巡更点相关信息
     * @return 巡更点，用于记录巡更点相关信息
     */
    @Override
    public List<PatrolPoints> selectPatrolPointsList(PatrolPoints patrolPoints)
    {
        return patrolPointsMapper.list(patrolPoints);
    }
    /**
     * 新增巡更点，用于记录巡更点相关信息
     *
     * @param patrolPoints 巡更点，用于记录巡更点相关信息
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    @Transactional(rollbackFor = Exception.class)
    public int insertPatrolPoints(PatrolPoints patrolPoints) throws IOException {
        int check = patrolPointsMapper.checkExist(patrolPoints.getName(),null);
        if(check>0){
            throw new ServiceException("该巡更点名称已存在！");
        }
        patrolPoints.setCreateBy(SecurityUtils.getLoginUser().getSysUser().getNickName());
        patrolPoints.setCreateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        if(!patrolPoints.getType().contains("2")){
            patrolPoints.setNfcId("");
        }
        int index = patrolPointsMapper.insertPatrolPoints(patrolPoints);
        if(patrolPoints.getType().contains("1")){
            BufferedImage image = QrCoder.createQrCode(null, patrolPoints.getName(), patrolPoints.getId()+"", patrolPoints.getLocation());
            //创建一个ByteArrayOutputStream
            ByteArrayOutputStream os = new ByteArrayOutputStream();
            //把BufferedImage写入ByteArrayOutputStream
            ImageIO.write(image, "png", os);
            //ByteArrayOutputStream转成InputStream
            InputStream input = new ByteArrayInputStream(os.toByteArray());
            //InputStream转成MultipartFile
            MultipartFile file =new MockMultipartFile("file", "file.png", "text/plain", input);
            R<SysFile> r = fileService.upload(file);
            if(r.getCode()!=200){
                throw new ServerException("生成失败！");
            }
            SysFile file1 = r.getData();
            patrolPoints.setQrCodeUrl(file1.getUrl());
            patrolPointsMapper.updatePatrolPoints(patrolPoints);
        }
        return index;
    }
    /**
     * 修改巡更点，用于记录巡更点相关信息
     *
     * @param patrolPoints 巡更点，用于记录巡更点相关信息
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int updatePatrolPoints(PatrolPoints patrolPoints) throws IOException {
        int check = patrolPointsMapper.checkExist(patrolPoints.getName(),patrolPoints.getId());
        if(check>0){
            throw new ServiceException("该巡更点名称已存在！");
        }
        patrolPoints.setUpdateBy(SecurityUtils.getLoginUser().getSysUser().getNickName());
        patrolPoints.setUpdateTime(DateUtils.getNowDate());
        if(patrolPoints.getType().contains("1")){
            BufferedImage image = QrCoder.createQrCode(null, patrolPoints.getName(), patrolPoints.getId()+"", patrolPoints.getLocation());
            //创建一个ByteArrayOutputStream
            ByteArrayOutputStream os = new ByteArrayOutputStream();
            //把BufferedImage写入ByteArrayOutputStream
            ImageIO.write(image, "png", os);
            //ByteArrayOutputStream转成InputStream
            InputStream input = new ByteArrayInputStream(os.toByteArray());
            //InputStream转成MultipartFile
            MultipartFile file =new MockMultipartFile("file", "file.png", "text/plain", input);
            R<SysFile> r = fileService.upload(file);
            if(r.getCode()!=200){
                throw new ServerException("生成失败！");
            }
            SysFile file1 = r.getData();
            patrolPoints.setQrCodeUrl(file1.getUrl());
        }
        if(!patrolPoints.getType().contains("2")){
            patrolPoints.setNfcId("");
        }
        return patrolPointsMapper.updatePatrolPoints(patrolPoints);
    }
    /**
     * 批量删除巡更点，用于记录巡更点相关信息
     *
     * @param ids 需要删除的巡更点，用于记录巡更点相关信息主键
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int deletePatrolPointsByIds(Long[] ids)
    {
        for(Long id:ids){
            int count = routesMapper.checkPointInUse(id);
            if(count>0){
                throw new ServiceException("该巡更点已被计划或者路线占用，无法删除！");
            }
            Map<String,Object> map = new HashMap<>();
            map.put("pointId",id);
            count = patrolPlanMapper.checkInUse(map);
            if(count>0){
                throw new ServiceException("该巡更点已被计划或者路线占用，无法删除！");
            }
        }
        return patrolPointsMapper.deletePatrolPointsByIds(ids);
    }
    /**
     * 删除巡更点，用于记录巡更点相关信息信息
     *
     * @param id 巡更点，用于记录巡更点相关信息主键
     * @return 结果
     */
    @Override
    public int deletePatrolPointsById(Long id)
    {
        return patrolPointsMapper.deletePatrolPointsById(id);
    }
    /**
     *
     * @Description:按NFC卡ID 取巡更点
     * @Author: chengjihong
     * @Date: 2023/03/16
     * @param nfcId
     * @return {@link PatrolPoints }
     */
    public PatrolPoints selectPointsByNFCId(String nfcId) {
        return patrolPointsMapper.selectPointsByNFCId(nfcId);
    }
    /**
     * @Description:同步教室作为巡更点
     */
    public void syncSchoolRoom() throws IOException {
        AjaxResult result = jufeService.listRoomOnly();
        JSONObject json = JSONUtil.parseObj(result);
        List<SchoolRoom> list = JSONUtil.toList(json.getStr("rows"),SchoolRoom.class);
        for(SchoolRoom sr:list){
            PatrolPoints pp = patrolPointsMapper.selectPointsByRoomId(sr.getRoomId()+"");
            if(pp == null){
                pp = new PatrolPoints();
            }
            pp.setName(sr.getRoomCode());
            pp.setLocation(sr.getRoomName());
            pp.setStatus("1");
            pp.setGetLocation("N");
            pp.setType("1");
            pp.setDelFlag("N");
            if(pp.getId()==null){
                insertPatrolPoints(pp);
            }else {
                updatePatrolPoints(pp);
            }
        }
    }
}
package com.chenrise.patrol.service.impl;
import java.util.List;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
import com.chenrise.patrol.mapper.RoutePointsMapper;
import com.chenrise.patrol.domain.RoutePoints;
